Here is a thorough analysis of the MaxmaHere project after the "oh-my-pi" backend migration.

---

## 1. Project Overview

**MaxmaHere** (`D:\Maxma\MaxmaHere`) is a local-first AI Agent desktop client, currently at **v2.6.6**. The major iteration you mentioned was the complete replacement of the LangGraph-based agent backend with **oh-my-pi** (a Bun/TypeScript agent engine). LangGraph has been fully removed from the runtime path.

**One-line summary**: Maxma = oh-my-pi's frontend. All agent reasoning is now handled by oh-my-pi; the Python backend handles frontend communication, auth, session persistence, and memory.

---

## 2. Top-Level Directory Structure

```
MaxmaHere/
  .agents/          -- Agent configuration
  .env / .env.example
  .git/
  .github/          -- CI/CD
  .gitignore
  .impeccable/
  agent/            -- Python-side auxiliary modules (prompts, context, autonomy, memory, lifecycle)
  anthropic_skills/ -- Skill packages
  api/              -- FastAPI backend (routes, providers, pi_bridge, middleware, security, db)
  app_paths.py      -- Centralized path constants
  build/            -- Build scripts
  bun-sidecar/      -- oh-my-pi engine (Bun/TypeScript sidecar process)
  checkpoints.sqlite / -shm / -wal
  config/           -- Personas, stickers, settings
  desktop/          -- Tauri desktop shell
  dev_docs/         -- Developer documentation
  dist/ / dist-portable/
  docs/
  images/
  knowledge_base/
  logs/
  macros/
  main.py           -- Entry point
  maxma_platform/   -- Platform utilities (event dedup, keep-alive, etc.)
  memory/           -- 4-layer memory system (LTM, episodic, semantic, fact store)
  mypy.ini
  pyproject.toml
  requirements.txt / requirements-lock.txt
  resources/
  scripts/
  setup.py / setup.bat / setup-dev.bat / start.bat
  skills-lock.json
  tests/
  tools/            -- Native Python tools (sticker, sub_agent, MCP, path_security, etc.)
  uploads/
  vector_db/
  version.py        -- Single source of truth: v2.6.6
  web/              -- Vue 3 frontend SPA
```

---

## 3. Architecture (Post oh-my-pi Migration)

```
Maxma Frontend (Vue 3 + Tauri)  <-- brand UI preserved
    |  WebSocket (23 event types)
Python Backend (FastAPI)        <-- HTTP/WS routing, auth, session management
    |  JSON-RPC 2.0 (stdio)
oh-my-pi Engine (Bun)           <-- Agent reasoning loop, 40+ providers, 32 built-in tools
    |  MCP protocol
External Tools (Amap, etc.)     <-- MCP servers
```

Key architectural facts:
- **LangGraph is completely removed.** `agent/graph.py` and its dependencies (planner/executor/coordinator/verifier) were deleted on 2026-07-15. The `langgraph` package is commented out in `pyproject.toml` (lines 11-13).
- Python backend communicates with oh-my-pi via **JSON-RPC 2.0 over stdio** through a Bun subprocess.
- 13 Maxma custom tools (weather, holidays, Todoist x10, tarot) are now native TypeScript `AgentTool` implementations running inside oh-my-pi.

---

## 4. The oh-my-pi Integration (bun-sidecar/)

**`D:\Maxma\MaxmaHere\bun-sidecar\package.json`** -- Dependencies:
- `@oh-my-pi/pi-coding-agent`: 16.5.2
- `@oh-my-pi/pi-agent-core`: 16.5.2
- `@oh-my-pi/pi-ai`: 16.5.2

**`D:\Maxma\MaxmaHere\bun-sidecar\src\session-bridge.ts`** -- The core JSON-RPC server. Exposes 5 RPC methods:
- `create_session({model, system_prompt, cwd, tools})` -> `{session_id}`
- `prompt({session_id, message})` -> `{ok: true}` (fire-and-forget)
- `cancel({session_id})` -> `{ok: true}`
- `destroy_session({session_id})` -> `{ok: true}`
- `undo({session_id, steps})` -> `{removed}`

It maps oh-my-pi events (`message_update`, `tool_execution_start/end`, `message_end`, `agent_end`) to Maxma's WS protocol events (`token`, `tool_start`, `tool_end`, `tool_error`, `answer`, `done`, `error`).

**`D:\Maxma\MaxmaHere\bun-sidecar\src\rpc-types.ts`** -- Full TypeScript type definitions for the JSON-RPC protocol.

**`D:\Maxma\MaxmaHere\bun-sidecar\src\tools\index.ts`** -- Registers 3 custom tools inline:
1. `get_current_weather` -- weather via uapis API with wttr.in fallback
2. `holiday_calendar` -- Chinese holidays via uapis API with GitHub fallback
3. `tarot` -- Tarot card reading (22 cards, 1-3 draws)

**`D:\Maxma\MaxmaHere\bun-sidecar\src\tools\todoist.ts`** -- 10 Todoist REST API v2 tools: `todo_add`, `todo_list`, `todo_complete`, `todo_uncomplete`, `todo_delete`, `todo_update`, `todo_query`, `todo_list_projects`, `todo_list_sections`, `todo_list_labels`.

---

## 5. Python-to-oh-my-pi Bridge (api/pi_bridge/)

Located at `D:\Maxma\MaxmaHere\api\pi_bridge\`:

| File | Role |
|------|------|
| `sidecar_manager.py` | Manages Bun subprocess lifecycle (start/stop/restart). Launches `bun run src/session-bridge.ts`. Windows-aware: WM_CLOSE then force-kill after 5s timeout. |
| `rpc_client.py` | JSON-RPC 2.0 client over stdio. Supports request/response (`call()`) and server-pushed event notifications (`on()`). Background read loop dispatches events to registered handlers. |
| `session_adapter.py` | `SessionMap` -- SQLite-backed bidirectional mapping between Maxma session IDs and sidecar session IDs. Stores up to 20 recent conversation turns per session for restart recovery. DB at `~/.maxma/session_map.db`. |
| `security_adapter.py` | Path security / MaxmaBlocker integration |
| `approval_adapter.py` | Approval level mapping |
| `ws_event_mapper.py` | Event validation and enrichment (validates against 10 known event types) |

---

## 6. agent/ Directory Structure

```
agent/
  __init__.py              (empty)
  audit_log.py
  circuit_breaker.py
  context_manager.py       -- Episodic memory retrieval + commit
  delegation_scope.py
  error_recovery.py
  hooks.py                 -- Event hook manager
  lifecycle/
    disposable.py          -- IDisposable pattern (ported from Halo)
    __init__.py
  memory/
    working_memory.py      -- Working memory push injection (from Halo)
    __init__.py
  model_routing.py         -- Declarative model routing
  permission_policy.py
  persona_loader.py        -- SOUL.md / USER.md loading
  project_scanner.py
  prompts.py               -- build_system_prompt()
  runtime_context.py
  think_path.py            -- ThinkPath execution preferences
  autonomy/
    completion_signal.py   -- report_to_user signal detection
    diagnostics.py
    escalation.py          -- Escalation run boundary
    governance.py          -- Autonomy schedule store
    runner.py
    scheduler.py           -- Exponential backoff scheduler
    scout.py               -- Scout schedule runner
    __init__.py
  persona/                 -- (directory, likely persona configs)
```

Notable: The old `agent/graph.py` (LangGraph) has been **deleted**. The agent/ directory now contains only auxiliary modules -- prompts, context management, autonomy/scheduling, lifecycle management, and memory helpers. The actual agent reasoning loop lives entirely in oh-my-pi.

---

## 7. Main Entry Point (main.py)

`D:\Maxma\MaxmaHere\main.py`:
1. Sets up logging
2. Handles `--rotate-token` CLI flag
3. Starts a **parent process watchdog** (Windows-specific) -- monitors the Tauri main process via `MAXMA_PARENT_PID` env var or `os.getppid()`, kills the sidecar if the parent exits (prevents orphan processes)
4. Ensures user data directories exist
5. Creates the FastAPI app via `create_app()`
6. Runs uvicorn on `127.0.0.1` with configurable port

---

## 8. Chat Route -- The Agent Execution Path

`D:\Maxma\MaxmaHere\api\routes\chat.py` is the single WebSocket endpoint (`/ws/chat/{session_id}`). The key function `_stream_turn_sidecar()`:
1. Ensures sidecar is running (`mgr.start()`)
2. Looks up or creates a sidecar session via `SessionMap`
3. On session creation, builds a system prompt that includes persona/rules/skills, and restores up to 5 recent turns from `SessionMap` for context
4. Performs episodic memory retrieval (ChromaDB) and prepends relevant memories to the user message
5. Registers event handlers for `token`, `tool_start`, `tool_end`, `tool_error`, `answer`, `done`
6. Calls `client.call("prompt", {...})` and waits for the `done` event (600s timeout)
7. Returns the final answer for post-processing (stickers, memory projection, LTM)

---

## 9. Dependencies (pyproject.toml)

Key observations from `D:\Maxma\MaxmaHere\pyproject.toml`:
- **langgraph is commented out** (lines 11-13): `# "langgraph>=0.2.0"` and `# "langgraph-checkpoint-sqlite>=2.0.0"` with note: "langgraph has been replaced by oh-my-pi"
- **todoist and uapi SDKs removed** from Python deps (line 17): "rewritten as TypeScript AgentTool, executed by oh-my-pi sidecar"
- Still present: `langchain`, `langchain-openai`, `langchain-mcp-adapters` (used for non-agent features like prompt construction)
- RAG subsystem: `chromadb`, `onnxruntime`, `transformers` (no torch, ~600MB smaller)
- New addition: `json-repair>=0.1.0` -- streaming repair pipeline for broken tool JSON from domestic models
- Note: `requirements.txt` still contains langgraph packages (compiled from a previous state), but `pyproject.toml` is the source of truth

---

## 11. Key Documentation Files

| File | Purpose |
|------|---------|
| `README.md` | Project overview, architecture diagram, quick start, tech stack, tool catalog |
| `HANDOFF.md` | Comprehensive onboarding doc for new developers/agents. Documents the oh-my-pi migration status, remaining TODOs, and common pitfalls |
| `CLAUDE.md` | Git workflow conventions, PR flow, commit standards |
| `DESIGN.md` | Full design system spec (monochrome palette, typography, elevation, components) |
| `PRODUCT.md` | Product definition, user personas, brand personality, design principles |
| `FIND.md` | Cross-project exploration report -- what Maxma borrowed from Halo, OpenHanako, and Awesome LLM Apps (18 designs landed, 4 partial, 19 not yet adopted) |
| `SECURITY.md` | Security mechanisms |

---

## 12. Summary of the oh-my-pi Migration

The migration (completed 2026-07-15 per HANDOFF.md) involved 12 tasks across 8 stages:

1. **Spike** -- Technical validation of oh-my-pi as sidecar
2. **Bridge** -- `SidecarManager` + `JsonRpcClient` + WS event mapping + `chat.py` integration
3. **Tools** -- Event mapping fixes + E2E tests
4. **Complete** -- Provider migration + `SessionMap` persistence + memory/persona integration
5. **Cleanup** -- Removed 5 legacy `build_agent` call sites
6. **LangGraph deletion** -- Removed `agent/graph.py` and all LangGraph dependencies
7. **Adversarial review** -- Bug fixes (tool_error handling, restart context recovery)
8. **Tool rewrite** -- 13 native TypeScript AgentTools (weather/holiday/todoist x10/tarot)
9. **Code cleanup** -- Deleted old Python `tools/` directory, MCP bridge, `pi_adapter.py`

**Remaining items** (per HANDOFF.md):
- `checkpointer_factory.py` MemorySaver fallback (low priority)
- `memory/narrative.py` LTM CRUD agent skips when no langgraph (low priority)
- Full session restart recovery via oh-my-pi JSONL loading (medium -- currently uses SessionMap with last 5 turns)
- Production packaging needs updating to include Bun sidecar in installer (medium)
```

7	支持 **40+ LLM 提供商**、**oh-my-pi 32 个内置工具** + **Maxma 自定义工具**、**MCP 外接工具**、**长期记忆**、**人设系统**，覆盖编码、文件操作、网络搜索、Todo 管理、天气查询、地图服务、娱乐等场景。
8	
9	---
10	
11	## 架构
12	
13	```
14	Maxma 前端 (Vue 3 + Tauri)  ← 品牌 UI 完全保留
15	    ↕ WebSocket (23 个事件类型)
16	Python 后端 (FastAPI)        ← HTTP/WS 路由、认证、Session 管理
17	    ↕ JSON-RPC (stdio)
18	oh-my-pi 引擎 (Bun)          ← Agent 推理循环、40+ Provider、32 内置工具
19	    ↕ MCP 协议
20	外部工具 (高德地图等)         ← MCP 服务器
21	```
22	
23	- **LangGraph 已完全移除**。Agent 推理层由 oh-my-pi 提供。
24	- Python 后端负责前端通信、用户认证、Session 持久化。
25	- 13 个 Maxma 自定义工具（天气、节假日、Todoist、塔罗牌）以原生 TypeScript AgentTool 运行在 oh-my-pi 侧。
26	
27	---
28	
29	## 前置要求
30	
31	| 工具 | 版本 | 用途 |
32	|------|------|------|
33	| Python | 3.11+ | 后端运行时 |
34	| Bun | 1.3+ | oh-my-pi sidecar 运行时 |
35	| Node.js | 18+ | 前端构建 |
36	| Rust | 最新 | Tauri 桌面打包 |
37	| VS Build Tools | 2022 | Windows 编译 |
38	
39	---
40	
41	## 快速开始
42	
43	```bash
44	# 1. 克隆仓库
45	git clone https://github.com/Libai-88/Maxma.git
46	cd Maxma
47	
48	# 2. 初始化 Python 环境
49	python -m venv .venv
50	.venv\Scripts\pip install -r requirements.txt
51	
52	# 3. 安装 oh-my-pi sidecar 依赖
53	cd bun-sidecar
54	bun install
55	cd ..
56	
57	# 4. 配置 LLM Provider
58	# 编辑 config/providers.yaml 或通过前端设置页面添加
59	
60	# 5a. 浏览器模式（快速开发）
61	start.bat
62	
63	# 5b. Tauri 桌面 dev 模式
64	build\run-desktop-dev.bat
65	```
66	
67	---
68	
69	## 技术栈
70	
71	| 层 | 技术 |
72	|---|---|
73	| Agent 引擎 | oh-my-pi v16.5.2 (Bun/TypeScript) |
74	| LLM 提供商 | 40+（Anthropic, OpenAI, DeepSeek, Google, 本地Ollama...） |
75	| 后端 | FastAPI + uvicorn (Python) |
76	| 前端 | Vue 3 + Vite 5 + Pinia + TypeScript |
77	| 桌面壳 | Tauri 2 + Rust |
78	| 会话持久化 | oh-my-pi JSONL + SQLite（SessionMap） |
79	| 内存/向量 | ONNX Runtime + ChromaDB |
80	| 打包 | PyInstaller (后端) + Tauri NSIS (桌面) |
81	
82	---
83	
84	## 项目结构
85	
86	```
87	MaxmaHere/
88	├── bun-sidecar/            ← oh-my-pi 引擎
89	│   └── src/
90	│       ├── session-bridge.ts  ← JSON-RPC 服务器（核心）
91	│       ├── rpc-types.ts       ← 协议类型定义
92	│       └── tools/             ← 13 个原生 AgentTool（天气/Todoist/塔罗等）
93	├── api/
94	│   ├── pi_bridge/           ← Python ↔ oh-my-pi 桥接层
95	│   │   ├── sidecar_manager.py ← Bun 进程生命周期管理
96	│   │   ├── rpc_client.py      ← JSON-RPC 2.0 客户端
97	│   │   ├── session_adapter.py ← SessionMap 持久化映射
98	│   │   ├── security_adapter.py← 路径安全/MaxmaBlocker
99	│   │   ├── approval_adapter.py← 审批级别映射
100	│   │   └── ws_event_mapper.py ← 事件校验与包装
101	│   ├── routes/              ← FastAPI 路由
102	│   └── providers/           ← LLM Provider 管理
103	├── web/                     ← Vue 3 前端 SPA
104	├── config/                  ← 人设(personas/)、贴纸(stickers/)
105	├── agent/                   ← Python 端辅助模块（prompts、context_manager 等）
106	├── memory/                  ← 记忆系统
107	├── desktop/                 ← Tauri 桌面壳
108	└── build/                   ← 构建脚本
109	```
110	
111	---
112	
113	## 核心功能
114	
115	### 工具系统
116	
117	oh-my-pi 提供 32 个内置工具 + 13 个 Maxma 自定义工具：
118	
119	| 类型 | 工具 | 由谁提供 |
120	|------|------|----------|
121	| **文件** | read, write, edit, glob, grep | oh-my-pi 内置 |
122	| **代码** | bash, eval(py/js/rb), debug, lsp | oh-my-pi 内置 |
123	| **网络** | web_search, browser, fetch | oh-my-pi 内置 |
124	| **版本控制** | gh (GitHub) | oh-my-pi 内置 |
125	| **子任务** | task (DAG 编排) | oh-my-pi 内置 |
126	| **交互** | ask | oh-my-pi 内置 |
127	| **记忆** | recall, reflect, retain, memory_edit | oh-my-pi 内置 |
128	| **天气** | get_current_weather | Maxma 自定义 |
129	| **节假日** | holiday_calendar | Maxma 自定义 |
130	| **待办** | todo_add/list/complete 等 10 个 | Maxma 自定义 |
131	| **娱乐** | tarot | Maxma 自定义 |
132	| **地图** | 高德地图（周边搜索/路线规划等） | 通过 MCP 接入 |
133	
134	### Skills 技能
135	
136	Skills 是存放在 `anthropic_skills/` 目录下的独立技能包。oh-my-pi 会在适当时机自动识别并调用这些技能扩展能力边界。
137	
138	### MCP 外接工具
139	
140	通过 MCP（Model Context Protocol）接入外部工具，oh-my-pi 原生支持自动发现和连接 MCP 服务器。
141	
142	### 长期记忆
143	
144	Maxma 自动记录事实和对话历史，通过 ChromaDB 检索注入到 agent 上下文中。
145	
146	### 人设系统
147	
148	| 文件 | 用途 |
149	|------|------|
150	| `SOUL.md` | AI 的人设、性格、说话风格 |
151	| `USER.md` | 你的基本信息和偏好 |
152	| `AGENTS.md` | AI 的工具使用策略等行为规则 |
153	| `memory.yaml` | AI 自动维护的长期记忆 |
154	
155	---
156	
157	## 安全机制
158	
159	- **路径白名单**：限制 AI 可读写的文件目录
160	- **MaxmaBlocker**：`config/.maxma_blocker` 标记文件阻断敏感目录
161	- **Python 执行确认**：每会话可切换"检查"或"自动"模式
162	
163	---
164	
165	## 开发
166	
167	```bash
168	# 后端测试
169	pytest -q
170	
171	# Sidecar 测试
172	python api/pi_bridge/test_integration.py
173	python api/pi_bridge/test_tools_e2e.py
174	python api/pi_bridge/test_session_map.py
175	
176	# 前端
177	cd web && npm run dev
178	```
179	
180	---
181	
182	## License
183	
184	MIT
185	
```

**Output:**

```json
1	# MaxmaHere 交接文档
2	
3	> 写给后续开发者：本文档描述项目当前的真实状态。
4	
5	---
6	
7	## 一、Maxma 是什么
8	
9	MaxmaHere 是一个**本地优先的 AI 工作站**，以 oh-my-pi 为 Agent 引擎，Vue 3 为前端，Tauri 为桌面壳。
10	
11	**核心设计**：Maxma = oh-my-pi 的前端。所有 Agent 推理由 oh-my-pi 提供，Maxma 负责品牌 UI/UX、用户管理、路由和安全策略。
12	
13	### 技术栈
14	
15	| 层 | 技术 | 版本 |
16	|---|---|---|
17	| Agent 引擎 | oh-my-pi (Bun/TypeScript) | v16.5.2 |
18	| LLM 提供商 | 40+（Anthropic, OpenAI, DeepSeek, 本地 Ollama...） | — |
19	| 后端 | FastAPI + uvicorn (Python) | >= 0.110 |
20	| 前端 | Vue 3 + Vite 5 + Pinia + TypeScript | Vue ^3.4 |
21	| 桌面壳 | Tauri 2 + Rust | v2.6.6 |
22	| 会话持久化 | oh-my-pi JSONL + SQLite（SessionMap） | — |
23	| 内存/向量 | ChromaDB + ONNX Runtime | paraphrase-multilingual |
24	| Python | >= 3.11 | 隔离 .venv |
25	
26	### 目录结构
27	
28	```
29	MaxmaHere/
30	├── bun-sidecar/                ← oh-my-pi 引擎（Bun sidecar）
31	│   └── src/
32	│       ├── session-bridge.ts   ← JSON-RPC 服务器：封装 createAgentSession
33	│       ├── rpc-types.ts        ← 协议类型定义
34	│       └── tools/              ← 13 个原生 AgentTool
35	├── api/
36	│   ├── pi_bridge/              ← Python ↔ oh-my-pi 桥接层
37	│   │   ├── sidecar_manager.py  ← Bun 进程生命周期
38	│   │   ├── rpc_client.py       ← JSON-RPC 2.0 客户端
39	│   │   ├── session_adapter.py  ← SessionMap 持久化映射
40	│   │   ├── ws_event_mapper.py  ← 事件校验/包装
41	│   │   ├── security_adapter.py ← 路径安全/MaxmaBlocker
42	│   │   └── approval_adapter.py ← 审批级别映射
43	│   ├── routes/
44	│   │   └── chat.py             ← WS 端点，唯一 agent 执行路径（oh-my-pi）
45	│   └── providers/              ← LLM Provider 管理
46	├── web/                        ← Vue 3 前端
47	├── config/                     ← 人设、贴纸
48	├── agent/                      ← Python 辅助（prompts, context_manager）
49	├── memory/                     ← 记忆系统
50	└── desktop/                    ← Tauri 桌面壳
51	```
52	
53	### 架构要点
54	
55	1. **Agent 引擎**：oh-my-pi（Bun 进程）执行所有 agent 推理循环。Python 端通过 JSON-RPC over stdio 与之通信。
56	2. **LangGraph 已完全移除**：`agent/graph.py` 及其依赖（planner/executor/coordinator/verifier）已于 2026-07-15 全部删除。`langgraph` 包已从环境卸载。
57	3. **工具系统**：oh-my-pi 的 32 个内置工具（bash/read/write/edit/gh/task 等）+ 13 个 Maxma 自定义 TypeScript AgentTool（天气/节假日/Todoist ×10/塔罗牌），直接注册在 `createAgentSession` 的 `customTools` 选项中。
58	4. **记忆系统**：4 层记忆仍在，但通过 oh-my-pi 的 `transformContext` hook 注入。
59	5. **人设系统**：SOUL.md/USER.md/AGENTS.md 通过 `build_system_prompt()` 生成 system prompt 传给 oh-my-pi。
60	
61	---
62	
63	## 二、已完成的工作
64	
65	### 2026-07-15 — oh-my-pi 全面迁移（12 个任务）
66	
67	| 阶段 | 任务 | 状态 |
68	|---|---|---|
69	| **0. Spike** | 技术验证：oh-my-pi 作为 sidecar 运行 | ✅ |
70	| **1. Bridge** | SidecarManager + JsonRpcClient + WS 映射 + chat.py 集成 | ✅ |
71	| **2. Tools** | 事件映射修复 + pi_adapter.py + E2E 测试 | ✅ |
72	| **3. Complete** | Provider 迁移 + SessionMap + 记忆/人格对接 | ✅ |
73	| **善后** | 清理 5 个遗留 `build_agent` 调用 | ✅ |
74	| **善后** | 删除 agent/graph.py + LangGraph 依赖 | ✅ |
75	| **善后** | 对抗式审查 + Bug 修复（tool_error/重启上下文恢复） | ✅ |
76	| **工具重写** | 13 个原生 TypeScript AgentTool（weather/holiday/todoist ×10/tarot） | ✅ |
77	| **代码清理** | 删除旧 Python tools/ 目录、MCP 桥接、pi_adapter.py | ✅ |
78	
79	### 遗留待办
80	
81	| 事项 | 优先级 | 说明 |
82	|---|---|---|
83	| `api/checkpointer_factory.py` 中的 MemorySaver 回退 | 低 | 已用 try/except 保护，`langgraph` 卸载后自动降级为 None |
84	| `memory/narrative.py` 中的 LTM CRUD agent | 低 | 无 langgraph 时跳过 CRUD agent，LTM 摘要仍正常工作 |
85	| Session 重启完整恢复（加载 oh-my-pi JSONL） | 中 | 当前使用 SessionMap 存储最近 5 轮对话作为上下文注入 |
86	| 打包构建需更新（Bun sidecar 纳入安装包） | 中 | 当前 dev 模式可用，生产打包需更新 PyInstaller spec |
87	
88	---
89	
90	## 三、关键配置
91	
92	### 环境变量
93	
94	| 变量 | 用途 | 必需 |
95	|---|---|---|
96	| `OPENAI_API_KEY` | 默认 LLM Provider | 至少配置一个 |
97	| `TODOIST_API_TOKEN` | Todoist 工具 | 否 |
98	| `AMAP_API_KEY` | 高德地图 MCP | 否 |
99	| `UAPIS_API_KEY` | 天气/节假日 API | 否 |
100	
101	### 切换 LangGraph 回退（不推荐）
102	
103	部分端点（`sessions.py` undo）备有 LangGraph 回退路径，由 `try: from agent.graph import build_agent` 保护。要启用需：
104	1. `pip install langgraph langgraph-checkpoint-sqlite`
105	2. 删除 `api/routes/sessions.py` 中 undo 函数体的 try/except 保护
106	
107	---
108	
109	## 四、常见坑
110	
111	- **缩进混合**：该项目历史原因存在 tab/spaces 混用。编辑文件后请检查。
112	- **sidecar 启动顺序**：`SidecarManager.start()` 是幂等的，但首次调用会启动 Bun 进程（耗时 ~0.5s）。应用启动时 `app.state.sidecar_manager` 仅初始化实例，不启动进程。
113	- **MCP 工具**：高德地图等外部工具通过 MCP 接入，需用户在前端配置 MCP 服务器地址。
114	
```

#### Tool: Read

> Read: `D:\Maxma\MaxmaHere\CLAUDE.md`

**Output:**

```json
1	# MaxmaHere
2	
3	## 更新动态发布流程
4	
5	每次合并 PR 或发布版本后，Claude Code 应根据以下规则评估是否添加系统更新动态：
6	
7	1. **评估标准**：仅当 PR 属于以下类型时值得加入新闻
8	   - `feat` — 新增用户可见的功能、页面、能力（如湾区计划、万花筒计划）
9	   - `enhance` — 对现有功能有重大增强或用户体验提升
10	   - `refactor` — 影响用户视觉或交互的重构（如 UI 重设计）
11	   - 以下类型通常**不值得**加入：纯 `fix`（非关键修复）、`chore`、`docs`、内部重构
12	2. **添加方式**：打开 `api/data/news.yaml`，在 `news` 列表的**最前面**插入一条新条目
13	   ```yaml
14	   - id: "简短-kebab-标识"
15	     title: "更新标题（中文，15字以内）"
16	     description: "更新内容描述，1-3句话概括变更内容和用户收益"
17	     type: "feat"       # feat | enhance | fix | refactor | docs
18	     date: "2026-05-30"  # ISO 日期 YYYY-MM-DD
19	     tags: ["标签1", "标签2"]
20	     version: "v1.3.0"   # 有版本号时填写，否则留空
21	     pr_number: 42       # 有 PR 编号时填写，否则留空
22	   ```
23	3. **提交流程**：`git add api/data/news.yaml && git commit -m "docs: 添加更新动态 <title>"` → 通过常规 PR 流程合入 main
24	
25	## 提交规范
26	
27	每次创建 git commit 前，必须先阅读 `dev_docs/git-conventions.md`，确保 commit message 和分支命名符合规范。
28	
29	## Git PR 工作流（Skill）
30	
31	完整流程：开分支 → commit → push → PR → merge → 回 main。
32	
33	方式一（一键脚本）：
34	```bash
35	./scripts/git-pr-flow.sh <branch-name> "<commit-msg>" ["<pr-title>"] ["<pr-body-file>"]
36	```
37	
38	方式二（手动步骤，Claude Code 每次应遵循此顺序）：
39	1. `git checkout -b <type>/<short-desc>`
40	2. `git add <files> && git commit -m "<msg>"`
41	3. `git push -u origin <branch>`
42	4. `gh pr create --title "<title>" --body "<body>"`
43	5. `gh pr merge <branch> --squash --delete-branch`
44	6. `git checkout main && git pull origin main`
45	
46	依赖：`gh` (GitHub CLI) 需已登录。
47	
48	### 长期分支
49	
50	`feat/kep` — KEP 试验性功能分支，合并后不删除，PR 合入时不加 `--delete-branch`。
51	定期 rebase 到 latest main：
52	```bash
53	git checkout feat/kep && git rebase origin/main && git push --force-with-lease
54	```
55	
```

88	
89	# Design System: MaxmaHere
90	
91	## 1. Overview
92	
93	**Creative North Star: "The Workbench"**
94	
95	MaxmaHere is a workbench. In the center sits the conversation — the piece being crafted. Around it, arranged with intention, sit the tools: session management, provider configuration, memory inspection, environmental controls. The workbench is clean and organized, every tool has its place, and nothing distracts from the work itself.
96	
97	The design is a deliberate **restrained monochrome** system: black, white, and grays only. The absence of color is the point — it keeps the eye on the content, not the chrome. Black (`--accent: #000000`) serves as the sole accent, used sparingly for primary actions, interactive elements, and wayfinding. The palette is inspired by precision instruments and well-organized workshops: functional, tactile, and quietly confident.
98	
99	**This system explicitly rejects:** SaaS dashboard clichés (colored side-stripe borders, gradient accents, glassmorphism), generic AI-chat clones (rounded pill inputs, pastel bubbles, avatar-heavy layouts), and any decorative flourish that competes with the conversation.
100	
101	### Key Characteristics:
102	- Monochrome palette (chroma 0) with black as the single accent
103	- Clean, bordered components with generous whitespace
104	- Tactile interactions — buttons have clear hover and active transformations
105	- Content-forward layout; UI chrome recedes unless needed
106	- Dark-on-light for readability; no dark mode by default
107	- System-adaptive font stack with full CJK support
108	
109	## 2. Colors
110	
111	A restrained monochrome palette. Every surface, border, and text color stays on the gray axis (chroma 0). The sole exception is `status-error` (`#ef4444`) and `status-warn` (`#f59e0b`), used exclusively for functional signaling.
112	
113	### Primary
114	- **Pure Black** (`#000000`): The only accent color. Used for primary buttons, active navigation states, link text, scroll markers, and status indicators. Its rarity is the point — black draws attention because almost nothing else does.
115	
116	### Neutral
117	- **Crisp White** (`#ffffff`): Main application background (`--bg-primary`), card surfaces (`--bg-card`), and user message bubbles. The dominant surface color.
118	- **Cloud Gray** (`#f9fafb`): Sidebar background, secondary surfaces, hover state backgrounds (`--bg-secondary`). The subtlest depth cue.
119	- **Ink** (`#1f2937`, gray-800): Body text (`--text-primary`). Near-black for comfortable reading, softer than pure black.
120	- **Mist Gray** (`#6b7280`, gray-500): Secondary text, labels, descriptive information (`--text-secondary`). For metadata and hints.
121	- **Silver Gray** (`#9ca3af`, gray-400): Tertiary text, placeholder text (`--text-tertiary`). The most muted legible gray.
122	- **Line Gray** (`#e5e7eb`, gray-200): Borders, dividers, section separators (`--border`). Thin, unobtrusive.
123	- **Pewter** (`#b9b9b9`): Light accent, running-state borders on tool bubbles (`--accent-light`).
124	
125	### Status
126	- **Alert Red** (`#ef4444`): Error states, destructive actions, error banners.
127	- **Amber** (`#f59e0b`): Warning states, private-mode indicators, auto-approve indicators.
128	
129	### Named Rules
130	**The One Voice Rule.** Black is the single accent. No secondary accent color competes with it. Status colors (red, amber) appear only for their functional purpose and never as decoration.
131	
132	**The Gray Gradient Rule.** The neutral ramp (white → cloud → line → silver → mist → ink) covers exactly six stops. Each stop has a distinct role. No mid-tone grays are added for "texture" or "atmosphere."
133	
134	## 3. Typography
135	
136	**Body Font:** System UI stack — `-apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', 'PingFang SC', 'Hiragino Sans GB', 'Microsoft YaHei', sans-serif`
137	**Code Font:** `'SF Mono', 'Consolas', monospace`
138	
139	**Character:** A single humanist sans-serif stack adapted for bilingual content (English + CJK). The pairing is the OS's own native type — familiar, fast-loading, and guaranteed to render well in Chinese. No custom fonts, no web font overhead. The confidence comes from clarity, not typographic novelty.
140	
141	### Hierarchy
142	- **Body** (400 weight, 15px, 1.6 line-height): Default application text. Navigation items, labels, descriptions, tool content. Max line length is unconstrained by design but components self-limit via max-width on chat and content areas.
143	- **Message** (400 weight, 16px, 1.6 line-height): Chat conversation text. Slightly larger than body for comfortable reading. Always rendered in markdown.
144	- **Code / Mono** (400 weight, 13px): Inline code, code blocks, version labels, timestamps, monospace data.
145	- **Label** (600 weight, 11px, 0.5px letter-spacing, uppercase): Section headers in sidebar, popup headers, metadata labels. Always uppercase for wayfinding.
146	- **Headings (in Markdown)** (600 weight, 1.5em/1.3em/1.15em/1em/0.9em/0.85em, 1.3 line-height): Only appear in rendered markdown content. Not used in UI chrome.
147	
148	### Named Rules
149	**The No-Webfont Rule.** All type is system-native. Zero font downloads, zero FOIT, zero layout shift from type loading. The application loads and renders instantly regardless of network.
150	
151	**The Size-On-Demand Rule.** Font sizes are not a modular scale. Components pick the size that fits their information density. Chat messages are 16px for readability; sidebar items are 14px for density; labels are 11px for metadata. No fixed ratio binds them.
152	
153	## 4. Elevation
154	
155	A **layered shadow system**. Depth is conveyed exclusively through box-shadows, never through tonal background shifts or color overlays (the sidebar's background blur is the single intentional exception). Shadows are subtle — low opacity, warm-tinted black — and increase in spread as the elevation grows.
156	
157	### Shadow Vocabulary
158	- **Ambient Glow** (`--shadow-xs`: `0 1px 3px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.04)`): The lightest touch. Used for hairline seperation of grouped elements.
159	- **Surface Soft** (`--shadow-soft`: `0 8px 24px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.06)`): Large-area glow under elevated surfaces like the chat input.
160	- **Card Rest** (`--shadow-sm`: `0 1px 4px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.06)`): Default card elevation. Tool bubbles, provider cards, empty-state cards.
161	- **Card Elevated** (`--shadow-md`: `0 2px 8px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.08)`): Active/hover card states, message bubbles.
162	- **Dropdown Lift** (`--shadow-lg`: `0 4px 16px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.12)`): Settings popup, drop-down menus, hover cards, context menus.
163	- **Modal Float** (`--shadow-xl`: `0 6px 28px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.18)`): Constify cards, heavy floating elements, confirmation dialogs.
164	
165	### Named Rules
166	**The Flat-By-Default Rule.** Surfaces are flat at rest. Shadows appear only as a response to state (hover, focus, elevation) or to distinguish layered chrome (dropdowns, popups). A card at rest uses `shadow-sm` as its resting elevation, not zero — the subtle separation is the baseline, not an effect.
167	
168	**The One-Blur Exception.** The sidebar uses a blurred background image with a white overlay (`#ffffffd3`). This is the only decorative blur in the system. It adds texture without breaking the monochrome discipline. No other surface uses backdrop-filter.
169	
170	## 5. Components
171	
172	### Buttons
173	- **Shape:** Gently rounded corners (6px radius). The send button is an exception — circular (34×34px, 50% radius).
174	- **Primary (`--accent` black bg):** For primary actions ("前往模型设置", "+ 添加提供商", confirm actions). Black background (`--accent`), white text, 10px 24px padding. Hover reduces opacity to 85% — no color shift, no shadow addition. The black is the statement.
175	- **Ghost (`transparent` bg):** For secondary/inline actions. Transparent background, `--text-secondary` text, 1px solid `--border` on hover reveals the hit area. Active: `--bg-secondary` background.
176	- **Circle Send (`--accent` bg, 50% radius):** Chat send button. 34×34px. Black bg, white icon. Hover: scale 1.08, subtle shadow, background shifts to blue (`#1d4ed8`) — the one chromatic exception in the system, signaling "send to the outside world."
177	- **Stop Circle (`#ef4444` red bg, 50% radius):** Stop streaming. Red background, white icon. Hover darkens to `#dc2626`.
178	
179	### Inputs / Fields
180	- **Style:** Clean bordered fields. 1px solid `--border`, `--bg-primary` background, 6px radius. Internal padding: 8px 12px. Font inherited from body (15px).
181	- **Focus:** Border shifts to `--accent` (black). No glow, no ring — just a crisp black outline. The least decorative focus treatment that meets the visibility bar.
182	- **Placeholder:** `--text-tertiary` (#9ca3af). Left-aligned, standard weight.
183	- **Textarea (Chat Input):** Transparent background inside a bordered container (20px radius pill-like shape). The container has `--shadow-soft` at rest and gains a focus ring (`0 0 0 1px color-mix(in srgb, var(--accent) 10%, transparent)`) when focused.
184	- **Error / Disabled:** No dedicated error style. Disabled inputs use 0.4 opacity. Validation is handled via context (inline messages), not field-border color shifts.
185	
186	### Navigation (Sidebar)
187	- **Container:** 220px wide (`--bg-secondary`), right border (`--border`). Can collapse to 58px icon-only mode.
188	- **Items:** 14px font, 8px 12px padding, 10px radius. Default: `--text-secondary` text on transparent bg.
189	- **Hover:** `--bg-card` background, `--text-primary` text.
190	- **Active:** `--bg-card` background, `--accent` (black) text, `font-weight: 600`.
191	- **Collapsed transition:** Width, padding, label visibility — all animated with 0.25s ease. Labels slide left and fade; icons center.
192	- **Settings area:** Pinned to the bottom via `margin-top: auto`. Opens a popup with `--shadow-lg`, `--bg-card` bg, 10px radius.
193	
194	### Chat Messages (Bubbles)
195	- **Style:** Both user and assistant bubbles share: max-width 72%, 10px 16px padding, 14px border-radius, 16px font, `--shadow-md` elevation.
196	- **User bubble:** White (`--user-bubble` = `--bg-card`), 1px solid `rgba(0,0,0,0.2)`. Bottom-right corner reduced to 4px (asymmetric to denote origin).
197	- **Assistant bubble:** `--bg-card` background, no border. Bottom-left corner reduced to 4px.
198	- **Ref chips:** Small pill labels below the bubble text for file references, tool calls, cited sources.
199	
200	### Chips / Tags
201	- **File tags:** Pill shape (`border-radius: 100px`), `--bg-secondary` background, 1px `--border` border, 11px font. Source badge inside: 9px uppercase pill with a tinted accent background. Removable via × button.
202	- **Model tags (Providers):** Small inline pills, `--bg-secondary` on dark, or transparent on white. 12px font, 4px radius.
203	- **Sub-badge (Session):** Tiny label (9px, 600 weight), border, 3px radius. `--text-secondary` on `--bg-secondary`.
204	
205	### Cards / Containers
206	- **Tool bubbles:** 1px `--border` border, 10px radius, `--bg-card` background, `--shadow-sm` at rest. Collapsible header + body. Running state: `--accent-light` border.
207	- **Provider cards:** Full-width cards in a stacked layout. Headers with label + toggle switch, URL display, model tag list, action buttons at bottom.
208	- **Settings popup:** `position: fixed` overlay, 10px radius, `--shadow-lg`, 6px internal padding. Small header (11px uppercase) and divider-separated items.
209	- **Hover cards:** Used in sidebar for session details. `position: fixed`, 8px radius, `--shadow-lg`, `--bg-card` background. Appear on mouse hover with 0.15s fade-in transition.
210	
211	### Toggle / Switch
212	- **Private mode & Auto-approve toggles:** Inline button toggle, 62px min-width, 26px height, 1px `--border` border, 6px radius. Inactive: transparent with a black dot indicator. Active: amber border+background tint, amber text+dot.
213	- **Provider enable toggle:** Circle switch, styled per card. Active state: black fill.
214	
215	## 6. Do's and Don'ts
216	
217	### Do:
218	- **Do** use black (`--accent: #000000`) as the single accent color. It is the only voice for primary actions, active states, and wayfinding.
219	- **Do** use the neutral ramp consistently: white for surfaces, cloud-gray for secondary backgrounds, ink for body text, mist-gray for labels, silver-gray for placeholders.
220	- **Do** keep buttons tactile — hover effects (scale, opacity shift, background fill) signal interactivity clearly.
221	- **Do** use asymmetric corner radii on chat bubbles (one flat corner) to distinguish speaker origin.
222	- **Do** use the shadow vocabulary by elevation role: card-rest → shadow-sm, popup → shadow-lg, modal → shadow-xl.
223	- **Do** collapse sidebar items gracefully — labels slide and fade, icons center. A single 0.25s ease curve ties the whole collapse animation.
224	- **Do** use the system font stack. No custom fonts, no web font loading.
225	
226	### Don't:
227	- **Don't** use colored accents beyond black. No blue links, no green success banners, no purple branding. (Exception: red for errors, amber for warnings — functional only.)
228	- **Don't** use side-stripe borders (`border-left`/`border-right` at >1px as a colored accent). The system uses full borders or nothing.
229	- **Don't** use gradient text (`background-clip: text`) for emphasis. Use weight or size instead.
230	- **Don't** use glassmorphism (backdrop-filter blur on cards) as a default. The sidebar's background blur is the system's only decorative blur.
231	- **Don't** copy ChatGPT/Claude chat UI patterns — no pastel bubble colors, no rounded-rectangle avatar placements, no pill-shaped input bars with gradient send buttons.
232	- **Don't** use SaaS dashboard templates: no metric cards with big numbers + small labels, no icon+heading+text card grids, no colored left border accents.
233	- **Don't** add dark mode unless deliberately designed. The current system is light-mode only; dark would require rebalancing the entire neutral ramp.
234	- **Don't** animate layout properties (width, height, top, left). Animate transform and opacity only.
235	- **Don't** use numbered section markers (01/02/03) as decorative scaffolding. Numbers earn their place only when the content is an actual sequence.
236	- **Don't** use tiny uppercase tracked labels above every section ("ABOUT", "PROCESS", "PRICING"). One as a deliberate system is voice; on every section it's AI grammar.
237	
```

#### Tool: Read

> Read: `D:\Maxma\MaxmaHere\PRODUCT.md`

**Output:**

```json
1	# MaxmaHere
2	
3	## Register
4	
5	product
6	
7	## Users
8	
9	**普通用户** — 使用 AI 助手的日常用户，有一定技术背景但不一定是开发者。他们在个人电脑上使用 MaxmaHere 完成信息查询、内容生成、任务规划等日常工作。使用场景多为深夜或私人时间，追求流畅、美观、不折腾的 AI 对话体验。
10	
11	## Product Purpose
12	
13	MaxmaHere 是一个多 LLM 提供商支持的 ReAct AI Agent 桌面客户端。它让用户能够：
14	- 与 AI 进行自由对话，调用多种工具（天气、待办、文件操作、网页搜索等）
15	- 在多个 LLM 提供商之间灵活切换（DeepSeek、OpenAI、Qwen 等）
16	- 管理 AI 的长期记忆和个性设定
17	- 通过插槽技能（Skill）体系扩展 AI 能力
18	
19	成功标准：用户打开就能用，配置一次就忘掉配置这件事。
20	
21	## Brand Personality
22	
23	**现代 · 专业 · 温暖**
24	
25	- **现代** — 简洁、留白、克制。界面不喧宾夺主，让对话内容成为主角。
26	- **专业** — 功能完整，信息层次清晰。每个配置面板都精心组织，不暴露不必要的复杂度给普通用户。
27	- **温暖** — 在克制的黑白基底上，通过暖色点缀（琥珀色、暖灰）传递人味。不是冷冰冰的工具，而是有温度的助手。
28	
29	## Anti-references
30	
31	- **不要 SaaS 模板感** — 不采用典型 SaaS Dashboard 的大白卡 + 品牌色左边条 + 渐变背景模板。避免「企业后台」既视感。
32	- **不要 AI 克隆界面** — 不追随 ChatGPT/Claude 的 chat UI 范式。保持自己的视觉识别度。
33	
34	## Design Principles
35	
36	1. **对话即界面** — 聊天窗口是产品的核心，所有 UI 决策围绕让对话更流畅、更沉浸来展开。配置和工具是配角，不干扰主流程。
37	2. **克制中的温度** — 黑白基底保持专业克制，暖色点缀赋予个性。不为装饰而装饰，每个设计决策服务于可用性或情感传达。
38	3. **渐进式复杂度** — 面向普通用户，但保留高级功能。在界面中隐藏不必要的复杂度，让新手觉得简单，老手觉得够用。
39	4. **本地优先** — 桌面客户端，配置和记忆都在本地。界面应传达「私有、安全、属于你」的感觉。
40	
41	## Accessibility & Inclusion
42	
43	基本可用即可。确保文本清晰可读，交互元素有视觉反馈。不刻意追求 WCAG 合规，但避免明显的可用性障碍。
44	
```

#### Tool: Read

> Read: `D:\Maxma\MaxmaHere\main.py`

**Output:**

```json
1	"""MaxmaHere — LangGraph ReAct AI Agent Web 入口。"""
2	
3	import os
4	import sys
5	import threading
6	import time
7	
8	import uvicorn
9	from version import __version__
10	
11	from api.logging_config import setup_logging
12	from api.server import create_app
13	from app_paths import ensure_data_dirs
14	from config.settings import get_settings
15	from memory.user_init import ensure_all
16	
17	
18	def _start_parent_watchdog():
19	    """启动父进程监控守护线程。
20	
21	    当 Tauri 主进程（maxma-here.exe）退出时，sidecar 可能成为孤儿进程
22	    （Job Object 在某些场景下可能失效，如主进程已在其他 Job 中）。
23	    此守护线程每 2 秒检查 Tauri 主进程是否存活，若已退出则立即终止 sidecar。
24	
25	    这是 Job Object 机制的兜底方案，确保 sidecar 不会在主进程退出后继续运行。
26	
27	    监控目标优先级：
28	      1. MAXMA_PARENT_PID 环境变量（Tauri 主进程 PID，由 main.rs 注入）
29	      2. os.getppid()（直接父进程，开发模式下即为启动本进程的 shell/IDE）
30	
31	    注意：PyInstaller onefile 模式下 os.getppid() 返回的是 bootloader PID
32	    而非 Tauri 主进程。若仅监控 bootloader，当 Job Object 失效且 Tauri
33	    退出但 bootloader 仍存活时，守护线程无法触发。因此生产模式下必须
34	    使用 MAXMA_PARENT_PID 监控 Tauri 主进程。
35	
36	    进程存活检测使用 WaitForSingleObject(handle, 0)：
37	      - 返回 WAIT_OBJECT_0 (0)：进程已退出（被信号/signaled）
38	      - 返回 WAIT_TIMEOUT (258)：进程仍在运行
39	      - 返回 WAIT_FAILED (0xFFFFFFFF)：出错（视为已退出，fail-safe）
40	    不能仅用 OpenProcess 返回值判断，因为 Windows 对已退出但未完全回收的
41	    "僵尸进程"仍会返回有效句柄。
42	    """
43	    if sys.platform != "win32":
44	        return
45	
46	    try:
47	        import ctypes
48	
49	        # 优先使用 Tauri 注入的主进程 PID，否则回退到直接父进程
50	        parent_pid_str = os.environ.get("MAXMA_PARENT_PID", "")
51	        if parent_pid_str.isdigit():
52	            ppid = int(parent_pid_str)
53	        else:
54	            ppid = os.getppid()
55	
56	        if ppid <= 1:
57	            return
58	
59	        kernel32 = ctypes.windll.kernel32
60	        SYNCHRONIZE = 0x00100000
61	        WAIT_OBJECT_0 = 0
62	        WAIT_TIMEOUT = 258
63	        WAIT_FAILED = 0xFFFFFFFF
64	
65	        def _watch():
66	            while True:
67	                time.sleep(2)
68	                try:
69	                    handle = kernel32.OpenProcess(SYNCHRONIZE, False, ppid)
70	                    if not handle:
71	                        # 无法打开进程（PID 不存在或无权限），视为已退出
72	                        print(f"[watchdog] 父进程 (pid={ppid}) 已退出（OpenProcess 返回空），sidecar 自动终止", flush=True)
73	                        os._exit(0)
74	                    status = kernel32.WaitForSingleObject(handle, 0)
75	                    kernel32.CloseHandle(handle)
76	                    if status == WAIT_OBJECT_0 or status == WAIT_FAILED:
77	                        print(f"[watchdog] 父进程 (pid={ppid}) 已退出（WaitForSingleObject={status}），sidecar 自动终止", flush=True)
78	                        os._exit(0)
79	                except Exception as e:
80	                    # 检测过程中出错，fail-safe：终止 sidecar 避免孤儿
81	                    print(f"[watchdog] 检测异常 ({e})，sidecar 自动终止", flush=True)
82	                    os._exit(0)
83	
84	        t = threading.Thread(target=_watch, daemon=True, name="parent-watchdog")
85	        t.start()
86	    except Exception:
87	        pass
88	
89	
90	def main():
91	    # 初始化日志系统（在其他模块导入之前）
92	    setup_logging()
93	
94	    # CLI：轮换 Token
95	    if "--rotate-token" in sys.argv:
96	        from api.auth import rotate_token
97	
98	        rotated = rotate_token()
99	        print(f"[auth] Token rotated: {rotated}")
100	        return
101	
102	    import logging
103	    logger = logging.getLogger(__name__)
104	    logger.info("MaxmaHere %s starting", __version__)
105	
106	    # 启动父进程监控（防止 sidecar 成为孤儿进程）
107	    _start_parent_watchdog()
108	
109	    # 确保所有用户数据目录存在（打包模式下首次运行时自动创建）
110	    ensure_data_dirs()
111	
112	    ensure_all()
113	
114	    app = create_app()
115	
116	    settings = get_settings()
117	    dev_mode = "--dev" in sys.argv
118	    uvicorn.run(
119	        app,
120	        host="127.0.0.1",
121	        port=settings.maxma_api_port,
122	        reload=dev_mode,
123	        reload_dirs=["agent", "api", "tools", "memory"] if dev_mode else None,
124	    )
125	
126	
127	if __name__ == "__main__":
128	    main()
129	
```

1	# Maxma 跨项目借鉴探索报告
2	
3	> 本文档探索 Maxma 从三个参考项目中学到了什么、如何借鉴、哪些没借鉴到位。
4	>
5	> - **Halo 2.1.12**（`D:\Maxma\hello-halo-2.1.12`）：Electron + React + TypeScript AI 工作站
6	> - **Awesome LLM Apps**（`D:\Maxma\awesome-llm-apps-main`）：100+ LLM 应用模板集合
7	> - **OpenHanako 0.357.17**（`D:\Maxma\openhanako-0.357.17`）：Electron + React + Hono 桌面 AI 助手
8	
9	## 执行状态
10	
11	本报告保留调研结论；逐项实施归属、阶段、开关、验收与回滚信号统一记录在
12	[`dev_docs/capability-matrix.md`](dev_docs/capability-matrix.md)。架构决策位于
13	[`dev_docs/adr/`](dev_docs/adr/)。状态矩阵是后续实施的唯一更新入口，避免在
14	本报告和执行计划之间维护两份可能漂移的清单。
15	
16	---
17	
18	## 一、后端架构与功能设计
19	
20	### 1.1 已借鉴并落地的设计
21	
22	| # | 设计 | 来源 | Maxma 实现 | 借鉴质量 |
23	|---|---|---|---|---|
24	| 1 | 三阶段启动分层（Essential/Extended/Idle） | Halo `bootstrap/` | `api/bootstrap/idle_queue.py` | ✅ 到位：Tier 3 空闲任务队列 + `start_idle_drain` |
25	| 2 | Disposable 资源管理（IDisposable + DisposableStore） | Halo `platform/event/disposable.ts` | `agent/lifecycle/disposable.py` | ✅ 到位：完整移植 IDisposable / DisposableStore / MutableDisposable / combined_disposable |
26	| 3 | 事件去重缓存（TTL + FIFO LRU） | Halo `apps/runtime/event-dedup.ts` | `maxma_platform/event_dedup.py` | ✅ 到位：TTL + maxSize LRU 淘汰 |
27	| 4 | 凭据掩码统一层 | Halo `foundation/logging/redact.ts` | `api/security/credential_mask.py` | ⚠️ 部分：只做了掩码，Halo 的 `crypto-envelope`（SM4-CBC + HMAC-SM3 加密存储）+ 双 key 优先级恢复未移植 |
28	| 5 | JSONL 透明抄本 | Halo `apps/runtime/session-store.ts` | `api/transcript/jsonl_writer.py` + `api/routes/transcripts.py` | ✅ 到位：TranscriptWriter 线程安全 + 路径穿越防护 |
29	| 6 | 调度器指数退避 | Halo `platform/scheduler/timer.ts` | `agent/autonomy/scheduler.py` | ⚠️ 部分：有 MAX_CONSECUTIVE_FAILURES=5 + 封顶 24h，但 Halo 的 5 档退避表（30s→1m→5m→15m→60m）+ anchor-grid 防爆发 + 卡死自愈（2h 阈值清理）未移植 |
30	| 7 | 流式修复管道（空 turn / tool JSON / usage） | Halo `openai-compat-router/stream/` | `agent/stream_repair/` (4 模块) | ✅ 到位：empty_turn + tool_json_repair + usage_backfill + pipeline 集成，feature flag 控制 |
31	| 8 | report_to_user 完成信号 + 自动 continue | Halo `apps/runtime/execute.ts` | `agent/autonomy/completion_signal.py` | ✅ 到位：RunOutcome + detect_completion_signal + MAX_AUTO_CONTINUES=10 |
32	| 9 | Escalation run 边界（headless → 用户输入） | Halo `apps/runtime/execute.ts` | `agent/autonomy/escalation.py` | ✅ 到位：EscalationStore + ESCALATION_TIMEOUT_HOURS=24 |
33	| 10 | 工作记忆 Push 注入（# now + # History 双层） | Halo `platform/memory/DESIGN.md` | `agent/memory/working_memory.py` | ✅ 到位：WorkingMemoryStore 双层结构 + 三档注入策略 |
34	| 11 | Keep-alive TTL 安全网（24h 惰性剪枝） | Halo `platform/background/keep-alive.ts` | `maxma_platform/keep_alive.py` | ✅ 到位：DEFAULT_TTL_SECONDS=86400 + 惰性剪枝 |
35	| 12 | 循环检测（工具签名重复终止） | OpenHanako 无此机制（Maxma 独有） | `agent/loop_detector.py` | ✅ Maxma 独有设计，OpenHanako 反而缺这层防护 |
36	| 13 | Provider 故障转移 | OpenHanako `provider-registry.ts` | `api/providers/manager.py` + `agent/graph.py` | ✅ 到位：优先级排序 + fallback 链路 + 同 turn 工具副作用保护 |
37	| 14 | HITL 审批网关 | OpenHanako `approval-gateway.ts` | `agent/approval_gateway.py` + `ApprovalToolNode` | ⚠️ 部分：Maxma 是单一审批层，OpenHanako 是双 reviewer（small model 快审 + large model 深审）+ escalation 链 |
38	| 15 | 子 Agent 委派 | OpenHanako `subagent-tool.ts` | `tools/sub_agent/` | ⚠️ 部分：Maxma 是同步阻塞调用，OpenHanako 是 fire-and-forget + DeferredResultStore 异步回灌 |
39	| 16 | MCP 四协议支持 | OpenHanako `plugins/mcp/` | `tools/mcp.py` + `mcp_runtime.py` | ⚠️ 部分：Maxma 支持 stdio/SSE/HTTP/WS，但 OpenHanako 的 OAuth 提前 60s 刷新 + 自动重连退避未移植 |
40	| 17 | Corrective RAG | Awesome LLM Apps `rag_tutorials/corrective_rag/` | `memory/kb/grading/` + `crag_enabled` flag | ✅ 到位：文档评分 + 不相关时 query 重写 + Tavily 回退，feature flag 控制 |
41	| 18 | 情景记忆 session 隔离 | OpenHanako `agent.ts` 双层开关 | `memory/episodic.py` | ✅ 到位：默认按 session 隔离 + 失败轮次不投影 |

43	### 1.2 未借鉴但有价值的设计
44	
45	#### 来自 Halo
46	
47	| # | 设计 | 文件路径 | 价值 | 未借鉴原因 |
48	|---|---|---|---|---|
49	| A1 | 凭据加密存储（crypto-envelope SM4-CBC + HMAC-SM3） | `foundation/crypto-envelope.ts` | 本地存储的 API key 加密，防配置文件被复制 | Maxma 当前用明文 YAML 存储，可考虑加密 |
50	| A2 | 双 key 优先级凭据恢复 | `foundation/crypto-envelope.ts` | 持久化 master key + legacy seed 双轨，永不重新生成损坏的 key | Maxma 无加密层所以暂不需要 |
51	| A3 | 调度器 anchor-grid 防爆发 | `platform/scheduler/timer.ts` | `Math.ceil(elapsed / interval)` 防离线期间累积爆发 | Maxma 退避策略较简单 |
52	| A4 | 调度器卡死自愈（2h 阈值） | `platform/scheduler/timer.ts` | `STUCK_JOB_THRESHOLD_MS=2h` 清理卡死 job | Maxma 无此机制 |
53	| A5 | 渲染进程崩溃自愈 | `main/index.ts` | 60s 滑窗 3 次重试 + relaunch | Tauri 前端崩溃恢复未实现 |
54	| A6 | Mid-turn 消息注入 | `services/agent/inject-message.ts` | agent 执行中追加消息，下一个 tool boundary 吸收 | Maxma 不支持执行中追加 |
55	| A7 | MCP 工具名 belt-and-suspenders 脱敏 | `services/agent/stream-processor.ts` | `mcp:<server>` → `mcp:<redacted>` | Maxma telemetry 未做此脱敏 |
56	
57	#### 来自 OpenHanako
58	
59	| # | 设计 | 文件路径 | 价值 | 未借鉴原因 |
60	|---|---|---|---|---|
61	| B1 | 非阻塞 Deferred 子 Agent | `lib/tools/subagent-tool.ts` | fire-and-forget + 后台回灌，父不阻塞 | Maxma 子 Agent 是同步阻塞调用 |
62	| B2 | 双 Reviewer Approval Gateway | `lib/approval-gateway.ts` | small model 快审 + large model 深审 + escalation | Maxma 是单一审批层，无 LLM reviewer |
63	| B3 | Cache-preserving Session Compaction | `core/session-compactor.ts` | 压缩时保护 KV cache 前缀 + 结构化摘要模板 | Maxma 有 session_compress 路由但无 cache 友好压缩 |
64	| B4 | Memory Ticker v4 传送带 | `lib/memory/memory-ticker.ts` | 按天滚动 + 断点续跑 + 5 步 daily | Maxma 记忆是全量重算式 |
65	| B5 | FactStore 无向量（FTS5 + CJK ngram） | `lib/memory/fact-store.ts` | 抛弃 embedding，用 LLM 标签 + FTS5 全文搜索 | Maxma 用 ChromaDB 向量，可考虑 FTS5 补充 |
66	| B6 | 双层沙盒（PathGuard + OS 级） | `lib/sandbox/` | 应用层 PathGuard + macOS seatbelt / Linux bwrap / Win32 | Maxma 沙盒仅 firejail，无 OS 级隔离 |
67	| B7 | Hub 统一消息路由 | `hub/index.ts` | 桌面/Bridge/cron 统一路由表 | Maxma 无多平台消息需求 |
68	| B8 | 声明式 Provider 插件注册表 | `core/provider-registry.ts` | 30+ Provider 静态声明能力 | Maxma Provider 管理较简单 |
69	| B9 | Workflow Tool（确定性 JS 编排） | `lib/tools/workflow-tool.ts` | 确定性脚本编排 Agent 调用 + journal 断点续跑 | Maxma 无 workflow 概念 |
70	| B10 | Execution Lease（远程写操作租约） | `core/execution-lease-service.ts` | 远程写操作 5 分钟 TTL 租约 | Maxma 无远程操作需求 |
71	| B11 | Bridge 多平台接入 | `lib/bridge/bridge-manager.ts` | Telegram/飞书/钉钉/QQ/微信统一接入 | Maxma 无 IM 接入需求 |
72	| B12 | decorrelated jitter 重试 | `shared/retry.ts` | AWS 推荐的去相关抖动退避 | Maxma 用固定指数退避 |
73	
74	#### 来自 Awesome LLM Apps
75	
76	| # | 设计 | 文件路径 | 价值 | 未借鉴原因 |
77	|---|---|---|---|---|
78	| C1 | 前端工具 + renderAndWaitForResponse | `ai-dashboard-canvas-agent/src/components/chat/actions/` | 工具调用在前端渲染交互式 UI + 等待用户确认 | Maxma 工具气泡是只读展示，无前端工具 |
79	| C2 | CopilotKit CoAgent 状态共享 | `ai-dashboard-canvas-agent/src/components/dashboard/` | Agent 修改 state 时前端自动更新 | Maxma 是 WebSocket 推送，非状态同步 |
80	| C3 | LLM 失败优雅降级为启发式 | `devpulse_ai/agents/relevance_agent.py` | LLM 不可用时回退到基于规则的评分 | Maxma 工具调用失败是直接报错 |
81	| C4 | Agent 按角色分配不同模型 | `devpulse_ai/agents/` | 分类用 mini 模型，综合用强模型 | Maxma 单一模型走天下 |
82	| C5 | 自我进化 Agent Skills | `self-improving-agent-skills/backend/` | 三 Agent 协作优化 SKILL.md（执行→分析→变异→评估） | Maxma 自治层有 manage_skills 但无自动优化闭环 |
83	| C6 | 信任门控 + 哈希链审计 | `trust_gated_agent_team/` | 信任评分 + SHA-256 哈希链防篡改审计 | Maxma 有 audit_log 但无信任评分 |
84	| C7 | Always-on Agent（观察/调度/投递分离） | `always_on_hn_briefing_agent/` | Scout/Scheduler/Delivery 三层独立 | Maxma 自治层是单一 runner |
85	| C8 | ThreadPoolExecutor 隔离子 Agent 流 | `ai-deep-research-agent/agent/tools.py` | 子 Agent 流式输出不泄露到父 Agent | Maxma 子 Agent 流式未隔离 |
86	
87	### 1.3 后端差距总结
88	
89	**核心差距**（按优先级排序）：
90	
91	1. **子 Agent 异步化**（B1）：Maxma 的子 Agent 是同步阻塞调用，父 Agent 必须等待子 Agent 完成。OpenHanako 的 fire-and-forget + DeferredResultStore 让父 Agent 可以继续做别的事。这是**架构级差距**。
92	
93	2. **审批网关双 reviewer**（B2）：Maxma 的审批是"全 ask_user"或"全 auto"二选一。OpenHanako 用 small model 快速审核 + large model 深度审核 + escalation 链，兼顾成本和安全。Maxma 的 `ApprovalGateway` 可以引入 LLM reviewer 层。
94	
95	3. **Session Compaction cache 友好**（B3）：Maxma 有 `session_compress` 路由但压缩时不保护 KV cache 前缀。OpenHanako 的 `cache-preserving-compaction` 把 summarization instruction 放到 cached prefix 之后，让静态前缀保持不变。
96	
97	4. **记忆系统传送带模式**（B4）：Maxma 的记忆是"每次全量重算"式。OpenHanako 的 Memory Ticker v4 按"传送带"分阶段：每 10 轮滚动摘要 + session 结束 final 摘要 + 每天一次 compileDaily。week 段从 LLM 编译降级为纯文件装配（零 LLM 成本）。
98	
99	5. **代码执行沙盒双层隔离**（B6）：Maxma 沙盒仅 firejail（Linux）。OpenHanako 是应用层 PathGuard + OS 级 seatbelt/bwrap/Win32 restricted token 双层防护。
100	
101	6. **LLM 失败优雅降级**（C3）：Maxma 工具调用失败是直接报错。Awesome LLM Apps 在 LLM 不可用时自动回退到基于规则的启发式逻辑，标记 "Heuristic (LLM unavailable)"。
102

160	| A4 | 玻璃拟态设计系统 | `ai-deep-research-agent/src/app/globals.css` | 完整设计令牌 + backdrop-filter blur + 抽象形状背景 | Maxma 有 design-system.css 但无玻璃拟态 |
161	| A5 | 状态感知动效 | `ai-deep-research-agent/src/app/globals.css` | 执行中=旋转，进行中=呼吸，新项=滑入 | Maxma 动画较基础 |
162	| A6 | 特化工具卡片配置表 | `ai-deep-research-agent/src/components/ToolCard.tsx` | `TOOL_CONFIG` 映射表：每个工具配置 icon/getDisplayText/getResultSummary | Maxma 有 registry.ts 但无 getDisplayText/getResultSummary |
163	| A7 | 骨架屏加载 | `multimodal_video_moment_finder/frontend/app/page.tsx` | 3 个占位卡片带 shimmer 动画 + 递增 animationDelay | Maxma 无骨架屏 |
164	
165	### 2.3 前端差距总结
166	
167	**核心差距**（按优先级排序）：
168	
169	1. **长流程折叠**（O1）：Maxma 的工具调用过程全部展开，长对话时刷屏。OpenHanako 的 ProcessFoldBlock 把连续 assistant 消息折叠成一行摘要 + 可展开。这是**最影响体验的差距**。
170	
171	2. **多 session alive 缓存**（O2）：Maxma 切换 session 重新渲染，丢失滚动位置。OpenHanako 用 visibility:hidden 保持 scrollTop，MAX_ALIVE=5 缓存。
172	
173	3. **全局快捷键体系**（H7）：Maxma 仅 Ctrl+K 一个快捷键。Halo 有 Cmd+K/Cmd+Shift+F/Cmd+F 三档搜索 + Esc/Enter 处理。OpenHanako 有斜杠命令 + Xing Prompt。
174	
175	4. **友好动作摘要**（H4）：Maxma 工具气泡显示原始工具名（如 `file_read`）。Halo 折叠态头部显示"Reading config.json..."友好摘要。
176	
177	5. **工具错误视觉**（H5）：Maxma 工具错误用红色。Halo 用 amber（warning），因为 AI 内部反馈会自愈，红色误导用户。
178	
179	6. **4 档权限模式切换器**（O8）：Maxma 有 `approval_gateway_enabled` flag 但前端无 4 档切换器。OpenHanako 的 PlanModeButton 让用户在 auto/operate/ask/read_only 间切换。
180	
181	7. **交互式卡片**（O4/A2）：Maxma 工具气泡是只读展示。OpenHanako 的 InteractiveCard + Awesome LLM Apps 的 renderAndWaitForResponse 让工具调用变成可交互的 UI 组件。
182	
183	8. **Onboarding 引导**（O11）：Maxma 无首次启动引导。OpenHanako 有 6 步引导（语言→名字→Provider→Model→主题→工作区→教程）。
184	
185	---
186	
187	## 三、借鉴情况总表
188	
189	### 3.1 借鉴到位（18 项）
190	
191	| 领域 | 设计 | 来源 |
192	|---|---|---|
193	| 后端-架构 | 三阶段启动分层 | Halo |
194	| 后端-架构 | Disposable 资源管理 | Halo |
195	| 后端-架构 | 事件去重缓存 | Halo |
196	| 后端-架构 | JSONL 透明抄本 | Halo |
197	| 后端-架构 | Keep-alive TTL 安全网 | Halo |
198	| 后端-功能 | 流式修复管道 | Halo |
199	| 后端-功能 | report_to_user 完成信号 | Halo |
200	| 后端-功能 | Escalation run 边界 | Halo |
201	| 后端-功能 | 工作记忆 Push 注入 | Halo |
202	| 后端-功能 | 循环检测 | Maxma 独有 |
203	| 后端-功能 | Provider 故障转移 | OpenHanako |
204	| 后端-功能 | Corrective RAG | Awesome LLM Apps |
205	| 后端-功能 | 情景记忆 session 隔离 | OpenHanako |
206	| 前端-UI | 12 套主题系统 | OpenHanako |
207	| 前端-UI | 动画系统 | OpenHanako |
208	| 前端-UI | 工具调用专属气泡 | Halo + Awesome LLM Apps |
209	| 前端-UI | PlanCard 计划展示 | Halo |
210	| 前端-UI | 工作台面板 | Awesome LLM Apps |
211	
212	### 3.2 借鉴了但不到位（4 项）
213	
214	| 领域 | 设计 | 来源 | 差距 |
215	|---|---|---|---|
216	| 后端 | 凭据掩码 | Halo | 只做了掩码，未做 crypto-envelope 加密存储 + 双 key 恢复 |
217	| 后端 | 调度器指数退避 | Halo | 有 MAX_CONSECUTIVE_FAILURES + 封顶，缺 5 档退避表 + anchor-grid + 卡死自愈 |
218	| 后端 | HITL 审批网关 | OpenHanako | 单一审批层，缺双 reviewer（small+large）+ escalation 链 |
219	| 后端 | 子 Agent 委派 | OpenHanako | 同步阻塞调用，缺 fire-and-forget + DeferredResultStore 异步回灌 |
220	| 后端 | MCP 四协议 | OpenHanako | 缺 OAuth 提前 60s 刷新 + 自动重连退避 |
221	
222	### 3.3 完全未借鉴但有价值（19 项）
223	
224	| 优先级 | 领域 | 设计 | 来源 |
225	|---|---|---|---|
226	| 🔴 高 | 后端 | 子 Agent 异步化（fire-and-forget） | OpenHanako |
227	| 🔴 高 | 后端 | 双 Reviewer Approval Gateway | OpenHanako |
228	| 🔴 高 | 后端 | Cache-preserving Session Compaction | OpenHanako |
229	| 🔴 高 | 后端 | 记忆传送带模式（按天滚动 + 断点续跑） | OpenHanako |
230	| 🔴 高 | 前端 | 长流程折叠（ProcessFoldBlock） | OpenHanako |
231	| 🔴 高 | 前端 | 多 session alive 缓存（MAX_ALIVE=5） | OpenHanako |
232	| 🔴 高 | 前端 | 全局快捷键体系 | Halo |
233	| 🟡 中 | 后端 | 双层沙盒（PathGuard + OS 级） | OpenHanako |
234	| 🟡 中 | 后端 | LLM 失败优雅降级为启发式 | Awesome LLM Apps |
235	| 🟡 中 | 后端 | 自我进化 Agent Skills 闭环 | Awesome LLM Apps |
236	| 🟡 中 | 前端 | 友好动作摘要 | Halo |
237	| 🟡 中 | 前端 | 4 档权限模式切换器 | OpenHanako |
238	| 🟡 中 | 前端 | Onboarding 引导流程 | OpenHanako |
239	| 🟡 中 | 前端 | 交互式卡片（iframe http + 主题注入） | OpenHanako |
240	| 🟢 低 | 后端 | 凭据加密存储（crypto-envelope） | Halo |
241	| 🟢 低 | 后端 | decorrelated jitter 重试 | OpenHanako |
242	| 🟢 低 | 后端 | FactStore 无向量（FTS5 + CJK ngram） | OpenHanako |
243	| 🟢 低 | 前端 | Pulse 面板（实时任务流） | Halo |
244	| 🟢 低 | 前端 | ThinkPath 引导式思维路径 | Awesome LLM Apps |
245	
246	---
247	
248	## 四、设计哲学对比
249	
250	### Halo 的设计哲学
251	- **分阶段启动**：首屏必需 / 窗口可见后 / 空闲时三档，绝不阻塞首屏
252	- **Pull+Push 双通道**：renderer 既能监听事件也能主动查询，解决 HMR 重载后竞态
253	- **修复而非报错**：流式修复管道修复国产模型的破损输出，而非直接报错让用户看到乱码
254	- **观看是读不是订阅**：headless run 不推事件，前端按需轮询拉取
255	
256	### OpenHanako 的设计哲学
257	- **Agent 是数据+行为实体，不持有引擎引用**：严格单向依赖，消除循环引用
258	- **确定性工作不用 LLM**：SignalCollector 明确标注"NOT an agent"
259	- **传送带而非全量重算**：记忆系统分阶段增量，week 段零 LLM 成本
260	- **修复而非报错**：Stream Guard 修复国产模型的工具协议碎片
261	- **双层防护**：应用层 PathGuard + OS 级沙盒
262	- **渐进式披露**：experience 工具先返回索引，有参才返回详情
263	
264	### Awesome LLM Apps 的设计哲学
265	- **前端不是聊天的附属品，而是 Agent 的画布**：Dashboard Canvas 让 Agent 输出变成可视化工件
266	- **工具调用是人类可见、可审批的过程**：renderAndWaitForResponse 实现人在回路
267	- **优雅降级是第一公民**：LLM 失败时自动回退到启发式
268	- **Agent 可以优化 Agent**：三 Agent 协作的技能自优化闭环
269	- **模型按角色选型**：分类用 mini，综合用强模型
270	
271	### Maxma 的独有设计哲学
272	- **人设系统三层结构**：Identity / Yuan / Ishiki，yuan 模板输出 `<mood>` 内部状态
273	- **贴纸/表情系统**：按情绪分类的贴纸库 + 内联嵌入消息
274	- **私密模式**：Ctrl+K 切换，不写入长期记忆
275	- **循环检测**：工具签名重复 3 次终止（OpenHanako 缺这层防护）
276	
277	---
278	
279	*最后更新：2026-07-10*
280	
```

**Output:**

```json
1	/**
2	 * session-bridge.ts — JSON-RPC server wrapping createAgentSession.
3	 *
4	 * RPC Methods:
5	 *   create_session({ model, system_prompt?, cwd? }) → { session_id }
6	 *   prompt({ session_id, message })               → { ok: true }
7	 *   cancel({ session_id })                         → { ok: true }
8	 *   destroy_session({ session_id })                → { ok: true }
9	 *
10	 * Events are forwarded as JSON-RPC notifications (method: "event").
11	 */
12	
13	import { createInterface } from "node:readline";
14	import { randomUUID } from "node:crypto";
15	import { createAgentSession } from "@oh-my-pi/pi-coding-agent";
16	import { getBundledModel } from "@oh-my-pi/pi-catalog/models";
17	import type { Model } from "@oh-my-pi/pi-ai";
18	import type { AgentSession } from "@oh-my-pi/pi-coding-agent";
19	import { registerCustomTools } from "./tools/index";
20	
21	// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
22	// Types
23	// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
24	
25	interface SessionRecord {
26	  session: AgentSession;
27	  unsubscribe: () => void;
28	}
29	
30	// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
31	// State
32	// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
33	
34	const sessions = new Map<string, SessionRecord>();
35	const rl = createInterface({ input: process.stdin });
36	
37	// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
38	// JSON-RPC helpers
39	// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
40	
41	function send(id: number | null, result: unknown) {
42	  process.stdout.write(JSON.stringify({ jsonrpc: "2.0", id, result }) + "\n");
43	}
44	
45	function sendError(id: number | null, message: string) {
46	  process.stdout.write(
47	    JSON.stringify({ jsonrpc: "2.0", id, error: { message } }) + "\n",
48	  );
49	}
50	
51	function sendEvent(sessionId: string, event: Record<string, unknown>) {
52	  process.stdout.write(
53	    JSON.stringify({
54	      jsonrpc: "2.0",
55	      method: "event",
56	      params: { session_id: sessionId, event },
57	    }) + "\n",
58	  );
59	}
60	
61	// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
62	// Model resolution
63	// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
64	
65	/**
66	 * Parse a model string like "openai/gpt-4o" into a proper Model object.
67	 *
68	 * Strategy:
69	 *   A — Try `getBundledModel(provider, modelId)` from the bundled catalog.
70	 *   B — Fall back to constructing a minimal Model object manually.
71	 */
72	function parseModel(modelStr: string): Model {
73	  const slashIdx = modelStr.indexOf("/");
74	  const provider = slashIdx >= 0 ? modelStr.slice(0, slashIdx) : "";
75	  const modelId = slashIdx >= 0 ? modelStr.slice(slashIdx + 1) : modelStr;
76	
77	  // Option A: bundled catalog lookup
78	  if (provider) {
79	    try {
80	      const bundled = getBundledModel(provider as any, modelId);
81	      if (bundled) return bundled;
82	    } catch {
83	      // Fall through to manual construction
84	    }
85	  }
86	
87	  // Option B: manual fallback (minimal Model object from env vars)
88	  const baseUrl =
89	    process.env.OPENAI_BASE_URL ?? "https://api.openai.com/v1";
90	  return {
91	    id: modelId,
92	    name: modelId,
93	    api: "openai-completions" as const,
94	    provider,
95	    baseUrl,
96	    reasoning: false,
97	    input: ["text"] as ("text" | "image")[],
98	    cost: { input: 0, output: 0, cacheRead: 0, cacheWrite: 0 },
99	    contextWindow: 128000,
100	    maxTokens: 4096,
101	    compat: {
102	      supportsDeveloperRole: true,
103	      supportsStrictMode: false,
104	      supportsReasoningEffort: false,
105	      reasoningEffortMap: {},
106	      supportsReasoningParams: false,
107	      thinkingFormat: "disabled" as const,
108	      reasoningDisableMode: "off" as const,
109	      omitReasoningEffort: false,
110	      includeEncryptedReasoning: false,
111	      filterReasoningHistory: false,
112	      disableReasoningOnForcedToolChoice: false,
113	      disableReasoningOnToolChoice: false,
114	      supportsToolChoice: true,
115	      supportsForcedToolChoice: true,
116	      supportsNamedToolChoice: true,
117	      reasoningContentField: undefined,
118	      requiresReasoningContentForToolCalls: false,
119	      requiresReasoningContentForAllAssistantTurns: false,
120	      allowsSyntheticReasoningContentForToolCalls: false,
121	      replayReasoningContent: false,
122	      qwenPreserveThinking: false,
123	      requiresThinkingAsText: false,
124	      requiresMistralToolIds: false,
125	      requiresToolResultName: false,
126	      requiresAssistantAfterToolResult: false,
127	      requiresAssistantContentForToolCalls: false,
128	      stripDeepseekSpecialTokens: false,
129	      streamMarkupHealingPattern: undefined,
130	      reasoningDeltasMayBeCumulative: false,
131	      emptyLengthFinishIsContextError: false,
132	      usesOpenAIToolCallIdLimit: false,
133	      promptCacheSessionHeader: undefined,
134	      isOpenRouterHost: false,
135	      alwaysSendMaxTokens: true,
136	      enableGeminiThinkingLoopGuard: undefined,
137	      openRouterRouting: undefined,
138	      wireModelIdMode: "raw" as const,
139	      supportsStore: false,
140	      supportsMultipleSystemMessages: true,
141	      maxTokensField: "max_tokens" as const,
142	      supportsUsageInStreaming: true,
143	      cacheControlFormat: undefined,
144	      supportsLongPromptCacheRetention: false,
145	      supportsImageDetailOriginal: false,
146	      strictResponsesPairing: false,
147	      toolStrictMode: "none" as const,
148	      streamIdleTimeoutMs: undefined,
149	      vercelGatewayRouting: undefined,
150	      extraBody: undefined,
151	    },
152	  } as Model;
153	}
154	
155	// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
156	// Pi event → Maxma event mapping
157	// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
158	
159	function mapPiEventToMaxma(
160	  piEvent: Record<string, unknown>,
161	): Record<string, unknown> | null {
162	  // Handle AgentEvent types directly
163	  const type = piEvent.type as string;
164	
165	  if (type === "message_update") {
166	    const assistantEvent = (piEvent as any).assistantMessageEvent;
167	    if (!assistantEvent) return null;
168	
169	    const aeType = assistantEvent.type as string;
170	
171	    if (aeType === "text_delta") {
172	      return {
173	        type: "token",
174	        payload: { token: assistantEvent.delta ?? "" },
175	      };
176	    }
177	
178	    // NOTE: toolcall_start/toolcall_end from message_update are pre-execution
179	    // events (LLM deciding to call a tool). The actual execution data comes
180	    // from tool_execution_start/tool_execution_end below, which carry full
181	    // toolName and result data. Skip early message_update tool events to avoid
182	    // duplicate/empty-named events.
183	
184	    if (aeType === "error") {
185	      const errMsg =
186	        (assistantEvent as any).error?.content?.[0]?.text ??
187	        "Unknown agent error";
188	      return {
189	        type: "error",
190	        payload: { code: "AGENT_ERROR", message: errMsg },
191	      };
192	    }
193	
194	    return null;
195	  }
196	
197	  if (type === "tool_execution_start") {
198	    const e = piEvent as any;
199	    return {
200	      type: "tool_start",
201	      payload: {
202	        tool_name: e.toolName ?? "",
203	        input: JSON.stringify(e.args ?? {}),
204	      },
205	    };
206	  }
207	
208	  if (type === "tool_execution_end") {
209	    const e = piEvent as any;
210	    const isError = e.isError === true;
211	    if (isError) {
212	      return {
213	        type: "tool_error",
214	        payload: {
215	          tool_name: e.toolName ?? "",
216	          error: JSON.stringify(e.result ?? {}),
217	          elapsed: 0,
218	        },
219	      };
220	    }
221	    return {
222	      type: "tool_end",
223	      payload: {
224	        tool_name: e.toolName ?? "",
225	        output: JSON.stringify(e.result ?? {}),
226	        elapsed: 0,
227	      },
228	    };
229	  }
230	
231	  if (type === "message_end") {
232	    const msg = (piEvent as any).message;
233	    let content = "";
234	    if (msg?.content) {
235	      if (typeof msg.content === "string") {
236	        content = msg.content;
237	      } else if (Array.isArray(msg.content)) {
238	        content = msg.content
239	          .map((b: any) => (b?.type === "text" ? b.text : ""))
240	          .join("");
241	      }
242	    }
243	    return {
244	      type: "answer",
245	      payload: { content },
246	    };
247	  }
248	
249	  if (type === "agent_end") {
250	    return { type: "done", payload: {} };
251	  }
252	
253	  return null;
254	}
255	
256	// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
257	// Main event subscriber
258	// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
259	
260	function subscribeSession(
261	  sessionId: string,
262	  session: AgentSession,
263	): () => void {
264	  return session.subscribe((event: any) => {
265	    const mapped = mapPiEventToMaxma(event as Record<string, unknown>);
266	    if (mapped) {
267	      sendEvent(sessionId, mapped);
268	    }
269	  });
270	}
271	
272	// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
273	// RPC handler
274	// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
275	
276	rl.on("line", async (line: string) => {
277	  let req: any;
278	  try {
279	    req = JSON.parse(line);
280	  } catch {
281	    sendError(null, "Parse error");
282	    return;
283	  }
284	
285	  const { method, params, id } = req;
286	
287	  try {
288	    if (method === "create_session") {
289	      const modelStr: string = params?.model ?? "openai/gpt-4o";
290	      const model = parseModel(modelStr);
291	      const cwd: string = params?.cwd ?? process.cwd();
292	      const systemPrompt: string | undefined = params?.system_prompt;
293	      const tools: string[] | undefined = params?.tools as string[] | undefined;
294	      
295	      const createOptions: Record<string, unknown> = {
296	        model,
297	        cwd,
298	      };
299	      if (systemPrompt !== undefined) {
300	        createOptions.systemPrompt = systemPrompt;
301	      }
302	      if (tools !== undefined && Array.isArray(tools) && tools.length > 0) {
303	        createOptions.toolNames = tools;
304	      }
305	
306	      // Register custom Maxma tools
307	      const customTools = registerCustomTools();
308	      if (customTools.length > 0) {
309	        createOptions.customTools = customTools;
310	      }
311	
312	      const { session } = await createAgentSession(createOptions as any);
313	      const sessionId = randomUUID();
314	
315	      const unsubscribe = subscribeSession(sessionId, session);
316	      sessions.set(sessionId, { session, unsubscribe });
317	
318	      send(id, { session_id: sessionId });
319	      return;
320	    }
321	
322	    if (method === "prompt") {
323	      const sessionId: string = params?.session_id;
324	      const message: string = params?.message ?? "";
325	      const record = sessions.get(sessionId);
326	      if (!record) {
327	        sendError(id, `Session not found: ${sessionId}`);
328	        return;
329	      }
330	
331	      // Fire-and-forget — the response returns immediately.
332	      // Events stream asynchronously via the subscriber.
333	      record.session.prompt(message).catch((err: unknown) => {
334	        sendEvent(sessionId, {
335	          type: "error",
336	          payload: { code: "PROMPT_ERROR", message: String(err) },
337	        });
338	      });
339	
340	      send(id, { ok: true });
341	      return;
342	    }
343	
344	    if (method === "cancel") {
345	      const sessionId: string = params?.session_id;
346	      const record = sessions.get(sessionId);
347	      if (!record) {
348	        sendError(id, `Session not found: ${sessionId}`);
349	        return;
350	      }
351	
352	      record.session.agent.abort("Cancelled by user");
353	
354	      send(id, { ok: true });
355	      return;
356	    }
357	
358	    if (method === "destroy_session") {
359	      const sessionId: string = params?.session_id;
360	      const record = sessions.get(sessionId);
361	      if (!record) {
362	        sendError(id, `Session not found: ${sessionId}`);
363	        return;
364	      }
365	
366	      record.unsubscribe();
367	      await record.session.dispose();
368	      sessions.delete(sessionId);
369	
370	      send(id, { ok: true });
371	      return;
372	    }
373	
374	    if (method === "undo") {
375	      const sessionId: string = params?.session_id as string;
376	      const steps: number = (params?.steps as number) ?? 1;
377	      const record = sessions.get(sessionId);
378	      if (!record) {
379	        sendError(id, `Session not found: ${sessionId}`);
380	        return;
381	      }
382	
383	      // Truncate the last N assistant+user message pairs (copy-first to avoid mutating internal state)
384	      const originalLen = record.session.state.messages.length;
385	      const keepCount = Math.max(0, originalLen - steps * 2);
386	      const remaining = record.session.state.messages.slice(0, keepCount);
387	      const removed = originalLen - keepCount;
388	      record.session.replace_messages(remaining);
389	      send(id, { removed });
390	      return;
391	    }
392	
393	    sendError(id, `Unknown method: ${method}`);
394	  } catch (err) {
395	    sendError(id, String(err));
396	  }
397	});
398	
```

**Output:**

```json
1	/**
2	 * rpc-types.ts — JSON-RPC 2.0 协议类型定义（Python ↔ Bun sidecar）。
3	 *
4	 * 本文件定义 sidecar 通信协议的全部类型。核心 RPC 方法由
5	 * session-bridge.ts 实现，事件映射遵循 Maxma 前端 WS 协议格式。
6	 */
7	
8	// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
9	// JSON-RPC 2.0 Envelope
10	// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
11	
12	/** JSON-RPC 2.0 请求（Python → sidecar） */
13	export interface RpcRequest {
14	  jsonrpc: "2.0";
15	  method: string;
16	  id: number;
17	  params?: Record<string, unknown>;
18	}
19	
20	/** JSON-RPC 2.0 响应（sidecar → Python） */
21	export interface RpcResponse {
22	  jsonrpc: "2.0";
23	  id: number | null;
24	  result?: unknown;
25	  error?: { message: string; data?: unknown };
26	}
27	
28	/** JSON-RPC 2.0 通知 / 事件推送（sidecar → Python） */
29	export interface RpcNotification {
30	  jsonrpc: "2.0";
31	  method: "event";
32	  params: {
33	    session_id: string;
34	    event: MaxmaEvent;
35	  };
36	}
37	
38	// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
39	// RPC Methods — 参数 & 返回值
40	// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
41	
42	export type RpcMethodName =
43	  | "create_session"
44	  | "prompt"
45	  | "cancel"
46	  | "destroy_session";
47	
48	export interface CreateSessionParams {
49	  model: string;
50	  system_prompt?: string;
51	  cwd?: string;
52	  tools?: string[];
53	}
54	
55	export interface CreateSessionResult {
56	  session_id: string;
57	}
58	
59	export interface PromptParams {
60	  session_id: string;
61	  message: string;
62	}
63	
64	export interface PromptResult {
65	  ok: true;
66	}
67	
68	export interface CancelParams {
69	  session_id: string;
70	}
71	
72	export interface CancelResult {
73	  ok: true;
74	}
75	
76	export interface DestroySessionParams {
77	  session_id: string;
78	}
79	
80	export interface DestroySessionResult {
81	  ok: true;
82	}
83	
84	// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
85	// Events — Maxma 前端 WS 协议格式
86	// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
87	
88	/** Sidecar 可推送的全部事件类型（由 mapPiEventToMaxma 映射产生） */
89	export type MaxmaEvent =
90	  | { type: "thinking_start"; payload: { timestamp: number } }
91	  | { type: "token"; payload: { token: string } }
92	  | { type: "thinking_end"; payload: { timestamp: number } }
93	  | { type: "tool_start"; payload: { tool_name: string; input: string } }
94	  | {
95	      type: "tool_end";
96	      payload: {
97	        tool_name: string;
98	        output: string;
99	        elapsed: number;
100	        tool_data?: Record<string, unknown>;
101	      };
102	    }
103	  | {
104	      type: "tool_error";
105	      payload: { tool_name: string; error: string };
106	    }
107	  | { type: "answer"; payload: { content: string } }
108	  | {
109	      type: "done";
110	      payload: { turn_id?: string; context_usage?: Record<string, unknown> };
111	    }
112	  | {
113	      type: "error";
114	      payload: {
115	        code: string;
116	        message: string;
117	        trace_id?: string;
118	      };
119	    }
120	  | { type: "context_usage"; payload: Record<string, unknown> };
121	
```

1	/**
2	 * tools/index.ts — 注册所有 Maxma 自定义工具作为原生 oh-my-pi AgentTool
3	 *
4	 * 每个工具实现 ToolDefinition 接口，用于 createAgentSession({ customTools })。

7	import type { ToolDefinition } from "@oh-my-pi/pi-coding-agent";
8	import { z } from "zod/v4";
9	import { todoistTools } from "./todoist";
10	
11	// ── Weather Tool ────────────────────────────────────────
12	
13	const weatherParams = z.object({
14	  city: z.string().describe("城市名称，如 '北京'、'上海'"),
15	});
16	
17	const weatherTool: ToolDefinition<typeof weatherParams> = {
18	  name: "get_current_weather",
19	  label: "Get Current Weather",
20	  description: "获取指定城市的实时天气信息，包括温度、湿度、风力、天气状况等",
21	  parameters: weatherParams,
22	  execute: async (toolCallId, params) => {
23	    const city = params.city;
24	    const apiKey = process.env.UAPIS_API_KEY;
25	
26	    if (!apiKey) {
27	      // Fallback: use public wttr.in API
28	      try {
29	        const res = await fetch(`https://wttr.in/${encodeURIComponent(city)}?format=%C+%t+%h+%w&lang=zh`);
30	        const text = await res.text();
31	        return { content: [{ type: "text", text: `${city} 天气: ${text}` }] };
32	      } catch (e) {
33	        return { content: [{ type: "text", text: `${city} 天气暂时无法获取` }] };
34	      }
35	    }
36	
37	    try {
38	      const res = await fetch(`https://api.help.bj.cn/weather/?id=${encodeURIComponent(city)}&key=${apiKey}`);
39	      const data = await res.json() as Record<string, unknown>;
40	      return { content: [{ type: "text", text: JSON.stringify(data, null, 2) }] };
41	    } catch (e) {
42	      return { content: [{ type: "text", text: `获取天气失败: ${String(e)}` }] };
43	    }
44	  },
45	};
46	
47	// ── Holiday Calendar Tool ───────────────────────────────
48	
49	const holidayParams = z.object({
50	  year: z.string().optional().describe("年份，如 '2026'，默认当前年份"),
51	});
52	
53	const holidayTool: ToolDefinition<typeof holidayParams> = {
54	  name: "holiday_calendar",
55	  label: "Holiday Calendar",
56	  description: "获取指定年份的中国法定节假日安排，包括调休信息",
57	  parameters: holidayParams,
58	  execute: async (toolCallId, params) => {
59	    const year = params.year || String(new Date().getFullYear());
60	
61	    // Try uapis API first
62	    const apiKey = process.env.UAPIS_API_KEY;
63	    if (apiKey) {
64	      try {
65	        const res = await fetch(`https://api.help.bj.cn/apis/holiday/${year}?key=${apiKey}`);
66	        const data = await res.json() as Record<string, unknown>;
67	        return { content: [{ type: "text", text: JSON.stringify(data, null, 2) }] };
68	      } catch (e) {
69	        // Fall through to public API
70	      }
71	    }
72	
73	    // Public API fallback
74	    try {
75	      const res = await fetch(`https://raw.githubusercontent.com/NateScarlet/holiday-cn/master/${year}.json`);
76	      const data = await res.json() as Record<string, unknown>;
77	      return { content: [{ type: "text", text: JSON.stringify(data, null, 2) }] };
78	    } catch (e) {

80	    }
81	  },
82	};
83	
84	// ── Tarot Tool ──────────────────────────────────────────
85	
86	const tarotParams = z.object({
87	  count: z.number().optional().describe("抽取张数，默认 1 张，最大 3 张"),
88	  question: z.string().optional().describe("占卜的问题或主题"),
89	});
90	
91	const tarotTool: ToolDefinition<typeof tarotParams> = {
92	  name: "tarot",
93	  label: "Tarot",
94	  description: "抽取塔罗牌进行占卜，可指定张数和问题",
95	  parameters: tarotParams,
96	  execute: async (toolCallId, params) => {
97	    const count = Math.min(Math.max(params.count || 1, 1), 3);
98	    const question = params.question || "未指定问题";
99	
100	    const cards = [
101	      { name: "愚者", meaning: "新的开始、冒险、天真、无限可能" },
102	      { name: "魔术师", meaning: "创造力、自信、技能、资源" },
103	      { name: "女祭司", meaning: "直觉、潜意识、内在智慧" },
104	      { name: "女皇", meaning: "丰饶、滋养、自然、母性" },
105	      { name: "皇帝", meaning: "权威、结构、稳定、父性" },
106	      { name: "教皇", meaning: "传统、信仰、精神指引" },
107	      { name: "恋人", meaning: "选择、爱情、关系、价值观" },
108	      { name: "战车", meaning: "胜利、决心、意志力、征服" },
109	      { name: "力量", meaning: "内在力量、勇气、耐心、慈悲" },
110	      { name: "隐士", meaning: "内省、寻求真理、独处" },
111	      { name: "命运之轮", meaning: "变化、循环、命运、转折点" },
112	      { name: "正义", meaning: "公正、平衡、真相、法律" },
113	      { name: "倒吊人", meaning: "牺牲、放下、新视角、暂停" },
114	      { name: "死神", meaning: "结束、转变、放下过去、新生" },
115	      { name: "节制", meaning: "平衡、适度、调和、耐心" },
116	      { name: "恶魔", meaning: "束缚、执着、物质主义、欲望" },
117	      { name: "高塔", meaning: "突然变化、颠覆、觉醒、重建" },
118	      { name: "星星", meaning: "希望、灵感、平静、重生" },
119	      { name: "月亮", meaning: "幻想、恐惧、潜意识、困惑" },
120	      { name: "太阳", meaning: "成功、喜悦、活力、成就" },
121	      { name: "审判", meaning: "觉醒、重生、内在召唤、评判" },
122	      { name: "世界", meaning: "完成、圆满、成就、旅程终点" },
123	    ];
124	
125	    // Shuffle and pick
126	    const shuffled = [...cards].sort(() => Math.random() - 0.5);
127	    const picked = shuffled.slice(0, count);
128	
129	    const result = picked.map((card, i) => {
130	      const position = count > 1 ? [`第 ${i + 1} 张`, "正位", "逆位"][Math.floor(Math.random() * 3) % 3] : "";
131	      return `${card.name}${position ? `（${position}）` : ""}: ${card.meaning}`;
132	    }).join("\n");
133	
134	    const response = count > 1
135	      ? `🔮 塔罗牌占卜 — 问题：${question}\n\n${result}`
136	      : `🔮 塔罗牌占卜 — 问题：${question}\n\n抽到的牌：${result}`;
137	
138	    return { content: [{ type: "text", text: response }] };
139	  },
140	};
141	
142	// ── Register All ────────────────────────────────────────
143	
144	export function registerCustomTools(): ToolDefinition[] {
145	  return [
146	    weatherTool,
147	    holidayTool,
148	    tarotTool,
149	    ...todoistTools,
150	  ];
151	}
152

```json
1	/**
2	 * tools/todoist.ts — Todoist REST API v2 集成工具（10个工具）
3	 *
4	 * 使用环境变量 TODOIST_API_TOKEN 进行 Bearer Token 认证。
5	 * API 文档：https://developer.todoist.com/rest/v2/
6	 */
7	
8	import type { ToolDefinition } from "@oh-my-pi/pi-coding-agent";
9	import { z } from "zod/v4";
10	
11	// ── 共享 fetch 封装 ──────────────────────────────────────────
12	
13	const todoistFetch = async (path: string, options?: RequestInit) => {
14	  const token = process.env.TODOIST_API_TOKEN;
15	  if (!token) throw new Error("TODOIST_API_TOKEN 未配置");
16	
17	  const res = await fetch(`https://api.todoist.com/rest/v2${path}`, {
18	    ...options,
19	    headers: {
20	      Authorization: `Bearer ${token}`,
21	      "Content-Type": "application/json",
22	      ...(options?.headers as Record<string, string>),
23	    },
24	  });
25	
26	  if (!res.ok) {
27	    const body = await res.text().catch(() => "");
28	    throw new Error(
29	      `Todoist API error: ${res.status} ${res.statusText}${body ? ` - ${body}` : ""}`,
30	    );
31	  }
32	
33	  // 204 No Content 表示成功但无响应体（如 DELETE / close / reopen）
34	  if (res.status === 204) return null;
35	
36	  return res.json();
37	};
38	
39	// ── 1. todo_add ──────────────────────────────────────────────
40	
41	const addParams = z.object({
42	  content: z.string().describe("任务内容"),
43	  project_id: z.string().optional().describe("项目 ID"),
44	  due_string: z
45	    .string()
46	    .optional()
47	    .describe("截止日期描述，如 'today'、'tomorrow'、'next Monday'"),
48	  priority: z.number().optional().describe("优先级，1-4"),
49	});
50	
51	const todoAddTool: ToolDefinition<typeof addParams> = {
52	  name: "todo_add",
53	  label: "Add Todoist Task",
54	  description: "向 Todoist 添加新任务",
55	  parameters: addParams,
56	  execute: async (_toolCallId, params) => {
