29	from config.settings import get_settings
30	from tools import get_all_tools, merge_tool_lists
31	from tools.base import format_error
32	from tools.path_security import check_path_access
33	
34	logger = logging.getLogger(__name__)
35	
36	router = APIRouter()
37	
38	_LOCAL_REF_PREFIX = "local:"
39	_MODEL_ROLES_PATH = CONFIG_DIR / "model_roles.yaml"
40	
41	
42	@dataclass(frozen=True)
43	class ThinkPathExecution:
44	    """Validated, opt-in execution preference for one chat turn.
45	
46	    The browser can only submit a fixed ThinkPath id.  Resolving its role and
47	    selecting a provider happens server-side, so a client cannot smuggle an
48	    arbitrary provider role, model capability, or cost preference into a chat
49	    request.
50	    """
51	
52	    path: ThinkPath | None = None
53	    provider: Any | None = None
54	    model_name: str | None = None
55	
56	
57	def _resolve_think_path_execution(
58	    think_path_id: object,
59	    *,
60	    think_path_enabled: bool,
61	    declarative_model_routing_enabled: bool,
62	    has_explicit_model_selection: bool,
63	    provider_manager: Any | None,
64	    model_roles_path: Path = _MODEL_ROLES_PATH,
65	) -> ThinkPathExecution:
66	    """Resolve a visible ThinkPath without weakening model-selection rules.
67	
68	    A path is ignored unless its feature flag is on.  Explicit provider/model
69	    choices always win, and an unavailable/malformed declarative rule leaves
70	    the normal default route untouched.  This helper performs no I/O besides
71	    reading the local role configuration and never changes provider state.
72	    """
73	    if not think_path_enabled:
74	        return ThinkPathExecution()
75	
76	    path = get_think_path(think_path_id if isinstance(think_path_id, str) else None)
77	    if path is None:
78	        return ThinkPathExecution()
79	
80	    if (
81	        not declarative_model_routing_enabled
82	        or has_explicit_model_selection
83	        or provider_manager is None
84	    ):
85	        return ThinkPathExecution(path=path)
86	
87	    try:
88	        role = resolve_model_role(model_roles_path, path.role)
89	        selected = provider_manager.select_for_role(role)
90	    except Exception:
91	        # Role routing is an optional convenience.  A bad local rule or an
92	        # unexpected provider implementation must never reject the message.
93	        logger.warning("[chat] ThinkPath model routing unavailable", exc_info=True)
94	        return ThinkPathExecution(path=path)
95	
96	    if selected is None:
97	        return ThinkPathExecution(path=path)
98	    provider, model_name = selected
99	    if not isinstance(model_name, str) or not model_name.strip():
100	        return ThinkPathExecution(path=path)
101	    return ThinkPathExecution(path=path, provider=provider, model_name=model_name)
102	
103	
104	def _think_path_runtime_context(path: ThinkPath | None) -> str:
105	    """Return trusted, fixed execution guidance for a selected path only."""
106	    if path is None:
107	        return ""
108	    return (
109	        "[本轮执行偏好（用户已确认）]\n"
110	        f"采用“{path.label}”路径：{path.description}\n"
111	        f"预期深度：{path.depth}；预估成本：{path.estimated_cost}。"
112	    )
113	
114	
115	def _effective_auto_approve(session: SessionState, requested: object) -> bool:
116	    """Prevent a delegated session from exceeding its parent's approval policy."""
117	    context = (
118	        getattr(session, "delegation_context", None)
119	        if getattr(session, "is_subagent", False)
120	        else None
121	    )
122	    if context is None:
123	        return bool(requested)
124	    return bool(requested) and bool(context.auto_approve)
125	
126	
127	def _get_provider_context(app_state) -> tuple[int, str]:
128	    """从 ProviderManager 获取默认 context_window 和 model_name。"""
129	    mgr = getattr(app_state, "provider_manager", None)
130	    if mgr is not None and mgr.count > 0:
131	        for provider in mgr.iter_enabled():
132	            return provider.config.context_window, provider.default_model
133	    return 256_000, ""
134	
135	
136	def _build_runtime_context_for_agent(
137	    app_state, turn_tools, current_model_name: str | None
138	) -> str:
139	    """生成运行时配置摘要，注入到 agent 的 episodic_context。
140	
141	    让 agent 每轮都能"看到"自己的配置全貌（providers/MCP/工具统计），
142	    减少执行路径的不确定性。失败时返回空字符串，不阻塞主流程。
143	    """
144	    try:
145	        from agent.runtime_context import build_runtime_context
146	
147	        provider_manager = getattr(app_state, "provider_manager", None)
148	        native_count = sum(
149	            1
150	            for t in turn_tools
151	            if not t.name.split("_")[0].islower() or "_" not in t.name
152	        )
153	        # 更准确的统计：MCP 工具名通常带 server_id 前缀
154	        from tools import TOOL_CATEGORIES
155	
156	        all_native_names: set[str] = set()
157	        for names in TOOL_CATEGORIES.values():
158	            all_native_names.update(names)
159	        native_count = sum(1 for t in turn_tools if t.name in all_native_names)
160	        mcp_count = len(turn_tools) - native_count
161	
162	        return build_runtime_context(
163	            provider_manager=provider_manager,
164	            mcp_tool_count=mcp_count,
165	            native_tool_count=native_count,
166	            current_model_name=current_model_name,
167	        )
168	    except Exception as e:
169	        logger.warning("[chat] 运行时配置摘要生成失败: %s", e)
170	        return ""
171	
172	
173	async def _process_image_refs(user_message: str) -> str:
174	    """从用户消息中提取图片引用，自动描述图片内容并追加到消息末尾。
175	
176	    流程：
177	    1. 解析 __refs__ 块中的 image 类型引用
178	    2. 对每个有 path 的图片调用 GLM-5V-Turbo 生成描述
179	    3. 将描述追加到用户消息文本末尾（在 __refs__ 之前）
180	
181	    Returns:
182	        增强后的用户消息文本
183	    """
184	    import re
185	
186	    # 提取 refs 块
187	    refs_start = user_message.rfind("__refs__")
188	    if refs_start == -1:
189	        return user_message
190	
191	    refs_end = user_message.find("__/refs__", refs_start)
192	    if refs_end == -1:
193	        return user_message
194	
195	    refs_json = user_message[refs_start + len("__refs__") : refs_end]
196	    try:
197	        refs_list = json.loads(refs_json)
198	    except (json.JSONDecodeError, ValueError):
199	        return user_message
200	
201	    # 提取图片引用
202	    image_paths = []
203	    for ref_item in refs_list:
204	        if isinstance(ref_item, dict) and ref_item.get("type") == "image":
205	            path = ref_item.get("path", "")
206	            if path:
207	                image_paths.append((path, ref_item.get("label", "image")))
208	
209	    if not image_paths:
210	        return user_message
211	
212	    # 对每张图片生成描述
213	    descriptions = []
214	    for path, label in image_paths:
215	        try:
216	            desc = await _describe_image(path)
217	            if desc:
218	                descriptions.append(f"[图片 {label}: {desc}]")
219	        except Exception as e:
220	            logger.warning(f"Failed to describe image {path}: {e}")
221	            descriptions.append(f"[图片 {label}: 描述失败 - {str(e)[:80]}]")
222	
223	    if not descriptions:
224	        return user_message
225	
226	    # 将描述插入到 __refs__ 之前
227	    before_refs = user_message[:refs_start].rstrip()
228	    after_refs = user_message[refs_start:]
229	    desc_text = "\n\n" + "\n".join(descriptions)
230	    return before_refs + desc_text + "\n\n" + after_refs
231	
232	
233	def _resolve_local_image_ref(image_ref: str) -> Path:
234	    """将前端图片 ref 解析为已通过路径安全检查的本地路径。"""
235	    path_text = image_ref.strip()
236	    if path_text.startswith(_LOCAL_REF_PREFIX):
237	        path_text = path_text[len(_LOCAL_REF_PREFIX) :].strip()
238	    if not path_text:
239	        raise ValueError("图片路径为空")
240	
241	    file_path = Path(path_text).expanduser().resolve(strict=False)
242	    blocked = check_path_access(str(file_path))
243	    if blocked:
244	        raise PermissionError(blocked)
245	    return file_path
246	
247	
248	async def _describe_image(image_path: str) -> str:
249	    """调用 GLM-5V-Turbo 描述单张图片。"""
250	    import base64
251	    import mimetypes
252	
253	    file_path = _resolve_local_image_ref(image_path)
254	    if not file_path.exists():
255	        raise FileNotFoundError(f"图片文件不存在: {image_path}")
256	
257	    # 读取并编码图片
258	    image_bytes = file_path.read_bytes()
259	    mime = mimetypes.guess_type(str(file_path))[0] or "image/png"
260	    image_b64 = base64.b64encode(image_bytes).decode("utf-8")
261	    data_url = f"data:{mime};base64,{image_b64}"
262	
263	    # 调用 GLM-5V-Turbo
264	    from zai import ZhipuAiClient
265	
266	    settings = get_settings()
267	    if not settings.zhipuai_api_key:
268	        return "(图片描述不可用: 未配置智谱 API Key)"
269	
270	    client = ZhipuAiClient(api_key=settings.zhipuai_api_key)
271	
272	    response = await asyncio.to_thread(
273	        client.chat.completions.create,
274	        model="glm-5v-turbo",
275	        messages=[
276	            {
277	                "role": "user",
278	                "content": [
279	                    {"type": "image_url", "image_url": {"url": data_url}},
280	                    {
281	                        "type": "text",
282	                        "text": "请简洁描述这张图片的主要内容，包括关键元素、场景和文字（如果有）。控制在 100 字以内。",
283	                    },
284	                ],
285	            }
286	        ],
287	        thinking={"type": "enabled"},
288	        stream=False,
289	    )
290	
291	    return response.choices[0].message.content or "(无法描述)"
292	
293	
294	async def _get_recent_ai_messages(session, config, limit: int = 5) -> list[str]:
295	    """从 checkpoint 获取最近 N 条 AI 消息内容。"""
296	    try:
297	        cpt = await session.checkpointer.aget_tuple(config)
298	        if cpt is None:
299	            return []
300	        messages = cpt.checkpoint.get("channel_values", {}).get("messages", [])
301	        # 从后往前取 AI 消息（排除最后一条，因为那是当前回复）
302	        ai_messages = []
303	        for msg in reversed(messages[:-1]):
304	            if hasattr(msg, "type") and msg.type == "ai":
305	                content = msg.content if hasattr(msg, "content") else str(msg)
306	                if content:
307	                    ai_messages.append(content)
308	                    if len(ai_messages) >= limit:
309	                        break
310	        return ai_messages
311	    except Exception:
312	        return []
313	
314	
315	async def _stream_turn_sidecar(
316	    ws: WebSocket,
317	    session: SessionState,
318	    user_message_for_llm: str,
319	    system_prompt: str,
320	    current_provider_id: str,
321	    current_model_name: str | None,
322	) -> str:
323	    """Execute a turn using oh-my-pi sidecar (Bun subprocess).
324	
325	    Returns final_answer string for post-processing (stickers, memory, etc.).
326	    Intermediate events (token, tool_start, tool_end, tool_error) are streamed
327	    to the frontend via WS in real-time.
328	
329	    The answer and done events are NOT sent here — the existing post-processing
330	    pipeline in _run_agent_turn handles those (including sticker processing).
331	    """
332	    app_state = ws.app.state
333	
334	    # 1. Ensure sidecar is running
335	    mgr = app_state.sidecar_manager
336	    await mgr.start()
337	    client = mgr.client
338	    assert client is not None, "Sidecar client not available"
339	
340	    # 2. Look up sidecar session (persistent SessionMap, fallback to in-memory)
341	    from api.pi_bridge.session_adapter import SessionMap
342	    _session_map = SessionMap()
343	    sidecar_sid = _session_map.get_sidecar_id(session.session_id)
344	    if not sidecar_sid:
345	        sidecar_sid = getattr(session, "_sidecar_session_id", None)
346	
347	    if not sidecar_sid:
348	        if current_provider_id:
349	            model_str = f"{current_provider_id}/{current_model_name or 'gpt-4o'}"
350	        else:
351	            model_str = current_model_name or "gpt-4o"
352	
353	        # 首次创建 sidecar session，system_prompt 含人设/规则/技能
354	        # 如果是重启后重建，从 SessionMap 恢复最近对话上下文
355	        _sidecar_system_prompt = system_prompt
356	        try:
357	            _past_turns = _session_map.get_recent_turns(session.session_id, count=5)
358	            if _past_turns:
359	                _history_lines = []
360	                for t in _past_turns:
361	                    _history_lines.append(f"用户: {t.get('user', '')}")
362	                    _history_lines.append(f"助理: {t.get('assistant', '')}")
363	                _history_text = "\n".join(_history_lines)
364	                _sidecar_system_prompt = (
365	                    f"{system_prompt}\n\n"
366	                    f"[历史对话上下文（共 {len(_past_turns)} 轮）]\n"
367	                    f"{_history_text}\n"
368	                )
369	                logger.info(
370	                    "[sidecar] Restored %d past turns for session %s",
371	                    len(_past_turns), session.session_id[:8],
372	                )
373	        except Exception:
374	            logger.debug("[sidecar] Failed to restore past turns", exc_info=True)
375	
376	        result = await client.call("create_session", {
377	            "model": model_str,
378	            "system_prompt": _sidecar_system_prompt,
379	            "cwd": ".",
380	        })
381	        sidecar_sid = result["session_id"]
382	        session._sidecar_session_id = sidecar_sid
383	        _session_map.set_mapping(session.session_id, sidecar_sid)
384	        logger.info(
385	            "[sidecar] Created session %s for Maxma session %s",
386	            sidecar_sid[:8], session.session_id[:8],
387	        )
388	
389	    # 3. 情景记忆：每轮对话以用户消息为查询检索相关历史，注入到 user_message
390	    _user_message_for_llm = user_message_for_llm
391	    try:
392	        _episodic_mm = getattr(app_state, "episodic_mm", None)
393	        if _episodic_mm is not None and user_message_for_llm:
394	            from agent.context_manager import retrieve_from_episodic
395	            _episodic_context = retrieve_from_episodic(
396	                user_message_for_llm,
397	                _episodic_mm,
398	                top_k=3,
399	                session_id=session.session_id,
400	            )
401	            if _episodic_context:
402	                _user_message_for_llm = (
403	                    f"[相关情景记忆]\n{_episodic_context}\n\n"
404	                    f"---\n\n{user_message_for_llm}"
405	                )
406	    except Exception:
407	        logger.warning("[sidecar] Episodic retrieval failed", exc_info=True)
408	
409	    # 3. Register event handlers to forward intermediate events to WS
410	    final_answer = ""
411	    turn_done = asyncio.Event()
412	
413	    async def _on_token(sid: str, event: dict):
414	        if sid != sidecar_sid:
415	            return
416	        try:
417	            await ws.send_json({
418	                "type": "token",
419	                "payload": {"token": event.get("payload", {}).get("token", "")},
420	            })
421	        except Exception:
422	            pass
423	
424	    async def _on_tool_start(sid: str, event: dict):
425	        if sid != sidecar_sid:
426	            return
427	        try:
428	            payload = event.get("payload", {})
429	            await ws.send_json({
430	                "type": "tool_start",
431	                "payload": {
432	                    "tool_name": payload.get("tool_name", ""),
433	                    "input": payload.get("input", ""),
434	                },
435	            })
436	        except Exception:
437	            pass
438	
439	    async def _on_tool_end(sid: str, event: dict):
440	        if sid != sidecar_sid:
441	            return
442	        try:
443	            payload = event.get("payload", {})
444	            await ws.send_json({
445	                "type": "tool_end",
446	                "payload": {
447	                    "tool_name": payload.get("tool_name", ""),
448	                    "output": payload.get("output", ""),
449	                    "elapsed": payload.get("elapsed", 0),
450	                },
451	            })
452	        except Exception:
453	            pass
454	
455	    async def _on_tool_error(sid: str, event: dict):
456	        if sid != sidecar_sid:
457	            return
458	        try:
459	            payload = event.get("payload", {})
460	            await ws.send_json({
461	                "type": "tool_error",
462	                "payload": {
463	                    "tool_name": payload.get("tool_name", ""),
464	                    "error": payload.get("error", ""),
465	                },
466	            })
467	        except Exception:
468	            pass
469	
470	    async def _on_answer(sid: str, event: dict):
471	        nonlocal final_answer
472	        if sid != sidecar_sid:
473	            return
474	        # Extract the answer but do NOT send to WS — the existing post-processing
475	        # in _run_agent_turn handles sticker processing + answer push.
476	        final_answer = event.get("payload", {}).get("content", "")
477	
478	    async def _on_done(sid: str, event: dict):
479	        if sid != sidecar_sid:
480	            return
481	        turn_done.set()
482	
483	    # Register all event handlers
484	    unsubs = []
485	    for evt_type, handler in [
486	        ("token", _on_token),
487	        ("tool_start", _on_tool_start),
488	        ("tool_end", _on_tool_end),
489	        ("tool_error", _on_tool_error),
490	        ("answer", _on_answer),
491	        ("done", _on_done),
492	    ]:
493	        unsub = client.on(evt_type, handler)
494	        unsubs.append(unsub)
495	
496	    # 4. Execute prompt via sidecar
497	    try:
498	        await client.call("prompt", {
499	            "session_id": sidecar_sid,
500	            "message": _user_message_for_llm,
501	        })
502	        # Wait for done event (sidecar signals completion)
503	        await asyncio.wait_for(turn_done.wait(), timeout=600)
504	    except asyncio.TimeoutError:
505	        logger.warning("[sidecar] Turn timed out for session %s", sidecar_sid)
506	        if not final_answer:
507	            final_answer = "（Sidecar 处理超时，请重试）"
508	    except Exception as e:
509	        logger.exception("[sidecar] Turn failed for session %s", sidecar_sid)
510	        if not final_answer:
511	            final_answer = f"（Sidecar 处理出错：{e}）"
512	    finally:
513	        for unsub in unsubs:
514	            try:
515	                unsub()
516	            except Exception:
517	                pass
518	
519	    return final_answer
520	
521	
522	async def _calculate_context_usage(
523	    session,
524	    system_prompt,
525	    *,
526	    max_tokens: int = 256_000,
527	    model_name: str = "",
528	) -> dict:
529	    """
530	    从 checkpointer 拉取消息列表，估算上下文用量。
531	    返回字典，包括现用量、最大用量、占比、模型名称。
532	    """
533	    try:
534	        cpt = await session.checkpointer.aget_tuple(
535	            {"configurable": {"thread_id": session.session_id}}
536	        )
537	        if cpt is not None:
538	            channel_values = cpt.checkpoint.get("channel_values", {})
539	            counting_messages = channel_values.get("messages", [])
540	        else:
541	            counting_messages = []
542	    except Exception:
543	        logger.debug(
544	            "Failed to read checkpoint for context usage estimation", exc_info=True
545	        )
546	        counting_messages = []
547	
548	    return estimate_context_usage(
549	        messages=counting_messages,
550	        system_prompt=system_prompt,
551	        max_tokens=max_tokens,
552	        model_name=model_name,
553	        system_prompt_parts=get_system_prompt_parts(),
554	    )
555	
556	
557	async def _inject_cancel_tool_messages(session, config, ws: WebSocket) -> None:
558	    """为 checkpoint 中孤立的 tool_calls 注入统一格式的正常 ToolMessage，
559	    并通知前端使对应工具气泡进入错误状态。
560	
561	    由 CancelledError 处理器调用，确保取消后 checkpoint 状态一致，
562	    下一条消息不会触发 "tool_calls without corresponding ToolMessage" 错误。
563	
564	    注入的 ToolMessage 使用 status="success"（默认），content 套用 format_error()
565	    统一错误响应格式，使 LLM 在下一轮能正确识别工具调用已被取消。
566	
567	    前端 tool_error 事件：如果对应工具气泡尚在 'running' 状态，则标记为 'error'；
568	    若工具从未启动过（无对应气泡）则事件被前端静默忽略。
569	
570	    与 time_traveler.py 的 undo_rounds() 使用同一模式（graph.aupdate_state）。
571	    注意必需传入 as_node="tools"，否则 aupdate_state 评估路由时会从 model 节点的
572	    model_to_tools 条件边走，检测到人造 ToolMessage 后返回 "model" 但该边目的地
573	    不含 "model" 导致 KeyError 使写入失败。
574	    """
575	    graph = session._graph
576	    if graph is None:
577	        return
578	
579	    try:
580	        state = await graph.aget_state(config)
581	    except Exception:
582	        logger.debug("Failed to get graph state for cancel cleanup", exc_info=True)
583	        return  # checkpoint 不可读时静默跳过
584	
585	    messages = state.values.get("messages", [])
586	    if not messages:
587	        return
588	
589	    # 从后往前找最后一个 AIMessage
590	    last_ai = None
591	    for i in range(len(messages) - 1, -1, -1):
592	        if isinstance(messages[i], AIMessage):
593	            last_ai = messages[i]
594	            break
595	
596	    if last_ai is None:
597	        return
598	
599	    tool_calls = getattr(last_ai, "tool_calls", [])
600	    if not tool_calls:
601	        return
602	
603	    # 收集其后所有 ToolMessage 的 tool_call_id 集合
604	    try:
605	        idx = messages.index(last_ai)
606	    except ValueError:
607	        return
608	    following = messages[idx + 1 :]
609	
610	    tool_msg_ids = {m.tool_call_id for m in following if isinstance(m, ToolMessage)}
611	
612	    orphaned = [tc for tc in tool_calls if tc["id"] not in tool_msg_ids]
613	    if not orphaned:
614	        return  # checkpoint 已一致
615	
616	    # 通知前端：使运行的工具体进入错误状态
617	    for tc in orphaned:
618	        try:
619	            await ws.send_json(
620	                {
621	                    "type": "tool_error",
622	                    "payload": {
623	                        "tool_name": tc["name"],
624	                        "error": "用户取消了该工具调用",
625	                    },
626	                }
627	            )
628	        except Exception:
629	            logger.debug(
630	                "Failed to send tool_error via WebSocket (connection may be closed)",
631	                exc_info=True,
632	            )
633	
634	    # 生成取消 ToolMessage 并写入 checkpoint
635	    cancel_msgs = []
636	    for tc in orphaned:
637	        cancel_msgs.append(
638	            ToolMessage(
639	                content=format_error("用户取消了该工具调用"),
640	                name=tc["name"],
641	                tool_call_id=tc["id"],
642	            )
643	        )
644	    try:
645	        await graph.aupdate_state(config, {"messages": cancel_msgs}, as_node="tools")
646	    except Exception as e:
647	        print(
648	            f"[cancel] aupdate_state failed: {type(e).__name__}: {e}", file=sys.stderr
649	        )
650	        raise
651	
652	
653	# ── 项目上下文自动感知 ──────────────────────────────────────────
654	
655	import re as _re
656	
657	# 匹配 Windows / Unix 绝对路径
658	_PATH_PATTERN = _re.compile(r"(?:[A-Za-z]:[\\/]|[\\/])(?:[\w .\-]+[\\/])*[\w .\-]+")
659	
660	
661	def _detect_project_path(message: str) -> str | None:
662	    """从用户消息中提取可能的项目根目录路径。"""
663	    matches = _PATH_PATTERN.findall(message)
664	    for m in matches:
665	        p = m.rstrip("\\/").rstrip()
666	        # 检查是否是目录
667	        from pathlib import Path as _Path
668	
669	        if _Path(p).is_dir():
670	            # 检查是否像项目根目录（含 .git 或 package.json 或 pyproject.toml 等）
671	            markers = [
672	                ".git",
673	                "package.json",
674	                "pyproject.toml",
675	                "Cargo.toml",
676	                "go.mod",
677	                "requirements.txt",
678	                "setup.py",
679	            ]
680	            if any((_Path(p) / marker).exists() for marker in markers):
681	                return p
682	    return None
683	
684	
685	def _get_project_context(session: SessionState, user_message: str) -> str | None:
686	    """获取项目上下文：优先用缓存，否则尝试从消息检测并扫描。"""
687	    # 已有缓存
688	    if session._project_context is not None:
689	        return session._project_context
690	
691	    # 尝试从消息检测项目路径
692	    project_path = _detect_project_path(user_message)
693	    if project_path is None:
694	        return None
695	
696	    # 扫描项目
697	    try:
698	        from agent.project_scanner import scan_project
699	
700	        ctx = scan_project(project_path)
701	        text = ctx.to_prompt_text()
702	        # 缓存到 session
703	        session._project_context = text
704	        session._project_path = project_path
705	        return text
706	    except Exception as e:
707	        import logging
708	
709	        logging.getLogger(__name__).warning("[project_scanner] 扫描失败: %s", e)
710	        return None
711	
712	
713	async def _project_completed_turn_to_episodic(
714	    *,
715	    graph,
716	    config: dict,
717	    episodic_mm,
718	    session_id: str,
719	    turn_id: str,
720	) -> None:
721	    """Best-effort 将一个成功的 chat turn 投影到情景记忆。
722	
723	    调用发生在客户端收到 ``done`` 事件后。情景记忆故障因此不会改变
724	    已完成对话的结果；存储层以 ``(session_id, turn_id)`` 保证重试幂等。
725	    """
726	    if episodic_mm is None:
727	        return
728	    try:
729	        episode_id = await commit_to_episodic(
730	            graph,
731	            config,
732	            episodic_mm,
733	            session_id=session_id,
734	            turn_id=turn_id,
735	        )
736	        if episode_id is None:
737	            logger.warning(
738	                "[episodic] projection produced no episode for session=%s turn=%s",
739	                session_id,
740	                turn_id,
741	            )
742	    except Exception:
743	        logger.exception(
744	            "[episodic] projection failed after completed response for session=%s turn=%s",
745	            session_id,
746	            turn_id,
747	        )
748	
749	
750	def _new_turn_id(turn_id: object = None) -> str:
751	    """Return a validated client id or create one before execution begins."""
752	    if isinstance(turn_id, str):
753	        candidate = turn_id.strip()
754	        if candidate and len(candidate) <= 128:
755	            return candidate
756	    return uuid.uuid4().hex
757	
758	
759	async def _is_memory_eligible_turn(graph, config: dict) -> bool:
760	    """Read the graph's explicit model outcome before persisting a turn.
761	
762	    Provider failures are intentionally rendered as helpful AI messages by the
763	    graph.  Their text is not a reliable persistence signal, particularly
764	    across locales and provider implementations, so only an explicit success
765	    marker allows automatic episodic/LTM projection.
766	    """
767	    try:
768	        state = await graph.aget_state(config)
769	        values = getattr(state, "values", {}) if state is not None else {}
770	        succeeded = values.get("llm_invocation_succeeded")
771	        if succeeded is True:
772	            return True
773	        if succeeded is False:
774	            logger.info("[memory] skipping failed model turn")
775	        else:
776	            logger.warning("[memory] skipping turn without model outcome metadata")
777	    except Exception:
778	        logger.warning(
779	            "[memory] skipping turn with unreadable model outcome", exc_info=True
780	        )
781	    return False
782	
783	
784	async def _run_agent_turn(
785	    ws: WebSocket,
786	    session: SessionState,
787	    user_message: str,
788	    private_mode: bool = False,
789	    auto_approve: bool = False,
790	    provider_id: str | None = None,
791	    model_name: str | None = None,
792	    think_path_id: str | None = None,
793	    turn_id: str | None = None,
794	):
795	    """
796	    在指定的session中编排一轮 Agent 对话。
797	    无返回值。
798	    以内置的 WebSocketCallback回调函数和前端通信系统作为副作用。
799	
800	    若指定了 provider_id + model_name，则从 ProviderManager 动态创建 LLM；
801	    否则退化到 app_state.llm 全局 fallback。
802	    """
803	    # 1. [准备环境] 从 WebSocket 获取应用状态
804	    app_state = ws.app.state
805	    current_task = asyncio.current_task()
806	    # The memory id is assigned before any model work.  Callers can pass a
807	    # stable client/request id when retrying after reconnect; otherwise this
808	    # invocation gets one stable id for its full lifetime.
809	    turn_id = _new_turn_id(turn_id)
810	    interaction.current_session_id.set(session.session_id)
811	    # ── 多模态：自动描述用户附带的图片 ──────────────────────────
812	    user_message = await _process_image_refs(user_message)
813	    # ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
814	
815	    # 获取默认上下文窗口大小和模型名（一次性解构，避免重复调用）
816	    default_max_tokens, fallback_model_name = _get_provider_context(app_state)
817	
818	    # 子会话在创建时带有不可变的 DelegationContext。前端连接后也必须
819	    # 消费它，不能让客户端 payload 或之后的全局 provider 配置改变父任务
820	    # 已授权的模型、工具或预算。普通会话保持原有选择逻辑。
821	    delegation_context = (
822	        getattr(session, "delegation_context", None)
823	        if getattr(session, "is_subagent", False)
824	        else None
825	    )
826	    delegation_helpers = None
827	    auto_approve = _effective_auto_approve(session, auto_approve)
828	    session.auto_approve = auto_approve
829	    interaction.set_session_auto_approve(session.session_id, auto_approve)
830	
831	    # 动态 LLM 选择（Phase 2：每次消息独立指定提供商/模型）
832	    # 阶段 3.3：指定 provider 失败时尝试 fallback 链（按 priority 排序）
833	    current_max_tokens = default_max_tokens
834	    current_provider_id = ""
835	    if provider_id and model_name and hasattr(app_state, "provider_manager"):
836	        try:
837	            provider = app_state.provider_manager.get(provider_id)
838	            llm = provider.create_llm(model_name, temperature=0.7, streaming=True)
839	            current_model_name = model_name
840	            current_max_tokens = provider.config.context_window
841	            current_provider_id = provider.config.id
842	        except KeyError:
843	            # 阶段 3.3：尝试 fallback 到下一个可用 provider
844	            fallback_provider = app_state.provider_manager.get_fallback(
845	                exclude_ids={provider_id} if provider_id else None
846	            )
847	            if fallback_provider is not None:
848	                logger.warning(
849	                    "[chat:%s] requested provider/model fallback: provider_id=%r model=%r not found; "
850	                    "switching to fallback provider=%r (priority=%d)",
851	                    session.session_id[:8],
852	                    provider_id,
853	                    model_name,
854	                    fallback_provider.config.id,
855	                    fallback_provider.config.priority,
856	                )
857	                llm = fallback_provider.create_llm(
858	                    fallback_provider.default_model,
859	                    temperature=0.7,
860	                    streaming=True,
861	                )
862	                current_model_name = fallback_provider.default_model
863	                current_max_tokens = fallback_provider.config.context_window
864	                current_provider_id = fallback_provider.config.id
865	            else:
866	                logger.warning(
867	                    "[chat:%s] requested provider/model fallback: provider_id=%r model=%r not found; "
868	                    "no fallback available, using default",
869	                    session.session_id[:8],
870	                    provider_id,
871	                    model_name,
872	                )
873	                llm = app_state.llm
874	                current_model_name = None
875	    elif provider_id or model_name:
876	        logger.warning(
877	            "[chat:%s] requested provider/model fallback: provider_id=%r model=%r incomplete or unavailable; "
878	            "using default provider/model=%r",
879	            session.session_id[:8],
880	            provider_id,
881	            model_name,
882	            fallback_model_name or "<unknown>",
883	        )
884	        llm = app_state.llm
885	        current_model_name = None
886	    else:
887	        llm = app_state.llm
888	        current_model_name = None
889	
890	    # ThinkPath is a user-confirmed depth preference, not an opaque prompt
891	    # classifier.  It may opt into declarative routing only when the user did
892	    # not already select a provider/model in this same request.
893	    settings = get_settings()
894	    think_path_execution = _resolve_think_path_execution(
895	        think_path_id,
896	        think_path_enabled=settings.think_path_enabled,
897	        declarative_model_routing_enabled=settings.declarative_model_routing_enabled,
898	        has_explicit_model_selection=bool(provider_id or model_name),
899	        provider_manager=getattr(app_state, "provider_manager", None),
900	    )
901	    if think_path_execution.provider is not None:
902	        try:
903	            routed_provider = think_path_execution.provider
904	            routed_model_name = think_path_execution.model_name
905	            llm = routed_provider.create_llm(
906	                routed_model_name,
907	                temperature=0.7,
908	                streaming=True,
909	            )
910	            current_provider_id = routed_provider.config.id
911	            current_model_name = routed_model_name
912	            current_max_tokens = routed_provider.config.context_window
913	            logger.info(
914	                "[chat:%s] ThinkPath %s selected provider=%s model=%s",
915	                session.session_id[:8],
916	                think_path_execution.path.id if think_path_execution.path else "",
917	                current_provider_id,
918	                current_model_name,
919	            )
920	        except Exception:
921	            # Do not turn an optional selection preference into a chat outage.
922	            # The previously selected/default LLM remains intact.
923	            logger.warning(
924	                "[chat:%s] ThinkPath route creation failed; using normal selection",
925	                session.session_id[:8],
926	                exc_info=True,
927	            )
928	
929	    if delegation_context is not None:
930	        from tools.sub_agent.delegation_context import (
931	            activate_delegation_context,
932	            bind_model_budget,
933	            prepare_delegated_tools,
934	            reset_delegation_context,
935	        )
936	
937	        delegation_helpers = (
938	            activate_delegation_context,
939	            prepare_delegated_tools,
940	            reset_delegation_context,
941	        )
942	        if delegation_context.remaining_seconds() <= 0:
943	            error = RuntimeError("子 Agent 的委托时间预算已耗尽")
944	            if (
945	                session._pending_result is not None
946	                and not session._pending_result.done()
947	            ):
948	                session._pending_result.set_exception(error)
949	            await ws.send_json(
950	                format_ws_error(ErrorCode.AGENT_ERROR, "子 Agent 的委托时间预算已耗尽")
951	            )
952	            return
953	        llm = bind_model_budget(delegation_context)
954	        current_model_name = delegation_context.model_name or current_model_name
955	        if delegation_context.max_tokens > 0:
956	            current_max_tokens = min(current_max_tokens, delegation_context.max_tokens)
957	
958	    if llm is None:
959	        error_collector.add_error(
960	            level="ERROR",
961	            category="llm",
962	            message="No LLM provider configured",
963	            session_id=session.session_id,
964	        )
965	        await ws.send_json(
966	            format_ws_error(
967	                ErrorCode.NO_LLM,
968	                "No LLM provider configured. Add one in Model Settings first.",
969	            )
970	        )
971	        return
972	
973	    # A normal parent turn also activates a context.  This makes a top-level
974	    # delegation inherit the model actually selected for this request rather
975	    # than rediscovering app_state.llm inside the tool.
976	    if delegation_context is None:
977	        from tools.sub_agent.delegation_context import (
978	            activate_delegation_context,
979	            create_delegation_context,
980	            reset_delegation_context,
981	        )
982	
983	        execution_context = create_delegation_context(
984	            app_state,
985	            session.session_id,
986	            model=llm,
987	            provider_id=current_provider_id,
988	            model_name=current_model_name,
989	            auto_approve=auto_approve,
990	        )
991	        delegation_helpers = (
992	            activate_delegation_context,
993	            None,
994	            reset_delegation_context,
995	        )
996	    else:
997	        execution_context = delegation_context
998	
999	    system_prompt = build_system_prompt()
1000	
1001	    # ── 项目上下文自动感知 ──────────────────────────────────────
1002	    # 缓存优化：project_ctx 不再追加到 system_prompt，而是 prepend 到
1003	    # user_message。这样 SystemMessage 保持完全稳定，有利于 DeepSeek
1004	    # prompt cache 命中（project_ctx 仅在检测到项目路径时非空）。
1005	    project_ctx = _get_project_context(session, user_message)
1006	    # ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
1007	
1008	    # 缓存优化：使用全量工具集 + MCP 工具，避免每轮工具集变化破坏
1009	    # DeepSeek prompt cache（tools 字段是 prompt 前缀的一部分）。
1010	    # 全量工具带来的额外 token 会被缓存，成本远低于缓存 miss。
1011	    mcp_tools = getattr(ws.app.state, "mcp_tools", None) or []
1012	    turn_tools = merge_tool_lists(
1013	        get_all_tools(), list(mcp_tools), log_collisions=False
1014	    )
1015	    if delegation_context is not None:
1016	        # This is the execution boundary, not merely prompt-time filtering.
1017	        # ScopedTool validates path arguments immediately before each call.
1018	        turn_tools = delegation_helpers[1](turn_tools, delegation_context)
1019	    # 4 层架构：注入情景记忆管理器，启用 episodic_retriever 节点
1020	    episodic_mm = getattr(ws.app.state, "episodic_mm", None)
1021	    # B6：生成运行时配置摘要，让 agent 感知自身的 providers/MCP/工具配置全貌
1022	    runtime_context_text = _build_runtime_context_for_agent(
1023	        app_state, turn_tools, current_model_name
1024	    )
1025	    think_path_context = _think_path_runtime_context(think_path_execution.path)
1026	    if think_path_context:
1027	        runtime_context_text = "\n\n".join(
1028	            part for part in (think_path_context, runtime_context_text) if part
1029	        )
1030	
1031	    # project_ctx prepend 到 user_message（不修改 system_prompt，保持缓存稳定）
1032	    if project_ctx:
1033	        user_message_for_llm = f"[项目上下文]\n{project_ctx}\n\n---\n\n{user_message}"
1034	    else:
1035	        user_message_for_llm = user_message
1036	
1037	    # oh-my-pi sidecar: no LangGraph state
1038	    config = None
1039	    agent_maxma = None
1040	    session._graph = None
1041	
1042	    # 2. [执行轮次] 流式执行 Agent 图，副作用推送最终回答，另有config回调副作用
1043	    final_answer = ""
1044	    _run_error: str | None = None
1045	    turn_completed = False
1046	    context_token = None
1047	    try:
1048	        # turn 开始时推送当前上下文用量（含刚加入的 user message）
1049	        initial_turn_usage = await _calculate_context_usage(
1050	            session,
1051	            system_prompt,
1052	            max_tokens=current_max_tokens,
1053	            model_name=current_model_name or "",
1054	        )
1055	        await ws.send_json({"type": "context_usage", "payload": initial_turn_usage})
1056	
1057	        context_token = delegation_helpers[0](execution_context)
1058	        if delegation_context is not None:
1059	            async with asyncio.timeout(delegation_context.remaining_seconds()):
1060	                final_answer = await _stream_turn_sidecar(
1061	                    ws,
1062	                    session,
1063	                    user_message_for_llm,
1064	                    system_prompt,
1065	                    current_provider_id,
1066	                    current_model_name,
1067	                )
1068	        else:
1069	            _turn_timeout = 600
1070	            try:
1071	                _turn_timeout = get_settings().turn_timeout
1072	            except Exception:
1073	                pass
1074	            async with asyncio.timeout(_turn_timeout):
1075	                final_answer = await _stream_turn_sidecar(
1076	                    ws,
1077	                    session,
1078	                    user_message_for_llm,
1079	                    system_prompt,
1080	                    current_provider_id,
1081	                    current_model_name,
1082	                )
1083	        # Sidecar mode: no graph state to inspect, trust the returned answer
1084	        turn_completed = bool(final_answer)
1085	
1086	        # 保存本轮对话到 SessionMap（用于侧边栏重启后恢复上下文）
1087	        if final_answer and not private_mode:
1088	            try:
1089	                from api.pi_bridge.session_adapter import SessionMap
1090	                SessionMap().append_turn(session.session_id, user_message, final_answer)
1091	            except Exception:
1092	                logger.debug("[sidecar] Failed to save turn to SessionMap", exc_info=True)
1093	
1094	        if final_answer:
1095	            # 表情包处理：分层决策架构
1096	            # 1. LLM 主动输出 [表情包:情绪] → 直接解析
1097	            # 2. LLM 未输出 → 决策器判断是否补发
1098	            from tools.sticker_utils import process_stickers
1099	
1100	            ai_recent = await _get_recent_ai_messages(session, config, limit=5)
1101	            processed_answer, _ = process_stickers(
1102	                final_answer,
1103	                user_message=user_message,
1104	                ai_recent_messages=ai_recent,
1105	            )
1106	            final_answer = processed_answer
1107	            await ws.send_json(
1108	                {  # [向前端通信] 1. 向客户端推送最终答案
1109	                    "type": "answer",
1110	                    "payload": {"content": processed_answer},
1111	                }
1112	            )
1113	    except asyncio.CancelledError:
1114	        # 清理 interaction 挂起 Future
1115	        await interaction.cancel_session(session.session_id)
1116	
1117	        # 修复 checkpoint：为孤立 tool_calls 注入取消 ToolMessage，并通知前端
1118	        try:
1119	            await _inject_cancel_tool_messages(session, config, ws)
1120	        except Exception as e:
1121	            logger.warning("[cancel] checkpoint cleanup error: %s", e)
1122	
1123	        # 向 checkpoint 注入一条"被中断"的 AIMessage，确保前端 loadHistoryFromBackend
1124	        # 能取到非空 finalAnswer，避免用户感知为"整轮对话被吞掉"。
1125	        # 注意：必须用 as_node="agent" 写入，否则 aupdate_state 路由会出错。
1126	        try:
1127	            interrupt_msg = AIMessage(
1128	                content="（回复已中断——可能因网络断开或切换页面。请重新提问以继续。）"
1129	            )
1130	            await agent_maxma.aupdate_state(
1131	                config, {"messages": [interrupt_msg]}, as_node="agent"
1132	            )
1133	        except Exception as e:
1134	            logger.warning("[cancel] failed to inject interrupt AIMessage: %s", e)
1135	
1136	        await ws.send_json(format_ws_error(ErrorCode.CANCELLED, "生成已取消"))
1137	    except Exception as e:
1138	        # 清理可能挂起的用户交互 Future，防止阻塞后续交互
1139	        await interaction.cancel_session(
1140	            session.session_id, "Agent 执行出错，交互已取消"
1141	        )
1142	        _run_error = str(e)
1143	        trace_id = uuid.uuid4().hex[:8]
1144	        logger.error(
1145	            f"[sub-agent:{session.session_id[:8]}] _run_agent_turn error: {e}",
1146	            exc_info=True,
1147	            extra={"trace_id": trace_id},
1148	        )
1149	        error_collector.add_exception(
1150	            e,
1151	            category="agent",
1152	            message=f"Agent 执行出错: {str(e)[:200]}",
1153	            trace_id=trace_id,
1154	            session_id=session.session_id,
1155	        )
1156	        await ws.send_json(
1157	            format_ws_error(
1158	                ErrorCode.AGENT_ERROR,
1159	                f"Agent 执行出错: {str(e)[:200]}",
1160	                trace_id=trace_id,
1161	            )
1162	        )
1163	    finally:
1164	        if context_token is not None:
1165	            delegation_helpers[2](context_token)
1166	        if session._active_task is current_task:
1167	            session._active_task = None
1168	        context_usage = await _calculate_context_usage(
1169	            session,
1170	            system_prompt,
1171	            max_tokens=current_max_tokens,
1172	            model_name=current_model_name or "",
1173	        )
1174	        await ws.send_json(
1175	            {  # [向前端通信] 3. 推送 turn 结束 + 上下文用量 + turn_id（用于记忆事件关联）
1176	                "type": "done",
1177	                "payload": {
1178	                    "turn_id": turn_id,
1179	                    "context_usage": context_usage,
1180	                },
1181	            }
1182	        )
1183	
1184	    # 3. [后处理] 增加消息计数器，将对话记录入长期记忆
1185	    # 修复：此前仅在 final_answer 非空时 +=2，错误轮次仍写 checkpointer（至少写入 HumanMessage）
1186	    # 但计数不增 → message_count 与 checkpointer 实际消息数漂移，导致：
1187	    # 1) undo 端点 max(0, count - deleted) 计算错误
1188	    # 2) const 会话 YAML metadata.message_count 不准，重启后显示错误
1189	    if final_answer:
1190	        session.message_count += 2  # human + ai
1191	    else:
1192	        # Agent 出错：graph.ainvoke 已把 HumanMessage 写入 checkpointer，但没有 AI 回复
1193	        session.message_count += 1
1194	    memory_eligible = turn_completed and bool(final_answer)
1195	    if not private_mode and memory_eligible:
1196	        if final_answer:
1197	            await _project_completed_turn_to_episodic(
1198	                graph=agent_maxma,
1199	                config=config,
1200	                episodic_mm=episodic_mm,
1201	                session_id=session.session_id,
1202	                turn_id=turn_id,
1203	            )
1204	        # 增量发送：只传成功轮次给记忆消费者，避免错误提示污染 LTM。
1205	        messages_for_memory = [
1206	            {"role": "user", "content": user_message},
1207	            {"role": "assistant", "content": final_answer},
1208	        ]
1209	        logger.info(
1210	            "[ltm] calling send_history, messages=%d (incremental)",
1211	            len(messages_for_memory),
1212	        )
1213	        try:
1214	            await app_state.ltm.send_history(
1215	                messages_for_memory,
1216	                session_id=session.session_id,
1217	                turn_id=turn_id,
1218	            )
1219	            logger.info("[ltm] send_history completed")
1220	        except Exception as e:
1221	            logger.error("[ltm] send_history failed: %s", e, exc_info=True)
1222	
1223	    # 4. [Const 会话] 自动持久化到磁盘 YAML
1224	    if final_answer and session.is_const:
1225	        try:
1226	            cpt = await session.checkpointer.aget_tuple(
1227	                {"configurable": {"thread_id": session.session_id}}
1228	            )
1229	            raw_messages = (
1230	                cpt.checkpoint.get("channel_values", {}).get("messages", [])
1231	                if cpt
1232	                else []
1233	            )
1234	            metadata = session.persistent_metadata()
1235	            serialized = serialize_messages(raw_messages)
1236	            for item in reversed(serialized):
1237	                if item.get("type") == "ai":
1238	                    item["content"] = final_answer
1239	                    break
1240	            save_const_session(
1241	                session.session_id, session.const_name, metadata, serialized
1242	            )
1243	        except Exception as e:
1244	            print(
1245	                f"[const] 自动保存会话 {session.session_id[:8]} 失败: {e}",
1246	                file=sys.stderr,
1247	            )
1248	
1249	    # 5. [Sub-agent] 如果有待处理的 pending_result，resolve 它
1250	    if session._pending_result is not None and not session._pending_result.done():
1251	        if _run_error:
1252	            print(
1253	                f"[sub-agent:{session.session_id[:8]}] resolving pending_result with run error",
1254	                file=sys.stderr,
1255	            )
1256	            session._pending_result.set_exception(
1257	                RuntimeError(f"子 Agent 执行失败: {_run_error}")
1258	            )
1259	        elif final_answer:
1260	            print(
1261	                f"[sub-agent:{session.session_id[:8]}] resolving pending_result with answer",
1262	                file=sys.stderr,
1263	            )
1264	            session._pending_result.set_result(final_answer)
1265	        else:
1266	            print(
1267	                f"[sub-agent:{session.session_id[:8]}] resolving pending_result with exception (empty answer)",
1268	                file=sys.stderr,
1269	            )
1270	            session._pending_result.set_exception(
1271	                RuntimeError("Sub-agent 未能产生有效回答")
1272	            )
1273	
1274	
1275	async def _resume_sub_agent(
1276	    ws: WebSocket, session: SessionState
1277	) -> asyncio.Task | None:
1278	    """WebSocket 重连时，若会话有未完成的 sub-agent 任务则自动恢复执行。"""
1279	    if session._sub_agent_task is None or session._pending_result is None:
1280	        return None
1281	    if session._pending_result.done():
1282	        return None
1283	    task = session._sub_agent_task
1284	    session._sub_agent_task = None  # 消费掉，防止重连后重复启动
1285	    # 取消旧任务，等待其完成后再创建新任务，避免 checkpoint 竞态
1286	    if session._active_task is not None and not session._active_task.done():
1287	        session._active_task.cancel()
1288	        try:
1289	            await asyncio.wait_for(session._active_task, timeout=5)
1290	        except (asyncio.CancelledError, asyncio.TimeoutError):
1291	            pass
1292	        session._active_task = None
1293	    interaction.current_ws.set(ws)
1294	    interaction.current_session_id.set(session.session_id)
1295	    agent_task = asyncio.create_task(
1296	        _run_agent_turn(ws, session, task, private_mode=False)
1297	    )
1298	    session._active_task = agent_task
1299	    return agent_task
1300	
1301	
1302	@router.websocket("/ws/chat/{session_id}")
1303	async def websocket_chat(ws: WebSocket, session_id: str):
1304	    """WebSocket 聊天端点 — 接收用户消息、驱动 Agent、处理取消和用户交互。"""
1305	    await ws.accept()
1306	
1307	    # ── 初始化会话 ────────────────────────────────────────
1308	    app_state = ws.app.state
1309	    session = await app_state.session_manager.get_or_create(session_id)
1310	
1311	    # 注册 WebSocket 到注册表，供后台记忆 consumer 推送事件
1312	    app_state.ws_registry.register(session_id, ws)
1313	
1314	    # ── 推送初始上下文用量 ─────────────────────────────────
1315	    default_max_tokens, default_model = _get_provider_context(app_state)
1316	    initial_usage = await _calculate_context_usage(
1317	        session,
1318	        app_state.system_prompt,
1319	        max_tokens=default_max_tokens,
1320	        model_name=default_model,
1321	    )
1322	    await ws.send_json({"type": "context_usage", "payload": initial_usage})
1323	
1324	    # ── 断线重连时恢复 sub-agent ──────────────────────────
1325	    agent_task = await _resume_sub_agent(ws, session)
1326	
1327	    # ── 消息主循环 ────────────────────────────────────────
1328	    try:
1329	        while True:
1330	            raw = await ws.receive_text()
1331	            try:
1332	                msg = json.loads(raw)
1333	            except json.JSONDecodeError:
1334	                # 客户端发送非 JSON 文本（心跳探针、协议错误等），忽略不中断连接
1335	                continue
1336	            if not isinstance(msg, dict):
1337	                continue
1338	
1339	            match msg.get("type", ""):
1340	                case "ping":
1341	                    await ws.send_json({"type": "pong", "payload": {}})
1342	
1343	                case "chat":
1344	                    if agent_task and not agent_task.done():
1345	                        continue  # 已有 Agent 运行中，忽略本次输入
1346	
1347	                    payload = msg.get("payload")
1348	                    if not isinstance(payload, dict):
1349	                        continue
1350	                    user_message = str(payload.get("message", "")).strip()
1351	                    if not user_message:
1352	                        continue
1353	
1354	                    # 阶段 3.2：per-session 令牌桶限流
1355	                    allowed, rate_err = get_ws_rate_limiter().try_consume(session_id)
1356	                    if not allowed:
1357	                        get_metrics().record_rate_limit("ws")
1358	                        error_collector.add_error(
1359	                            level="WARNING",
1360	                            category="rate_limit",
1361	                            message=f"WebSocket 限流: {rate_err}",
1362	                            session_id=session_id,
1363	                        )
1364	                        await ws.send_json({"type": "error", "payload": rate_err})
1365	                        continue
1366	
1367	                    auto_approve = _effective_auto_approve(
1368	                        session, payload.get("auto_approve", False)
1369	                    )
1370	                    interaction.current_ws.set(ws)  # 供工具函数通过 WebSocket 推送交互
1371	                    interaction.current_session_id.set(session_id)
1372	                    interaction.set_session_auto_approve(session_id, auto_approve)
1373	
1374	                    agent_task = asyncio.create_task(
1375	                        _run_agent_turn(
1376	                            ws,
1377	                            session,
1378	                            user_message,
1379	                            private_mode=payload.get("private", False),
1380	                            auto_approve=auto_approve,
1381	                            provider_id=payload.get("provider_id"),
1382	                            model_name=payload.get("model_name"),
1383	                            think_path_id=payload.get("think_path_id"),
1384	                            turn_id=payload.get("turn_id"),
1385	                        )
1386	                    )
1387	                    session._active_task = agent_task  # 供外部 REST 接口查询活跃状态
1388	
1389	                case "user_response":
1390	                    payload = msg.get("payload", {})
1391	                    interaction_id = payload.get("interaction_id", "")
1392	                    response = payload.get("response", "")
1393	                    if interaction_id:
1394	                        await interaction.resolve(interaction_id, response)
1395	
1396	                case "artifact_action":
1397	                    # Artifact actions are never tool calls.  They can only
1398	                    # resolve an already-pending interaction after the signed,
1399	                    # session-bound token has been validated.
1400	
1401	                    if not get_settings().interactive_artifacts_enabled:
1402	                        continue
1403	                    try:
1404	                        from api.artifacts.schema import (
1405	                            ArtifactActionResponse,
1406	                            artifact_action_authorizer,
1407	                        )
1408	
1409	                        response = ArtifactActionResponse.model_validate(
1410	                            msg.get("payload", {})
1411	                        )
1412	                        authorized = artifact_action_authorizer.authorize(
1413	                            response, session_id=session_id
1414	                        )
1415	                    except (TypeError, ValueError):
1416	                        continue
1417	                    if authorized is None:
1418	                        continue
1419	                    if await interaction.resolve(
1420	                        authorized.interaction_id, authorized.action_id
1421	                    ):
1422	                        artifact_action_authorizer.consume(authorized)
1423	
1424	                case "plan_response":
1425	                    payload = msg.get("payload", {})
1426	                    plan_id = payload.get("plan_id", "")
1427	                    action = payload.get("action", "")
1428	                    modified_plan = payload.get("modified_plan", "")
1429	                    if plan_id:
1430	                        if action == "approve":
1431	                            await interaction.resolve(plan_id, "approve")
1432	                        elif action == "reject":
1433	                            await interaction.resolve(plan_id, "reject")
1434	                        elif action == "modify" and modified_plan:
1435	                            await interaction.resolve(plan_id, modified_plan)
1436	                        else:
1437	                            await interaction.resolve(plan_id, "reject")
1438	
1439	                case "cancel":
1440	                    if agent_task and not agent_task.done():
1441	                        agent_task.cancel()
1442	                        agent_task = None
1443	
1444	                case "update_auto_approve":
1445	                    payload = msg.get("payload")
1446	                    if not isinstance(payload, dict):
1447	                        continue
1448	                    auto_approve_val = _effective_auto_approve(
1449	                        session, payload.get("auto_approve", False)
1450	                    )
1451	                    interaction.set_session_auto_approve(session_id, auto_approve_val)
1452	                    session.auto_approve = auto_approve_val
1453	
1454	    except WebSocketDisconnect:
1455	        pass  # 客户端断开是正常行为
1456	    finally:
1457	        app_state.ws_registry.unregister(session_id)
1458	        if agent_task and not agent_task.done():
1459	            agent_task.cancel()
1460	        if session._active_task is agent_task:
1461	            session._active_task = None
1462	        interaction.clear_session_settings(session_id)
1463	
```

68	def _migrate_provider_from_env(store) -> object | None:
69	    """从 .env 读取 DeepSeek 配置写入 SQLite（向后兼容）。"""
70	    import os
71	    api_key = os.getenv("DEEPSEEK_API_KEY", "")
72	    if not api_key:
73	        return None
74	    base_url = os.getenv("DEEPSEEK_BASE_URL", "https://api.deepseek.com/v1")
75	    model_name = os.getenv("MODEL_NAME", "deepseek-v4-flash")
76	    context_window_str = os.getenv("MODEL_CONTEXT_WINDOW", "256000")
77	    from api.providers import ProviderConfig
78	    config = ProviderConfig(
79	        id="deepseek-main",
80	        provider_type="openai",
81	        label="DeepSeek",
82	        api_key=api_key,
83	        base_url=base_url,
84	        models=[model_name],
85	        enabled=True,
86	        context_window=int(context_window_str),
87	    )
88	    store.save(config)
89	    return config

92	def _hook_tools_for_action(app_state, action: str, trigger_detail: str) -> list:
93	    """Select tools for a headless event-hook run.
94	
95	    Event hooks execute without a live chat WebSocket, so tools that require
96	    immediate user interaction are intentionally excluded.
97	    """
98	    from tools import select_tools_for_query
99	
100	    mcp_tools = getattr(app_state, "mcp_tools", None) or []
101	    selected = select_tools_for_query(
102	        f"{action}\n\n触发详情：{trigger_detail}",
103	        mcp_tools=list(mcp_tools),
104	    )
105	    return [
106	        tool
107	        for tool in selected
108	        if not str(getattr(tool, "name", "")).startswith("ask_user_")
109	    ]
110	
111	
112	def _extract_hook_final_answer(output) -> str:
113	    messages = output.get("messages", []) if isinstance(output, dict) else []
114	    if not messages:
115	        return ""
116	    last = messages[-1]
117	    content = last.content if hasattr(last, "content") else str(last)
118	    return str(content or "")
119	
120	
121	async def _run_event_hook_action(app: FastAPI, hook, trigger_detail: str) -> str:
122	    """Run one event-hook action through the normal LangGraph Agent entrypoint."""
123	    app_state = app.state
124	    llm = getattr(app_state, "llm", None)
125	    if llm is None:
126	        raise HookUnsupportedError("事件钩子执行不可用：未配置 LLM Provider")
127	
128	    session_manager = getattr(app_state, "session_manager", None)
129	    if session_manager is None:
130	        raise HookUnsupportedError("事件钩子执行不可用：会话管理器未初始化")
131	
132	    session = await session_manager.create()
133	    try:
134	        system_prompt = getattr(app_state, "system_prompt", "") or get_system_prompt()
135	        system_prompt = (
136	            system_prompt
137	            + "\n\n[事件钩子执行模式]\n"
138	            + "当前任务由后台事件钩子自动触发，没有可交互的聊天 WebSocket。"
139	            + "不要请求用户确认或等待用户输入；"
140	            + "如果动作需要人工确认，请说明无法在后台执行。"
141	        )
142	        tools = _hook_tools_for_action(app_state, hook.action, trigger_detail)
143	        # 4 层架构：注入情景记忆管理器（事件钩子场景也启用 episodic 检索）
144	        episodic_mm = getattr(app_state, "episodic_mm", None)
145	        prompt = (
146	            "[事件钩子触发]\n"
147	            f"钩子名称：{hook.name}\n"
148	            f"钩子类型：{hook.hook_type}\n"
149	            f"触发详情：{trigger_detail}\n\n"
150	            "[预设动作]\n"
151	            f"{hook.action}"
152	        )
153	        timeout = float(hook.config.get("timeout", 600))
154	        response = await asyncio.wait_for(
155	            llm.ainvoke([
156	                SystemMessage(content=system_prompt),
157	                HumanMessage(content=prompt),
158	            ]),
159	            timeout=timeout,
160	        )
161	        final_answer = response.content if hasattr(response, "content") else str(response)
162	        return (
163	            final_answer
164	            or "事件钩子动作已执行，但没有生成文本结果"
165	        )
166	    finally:
167	        delete_session = getattr(session_manager, "delete", None)
168	        if callable(delete_session):
169	            await delete_session(session.session_id)
170	
171	
172	def _build_event_hook_callback(app: FastAPI):
173	    async def _callback(hook, trigger_detail: str) -> str:
174	        return await _run_event_hook_action(app, hook, trigger_detail)
175	
176	    return _callback
177

179	async def _load_const_sessions(app: FastAPI):
180	    """从 YAML 重建所有 const 固定会话到内存 SessionManager。
181	
182	    阶段 5.1：改用全局持久化 checkpointer（AsyncSqliteSaver）。
183	    - thread_id = const session_id 天然隔离，无需为每个 const 会话单独建 saver
184	    - 进程重启后，SQLite 中已存在的 checkpoint 可直接恢复，aupdate_state 幂等覆盖
185	    """
186	    sm = app.state.session_manager
187	    const_list = load_all_const_sessions()
188	    if not const_list:
189	        return
190	
191	    # 使用 getattr 避免 AttributeError：app.state.llm 是在 _init_llm_background()
192	    # 异步任务中设置的，_load_const_sessions 可能在该任务完成前就被调用
193	    llm = getattr(app.state, 'llm', None)
194	    if llm is None:
195	        logger.warning("[const] Skipping %d const session(s) — no LLM available yet", len(const_list))
196	        return
197	
198	    from api.checkpointer_factory import get_persistent_checkpointer
199	
200	    # 共享全局 checkpointer（thread_id 区分会话）
201	    shared_checkpointer = get_persistent_checkpointer()
202	
203	    loaded = 0
204	    for const_data in const_list:
205	        sid = const_data.get("session_id")
206	        if not sid or sid in sm._sessions:
207	            continue
208	
209	        metadata = const_data.get("metadata", {})
210	        const_name = const_data.get("const_name", "")
211	        messages = const_data.get("messages", [])
212	
213	        # 用共享 checkpointer 重建会话状态
214	        try:
215	            reconstructed = deserialize_messages(messages)
216	            if reconstructed:
217	                logger.info("[const] Sidecar mode: const session %s messages are managed by oh-my-pi", sid)
218	        except Exception as e:
219	            logger.warning("[const] 重建会话 %s 失败: %s", sid, e)
220	            continue
221	
222	        session = SessionState(
223	            session_id=sid,
224	            created_at=metadata.get("created_at", time.time()),
225	            last_active=metadata.get("last_active", time.time()),
226	            message_count=metadata.get("message_count", 0),
227	            permission_mode=metadata.get("permission_mode", "ask"),
228	            permission_mode_updated_at=metadata.get("permission_mode_updated_at", time.time()),
229	            checkpointer=shared_checkpointer,
230	            is_const=True,
231	            const_name=const_name,
232	        )
233	        sm._sessions[sid] = session
234	        loaded += 1
235	
236	    logger.info("[const] 已加载 %d/%d 个固定会话", loaded, len(const_list))
237

239	@asynccontextmanager
240	async def lifespan(app: FastAPI):
241	    from agent.lifecycle.disposable import DisposableStore, to_disposable
242	
243	    # Disposable 资源集合 — 统一管理生命周期
244	    _disposables = DisposableStore()
245	    app.state._disposables = _disposables
246	
247	    # 1. 初始化 Provider 管理器（SQLite 存储，兼容旧 YAML 导入）
248	    from api.db.core import initialize_database
249	    from api.db.providers import ProviderDbStore
250	
251	    initialize_database()  # 确保 DB schema 已创建
252	
253	    provider_store = ProviderDbStore()
254	    # 首次迁移：从旧 YAML 导入已有配置
255	    migrated_count = provider_store.migrate_from_yaml()
256	    if migrated_count:
257	        logger.info("[provider] migrated %d provider(s) from YAML", migrated_count)
258	    # 迁移 .env 中的 DeepSeek 配置（纯新安装场景）
259	    if provider_store.is_empty:
260	        migrated = _migrate_provider_from_env(provider_store)
261	        if migrated:
262	            logger.info("[provider] migrated %s from .env", migrated.label)
263	
264	    provider_manager = ProviderManager(provider_store)
265	    provider_manager.load_all()
266	    app.state.provider_manager = provider_manager
267	    logger.info("[provider] loaded %d provider(s)", provider_manager.count)
268	
269	    # 阶段 3.3：启动 provider 健康监控后台任务
270	    # - 健康 provider 每 check_interval 秒检查一次
271	    # - unhealthy provider 每 recovery_interval 秒重新探测
272	    # - 连续失败达 unhealthy_threshold 才标记 error（避免单次抖动）
273	    from api.providers.health_monitor import start_health_monitor
274	    from config.settings import get_settings as _get_settings_for_health
275	    _health_settings = _get_settings_for_health()
276	    start_health_monitor(
277	        provider_manager,
278	        check_interval=_health_settings.provider_health_check_interval_seconds,
279	        recovery_interval=_health_settings.provider_recovery_check_interval_seconds,
280	        unhealthy_threshold=_health_settings.provider_unhealthy_threshold,
281	    )
282	    logger.info(
283	        "[health_monitor] 已启动（check=%ds, recovery=%ds, threshold=%d）",
284	        _health_settings.provider_health_check_interval_seconds,
285	        _health_settings.provider_recovery_check_interval_seconds,
286	        _health_settings.provider_unhealthy_threshold,
287	    )
288	
289	    # 2. 其他共享资源（不阻塞启动 — LLM 在后台初始化）
290	    app.state.system_prompt = get_system_prompt()
291	    app.state.native_tools = get_tools()
292	    app.state.session_manager = SessionManager()
293	    # The workflow API is always registered but runtime construction remains
294	    # opt-in. A disabled flag therefore has no journal or execution side effect.
295	    workflow_settings = get_settings()
296	    if (
297	        workflow_settings.workflow_enabled
298	        and workflow_settings.async_subagent_enabled
299	        and workflow_settings.permission_modes_enabled
300	    ):
301	        from tools.workflow.journal import WorkflowJournalStore
302	        from tools.workflow.registry import DEFAULT_WORKFLOW_REGISTRY
303	        from tools.workflow.run_manager import WorkflowRunManager
304	
305	        app.state.workflow_run_manager = WorkflowRunManager(
306	            WorkflowJournalStore(WORKFLOW_JOURNAL_PATH), DEFAULT_WORKFLOW_REGISTRY
307	        )
308	        app.state.session_manager.set_workflow_run_manager(app.state.workflow_run_manager)
309	        app.state.workflow_run_manager.recover()
310	    app.state.ws_registry = WebSocketRegistry()
311	    app.state.ltm = LongTermMemoryInterface(
312	        MEMORY_PATH,
313	        retry_policy_enabled=get_settings().ltm_retry_policy_enabled,
314	    )
315	
316	    # 阶段 5.1：初始化持久化 checkpointer（必须在 _load_const_sessions 之前）
317	    # - 启用 SQLite 持久化：进程重启后可恢复会话状态
318	    # - 失败时自动回退到 MemorySaver（仅内存，重启丢失）
319	    from api.checkpointer_factory import init_persistent_checkpointer
320	    await init_persistent_checkpointer()
321	    from api.checkpointer_factory import get_checkpointer_info
322	    logger.info("[checkpointer] %s", get_checkpointer_info())
323	
324	    # 后台初始化 LLM（不阻塞 lifespan，让 API 立即就绪）
325	    async def _init_llm_background():
326	        try:
327	            llm = get_llm(provider_manager)
328	            app.state.llm = llm
329	            logger.info("[llm] LLM 后台初始化完成")
330	            # LLM 就绪后启动长期记忆
331	            app.state.ltm.start_listening(
332	                llm, ws_registry=app.state.ws_registry,
333	            )
334	            logger.info("[ltm] 长期记忆监听器已启动")
335	        except RuntimeError as e:
336	            logger.warning("[llm] %s", e)
337	            logger.warning("[llm] No LLM configured — chat will be read-only until a provider is added")
338	            app.state.llm = None
339	    app.state._llm_init_task = asyncio.create_task(_init_llm_background())
340	    _disposables.add(to_disposable(lambda: app.state._llm_init_task.cancel() if not app.state._llm_init_task.done() else None))
341	
342	    # 从 YAML 配置加载 MCP 工具
343	    app.state.mcp_tools = await init_mcp_tools()
344	    app.state.tools = merge_tool_lists(app.state.native_tools, app.state.mcp_tools)
345	
346	    # 注入 MCP 重载回调：工具修改 YAML 后通过此回调触发异步重载
347	    _loop = asyncio.get_running_loop()  # 在 lifespan 协程中安全获取
348	
349	    def _mcp_reload_callback():
350	        _loop.call_soon_threadsafe(lambda: _loop.create_task(_do_reload_from_tool()))
351	
352	    async def _do_reload_from_tool():
353	        try:
354	            from tools.mcp import reload_mcp
355	            new_tools = await reload_mcp()
356	            app.state.mcp_tools = new_tools
357	            app.state.tools = merge_tool_lists(app.state.native_tools, new_tools)
358	            logger.info("[mcp] 工具触发热重载成功，共 %d 个 MCP 工具", len(new_tools))
359	        except Exception as exc:
360	            logger.error("[mcp] 工具触发热重载失败: %s", exc)
361	
362	    set_reload_callback(_mcp_reload_callback)
363	
364	    # 加载 const 固定会话（需要 tools 已就绪）
365	    await _load_const_sessions(app)
366	
367	    # 4. 启动定时 session 清理任务（每 5 分钟清理超过 TTL 的不活跃会话）
368	    async def _periodic_cleanup():
369	        while True:
370	            await asyncio.sleep(300)  # 5 分钟
371	            sm = app.state.session_manager
372	            removed = await sm.cleanup_expired()
373	            if removed:
374	                logger.info(
375	                    "[session] cleanup: removed %d expired session(s), %d remaining",
376	                    removed, len(sm._sessions),
377	                )
378	
379	    app.state._cleanup_task = asyncio.create_task(_periodic_cleanup())
380	    _disposables.add(to_disposable(lambda: app.state._cleanup_task.cancel() if not app.state._cleanup_task.done() else None))
381	
382	    # 4.5 启动指标持久化 flush 任务（定期将内存快照写入 SQLite）
383	    from api.metrics import get_metrics
384	    get_metrics().start_flush_task()
385	
386	    # 4.6 启动 TTL 遗忘机制后台清理任务（定期清理 memory.yaml 中已过期条目）
387	    from memory.ttl import schedule_purge as schedule_ttl_purge
388	    from app_paths import EPISODIC_MEMORY_PATH, SEMANTIC_MEMORY_PATH
389	    _settings = get_settings()
390	    # 初始化 4 层记忆：长期/情景/语义管理器 + 协调器
391	    _long_term_mm = MemoryManager(yaml_file=str(MEMORY_PATH))
392	    _episodic_mm = EpisodicMemoryManager(
393	        json_file=str(EPISODIC_MEMORY_PATH),
394	        default_ttl=_settings.default_episodic_ttl,
395	    )
396	    _semantic_mm = SemanticMemoryManager(json_file=str(SEMANTIC_MEMORY_PATH))
397	    app.state.episodic_mm = _episodic_mm
398	    app.state.semantic_mm = _semantic_mm
399	    _fact_store = None
400	    _fact_retriever = None
401	    if _settings.fact_store_retrieval_enabled:
402	        from app_paths import FACT_STORE_PATH
403	        from memory.fact_retrieval import SupplementaryFactRetriever
404	        from memory.fact_store import FactStore
405	
406	        _fact_store = FactStore(db_path=str(FACT_STORE_PATH))
407	        _fact_retriever = SupplementaryFactRetriever(_fact_store, enabled=True)
408	        app.state.fact_store = _fact_store
409	        logger.info("[memory] FactStore supplementary retrieval enabled")
410	    app.state.memory_coordinator = MemoryCoordinator(
411	        long_term_mm=_long_term_mm,
412	        episodic_mm=_episodic_mm,
413	        semantic_mm=_semantic_mm,
414	        fact_retriever=_fact_retriever,
415	    )
416	    logger.info(
417	        "[memory] memory layers initialized: long_term + episodic + semantic%s",
418	        " + facts" if _fact_retriever is not None else "",
419	    )
420	    ttl_managers = [_long_term_mm, _episodic_mm, _semantic_mm]
421	    if _fact_retriever is not None:
422	        # FactStore exposes the same purge contract; keeping it in the common
423	        # scheduler means expired FTS rows cannot accumulate after rollout.
424	        ttl_managers.append(_fact_retriever)
425	    schedule_ttl_purge(
426	        _settings.ttl_purge_interval_seconds,
427	        ttl_managers,
428	    )
429	    logger.info(
430	        "[ttl] 后台清理任务已启动，间隔 %d 秒", _settings.ttl_purge_interval_seconds,
431	    )
432	
433	    # 5. 初始化认证 Token（SQLite 存储）
434	    from api.db.auth import load_or_create_token as load_token_db
435	    app.state.auth_token = load_token_db()
436	    logger.info("[auth] token: %s...%s", app.state.auth_token[:4], app.state.auth_token[-4:])
437	
438	    # 6. 初始化事件钩子管理器
439	    from agent.hooks import get_hook_manager
440	    hook_manager = get_hook_manager()
441	    hook_manager.set_loop(asyncio.get_running_loop())
442	    hook_manager.set_trigger_callback(_build_event_hook_callback(app))
443	    hook_manager.load()
444	    hook_manager.start_all()
445	    app.state.hook_manager = hook_manager
446	    logger.info("[hooks] 事件钩子管理器已启动，%d 个钩子", len(hook_manager.list_hooks()))
447	
448	    # 6.5 初始化 oh-my-pi sidecar 管理器（懒启动，首次调用时自动拉起 Bun 进程）

450	    app.state.sidecar_manager = SidecarManager()

452	
453	    # 7. 启动自治调度器（默认关闭，需在 .env 中设置 autonomy_enabled=true）
454	    from config.settings import get_settings as _get_autonomy_settings
455	    _autonomy_settings = _get_autonomy_settings()
456	    if _autonomy_settings.autonomy_enabled:
457	        # User-created Scout schedules are a separate, deliberately
458	        # read-only capability.  Their durable store uses the regular audit
459	        # writer and the runner refuses to replay in-flight work after restart.
460	        from agent.audit_log import log_event
461	        from agent.autonomy.governance import AutonomyScheduleStore
462	        from agent.autonomy.scout import ScoutScheduleRunner, run_scout_lease
463	
464	        app.state.autonomy_schedule_store = AutonomyScheduleStore(
465	            AUTONOMY_SCHEDULES_PATH, audit=log_event
466	        )
467	        app.state.autonomy_scout_runner = ScoutScheduleRunner(
468	            app.state.autonomy_schedule_store,
469	            lambda lease: run_scout_lease(app, lease),
470	        )
471	        app.state.autonomy_scout_runner.start()
472	        from agent.autonomy.scheduler import start_autonomy
473	        start_autonomy(
474	            app,
475	            interval_seconds=_autonomy_settings.autonomy_interval_seconds,
476	            self_improve_enabled=_autonomy_settings.autonomy_self_improve_enabled,
477	        )
478	        logger.info("[autonomy] 自治调度器已启动")
479	    else:
480	        logger.info("[autonomy] 自治调度器未启用（autonomy_enabled=False）")
481	
482	    # === 注册 Idle Queue 任务（Tier 3，不阻塞启动）===
483	    from api.bootstrap.idle_queue import register_idle_task
484	
485	    # const 会话重试加载（如果 LLM 初始化时未就绪）
486	    async def _retry_const_sessions():
487	        await asyncio.sleep(5)  # 等 LLM 初始化
488	        if getattr(app.state, "llm", None) is not None:
489	            await _load_const_sessions(app)
490	
491	    register_idle_task("retry-const-sessions", _retry_const_sessions)
492	
493	    # === 启动 Idle Queue drain（非阻塞）===
494	    from api.bootstrap.idle_queue import start_idle_drain
495	    asyncio.create_task(start_idle_drain())
496	
497	    yield
498	
499	    # 优先通过 DisposableStore 释放（逆序）
500	    _disposables = getattr(app.state, "_disposables", None)
501	    if _disposables:
502	        _disposables.dispose()
503	
504	    # 关闭：后台 LLM 初始化任务
505	    llm_task = getattr(app.state, "_llm_init_task", None)
506	    if llm_task and not llm_task.done():
507	        llm_task.cancel()
508	        try:

510	        except asyncio.CancelledError:
511	            pass

516	
517	    app.state._cleanup_task.cancel()
518	    try:
519	        await app.state._cleanup_task
520	    except asyncio.CancelledError:
521	        pass
522	
523	    # 停止指标 flush 任务（执行最终 flush）

526	
527	    # 停止 TTL 遗忘机制后台清理任务

531	    # 关闭事件钩子

535	    # 停止自治调度器

541	
542	    await close_mcp()
