579	def create_app() -> FastAPI:
580	    app = FastAPI(
581	        title="MaxmaHere API",
582	        version=__version__,
583	        lifespan=lifespan,
584	    )
585	
586	    cors_origins = build_cors_origins()
587	    app.add_middleware(
588	        CORSMiddleware,
589	        allow_origins=cors_origins,
590	        allow_credentials=True,
591	        allow_methods=["*"],
592	        allow_headers=["*"],
593	    )
594	
595	    # REST 路由
596	    app.include_router(sessions.router, prefix="/api")
597	    app.include_router(deferred_runs_router.router, prefix="/api")
598	    app.include_router(workflows_router.router, prefix="/api")
599	    app.include_router(autonomy_router.router, prefix="/api")
600	    app.include_router(memory.router, prefix="/api")
601	    app.include_router(files.router, prefix="/api")
602	    app.include_router(balance.router, prefix="/api")
603	
604	    # WebSocket 路由（无 /api 前缀）
605	    app.include_router(chat.router)
606	
607	    # Provider CRUD 路由
608	    app.include_router(providers.router, prefix="/api")
609	
610	    # MCP 服务器配置查看与热加载
611	    app.include_router(mcp_router.router, prefix="/api")
612	
613	    # MCP 测试连接（路由自带 /api/mcp 前缀）
614	    app.include_router(mcp_test_router.router)
615	
616	    # 人设读写 (SOUL.md / USER.md)
617	    app.include_router(persona_router.router, prefix="/api")
618	
619	    # 本地路径白名单管理
620	    app.include_router(path_whitelist_router.router, prefix="/api")
621	
622	    # MaxmaBlocker 拒止锚管理
623	    app.include_router(maxma_blocker_router.router, prefix="/api")
624	
625	    # Anthropic Skills
626	    app.include_router(skills_router.router, prefix="/api")
627	
628	    # 系统更新动态
629	    app.include_router(news_router.router, prefix="/api")
630	
631	    # 重启后端
632	    app.include_router(restart_router.router, prefix="/api")
633	
634	    # 工具环境变量管理
635	    app.include_router(env_vars_router.router, prefix="/api")
636	
637	    # 工具使用统计
638	    app.include_router(tool_stats_router.router, prefix="/api")
639	
640	    # 文件上传
641	    app.include_router(upload_router.router, prefix="/api")
642	
643	    # 运行时指标
644	    app.include_router(metrics_router.router, prefix="/api")
645	
646	    # 事件钩子
647	    app.include_router(event_hooks_router.router, prefix="/api")
648	
649	    # 审计日志
650	    app.include_router(audit_log_router.router, prefix="/api")
651	
652	    # 诊断与错误日志导出
653	    app.include_router(diagnostics_router.router, prefix="/api")
654	
655	    # Transcript 读取
656	    from api.routes import transcripts as transcripts_router_mod
657	    app.include_router(transcripts_router_mod.router, prefix="/api")
658	
659	    # Activity Hub —— 活动事件中心（REST + SSE）
660	    from api.routes import activity as activity_router
661	    app.include_router(activity_router.router, prefix="/api")
662	
663	    # 会话手动压缩
664	    from api.routes import session_compress
665	    app.include_router(session_compress.router, prefix="/api")
666	
667	    # 知识库
668	    from api.routes import kb as kb_router
669	    app.include_router(kb_router.router, prefix="/api")
670	
671	    # 表情包
672	    from api.routes import stickers as stickers_router
673	    app.include_router(stickers_router.router, prefix="/api")
674	
675	    # 表情收藏
676	    from api.routes import sticker_favorites as sticker_favorites_router
677	    app.include_router(sticker_favorites_router.router, prefix="/api")
678	
679	    # 自定义表情上传
680	    from api.routes import sticker_upload as sticker_upload_router
681	    app.include_router(sticker_upload_router.router, prefix="/api")
682	
683	    # Auth token 端点 — 桌面应用运行时获取 Token（替代构建时硬编码）
684	    @app.get("/api/auth/token")
685	    async def get_auth_token():
686	        """返回当前认证 Token。桌面应用启动后调用此接口获取 Token。"""
687	        return {"token": app.state.auth_token}
688	
689	    # 健康检查
690	    @app.get("/api/health")
691	    async def health(full: bool = False):
692	        return await get_health_report(app, probe_remote=full)
693	
694	    # 自治调度器状态（前端监控 + 外部健康检查）
695	    @app.get("/api/autonomy/status")
696	    async def get_autonomy_status():
697	        """获取自治调度器运行状态。"""
698	        from agent.autonomy.scheduler import get_autonomy_status as _get_status
699	        return _get_status()
700	
701	    # ── 全局异常处理器 ──────────────────────────────────────────
702	    # 捕获所有未处理的异常，记录到 ErrorCollector 供一键导出，
703	    # 同时写入日志（带 exc_info），避免错误丢失。
704	    import traceback as _traceback
705	    from fastapi.responses import JSONResponse as _JSONResponse
706	    from fastapi import Request as _Request
707	    from api.diagnostics import error_collector as _error_collector
708	
709	    @app.exception_handler(Exception)
710	    async def _global_exception_handler(request: _Request, exc: Exception):
711	        _error_collector.add_exception(
712	            exc,
713	            category="uncaught",
714	            message=f"未捕获异常 [{type(exc).__name__}]: {exc}",
715	            request_id=getattr(request.state, "request_id", None),
716	        )
717	        logger.error(
718	            "未捕获异常: %s %s -> %s: %s",
719	            request.method,
720	            request.url.path,
721	            type(exc).__name__,
722	            exc,
723	            exc_info=True,
724	        )
725	        return _JSONResponse(
726	            status_code=500,
727	            content={"detail": "Internal Server Error"},
728	        )
729	
730	    # 中间件执行顺序以“最后 add 的最先执行”为准。
731	    # 注册顺序（add 顺序）与实际执行顺序（后 add 先执行）：
732	    #   add 顺序: Auth → RateLimit → RequestLog
733	    #   执行顺序: RequestLog → RateLimit → Auth → 路由
734	    # 限流在 Auth 之前，避免被拒绝的鉴权请求也消耗限流配额。
735	    # 阶段 3.2：新增 RateLimitMiddleware（HTTP 按 IP 限流）
736	    app.add_middleware(AuthMiddleware)
737	    app.add_middleware(RateLimitMiddleware)
738	
739	    # 请求日志放在最外层，确保包括被鉴权拒绝的请求也会被记录。
740	    app.add_middleware(RequestLogMiddleware)
741	
742	    # 生产模式：挂载前端静态文件（必须在所有 API 路由之后）
743	    if os.environ.get("MAXMA_ENV") == "production":
744	        from app_paths import WEB_DIST_DIR as dist_dir
745	        if dist_dir.exists():
746	            from fastapi.responses import FileResponse
747	
748	            # 挂载静态资源目录
749	            app.mount("/assets", StaticFiles(directory=dist_dir / "assets"), name="assets")
750	            if (dist_dir / "fonts").exists():
751	                app.mount("/fonts", StaticFiles(directory=dist_dir / "fonts"), name="fonts")
752	            if (dist_dir / "images").exists():
753	                app.mount("/images", StaticFiles(directory=dist_dir / "images"), name="images")
754	
755	            # SPA 路由回退：所有非 API、非静态资源路径返回 index.html
756	            @app.get("/{path:path}")
757	            async def spa_fallback(path: str):
758	                index_path = dist_dir / "index.html"
759	                if index_path.exists():
760	                    return FileResponse(index_path)
761	                return {"detail": "Not Found"}
762	
763	            # 根路径也返回 index.html
764	            @app.get("/")
765	            async def root_fallback():
766	                index_path = dist_dir / "index.html"
767	                if index_path.exists():
768	                    return FileResponse(index_path)
769	                return {"detail": "Not Found"}
770	
771	            logger.info("[static] 已挂载前端静态文件: %s", dist_dir)
772	        else:
773	            logger.warning("[static] web/dist 目录不存在，跳过前端挂载: %s", dist_dir)
774	
775	    return app
776	
```

16	
17	class ConstifyRequest(BaseModel):
18	    name: str
19	
20	
21	PermissionModeValue = Literal["read_only", "ask", "operate", "auto"]
22	_PERMISSION_MODES: tuple[PermissionModeValue, ...] = (
23	    "read_only",
24	    "ask",
25	    "operate",
26	    "auto",
27	)
28	
29	
30	class PermissionModeRequest(BaseModel):
31	    """Browser-facing request for the session's additional permission layer."""
32	
33	    permission_mode: PermissionModeValue
34	
35	
36	def _permission_modes_enabled() -> bool:
37	    """Read the opt-in flag at request time so settings reloads take effect."""
38	    try:
39	        from config.settings import get_settings
40	
41	        return bool(get_settings().permission_modes_enabled)
42	    except Exception:
43	        # Permission mode controls must never accidentally become writable if
44	        # settings cannot be loaded.
45	        return False
46	
47	
48	def _permission_mode_metadata(session, *, enabled: bool) -> dict[str, object]:
49	    """Return the small, non-secret contract consumed by the session UI.
50	
51	    A disabled feature reports the compatible confirmation-first mode instead
52	    of a stale, more permissive saved value.  This reflects the mode effective
53	    at the approval boundary while the feature flag is off.
54	    """
55	    return {
56	        "session_id": session.session_id,
57	        "permission_modes_enabled": enabled,
58	        "permission_mode": session.permission_mode if enabled else "ask",
59	        "permission_mode_updated_at": session.permission_mode_updated_at,
60	        "available_permission_modes": list(_PERMISSION_MODES) if enabled else [],
61	    }
62	
63	
64	@router.post("/sessions")
65	async def create_session(request: Request):
66	    sm = request.app.state.session_manager
67	    session = await sm.create()
68	    return {"session_id": session.session_id, "created_at": session.created_at}
69	
70	
71	@router.get("/sessions")
72	async def list_sessions(request: Request):
73	    sm = request.app.state.session_manager
74	    return {"sessions": await sm.list_sessions()}
75	
76	
77	@router.get("/sessions/{session_id}")
78	async def get_session(session_id: str, request: Request):
79	    sm = request.app.state.session_manager
80	    session = await sm.get(session_id)
81	    if session is None:
82	        raise HTTPException(status_code=404, detail="Session not found")
83	    return {
84	        "session_id": session.session_id,
85	        "message_count": session.message_count,
86	        "created_at": session.created_at,
87	        "has_active_agent": session._active_task is not None
88	        and not session._active_task.done(),
89	        "is_const": session.is_const,
90	        "const_name": session.const_name,
91	    }
92	
93	
94	@router.get("/sessions/{session_id}/permission-mode")
95	async def get_session_permission_mode(session_id: str, request: Request):
96	    """Get the effective permission mode for one authenticated session."""
97	    sm = request.app.state.session_manager
98	    session = await sm.get(session_id)
99	    if session is None:
100	        raise HTTPException(status_code=404, detail="Session not found")
101	    return _permission_mode_metadata(session, enabled=_permission_modes_enabled())
102	
103	
104	@router.put("/sessions/{session_id}/permission-mode")
105	async def set_session_permission_mode(
106	    session_id: str,
107	    body: PermissionModeRequest,
108	    request: Request,
109	):
110	    """Persist a validated permission mode when the opt-in feature is active."""
111	    sm = request.app.state.session_manager
112	    session = await sm.get(session_id)
113	    if session is None:
114	        raise HTTPException(status_code=404, detail="Session not found")
115	
116	    if not _permission_modes_enabled():
117	        # The flag preserves the legacy approval semantics, so an inactive
118	        # endpoint must not leave a latent elevated value on the session.
119	        raise HTTPException(status_code=409, detail="Permission modes are unavailable")
120	
121	    try:
122	        session.set_permission_mode(body.permission_mode)
123	    except ValueError:
124	        # The request model normally catches this first.  Keep the boundary
125	        # fail-closed if an alternative SessionState implementation rejects it.
126	        raise HTTPException(status_code=422, detail="Unsupported permission mode") from None
127	
128	    return _permission_mode_metadata(session, enabled=True)
129	
130	
131	@router.get("/sessions/{session_id}/messages")
132	async def get_messages(session_id: str, request: Request):
133	    sm = request.app.state.session_manager
134	    session = await sm.get(session_id)
135	    if session is None:
136	        raise HTTPException(status_code=404, detail="Session not found")
137	
138	    if session.is_const:
139	        from api.const_session_store import load_const_session_by_id
140	
141	        const_data = load_const_session_by_id(session_id)
142	        if const_data is not None:
143	            persisted_messages = const_data.get("messages", [])
144	            if isinstance(persisted_messages, list):
145	                return {
146	                    "session_id": session_id,
147	                    "messages": [
148	                        {
149	                            "role": str(m.get("type", "human")),
150	                            "content": m.get("content", ""),
151	                        }
152	                        for m in persisted_messages
153	                        if isinstance(m, dict)
154	                    ],
155	                }
156	
157	    try:
158	        cpt = await session.checkpointer.aget_tuple(
159	            {"configurable": {"thread_id": session.session_id}}
160	        )
161	        msgs = (
162	            cpt.checkpoint.get("channel_values", {}).get("messages", []) if cpt else []
163	        )
164	    except Exception:
165	        logger.debug("Failed to read messages from checkpoint for session %s", session_id, exc_info=True)
166	        msgs = []
167	    return {
168	        "session_id": session_id,
169	        "messages": [{"role": m.type, "content": m.content} for m in msgs],
170	    }
171	
172	
173	async def _sync_const_session_after_undo(session, deleted: int):
174	    """Sync const session YAML after undo."""
175	    if session.is_const and deleted > 0:
176	        from api.const_session_store import save_const_session, serialize_messages
177	
178	        try:
179	            cpt = await session.checkpointer.aget_tuple(
180	                {"configurable": {"thread_id": session.session_id}}
181	            )
182	            raw_messages = (
183	                cpt.checkpoint.get("channel_values", {}).get("messages", []) if cpt else []
184	            )
185	            metadata = session.persistent_metadata()
186	            save_const_session(
187	                session.session_id,
188	                session.const_name,
189	                metadata,
190	                serialize_messages(raw_messages),
191	            )
192	            logger.info(
193	                "[undo] const 会话 %s 已同步更新 YAML (deleted=%d, msg_count=%d)",
194	                session.session_id, deleted, session.message_count,
195	            )
196	        except Exception:
197	            logger.warning(
198	                "[undo] const 会话 %s 撤回后同步 YAML 失败",
199	                session.session_id, exc_info=True,
200	            )
201	
202	
203	@router.post("/sessions/{session_id}/undo")
204	async def undo_session_messages(session_id: str, request: Request, n: int = 1):
205	    """撤回最近 n 轮对话（默认撤回最后一轮）。"""
206	    if n < 1:
207	        return {"deleted_count": 0}
208	    sm = request.app.state.session_manager
209	    session = await sm.get(session_id)
210	    if session is None:
211	        raise HTTPException(status_code=404, detail="Session not found")
212	
213	    # ── Sidecar path ──────────────────────────────────────────────
214	    mgr = getattr(request.app.state, "sidecar_manager", None)
215	    if mgr is not None:
216	        await mgr.start()
217	        client = mgr.client
218	        sidecar_sid = getattr(session, "_sidecar_session_id", None)
219	        if client is not None and sidecar_sid is not None:
220	            result = await client.call("undo", {
221	                "session_id": sidecar_sid,
222	                "steps": n,
223	            })
224	            deleted = result.get("removed", 0)
225	            session.message_count = max(0, session.message_count - deleted)
226	            await _sync_const_session_after_undo(session, deleted)
227	            return {"deleted_count": deleted}
228	
229	        # ── LangGraph checkpointer fallback（graph.py 移除后不可用）──
230	        try:
231	            from api.time_traveler import undo_rounds
232	
233	            config = {"configurable": {"thread_id": session_id}}
234	            graph = session._graph
235	            if graph is None:
236	                llm = getattr(request.app.state, "llm", None)
237	                if llm is None:
238	                    raise HTTPException(
239	                        status_code=503, detail="LLM 未就绪，无法执行撤回操作"
240	                    )
241	                from agent.graph import build_agent
242	
243	                tools = getattr(request.app.state, "tools", []) or []
244	                system_prompt = getattr(request.app.state, "system_prompt", "") or ""
245	                graph = build_agent(
246	                    model=llm,
247	                    tools=tools,
248	                    system_prompt=system_prompt,
249	                    checkpointer=session.checkpointer,
250	                )
251	                session._graph = graph
252	            deleted = await undo_rounds(graph, config, n=n)
253	            session.message_count = max(0, session.message_count - deleted)
254	
255	            await _sync_const_session_after_undo(session, deleted)
256	            return {"deleted_count": deleted}
257	        except ImportError:
258	            logger.warning("[undo] LangGraph fallback not available (graph.py removed)")
259	            return {"deleted_count": 0, "error": "Undo requires sidecar mode"}
260	
261	
262	@router.get("/sessions/{session_id}/context-usage")
263	async def get_context_usage(session_id: str, request: Request):
264	    sm = request.app.state.session_manager
265	    session = await sm.get(session_id)
266	    if session is None:
267	        raise HTTPException(status_code=404, detail="Session not found")
268	    mgr = getattr(request.app.state, "provider_manager", None)
269	    max_tokens = 256_000
270	    model_name = ""
271	    if mgr is not None and mgr.count > 0:
272	        for provider in mgr.iter_enabled():
273	            max_tokens = provider.config.context_window
274	            model_name = provider.default_model
275	            break
276	
277	    system_prompt = request.app.state.system_prompt
278	    try:
279	        cpt = await session.checkpointer.aget_tuple(
280	            {"configurable": {"thread_id": session.session_id}}
281	        )
282	        counting_messages = (
283	            cpt.checkpoint.get("channel_values", {}).get("messages", []) if cpt else []
284	        )
285	    except Exception:
286	        logger.debug("Failed to read checkpoint for context usage in session %s", session_id, exc_info=True)
287	        counting_messages = []
288	    usage = estimate_context_usage(
289	        messages=counting_messages,
290	        system_prompt=system_prompt,
291	        max_tokens=max_tokens,
292	        model_name=model_name,
293	        system_prompt_parts=get_system_prompt_parts(),
294	    )
295	    usage["session_id"] = session_id
296	    return usage
297	
298	
299	@router.delete("/sessions/{session_id}")
300	async def delete_session(session_id: str, request: Request):
301	    sm = request.app.state.session_manager
302	    session = await sm.get(session_id)
303	
304	    # 若为 const 会话，先清理磁盘文件
305	    if session is not None and session.is_const:
306	        from api.const_session_store import delete_const_session
307	
308	        delete_const_session(session_id)
309	
310	    if not await sm.delete(session_id):
311	        raise HTTPException(status_code=404, detail="Session not found")
312	    return {"status": "deleted"}
313	
314	
315	# ── Const 固定会话 ────────────────────────────────────────────
316	
317	
318	@router.post("/sessions/{session_id}/const")
319	async def constify_session(session_id: str, body: ConstifyRequest, request: Request):
320	    """将当前会话固定为 const 持久化保存。"""
321	    sm = request.app.state.session_manager
322	    session = await sm.get(session_id)
323	    if session is None:
324	        raise HTTPException(status_code=404, detail="Session not found")
325	
326	    # Agent 运行中禁止固定
327	    if session._active_task is not None and not session._active_task.done():
328	        raise HTTPException(status_code=409, detail="Agent 仍在运行中，无法固定会话")
329	
330	    # 从 checkpointer 提取消息
331	    try:
332	        cpt = await session.checkpointer.aget_tuple(
333	            {"configurable": {"thread_id": session.session_id}}
334	        )
335	        raw_messages = (
336	            cpt.checkpoint.get("channel_values", {}).get("messages", []) if cpt else []
337	        )
338	    except Exception:
339	        logger.debug("Failed to read checkpoint for constify in session %s", session_id, exc_info=True)
340	        raw_messages = []
341	
342	    from api.const_session_store import save_const_session, serialize_messages
343	
344	    metadata = session.persistent_metadata()
345	    serialized = serialize_messages(raw_messages)
346	    save_const_session(session.session_id, body.name, metadata, serialized)
347	
348	    # 标记为 const
349	    session.is_const = True
350	    session.const_name = body.name
351	
352	    return {
353	        "session_id": session.session_id,
354	        "is_const": True,
355	        "const_name": body.name,
356	    }
357	
358	
359	@router.post("/sessions/{session_id}/generate-title")
360	async def generate_session_title(session_id: str, request: Request):
361	    """根据会话内容使用 LLM 生成简洁标题。"""
362	    sm = request.app.state.session_manager
363	    session = await sm.get(session_id)
364	    if session is None:
365	        raise HTTPException(status_code=404, detail="Session not found")
366	
367	    # 从 checkpointer 提取消息
368	    try:
369	        cpt = await session.checkpointer.aget_tuple(
370	            {"configurable": {"thread_id": session.session_id}}
371	        )
372	        messages = (
373	            cpt.checkpoint.get("channel_values", {}).get("messages", []) if cpt else []
374	        )
375	    except Exception:
376	        logger.debug("Failed to read checkpoint for title generation in session %s", session_id, exc_info=True)
377	        messages = []
378	
379	    if not messages:
380	        raise HTTPException(status_code=400, detail="没有消息可供生成标题")
381	
382	    # 构建对话文本（仅 human/ai，截断长内容）
383	    conversation_lines = []
384	    for m in messages:
385	        role = "user" if m.type == "human" else "assistant"
386	        content = (m.content[:600] if hasattr(m, "content") else str(m))[:600]
387	        conversation_lines.append(f"[{role}]\n{content}")
388	    conversation_text = "\n\n".join(conversation_lines)
389	
390	    system_prompt = """你是一个对话标题生成器。根据用户和助理的对话内容，生成一个简短的标题。
391	
392	## 规则（必须严格遵守）
393	
394	1. **忠实概括**：标题必须基于对话的实际内容，不能捏造或偏离用户真实提出的问题或主题。这是最根本的原则。
395	2. **核心主题**：准确抓住整个对话中最主要、最核心的主题或意图。如果用户问了多个问题，优先选择覆盖最广或最重要的那个。
396	3. **简洁凝练**：标题通常很短，一般为5-10个字，力求用最少的词概括最多信息。剔除冗余词语，保留关键词。
397	4. **区分度**：生成的标题应能明显区别于用户历史对话中的其他标题，便于快速定位和识别不同对话。
398	5. **通用可读**：不使用具体的"您"、"我"等指代词，也不包含"对话关于…"这样的描述性前缀。标题本身是名词性短语，直接陈述主题（如"Python爬虫入门"）。
399	6. **中性客观**：不添加情感色彩或主观评价（如不写成"令人困惑的数学问题"），也不使用指令式语气（如"请总结这个对话"）。
400	
401	## 输出格式
402	
403	只输出标题本身，不要有任何额外文字、引号或标点符号。"""
404	
405	    prompt = f"{system_prompt}\n\n对话内容：\n{conversation_text}\n\n标题："
406	
407	    try:
408	        llm = request.app.state.llm
409	        response = await llm.ainvoke(prompt)
410	        title = (
411	            response.content.strip().strip('"').strip("'")
412	            if hasattr(response, "content")
413	            else str(response).strip()
414	        )
415	        title = title[:50]
416	        if not title:
417	            title = "未命名会话"
418	    except Exception as e:
419	        raise HTTPException(status_code=500, detail=f"标题生成失败: {e}")
420	
421	    return {"title": title}
422	
423	
424	@router.delete("/sessions/{session_id}/const")
425	async def unconstify_session(session_id: str, request: Request):
426	    """取消固定，删除磁盘文件。"""
427	    from api.const_session_store import delete_const_session
428	
429	    delete_const_session(session_id)
430	
431	    sm = request.app.state.session_manager
432	    session = await sm.get(session_id)
433	    if session is not None:
434	        session.is_const = False
435	        session.const_name = ""
436	
437	    return {"status": "ok"}
438	
```

1	/**
2	 * session-bridge.ts — JSON-RPC server wrapping createAgentSession.
3	 *
4	 * RPC Methods:
5	 *   create_session({ model, system_prompt?, cwd? }) → { session_id }
6	 *   prompt({ session_id, message })               → { ok: true }
7	 *   cancel({ session_id })                         → { ok: true }
8	 *   destroy_session({ session_id })                → { ok: true }
9	 *
10	 * Events are forwarded as JSON-RPC notifications (method: "event").
11	 */
12	
13	import { createInterface } from "node:readline";
14	import { randomUUID } from "node:crypto";
15	import { createAgentSession } from "@oh-my-pi/pi-coding-agent";
16	import { getBundledModel } from "@oh-my-pi/pi-catalog/models";
17	import type { Model } from "@oh-my-pi/pi-ai";
18	import type { AgentSession } from "@oh-my-pi/pi-coding-agent";
19	import { registerCustomTools } from "./tools/index";
20	
21	// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
22	// Types
23	// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
24	
25	interface SessionRecord {
26	  session: AgentSession;
27	  unsubscribe: () => void;
28	}
29	
30	// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
31	// State
32	// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
33	
34	const sessions = new Map<string, SessionRecord>();
35	const rl = createInterface({ input: process.stdin });
36	
37	// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
38	// JSON-RPC helpers
39	// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
40	
41	function send(id: number | null, result: unknown) {
42	  process.stdout.write(JSON.stringify({ jsonrpc: "2.0", id, result }) + "\n");
43	}
44	
45	function sendError(id: number | null, message: string) {
46	  process.stdout.write(
47	    JSON.stringify({ jsonrpc: "2.0", id, error: { message } }) + "\n",
48	  );
49	}
50	
51	function sendEvent(sessionId: string, event: Record<string, unknown>) {
52	  process.stdout.write(
53	    JSON.stringify({
54	      jsonrpc: "2.0",
55	      method: "event",
56	      params: { session_id: sessionId, event },
57	    }) + "\n",
58	  );
59	}
60	
61	// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
62	// Model resolution
63	// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
64	
65	/**
66	 * Parse a model string like "openai/gpt-4o" into a proper Model object.
67	 *
68	 * Strategy:
69	 *   A — Try `getBundledModel(provider, modelId)` from the bundled catalog.
70	 *   B — Fall back to constructing a minimal Model object manually.
71	 */
72	function parseModel(modelStr: string): Model {
73	  const slashIdx = modelStr.indexOf("/");
74	  const provider = slashIdx >= 0 ? modelStr.slice(0, slashIdx) : "";
75	  const modelId = slashIdx >= 0 ? modelStr.slice(slashIdx + 1) : modelStr;
76	
77	  // Option A: bundled catalog lookup
78	  if (provider) {
79	    try {
80	      const bundled = getBundledModel(provider as any, modelId);
81	      if (bundled) return bundled;
82	    } catch {
83	      // Fall through to manual construction
84	    }
85	  }
86	
87	  // Option B: manual fallback (minimal Model object from env vars)
88	  const baseUrl =
89	    process.env.OPENAI_BASE_URL ?? "https://api.openai.com/v1";
90	  return {
91	    id: modelId,
92	    name: modelId,
93	    api: "openai-completions" as const,
94	    provider,
95	    baseUrl,
96	    reasoning: false,
97	    input: ["text"] as ("text" | "image")[],
98	    cost: { input: 0, output: 0, cacheRead: 0, cacheWrite: 0 },
99	    contextWindow: 128000,
100	    maxTokens: 4096,
101	    compat: {
102	      supportsDeveloperRole: true,
103	      supportsStrictMode: false,
104	      supportsReasoningEffort: false,
105	      reasoningEffortMap: {},
106	      supportsReasoningParams: false,
107	      thinkingFormat: "disabled" as const,
108	      reasoningDisableMode: "off" as const,
109	      omitReasoningEffort: false,
110	      includeEncryptedReasoning: false,
111	      filterReasoningHistory: false,
112	      disableReasoningOnForcedToolChoice: false,
113	      disableReasoningOnToolChoice: false,
114	      supportsToolChoice: true,
115	      supportsForcedToolChoice: true,
116	      supportsNamedToolChoice: true,
117	      reasoningContentField: undefined,
118	      requiresReasoningContentForToolCalls: false,
119	      requiresReasoningContentForAllAssistantTurns: false,
120	      allowsSyntheticReasoningContentForToolCalls: false,
121	      replayReasoningContent: false,
122	      qwenPreserveThinking: false,
123	      requiresThinkingAsText: false,
124	      requiresMistralToolIds: false,
125	      requiresToolResultName: false,
126	      requiresAssistantAfterToolResult: false,
127	      requiresAssistantContentForToolCalls: false,
128	      stripDeepseekSpecialTokens: false,
129	      streamMarkupHealingPattern: undefined,
130	      reasoningDeltasMayBeCumulative: false,
131	      emptyLengthFinishIsContextError: false,
132	      usesOpenAIToolCallIdLimit: false,
133	      promptCacheSessionHeader: undefined,
134	      isOpenRouterHost: false,
135	      alwaysSendMaxTokens: true,
136	      enableGeminiThinkingLoopGuard: undefined,
137	      openRouterRouting: undefined,
138	      wireModelIdMode: "raw" as const,
139	      supportsStore: false,
140	      supportsMultipleSystemMessages: true,
141	      maxTokensField: "max_tokens" as const,
142	      supportsUsageInStreaming: true,
143	      cacheControlFormat: undefined,
144	      supportsLongPromptCacheRetention: false,
145	      supportsImageDetailOriginal: false,
146	      strictResponsesPairing: false,
147	      toolStrictMode: "none" as const,
148	      streamIdleTimeoutMs: undefined,
149	      vercelGatewayRouting: undefined,
150	      extraBody: undefined,
151	    },
152	  } as Model;
153	}
154	
155	// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
156	// Pi event → Maxma event mapping
157	// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
158	
159	function mapPiEventToMaxma(
160	  piEvent: Record<string, unknown>,
161	): Record<string, unknown> | null {
162	  // Handle AgentEvent types directly
163	  const type = piEvent.type as string;
164	
165	  if (type === "message_update") {
166	    const assistantEvent = (piEvent as any).assistantMessageEvent;
167	    if (!assistantEvent) return null;
168	
169	    const aeType = assistantEvent.type as string;
170	
171	    if (aeType === "text_delta") {
172	      return {
173	        type: "token",
174	        payload: { token: assistantEvent.delta ?? "" },
175	      };
176	    }
177	
178	    // NOTE: toolcall_start/toolcall_end from message_update are pre-execution
179	    // events (LLM deciding to call a tool). The actual execution data comes
180	    // from tool_execution_start/tool_execution_end below, which carry full
181	    // toolName and result data. Skip early message_update tool events to avoid
182	    // duplicate/empty-named events.
183	
184	    if (aeType === "error") {
185	      const errMsg =
186	        (assistantEvent as any).error?.content?.[0]?.text ??
187	        "Unknown agent error";
188	      return {
189	        type: "error",
190	        payload: { code: "AGENT_ERROR", message: errMsg },
191	      };
192	    }
193	
194	    return null;
195	  }
196	
197	  if (type === "tool_execution_start") {
198	    const e = piEvent as any;
199	    return {
200	      type: "tool_start",
201	      payload: {
202	        tool_name: e.toolName ?? "",
203	        input: JSON.stringify(e.args ?? {}),
204	      },
205	    };
206	  }
207	
208	  if (type === "tool_execution_end") {
209	    const e = piEvent as any;
210	    const isError = e.isError === true;
211	    if (isError) {
212	      return {
213	        type: "tool_error",
214	        payload: {
215	          tool_name: e.toolName ?? "",
216	          error: JSON.stringify(e.result ?? {}),
217	          elapsed: 0,
218	        },
219	      };
220	    }
221	    return {
222	      type: "tool_end",
223	      payload: {
224	        tool_name: e.toolName ?? "",
225	        output: JSON.stringify(e.result ?? {}),
226	        elapsed: 0,
227	      },
228	    };
229	  }
230	
231	  if (type === "message_end") {
232	    const msg = (piEvent as any).message;
233	    let content = "";
234	    if (msg?.content) {
235	      if (typeof msg.content === "string") {
236	        content = msg.content;
237	      } else if (Array.isArray(msg.content)) {
238	        content = msg.content
239	          .map((b: any) => (b?.type === "text" ? b.text : ""))
240	          .join("");
241	      }
242	    }
243	    return {
244	      type: "answer",
245	      payload: { content },
246	    };
247	  }
248	
249	  if (type === "agent_end") {
250	    return { type: "done", payload: {} };
251	  }
252	
253	  return null;
254	}
255	
256	// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
257	// Main event subscriber
258	// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
259	
260	function subscribeSession(
261	  sessionId: string,
262	  session: AgentSession,
263	): () => void {
264	  return session.subscribe((event: any) => {
265	    const mapped = mapPiEventToMaxma(event as Record<string, unknown>);
266	    if (mapped) {
267	      sendEvent(sessionId, mapped);
268	    }
269	  });
270	}
271	
272	// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
273	// RPC handler
274	// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
275	
276	rl.on("line", async (line: string) => {
277	  let req: any;
278	  try {
279	    req = JSON.parse(line);
280	  } catch {
281	    sendError(null, "Parse error");
282	    return;
283	  }
284	
285	  const { method, params, id } = req;
286	
287	  try {
288	    if (method === "create_session") {
289	      const modelStr: string = params?.model ?? "openai/gpt-4o";
290	      const model = parseModel(modelStr);
291	      const cwd: string = params?.cwd ?? process.cwd();
292	      const systemPrompt: string | undefined = params?.system_prompt;
293	      const tools: string[] | undefined = params?.tools as string[] | undefined;
294	      
295	      const createOptions: Record<string, unknown> = {
296	        model,
297	        cwd,
298	      };
299	      if (systemPrompt !== undefined) {
300	        createOptions.systemPrompt = systemPrompt;
301	      }
302	      if (tools !== undefined && Array.isArray(tools) && tools.length > 0) {
303	        createOptions.toolNames = tools;
304	      }
305	
306	      // Register custom Maxma tools
307	      const customTools = registerCustomTools();
308	      if (customTools.length > 0) {
309	        createOptions.customTools = customTools;
310	      }
311	
312	      const { session } = await createAgentSession(createOptions as any);
313	      const sessionId = randomUUID();
314	
315	      const unsubscribe = subscribeSession(sessionId, session);
316	      sessions.set(sessionId, { session, unsubscribe });
317	
318	      send(id, { session_id: sessionId });
319	      return;
320	    }
321	
322	    if (method === "prompt") {
323	      const sessionId: string = params?.session_id;
324	      const message: string = params?.message ?? "";
325	      const record = sessions.get(sessionId);
326	      if (!record) {
327	        sendError(id, `Session not found: ${sessionId}`);
328	        return;
329	      }
330	
331	      // Fire-and-forget — the response returns immediately.
332	      // Events stream asynchronously via the subscriber.
333	      record.session.prompt(message).catch((err: unknown) => {
334	        sendEvent(sessionId, {
335	          type: "error",
336	          payload: { code: "PROMPT_ERROR", message: String(err) },
337	        });
338	      });
339	
340	      send(id, { ok: true });
341	      return;
342	    }
343	
344	    if (method === "cancel") {
345	      const sessionId: string = params?.session_id;
346	      const record = sessions.get(sessionId);
347	      if (!record) {
348	        sendError(id, `Session not found: ${sessionId}`);
349	        return;
350	      }
351	
352	      record.session.agent.abort("Cancelled by user");
353	
354	      send(id, { ok: true });
355	      return;
356	    }
357	
358	    if (method === "destroy_session") {
359	      const sessionId: string = params?.session_id;
360	      const record = sessions.get(sessionId);
361	      if (!record) {
362	        sendError(id, `Session not found: ${sessionId}`);
363	        return;
364	      }
365	
366	      record.unsubscribe();
367	      await record.session.dispose();
368	      sessions.delete(sessionId);
369	
370	      send(id, { ok: true });
371	      return;
372	    }
373	
374	    if (method === "undo") {
375	      const sessionId: string = params?.session_id as string;
376	      const steps: number = (params?.steps as number) ?? 1;
377	      const record = sessions.get(sessionId);
378	      if (!record) {
379	        sendError(id, `Session not found: ${sessionId}`);
380	        return;
381	      }
382	
383	      // Truncate the last N assistant+user message pairs (copy-first to avoid mutating internal state)
384	      const originalLen = record.session.state.messages.length;
385	      const keepCount = Math.max(0, originalLen - steps * 2);
386	      const remaining = record.session.state.messages.slice(0, keepCount);
387	      const removed = originalLen - keepCount;
388	      record.session.replace_messages(remaining);
389	      send(id, { removed });
390	      return;
391	    }
392	
393	    sendError(id, `Unknown method: ${method}`);
394	  } catch (err) {
395	    sendError(id, String(err));
396	  }
397	});
398	
```

> Read: `D:\Maxma\MaxmaHere\bun-sidecar\src\rpc-types.ts`

**Output:**

```json
1	/**
2	 * rpc-types.ts — JSON-RPC 2.0 协议类型定义（Python ↔ Bun sidecar）。
3	 *
4	 * 本文件定义 sidecar 通信协议的全部类型。核心 RPC 方法由
5	 * session-bridge.ts 实现，事件映射遵循 Maxma 前端 WS 协议格式。
6	 */
7	
8	// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
9	// JSON-RPC 2.0 Envelope
10	// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
11	
12	/** JSON-RPC 2.0 请求（Python → sidecar） */
13	export interface RpcRequest {
14	  jsonrpc: "2.0";
15	  method: string;
16	  id: number;
17	  params?: Record<string, unknown>;
18	}
19	
20	/** JSON-RPC 2.0 响应（sidecar → Python） */
21	export interface RpcResponse {
22	  jsonrpc: "2.0";
23	  id: number | null;
24	  result?: unknown;
25	  error?: { message: string; data?: unknown };
26	}
27	
28	/** JSON-RPC 2.0 通知 / 事件推送（sidecar → Python） */
29	export interface RpcNotification {
30	  jsonrpc: "2.0";
31	  method: "event";
32	  params: {
33	    session_id: string;
34	    event: MaxmaEvent;
35	  };
36	}
37	
38	// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
39	// RPC Methods — 参数 & 返回值
40	// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
41	
42	export type RpcMethodName =
43	  | "create_session"
44	  | "prompt"
45	  | "cancel"
46	  | "destroy_session";
47	
48	export interface CreateSessionParams {
49	  model: string;
50	  system_prompt?: string;
51	  cwd?: string;
52	  tools?: string[];
53	}
54	
55	export interface CreateSessionResult {
56	  session_id: string;
57	}
58	
59	export interface PromptParams {
60	  session_id: string;
61	  message: string;
62	}
63	
64	export interface PromptResult {
65	  ok: true;
66	}
67	
68	export interface CancelParams {
69	  session_id: string;
70	}
71	
72	export interface CancelResult {
73	  ok: true;
74	}
75	
76	export interface DestroySessionParams {
77	  session_id: string;
78	}
79	
80	export interface DestroySessionResult {
81	  ok: true;
82	}
83	
84	// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
85	// Events — Maxma 前端 WS 协议格式
86	// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
87	
88	/** Sidecar 可推送的全部事件类型（由 mapPiEventToMaxma 映射产生） */
89	export type MaxmaEvent =
90	  | { type: "thinking_start"; payload: { timestamp: number } }
91	  | { type: "token"; payload: { token: string } }
92	  | { type: "thinking_end"; payload: { timestamp: number } }
93	  | { type: "tool_start"; payload: { tool_name: string; input: string } }
94	  | {
95	      type: "tool_end";
96	      payload: {
97	        tool_name: string;
98	        output: string;
99	        elapsed: number;
100	        tool_data?: Record<string, unknown>;
101	      };
102	    }
103	  | {
104	      type: "tool_error";
105	      payload: { tool_name: string; error: string };
106	    }
107	  | { type: "answer"; payload: { content: string } }
108	  | {
109	      type: "done";
110	      payload: { turn_id?: string; context_usage?: Record<string, unknown> };
111	    }
112	  | {
113	      type: "error";
114	      payload: {
115	        code: string;
116	        message: string;
117	        trace_id?: string;
118	      };
119	    }
120	  | { type: "context_usage"; payload: Record<string, unknown> };
121	
```

1	/**
2	 * tools/index.ts — 注册所有 Maxma 自定义工具作为原生 oh-my-pi AgentTool

7	import type { ToolDefinition } from "@oh-my-pi/pi-coding-agent";
8	import { z } from "zod/v4";
9	import { todoistTools } from "./todoist";
10	
11	// ── Weather Tool ────────────────────────────────────────
12	
13	const weatherParams = z.object({
14	  city: z.string().describe("城市名称，如 '北京'、'上海'"),
15	});
16	
17	const weatherTool: ToolDefinition<typeof weatherParams> = {
18	  name: "get_current_weather",
19	  label: "Get Current Weather",
20	  description: "获取指定城市的实时天气信息，包括温度、湿度、风力、天气状况等",
21	  parameters: weatherParams,
22	  execute: async (toolCallId, params) => {
23	    const city = params.city;
24	    const apiKey = process.env.UAPIS_API_KEY;
25	
26	    if (!apiKey) {
27	      // Fallback: use public wttr.in API
28	      try {
29	        const res = await fetch(`https://wttr.in/${encodeURIComponent(city)}?format=%C+%t+%h+%w&lang=zh`);
30	        const text = await res.text();
31	        return { content: [{ type: "text", text: `${city} 天气: ${text}` }] };
32	      } catch (e) {
33	        return { content: [{ type: "text", text: `${city} 天气暂时无法获取` }] };
34	      }
35	    }
36	
37	    try {
38	      const res = await fetch(`https://api.help.bj.cn/weather/?id=${encodeURIComponent(city)}&key=${apiKey}`);
39	      const data = await res.json() as Record<string, unknown>;
40	      return { content: [{ type: "text", text: JSON.stringify(data, null, 2) }] };
41	    } catch (e) {
42	      return { content: [{ type: "text", text: `获取天气失败: ${String(e)}` }] };
43	    }
44	  },
45	};
46	
47	// ── Holiday Calendar Tool ───────────────────────────────
48	
49	const holidayParams = z.object({
50	  year: z.string().optional().describe("年份，如 '2026'，默认当前年份"),
51	});
52	
53	const holidayTool: ToolDefinition<typeof holidayParams> = {
54	  name: "holiday_calendar",
55	  label: "Holiday Calendar",
56	  description: "获取指定年份的中国法定节假日安排，包括调休信息",
57	  parameters: holidayParams,
58	  execute: async (toolCallId, params) => {
59	    const year = params.year || String(new Date().getFullYear());
60	
61	    // Try uapis API first

63	    if (apiKey) {

72	
73	    // Public API fallback

80	    }
81	  },
82	};
83	
84	// ── Tarot Tool ──────────────────────────────────────────
85	
86	const tarotParams = z.object({
87	  count: z.number().optional().describe("抽取张数，默认 1 张，最大 3 张"),
88	  question: z.string().optional().describe("占卜的问题或主题"),
89	});
90	
91	const tarotTool: ToolDefinition<typeof tarotParams> = {
92	  name: "tarot",
93	  label: "Tarot",
94	  description: "抽取塔罗牌进行占卜，可指定张数和问题",
95	  parameters: tarotParams,
96	  execute: async (toolCallId, params) => {
97	    const count = Math.min(Math.max(params.count || 1, 1), 3);
98	    const question = params.question || "未指定问题";
99	
100	    const cards = [
101	      { name: "愚者", meaning: "新的开始、冒险、天真、无限可能" },
102	      { name: "魔术师", meaning: "创造力、自信、技能、资源" },
103	      { name: "女祭司", meaning: "直觉、潜意识、内在智慧" },
104	      { name: "女皇", meaning: "丰饶、滋养、自然、母性" },
105	      { name: "皇帝", meaning: "权威、结构、稳定、父性" },
106	      { name: "教皇", meaning: "传统、信仰、精神指引" },
107	      { name: "恋人", meaning: "选择、爱情、关系、价值观" },
108	      { name: "战车", meaning: "胜利、决心、意志力、征服" },
109	      { name: "力量", meaning: "内在力量、勇气、耐心、慈悲" },
110	      { name: "隐士", meaning: "内省、寻求真理、独处" },
111	      { name: "命运之轮", meaning: "变化、循环、命运、转折点" },
112	      { name: "正义", meaning: "公正、平衡、真相、法律" },
113	      { name: "倒吊人", meaning: "牺牲、放下、新视角、暂停" },
114	      { name: "死神", meaning: "结束、转变、放下过去、新生" },
115	      { name: "节制", meaning: "平衡、适度、调和、耐心" },
116	      { name: "恶魔", meaning: "束缚、执着、物质主义、欲望" },
117	      { name: "高塔", meaning: "突然变化、颠覆、觉醒、重建" },
118	      { name: "星星", meaning: "希望、灵感、平静、重生" },
119	      { name: "月亮", meaning: "幻想、恐惧、潜意识、困惑" },
120	      { name: "太阳", meaning: "成功、喜悦、活力、成就" },
121	      { name: "审判", meaning: "觉醒、重生、内在召唤、评判" },
122	      { name: "世界", meaning: "完成、圆满、成就、旅程终点" },
123	    ];
124	
125	    // Shuffle and pick
126	    const shuffled = [...cards].sort(() => Math.random() - 0.5);
127	    const picked = shuffled.slice(0, count);
128	
129	    const result = picked.map((card, i) => {
130	      const position = count > 1 ? [`第 ${i + 1} 张`, "正位", "逆位"][Math.floor(Math.random() * 3) % 3] : "";
131	      return `${card.name}${position ? `（${position}）` : ""}: ${card.meaning}`;
132	    }).join("\n");
133	
134	    const response = count > 1
135	      ? `🔮 塔罗牌占卜 — 问题：${question}\n\n${result}`
136	      : `🔮 塔罗牌占卜 — 问题：${question}\n\n抽到的牌：${result}`;
137	
138	    return { content: [{ type: "text", text: response }] };
139	  },
140	};
141	
142	// ── Register All ────────────────────────────────────────
143	
144	export function registerCustomTools(): ToolDefinition[] {
145	  return [
146	    weatherTool,
147	    holidayTool,
148	    tarotTool,
149	    ...todoistTools,
150	  ];
151	}
152

1	/**
2	 * tools/todoist.ts — Todoist REST API v2 集成工具（10个工具）
3	 *
4	 * 使用环境变量 TODOIST_API_TOKEN 进行 Bearer Token 认证。
5	 * API 文档：https://developer.todoist.com/rest/v2/
6	 */
7	
8	import type { ToolDefinition } from "@oh-my-pi/pi-coding-agent";
9	import { z } from "zod/v4";
10	
11	// ── 共享 fetch 封装 ──────────────────────────────────────────
12	
13	const todoistFetch = async (path: string, options?: RequestInit) => {
14	  const token = process.env.TODOIST_API_TOKEN;
15	  if (!token) throw new Error("TODOIST_API_TOKEN 未配置");
16	
17	  const res = await fetch(`https://api.todoist.com/rest/v2${path}`, {
18	    ...options,
19	    headers: {
20	      Authorization: `Bearer ${token}`,
21	      "Content-Type": "application/json",
22	      ...(options?.headers as Record<string, string>),
23	    },
24	  });
25	
26	  if (!res.ok) {
27	    const body = await res.text().catch(() => "");
28	    throw new Error(
29	      `Todoist API error: ${res.status} ${res.statusText}${body ? ` - ${body}` : ""}`,
30	    );
31	  }
32	
33	  // 204 No Content 表示成功但无响应体（如 DELETE / close / reopen）
34	  if (res.status === 204) return null;
35	
36	  return res.json();
37	};

174	    .optional()
175	    .describe("新的截止日期描述，如 'today'、'tomorrow'"),
176	  priority: z.number().optional().describe("新的优先级，1-4"),
177	});
178	
179	const todoUpdateTool: ToolDefinition<typeof updateParams> = {
180	  name: "todo_update",
181	  label: "Update Todoist Task",
182	  description: "更新 Todoist 中现有任务的内容、截止日期或优先级",
183	  parameters: updateParams,
184	  execute: async (_toolCallId, params) => {
185	    try {
186	      const body: Record<string, unknown> = {};
187	      if (params.content !== undefined) body.content = params.content;
188	      if (params.due_string !== undefined) body.due_string = params.due_string;
189	      if (params.priority !== undefined) body.priority = params.priority;
190	
191	      const data = await todoistFetch(`/tasks/${params.id}`, {
192	        method: "POST",
193	        body: JSON.stringify(body),
194	      });
195	      return { content: [{ type: "text", text: JSON.stringify(data, null, 2) }] };
196	    } catch (e) {
197	      return { content: [{ type: "text", text: `更新任务失败: ${String(e)}` }] };
198	    }
199	  },
200	};
201	
202	// ── 7. todo_query ────────────────────────────────────────────
203	
204	const queryParams = z.object({
205	  query: z.string().describe("搜索关键词，按任务内容查找"),
206	});
207	
208	const todoQueryTool: ToolDefinition<typeof queryParams> = {
209	  name: "todo_query",
210	  label: "Query Todoist Tasks",
211	  description: "根据关键词搜索 Todoist 中的任务（使用 filter search: 语法）",
212	  parameters: queryParams,
213	  execute: async (_toolCallId, params) => {
214	    try {
215	      const data = await todoistFetch(
216	        `/tasks?filter=${encodeURIComponent(`search: ${params.query}`)}`,
217	      );
218	      return { content: [{ type: "text", text: JSON.stringify(data, null, 2) }] };
219	    } catch (e) {
220	      return { content: [{ type: "text", text: `搜索任务失败: ${String(e)}` }] };
221	    }
222	  },
223	};
224	
225	// ── 8. todo_list_projects ────────────────────────────────────
226	
227	const listProjectsParams = z.object({});
228	
229	const todoListProjectsTool: ToolDefinition<typeof listProjectsParams> = {
230	  name: "todo_list_projects",
231	  label: "List Todoist Projects",
232	  description: "列出 Todoist 中所有项目",
233	  parameters: listProjectsParams,
234	  execute: async () => {
235	    try {
236	      const data = await todoistFetch("/projects");
237	      return { content: [{ type: "text", text: JSON.stringify(data, null, 2) }] };
238	    } catch (e) {
239	      return { content: [{ type: "text", text: `获取项目列表失败: ${String(e)}` }] };
240	    }
241	  },
242	};
243	
244	// ── 9. todo_list_sections ────────────────────────────────────
245	
246	const listSectionsParams = z.object({
247	  project_id: z.string().describe("项目 ID，列出该项目下的分区"),
248	});
249	
250	const todoListSectionsTool: ToolDefinition<typeof listSectionsParams> = {
251	  name: "todo_list_sections",
252	  label: "List Todoist Sections",
253	  description: "列出指定项目中的分区（section）",
254	  parameters: listSectionsParams,
255	  execute: async (_toolCallId, params) => {
256	    try {
257	      const data = await todoistFetch(
258	        `/sections?project_id=${params.project_id}`,
259	      );
260	      return { content: [{ type: "text", text: JSON.stringify(data, null, 2) }] };
261	    } catch (e) {
262	      return { content: [{ type: "text", text: `获取分区列表失败: ${String(e)}` }] };
263	    }
264	  },
265	};
266	
267	// ── 10. todo_list_labels ─────────────────────────────────────
268	
269	const listLabelsParams = z.object({});
270	
271	const todoListLabelsTool: ToolDefinition<typeof listLabelsParams> = {
272	  name: "todo_list_labels",
273	  label: "List Todoist Labels",
274	  description: "列出 Todoist 中所有标签",
275	  parameters: listLabelsParams,
276	  execute: async () => {
277	    try {
278	      const data = await todoistFetch("/labels");
279	      return { content: [{ type: "text", text: JSON.stringify(data, null, 2) }] };
280	    } catch (e) {
281	      return { content: [{ type: "text", text: `获取标签列表失败: ${String(e)}` }] };
282	    }
283	  },
284	};
285	
286	// ── Export ────────────────────────────────────────────────────
287	
288	export const todoistTools: ToolDefinition[] = [
289	  todoAddTool,
290	  todoListTool,
291	  todoCompleteTool,
292	  todoUncompleteTool,
293	  todoDeleteTool,
294	  todoUpdateTool,
295	  todoQueryTool,
296	  todoListProjectsTool,
297	  todoListSectionsTool,
298	  todoListLabelsTool,
299	];
300	
```

#### Tool: Read

> Read: `D:\Maxma\MaxmaHere\HANDOFF.md`

**Output:**

```json
1	# MaxmaHere 交接文档
2	
3	> 写给后续开发者：本文档描述项目当前的真实状态。
4	
5	---
6	
7	## 一、Maxma 是什么
8	
9	MaxmaHere 是一个**本地优先的 AI 工作站**，以 oh-my-pi 为 Agent 引擎，Vue 3 为前端，Tauri 为桌面壳。
10	
11	**核心设计**：Maxma = oh-my-pi 的前端。所有 Agent 推理由 oh-my-pi 提供，Maxma 负责品牌 UI/UX、用户管理、路由和安全策略。
12	
13	### 技术栈
14	
15	| 层 | 技术 | 版本 |
16	|---|---|---|
17	| Agent 引擎 | oh-my-pi (Bun/TypeScript) | v16.5.2 |
18	| LLM 提供商 | 40+（Anthropic, OpenAI, DeepSeek, 本地 Ollama...） | — |
19	| 后端 | FastAPI + uvicorn (Python) | >= 0.110 |
20	| 前端 | Vue 3 + Vite 5 + Pinia + TypeScript | Vue ^3.4 |
21	| 桌面壳 | Tauri 2 + Rust | v2.6.6 |
22	| 会话持久化 | oh-my-pi JSONL + SQLite（SessionMap） | — |
23	| 内存/向量 | ChromaDB + ONNX Runtime | paraphrase-multilingual |
24	| Python | >= 3.11 | 隔离 .venv |
25	
26	### 目录结构
27	
28	```
29	MaxmaHere/
30	├── bun-sidecar/                ← oh-my-pi 引擎（Bun sidecar）
31	│   └── src/
32	│       ├── session-bridge.ts   ← JSON-RPC 服务器：封装 createAgentSession
33	│       ├── rpc-types.ts        ← 协议类型定义
34	│       └── tools/              ← 13 个原生 AgentTool
35	├── api/
36	│   ├── pi_bridge/              ← Python ↔ oh-my-pi 桥接层
37	│   │   ├── sidecar_manager.py  ← Bun 进程生命周期
38	│   │   ├── rpc_client.py       ← JSON-RPC 2.0 客户端
39	│   │   ├── session_adapter.py  ← SessionMap 持久化映射
40	│   │   ├── ws_event_mapper.py  ← 事件校验/包装
41	│   │   ├── security_adapter.py ← 路径安全/MaxmaBlocker
42	│   │   └── approval_adapter.py ← 审批级别映射
43	│   ├── routes/
44	│   │   └── chat.py             ← WS 端点，唯一 agent 执行路径（oh-my-pi）
45	│   └── providers/              ← LLM Provider 管理
46	├── web/                        ← Vue 3 前端
47	├── config/                     ← 人设、贴纸
48	├── agent/                      ← Python 辅助（prompts, context_manager）
49	├── memory/                     ← 记忆系统
50	└── desktop/                    ← Tauri 桌面壳
51	```
52	
53	### 架构要点
54	
55	1. **Agent 引擎**：oh-my-pi（Bun 进程）执行所有 agent 推理循环。Python 端通过 JSON-RPC over stdio 与之通信。
56	2. **LangGraph 已完全移除**：`agent/graph.py` 及其依赖（planner/executor/coordinator/verifier）已于 2026-07-15 全部删除。`langgraph` 包已从环境卸载。
57	3. **工具系统**：oh-my-pi 的 32 个内置工具（bash/read/write/edit/gh/task 等）+ 13 个 Maxma 自定义 TypeScript AgentTool（天气/节假日/Todoist ×10/塔罗牌），直接注册在 `createAgentSession` 的 `customTools` 选项中。
58	4. **记忆系统**：4 层记忆仍在，但通过 oh-my-pi 的 `transformContext` hook 注入。
59	5. **人设系统**：SOUL.md/USER.md/AGENTS.md 通过 `build_system_prompt()` 生成 system prompt 传给 oh-my-pi。
60	
61	---
62	
63	## 二、已完成的工作
64	
65	### 2026-07-15 — oh-my-pi 全面迁移（12 个任务）
66	
67	| 阶段 | 任务 | 状态 |
68	|---|---|---|
69	| **0. Spike** | 技术验证：oh-my-pi 作为 sidecar 运行 | ✅ |
70	| **1. Bridge** | SidecarManager + JsonRpcClient + WS 映射 + chat.py 集成 | ✅ |
71	| **2. Tools** | 事件映射修复 + pi_adapter.py + E2E 测试 | ✅ |
72	| **3. Complete** | Provider 迁移 + SessionMap + 记忆/人格对接 | ✅ |
73	| **善后** | 清理 5 个遗留 `build_agent` 调用 | ✅ |
74	| **善后** | 删除 agent/graph.py + LangGraph 依赖 | ✅ |
75	| **善后** | 对抗式审查 + Bug 修复（tool_error/重启上下文恢复） | ✅ |
76	| **工具重写** | 13 个原生 TypeScript AgentTool（weather/holiday/todoist ×10/tarot） | ✅ |
77	| **代码清理** | 删除旧 Python tools/ 目录、MCP 桥接、pi_adapter.py | ✅ |
78	
79	### 遗留待办
80	
81	| 事项 | 优先级 | 说明 |
82	|---|---|---|
83	| `api/checkpointer_factory.py` 中的 MemorySaver 回退 | 低 | 已用 try/except 保护，`langgraph` 卸载后自动降级为 None |
84	| `memory/narrative.py` 中的 LTM CRUD agent | 低 | 无 langgraph 时跳过 CRUD agent，LTM 摘要仍正常工作 |
85	| Session 重启完整恢复（加载 oh-my-pi JSONL） | 中 | 当前使用 SessionMap 存储最近 5 轮对话作为上下文注入 |
86	| 打包构建需更新（Bun sidecar 纳入安装包） | 中 | 当前 dev 模式可用，生产打包需更新 PyInstaller spec |
87	
88	---
89	
90	## 三、关键配置
91	
92	### 环境变量
93	
94	| 变量 | 用途 | 必需 |
95	|---|---|---|
96	| `OPENAI_API_KEY` | 默认 LLM Provider | 至少配置一个 |
97	| `TODOIST_API_TOKEN` | Todoist 工具 | 否 |
98	| `AMAP_API_KEY` | 高德地图 MCP | 否 |
99	| `UAPIS_API_KEY` | 天气/节假日 API | 否 |
100	
101	### 切换 LangGraph 回退（不推荐）
102	
103	部分端点（`sessions.py` undo）备有 LangGraph 回退路径，由 `try: from agent.graph import build_agent` 保护。要启用需：
104	1. `pip install langgraph langgraph-checkpoint-sqlite`
105	2. 删除 `api/routes/sessions.py` 中 undo 函数体的 try/except 保护
106	
107	---
108	
109	## 四、常见坑
110	
111	- **缩进混合**：该项目历史原因存在 tab/spaces 混用。编辑文件后请检查。
112	- **sidecar 启动顺序**：`SidecarManager.start()` 是幂等的，但首次调用会启动 Bun 进程（耗时 ~0.5s）。应用启动时 `app.state.sidecar_manager` 仅初始化实例，不启动进程。
113	- **MCP 工具**：高德地图等外部工具通过 MCP 接入，需用户在前端配置 MCP 服务器地址。
114	
```

#### Tool: Read

> Read: `D:\Maxma\MaxmaHere\main.py`

**Output:**

```json
1	"""MaxmaHere — LangGraph ReAct AI Agent Web 入口。"""
2	
3	import os
4	import sys
5	import threading
6	import time
7	
8	import uvicorn
9	from version import __version__
10	
11	from api.logging_config import setup_logging
12	from api.server import create_app
13	from app_paths import ensure_data_dirs
14	from config.settings import get_settings
15	from memory.user_init import ensure_all
16	
17	
18	def _start_parent_watchdog():
19	    """启动父进程监控守护线程。
20	
21	    当 Tauri 主进程（maxma-here.exe）退出时，sidecar 可能成为孤儿进程
22	    （Job Object 在某些场景下可能失效，如主进程已在其他 Job 中）。
23	    此守护线程每 2 秒检查 Tauri 主进程是否存活，若已退出则立即终止 sidecar。
24	
25	    这是 Job Object 机制的兜底方案，确保 sidecar 不会在主进程退出后继续运行。
26	
27	    监控目标优先级：
28	      1. MAXMA_PARENT_PID 环境变量（Tauri 主进程 PID，由 main.rs 注入）
29	      2. os.getppid()（直接父进程，开发模式下即为启动本进程的 shell/IDE）
30	
31	    注意：PyInstaller onefile 模式下 os.getppid() 返回的是 bootloader PID
32	    而非 Tauri 主进程。若仅监控 bootloader，当 Job Object 失效且 Tauri
33	    退出但 bootloader 仍存活时，守护线程无法触发。因此生产模式下必须
34	    使用 MAXMA_PARENT_PID 监控 Tauri 主进程。
35	
36	    进程存活检测使用 WaitForSingleObject(handle, 0)：
37	      - 返回 WAIT_OBJECT_0 (0)：进程已退出（被信号/signaled）
38	      - 返回 WAIT_TIMEOUT (258)：进程仍在运行
39	      - 返回 WAIT_FAILED (0xFFFFFFFF)：出错（视为已退出，fail-safe）
40	    不能仅用 OpenProcess 返回值判断，因为 Windows 对已退出但未完全回收的
41	    "僵尸进程"仍会返回有效句柄。
42	    """
43	    if sys.platform != "win32":
44	        return
45	
46	    try:
47	        import ctypes
48	
49	        # 优先使用 Tauri 注入的主进程 PID，否则回退到直接父进程
50	        parent_pid_str = os.environ.get("MAXMA_PARENT_PID", "")
51	        if parent_pid_str.isdigit():
52	            ppid = int(parent_pid_str)
53	        else:
54	            ppid = os.getppid()
55	
56	        if ppid <= 1:
57	            return
58	
59	        kernel32 = ctypes.windll.kernel32
60	        SYNCHRONIZE = 0x00100000
61	        WAIT_OBJECT_0 = 0
62	        WAIT_TIMEOUT = 258
63	        WAIT_FAILED = 0xFFFFFFFF
64	
65	        def _watch():
66	            while True:
67	                time.sleep(2)
68	                try:
69	                    handle = kernel32.OpenProcess(SYNCHRONIZE, False, ppid)
70	                    if not handle:
71	                        # 无法打开进程（PID 不存在或无权限），视为已退出
72	                        print(f"[watchdog] 父进程 (pid={ppid}) 已退出（OpenProcess 返回空），sidecar 自动终止", flush=True)
73	                        os._exit(0)
74	                    status = kernel32.WaitForSingleObject(handle, 0)
75	                    kernel32.CloseHandle(handle)
76	                    if status == WAIT_OBJECT_0 or status == WAIT_FAILED:
77	                        print(f"[watchdog] 父进程 (pid={ppid}) 已退出（WaitForSingleObject={status}），sidecar 自动终止", flush=True)
78	                        os._exit(0)
79	                except Exception as e:
80	                    # 检测过程中出错，fail-safe：终止 sidecar 避免孤儿
81	                    print(f"[watchdog] 检测异常 ({e})，sidecar 自动终止", flush=True)
82	                    os._exit(0)
83	
84	        t = threading.Thread(target=_watch, daemon=True, name="parent-watchdog")
85	        t.start()
86	    except Exception:
87	        pass
88	
89	
90	def main():
91	    # 初始化日志系统（在其他模块导入之前）
92	    setup_logging()
93	
94	    # CLI：轮换 Token
95	    if "--rotate-token" in sys.argv:
96	        from api.auth import rotate_token
97	
98	        rotated = rotate_token()
99	        print(f"[auth] Token rotated: {rotated}")
100	        return
101	
102	    import logging
103	    logger = logging.getLogger(__name__)
104	    logger.info("MaxmaHere %s starting", __version__)
105	
106	    # 启动父进程监控（防止 sidecar 成为孤儿进程）
107	    _start_parent_watchdog()
108	
109	    # 确保所有用户数据目录存在（打包模式下首次运行时自动创建）
110	    ensure_data_dirs()
111	
112	    ensure_all()
113	
114	    app = create_app()
115	
116	    settings = get_settings()
117	    dev_mode = "--dev" in sys.argv
118	    uvicorn.run(
119	        app,
120	        host="127.0.0.1",
121	        port=settings.maxma_api_port,
122	        reload=dev_mode,
123	        reload_dirs=["agent", "api", "tools", "memory"] if dev_mode else None,
124	    )
125	
126	
127	if __name__ == "__main__":
128	    main()
129	
```

**Output:**

```json
1	"""JSON-RPC 2.0 client for communicating with the Bun sidecar over stdio."""
2	
3	from __future__ import annotations
4	
5	import asyncio
6	import json
7	import logging
8	from collections.abc import Callable
9	from typing import Any
10	
11	logger = logging.getLogger(__name__)
12	
13	
14	class JsonRpcError(Exception):
15	    """Raised when the sidecar returns a JSON-RPC error response."""
16	
17	    def __init__(self, message: str, data: Any = None) -> None:
18	        super().__init__(message)
19	        self.data = data
20	
21	
22	class JsonRpcClient:
23	    """JSON-RPC 2.0 client over stdio.
24	
25	    Reads/writes JSON lines from/to a subprocess's stdin/stdout.
26	    Supports:
27	    - Request/response with call()
28	    - Server-pushed event notifications with on()
29	    - Automatic cleanup on stop()
30	    """
31	
32	    def __init__(
33	        self, stdin: asyncio.StreamWriter, stdout: asyncio.StreamReader
34	    ) -> None:
35	        self._stdin = stdin
36	        self._stdout = stdout
37	        self._msg_id = 0
38	        self._pending: dict[int, asyncio.Future[dict]] = {}
39	        self._handlers: dict[str, list[Callable]] = {}
40	        self._running = False
41	        self._read_task: asyncio.Task[None] | None = None
42	
43	    # -- Public API ---------------------------------------------------------
44	
45	    async def start_reading(self) -> None:
46	        """Start the background task that reads stdout and dispatches messages."""
47	        if self._running:
48	            return
49	        self._running = True
50	        self._read_task = asyncio.create_task(self._read_loop())
51	
52	    async def call(
53	        self, method: str, params: dict | None = None, *, timeout: float = 120
54	    ) -> dict:
55	        """Send a JSON-RPC request and wait for the response.
56	
57	        Args:
58	            method: The RPC method name.
59	            params: Optional parameters dict.
60	            timeout: Maximum seconds to wait for a response (default 120).
61	
62	        Returns:
63	            The result dict from the response.
64	
65	        Raises:
66	            JsonRpcError: if the sidecar returns an error response.
67	            TimeoutError: if no response within *timeout* seconds.
68	            RuntimeError: if the client is not running.
69	        """
70	        if not self._running:
71	            raise RuntimeError("JsonRpcClient is not running")
72	
73	        self._msg_id += 1
74	        msg_id = self._msg_id
75	
76	        req: dict[str, Any] = {
77	            "jsonrpc": "2.0",
78	            "method": method,
79	            "id": msg_id,
80	        }
81	        if params is not None:
82	            req["params"] = params
83	
84	        future: asyncio.Future[dict] = asyncio.get_event_loop().create_future()
85	        self._pending[msg_id] = future
86	
87	        try:
88	            line = json.dumps(req, ensure_ascii=False) + "\n"
89	            self._stdin.write(line.encode("utf-8"))
90	            await self._stdin.drain()
91	            return await asyncio.wait_for(future, timeout=timeout)
92	        except asyncio.TimeoutError:
93	            self._pending.pop(msg_id, None)
94	            raise TimeoutError(
95	                f"RPC call '{method}' timed out after {timeout}s"
96	            )
97	
98	    def on(self, event_type: str, handler: Callable) -> Callable[[], None]:
99	        """Register an event handler.
100	
101	        The handler receives ``(session_id: str, event: dict)``.
102	
103	        Returns a callable that unsubscribes the handler when invoked.
104	        """
105	        if event_type not in self._handlers:
106	            self._handlers[event_type] = []
107	        self._handlers[event_type].append(handler)
108	
109	        def _unsubscribe() -> None:
110	            try:
111	                self._handlers[event_type].remove(handler)
112	            except ValueError:
113	                pass
114	
115	        return _unsubscribe
116	
117	    async def stop(self) -> None:
118	        """Stop the read loop and cancel pending futures."""
119	        self._running = False
120	        if self._read_task is not None and not self._read_task.done():
121	            self._read_task.cancel()
122	            try:
123	                await self._read_task
124	            except asyncio.CancelledError:
125	                pass
126	            self._read_task = None
127	        # Cancel remaining pending futures
128	        for fut in self._pending.values():
129	            if not fut.done():
130	                fut.set_exception(RuntimeError("Client stopped"))
131	        self._pending.clear()
132	
133	    @property
134	    def is_running(self) -> bool:
135	        """True if the read loop is active."""
136	        return self._running
137	
138	    # -- Internal -----------------------------------------------------------
139	
140	    async def _read_loop(self) -> None:
141	        """Continuously read JSON lines from stdout and dispatch them."""
142	        try:
143	            while self._running:
144	                line = await self._stdout.readline()
145	                if not line:
146	                    break  # EOF: process died
147	                line_str = line.decode("utf-8").strip()
148	                if not line_str:
149	                    continue
150	                try:
151	                    msg = json.loads(line_str)
152	                    await self._dispatch(msg)
153	                except json.JSONDecodeError:
154	                    logger.warning(
155	                        "[rpc] invalid JSON from sidecar: %s", line_str[:200]
156	                    )
157	        except Exception:
158	            if self._running:
159	                logger.exception("[rpc] read loop crashed")
160	        finally:
161	            self._running = False
162	            # Cancel all pending futures
163	            for fut in self._pending.values():
164	                if not fut.done():
165	                    fut.set_exception(RuntimeError("Sidecar disconnected"))
166	            self._pending.clear()
167	
168	    async def _dispatch(self, msg: dict) -> None:
169	        """Dispatch an incoming message: event notification or RPC response."""
170	        # Event notification (server-pushed, no id)
171	        if msg.get("method") == "event":
172	            params = msg.get("params", {})
173	            event = params.get("event", {})
174	            event_type: str = ""
175	            if isinstance(event, dict):
176	                event_type = event.get("type", "")
177	            handlers = self._handlers.get(event_type, [])
178	            session_id = params.get("session_id", "")
179	            for handler in handlers:
180	                try:
181	                    if asyncio.iscoroutinefunction(handler):
182	                        await handler(session_id, event)
183	                    else:
184	                        handler(session_id, event)
185	                except Exception:
186	                    logger.exception(
187	                        "[rpc] event handler error: type=%s", event_type
188	                    )
189	            return
190	
191	        # RPC response (has id)
192	        msg_id = msg.get("id")
193	        if msg_id is not None and msg_id in self._pending:
194	            fut = self._pending.pop(msg_id)
195	            if "error" in msg:
196	                error = msg["error"]
197	                fut.set_exception(
198	                    JsonRpcError(
199	                        error.get("message", "RPC error"),
200	                        error.get("data"),
201	                    )
202	                )
203	            else:
204	                fut.set_result(msg.get("result", {}))
205	
```
