```json
91	
92	def _hook_tools_for_action(app_state, action: str, trigger_detail: str) -> list:
93	    """Select tools for a headless event-hook run.
94	
95	    Event hooks execute without a live chat WebSocket, so tools that require
96	    immediate user interaction are intentionally excluded.
97	    """
98	    from tools import select_tools_for_query
99	
100	    mcp_tools = getattr(app_state, "mcp_tools", None) or []
101	    selected = select_tools_for_query(
102	        f"{action}\n\n触发详情：{trigger_detail}",
103	        mcp_tools=list(mcp_tools),
104	    )
105	    return [
106	        tool
107	        for tool in selected
108	        if not str(getattr(tool, "name", "")).startswith("ask_user_")
109	    ]
110	
111	
112	def _extract_hook_final_answer(output) -> str:
113	    messages = output.get("messages", []) if isinstance(output, dict) else []
114	    if not messages:
115	        return ""
116	    last = messages[-1]
117	    content = last.content if hasattr(last, "content") else str(last)
118	    return str(content or "")
119	
120	
121	async def _run_event_hook_action(app: FastAPI, hook, trigger_detail: str) -> str:
122	    """Run one event-hook action through the normal LangGraph Agent entrypoint."""
123	    app_state = app.state
124	    llm = getattr(app_state, "llm", None)
125	    if llm is None:
126	        raise HookUnsupportedError("事件钩子执行不可用：未配置 LLM Provider")
127	
128	    session_manager = getattr(app_state, "session_manager", None)
129	    if session_manager is None:
130	        raise HookUnsupportedError("事件钩子执行不可用：会话管理器未初始化")
131	
132	    session = await session_manager.create()
133	    try:
134	        system_prompt = getattr(app_state, "system_prompt", "") or get_system_prompt()
135	        system_prompt = (
136	            system_prompt
137	            + "\n\n[事件钩子执行模式]\n"
138	            + "当前任务由后台事件钩子自动触发，没有可交互的聊天 WebSocket。"
139	            + "不要请求用户确认或等待用户输入；"
140	            + "如果动作需要人工确认，请说明无法在后台执行。"
141	        )
142	        tools = _hook_tools_for_action(app_state, hook.action, trigger_detail)
143	        # 4 层架构：注入情景记忆管理器（事件钩子场景也启用 episodic 检索）
144	        episodic_mm = getattr(app_state, "episodic_mm", None)
145	        prompt = (
146	            "[事件钩子触发]\n"
147	            f"钩子名称：{hook.name}\n"
148	            f"钩子类型：{hook.hook_type}\n"
149	            f"触发详情：{trigger_detail}\n\n"
150	            "[预设动作]\n"
151	            f"{hook.action}"
152	        )
153	        timeout = float(hook.config.get("timeout", 600))
154	        response = await asyncio.wait_for(
155	            llm.ainvoke([
156	                SystemMessage(content=system_prompt),
157	                HumanMessage(content=prompt),
158	            ]),
159	            timeout=timeout,
160	        )
161	        final_answer = response.content if hasattr(response, "content") else str(response)
162	        return (
163	            final_answer
164	            or "事件钩子动作已执行，但没有生成文本结果"
165	        )
166	    finally:
167	        delete_session = getattr(session_manager, "delete", None)
168	        if callable(delete_session):
169	            await delete_session(session.session_id)
170	
171	
172	def _build_event_hook_callback(app: FastAPI):
173	    async def _callback(hook, trigger_detail: str) -> str:
174	        return await _run_event_hook_action(app, hook, trigger_detail)
175	
176	    return _callback
177	
178	
179	async def _load_const_sessions(app: FastAPI):
180	    """从 YAML 重建所有 const 固定会话到内存 SessionManager。
181	
182	    阶段 5.1：改用全局持久化 checkpointer（AsyncSqliteSaver）。
183	    - thread_id = const session_id 天然隔离，无需为每个 const 会话单独建 saver
184	    - 进程重启后，SQLite 中已存在的 checkpoint 可直接恢复，aupdate_state 幂等覆盖
185	    """
186	    sm = app.state.session_manager
187	    const_list = load_all_const_sessions()
188	    if not const_list:
189	        return
190	
191	    # 使用 getattr 避免 AttributeError：app.state.llm 是在 _init_llm_background()
192	    # 异步任务中设置的，_load_const_sessions 可能在该任务完成前就被调用
193	    llm = getattr(app.state, 'llm', None)
194	    if llm is None:
195	        logger.warning("[const] Skipping %d const session(s) — no LLM available yet", len(const_list))
196	        return
197	
198	    from api.checkpointer_factory import get_persistent_checkpointer
199	
200	    # 共享全局 checkpointer（thread_id 区分会话）
201	    shared_checkpointer = get_persistent_checkpointer()
202	
203	    loaded = 0
204	    for const_data in const_list:
205	        sid = const_data.get("session_id")
206	        if not sid or sid in sm._sessions:
207	            continue
208	
209	        metadata = const_data.get("metadata", {})
210	        const_name = const_data.get("const_name", "")
211	        messages = const_data.get("messages", [])
212	
213	        # 用共享 checkpointer 重建会话状态
214	        try:
215	            reconstructed = deserialize_messages(messages)
216	            if reconstructed:
217	                logger.info("[const] Sidecar mode: const session %s messages are managed by oh-my-pi", sid)
218	        except Exception as e:
219	            logger.warning("[const] 重建会话 %s 失败: %s", sid, e)
220	            continue
221	
222	        session = SessionState(
223	            session_id=sid,
224	            created_at=metadata.get("created_at", time.time()),
225	            last_active=metadata.get("last_active", time.time()),
226	            message_count=metadata.get("message_count", 0),
227	            permission_mode=metadata.get("permission_mode", "ask"),
228	            permission_mode_updated_at=metadata.get("permission_mode_updated_at", time.time()),
229	            checkpointer=shared_checkpointer,
230	            is_const=True,
231	            const_name=const_name,
232	        )
233	        sm._sessions[sid] = session
234	        loaded += 1
235	
236	    logger.info("[const] 已加载 %d/%d 个固定会话", loaded, len(const_list))
237	
238	
239	@asynccontextmanager
240	async def lifespan(app: FastAPI):
241	    from agent.lifecycle.disposable import DisposableStore, to_disposable
242	
243	    # Disposable 资源集合 — 统一管理生命周期
244	    _disposables = DisposableStore()
245	    app.state._disposables = _disposables
246	
247	    # 1. 初始化 Provider 管理器（SQLite 存储，兼容旧 YAML 导入）
248	    from api.db.core import initialize_database
249	    from api.db.providers import ProviderDbStore
250	
251	    initialize_database()  # 确保 DB schema 已创建
252	
253	    provider_store = ProviderDbStore()
254	    # 首次迁移：从旧 YAML 导入已有配置
255	    migrated_count = provider_store.migrate_from_yaml()
256	    if migrated_count:
257	        logger.info("[provider] migrated %d provider(s) from YAML", migrated_count)
258	    # 迁移 .env 中的 DeepSeek 配置（纯新安装场景）
259	    if provider_store.is_empty:
260	        migrated = _migrate_provider_from_env(provider_store)
261	        if migrated:
262	            logger.info("[provider] migrated %s from .env", migrated.label)
263	
264	    provider_manager = ProviderManager(provider_store)
265	    provider_manager.load_all()
266	    app.state.provider_manager = provider_manager
267	    logger.info("[provider] loaded %d provider(s)", provider_manager.count)
268	
269	    # 阶段 3.3：启动 provider 健康监控后台任务
270	    # - 健康 provider 每 check_interval 秒检查一次
271	    # - unhealthy provider 每 recovery_interval 秒重新探测
272	    # - 连续失败达 unhealthy_threshold 才标记 error（避免单次抖动）
273	    from api.providers.health_monitor import start_health_monitor
274	    from config.settings import get_settings as _get_settings_for_health
275	    _health_settings = _get_settings_for_health()
276	    start_health_monitor(
277	        provider_manager,
278	        check_interval=_health_settings.provider_health_check_interval_seconds,
279	        recovery_interval=_health_settings.provider_recovery_check_interval_seconds,
280	        unhealthy_threshold=_health_settings.provider_unhealthy_threshold,
281	    )
282	    logger.info(
283	        "[health_monitor] 已启动（check=%ds, recovery=%ds, threshold=%d）",
284	        _health_settings.provider_health_check_interval_seconds,
285	        _health_settings.provider_recovery_check_interval_seconds,
286	        _health_settings.provider_unhealthy_threshold,
287	    )
288	
289	    # 2. 其他共享资源（不阻塞启动 — LLM 在后台初始化）
290	    app.state.system_prompt = get_system_prompt()
291	    app.state.native_tools = get_tools()
292	    app.state.session_manager = SessionManager()
293	    # The workflow API is always registered but runtime construction remains
294	    # opt-in. A disabled flag therefore has no journal or execution side effect.
295	    workflow_settings = get_settings()
296	    if (
297	        workflow_settings.workflow_enabled
298	        and workflow_settings.async_subagent_enabled
299	        and workflow_settings.permission_modes_enabled
300	    ):
301	        from tools.workflow.journal import WorkflowJournalStore
302	        from tools.workflow.registry import DEFAULT_WORKFLOW_REGISTRY
303	        from tools.workflow.run_manager import WorkflowRunManager
304	
305	        app.state.workflow_run_manager = WorkflowRunManager(
306	            WorkflowJournalStore(WORKFLOW_JOURNAL_PATH), DEFAULT_WORKFLOW_REGISTRY
307	        )
308	        app.state.session_manager.set_workflow_run_manager(app.state.workflow_run_manager)
309	        app.state.workflow_run_manager.recover()
310	    app.state.ws_registry = WebSocketRegistry()
311	    app.state.ltm = LongTermMemoryInterface(
312	        MEMORY_PATH,
313	        retry_policy_enabled=get_settings().ltm_retry_policy_enabled,
314	    )
315	
316	    # 阶段 5.1：初始化持久化 checkpointer（必须在 _load_const_sessions 之前）
317	    # - 启用 SQLite 持久化：进程重启后可恢复会话状态
318	    # - 失败时自动回退到 MemorySaver（仅内存，重启丢失）
319	    from api.checkpointer_factory import init_persistent_checkpointer
320	    await init_persistent_checkpointer()
321	    from api.checkpointer_factory import get_checkpointer_info
322	    logger.info("[checkpointer] %s", get_checkpointer_info())
323	
324	    # 后台初始化 LLM（不阻塞 lifespan，让 API 立即就绪）
325	    async def _init_llm_background():
326	        try:
327	            llm = get_llm(provider_manager)
328	            app.state.llm = llm
329	            logger.info("[llm] LLM 后台初始化完成")
330	            # LLM 就绪后启动长期记忆
331	            app.state.ltm.start_listening(
332	                llm, ws_registry=app.state.ws_registry,
333	            )
334	            logger.info("[ltm] 长期记忆监听器已启动")
335	        except RuntimeError as e:
336	            logger.warning("[llm] %s", e)
337	            logger.warning("[llm] No LLM configured — chat will be read-only until a provider is added")
338	            app.state.llm = None
339	    app.state._llm_init_task = asyncio.create_task(_init_llm_background())
340	    _disposables.add(to_disposable(lambda: app.state._llm_init_task.cancel() if not app.state._llm_init_task.done() else None))
341	
342	    # 从 YAML 配置加载 MCP 工具
343	    app.state.mcp_tools = await init_mcp_tools()
344	    app.state.tools = merge_tool_lists(app.state.native_tools, app.state.mcp_tools)
345	
346	    # 注入 MCP 重载回调：工具修改 YAML 后通过此回调触发异步重载
347	    _loop = asyncio.get_running_loop()  # 在 lifespan 协程中安全获取
348	
349	    def _mcp_reload_callback():
350	        _loop.call_soon_threadsafe(lambda: _loop.create_task(_do_reload_from_tool()))
351	
352	    async def _do_reload_from_tool():
353	        try:
354	            from tools.mcp import reload_mcp
355	            new_tools = await reload_mcp()
356	            app.state.mcp_tools = new_tools
357	            app.state.tools = merge_tool_lists(app.state.native_tools, new_tools)
358	            logger.info("[mcp] 工具触发热重载成功，共 %d 个 MCP 工具", len(new_tools))
359	        except Exception as exc:
360	            logger.error("[mcp] 工具触发热重载失败: %s", exc)
361	
362	    set_reload_callback(_mcp_reload_callback)
363	
364	    # 加载 const 固定会话（需要 tools 已就绪）
365	    await _load_const_sessions(app)
366	
367	    # 4. 启动定时 session 清理任务（每 5 分钟清理超过 TTL 的不活跃会话）
368	    async def _periodic_cleanup():
369	        while True:
370	            await asyncio.sleep(300)  # 5 分钟
371	            sm = app.state.session_manager
372	            removed = await sm.cleanup_expired()
373	            if removed:
374	                logger.info(
375	                    "[session] cleanup: removed %d expired session(s), %d remaining",
376	                    removed, len(sm._sessions),
377	                )
378	
379	    app.state._cleanup_task = asyncio.create_task(_periodic_cleanup())
380	    _disposables.add(to_disposable(lambda: app.state._cleanup_task.cancel() if not app.state._cleanup_task.done() else None))
381	
382	    # 4.5 启动指标持久化 flush 任务（定期将内存快照写入 SQLite）
383	    from api.metrics import get_metrics
384	    get_metrics().start_flush_task()
385	
386	    # 4.6 启动 TTL 遗忘机制后台清理任务（定期清理 memory.yaml 中已过期条目）
387	    from memory.ttl import schedule_purge as schedule_ttl_purge
388	    from app_paths import EPISODIC_MEMORY_PATH, SEMANTIC_MEMORY_PATH
389	    _settings = get_settings()
390	    # 初始化 4 层记忆：长期/情景/语义管理器 + 协调器
391	    _long_term_mm = MemoryManager(yaml_file=str(MEMORY_PATH))
392	    _episodic_mm = EpisodicMemoryManager(
393	        json_file=str(EPISODIC_MEMORY_PATH),
394	        default_ttl=_settings.default_episodic_ttl,
395	    )
396	    _semantic_mm = SemanticMemoryManager(json_file=str(SEMANTIC_MEMORY_PATH))
397	    app.state.episodic_mm = _episodic_mm
398	    app.state.semantic_mm = _semantic_mm
399	    _fact_store = None
400	    _fact_retriever = None
401	    if _settings.fact_store_retrieval_enabled:
402	        from app_paths import FACT_STORE_PATH
403	        from memory.fact_retrieval import SupplementaryFactRetriever
404	        from memory.fact_store import FactStore
405	
406	        _fact_store = FactStore(db_path=str(FACT_STORE_PATH))
407	        _fact_retriever = SupplementaryFactRetriever(_fact_store, enabled=True)
408	        app.state.fact_store = _fact_store
409	        logger.info("[memory] FactStore supplementary retrieval enabled")
410	    app.state.memory_coordinator = MemoryCoordinator(
411	        long_term_mm=_long_term_mm,
412	        episodic_mm=_episodic_mm,
413	        semantic_mm=_semantic_mm,
414	        fact_retriever=_fact_retriever,
415	    )
416	    logger.info(
417	        "[memory] memory layers initialized: long_term + episodic + semantic%s",
418	        " + facts" if _fact_retriever is not None else "",
419	    )
420	    ttl_managers = [_long_term_mm, _episodic_mm, _semantic_mm]
421	    if _fact_retriever is not None:
422	        # FactStore exposes the same purge contract; keeping it in the common
423	        # scheduler means expired FTS rows cannot accumulate after rollout.
424	        ttl_managers.append(_fact_retriever)
425	    schedule_ttl_purge(
426	        _settings.ttl_purge_interval_seconds,
427	        ttl_managers,
428	    )
429	    logger.info(
430	        "[ttl] 后台清理任务已启动，间隔 %d 秒", _settings.ttl_purge_interval_seconds,
431	    )

446	    logger.info("[hooks] 事件钩子管理器已启动，%d 个钩子", len(hook_manager.list_hooks()))
447

450	    app.state.sidecar_manager = SidecarManager()

455	    _autonomy_settings = _get_autonomy_settings()
456	    if _autonomy_settings.autonomy_enabled:
457	        # User-created Scout schedules are a separate, deliberately

497	    yield

502	        _disposables.dispose()
503	
504	    # 关闭：后台 LLM 初始化任务

578	
579	def create_app() -> FastAPI:
580	    app = FastAPI(
581	        title="MaxmaHere API",
582	        version=__version__,
583	        lifespan=lifespan,
584	    )
585	
586	    cors_origins = build_cors_origins()
587	    app.add_middleware(
588	        CORSMiddleware,
589	        allow_origins=cors_origins,
590	        allow_credentials=True,
591	        allow_methods=["*"],
592	        allow_headers=["*"],
593	    )
594	
595	    # REST 路由
596	    app.include_router(sessions.router, prefix="/api")
597	    app.include_router(deferred_runs_router.router, prefix="/api")
598	    app.include_router(workflows_router.router, prefix="/api")
599	    app.include_router(autonomy_router.router, prefix="/api")

603	
604	    # WebSocket 路由（无 /api 前缀）
605	    app.include_router(chat.router)

607	    # Provider CRUD 路由

677	    app.include_router(sticker_favorites_router.router, prefix="/api")
678	
679	    # 自定义表情上传
680	    from api.routes import sticker_upload as sticker_upload_router
681	    app.include_router(sticker_upload_router.router, prefix="/api")
682	
683	    # Auth token 端点 — 桌面应用运行时获取 Token（替代构建时硬编码）
684	    @app.get("/api/auth/token")
685	    async def get_auth_token():
686	        """返回当前认证 Token。桌面应用启动后调用此接口获取 Token。"""
687	        return {"token": app.state.auth_token}
688	
689	    # 健康检查
690	    @app.get("/api/health")
691	    async def health(full: bool = False):
692	        return await get_health_report(app, probe_remote=full)
693	
694	    # 自治调度器状态（前端监控 + 外部健康检查）
695	    @app.get("/api/autonomy/status")
696	    async def get_autonomy_status():
697	        """获取自治调度器运行状态。"""
698	        from agent.autonomy.scheduler import get_autonomy_status as _get_status
699	        return _get_status()
700	
701	    # ── 全局异常处理器 ──────────────────────────────────────────
702	    # 捕获所有未处理的异常，记录到 ErrorCollector 供一键导出，
703	    # 同时写入日志（带 exc_info），避免错误丢失。
704	    import traceback as _traceback
705	    from fastapi.responses import JSONResponse as _JSONResponse
706	    from fastapi import Request as _Request
707	    from api.diagnostics import error_collector as _error_collector
708	
709	    @app.exception_handler(Exception)
710	    async def _global_exception_handler(request: _Request, exc: Exception):
711	        _error_collector.add_exception(
712	            exc,
713	            category="uncaught",
714	            message=f"未捕获异常 [{type(exc).__name__}]: {exc}",
715	            request_id=getattr(request.state, "request_id", None),
716	        )
717	        logger.error(
718	            "未捕获异常: %s %s -> %s: %s",
719	            request.method,
720	            request.url.path,
721	            type(exc).__name__,
722	            exc,
723	            exc_info=True,
724	        )
725	        return _JSONResponse(
726	            status_code=500,
727	            content={"detail": "Internal Server Error"},
728	        )
729	
730	    # 中间件执行顺序以“最后 add 的最先执行”为准。
731	    # 注册顺序（add 顺序）与实际执行顺序（后 add 先执行）：
732	    #   add 顺序: Auth → RateLimit → RequestLog
733	    #   执行顺序: RequestLog → RateLimit → Auth → 路由
734	    # 限流在 Auth 之前，避免被拒绝的鉴权请求也消耗限流配额。
735	    # 阶段 3.2：新增 RateLimitMiddleware（HTTP 按 IP 限流）
736	    app.add_middleware(AuthMiddleware)
737	    app.add_middleware(RateLimitMiddleware)
738	
739	    # 请求日志放在最外层，确保包括被鉴权拒绝的请求也会被记录。
740	    app.add_middleware(RequestLogMiddleware)
741	
742	    # 生产模式：挂载前端静态文件（必须在所有 API 路由之后）
743	    if os.environ.get("MAXMA_ENV") == "production":
744	        from app_paths import WEB_DIST_DIR as dist_dir
745	        if dist_dir.exists():
746	            from fastapi.responses import FileResponse
747	
748	            # 挂载静态资源目录
749	            app.mount("/assets", StaticFiles(directory=dist_dir / "assets"), name="assets")
750	            if (dist_dir / "fonts").exists():
751	                app.mount("/fonts", StaticFiles(directory=dist_dir / "fonts"), name="fonts")
752	            if (dist_dir / "images").exists():
753	                app.mount("/images", StaticFiles(directory=dist_dir / "images"), name="images")
754	
755	            # SPA 路由回退：所有非 API、非静态资源路径返回 index.html
756	            @app.get("/{path:path}")
757	            async def spa_fallback(path: str):
758	                index_path = dist_dir / "index.html"
759	                if index_path.exists():
760	                    return FileResponse(index_path)
761	                return {"detail": "Not Found"}
762	
763	            # 根路径也返回 index.html
764	            @app.get("/")
765	            async def root_fallback():
766	                index_path = dist_dir / "index.html"
767	                if index_path.exists():
768	                    return FileResponse(index_path)
769	                return {"detail": "Not Found"}
770	
771	            logger.info("[static] 已挂载前端静态文件: %s", dist_dir)
772	        else:
773	            logger.warning("[static] web/dist 目录不存在，跳过前端挂载: %s", dist_dir)
774	
775	    return app
776	
```

**Output:**

```json
1	"""Maxma session ↔ oh-my-pi sidecar session 映射持久化。
2	
3	在 SQLite 中维护 Maxma session_id 到 sidecar session_id 的双向映射，
4	同时保存最近对话轮次，确保 sidecar 重启后上下文可恢复。
5	"""
6	
7	from __future__ import annotations
8	
9	import json
10	import sqlite3
11	import threading
12	from pathlib import Path
13	from typing import Any
14	
15	# SQLite 数据库路径
16	SESSION_MAP_DIR = Path.home() / ".maxma"
17	SESSION_MAP_DB = SESSION_MAP_DIR / "session_map.db"
18	# 保存的最大对话轮次数
19	MAX_TURNS = 20
20	
21	
22	class SessionMap:
23	    """Maxma ↔ sidecar session ID 映射表。
24	    
25	    线程安全（SQLite connection 是线程安全的，但 WAL 模式下并发写需序列化）。
26	    """
27	    
28	    def __init__(self, db_path: str | Path = SESSION_MAP_DB) -> None:
29	        self._db_path = str(db_path)
30	        self._lock = threading.Lock()
31	        # 确保父目录存在
32	        Path(self._db_path).parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
33	        self._conn = sqlite3.connect(self._db_path, timeout=5)
34	        self._conn.execute("PRAGMA journal_mode=WAL")
35	        # Main table
36	        self._conn.execute("""
37	            CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS session_map (
38	                maxma_id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
39	                sidecar_id TEXT NOT NULL,
40	                is_const INTEGER DEFAULT 0,
41	                turns TEXT DEFAULT '[]',
42	                created_at TEXT DEFAULT (datetime('now')),
43	                updated_at TEXT DEFAULT (datetime('now'))
44	            )
45	        """)
46	        # Migration: add columns if missing
47	        for col_sql in [
48	            "ALTER TABLE session_map ADD COLUMN is_const INTEGER DEFAULT 0",
49	            "ALTER TABLE session_map ADD COLUMN turns TEXT DEFAULT '[]'",
50	        ]:
51	            try:
52	                self._conn.execute(col_sql)
53	            except Exception:
54	                pass  # Column already exists
55	        self._conn.commit()
56	
57	    def __enter__(self) -> SessionMap:
58	        return self
59	
60	    def __exit__(self, *args: object) -> None:
61	        self.close()
62	    
63	    def get_sidecar_id(self, maxma_id: str) -> str | None:
64	        """根据 Maxma session ID 查找对应的 sidecar session ID。"""
65	        with self._lock:
66	            row = self._conn.execute(
67	                "SELECT sidecar_id FROM session_map WHERE maxma_id = ?",
68	                (maxma_id,),
69	            ).fetchone()
70	        return row[0] if row else None
71	    
72	    def get_maxma_id(self, sidecar_id: str) -> str | None:
73	        """反向查找：根据 sidecar session ID 查找 Maxma session ID。"""
74	        with self._lock:
75	            row = self._conn.execute(
76	                "SELECT maxma_id FROM session_map WHERE sidecar_id = ?",
77	                (sidecar_id,),
78	            ).fetchone()
79	        return row[0] if row else None
80	    
81	    def set_mapping(self, maxma_id: str, sidecar_id: str) -> None:
82	        """建立或更新映射（保留首次创建时间）。"""
83	        with self._lock:
84	            self._conn.execute(
85	                "INSERT INTO session_map (maxma_id, sidecar_id) VALUES (?, ?) "
86	                "ON CONFLICT(maxma_id) DO UPDATE SET "
87	                "sidecar_id=excluded.sidecar_id, updated_at=datetime('now')",
88	                (maxma_id, sidecar_id),
89	            )
90	            self._conn.commit()
91	    
92	    def remove(self, maxma_id: str) -> bool:
93	        """删除指定 Maxma session 的映射。"""
94	        with self._lock:
95	            cur = self._conn.execute(
96	                "DELETE FROM session_map WHERE maxma_id = ?", (maxma_id,)
97	            )
98	            self._conn.commit()
99	        return cur.rowcount > 0
100	    
101	    def set_const(self, maxma_id: str, is_const: bool = True) -> None:
102	        """标记一个 Maxma session 是否为 const session。"""
103	        with self._lock:
104	            self._conn.execute(
105	                "UPDATE session_map SET is_const = ?, updated_at = datetime('now') WHERE maxma_id = ?",
106	                (1 if is_const else 0, maxma_id),
107	            )
108	            self._conn.commit()
109	
110	    def get_const(self, maxma_id: str) -> bool:
111	        """检查一个 Maxma session 是否为 const session。"""
112	        with self._lock:
113	            row = self._conn.execute(
114	                "SELECT is_const FROM session_map WHERE maxma_id = ?",
115	                (maxma_id,),
116	            ).fetchone()
117	        return bool(row[0]) if row else False
118	
119	    def append_turn(self, maxma_id: str, user_message: str, assistant_message: str) -> None:
120	        """保存一轮对话到 session 记录（用于重启后恢复上下文）。"""
121	        with self._lock:
122	            row = self._conn.execute(
123	                "SELECT turns FROM session_map WHERE maxma_id = ?", (maxma_id,)
124	            ).fetchone()
125	            if row:
126	                turns: list[dict[str, str]] = json.loads(row[0]) if row[0] else []
127	            else:
128	                turns = []
129	            turns.append({
130	                "user": user_message[:500],
131	                "assistant": assistant_message[:1000],
132	            })
133	            # 只保留最近 N 轮
134	            if len(turns) > MAX_TURNS:
135	                turns = turns[-MAX_TURNS:]
136	            self._conn.execute(
137	                "UPDATE session_map SET turns = ?, updated_at = datetime('now') WHERE maxma_id = ?",
138	                (json.dumps(turns, ensure_ascii=False), maxma_id),
139	            )
140	            self._conn.commit()
141	
142	    def get_recent_turns(self, maxma_id: str, count: int = 5) -> list[dict[str, str]]:
143	        """获取最近 N 轮对话（用于重启后恢复上下文）。"""
144	        with self._lock:
145	            row = self._conn.execute(
146	                "SELECT turns FROM session_map WHERE maxma_id = ?",
147	                (maxma_id,),
148	            ).fetchone()
149	            if row and row[0]:
150	                turns: list[dict[str, str]] = json.loads(row[0])
151	                return turns[-count:]
152	            return []
153	
154	    def list_all(self) -> list[dict[str, str]]:
155	        """列出所有映射（用于调试/管理）。"""
156	        with self._lock:
157	            rows = self._conn.execute(
158	                "SELECT maxma_id, sidecar_id, created_at, updated_at "
159	                "FROM session_map ORDER BY updated_at DESC"
160	            ).fetchall()
161	        return [
162	            {
163	                "maxma_id": r[0],
164	                "sidecar_id": r[1],
165	                "created_at": r[2],
166	                "updated_at": r[3],
167	            }
168	            for r in rows
169	        ]
170	    
171	    @property
172	    def count(self) -> int:
173	        """当前映射数量。"""
174	        with self._lock:
175	            row = self._conn.execute(
176	                "SELECT COUNT(*) FROM session_map"
177	            ).fetchone()
178	        return row[0] if row else 0
179	    
180	    def close(self) -> None:
181	        """关闭数据库连接。"""
182	        self._conn.close()
183	
```

```json
1	"""Production-grade SidecarManager for Bun subprocess lifecycle.
2	
3	Manages start/stop/restart of the Bun sidecar process (session-bridge.ts).
4	Designed to be consumed by JsonRpcClient (Task 1.3) which will use the
5	stdin/stdout streams for JSON-RPC communication.
6	
7	Thread-safe: all public mutation methods use asyncio.Lock.
8	"""
9	
10	from __future__ import annotations
11	
12	import asyncio
13	import logging
14	import sys
15	from pathlib import Path
16	
17	# Ensure project root is on sys.path for imports when run as a script
18	_project_root = Path(__file__).resolve().parent.parent.parent
19	if str(_project_root) not in sys.path:
20	    sys.path.insert(0, str(_project_root))
21	
22	from api.pi_bridge.rpc_client import JsonRpcClient
23	
24	logger = logging.getLogger(__name__)
25	
26	# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
27	# Constants
28	# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
29	
30	SIDECAR_DIR = Path(__file__).resolve().parent.parent.parent / "bun-sidecar"
31	SIDECAR_ENTRY = SIDECAR_DIR / "src" / "session-bridge.ts"
32	# 当 settings 未初始化时的默认值
33	_DEFAULT_BUN_PATH = "D:/NodeGlobal/node_modules/bun/bin/bun.exe"
34	
35	
36	def _resolve_bun_path() -> str:
37	    """从配置读取 Bun 路径，fallback 到默认值。"""
38	    try:
39	        from config.settings import get_settings
40	        s = get_settings()
41	        return s.sidecar_bun_path or _DEFAULT_BUN_PATH
42	    except Exception:
43	        return _DEFAULT_BUN_PATH
44	
45	
46	# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
47	# SidecarManager
48	# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
49	
50	class SidecarManager:
51	    """Manages the lifecycle of the Bun sidecar subprocess.
52	
53	    Provides properties for accessing the process's stdin/stdout streams
54	    so that a separate JsonRpcClient can perform JSON-RPC communication.
55	    """
56	
57	    def __init__(self) -> None:
58	        self._process: asyncio.subprocess.Process | None = None
59	        self._lock = asyncio.Lock()
60	        self._stderr_task: asyncio.Task[None] | None = None
61	        self._client: JsonRpcClient | None = None
62	
63	    # -- Properties ---------------------------------------------------------
64	
65	    @property
66	    def is_running(self) -> bool:
67	        """True if the subprocess is started and still alive."""
68	        return (
69	            self._process is not None
70	            and self._process.returncode is None
71	        )
72	
73	    @property
74	    def stdin(self) -> asyncio.StreamWriter | None:
75	        """The process's stdin stream, or None if not running."""
76	        return self._process.stdin if self._process else None
77	
78	    @property
79	    def stdout(self) -> asyncio.StreamReader | None:
80	        """The process's stdout stream, or None if not running."""
81	        return self._process.stdout if self._process else None
82	
83	    @property
84	    def client(self) -> JsonRpcClient | None:
85	        """The JSON-RPC client for this sidecar, or None if not started."""
86	        return self._client
87	
88	    # -- Public API ---------------------------------------------------------
89	
90	    async def start(self) -> None:
91	        """Start the Bun sidecar subprocess.
92	
93	        If already running, this is a no-op.
94	        After starting, stderr is forwarded to the Python logger in a
95	        background task, and a short sleep allows the process to initialise.
96	        """
97	        async with self._lock:
98	            if self.is_running:
99	                logger.debug("Sidecar already running, skipping start")
100	                return
101	
102	            bun_path = _resolve_bun_path()
103	            logger.info(
104	                "Starting sidecar: %s run %s", bun_path, SIDECAR_ENTRY
105	            )
106	            self._process = await asyncio.create_subprocess_exec(
107	                bun_path,
108	                "run",
109	                str(SIDECAR_ENTRY),
110	                stdin=asyncio.subprocess.PIPE,
111	                stdout=asyncio.subprocess.PIPE,
112	                stderr=asyncio.subprocess.PIPE,
113	                cwd=str(SIDECAR_DIR),
114	            )
115	            logger.info(
116	                "Sidecar started (pid=%s)", self._process.pid
117	            )
118	
119	            # Forward stderr in the background
120	            self._stderr_task = asyncio.create_task(
121	                self._forward_stderr()
122	            )
123	
124	            # Create and start the JSON-RPC client
125	            assert self._process.stdin is not None
126	            assert self._process.stdout is not None
127	            self._client = JsonRpcClient(
128	                self._process.stdin, self._process.stdout
129	            )
130	            await self._client.start_reading()
131	
132	            # Brief wait for the process to initialise
133	            await asyncio.sleep(0.5)
134	
135	    async def stop(self) -> None:
136	        """Stop the sidecar subprocess gracefully.
137	
138	        Strategy (Windows-aware):
139	          0. Stop the JSON-RPC client first.
140	          1. Send terminate (WM_CLOSE on Windows, SIGTERM on Unix).
141	          2. Wait up to 5 seconds for clean exit.
142	          3. On timeout, force-kill (TerminateProcess / SIGKILL).
143	          4. Ignore ProcessLookupError (already exited).
144	        """
145	        # Stop the JSON-RPC client first
146	        if self._client is not None:
147	            await self._client.stop()
148	            self._client = None
149	
150	        async with self._lock:
151	            if not self.is_running:
152	                logger.debug("Sidecar not running, skipping stop")
153	                return
154	
155	            proc = self._process
156	            self._process = None  # Prevent re-use during cleanup
157	
158	            assert proc is not None
159	
160	        # Cancel stderr forwarding task
161	        if self._stderr_task is not None and not self._stderr_task.done():
162	            self._stderr_task.cancel()
163	            try:
164	                await self._stderr_task
165	            except asyncio.CancelledError:
166	                pass
167	        self._stderr_task = None
168	
169	        try:
170	            proc.terminate()  # SIGTERM on Unix, WM_CLOSE on Windows
171	            await asyncio.wait_for(proc.wait(), timeout=5)
172	            logger.info("Sidecar (pid=%s) stopped gracefully", proc.pid)
173	        except asyncio.TimeoutError:
174	            logger.warning(
175	                "Sidecar (pid=%s) did not exit in 5s, killing", proc.pid
176	            )
177	            proc.kill()  # TerminateProcess on Windows, SIGKILL on Unix
178	            await proc.wait()
179	            logger.info("Sidecar (pid=%s) killed", proc.pid)
180	        except ProcessLookupError:
181	            logger.debug(
182	                "Sidecar (pid=%s) already exited", proc.pid
183	            )
184	
185	    async def restart(self) -> None:
186	        """Restart the sidecar subprocess (stop then start)."""
187	        logger.info("Restarting sidecar")
188	        self._client = None
189	        await self.stop()
190	        await self.start()
191	
192	    # -- Internal helpers ---------------------------------------------------
193	
194	    async def _forward_stderr(self) -> None:
195	        """Read stderr lines from the process and forward them to the logger."""
196	        try:
197	            assert self._process is not None
198	            assert self._process.stderr is not None
199	            async for line in self._process.stderr:
200	                text = line.decode("utf-8", errors="replace").rstrip()
201	                if text:
202	                    logger.debug("[sidecar] %s", text)
203	        except Exception:
204	            logger.exception("Error forwarding sidecar stderr")
205	
206	
207	# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
208	# Self-test
209	# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
210	
211	async def _test() -> None:
212	    """Quick integration test: start, verify running, stop, verify stopped."""
213	    logging.basicConfig(
214	        level=logging.DEBUG,
215	        format="%(asctime)s [%(levelname)s] %(name)s: %(message)s",
216	    )
217	
218	    mgr = SidecarManager()
219	
220	    # Start
221	    await mgr.start()
222	    assert mgr.is_running, "Expected sidecar to be running after start()"
223	    assert mgr.stdin is not None, "Expected stdin to be available"
224	    assert mgr.stdout is not None, "Expected stdout to be available"
225	    print(f"[PASS] Sidecar started (pid={mgr._process.pid})")
226	
227	    # Stop
228	    await mgr.stop()
229	    assert not mgr.is_running, "Expected sidecar to be stopped after stop()"
230	    print("[PASS] Sidecar stopped")
231	
232	
233	if __name__ == "__main__":
234	    asyncio.run(_test())
235	
```

```json
442	    # 使 vector_store.get_vector_store() 返回 None，知识库功能完全不可用。
443	]
444	
445	a = Analysis(
446	    [str(project_root / "main.py")],
447	    pathex=[str(project_root)],
448	    binaries=local_extension_binaries,
449	    datas=datas,
450	    hiddenimports=hiddenimports,
451	    hookspath=[],
452	    hooksconfig={},
453	    runtime_hooks=[],
454	    excludes=excludes,
455	    win_no_prefer_redirects=False,
456	    win_private_assemblies=False,
457	    cipher=block_cipher,
458	    noarchive=False,
459	)
460	
461	pyz = PYZ(a.pure, a.zipped_data, cipher=block_cipher)
462	
463	exe = EXE(
464	    pyz,
465	    a.scripts,
466	    a.binaries,
467	    a.datas,
468	    [],
469	    name="maxma-server",
470	    debug=False,
471	    bootloader_ignore_signals=False,
472	    strip=False,
473	    upx=True,
474	    console=True,  # 保留控制台窗口以便查看日志
475	    disable_windowed_traceback=False,
476	    argv_emulation=False,
477	    icon=None,  # 可后续添加 .ico 图标
478	)
479
```

```json
1	"""工具（Tool）集中注册 — ALL_TOOLS 供 Agent 使用。"""
2	
3	from __future__ import annotations
4	
5	from collections import defaultdict
6	import logging
7	import threading
8	from typing import TYPE_CHECKING
9	
10	if TYPE_CHECKING:
11	    from langchain_core.tools import BaseTool
12	
13	logger = logging.getLogger(__name__)
14	
15	# 懒加载 client，避免循环导入
16	_client: SharedAPIClient | None = None
17	_client_lock = threading.Lock()  # 保护 _client 单例初始化
18	_cached_tools: list[BaseTool] | None = None
19	_cached_tools_lock = threading.Lock()  # 保护 _cached_tools 初始化
20	_registry_validated = False
21	
22	# 工具使用统计（工具名 → 调用次数）
23	_tool_usage: dict[str, int] = defaultdict(int)
24	
25	
26	def record_tool_usage(tool_name: str) -> None:
27	    """记录一次工具调用（供回调函数调用）。"""
28	    _tool_usage[tool_name] += 1
29	
30	
31	def get_tool_stats() -> dict[str, int]:
32	    """返回所有工具的使用次数统计。"""
33	    return dict(_tool_usage)
34	
35	
36	def _get_client() -> SharedAPIClient:
37	    from tools.base import SharedAPIClient
38	
39	    global _client
40	    if _client is not None:
41	        return _client
42	    with _client_lock:
43	        if _client is None:
44	            _client = SharedAPIClient()
45	        return _client
46	
47	
48	def get_all_tools() -> list[BaseTool]:
49	    """返回所有已注册的 Tool 实例（带缓存，仅首次调用时加载）。
50	
51	    通过 ``tools.registry.discover_tools()`` 扫描 ``tools/*/tool_*.py``，
52	    收集所有带 ``@register_tool`` 装饰器的类并实例化。
53	    新增工具只需在文件中加 ``@register_tool``，无需修改本文件。
54	
55	    线程安全：通过 _cached_tools_lock 双重检查，避免重复实例化。
56	    """
57	    global _cached_tools
58	    if _cached_tools is not None:
59	        return _cached_tools
60	    with _cached_tools_lock:
61	        if _cached_tools is not None:
62	            return _cached_tools
63	        client = _get_client()
64	
65	        from tools.registry import instantiate_tools
66	
67	        tools_list = instantiate_tools(client)
68	        validate_tool_registry(tools_list)
69	        _cached_tools = tools_list
70	        return _cached_tools
71	
72	
73	def clear_tool_cache() -> None:
74	    """清除工具缓存，下次调用 get_all_tools() 时重新加载。"""
75	    global _cached_tools, _registry_validated
76	    with _cached_tools_lock:
77	        _cached_tools = None
78	        _registry_validated = False
79	
80	
81	def merge_tool_lists(
82	    primary_tools: list[BaseTool],
83	    secondary_tools: list[BaseTool] | None = None,
84	    *,
85	    log_collisions: bool = True,
86	) -> list[BaseTool]:
87	    """按名称合并两组工具，保留第一组优先级。"""
88	    merged = list(primary_tools)
89	    seen_names = {tool.name for tool in merged}
90	
91	    for tool in secondary_tools or []:
92	        if tool.name in seen_names:
93	            if log_collisions:
94	                logger.warning(
95	                    "[tools] skip duplicate tool name from secondary toolset: %s",
96	                    tool.name,
97	                )
98	            continue
99	        merged.append(tool)
100	        seen_names.add(tool.name)
101	
102	    return merged
103	
104	
105	class ToolRegistryError(RuntimeError):
106	    """工具注册表与实际工具装配结果不一致。"""
107	
108	
109	def _registered_tool_names(tools: list[BaseTool]) -> list[str]:
110	    return [str(tool.name) for tool in tools]
111	
112	
113	def _find_duplicate_names(names: list[str]) -> list[str]:
114	    seen: set[str] = set()
115	    duplicates: set[str] = set()
116	    for name in names:
117	        if name in seen:
118	            duplicates.add(name)
119	        seen.add(name)
120	    return sorted(duplicates)
121	
122	
123	def validate_tool_registry(tools: list[BaseTool] | None = None) -> None:
124	    """校验工具分类/核心工具声明与实际装配工具名保持同步。
125	
126	    不在模块 import 时运行；默认在 get_all_tools() 首次完成装配后运行一次。
127	    测试可传入轻量 fake tool 列表，避免触发真实工具初始化。
128	    """
129	    global _registry_validated
130	    if tools is None:
131	        if _registry_validated:
132	            return
133	        tools = get_all_tools()
134	
135	    actual_names_list = _registered_tool_names(tools)
136	    actual_names = set(actual_names_list)
137	    categorized_names = {
138	        tool_name
139	        for category_tools in TOOL_CATEGORIES.values()
140	        for tool_name in category_tools
141	    }
142	    category_names = set(TOOL_CATEGORIES)
143	    keyword_categories = {
144	        category
145	        for categories in KEYWORD_TO_CATEGORIES.values()
146	        for category in categories
147	    }
148	
149	    issues: list[str] = []
150	    duplicates = _find_duplicate_names(actual_names_list)
151	    if duplicates:
152	        issues.append(f"duplicate registered tool names: {duplicates}")
153	
154	    missing_category_tools = sorted(categorized_names - actual_names)
155	    if missing_category_tools:
156	        issues.append(f"TOOL_CATEGORIES references unregistered tools: {missing_category_tools}")
157	
158	    missing_core_tools = sorted(CORE_TOOLS - actual_names)
159	    if missing_core_tools:
160	        issues.append(f"CORE_TOOLS references unregistered tools: {missing_core_tools}")
161	
162	    uncategorized_tools = sorted(actual_names - categorized_names)
163	    if uncategorized_tools:
164	        issues.append(f"registered tools missing from TOOL_CATEGORIES: {uncategorized_tools}")
165	
166	    core_not_categorized = sorted(CORE_TOOLS - categorized_names)
167	    if core_not_categorized:
168	        issues.append(f"CORE_TOOLS missing from TOOL_CATEGORIES: {core_not_categorized}")
169	
170	    unknown_keyword_categories = sorted(keyword_categories - category_names)
171	    if unknown_keyword_categories:
172	        issues.append(f"KEYWORD_TO_CATEGORIES references unknown categories: {unknown_keyword_categories}")
173	
174	    if issues:
175	        raise ToolRegistryError("; ".join(issues))
176	
177	    _registry_validated = True
178

374	
375	def select_tools_for_query(query: str, max_tools: int = 20, mcp_tools: list | None = None) -> list[BaseTool]:
376	    """根据用户查询动态选择相关工具子集。
377	
378	    Args:
379	        query: 用户输入文本
380	        max_tools: 最大返回工具数（不含 MCP 工具）
381	        mcp_tools: 可选的 MCP 工具列表，始终追加到结果中
382	
383	    Returns:
384	        过滤后的工具列表，包含核心工具 + 匹配查询的工具 + MCP 工具
385	    """
386	    all_tools = get_all_tools()
387	    query_lower = query.lower()
388	
389	    # 收集匹配的分类
390	    matched_categories: set[str] = set()
391	    for keyword, categories in KEYWORD_TO_CATEGORIES.items():
392	        if keyword in query_lower:
393	            matched_categories.update(categories)
394	
395	    # 收集要包含的工具名称
396	    included_tools: set[str] = set(CORE_TOOLS)
397	    for category in matched_categories:
398	        included_tools.update(TOOL_CATEGORIES.get(category, []))
399	
400	    # 过滤工具列表
401	    filtered = [t for t in all_tools if t.name in included_tools]
402	
403	    # 如果过滤后工具数少于上限，返回全部
404	    if len(filtered) <= max_tools:
405	        result = filtered
406	    else:
407	        # 否则优先返回核心工具
408	        core = [t for t in all_tools if t.name in CORE_TOOLS]
409	        non_core = [t for t in filtered if t.name not in CORE_TOOLS]
410	        result = core + non_core[:max_tools - len(core)]
411	
412	    # 追加 MCP 工具（始终包含，不受过滤影响），若名称冲突则保留已选中的第一份。
413	    if mcp_tools:
414	        result = merge_tool_lists(result, list(mcp_tools), log_collisions=False)
415	
416	    # ── 人格专属工具集过滤 ──
417	    # 如果当前人格的 SOUL 文件 frontmatter 中声明了 tools 列表，
418	    # 只保留允许的工具（MCP 工具不受限制）
419	    try:
420	        from agent.prompts import get_persona_allowed_tools
421	        allowed = get_persona_allowed_tools()
422	        if allowed is not None:
423	            all_native_names = {t.name for t in get_all_tools()}
424	            result = [
425	                t for t in result
426	                if t.name in allowed or t.name not in all_native_names
427	            ]
428	    except Exception:
429	        pass  # 解析失败时不限制
430	
431	    return result
432	
```

```json
1	/**
2	 * session-bridge.ts — JSON-RPC server wrapping createAgentSession.
3	 *
4	 * RPC Methods:
5	 *   create_session({ model, system_prompt?, cwd? }) → { session_id }
6	 *   prompt({ session_id, message })               → { ok: true }
7	 *   cancel({ session_id })                         → { ok: true }
8	 *   destroy_session({ session_id })                → { ok: true }
9	 *
10	 * Events are forwarded as JSON-RPC notifications (method: "event").
11	 */
12	
13	import { createInterface } from "node:readline";
14	import { randomUUID } from "node:crypto";
15	import { createAgentSession } from "@oh-my-pi/pi-coding-agent";
16	import { getBundledModel } from "@oh-my-pi/pi-catalog/models";
17	import type { Model } from "@oh-my-pi/pi-ai";
18	import type { AgentSession } from "@oh-my-pi/pi-coding-agent";
19	import { registerCustomTools } from "./tools/index";
20	
21	// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
22	// Types
23	// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
24	
25	interface SessionRecord {
26	  session: AgentSession;
27	  unsubscribe: () => void;
28	}
29	
30	// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
31	// State
32	// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
33	
34	const sessions = new Map<string, SessionRecord>();
35	const rl = createInterface({ input: process.stdin });
36	
37	// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
38	// JSON-RPC helpers
39	// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
40	
41	function send(id: number | null, result: unknown) {
42	  process.stdout.write(JSON.stringify({ jsonrpc: "2.0", id, result }) + "\n");
43	}
44	
45	function sendError(id: number | null, message: string) {
46	  process.stdout.write(
47	    JSON.stringify({ jsonrpc: "2.0", id, error: { message } }) + "\n",
48	  );
49	}
50	
51	function sendEvent(sessionId: string, event: Record<string, unknown>) {
52	  process.stdout.write(
53	    JSON.stringify({
54	      jsonrpc: "2.0",
55	      method: "event",
56	      params: { session_id: sessionId, event },
57	    }) + "\n",
58	  );
59	}
60	
61	// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
62	// Model resolution
63	// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
64	
65	/**
66	 * Parse a model string like "openai/gpt-4o" into a proper Model object.
67	 *
68	 * Strategy:
69	 *   A — Try `getBundledModel(provider, modelId)` from the bundled catalog.
70	 *   B — Fall back to constructing a minimal Model object manually.
71	 */
72	function parseModel(modelStr: string): Model {
73	  const slashIdx = modelStr.indexOf("/");
74	  const provider = slashIdx >= 0 ? modelStr.slice(0, slashIdx) : "";
75	  const modelId = slashIdx >= 0 ? modelStr.slice(slashIdx + 1) : modelStr;
76	
77	  // Option A: bundled catalog lookup
78	  if (provider) {
79	    try {
80	      const bundled = getBundledModel(provider as any, modelId);
81	      if (bundled) return bundled;
82	    } catch {
83	      // Fall through to manual construction
84	    }
85	  }
86	
87	  // Option B: manual fallback (minimal Model object from env vars)
88	  const baseUrl =
89	    process.env.OPENAI_BASE_URL ?? "https://api.openai.com/v1";
90	  return {
91	    id: modelId,
92	    name: modelId,
93	    api: "openai-completions" as const,
94	    provider,
95	    baseUrl,
96	    reasoning: false,
97	    input: ["text"] as ("text" | "image")[],
98	    cost: { input: 0, output: 0, cacheRead: 0, cacheWrite: 0 },
99	    contextWindow: 128000,
100	    maxTokens: 4096,
101	    compat: {
102	      supportsDeveloperRole: true,
103	      supportsStrictMode: false,
104	      supportsReasoningEffort: false,
105	      reasoningEffortMap: {},
106	      supportsReasoningParams: false,
107	      thinkingFormat: "disabled" as const,
108	      reasoningDisableMode: "off" as const,
109	      omitReasoningEffort: false,
110	      includeEncryptedReasoning: false,
111	      filterReasoningHistory: false,
112	      disableReasoningOnForcedToolChoice: false,
113	      disableReasoningOnToolChoice: false,
114	      supportsToolChoice: true,
115	      supportsForcedToolChoice: true,
116	      supportsNamedToolChoice: true,
117	      reasoningContentField: undefined,
118	      requiresReasoningContentForToolCalls: false,
119	      requiresReasoningContentForAllAssistantTurns: false,
120	      allowsSyntheticReasoningContentForToolCalls: false,
121	      replayReasoningContent: false,
122	      qwenPreserveThinking: false,
123	      requiresThinkingAsText: false,
124	      requiresMistralToolIds: false,
125	      requiresToolResultName: false,
126	      requiresAssistantAfterToolResult: false,
127	      requiresAssistantContentForToolCalls: false,
128	      stripDeepseekSpecialTokens: false,
129	      streamMarkupHealingPattern: undefined,
130	      reasoningDeltasMayBeCumulative: false,
131	      emptyLengthFinishIsContextError: false,
132	      usesOpenAIToolCallIdLimit: false,
133	      promptCacheSessionHeader: undefined,
134	      isOpenRouterHost: false,
135	      alwaysSendMaxTokens: true,
136	      enableGeminiThinkingLoopGuard: undefined,
137	      openRouterRouting: undefined,
138	      wireModelIdMode: "raw" as const,
139	      supportsStore: false,
140	      supportsMultipleSystemMessages: true,
141	      maxTokensField: "max_tokens" as const,
142	      supportsUsageInStreaming: true,
143	      cacheControlFormat: undefined,
144	      supportsLongPromptCacheRetention: false,
145	      supportsImageDetailOriginal: false,
146	      strictResponsesPairing: false,
147	      toolStrictMode: "none" as const,
148	      streamIdleTimeoutMs: undefined,
149	      vercelGatewayRouting: undefined,
150	      extraBody: undefined,
151	    },
152	  } as Model;
153	}
154	
155	// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
156	// Pi event → Maxma event mapping
157	// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
158	
159	function mapPiEventToMaxma(
160	  piEvent: Record<string, unknown>,
161	): Record<string, unknown> | null {
162	  // Handle AgentEvent types directly
163	  const type = piEvent.type as string;
164	
165	  if (type === "message_update") {
166	    const assistantEvent = (piEvent as any).assistantMessageEvent;
167	    if (!assistantEvent) return null;
168	
169	    const aeType = assistantEvent.type as string;
170	
171	    if (aeType === "text_delta") {
172	      return {
173	        type: "token",
174	        payload: { token: assistantEvent.delta ?? "" },
175	      };
176	    }
177	
178	    // NOTE: toolcall_start/toolcall_end from message_update are pre-execution
179	    // events (LLM deciding to call a tool). The actual execution data comes
180	    // from tool_execution_start/tool_execution_end below, which carry full
181	    // toolName and result data. Skip early message_update tool events to avoid
182	    // duplicate/empty-named events.
183	
184	    if (aeType === "error") {
185	      const errMsg =
186	        (assistantEvent as any).error?.content?.[0]?.text ??
187	        "Unknown agent error";
188	      return {
189	        type: "error",
190	        payload: { code: "AGENT_ERROR", message: errMsg },
191	      };
192	    }
193	
194	    return null;
195	  }
196	
197	  if (type === "tool_execution_start") {
198	    const e = piEvent as any;
199	    return {
200	      type: "tool_start",
201	      payload: {
202	        tool_name: e.toolName ?? "",
203	        input: JSON.stringify(e.args ?? {}),
204	      },
205	    };
206	  }
207	
208	  if (type === "tool_execution_end") {
209	    const e = piEvent as any;
210	    const isError = e.isError === true;
211	    if (isError) {
212	      return {
213	        type: "tool_error",
214	        payload: {
215	          tool_name: e.toolName ?? "",
216	          error: JSON.stringify(e.result ?? {}),
217	          elapsed: 0,
218	        },
219	      };
220	    }
221	    return {
222	      type: "tool_end",
223	      payload: {
224	        tool_name: e.toolName ?? "",
225	        output: JSON.stringify(e.result ?? {}),
226	        elapsed: 0,
227	      },
228	    };
229	  }
230	
231	  if (type === "message_end") {
232	    const msg = (piEvent as any).message;
233	    let content = "";
234	    if (msg?.content) {
235	      if (typeof msg.content === "string") {
236	        content = msg.content;
237	      } else if (Array.isArray(msg.content)) {
238	        content = msg.content
239	          .map((b: any) => (b?.type === "text" ? b.text : ""))
240	          .join("");
241	      }
242	    }
243	    return {
244	      type: "answer",
245	      payload: { content },
246	    };
247	  }
248	
249	  if (type === "agent_end") {
250	    return { type: "done", payload: {} };
251	  }
252	
253	  return null;
254	}
255	
256	// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
257	// Main event subscriber
258	// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
259	
260	function subscribeSession(
261	  sessionId: string,
262	  session: AgentSession,
263	): () => void {
264	  return session.subscribe((event: any) => {
265	    const mapped = mapPiEventToMaxma(event as Record<string, unknown>);
266	    if (mapped) {
267	      sendEvent(sessionId, mapped);
268	    }
269	  });
270	}
271	
272	// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
273	// RPC handler
274	// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
275	
276	rl.on("line", async (line: string) => {
277	  let req: any;
278	  try {
279	    req = JSON.parse(line);
280	  } catch {
281	    sendError(null, "Parse error");
282	    return;
283	  }
284	
285	  const { method, params, id } = req;
286	
287	  try {
288	    if (method === "create_session") {
289	      const modelStr: string = params?.model ?? "openai/gpt-4o";
290	      const model = parseModel(modelStr);
291	      const cwd: string = params?.cwd ?? process.cwd();
292	      const systemPrompt: string | undefined = params?.system_prompt;
293	      const tools: string[] | undefined = params?.tools as string[] | undefined;
294	      
295	      const createOptions: Record<string, unknown> = {
296	        model,
297	        cwd,
298	      };
299	      if (systemPrompt !== undefined) {
300	        createOptions.systemPrompt = systemPrompt;
301	      }
302	      if (tools !== undefined && Array.isArray(tools) && tools.length > 0) {
303	        createOptions.toolNames = tools;
304	      }
305	
306	      // Register custom Maxma tools
307	      const customTools = registerCustomTools();
308	      if (customTools.length > 0) {
309	        createOptions.customTools = customTools;
310	      }
311	
312	      const { session } = await createAgentSession(createOptions as any);
313	      const sessionId = randomUUID();
314	
315	      const unsubscribe = subscribeSession(sessionId, session);
316	      sessions.set(sessionId, { session, unsubscribe });
317	
318	      send(id, { session_id: sessionId });
319	      return;
320	    }
321	
322	    if (method === "prompt") {
323	      const sessionId: string = params?.session_id;
324	      const message: string = params?.message ?? "";
325	      const record = sessions.get(sessionId);
326	      if (!record) {
327	        sendError(id, `Session not found: ${sessionId}`);
328	        return;
329	      }
330	
331	      // Fire-and-forget — the response returns immediately.
332	      // Events stream asynchronously via the subscriber.
333	      record.session.prompt(message).catch((err: unknown) => {
334	        sendEvent(sessionId, {
335	          type: "error",
336	          payload: { code: "PROMPT_ERROR", message: String(err) },
337	        });
338	      });
339	
340	      send(id, { ok: true });
341	      return;
342	    }
343	
344	    if (method === "cancel") {
345	      const sessionId: string = params?.session_id;
346	      const record = sessions.get(sessionId);
347	      if (!record) {
348	        sendError(id, `Session not found: ${sessionId}`);
349	        return;
350	      }
351	
352	      record.session.agent.abort("Cancelled by user");
353	
354	      send(id, { ok: true });
355	      return;
356	    }
357	
358	    if (method === "destroy_session") {
359	      const sessionId: string = params?.session_id;
360	      const record = sessions.get(sessionId);
361	      if (!record) {
362	        sendError(id, `Session not found: ${sessionId}`);
363	        return;
364	      }
365	
366	      record.unsubscribe();
367	      await record.session.dispose();
368	      sessions.delete(sessionId);
369	
370	      send(id, { ok: true });
371	      return;
372	    }
373	
374	    if (method === "undo") {
375	      const sessionId: string = params?.session_id as string;
376	      const steps: number = (params?.steps as number) ?? 1;
377	      const record = sessions.get(sessionId);
378	      if (!record) {
379	        sendError(id, `Session not found: ${sessionId}`);
380	        return;
381	      }
382	
383	      // Truncate the last N assistant+user message pairs (copy-first to avoid mutating internal state)
384	      const originalLen = record.session.state.messages.length;
385	      const keepCount = Math.max(0, originalLen - steps * 2);
386	      const remaining = record.session.state.messages.slice(0, keepCount);
387	      const removed = originalLen - keepCount;
388	      record.session.replace_messages(remaining);
389	      send(id, { removed });
390	      return;
391	    }
392	
393	    sendError(id, `Unknown method: ${method}`);
394	  } catch (err) {
395	    sendError(id, String(err));
396	  }
397	});
398	
```

1	# MaxmaHere 交接文档
2	
3	> 写给后续开发者：本文档描述项目当前的真实状态。

5	---
6	
7	## 一、Maxma 是什么
8	
9	MaxmaHere 是一个**本地优先的 AI 工作站**，以 oh-my-pi 为 Agent 引擎，Vue 3 为前端，Tauri 为桌面壳。
10	
11	**核心设计**：Maxma = oh-my-pi 的前端。所有 Agent 推理由 oh-my-pi 提供，Maxma 负责品牌 UI/UX、用户管理、路由和安全策略。
12	
13	### 技术栈
14	
15	| 层 | 技术 | 版本 |
16	|---|---|---|
17	| Agent 引擎 | oh-my-pi (Bun/TypeScript) | v16.5.2 |
18	| LLM 提供商 | 40+（Anthropic, OpenAI, DeepSeek, 本地 Ollama...） | — |
19	| 后端 | FastAPI + uvicorn (Python) | >= 0.110 |
20	| 前端 | Vue 3 + Vite 5 + Pinia + TypeScript | Vue ^3.4 |
21	| 桌面壳 | Tauri 2 + Rust | v2.6.6 |
22	| 会话持久化 | oh-my-pi JSONL + SQLite（SessionMap） | — |
23	| 内存/向量 | ChromaDB + ONNX Runtime | paraphrase-multilingual |
24	| Python | >= 3.11 | 隔离 .venv |
25	
26	### 目录结构
27	
28	```
29	MaxmaHere/
30	├── bun-sidecar/                ← oh-my-pi 引擎（Bun sidecar）
31	│   └── src/
32	│       ├── session-bridge.ts   ← JSON-RPC 服务器：封装 createAgentSession
33	│       ├── rpc-types.ts        ← 协议类型定义
34	│       └── tools/              ← 13 个原生 AgentTool
35	├── api/
36	│   ├── pi_bridge/              ← Python ↔ oh-my-pi 桥接层
37	│   │   ├── sidecar_manager.py  ← Bun 进程生命周期
38	│   │   ├── rpc_client.py       ← JSON-RPC 2.0 客户端
39	│   │   ├── session_adapter.py  ← SessionMap 持久化映射
40	│   │   ├── ws_event_mapper.py  ← 事件校验/包装
41	│   │   ├── security_adapter.py ← 路径安全/MaxmaBlocker
42	│   │   └── approval_adapter.py ← 审批级别映射
43	│   ├── routes/
44	│   │   └── chat.py             ← WS 端点，唯一 agent 执行路径（oh-my-pi）
45	│   └── providers/              ← LLM Provider 管理
46	├── web/                        ← Vue 3 前端
47	├── config/                     ← 人设、贴纸
48	├── agent/                      ← Python 辅助（prompts, context_manager）
49	├── memory/                     ← 记忆系统
50	└── desktop/                    ← Tauri 桌面壳
51	```
52	
53	### 架构要点
54	
55	1. **Agent 引擎**：oh-my-pi（Bun 进程）执行所有 agent 推理循环。Python 端通过 JSON-RPC over stdio 与之通信。
56	2. **LangGraph 已完全移除**：`agent/graph.py` 及其依赖（planner/executor/coordinator/verifier）已于 2026-07-15 全部删除。`langgraph` 包已从环境卸载。
57	3. **工具系统**：oh-my-pi 的 32 个内置工具（bash/read/write/edit/gh/task 等）+ 13 个 Maxma 自定义 TypeScript AgentTool（天气/节假日/Todoist ×10/塔罗牌），直接注册在 `createAgentSession` 的 `customTools` 选项中。
58	4. **记忆系统**：4 层记忆仍在，但通过 oh-my-pi 的 `transformContext` hook 注入。
59	5. **人设系统**：SOUL.md/USER.md/AGENTS.md 通过 `build_system_prompt()` 生成 system prompt 传给 oh-my-pi。
60	
61	---
62	
63	## 二、已完成的工作
64	
65	### 2026-07-15 — oh-my-pi 全面迁移（12 个任务）

72	| **3. Complete** | Provider 迁移 + SessionMap + 记忆/人格对接 | ✅ |

74	| **善后** | 删除 agent/graph.py + LangGraph 依赖 | ✅ |
75	| **善后** | 对抗式审查 + Bug 修复（tool_error/重启上下文恢复） | ✅ |
76	| **工具重写** | 13 个原生 TypeScript AgentTool（weather/holiday/todoist ×10/tarot） | ✅ |
77	| **代码清理** | 删除旧 Python tools/ 目录、MCP 桥接、pi_adapter.py | ✅ |

84	| `memory/narrative.py` 中的 LTM CRUD agent | 低 | 无 langgraph 时跳过 CRUD agent，LTM 摘要仍正常工作 |

90	## 三、关键配置
91	
92	### 环境变量
93	
94	| 变量 | 用途 | 必需 |
95	|---|---|---|
96	| `OPENAI_API_KEY` | 默认 LLM Provider | 至少配置一个 |
97	| `TODOIST_API_TOKEN` | Todoist 工具 | 否 |
98	| `AMAP_API_KEY` | 高德地图 MCP | 否 |
99	| `UAPIS_API_KEY` | 天气/节假日 API | 否 |

101	### 切换 LangGraph 回退（不推荐）
102	
103	部分端点（`sessions.py` undo）备有 LangGraph 回退路径，由 `try: from agent.graph import build_agent` 保护。要启用需：
104	1. `pip install langgraph langgraph-checkpoint-sqlite`
105	2. 删除 `api/routes/sessions.py` 中 undo 函数体的 try/except 保护
106	
107	---
108	
109	## 四、常见坑
110	
111	- **缩进混合**：该项目历史原因存在 tab/spaces 混用。编辑文件后请检查。
112	- **sidecar 启动顺序**：`SidecarManager.start()` 是幂等的，但首次调用会启动 Bun 进程（耗时 ~0.5s）。应用启动时 `app.state.sidecar_manager` 仅初始化实例，不启动进程。
113	- **MCP 工具**：高德地图等外部工具通过 MCP 接入，需用户在前端配置 MCP 服务器地址。
114

**Output:**

```json
1	"""TimeTraveler — 对话轮次撤回工具。
2	
3	基于 LangGraph 的 RemoveMessage 机制，通过 CompiledStateGraph.update_state
4	删除 MemorySaver 检查点中指定轮次的对话消息。
5	"""
6	
7	from langchain_core.messages import RemoveMessage
8	
9	
10	async def undo_rounds(graph, config, n: int = 1) -> int:
11	    """撤回最近 n 轮对话，返回删除的消息条数。
12	
13	    Args:
14	        graph: CompiledStateGraph 实例（需持有会话的 checkpointer）。
15	        config: LangGraph 配置，至少包含 {"configurable": {"thread_id": ...}}。
16	        n: 要撤回的轮次数，默认 1。
17	
18	    Returns:
19	        实际删除的消息条数。
20	    """
21	    if n < 1:
22	        return 0
23	
24	    state = await graph.aget_state(config)
25	    messages = state.values.get("messages", [])
26	
27	    if not messages:
28	        return 0
29	
30	    # 找出所有 HumanMessage 的位置
31	    human_indices = [i for i, m in enumerate(messages) if m.type == "human"]
32	
33	    if not human_indices:
34	        return 0
35	
36	    if len(human_indices) < n:
37	        # 不够 n 轮就全部删除
38	        to_delete = messages
39	    else:
40	        # 倒数第 n 个 human 的位置就是切割点
41	        cutoff = human_indices[-n]
42	        to_delete = messages[cutoff:]
43	
44	    # 提交删除指令 — RemoveMessage 会被 add_messages reducer 识别并删除对应 id 的消息
45	    remove_msgs = []
46	    for m in to_delete:
47	        msg_id = getattr(m, "id", None)
48	        if msg_id:
49	            remove_msgs.append(RemoveMessage(id=msg_id))
50	    if remove_msgs:
51	        await graph.aupdate_state(config, {"messages": remove_msgs})
52	    return len(to_delete)
53	
54	
55	async def undo_last_round(graph, config) -> int:
56	    """撤回最近一轮对话。"""
57	    return await undo_rounds(graph, config, n=1)
58	
59	
60	async def undo_all(graph, config) -> int:
61	    """撤回所有轮次，清空对话历史。"""
62	    return await undo_rounds(graph, config, n=10**9)
63	
```

#### Thinking

Now let me give a concise summary.

Plan 已经写到项目的 `docs/superpowers/plans/` 目录下了。

**核心思路：** 所有 23 个问题的根源是同一个——对话状态有两个竞争的事实源，迁移只完成了写端切换，读端全部还指向已废弃的 LangGraph checkpointer。整个 plan 围绕"收敛到单一事实源"展开。

五个阶段：

**Phase 1（最关键，3-4h）** — 状态读取收敛。新增 sidecar `get_messages` RPC，把 chat.py 和 sessions.py 中 6 处 checkpointer 读取全部替换为从 sidecar/SessionMap 获取。同时修复 CancelledError 必崩代码、情景记忆投影传入 None、undo 重启失效、const session 被清空。做完这步 dev 模式就能正常工作了。

**Phase 2（1-2h）** — sidecar 加固。prompt 并发锁、sidecar_manager 锁修复、SessionMap 资源管理、优雅关闭。

**Phase 3（2h）** — 构建管线。清理 PyInstaller spec 的 15 个死 hiddenimport、重新锁定 requirements.txt、用 `bun build --compile` 把 sidecar 编译为独立 exe 纳入 Tauri 打包。

**Phase 4（3-4h）** — 遗留代码清理。tools/ 目录审计分类（保留基础设施、删除已替代的、高德地图需要决策）、autonomy 模块 import 修复、12 个死测试文件清理。

**Phase 5（1-2h）** — 防御加固。security_adapter fail-closed、approval 默认 ask、类型同步、tarot shuffle 修复、package.json 依赖补全。

你看看 plan 有没有需要调整的地方，确认后我就开始按顺序执行。

```json
1	/**
2	 * session-bridge.ts — JSON-RPC server wrapping createAgentSession.
3	 *
4	 * RPC Methods:
5	 *   create_session({ model, system_prompt?, cwd? }) → { session_id }
6	 *   prompt({ session_id, message })               → { ok: true }
7	 *   cancel({ session_id })                         → { ok: true }
8	 *   destroy_session({ session_id })                → { ok: true }
9	 *
10	 * Events are forwarded as JSON-RPC notifications (method: "event").
11	 */
12	
13	import { createInterface } from "node:readline";
14	import { randomUUID } from "node:crypto";
15	import { createAgentSession } from "@oh-my-pi/pi-coding-agent";
16	import { getBundledModel } from "@oh-my-pi/pi-catalog/models";
17	import type { Model } from "@oh-my-pi/pi-ai";
18	import type { AgentSession } from "@oh-my-pi/pi-coding-agent";
19	import { registerCustomTools } from "./tools/index";
20	
21	// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
22	// Types
23	// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
24	
25	interface SessionRecord {
26	  session: AgentSession;
27	  unsubscribe: () => void;
28	}
29	
30	// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
31	// State
32	// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
33	
34	const sessions = new Map<string, SessionRecord>();
35	const rl = createInterface({ input: process.stdin });
36	
37	// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
38	// JSON-RPC helpers
39	// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
40	
41	function send(id: number | null, result: unknown) {
42	  process.stdout.write(JSON.stringify({ jsonrpc: "2.0", id, result }) + "\n");
43	}
44	
45	function sendError(id: number | null, message: string) {
46	  process.stdout.write(
47	    JSON.stringify({ jsonrpc: "2.0", id, error: { message } }) + "\n",
48	  );
49	}
50	
51	function sendEvent(sessionId: string, event: Record<string, unknown>) {
52	  process.stdout.write(
53	    JSON.stringify({
54	      jsonrpc: "2.0",
55	      method: "event",
56	      params: { session_id: sessionId, event },
57	    }) + "\n",
58	  );
59	}
60	
61	// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
62	// Model resolution
63	// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
64	
65	/**
66	 * Parse a model string like "openai/gpt-4o" into a proper Model object.
67	 *
68	 * Strategy:
69	 *   A — Try `getBundledModel(provider, modelId)` from the bundled catalog.
70	 *   B — Fall back to constructing a minimal Model object manually.
71	 */
72	function parseModel(modelStr: string): Model {
73	  const slashIdx = modelStr.indexOf("/");
74	  const provider = slashIdx >= 0 ? modelStr.slice(0, slashIdx) : "";
75	  const modelId = slashIdx >= 0 ? modelStr.slice(slashIdx + 1) : modelStr;
76	
77	  // Option A: bundled catalog lookup
78	  if (provider) {
79	    try {
80	      const bundled = getBundledModel(provider as any, modelId);
81	      if (bundled) return bundled;
82	    } catch {
83	      // Fall through to manual construction
84	    }
85	  }
86	
87	  // Option B: manual fallback (minimal Model object from env vars)
88	  const baseUrl =
89	    process.env.OPENAI_BASE_URL ?? "https://api.openai.com/v1";
90	  return {
91	    id: modelId,
92	    name: modelId,
93	    api: "openai-completions" as const,
94	    provider,
95	    baseUrl,
96	    reasoning: false,
97	    input: ["text"] as ("text" | "image")[],
98	    cost: { input: 0, output: 0, cacheRead: 0, cacheWrite: 0 },
99	    contextWindow: 128000,
100	    maxTokens: 4096,
101	    compat: {
102	      supportsDeveloperRole: true,
103	      supportsStrictMode: false,
104	      supportsReasoningEffort: false,
105	      reasoningEffortMap: {},
106	      supportsReasoningParams: false,
107	      thinkingFormat: "disabled" as const,
108	      reasoningDisableMode: "off" as const,
109	      omitReasoningEffort: false,
110	      includeEncryptedReasoning: false,
111	      filterReasoningHistory: false,
112	      disableReasoningOnForcedToolChoice: false,
113	      disableReasoningOnToolChoice: false,
114	      supportsToolChoice: true,
115	      supportsForcedToolChoice: true,
116	      supportsNamedToolChoice: true,
117	      reasoningContentField: undefined,
118	      requiresReasoningContentForToolCalls: false,
119	      requiresReasoningContentForAllAssistantTurns: false,
120	      allowsSyntheticReasoningContentForToolCalls: false,
121	      replayReasoningContent: false,
122	      qwenPreserveThinking: false,
123	      requiresThinkingAsText: false,
124	      requiresMistralToolIds: false,
125	      requiresToolResultName: false,
126	      requiresAssistantAfterToolResult: false,
127	      requiresAssistantContentForToolCalls: false,
128	      stripDeepseekSpecialTokens: false,
129	      streamMarkupHealingPattern: undefined,
130	      reasoningDeltasMayBeCumulative: false,
131	      emptyLengthFinishIsContextError: false,
132	      usesOpenAIToolCallIdLimit: false,
133	      promptCacheSessionHeader: undefined,
134	      isOpenRouterHost: false,
135	      alwaysSendMaxTokens: true,
136	      enableGeminiThinkingLoopGuard: undefined,
137	      openRouterRouting: undefined,
138	      wireModelIdMode: "raw" as const,
139	      supportsStore: false,
140	      supportsMultipleSystemMessages: true,
141	      maxTokensField: "max_tokens" as const,
142	      supportsUsageInStreaming: true,
143	      cacheControlFormat: undefined,
144	      supportsLongPromptCacheRetention: false,
145	      supportsImageDetailOriginal: false,
146	      strictResponsesPairing: false,
147	      toolStrictMode: "none" as const,
148	      streamIdleTimeoutMs: undefined,
149	      vercelGatewayRouting: undefined,
150	      extraBody: undefined,
151	    },
152	  } as Model;
153	}
154	
155	// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
156	// Pi event → Maxma event mapping
157	// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
158	
159	function mapPiEventToMaxma(
160	  piEvent: Record<string, unknown>,
161	): Record<string, unknown> | null {
162	  // Handle AgentEvent types directly
163	  const type = piEvent.type as string;
164	
165	  if (type === "message_update") {
166	    const assistantEvent = (piEvent as any).assistantMessageEvent;
167	    if (!assistantEvent) return null;
168	
169	    const aeType = assistantEvent.type as string;
170	
171	    if (aeType === "text_delta") {
172	      return {
173	        type: "token",
174	        payload: { token: assistantEvent.delta ?? "" },
175	      };
176	    }
177	
178	    // NOTE: toolcall_start/toolcall_end from message_update are pre-execution
179	    // events (LLM deciding to call a tool). The actual execution data comes
180	    // from tool_execution_start/tool_execution_end below, which carry full
181	    // toolName and result data. Skip early message_update tool events to avoid
182	    // duplicate/empty-named events.
183	
184	    if (aeType === "error") {
185	      const errMsg =
186	        (assistantEvent as any).error?.content?.[0]?.text ??
187	        "Unknown agent error";
188	      return {
189	        type: "error",
190	        payload: { code: "AGENT_ERROR", message: errMsg },
191	      };
192	    }
193	
194	    return null;
195	  }
196	
197	  if (type === "tool_execution_start") {
198	    const e = piEvent as any;
199	    return {
200	      type: "tool_start",
201	      payload: {
202	        tool_name: e.toolName ?? "",
203	        input: JSON.stringify(e.args ?? {}),
204	      },
205	    };
206	  }
207	
208	  if (type === "tool_execution_end") {
209	    const e = piEvent as any;
210	    const isError = e.isError === true;
211	    if (isError) {
212	      return {
213	        type: "tool_error",
214	        payload: {
215	          tool_name: e.toolName ?? "",
216	          error: JSON.stringify(e.result ?? {}),
217	          elapsed: 0,
218	        },
219	      };
220	    }
221	    return {
222	      type: "tool_end",
223	      payload: {
224	        tool_name: e.toolName ?? "",
225	        output: JSON.stringify(e.result ?? {}),
226	        elapsed: 0,
227	      },
228	    };
229	  }
230	
231	  if (type === "message_end") {
232	    const msg = (piEvent as any).message;
233	    let content = "";
234	    if (msg?.content) {
235	      if (typeof msg.content === "string") {
236	        content = msg.content;
237	      } else if (Array.isArray(msg.content)) {
238	        content = msg.content
239	          .map((b: any) => (b?.type === "text" ? b.text : ""))
240	          .join("");
241	      }
242	    }
243	    return {
244	      type: "answer",
245	      payload: { content },
246	    };
247	  }
248	
249	  if (type === "agent_end") {
250	    return { type: "done", payload: {} };
251	  }
252	
253	  return null;
254	}
255	
256	// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
257	// Main event subscriber
258	// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
259	
260	function subscribeSession(
261	  sessionId: string,
262	  session: AgentSession,
263	): () => void {
264	  return session.subscribe((event: any) => {
265	    const mapped = mapPiEventToMaxma(event as Record<string, unknown>);
266	    if (mapped) {
267	      sendEvent(sessionId, mapped);
268	    }
269	  });
270	}
271	
272	// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
273	// RPC handler
274	// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
275	
276	rl.on("line", async (line: string) => {
277	  let req: any;
278	  try {
279	    req = JSON.parse(line);
280	  } catch {
281	    sendError(null, "Parse error");
282	    return;
283	  }
284	
285	  const { method, params, id } = req;
286	
287	  try {
288	    if (method === "create_session") {
289	      const modelStr: string = params?.model ?? "openai/gpt-4o";
290	      const model = parseModel(modelStr);
291	      const cwd: string = params?.cwd ?? process.cwd();
292	      const systemPrompt: string | undefined = params?.system_prompt;
293	      const tools: string[] | undefined = params?.tools as string[] | undefined;
294	      
295	      const createOptions: Record<string, unknown> = {
296	        model,
297	        cwd,
298	      };
299	      if (systemPrompt !== undefined) {
300	        createOptions.systemPrompt = systemPrompt;
301	      }
302	      if (tools !== undefined && Array.isArray(tools) && tools.length > 0) {
303	        createOptions.toolNames = tools;
304	      }
305	
306	      // Register custom Maxma tools
307	      const customTools = registerCustomTools();
308	      if (customTools.length > 0) {
309	        createOptions.customTools = customTools;
310	      }
311	
312	      const { session } = await createAgentSession(createOptions as any);
313	      const sessionId = randomUUID();
314	
315	      const unsubscribe = subscribeSession(sessionId, session);
316	      sessions.set(sessionId, { session, unsubscribe });
317	
318	      send(id, { session_id: sessionId });
319	      return;
320	    }
321	
322	    if (method === "prompt") {
323	      const sessionId: string = params?.session_id;
324	      const message: string = params?.message ?? "";
325	      const record = sessions.get(sessionId);
326	      if (!record) {
327	        sendError(id, `Session not found: ${sessionId}`);
328	        return;
329	      }
330	
331	      // Fire-and-forget — the response returns immediately.
332	      // Events stream asynchronously via the subscriber.
333	      record.session.prompt(message).catch((err: unknown) => {
334	        sendEvent(sessionId, {
335	          type: "error",
336	          payload: { code: "PROMPT_ERROR", message: String(err) },
337	        });
338	      });
339	
340	      send(id, { ok: true });
341	      return;
342	    }
343	
344	    if (method === "cancel") {
345	      const sessionId: string = params?.session_id;
346	      const record = sessions.get(sessionId);
347	      if (!record) {
348	        sendError(id, `Session not found: ${sessionId}`);
349	        return;
350	      }
351	
352	      record.session.agent.abort("Cancelled by user");
353	
354	      send(id, { ok: true });
355	      return;
356	    }
357	
358	    if (method === "destroy_session") {
359	      const sessionId: string = params?.session_id;
360	      const record = sessions.get(sessionId);
361	      if (!record) {
362	        sendError(id, `Session not found: ${sessionId}`);
363	        return;
364	      }
365	
366	      record.unsubscribe();
367	      await record.session.dispose();
368	      sessions.delete(sessionId);
369	
370	      send(id, { ok: true });
371	      return;
372	    }
373	
374	    if (method === "undo") {
375	      const sessionId: string = params?.session_id as string;
376	      const steps: number = (params?.steps as number) ?? 1;
377	      const record = sessions.get(sessionId);
378	      if (!record) {
379	        sendError(id, `Session not found: ${sessionId}`);
380	        return;
381	      }
382	
383	      // Truncate the last N assistant+user message pairs (copy-first to avoid mutating internal state)
384	      const originalLen = record.session.state.messages.length;
385	      const keepCount = Math.max(0, originalLen - steps * 2);
386	      const remaining = record.session.state.messages.slice(0, keepCount);
387	      const removed = originalLen - keepCount;
388	      record.session.replace_messages(remaining);
389	      send(id, { removed });
390	      return;
391	    }
392	
393	    sendError(id, `Unknown method: ${method}`);
394	  } catch (err) {
395	    sendError(id, String(err));
396	  }
397	});
398	
```
