6	        v-model="linkUrl"
7	        type="url"
8	        class="link-input"
9	        placeholder="输入链接 URL……"
10	        @keydown.enter.prevent="confirmLink"
11	        @keydown.escape.prevent="cancelLink"
12	      />
13	      <button class="link-input-confirm" :disabled="!linkUrl.trim()" @click="confirmLink">✓</button>
14	      <button class="link-input-cancel" @click="cancelLink">✕</button>
15	    </div>
16	    <div
17	      ref="inputContainerRef"
18	      class="chat-input"
19	      :class="{ 'is-resizing': isResizing, 'is-dragover': isDragover }"
20	      :style="containerStyle"
21	      @dragenter.prevent="onDragEnter"
22	      @dragover.prevent="onDragOver"
23	      @dragleave.prevent="onDragLeave"
24	      @drop.prevent="onDrop"
25	    >
26	      <div
27	        class="resize-handle"
28	        @pointerdown="startResize"
29	        title="拖拽调整输入框高度"
30	      >
31	        <div class="resize-handle-grip"></div>
32	      </div>
33	      <TransitionGroup name="ref-tag" tag="div" class="file-refs-bar" @before-leave="freezeLeavePos">
34	        <!-- 表情引用：缩略图预览 -->
35	        <span
36	          v-for="seg in stickerSegments"
37	          :key="'sticker-' + seg.occurrenceKey"
38	          class="sticker-tag"
39	          :title="seg.path"
40	        >
41	          <img :src="seg.src" class="sticker-tag-preview" :alt="seg.filename" />
42	          <span class="sticker-tag-name">{{ seg.category || '表情' }}</span>
43	          <button class="sticker-tag-remove" @click="removeStickerSegment(seg)">✕</button>
44	        </span>
45	        <!-- 图片引用：缩略图预览 -->
46	        <span
47	          v-for="(r, idx) in imageRefs"
48	          :key="'img-' + idx"
49	          class="image-tag"
50	        >
51	          <img :src="r.preview" class="image-tag-preview" :alt="r.label" />
52	          <span class="image-tag-name">{{ r.label }}</span>
53	          <button class="image-tag-remove" @click="removeRef(getRefIndex(r))">✕</button>
54	        </span>
55	        <!-- 其他引用：文本 chip -->
56	        <span
57	          v-for="(r, idx) in nonImageRefs"
58	          :key="r.type + r.label + idx"
59	          class="file-tag"
60	          :class="{ blocked: 'blocked' in r && r.blocked }"
61	          :title="getRefTooltip(r)"
62	        >
63	          <span class="file-tag-icon"><Icon :name="getRefIcon(r)" :size="14" /></span>
64	          <span class="file-tag-name">{{ r.label }}</span>
65	          <span class="file-tag-source">{{ r.type }}</span>
66	          <span v-if="'blocked' in r && r.blocked" class="file-tag-blocked">blocked</span>
67	          <button class="file-tag-remove" @click="removeRef(getNonImageRefIndex(r))">✕</button>
68	        </span>
69	      </TransitionGroup>
70	      <!-- 已引用选区卡片栏 -->
71	      <div v-if="quotedSelections.length" class="quoted-selections-bar">
72	        <QuotedSelectionCard
73	          v-for="q in quotedSelections"
74	          :key="q.id"
75	          :quote="q"
76	          @remove="$emit('removeQuote', q.id)"
77	        />
78	      </div>
79	      <div class="input-body">
80	        <textarea
81	          ref="textareaRef"
82	          v-model="text"
83	          class="input-area"
84	          :placeholder="inputPlaceholder"
85	          :disabled="disabled"
86	          rows="1"
87	          @keydown="onKeydown"
88	          @input="autoResize"
89	          @paste="onPaste"
90	        ></textarea>
91	      </div>
92	      <ThinkPathChooser
93	        v-model="selectedThinkPathId"
94	        :enabled="thinkPathEnabled"
95	        :text="text"
96	        :disabled="disabled || isStreaming"
97	      />
98	      <hr class="input-divider" />
99	      <div class="input-bottom-bar">
100	        <div class="input-left-group">
101	          <div class="btn-add-file-wrapper">
102	          <button class="btn-add-file" :disabled="disabled" @click="toggleMenu">
103	            <span v-if="loading" class="btn-add-file-spin">⟳</span>
104	            <Icon v-else name="attach" :size="18" />
105	          </button>
106	          <div v-if="showMenu" class="add-file-menu" @click.stop>
107	            <button class="add-file-menu-item" @click="pickFile">
108	              <Icon name="menu-file" :size="14" /> 选择文件
109	            </button>
110	            <button class="add-file-menu-item" @click="pickFolder">
111	              <Icon name="menu-folder" :size="14" /> 选择文件夹
112	            </button>
113	            <button class="add-file-menu-item" @click="pickImage">
114	              <Icon name="image" :size="14" /> 选择图片
115	            </button>
116	            <button class="add-file-menu-item" @click="startLinkInput">
117	              <Icon name="link" :size="14" /> 加入链接
118	            </button>
119	          </div>
120	          <div v-if="showMenu" class="menu-backdrop" @click="showMenu = false"></div>
121	          </div>
122	        </div>
123	        <div class="input-right-group">
124	          <div class="dropdown">
125	            <button class="dropdown-trigger" :class="{ empty: providers.length === 0 }" @click.stop="toggleDropdown('provider')">
126	              {{ providers.length === 0 ? '未配置模型' : (providers.find(p => p.id === selectedProviderId)?.label || '选择提供商') }}
127	              <span class="dropdown-arrow">▾</span>
128	            </button>
129	            <div v-if="openDropdown === 'provider'" class="dropdown-menu">
130	              <button v-if="providers.length === 0" class="dropdown-option disabled">暂无可用的提供商，请先在模型设置中添加</button>
131	              <button v-for="p in providers" :key="p.id" class="dropdown-option" :class="{ selected: selectedProviderId === p.id }" @click="selectProvider(p.id)">{{ p.label }}</button>
132	            </div>
133	          </div>
134	          <div v-if="currentModels.length" class="dropdown">
135	            <button class="dropdown-trigger" @click.stop="toggleDropdown('model')">
136	              {{ selectedModelName || '选择模型' }}
137	              <span class="dropdown-arrow">▾</span>
138	            </button>
139	            <div v-if="openDropdown === 'model'" class="dropdown-menu">
140	              <button v-for="m in currentModels" :key="m" class="dropdown-option" :class="{ selected: selectedModelName === m }" @click="selectModel(m)">{{ m }}</button>
141	            </div>
142	          </div>
143	          <span class="input-separator"></span>
144	          <div class="input-actions">
145	            <button
146	              class="btn-sticker"
147	              :class="{ active: showStickerPicker }"
148	              @click.stop="toggleStickerPicker"
149	              title="表情"
150	            >
151	              <Icon name="sticker" :size="18" />
152	            </button>
153	            <button
154	              v-if="!isStreaming"
155	              class="btn-send"
156	              :disabled="(!text.trim() && imageRefs.length === 0) || disabled || noProvider || !canSend"
157	              :title="sendButtonTitle"
158	              @click="handleSend"
159	            >
160	              <Icon name="send" :size="16" />
161	            </button>
162	            <button v-else class="btn-stop" @click="$emit('stop')">
163	              <Icon name="stop" :size="12" />
164	            </button>
165	          </div>
166	        </div>
167	      </div>
168	    </div>
169	    <!-- 表情选择器 -->
170	    <StickerPicker
171	      v-if="showStickerPicker"
172	      ref="stickerPickerRef"
173	      :visible="showStickerPicker"
174	      :context-text="text"
175	      @select="onStickerSelect"
176	      @close="showStickerPicker = false"
177	      @contextmenu="onStickerContextMenu"
178	    />
179	    <!-- 表情右键菜单 -->
180	    <StickerContextMenu
181	      v-if="contextMenuVisible"
182	      :visible="contextMenuVisible"
183	      :position="contextMenuPosition"
184	      :sticker="contextMenuSticker"
185	      @close="contextMenuVisible = false"
186	      @refresh="onContextMenuRefresh"
187	    />
188	    <AutocompletePanel
189	      :items="acFiltered"
190	      :visible="acMode !== null"
191	      :position="acPosition"
192	      :active-index="acActiveIndex"
193	      :filter-text="acFilterText"
194	      :icon-name="acMode === 'tool' ? 'tool' : 'sparkles'"
195	      @select="confirmItem"
196	      @close="acMode = null"
197	      @update:active-index="acActiveIndex = $event"
198	    />
199	    <!-- 选区引用浮层 -->
200	    <Transition name="quote-pop">
201	      <button
202	        v-if="quoteCandidate"
203	        class="quote-float-btn"
204	        :style="quoteFloatStyle"
205	        @click="$emit('commitQuote')"
206	        title="引用选中文本"
207	      >
208	        + 引用
209	      </button>
210	    </Transition>
211	  </div>
212	</template>
213	
214	<script setup lang="ts">
215	import { api } from '@/api'
216	import AutocompletePanel from '@/components/AutocompletePanel.vue'
217	import Icon from '@/components/Icon.vue'
218	import StickerPicker from '@/components/StickerPicker.vue'
219	import StickerContextMenu from '@/components/StickerContextMenu.vue'
220	import QuotedSelectionCard from '@/components/QuotedSelectionCard.vue'
221	import ThinkPathChooser from '@/components/ThinkPathChooser.vue'
222	import type { QuotedSelection, QuoteCandidate } from '@/composables/useSelectionQuote'
223	import { computeFloatingInputPosition } from '@/utils/floatingPosition'
224	import type { ProviderConfig, SkillInfo, MacroInfo, ToolInfo } from '@/types'
225	import { useProviderStore } from '@/stores/provider'
226	import { useStickerSegments, type StickerSegment } from '@/composables/useStickerSegments'
227	import type { ParsedRef, ImageRef } from '@/utils/references'
228	import { REF_CHIP_CONFIG } from '@/utils/references'
229	import { getApiBase, isTauri, tauriFetch } from '@/utils/env'
230	import type { ThinkPathId } from '@/utils/thinkPath'
231	import { computed, nextTick, onMounted, onUnmounted, ref, watch } from 'vue'
232	
233	const props = withDefaults(defineProps<{
234	  isStreaming: boolean
235	  disabled: boolean
236	  canSend: boolean
237	  initialProviderId?: string
238	  initialModelName?: string
239	  /** Server-owned capability flag; false leaves the composer on the legacy path. */
240	  thinkPathEnabled?: boolean
241	  quotedSelections?: QuotedSelection[]
242	  quoteCandidate?: QuoteCandidate | null
243	}>(), {
244	  quotedSelections: () => [],
245	  quoteCandidate: null,
246	})
247	
248	const emit = defineEmits<{
249	  send: [text: string, refs: ParsedRef[], providerId?: string, modelName?: string, thinkPathId?: ThinkPathId]
250	  stop: []
251	  modelChange: [providerId: string, modelName: string]
252	  commitQuote: []
253	  removeQuote: [id: string]
254	}>()
255	
256	const text = ref('')
257	const selectedThinkPathId = ref<ThinkPathId | null>(null)
258	const textareaRef = ref<HTMLTextAreaElement | null>(null)
259	const inputContainerRef = ref<HTMLDivElement | null>(null)
260	const refs = ref<ParsedRef[]>([])
261	const loading = ref(false)
262	const inputPlaceholder = computed(() =>
263	  props.canSend
264	    ? '输入消息…… @技能 · #工具 · !宏'
265	    : '后端连接中，可先输入内容，连接完成后发送……'
266	)
267	const sendButtonTitle = computed(() => {
268	  if (noProvider.value) return '请先在模型设置中添加 LLM 提供商'
269	  if (!props.canSend) return '后端连接中，暂时还不能发送'
270	  return ''
271	})
272	
273	// 选区引用浮层定位
274	const quoteFloatStyle = computed(() => {
275	  if (!props.quoteCandidate) return {}
276	  const result = computeFloatingInputPosition(
277	    props.quoteCandidate.rect,
278	    { width: 100, height: 32 },
279	    window.innerWidth,
280	    window.innerHeight,
281	    'top',
282	  )
283	  return {
284	    left: `${result.left}px`,
285	    top: `${result.top}px`,
286	    transformOrigin: result.origin,
287	  }
288	})
289	
290	// ── 表情选择器状态 ──
291	const showStickerPicker = ref(false)
292	const contextMenuVisible = ref(false)
293	const contextMenuPosition = ref({ x: 0, y: 0 })
294	const contextMenuSticker = ref<any>(null)
295	const stickerPickerRef = ref<InstanceType<typeof StickerPicker> | null>(null)
296	const parsedInputSegments = useStickerSegments(text)
297	const stickerSegments = computed(() =>
298	  parsedInputSegments.value.filter((seg): seg is StickerSegment => seg.type === 'sticker')
299	)
300	
301	function toggleStickerPicker() {
302	  console.log('[ChatInput] toggleStickerPicker called, current:', showStickerPicker.value)
303	  showStickerPicker.value = !showStickerPicker.value
304	  console.log('[ChatInput] showStickerPicker now:', showStickerPicker.value)
305	}
306	
307	async function onStickerSelect(sticker: any) {
308	  console.log('[ChatInput] onStickerSelect called with:', sticker)
309	  // 直接用用户选择的具体表情，不再调 random API
310	  const stickerTag = `<sticker:${sticker.path}>`
311	  text.value += stickerTag
312	  recordStickerUsage(sticker)
313	  console.log('[ChatInput] Inserted sticker tag:', stickerTag)
314	  showStickerPicker.value = false
315	  nextTick(() => {
316	    textareaRef.value?.focus()
317	    autoResize()
318	  })
319	}
320	
321	function removeStickerSegment(sticker: StickerSegment) {
322	  const currentSticker = stickerSegments.value.find(seg => seg.occurrenceKey === sticker.occurrenceKey) || sticker
323	  text.value = text.value.slice(0, currentSticker.start) + text.value.slice(currentSticker.end)
324	  nextTick(() => {
325	    textareaRef.value?.focus()
326	    autoResize()
327	  })
328	}
329	
330	async function recordStickerUsage(sticker: any) {
331	  try {
332	    await tauriFetch(`${getApiBase()}/stickers/usage`, {
333	      method: 'POST',
334	      headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
335	      body: JSON.stringify({
336	        category: sticker.category,
337	        filename: sticker.filename
338	      })
339	    })
340	  } catch (err) {
341	    console.warn('[ChatInput] 记录表情使用失败:', err)
342	  }
343	}
344	
345	function onStickerContextMenu(event: MouseEvent, sticker: any) {
346	  contextMenuSticker.value = sticker
347	  contextMenuPosition.value = { x: event.clientX, y: event.clientY }
348	  contextMenuVisible.value = true
349	}
350	
351	function onContextMenuRefresh() {
352	  stickerPickerRef.value?.refresh()
353	  contextMenuVisible.value = false
354	}
355	
356	// ── 图片引用分离（用于模板中分别渲染缩略图和文本 chip）──
357	const imageRefs = computed(() => refs.value.filter((r): r is ImageRef => r.type === 'image'))
358	const nonImageRefs = computed(() => refs.value.filter((r): r is Exclude<ParsedRef, ImageRef> => r.type !== 'image'))
359	
360	/** 获取 ImageRef 在 refs 数组中的真实索引 */
361	function getRefIndex(imgRef: ImageRef): number {
362	  return refs.value.indexOf(imgRef)
363	}
364	
365	/** 获取 nonImageRef 在 refs 数组中的真实索引 */
366	function getNonImageRefIndex(r: Exclude<ParsedRef, ImageRef>): number {
367	  return refs.value.indexOf(r as ParsedRef)
368	}
369	
370	// ── 拖拽图片状态 ──
371	const isDragover = ref(false)
372	let dragCounter = 0
373	const showMenu = ref(false)
374	const showLinkInput = ref(false)
375	const linkUrl = ref('')
376	const linkInputRef = ref<HTMLInputElement | null>(null)
377	
378	// ── 供父组件注入新引用（如 ChatWindow 发出的 cite） ──
379	
380	function addRef(r: ParsedRef) {
381	  refs.value.push(r)
382	}
383	
384	function removeRef(idx: number) {
385	  const ref = refs.value[idx]
386	  // 释放图片 blob URL，防止内存泄漏
387	  if (ref && ref.type === 'image' && (ref as ImageRef).preview?.startsWith('blob:')) {
388	    URL.revokeObjectURL((ref as ImageRef).preview)
389	  }
390	  refs.value.splice(idx, 1)
391	}
392	
393	/** TransitionGroup before-leave：冻结退场元素的位置，使其脱离 flex 流而不跳跃 */
394	function freezeLeavePos(el: Element) {
395	  const htmlEl = el as HTMLElement
396	  const parent = htmlEl.offsetParent as HTMLElement
397	  if (parent) {
398	    htmlEl.style.left = htmlEl.offsetLeft + 'px'
399	    htmlEl.style.top = htmlEl.offsetTop + 'px'
400	  }
401	}
402	
403	/** 从 REF_CHIP_CONFIG 获取图标名 */
404	function getRefIcon(r: ParsedRef): string {
405	  return REF_CHIP_CONFIG[r.type]?.icon ?? 'file'
406	}
407	
408	/** 从 REF_CHIP_CONFIG 获取 tooltip，受阻时附加原因 */
409	function getRefTooltip(r: ParsedRef): string {
410	  const base = REF_CHIP_CONFIG[r.type]?.tooltip(r) ?? r.label
411	  if ('blocked' in r && r.blocked) {
412	    return `${base}\n⛔ ${r.blockedReason || '路径被阻挡，无法访问'}`
413	  }
414	  return base
415	}
416	
417	defineExpose({ addRef })
418	
419	// ── 链接引用 ──
420	
421	const LINK_RE = /^https?:\/\/[^\s/$.?#].[^\s]*$/i
422	
423	function startLinkInput() {
424	  showMenu.value = false
425	  linkUrl.value = ''
426	  showLinkInput.value = true
427	  nextTick(() => linkInputRef.value?.focus())
428	}
429	
430	function confirmLink() {
431	  const url = linkUrl.value.trim()
432	  if (!url) return
433	  // 如果没有协议前缀，自动补 https://
434	  const normalized = /^https?:\/\//i.test(url) ? url : 'https://' + url
435	  if (!LINK_RE.test(normalized)) return
436	  try {
437	    const domain = new URL(normalized).hostname.replace(/^www\./, '')
438	    refs.value.push({ type: 'web_link', url: normalized, label: domain, domain })
439	    linkUrl.value = ''
440	    showLinkInput.value = false
441	  } catch {
442	    // URL 解析失败，不做操作
443	  }
444	}
445	
446	function cancelLink() {
447	  linkUrl.value = ''
448	  showLinkInput.value = false
449	}
450	
451	// ── 粘贴URL自动识别 ──
452	
453	/** 判断文本是否看起来像域名/IP，适合补 https:// */
454	function looksLikeHost(text: string): boolean {
455	  // 允许 localhost、带点的域名、IPv4、IPv6
456	  return /^[a-zA-Z0-9-]+(\.[a-zA-Z0-9-]+)+(:[0-9]+)?(\/|$)/.test(text)
457	      || /^localhost(:[0-9]+)?(\/|$)/i.test(text)
458	}
459	
460	function onPaste(e: ClipboardEvent) {
461	  // ── 剪贴板图片粘贴 ──
462	  const items = e.clipboardData?.items
463	  if (items) {
464	    for (const item of Array.from(items)) {
465	      if (item.type.startsWith('image/')) {
466	        e.preventDefault()
467	        const file = item.getAsFile()
468	        if (file) {
469	          handleImageFile(file)
470	        }
471	        return
472	      }
473	    }
474	  }
475	
476	  const text = e.clipboardData?.getData('text/plain')?.trim()
477	  if (!text) return
478	
479	  // 已有协议头 → 直接校验完整 URL
480	  if (/^https?:\/\//i.test(text)) {
481	    try {
482	      const url = new URL(text)
483	      if (['http:', 'https:'].includes(url.protocol) && url.hostname.includes('.')) {
484	        e.preventDefault()
485	        const domain = url.hostname.replace(/^www\./, '')
486	        refs.value.push({ type: 'web_link', url: text, label: domain, domain } as ParsedRef)
487	      }
488	    } catch { /* 走默认粘贴 */ }
489	    return
490	  }
491	
492	  // 无协议头 → 仅当看起来像域名时才补 https:// 并二次校验
493	  if (looksLikeHost(text)) {
494	    const normalized = 'https://' + text
495	    try {
496	      const url = new URL(normalized)
497	      if (['http:', 'https:'].includes(url.protocol)) {
498	        e.preventDefault()
499	        const domain = url.hostname.replace(/^www\./, '')
500	        refs.value.push({ type: 'web_link', url: normalized, label: domain, domain } as ParsedRef)
501	      }
502	    } catch { /* 走默认粘贴 */ }
503	  }
504	}
505	
506	// ── @ / # 自动补全（统一状态机） ──
507	
508	type AcMode = 'skill' | 'tool' | 'macro' | null
509	
510	const acMode = ref<AcMode>(null)
511	const acFilterText = ref('')
512	const acPosition = ref({ x: 0, y: 0 })
513	const acActiveIndex = ref(0)
514	const acTriggerPos = ref(-1)
515	const acTriggerChar = ref('')
516	
517	const skills = ref<SkillInfo[]>([])
518	const tools = ref<ToolInfo[]>([])
519	const macros = ref<MacroInfo[]>([])
520	
521	/** 当前模式对应的数据源 */
522	const acSource = computed(() =>
523	  acMode.value === 'skill' ? skills.value
524	  : acMode.value === 'tool' ? tools.value
525	  : acMode.value === 'macro' ? macros.value
526	  : []
527	)
528	
529	/** 筛选 + 排序后的候选项 */
530	const acFiltered = computed(() => {
531	  const src = acSource.value
532	  if (!acFilterText.value) return src
533	  const lower = acFilterText.value.toLowerCase()
534	
535	  const scored = src
536	    .map(item => {
537	      const nameLower = item.name.toLowerCase()
538	      if (!nameLower.includes(lower)) return null
539	      const prefix = nameLower.startsWith(lower)
540	      const count = prefix ? 1 : nameLower.split(lower).length - 1
541	      const score = prefix ? 4 : 2
542	      return { item, score, count }
543	    })
544	    .filter((x): x is NonNullable<typeof x> => x !== null)
545	
546	  scored.sort((a, b) => {
547	    if (a.score !== b.score) return b.score - a.score
548	    if (a.count !== b.count) return b.count - a.count
549	    return a.item.name.localeCompare(b.item.name)
550	  })
551	
552	  return scored.map(s => s.item)
553	})
554	
555	async function loadSkills() {
556	  try {
557	    const res = await api.listSkills()
558	    skills.value = res.skills
559	  } catch (e) {
560	    console.error('[ChatInput] 加载技能失败:', e)
561	  }
562	}
563	
564	async function loadTools() {
565	  try {
566	    const res = await api.listTools()
567	    tools.value = res.tools
568	  } catch (e) {
569	    console.error('[ChatInput] 加载工具失败:', e)
570	  }
571	}
572	
573	async function loadMacros() {
574	  try {
575	    const res = await api.listMacros()
576	    macros.value = res.macros
577	  } catch (e) {
578	    console.error('[ChatInput] 加载宏失败:', e)
579	  }
580	}
581	
582	/** 检测 @ / # 触发 */
583	watch(text, () => {
584	  const el = textareaRef.value
585	  if (!el || el !== document.activeElement) return
586	  const val = text.value
587	  const cursorPos = el.selectionStart
588	  const textBeforeCursor = val.slice(0, cursorPos)
589	
590	  // 检查 @、#、!、！，取最近者
591	  let triggerPos = -1
592	  let triggerChar = ''
593	  for (const ch of ['@', '#', '!', '！'] as const) {
594	    const idx = textBeforeCursor.lastIndexOf(ch)
595	    if (idx > triggerPos) {
596	      triggerPos = idx
597	      triggerChar = ch
598	    }
599	  }
600	
601	  const mode: AcMode = triggerChar === '@' ? 'skill' : triggerChar === '#' ? 'tool' : (triggerChar === '!' || triggerChar === '！') ? 'macro' : null
602	
603	  if (triggerPos !== -1 && mode) {
604	    const after = textBeforeCursor.slice(triggerPos + 1)
605	    const charBefore = triggerPos === 0 ? ' ' : textBeforeCursor[triggerPos - 1]
606	    if (!/\w/.test(charBefore)) {
607	      acMode.value = mode
608	      acFilterText.value = after
609	      acTriggerPos.value = triggerPos
610	      acTriggerChar.value = triggerChar
611	      acActiveIndex.value = 0
612	      acPosition.value = calcCursorPixelPos(el, cursorPos)
613	      return
614	    }
615	  }
616	  acMode.value = null
617	})
618	
619	function onKeydown(e: KeyboardEvent) {
620	  // IME 组合态（中文输入法选字中）不拦截任何按键
621	  if (e.isComposing || e.keyCode === 229) return
622	
623	  if (acMode.value) {
624	    const len = acFiltered.value.length
625	    if (e.key === 'Tab') {
626	      e.preventDefault()
627	      confirmItem()
628	      return
629	    }
630	    if (e.key === 'ArrowUp') {
631	      e.preventDefault()
632	      acActiveIndex.value = ((acActiveIndex.value - 1) % len + len) % len
633	      return
634	    }
635	    if (e.key === 'ArrowDown') {
636	      e.preventDefault()
637	      acActiveIndex.value = (acActiveIndex.value + 1) % len
638	      return
639	    }
640	    if (e.key === 'Escape') {
641	      acMode.value = null
642	      return
643	    }
644	  }
645	
646	  // Enter 发送（仅当面板未打开时）
647	  if (e.key === 'Enter' && !e.shiftKey) {
648	    e.preventDefault()
649	    handleSend()
650	  }
651	}
652	
653	function confirmItem() {
654	  const item = acFiltered.value[acActiveIndex.value]
655	  if (!item) return
656	
657	  // 移除触发符及后续文本
658	  const el = textareaRef.value
659	  const cursorPos = el?.selectionStart ?? text.value.length
660	  text.value = text.value.slice(0, acTriggerPos.value) + text.value.slice(cursorPos)
661	
662	  // 创建对应类型的引用
663	  const ref: ParsedRef =
664	    acMode.value === 'skill' ? { type: 'skill', name: item.name, label: item.name }
665	    : acMode.value === 'macro' ? { type: 'macro', name: item.name, label: item.name }
666	    : { type: 'tool', name: item.name, label: item.name }
667	  refs.value.push(ref)
668	
669	  acMode.value = null
670	  nextTick(() => autoResize())
671	}
672	
673	function calcCursorPixelPos(textarea: HTMLTextAreaElement, pos: number): { x: number; y: number } {
674	  const style = getComputedStyle(textarea)
675	  const mirror = document.createElement('div')
676	  mirror.style.cssText = `
677	    position: fixed; top: 0; left: -9999px; visibility: hidden; white-space: pre-wrap;
678	    word-wrap: break-word; overflow-wrap: break-word;
679	    font: ${style.font}; font-size: ${style.fontSize};
680	    letter-spacing: ${style.letterSpacing};
681	    width: ${textarea.clientWidth}px;
682	    padding: ${style.padding};
683	  `
684	  mirror.textContent = textarea.value.slice(0, pos) + '.'
685	  document.body.appendChild(mirror)
686	
687	  const textareaRect = textarea.getBoundingClientRect()
688	  const mirrorRect = mirror.getBoundingClientRect()
689	  const lineHeight = parseInt(style.lineHeight) || 24
690	
691	  // 计算光标所在行相对于 mirror 顶部的位置
692	  const lines = mirror.textContent!.split('\n')
693	  const lastLine = lines[lines.length - 1]
694	  const linePixel = (lines.length - 1) * lineHeight
695	
696	  // 用 span 精确测量最后一行的宽度
697	  const span = document.createElement('span')
698	  span.textContent = lastLine
699	  span.style.cssText = `visibility: hidden; white-space: pre; font: ${style.font}; font-size: ${style.fontSize};`
700	  document.body.appendChild(span)
701	
702	  const x = textareaRect.left + span.getBoundingClientRect().width + parseInt(style.paddingLeft || '0') - 8
703	  const y = textareaRect.top + mirrorRect.height - textarea.scrollTop + 4
704	
705	  document.body.removeChild(mirror)
706	  document.body.removeChild(span)
707	
708	  return { x, y }
709	}
710	
711	// ── LLM 选择器 ──
712	// provider 列表来自全局 store（含重试），消除此前各组件独立请求导致的状态不一致
713	const providerStore = useProviderStore()
714	const providers = computed(() => providerStore.enabledProviders)
715	const selectedProviderId = ref('')
716	const selectedModelName = ref('')
717	const currentModels = ref<string[]>([])
718	const openDropdown = ref<'provider' | 'model' | null>(null)
719	const noProvider = computed(() => providers.value.length === 0)
720	
721	function toggleDropdown(name: 'provider' | 'model') {
722	  openDropdown.value = openDropdown.value === name ? null : name
723	}
724	
725	function selectProvider(id: string) {
726	  selectedProviderId.value = id
727	  openDropdown.value = null
728	  const p = providers.value.find(p => p.id === id)
729	  currentModels.value = p?.models ?? []
730	  selectedModelName.value = currentModels.value[0] || ''
731	  emit('modelChange', selectedProviderId.value, selectedModelName.value)
732	}
733	
734	function selectModel(name: string) {
735	  selectedModelName.value = name
736	  openDropdown.value = null
737	  emit('modelChange', selectedProviderId.value, selectedModelName.value)
738	}
739	
740	function onDocumentClick() {
741	  openDropdown.value = null
742	}
743	onMounted(() => document.addEventListener('click', onDocumentClick))
744	onUnmounted(() => document.removeEventListener('click', onDocumentClick))
745	
746	// 从 store 加载 provider 列表并设置默认选中
747	async function loadProviders() {
748	  await providerStore.loadProviders()
749	  // 优先使用父组件传入的初始值（跨对话持久化）
750	  if (props.initialProviderId) {
751	    const provider = providers.value.find(p => p.id === props.initialProviderId)
752	    if (provider) {
753	      selectedProviderId.value = provider.id
754	      currentModels.value = provider.models ?? []
755	      selectedModelName.value = props.initialModelName && currentModels.value.includes(props.initialModelName)
756	        ? props.initialModelName
757	        : (currentModels.value[0] || '')
758	      // 同步回父组件，确保父组件持有的状态与实际选中一致
759	      emit('modelChange', selectedProviderId.value, selectedModelName.value)
760	      return
761	    }
762	  }
763	  // 默认选中第一个已启用的提供商
764	  if (providers.value.length > 0 && !selectedProviderId.value) {
765	    selectProvider(providers.value[0].id)
766	  }
767	}
768	
769	// 监听 store 中 provider 列表变化（例如 ProvidersView 增删改后刷新 store）
770	watch(providers, (newList) => {
771	  // 如果有初始值且初始值有效，让 loadProviders 处理初始选择，避免竞态覆盖
772	  if (props.initialProviderId && newList.find(p => p.id === props.initialProviderId) && !selectedProviderId.value) {
773	    return
774	  }
775	  if (selectedProviderId.value) {
776	    // 当前选中的 provider 还在列表中
777	    const p = newList.find(p => p.id === selectedProviderId.value)
778	    if (p) {
779	      // 更新 currentModels（provider 的 models 可能被修改过）
780	      const newModels = p.models ?? []
781	      const modelsChanged = JSON.stringify(currentModels.value) !== JSON.stringify(newModels)
782	      if (modelsChanged) {
783	        currentModels.value = newModels
784	        // selectedModelName 不在新 models 中时重置为第一个
785	        if (!newModels.includes(selectedModelName.value)) {
786	          selectedModelName.value = newModels[0] || ''
787	          emit('modelChange', selectedProviderId.value, selectedModelName.value)
788	        }
789	      }
790	    } else {
791	      // 当前选中的 provider 不在新列表中（被删除或禁用），重置选中
792	      selectedProviderId.value = ''
793	      currentModels.value = []
794	      selectedModelName.value = ''
795	      if (newList.length > 0) {
796	        selectProvider(newList[0].id)
797	      }
798	    }
799	  } else if (!selectedProviderId.value && newList.length > 0) {
800	    // 之前没有 provider，现在有了，自动选中第一个
801	    selectProvider(newList[0].id)
802	  }
803	})
804	
805	onMounted(loadProviders)
806	onMounted(loadSkills)
807	onMounted(loadTools)
808	onMounted(loadMacros)
809	
810	function getFileName(fp: string): string {
811	  const parts = fp.replace(/\\/g, '/').split('/')
812	  return parts[parts.length - 1] || fp
813	}
814	
815	function toggleMenu() {
816	  if (props.disabled) return
817	  showMenu.value = !showMenu.value
818	}
819	
820	async function pickFile() {
821	  showMenu.value = false
822	  await _pick('file')
823	}
824	
825	async function pickFolder() {
826	  showMenu.value = false
827	  await _pick('folder')
828	}
829	
830	async function _pick(type: 'file' | 'folder') {
831	  if (loading.value) return
832	  loading.value = true
833	  try {
834	    const path = await selectLocalPath(type)
835	    if (path) {
836	      const refType = type === 'folder' ? 'folder' : 'file'
837	      const idx = refs.value.length
838	      refs.value.push({ type: refType, path, label: getFileName(path) } as ParsedRef)
839	      console.log('[ChatInput] _pick: pushed ref idx=%d type=%s path=%s', idx, refType, path)
840	
841	      // 异步检查路径是否被拒止锚或白名单阻挡
842	      api.checkPathBlocked(path).then(result => {
843	        console.log('[ChatInput] checkPathBlocked result for', path, result)
844	        if (result.blocked) {
845	          // 通过 refs.value[idx] 操作以触发响应式更新
846	          const entry = refs.value[idx] as any
847	          entry.blocked = true
848	          entry.blockedReason = result.reason
849	          console.log('[ChatInput] marked ref %d as blocked, reason: %s', idx, result.reason)
850	        }
851	      }).catch(err => {
852	        console.warn('[ChatInput] checkPathBlocked failed:', err)
853	      })
854	    }
855	  } catch {
856	    // 静默失败
857	  } finally {
858	    loading.value = false
859	  }
860	}
861	
862	async function selectLocalPath(type: 'file' | 'folder'): Promise<string | null> {
863	  if (isTauri()) {
864	    const invoke = (window as any).__TAURI_INTERNALS__?.invoke ?? (window as any).__TAURI__?.core?.invoke
865	    if (invoke) return await invoke('select_path', { kind: type })
866	  }
867	
868	  const data = await api.selectFile(type)
869	  return data.path
870	}
871	
872	// ── 图片处理 ──
873	
874	const IMAGE_EXTS = ['png', 'jpg', 'jpeg', 'gif', 'bmp', 'webp', 'svg']
875	const MAX_IMAGE_SIZE = 20 * 1024 * 1024 // 20MB
876	
877	/** 通过文件选择器选择图片 */
878	async function pickImage() {
879	  showMenu.value = false
880	  const input = document.createElement('input')
881	  input.type = 'file'
882	  input.accept = 'image/*'
883	  input.multiple = true
884	  input.onchange = async () => {
885	    if (!input.files) return
886	    for (const file of Array.from(input.files)) {
887	      await handleImageFile(file)
888	    }
889	  }
890	  input.click()
891	}
892	
893	/** 处理单个图片文件：校验 → 上传 → 添加到 refs */
894	async function handleImageFile(file: File) {
895	  // 校验类型
896	  const ext = file.name.split('.').pop()?.toLowerCase() || ''
897	  if (!file.type.startsWith('image/') && !IMAGE_EXTS.includes(ext)) {
898	    console.warn('[ChatInput] 非图片文件:', file.name)
899	    return
900	  }
901	  // 校验大小
902	  if (file.size > MAX_IMAGE_SIZE) {
903	    console.warn('[ChatInput] 图片过大:', file.size, file.name)
904	    return
905	  }
906	
907	  // 本地预览 URL
908	  const preview = URL.createObjectURL(file)
909	  const label = file.name || 'image'
910	
911	  // 先添加为占位（path 为空），上传完成后更新
912	  const idx = refs.value.length
913	  refs.value.push({ type: 'image', label, path: '', preview } as ImageRef)
914	
915	  try {
916	    const result = await api.uploadImage(file)
917	    // 上传成功，更新 path
918	    const entry = refs.value[idx] as ImageRef
919	    entry.path = result.path
920	    console.log('[ChatInput] image uploaded:', result.path)
921	  } catch (e) {
922	    console.error('[ChatInput] image upload failed:', e)
923	    // 上传失败，移除该引用并释放 preview URL
924	    refs.value.splice(idx, 1)
925	    URL.revokeObjectURL(preview)
926	  }
927	}
928	
929	/** 拖拽进入 */
930	function onDragEnter(e: DragEvent) {
931	  if (!e.dataTransfer?.types.includes('Files')) return
932	  dragCounter++
933	  isDragover.value = true
934	}
935	
936	/** 拖拽经过 */
937	function onDragOver(_e: DragEvent) {
938	  // 保持 isDragover 状态，CSS 显示高亮
939	}
940	
941	/** 拖拽离开 */
942	function onDragLeave(_e: DragEvent) {
943	  dragCounter--
944	  if (dragCounter <= 0) {
945	    dragCounter = 0
946	    isDragover.value = false
947	  }
948	}
949	
950	/** 拖拽放下 */
951	async function onDrop(e: DragEvent) {
952	  isDragover.value = false
953	  dragCounter = 0
954	  const files = e.dataTransfer?.files
955	  if (!files) return
956	  for (const file of Array.from(files)) {
957	    if (file.type.startsWith('image/')) {
958	      await handleImageFile(file)
959	    }
960	  }
961	}
962	
963	function handleSend() {
964	  const msg = text.value.trim()
965	  if ((!msg && imageRefs.value.length === 0) || props.disabled || !props.canSend) return
966	  emit(
967	    'send',
968	    msg,
969	    refs.value,
970	    selectedProviderId.value || undefined,
971	    selectedModelName.value || undefined,
972	    selectedThinkPathId.value || undefined,
973	  )
974	  text.value = ''
975	  // ThinkPath is intentionally one-shot: it is a confirmed preference for this
976	  // request, never an invisible session-level routing policy.
977	  selectedThinkPathId.value = null
978	  // 释放图片预览 URL
979	  for (const r of refs.value) {
980	    if (r.type === 'image' && r.preview.startsWith('blob:')) {
981	      URL.revokeObjectURL(r.preview)
982	    }
983	  }
984	  refs.value = []
985	  nextTick(() => autoResize())
986	}
987	
988	function autoResize() {
989	  const el = textareaRef.value
990	  if (!el) return
991	  // 如果用户手动拖拽过容器高度，不干涉 textarea 高度，交由 flex 布局自动填充
992	  if (customHeight.value !== null) return
993	  el.style.height = 'auto'
994	  el.style.height = Math.min(el.scrollHeight, 160) + 'px'
995	}
996	
997	// ── 拖拽调整输入框高度 ──
998	
999	const customHeight = ref<number | null>(null)
1000	const isResizing = ref(false)
1001	const resizeStartY = ref(0)
1002	const resizeStartHeight = ref(0)
1003	const handleRef = ref<HTMLDivElement | null>(null)
1004	const DEFAULT_INPUT_HEIGHT = 117
1005	const initialHeight = ref(DEFAULT_INPUT_HEIGHT)
1006	
1007	const containerStyle = computed(() => {
1008	  const minHeight = initialHeight.value + 'px'
1009	  if (customHeight.value === null) return { minHeight }
1010	  return { height: customHeight.value + 'px', minHeight }
1011	})
1012	
1013	/** 组件挂载后捕获输入框的初始默认高度，作为拖拽下限 */
1014	onMounted(() => {
1015	  nextTick(() => {
1016	    const el = inputContainerRef.value
1017	    if (el) initialHeight.value = Math.max(DEFAULT_INPUT_HEIGHT, el.clientHeight)
1018	  })
1019	})
1020	
1021	function startResize(e: PointerEvent) {
1022	  const handle = e.currentTarget as HTMLDivElement
1023	  handle.setPointerCapture(e.pointerId)
1024	  handleRef.value = handle
1025	
1026	  isResizing.value = true
1027	  resizeStartY.value = e.clientY
1028	  const el = inputContainerRef.value
1029	  resizeStartHeight.value = el ? el.clientHeight : initialHeight.value
1030	  if (customHeight.value === null) {
1031	    customHeight.value = resizeStartHeight.value
1032	  }
1033	
1034	  // 拖拽时清除 textarea 行内高度，让 CSS height: 100% 接管以填充容器
1035	  if (textareaRef.value) textareaRef.value.style.height = ''
1036	
1037	  handle.addEventListener('pointermove', onResizeMove)
1038	  handle.addEventListener('pointerup', onResizeEnd)
1039	  handle.addEventListener('pointercancel', onResizeEnd)
1040	}
1041	
1042	function onResizeMove(e: PointerEvent) {
1043	  const delta = resizeStartY.value - e.clientY
1044	  const newHeight = Math.max(initialHeight.value, Math.min(600, resizeStartHeight.value + delta))
1045	  customHeight.value = newHeight
1046	}
1047	
1048	function onResizeEnd(e: PointerEvent) {
1049	  isResizing.value = false
1050	  const handle = handleRef.value
1051	  if (handle) {
1052	    handle.releasePointerCapture(e.pointerId)
1053	    handle.removeEventListener('pointermove', onResizeMove)
1054	    handle.removeEventListener('pointerup', onResizeEnd)
1055	    handle.removeEventListener('pointercancel', onResizeEnd)
1056	    handleRef.value = null
1057	  }
1058	}
1059	</script>
1060	
1061	<style scoped>
1062	.chat-input-wrapper {
1063	  padding: 12px 24px 16px;
1064	  background: var(--bg-card);
1065	  position: relative;
1066	}
1067	
1068	/* ── 自定义 Dropdown ── */
1069	.dropdown {
1070	  position: relative;
1071	  display: inline-block;
1072	}
1073	.dropdown-trigger {
1074	  font-size: 0.75em;
1075	  padding: 4px 8px;
1076	  border: 1px solid transparent;
1077	  border-radius: 6px;
1078	  background: transparent;
1079	  color: var(--text-secondary);
1080	  cursor: pointer;
1081	  font-family: inherit;
1082	  white-space: nowrap;
1083	  overflow: hidden;
1084	  text-overflow: ellipsis;
1085	  transition: all 0.15s;
1086	  display: inline-flex;
1087	  align-items: center;
1088	  gap: 4px;
1089	  max-width: 160px;
1090	  flex-shrink: 1;
1091	  min-width: 0;
1092	}
1093	.dropdown-trigger:hover {
1094	  border-color: var(--border);
1095	  background: var(--bg-secondary);
1096	  color: var(--text-primary);
1097	}
1098	.dropdown-trigger.empty {
1099	  color: var(--status-error);
1100	  opacity: 0.7;
1101	}
1102	.dropdown-trigger:focus-visible {
1103	  outline: 1.5px solid var(--accent);
1104	  outline-offset: 2px;
1105	}
1106	.dropdown-option.disabled {
1107	  color: var(--text-secondary);
1108	  font-style: italic;
1109	  cursor: default;
1110	  font-size: 0.8em;
1111	  white-space: normal;
1112	  line-height: 1.4;
1113	}
1114	.dropdown-arrow {
1115	  font-size: 0.6em;
1116	  line-height: 1;
1117	  opacity: 0.5;
1118	  flex-shrink: 0;
1119	}
1120	.dropdown-menu {
1121	  position: absolute;
1122	  bottom: calc(100% + 4px);
1123	  right: 0;
1124	  z-index: 200;
1125	  background: var(--bg-card);
1126	  border: 1px solid var(--border);
1127	  border-radius: 8px;
1128	  box-shadow: var(--shadow-lg);
1129	  min-width: 140px;
1130	  max-height: 200px;
1131	  overflow-y: auto;
1132	  padding: 4px;
1133	}
1134	.dropdown-option {
1135	  display: block;
1136	  width: 100%;
1137	  text-align: left;
1138	  padding: 6px 10px;
1139	  border: none;
1140	  border-radius: 6px;
1141	  background: transparent;
1142	  color: var(--text-primary);
1143	  font-size: 0.85em;
1144	  cursor: pointer;
1145	  font-family: inherit;
1146	  white-space: nowrap;
1147	  transition: background 0.1s;
1148	}
1149	.dropdown-option:hover {
1150	  background: var(--bg-secondary);
1151	}
1152	.dropdown-option.selected {
1153	  color: var(--accent);
1154	  font-weight: 600;
1155	  background: color-mix(in srgb, var(--accent) 6%, transparent);
1156	}
1157	
1158	/* 引用标签条 */
1159	.file-refs-bar {
