#### Tool: Read

> Read: `D:\Maxma\MaxmaHere\web\src\composables\useChat.ts`

**Output:**

```json
1	import { computed, watch, onUnmounted, ref, type Ref } from 'vue'
2	import type { ClientMessage, ServerEvent, ChatTurn, ToolCall, ThinkingBlock, TurnEvent, ContextUsage, AskUserEvent, ArtifactEvent, PlanProposedEvent, PlanStepStartEvent, PlanStepEndEvent, PlanStepErrorEvent, PlanCompletedEvent, DeferredSubagentSubmittedEvent, MemoryToolEvent, MemoryToolStartEvent, MemoryToolEndEvent, MemoryToolErrorEvent, MemoryStartEvent, MemoryDoneEvent } from '@/types'
3	import type { ThinkPathId } from '@/utils/thinkPath'
4	import { useChatStore } from '@/stores/chat'
5	import { useSessionStore } from '@/stores/session'
6	import { buildFlatMessage, buildTimestamp, parseReferences } from '@/utils/references'
7	import type { ParsedRef } from '@/utils/references'
8	import { getToken, ensureTokenLoaded, resetToken, api } from '@/api'
9	import { ensurePortLoaded, waitForBackend, getWsBase } from '@/utils/env'
10	import { chatSessionAliveCache } from '@/composables/sessionAliveCache'
11	import { useWorkbenchStore } from '@/stores/workbench'
12	/** 匹配旧格式尾缀（用于 localStorage 迁移） */
13	const TIME_SUFFIX_RE = /（\d{4}-\d{2}-\d{2} \w{3} \d{2}:\d{2}）$/
14	
15	export const TURNS_KEY_PREFIX = 'maxma_turns_'
16	
17	/** 将旧格式 turn（userMessage 含 __refs__ 和时间尾缀）迁移为新格式 */
18	function migrateLegacyTurn(turn: any): ChatTurn {
19	  if (Array.isArray(turn.refs)) {
20	    return { memoryEvents: [], ...turn } as ChatTurn
21	  }
22	  // 旧格式：从 userMessage 中提取 refs 和时间尾缀
23	  const prevMsg = (turn.userMessage ?? '') as string
24	  const { cleanText, refs } = parseReferences(prevMsg || '')
25	  const text = refs.length > 0 ? cleanText : prevMsg.replace(TIME_SUFFIX_RE, '')
26	  return { ...turn, userMessage: text, refs, memoryEvents: [] }
27	}
28	
29	// 从 localStorage 恢复所有会话的消息缓存（页面刷新后仍保留）
30	function loadAllTurnsFromStorage(): Map<string, ChatTurn[]> {
31	  const map = new Map<string, ChatTurn[]>()
32	  const keysFound: string[] = []
33	  for (let i = 0; i < localStorage.length; i++) {
34	    const key = localStorage.key(i)
35	    if (key && key.startsWith(TURNS_KEY_PREFIX)) {
36	      keysFound.push(key)
37	      const sid = key.slice(TURNS_KEY_PREFIX.length)
38	      try {
39	        const raw = localStorage.getItem(key) || '[]'
40	        const data = JSON.parse(raw)
41	        if (Array.isArray(data)) {
42	          const migrated = data.map(migrateLegacyTurn)
43	          console.log(`[useChat:load] 从 localStorage 加载会话 ${sid}: ${data.length} 条 turn (迁移 ${migrated.length}), 序列化长度 ${raw.length}`)
44	          map.set(sid, migrated)
45	        } else {
46	          console.warn(`[useChat:load] 键 ${key} 的数据不是数组，跳过`)
47	        }
48	      } catch (e) {
49	        console.error(`[useChat:load] 解析 localStorage 键 ${key} 失败:`, e)
50	      }
51	    }
52	  }
53	  console.log(`[useChat:load] localStorage 中共 ${keysFound.length} 个 ${TURNS_KEY_PREFIX}* 键, 恢复 ${map.size} 个会话的缓存`)
54	  return map
55	}
56	
57	function saveTurnsToStorage(sid: string, data: ChatTurn[]) {
58	  const key = TURNS_KEY_PREFIX + sid
59	  const tryWrite = () => {
60	    const serialized = JSON.stringify(data)
61	    const size = new Blob([serialized]).size
62	    localStorage.setItem(key, serialized)
63	    return size
64	  }
65	  try {
66	    const size = tryWrite()
67	    console.log(`[useChat:save] 保存会话 ${sid} 到 localStorage: ${data.length} 条 turn, 约 ${(size / 1024).toFixed(1)} KB, key=${key}`)
68	  } catch (e) {
69	    // 修复：配额超限后无清理 → 后续所有保存全部静默失败，用户无感知地丢失持久化。
70	    // 策略：删除其他会话中最早（按 localStorage 键的写入顺序近似）的缓存，腾出空间后重试一次。
71	    if (e instanceof DOMException && (e.name === 'QuotaExceededError' || e.name === 'NS_ERROR_DOM_QUOTA_REACHED')) {
72	      console.warn(`[useChat:save] localStorage 配额超限，尝试清理其他会话缓存后重试 (key=${key})`)
73	      // 收集除当前 sid 外的所有 turns 缓存键，按"最近未使用"策略删除最旧的
74	      const otherKeys: string[] = []
75	      for (let i = 0; i < localStorage.length; i++) {
76	        const k = localStorage.key(i)
77	        if (k && k.startsWith(TURNS_KEY_PREFIX) && k !== key) {
78	          otherKeys.push(k)
79	        }
80	      }
81	      // 删除一半最旧的缓存（最多保留一半），按键在 localStorage 中的顺序（近似 FIFO）
82	      const toEvict = otherKeys.slice(0, Math.max(1, Math.ceil(otherKeys.length / 2)))
83	      for (const k of toEvict) {
84	        localStorage.removeItem(k)
85	        const evictedSid = k.slice(TURNS_KEY_PREFIX.length)
86	        turnsCache.delete(evictedSid)
87	        console.warn(`[useChat:save] 配额压力下清理会话 ${evictedSid} 的缓存`)
88	      }
89	      // 重试一次
90	      try {
91	        const size = tryWrite()
92	        console.log(`[useChat:save] 清理后重试成功: 会话 ${sid}, ${data.length} 条 turn, 约 ${(size / 1024).toFixed(1)} KB`)
93	      } catch (e2) {
94	        console.error(`[useChat:save] 清理后仍无法保存会话 ${sid} (key=${key}):`, e2)
95	        // 最后手段：移除当前会话自己的缓存键，避免留下部分写入的脏数据
96	        try { localStorage.removeItem(key) } catch { /* ignore */ }
97	      }
98	    } else {
99	      console.error(`[useChat:save] 保存会话 ${sid} 到 localStorage 失败 (key=${key}):`, e)
100	      let total = 0
101	      for (let i = 0; i < localStorage.length; i++) {
102	        const k = localStorage.key(i)
103	        if (k) total += k.length + (localStorage.getItem(k) || '').length
104	      }
105	      console.warn(`[useChat:save] localStorage 当前总估算用量: ${(total * 2 / 1024).toFixed(1)} KB`)
106	    }
107	  }
108	}
109	
110	export function removeTurnsFromStorage(sid: string) {
111	  localStorage.removeItem(TURNS_KEY_PREFIX + sid)
112	}
113	
114	export function disconnectSession(sid: string) {
115	  const chatStore = useChatStore()
116	  const ch = chatStore.channels.get(sid)
117	  if (!ch) return
118	  if (ch.reconnectTimer) {
119	    clearTimeout(ch.reconnectTimer)
120	    ch.reconnectTimer = null
121	  }
122	  if (ch.ws) {
123	    ch.ws.onclose = null
124	    ch.ws.close()
125	    ch.ws = null
126	  }
127	  ch.connected = false
128	  ch.initialized = false
129	  chatStore.removeChannel(sid)
130	  chatSessionAliveCache.remove(sid)
131	}
132	
133	// Lazy store accessors — Pinia 在模块加载时尚未安装，只能在运行时调用
134	function getChatStore() { return useChatStore() }
135	function getSessionStore() { return useSessionStore() }
136	
137	const refreshSessions = () => getSessionStore().refreshSessions().catch(() => {/* 保留现有列表，静默失败 */})
138	const switchSession = (id: string) => getSessionStore().switchSession(id)
139	// 模块级缓存：首次 import 时从 localStorage 恢复所有会话的历史消息
140	// （修复：此前为 new Map()，导致 loadAllTurnsFromStorage 成为死代码，
141	//   页面刷新后 turnsCache 为空，旧会话点击后无历史显示）
142	const turnsCache = loadAllTurnsFromStorage()
143	
144	// ── SessionChannel 定义 ────────────────────────────────────
145	
146	interface SessionChannel {
147	  ws: WebSocket | null
148	  connected: boolean
149	  isStreaming: boolean
150	  isAwaitingUser: boolean
151	  turns: ChatTurn[]
152	  currentTurn: ChatTurn | null
153	  error: string | null
154	  errorCategory: 'user_error' | 'tool_error' | 'system_error' | 'rate_limit' | 'cancelled' | null
155	  errorTraceId: string | null
156	  contextUsage: ContextUsage | null
157	  taskTrackerData: Record<string, unknown> | null
158	  reconnectTimer: ReturnType<typeof setTimeout> | null
159	  reconnectAttempts: number  // 重连次数，用于计算退避延迟
160	  initialized: boolean
161	  _awaitingToolName: string | null
162	  parentSessionId: string | null  // sub-agent 用：完成时切回主会话
163	  privateMode: boolean
164	  autoApprove: boolean
165	}
166	
167	// Lazy export — 运行时才访问 Store（Pinia 在模块加载时尚未安装）
168	export function getAllSessionStatuses() { return getChatStore().allSessionStatuses }
169	
170	function getOrCreateChannel(sid: string): SessionChannel {
171	  return getChatStore().getOrCreateChannel(sid) as SessionChannel
172	}
173	
174	function persistTurns(sid: string) {
175	  const ch = getChatStore().channels.get(sid)
176	  if (!ch) {
177	    console.warn(`[useChat:persist] 跳过保存 sid="${sid}": 通道不存在`)
178	    return
179	  }
180	  const snapshot = [...ch.turns]
181	  console.log(`[useChat:persist] 持久化会话 ${sid}: ${snapshot.length} 条 turn`)
182	  turnsCache.set(sid, snapshot)
183	  saveTurnsToStorage(sid, snapshot)
184	}
185	
186	// ── WebSocket 生命周期（每 Session 独立管理） ──────────────
187	
188	/** 会话 ID 格式验证：由后端 uuid.uuid4().hex 生成（32 位 hex） */
189	const SID_RE = /^[0-9a-f]{32}$/i
190	
191	function isValidSessionId(sid: string): boolean {
192	  return SID_RE.test(sid)
193	}
194	
195	/** 计算指数退避延迟（毫秒）：1s → 2s → 4s → 8s → ... → 最大 30s */
196	function getReconnectDelay(attempts: number): number {
197	  const base = 1000
198	  const maxDelay = 30000
199	  return Math.min(base * Math.pow(2, attempts), maxDelay)
200	}
201	
202	/** 最大重连次数，超过后停止重连 */
203	const MAX_RECONNECT_ATTEMPTS = 20
204	
205	async function connectSession(sid: string) {
206	  if (!isValidSessionId(sid)) {
207	    console.error(`[useChat] 拒绝连接：非法的 sessionId "${sid}"`)
208	    return
209	  }
210	  const ch = getOrCreateChannel(sid)
211	  // 防止重复连接：如果已有 OPEN 或 CONNECTING 的 WS，跳过
212	  if (ch.ws && (ch.ws.readyState === WebSocket.OPEN || ch.ws.readyState === WebSocket.CONNECTING)) {
213	    return
214	  }
215	
216	  // 确保端口已加载（Tauri 环境下 sidecar 端口可能不是默认 8000）
217	  await ensurePortLoaded()
218	
219	  // 等待后端就绪（PyInstaller onefile 启动可能需要数秒，孤儿 sidecar 被清理后
220	  // 新 sidecar 需要时间启动）。waitForBackend 在后端已就绪时立即返回，仅在后端
221	  // 未启动时重试等待，避免前端在后端启动期间反复失败。
222	  await waitForBackend()
223	
224	  // 确保 Token 已加载（桌面应用运行时获取）
225	  await ensureTokenLoaded()
226	  const token = getToken()
227	  if (!token) {
228	    ch.connected = false
229	    ch.error = '连接失败：未能获取认证令牌'
230	    if (ch.reconnectAttempts >= MAX_RECONNECT_ATTEMPTS) {
231	      return
232	    }
233	    const delay = getReconnectDelay(ch.reconnectAttempts)
234	    ch.reconnectAttempts++
235	    ch.reconnectTimer = setTimeout(() => connectSession(sid), delay)
236	    return
237	  }
238	  const url = `${getWsBase()}/ws/chat/${sid}`
239	  ch.ws = new WebSocket(url, [token])
240	
241	  ch.ws.onopen = () => {
242	    ch.connected = true
243	    ch.reconnectAttempts = 0  // 连接成功，重置退避计数
244	    ch.error = null  // 清除连接错误状态
245	    if (ch.reconnectTimer) {
246	      clearTimeout(ch.reconnectTimer)
247	      ch.reconnectTimer = null
248	    }
249	    console.log(`[useChat] WS connected: session=${sid}`)
250	    // 修复：重连后若上一轮 currentTurn 仍卡住（WS 中断时未收到 done/error），
251	    // 必须清理否则 isStreaming 永久为 true，且中断的轮次数据会因下次 send 被覆盖而丢失。
252	    // 后端 WS 断开时已 cancel agent_task，所以这个 currentTurn 永远等不到 done 事件。
253	    if (ch.isStreaming && ch.currentTurn) {
254	      const interrupted = ch.currentTurn
255	      console.warn(`[useChat] 重连检测到中断的轮次 (turn.id=${interrupted.id}), 推入 turns 并重置状态`)
256	      // 保留已生成的部分内容（用户能看到中断点），标记未完成
257	      if (!interrupted.finalAnswer) {
258	        interrupted.finalAnswer = '（连接中断，回复未完成）'
259	      }
260	      ch.turns.push(interrupted)
261	      ch.currentTurn = null
262	      ch.isStreaming = false
263	      ch.isAwaitingUser = false
264	      ch._awaitingToolName = null
265	      if (!ch.privateMode) {
266	        persistTurns(sid)
267	      }
268	    }
269	  }
270	
271	  ch.ws.onclose = (event) => {
272	    ch.connected = false
273	    // 认证失败（Token 过期/轮换）— 刷新 Token 后重连
274	    if (event.code === 4001) {
275	      console.log(`[useChat] WS auth failure (4001), refreshing token...`)
276	      resetToken()  // 强制下次请求重新获取 Token
277	    }
278	    // 超过最大重连次数，停止重连
279	    if (ch.reconnectAttempts >= MAX_RECONNECT_ATTEMPTS) {
280	      console.error(`[useChat] WS 已达最大重连次数 (${MAX_RECONNECT_ATTEMPTS})，停止重连`)
281	      ch.error = '连接失败：已达最大重连次数，请刷新页面重试'
282	      return
283	    }
284	    // 指数退避重连
285	    const delay = getReconnectDelay(ch.reconnectAttempts)
286	    ch.reconnectAttempts++
287	    console.log(`[useChat] WS closed: session=${sid}, reconnecting in ${delay}ms (attempt ${ch.reconnectAttempts})`)
288	    ch.reconnectTimer = setTimeout(() => connectSession(sid), delay)
289	  }
290	
291	  ch.ws.onerror = () => {
292	    // onerror 后通常会触发 onclose，退避重连在 onclose 中处理
293	    console.warn(`[useChat] WS error: session=${sid}`)
294	  }
295	
296	  ch.ws.onmessage = (event) => {
297	    try {
298	      const msg: ServerEvent = JSON.parse(event.data)
299	      console.log('[useChat] WS event received:', msg.type, 'session:', sid, msg.type === 'ask_user' ? {
300	        tool_name: (msg as AskUserEvent).payload.tool_name,
301	        interaction_id: (msg as AskUserEvent).payload.interaction_id,
302	      } : '')
303	      handleEventForChannel(sid, msg)
304	    } catch (e) {
305	      console.error('[useChat] WS message parse/handle error:', e)
306	    }
307	  }
308	}
309	
310	export function ensureConnected(sid: string) {
311	  if (!sid) {
312	    console.warn(`[useChat:ensureConnected] 跳过空 sid`)
313	    return
314	  }
315	  if (!isValidSessionId(sid)) {
316	    console.error(`[useChat:ensureConnected] 拒绝连接：非法的 sessionId "${sid}"`)
317	    return
318	  }
319	  const ch = getOrCreateChannel(sid)
320	  if (ch.initialized) {
321	    console.log(`[useChat:ensureConnected] 会话 ${sid} 已初始化, 跳过`)
322	    return
323	  }
324	  console.log(`[useChat:ensureConnected] 初始化会话 ${sid} 的 WebSocket 连接`)
325	  ch.initialized = true
326	  connectSession(sid)
327	}
328	
329	// ── 事件路由 ──────────────────────────────────────────────
330	
331	function handleEventForChannel(sid: string, event: ServerEvent) {
332	  const ch = getChatStore().channels.get(sid)
333	  if (!ch) return
334	
335	  // context_usage 可以在无活跃轮次时接收（如连接初始化）
336	  if (event.type === 'context_usage') {
337	    ch.contextUsage = event.payload
338	    return
339	  }
340	
341	  // context_compressed：上下文压缩完成通知（可能在无活跃轮次时到达，如手动压缩）
342	  if (event.type === 'context_compressed') {
343	    const payload = event.payload
344	    // 更新上下文用量占比（后端 context_usage_after 为 0-1 浮点数，转为百分比）
345	    if (payload.context_usage_after !== undefined && ch.contextUsage) {
346	      ch.contextUsage = {
347	        ...ch.contextUsage,
348	        usage_percent: Math.round(payload.context_usage_after * 1000) / 10,
349	      }
350	    }
351	    // 在当前 turn 事件流中追加压缩通知
352	    if (ch.currentTurn) {
353	      ch.currentTurn.events.push({
354	        kind: 'system',
355	        detail: 'context_compressed',
356	        content: `上下文已压缩：移除 ${payload.removed_count ?? 0} 条消息` +
357	          (payload.summary_preview ? `，摘要：${payload.summary_preview}` : ''),
358	        timestamp: Date.now(),
359	      })
360	    }
361	    return
362	  }
363	
364	  // sub_session_created 可能在任何时候到达（主 Agent 调用 call_sub_agent）
365	  if (event.type === 'sub_session_created') {
366	    const subId = event.payload.sub_session_id
367	    const parentId = event.payload.parent_session_id
368	    void refreshSessions()
369	    ensureConnected(subId)
370	
371	    // 初始化子会话的 currentTurn，否则子 Agent 推送的所有事件都被丢弃
372	    const subCh = getOrCreateChannel(subId)
373	    subCh.parentSessionId = parentId
374	    subCh.isStreaming = true
375	    subCh.currentTurn = {
376	      id: crypto.randomUUID(),
377	      userMessage: event.payload.task || '(子 Agent 任务)',
378	      refs: [],
379	      events: [],
380	      memoryEvents: [],
381	      finalAnswer: null,
382	    }
383	
384	    void switchSession(subId)
385	    return
386	  }
387	
388	  // Deferred mode deliberately sends only an opaque ID. The card resolves the
389	  // browser-safe run projection lazily instead of caching task/scope details.
390	  if (event.type === 'deferred_subagent_submitted') {
391	    const submitted = event as DeferredSubagentSubmittedEvent
392	    const runId = submitted.payload.run_id
393	    if (ch.currentTurn && runId && !ch.currentTurn.deferredRunIds?.includes(runId)) {
394	      ch.currentTurn.deferredRunIds = [...(ch.currentTurn.deferredRunIds ?? []), runId]
395	    }
396	    return
397	  }
398	
399	  // memory_tool_* / memory_start / memory_done 可能在 done 事件之后到达（currentTurn 已清空），
400	  // 必须在 const turn = ch.currentTurn 守卫之前处理，通过 turn_id 自行查找目标。
401	  if (event.type === 'memory_start' || event.type === 'memory_tool_start' || event.type === 'memory_tool_end'
402	    || event.type === 'memory_tool_error' || event.type === 'memory_done') {
403	    handleMemoryToolEvent(ch, sid, event)
404	    return
405	  }
406	
407	  const turn = ch.currentTurn
408	  if (!turn) return
409	
410	  switch (event.type) {
411	    case 'thinking_start':
412	      turn.events.push({ kind: 'thinking', tokens: '', done: false, becameAnswer: false })
413	      break
414	
415	    case 'token': {
416	      const lastThink = findLastThinking(turn.events)
417	      if (lastThink) {
418	        lastThink.tokens += event.payload.token
419	      }
420	      break
421	    }
422	
423	    case 'thinking_end': {
424	      const lastThink = findLastThinking(turn.events)
425	      if (lastThink) {
426	        lastThink.done = true
427	      }
428	      break
429	    }
430	
431	    case 'tool_start': {
432	      console.log(`[useChat] tool_start: "${event.payload.tool_name}"`, { input: event.payload.input, session: sid })
433	      // 标记上一个 thinking 块为 consumed（工具调用前的中间思考，UI 不渲染）
434	      const lastThink = findLastThinking(turn.events)
435	      if (lastThink && !lastThink.becameAnswer) {
436	        lastThink.consumed = true
437	      }
438	      // ApprovalToolNode 场景：ask_user(approval) 事件先到达时已创建占位 tool event，
439	      // 此时 tool_start 到达应更新该 event 的 input（后端 tool_start 携带的 input 更准确），
440	      // 而不是重复 push 一个新的 tool event。
441	      const existingApprovalTool = findRunningTool(turn.events, event.payload.tool_name)
442	      if (existingApprovalTool && existingApprovalTool.interaction?.mode === 'approval') {
443	        console.log('[useChat] tool_start: 复用已存在的 approval 占位 tool event，更新 input')
444	        existingApprovalTool.input = event.payload.input
445	        break
446	      }
447	      turn.events.push({
448	        kind: 'tool',
449	        name: event.payload.tool_name,
450	        input: event.payload.input,
451	        output: null,
452	        elapsed: null,
453	        status: 'running',
454	      })
455	      break
456	    }
457	
458	    case 'tool_end': {
459	      const tc = findRunningTool(turn.events, event.payload.tool_name)
460	      if (tc) {
461	        tc.output = event.payload.output
462	        tc.elapsed = event.payload.elapsed
463	        tc.status = 'done'
464	        if (event.payload.tool_data) {
465	          tc.toolData = event.payload.tool_data
466	          if (event.payload.tool_name === 'task_tracker' && event.payload.tool_data) {
467	            ch.taskTrackerData = event.payload.tool_data as Record<string, unknown>
468	          }
469	        }
470	        console.log(`[useChat] tool_end: "${event.payload.tool_name}"`, {
471	          output_len: (event.payload.output || '').length,
472	          output_preview: (event.payload.output || '').slice(0, 100),
473	          has_tool_data: !!event.payload.tool_data,
474	          elapsed: event.payload.elapsed,
475	          session: sid,
476	        })
477	      }
478	      // ask_user 工具执行完毕 → 用户已回应，回到工作态
479	      if (ch.isAwaitingUser && event.payload.tool_name === ch._awaitingToolName) {
480	        ch.isAwaitingUser = false
481	        ch._awaitingToolName = null
482	      }
483	      break
484	    }
485	
486	    case 'tool_error': {
487	      const tc = findRunningTool(turn.events, event.payload.tool_name)
488	      if (tc) {
489	        tc.status = 'error'
490	      }
491	      break
492	    }
493	
494	    case 'answer': {
495	      const lastThink = findLastThinking(turn.events)
496	      if (lastThink) {
497	        lastThink.becameAnswer = true
498	        lastThink.tokens = event.payload.content
499	      }
500	      turn.finalAnswer = event.payload.content
501	      break
502	    }
503	
504	    case 'done':
505	      ch.isAwaitingUser = false
506	      ch._awaitingToolName = null
507	      if (event.payload.context_usage) {
508	        ch.contextUsage = event.payload.context_usage
509	      }
510	      // 存储后端 turn_id，用于关联后台记忆 consumer 的事件
511	      if (ch.currentTurn && (event.payload as Record<string, unknown>).turn_id) {
512	        ch.currentTurn.turnId = (event.payload as Record<string, unknown>).turn_id as string
513	        console.log(`[ltm-fe] turnId set on turn.id=${ch.currentTurn.id}: ${ch.currentTurn.turnId}`)
514	      }
515	      if (ch.currentTurn) {
516	        const turnToFinalize = ch.currentTurn
517	        const lastThink = findLastThinking(turnToFinalize.events)
518	        const trackBecame = lastThink?.becameAnswer
519	        console.log(`[useChat:done] 会话 ${sid}: becameAnswer=${trackBecame}, events=${turnToFinalize.events.length}, finalAnswer=${turnToFinalize.finalAnswer?.slice(0, 50) ?? 'null'}`)
520	        ch.turns.push(turnToFinalize)
521	        if (ch.currentTurn?.id === turnToFinalize.id) {
522	          ch.currentTurn = null
523	        }
524	        ch.isStreaming = false
525	        if (!ch.privateMode) {
526	          persistTurns(sid)
527	        }
528	        void refreshSessions()  // 轮次结束，刷新会话列表以更新 message_count
529	      } else {
530	        console.warn(`[useChat:done] 会话 ${sid} 的 done 事件到达时 currentTurn 为 null`)
531	        ch.isStreaming = false
532	      }
533	      // 子 Agent 完成 → 自动切回主会话
534	      if (ch.parentSessionId) {
535	        setTimeout(() => switchSession(ch.parentSessionId!), 500)
536	      }
537	      break
538	
539	    case 'error':
540	      ch.isAwaitingUser = false
541	      ch._awaitingToolName = null
542	      ch.error = event.payload.message
543	      ch.errorCategory = event.payload.category ?? null
544	      ch.errorTraceId = event.payload.trace_id ?? null
545	      ch.isStreaming = false
546	      console.warn(`[useChat] error: ${event.payload.code} (${event.payload.category ?? 'unknown'})`, event.payload.message)
547	      break
548	
549	    case 'pong':
550	      break
551	
552	    case 'ask_user': {
553	      const ae = event as AskUserEvent
554	      const mode = ae.payload.mode
555	      ch.isAwaitingUser = true
556	      ch._awaitingToolName = ae.payload.tool_name
557	      console.log('[useChat] received ask_user event:', {
558	        tool_name: ae.payload.tool_name,
559	        question: ae.payload.question?.slice(0, 50),
560	        mode,
561	        interaction_id: ae.payload.interaction_id,
562	        session: sid,
563	      })
564	      let runningTool = findRunningTool(turn.events, ae.payload.tool_name)
565	      console.log('[useChat] findRunningTool result:', runningTool ? {
566	        name: runningTool.name,
567	        status: runningTool.status,
568	        has_interaction: !!runningTool.interaction,
569	      } : 'NOT FOUND')
570	      // ApprovalToolNode 场景：ask_user 事件先于 tool_start 到达（工具尚未执行，等待审批），
571	      // 此时 runningTool 不存在，需先创建一个 running 状态的 tool event 承载 interaction 数据，
572	      // 待用户批准后 ApprovalToolNode 才执行工具，后续 tool_start/tool_end 会通过 findRunningTool
573	      // 找到这个已存在的 event 并填充 output/elapsed。
574	      if (!runningTool && mode === 'approval') {
575	        console.log('[useChat] approval mode: runningTool 不存在，创建占位 tool event 承载 interaction')
576	        turn.events.push({
577	          kind: 'tool',
578	          name: ae.payload.tool_name,
579	          input: ae.payload.tool_input ? JSON.stringify(ae.payload.tool_input, null, 2) : '',
580	          output: null,
581	          elapsed: null,
582	          status: 'running',
583	        })
584	        runningTool = findRunningTool(turn.events, ae.payload.tool_name)
585	      }
586	      if (runningTool) {
587	        runningTool.interaction = {
588	          question: ae.payload.question,
589	          mode,
590	          options: ae.payload.options,
591	          interactionId: ae.payload.interaction_id,
592	          submitted: false,
593	          code: ae.payload.code,
594	          detail: ae.payload.detail,
595	          // 审批模式特有字段
596	          risk_level: mode === 'approval' ? ae.payload.risk_level : undefined,
597	          tool_input: mode === 'approval' ? ae.payload.tool_input : undefined,
598	        }
599	      }
600	      break
601	    }
602	
603	    case 'artifact': {
604	      // Artifacts are only accepted by the strict store guard and only shown
605	      // for the active session, preventing a background session from moving
606	      // a user's workbench focus.
607	      if (sid === getSessionStore().sessionId) {
608	        useWorkbenchStore().addArtifact((event as ArtifactEvent).payload)
609	      }
610	      break
611	    }
612	
613	    case 'plan_proposed': {
614	      const pe = event as PlanProposedEvent
615	      console.log('[useChat] received plan_proposed:', {
616	        plan_id: pe.payload.plan_id,
617	        steps: pe.payload.steps.length,
618	        session: sid,
619	      })
620	      // 将计划卡片附加到当前正在执行的 turn（不是已完成的 turn）
621	      const targetTurn = ch.currentTurn
622	      if (targetTurn) {
623	        targetTurn.planCard = {
624	          planId: pe.payload.plan_id,
625	          steps: pe.payload.steps,
626	          planText: pe.payload.plan_text,
627	          status: 'pending',
628	          currentStepIndex: -1,
629	          stepStatuses: {},
630	          failureCount: 0,
631	          replanCount: 0,
632	        }
633	      }
634	      break
635	    }
636	
637	    case 'plan_step_start': {
638	      const se = event as PlanStepStartEvent
639	      const targetTurn = ch.currentTurn
640	      if (targetTurn?.planCard) {
641	        targetTurn.planCard.status = 'running'
642	        targetTurn.planCard.currentStepIndex = se.payload.step_index
643	        if (!targetTurn.planCard.stepStatuses) targetTurn.planCard.stepStatuses = {}
644	        targetTurn.planCard.stepStatuses[String(se.payload.step_index)] = 'running'
645	        if (se.payload.tool_hint && targetTurn.planCard.toolHints) {
646	          targetTurn.planCard.toolHints[String(se.payload.step_index)] = se.payload.tool_hint
647	        } else if (se.payload.tool_hint) {
648	          targetTurn.planCard.toolHints = { [String(se.payload.step_index)]: se.payload.tool_hint }
649	        }
650	      }
651	      break
652	    }
653	
654	    case 'plan_step_end': {
655	      const se = event as PlanStepEndEvent
656	      const targetTurn = ch.currentTurn
657	      if (targetTurn?.planCard) {
658	        if (!targetTurn.planCard.stepStatuses) targetTurn.planCard.stepStatuses = {}
659	        targetTurn.planCard.stepStatuses[String(se.payload.step_index)] = se.payload.status
660	      }
661	      break
662	    }
663	
664	    case 'plan_step_error': {
665	      const se = event as PlanStepErrorEvent
666	      const targetTurn = ch.currentTurn
667	      if (targetTurn?.planCard) {
668	        if (!targetTurn.planCard.stepStatuses) targetTurn.planCard.stepStatuses = {}
669	        targetTurn.planCard.stepStatuses[String(se.payload.step_index)] = 'failed'
670	        targetTurn.planCard.failureCount = (targetTurn.planCard.failureCount || 0) + 1
671	        if (se.payload.replanning) {
672	          targetTurn.planCard.status = 'replanning'
673	          targetTurn.planCard.replanCount = (targetTurn.planCard.replanCount || 0) + 1
674	        } else if (se.payload.skipped) {
675	          targetTurn.planCard.stepStatuses[String(se.payload.step_index)] = 'skipped'
676	        } else {
677	          targetTurn.planCard.status = 'failed'
678	        }
679	      }
680	      break
681	    }
682	
683	    case 'plan_completed': {
684	      const ce = event as PlanCompletedEvent
685	      const targetTurn = ch.currentTurn
686	      if (targetTurn?.planCard) {
687	        targetTurn.planCard.status = 'approved'  // 保持已确认状态
688	        targetTurn.planCard.currentStepIndex = ce.payload.summary.total_steps
689	        if (ce.payload.summary.statuses) {
690	          targetTurn.planCard.stepStatuses = { ...ce.payload.summary.statuses }
691	        }
692	        targetTurn.planCard.failureCount = ce.payload.summary.failure_count
693	        targetTurn.planCard.replanCount = ce.payload.summary.replan_count
694	      }
695	      break
696	    }
697	
698	  }
699	}
700	
701	/** 后台记忆 consumer 事件处理（在 done 后 currentTurn=null 时也能通过 turn_id 找到目标）。 */
702	function handleMemoryToolEvent(ch: SessionChannel, sid: string, event: ServerEvent): void {
703	  if (event.type === 'memory_start') {
704	    const me = event as MemoryStartEvent
705	    console.log(`[ltm-fe] memory_start session=${sid} turn_id=${me.payload.turn_id}`)
706	    const targetTurn = findTurnByBackendId(ch, me.payload.turn_id)
707	    if (!targetTurn) { console.log(`[ltm-fe] NO turn found for ${me.payload.turn_id}`); return }
708	    if (!targetTurn.memoryEvents) targetTurn.memoryEvents = []
709	    targetTurn.memoryEvents.push({
710	      kind: 'memory_tool', name: 'memory_processing', input: '', output: null, elapsed: null, status: 'running',
711	    })
712	    return
713	  }
714	  if (event.type === 'memory_tool_start') {
715	    const me = event as MemoryToolStartEvent
716	    if (me.payload.tool_name === 'read_memories') return  // 纯读取不显示
717	    console.log(`[ltm-fe] memory_tool_start session=${sid} turn_id=${me.payload.turn_id} tool=${me.payload.tool_name}`)
718	    const targetTurn = findTurnByBackendId(ch, me.payload.turn_id)
719	    if (!targetTurn) { console.log(`[ltm-fe] NO turn found for ${me.payload.turn_id}`); return }
720	    targetTurn.memoryEvents?.push({
721	      kind: 'memory_tool', name: me.payload.tool_name, input: me.payload.input,
722	      output: null, elapsed: null, status: 'running',
723	    })
724	    return
725	  }
726	  if (event.type === 'memory_tool_end') {
727	    const me = event as MemoryToolEndEvent
728	    if (me.payload.tool_name === 'read_memories') return  // 纯读取不显示
729	    console.log(`[ltm-fe] memory_tool_end session=${sid} turn_id=${me.payload.turn_id} tool=${me.payload.tool_name}`)
730	    const targetTurn = findTurnByBackendId(ch, me.payload.turn_id)
731	    if (!targetTurn) { console.log(`[ltm-fe] NO turn`); return }
732	    const mt = findRunningMemoryTool(targetTurn.memoryEvents ?? [], me.payload.tool_name)
733	    if (mt) { mt.output = me.payload.output; mt.elapsed = me.payload.elapsed; mt.status = 'done' }
734	    if (ch.turns.includes(targetTurn as ChatTurn)) persistTurns(sid)
735	    return
736	  }
737	  if (event.type === 'memory_tool_error') {
738	    const me = event as MemoryToolErrorEvent
739	    if (me.payload.tool_name === 'read_memories') return  // 纯读取不显示
740	    const targetTurn = findTurnByBackendId(ch, me.payload.turn_id)
741	    if (!targetTurn) return
742	    const mt = findRunningMemoryTool(targetTurn.memoryEvents ?? [], me.payload.tool_name)
743	    if (mt) mt.status = 'error'
744	    if (ch.turns.includes(targetTurn as ChatTurn)) persistTurns(sid)
745	    return
746	  }
747	  if (event.type === 'memory_done') {
748	    const me = event as MemoryDoneEvent
749	    console.log(`[ltm-fe] memory_done session=${sid} turn_id=${me.payload.turn_id}`)
750	    const targetTurn = findTurnByBackendId(ch, me.payload.turn_id)
751	    if (!targetTurn) { console.log(`[ltm-fe] NO turn`); return }
752	    // 移除「处理中」占位条目
753	    const realEvents = (targetTurn.memoryEvents ?? []).filter(e => e.name !== 'memory_processing')
754	    targetTurn.memoryEvents = realEvents
755	    if (realEvents.length === 0) {
756	      targetTurn.memoryEvents = [{
757	        kind: 'memory_tool', name: 'memory_review', input: '', output: '', elapsed: null, status: 'done',
758	      }]
759	      console.log(`[ltm-fe] added memory_review`)
760	    }
761	    if (ch.turns.includes(targetTurn as ChatTurn)) persistTurns(sid)
762	    return
763	  }
764	}
765	
766	// ── useChat composable ─────────────────────────────────────
767	
768	export function useChat(sessionId: Ref<string>) {
769	  // 若 sessionId 为空，创建占位通道，等 watch 触发时再连接
770	  const activeChannelRef = ref(getOrCreateChannel(sessionId.value || '__pending__'))
771	  const activeChannel = computed(() => activeChannelRef.value)
772	
773	  // 暴露给 ChatView 的响应式属性（指向当前 Session 通道）
774	  const connected = computed(() => activeChannel.value.connected)
775	  const isStreaming = computed(() => activeChannel.value.isStreaming)
776	  const turns = computed(() => activeChannel.value.turns)
777	  const currentTurn = computed(() => activeChannel.value.currentTurn)
778	  const error = computed(() => activeChannel.value.error)
779	  const errorCategory = computed(() => activeChannel.value.errorCategory)
780	  const errorTraceId = computed(() => activeChannel.value.errorTraceId)
781	  const contextUsage = computed(() => activeChannel.value.contextUsage)
782	  const taskTrackerData = computed(() => activeChannel.value.taskTrackerData)
783	
784	  const privateMode = computed(() => activeChannel.value.privateMode)
785	  const autoApprove = computed(() => activeChannel.value.autoApprove)
786	
787	  function setPrivateMode(val: boolean) {
788	    activeChannel.value.privateMode = val
789	  }
790	
791	  function setAutoApprove(val: boolean) {
792	    activeChannel.value.autoApprove = val
793	    const ch = activeChannel.value
794	    if (ch.ws && ch.ws.readyState === WebSocket.OPEN) {
795	      ch.ws.send(JSON.stringify({
796	        type: 'update_auto_approve',
797	        payload: { auto_approve: val }
798	      }))
799	    }
800	  }
801	
802	  // 从后端加载历史消息并转换为 ChatTurn[]（localStorage 无缓存时的回退方案）
803	  // const 会话从 YAML 文件读取，普通会话从 checkpointer 读取
804	  async function loadHistoryFromBackend(sid: string, ch: SessionChannel) {
805	    // 防御：空 sessionId 或占位符 sessionId 不加载
806	    if (!sid || sid === '__pending__') {
807	      console.log(`[useChat:loadHistory] 跳过空/占位 sessionId: "${sid}"`)
808	      return
809	    }
810	    try {
811	      const res = await api.getMessages(sid)
812	      if (!res.messages || res.messages.length === 0) {
813	        console.log(`[useChat:loadHistory] 会话 ${sid} 后端无历史消息`)
814	        return
815	      }
816	      // 后端返回 [{role, content}]，按 human 分组配对成 ChatTurn
817	      // 一轮对话 = 1 个 human + 后续所有非 human 消息（ai/tool），直到下一个 human
818	      // 修复：此前只看 human/ai 相邻配对，含工具调用的回复（human → ai(tool_calls) → tool → ai(final)）会丢失
819	      const turns: ChatTurn[] = []
820	      let i = 0
821	      while (i < res.messages.length) {
822	        const msg = res.messages[i]
823	        if (msg.role === 'human') {
824	          // 开始一轮新对话
825	          const turn: ChatTurn = {
826	            id: `history-${sid}-${i}`,
827	            userMessage: msg.content,
828	            refs: [],
829	            events: [],
830	            memoryEvents: [],
831	            finalAnswer: null,
832	          }
833	          i++
834	          // 收集后续所有非 human 消息（ai/tool），直到下一个 human
835	          const aiContents: string[] = []
836	          while (i < res.messages.length && res.messages[i].role !== 'human') {
837	            const m = res.messages[i]
838	            if (m.role === 'ai' && m.content) {
839	              // 收集非空 ai 消息内容，最后一个非空 ai 消息作为 finalAnswer
840	              aiContents.push(m.content)
841	            }
842	            // tool 消息跳过（历史回看不需要显示工具调用细节）
843	            i++
844	          }
845	          // 最后一个非空 ai 消息作为 finalAnswer
846	          turn.finalAnswer = aiContents.length > 0 ? aiContents[aiContents.length - 1] : null
847	          // 兜底：如果 finalAnswer 为空（如 agent 被取消、工具失败后图直接结束），
848	          // 设置占位提示，避免用户感知为"整轮对话被吞掉"
849	          if (!turn.finalAnswer) {
850	            turn.finalAnswer = '（这一轮处理未生成文字回复，请查看工具执行结果或重新提问。）'
851	          }
852	          turns.push(turn)
853	        } else {
854	          // 非 human 消息但没有前置 human（异常情况），跳过
855	          i++
856	        }
857	      }
858	      if (turns.length > 0) {
859	        console.log(`[useChat:loadHistory] 从后端加载会话 ${sid}: ${turns.length} 条 turn`)
860	        ch.turns.push(...turns)
861	        turnsCache.set(sid, turns)
862	        saveTurnsToStorage(sid, turns)
863	      }
864	    } catch (e) {
865	      console.warn(`[useChat:loadHistory] 加载会话 ${sid} 历史失败:`, e)
866	    }
867	  }
868	
869	  // Keep at most five inactive sessions alive. Streaming and approval-waiting
870	  // sessions are protected so a cache eviction never cancels user-visible work.
871	  watch(
872	    sessionId,
873	    async (newId, oldId) => {
874	      console.log(`[useChat:watch] sessionId 变化: "${oldId}" → "${newId}"`)
875	      if (oldId) {
876	        console.log(`[useChat:watch] 在切换前持久化旧会话 "${oldId}"`)
877	        persistTurns(oldId)
878	      }
879	      const evictedSessionId = newId
880	        ? chatSessionAliveCache.touch(newId, { scrollTop: 0 }, (candidateId) => {
881	          const candidate = getChatStore().channels.get(candidateId)
882	          return !candidate?.isStreaming && !candidate?.isAwaitingUser
883	        })
884	        : null
885	      if (evictedSessionId) {
886	        persistTurns(evictedSessionId)
887	        disconnectSession(evictedSessionId)
888	      }
889	      activeChannelRef.value = getOrCreateChannel(newId)
890	      ensureConnected(newId)
891	      // 恢复新会话的消息缓存（页面刷新场景）
892	      const cached = turnsCache.get(newId)
893	      const ch = getOrCreateChannel(newId)
894	      if (cached) {
895	        console.log(`[useChat:watch] 找到会话 ${newId} 的缓存: ${cached.length} 条 turn, 通道已有 ${ch.turns.length} 条`)
896	        if (ch.turns.length === 0) {
897	          console.log(`[useChat:watch] 恢复缓存: 将 ${cached.length} 条 turn 推入通道`)
898	          ch.turns.push(...cached)
899	          console.log(`[useChat:watch] 恢复后通道 turns.length = ${ch.turns.length}`)
900	        } else {
901	          console.log(`[useChat:watch] 跳过恢复: 通道已有数据`)
902	        }
903	      } else {
904	        console.log(`[useChat:watch] 未找到会话 ${newId} 的缓存, sessionId="${sessionId.value}"`)
905	        const available = Array.from(turnsCache.keys())
906	        console.log(`[useChat:watch] turnsCache 可用键:`, available.length ? available : '(空)')
907	        // 回退：从后端加载历史消息（const 会话从 YAML，普通会话从 checkpointer）
908	        // 修复：此前前端从未调用 /sessions/{id}/messages，导致 localStorage 无缓存时
909	        // 旧会话点击后无历史显示
910	        if (ch.turns.length === 0) {
911	          await loadHistoryFromBackend(newId, ch)
912	        }
913	      }
914	    },
915	    { immediate: true }
916	  )
917	
918	  onUnmounted(() => {
919	    // 组件真正卸载时（非 keep-alive deactivated）断开所有 WS。
920	    // 注意：keep-alive 场景下切换路由触发的是 onDeactivated 而非 onUnmounted，
921	    // 所以 ChatView 被 keep-alive 缓存时，WS 不会被关闭，流式回复可以继续。
922	    for (const sid of Array.from(getChatStore().channels.keys())) {
923	      disconnectSession(sid)
924	    }
925	    chatSessionAliveCache.clear()
926	  })
927	
928	  function send(text: string, refs: ParsedRef[] = [], providerId?: string, modelName?: string, thinkPathId?: ThinkPathId) {
929	    const ch = activeChannel.value
930	    if (!ch.ws || ch.ws.readyState !== WebSocket.OPEN) {
931	      console.warn(`[useChat:send] WebSocket 未就绪, readyState=${ch.ws?.readyState}, session=${sessionId.value}`)
932	      return
933	    }
934	    ch.isStreaming = true
935	    ch.error = null
936	
937	    const timestamp = buildTimestamp()
938	    const flatMsg = buildFlatMessage(text, timestamp, refs)
939	
940	    const turn: ChatTurn = {
941	      id: crypto.randomUUID(),
942	      userMessage: text,
943	      refs,
944	      events: [],
945	      memoryEvents: [],
946	      finalAnswer: null,
947	    }
948	    ch.currentTurn = turn
949	
950	    const payload: ClientMessage = {
951	      type: 'chat',
952	      payload: {
953	        message: flatMsg,
954	        private: ch.privateMode,
955	        auto_approve: ch.autoApprove,
956	        provider_id: providerId,
957	        model_name: modelName,
958	        ...(thinkPathId ? { think_path_id: thinkPathId } : {}),
959	      },
960	    }
961	    ch.ws.send(JSON.stringify(payload))
962	  }
963	
964	  function cancel() {
965	    const ch = activeChannel.value
966	    if (!ch.ws || ch.ws.readyState !== WebSocket.OPEN) return
967	    const payload: ClientMessage = { type: 'cancel', payload: {} }
968	    ch.ws.send(JSON.stringify(payload))
969	  }
970	
971	  function sendUserResponse(interactionId: string, response: string | string[]) {
972	    const ch = activeChannel.value
973	    if (!ch.ws || ch.ws.readyState !== WebSocket.OPEN) return
974	    const payload: ClientMessage = {
975	      type: 'user_response',
976	      payload: { interaction_id: interactionId, response },
977	    }
978	    ch.ws.send(JSON.stringify(payload))
979	  }
980	
981	  function sendArtifactAction(artifactId: string, actionId: string, token: string): boolean {
982	    const ch = activeChannel.value
983	    if (!ch.ws || ch.ws.readyState !== WebSocket.OPEN) return false
984	    const payload: ClientMessage = {
985	      type: 'artifact_action',
986	      payload: { artifact_id: artifactId, action_id: actionId, token },
987	    }
988	    ch.ws.send(JSON.stringify(payload))
989	    return true
990	  }
991	
992	  function sendPlanResponse(planId: string, action: 'approve' | 'modify' | 'reject', modifiedPlan?: string) {
993	    const ch = activeChannel.value
994	    if (!ch.ws || ch.ws.readyState !== WebSocket.OPEN) return
995	    // 更新 planCard 状态 — 必须用 currentTurn（plan_proposed 也写在这里）
996	    const currentTurn = ch.currentTurn
997	    if (currentTurn?.planCard && currentTurn.planCard.planId === planId) {
998	      currentTurn.planCard.status = action === 'approve' ? 'approved' : action === 'reject' ? 'rejected' : 'modified'
999	    }
1000	    const msg: Record<string, unknown> = {
1001	      type: 'plan_response',
1002	      payload: { plan_id: planId, action },
1003	    }
1004	    if (modifiedPlan) {
1005	      (msg.payload as Record<string, unknown>).modified_plan = modifiedPlan
1006	    }
1007	    ch.ws.send(JSON.stringify(msg))
1008	  }
1009	
1010	  /** 从当前会话的 turns 列表中移除最后 count 条轮次（撤回后的前端同步）。 */
1011	  function removeTurns(count: number) {
1012	    const ch = getOrCreateChannel(sessionId.value)
1013	    if (ch.turns.length === 0) return
1014	    const actual = Math.min(count, ch.turns.length)
1015	    ch.turns.splice(ch.turns.length - actual, actual)
1016	    if (!ch.privateMode) {
1017	      persistTurns(sessionId.value)
1018	    }
1019	    void refreshSessions()
1020	  }
1021	
1022	  return {
1023	    connected, isStreaming, turns, currentTurn, error, errorCategory, errorTraceId,
1024	    contextUsage, taskTrackerData,
1025	    send, cancel, sendUserResponse, sendArtifactAction, sendPlanResponse, removeTurns,
1026	    privateMode, setPrivateMode,
1027	    autoApprove, setAutoApprove,
1028	  }
1029	}
1030	
1031	
1032	
1033	function findLastThinking(events: TurnEvent[]): ThinkingBlock | undefined {
1034	  for (let i = events.length - 1; i >= 0; i--) {
1035	    if (events[i].kind === 'thinking') {
1036	      return events[i] as ThinkingBlock
1037	    }
1038	  }
1039	  return undefined
1040	}
1041	
1042	function findRunningTool(events: TurnEvent[], toolName: string): ToolCall | undefined {
1043	  for (let i = events.length - 1; i >= 0; i--) {
1044	    const e = events[i]
1045	    if (e.kind === 'tool' && e.name === toolName && e.status === 'running') {
1046	      return e as ToolCall
1047	    }
1048	  }
1049	  return undefined
1050	}
1051	
1052	/** 通过后端 turn_id 查找 turn（先在 currentTurn 中找，再在 turns 中找）。 */
1053	function findTurnByBackendId(ch: SessionChannel, turnId: string): ChatTurn | undefined {
1054	  if (ch.currentTurn?.turnId === turnId) return ch.currentTurn
1055	  return ch.turns.find(t => t.turnId === turnId)
1056	}
1057	
1058	/** 在 memoryEvents 中查找指定工具名的 running 状态事件。 */
1059	function findRunningMemoryTool(events: MemoryToolEvent[], toolName: string): MemoryToolEvent | undefined {
1060	  for (let i = events.length - 1; i >= 0; i--) {
1061	    const e = events[i]
1062	    if (e.name === toolName && e.status === 'running') return e
1063	  }
1064	  return undefined
1065	}
1066	
```

193

197	        <div v-if="deleteConfirmTarget" class="delete-confirm-overlay" @click="cancelDelete">
198	          <div class="delete-confirm-card" @click.stop>
199	            <div class="delete-confirm-title">确认删除会话</div>
200	            <div class="delete-confirm-message">
201	              此会话包含 <strong>{{ deleteConfirmTarget.message_count }}</strong> 条消息，删除后无法恢复。
202	            </div>
203	            <div class="delete-confirm-actions">
204	              <button class="delete-confirm-btn cancel" @click="cancelDelete">取消</button>
205	              <button class="delete-confirm-btn confirm" @click="confirmDelete">删除</button>
206	            </div>
207	          </div>

212	</template>
213	
214	<script setup lang="ts">
215	import ContextMenu from '@/components/ContextMenu.vue';
216	import Icon from '@/components/Icon.vue';
217	import { useSessionStore } from '@/stores/session';
218	import type { SessionInfo } from '@/types';
219	import { computed, nextTick, ref, watch } from 'vue';
220	
221	const sessionStore = useSessionStore()
222	
223	const props = defineProps<{
224	  sessions: SessionInfo[]
225	  activeId: string
226	  sessionStatuses?: Record<string, { connected: boolean; isStreaming: boolean; isAwaitingUser: boolean }>
227	  collapsed?: boolean
228	}>()
229	
230	const emit = defineEmits<{
231	  create: []
232	  switch: [id: string]
233	  delete: [id: string]
234	  constify: [id: string, name: string]
235	  unconstify: [id: string]
236	}>()
237	
238	// ── 分区计算 ──────────────────────────────────────────────────
239	
240	function getSessionDisplayIndex(s: SessionInfo): number {
241	  return tempSessions.value.length - tempSessions.value.findIndex(x => x.session_id === s.session_id)
242	}
243	
244	const constSessions = computed(() =>
245	  props.sessions.filter(s => s.is_const)
246	)
247	
248	const tempSessions = computed(() =>
249	  props.sessions.filter(s => !s.is_const)
250	)
251	
252	// ── Hover card ────────────────────────────────────────────────
253	
254	const hoveredSession = ref<SessionInfo | null>(null)
255	const hoverCardRef = ref<HTMLElement | null>(null)
256	const cardTop = ref(0)
257	const cardLeft = ref(0)
258	
259	let hoverLeaveTimer: ReturnType<typeof setTimeout> | null = null
260	
261	function formatRelativeTime(ts: number): string {
262	  const diff = Date.now() - ts * 1000
263	  const minutes = Math.floor(diff / 60000)
264	  const hours = Math.floor(minutes / 60)
265	  const days = Math.floor(hours / 24)
266	  if (minutes < 1) return '刚刚'
267	  if (minutes < 60) return `${minutes}分钟前`
268	  if (hours < 24) return `${hours}小时前`
269	  if (days < 7) return `${days}天前`
270	  return new Date(ts * 1000).toLocaleDateString()
271	}
272	
273	function getAgentStatus(sessionId: string): string {
274	  const status = props.sessionStatuses?.[sessionId]
275	  if (!status?.connected) return '就绪'
276	  if (status.isAwaitingUser) return '需处理'
277	  if (status.isStreaming) return '工作中'
278	  return '就绪'
279	}
280	
281	function onSessionMouseEnter(event: MouseEvent, session: SessionInfo) {
282	  if (hoverLeaveTimer !== null) {
283	    clearTimeout(hoverLeaveTimer)
284	    hoverLeaveTimer = null
285	  }
286	  const button = event.currentTarget as HTMLElement
287	  const rect = button.getBoundingClientRect()
288	  cardTop.value = rect.top
289	  cardLeft.value = rect.right + 8
290	  hoveredSession.value = session
291	  nextTick(() => adjustCardPosition(rect))
292	}
293	
294	function onSessionMouseLeave() {
295	  if (hoverLeaveTimer !== null) clearTimeout(hoverLeaveTimer)
296	  hoverLeaveTimer = setTimeout(() => {
297	    hoveredSession.value = null
298	  }, 150)
299	}
300	
301	function adjustCardPosition(buttonRect: DOMRect) {
302	  const cardEl = hoverCardRef.value
303	  if (!cardEl || !hoveredSession.value) return
304	  const cardWidth = cardEl.offsetWidth
305	  const cardHeight = cardEl.offsetHeight
306	  const vw = window.innerWidth
307	  const vh = window.innerHeight
308	  const margin = 8
309	
310	  if (cardLeft.value + cardWidth > vw - margin) {
311	    const leftPos = buttonRect.left - cardWidth - margin
312	    cardLeft.value = leftPos >= margin ? leftPos : Math.max(margin, vw - cardWidth - margin)
313	  }
314	  if (cardTop.value + cardHeight > vh - margin) {
315	    cardTop.value = Math.max(margin, vh - cardHeight - margin)
316	  }
317	}
318	
319	const cardStyle = computed(() => {
320	  if (!hoveredSession.value) return {}
321	  return {
322	    position: 'fixed' as const,
323	    top: `${cardTop.value}px`,
324	    left: `${cardLeft.value}px`,
325	    zIndex: 100,
326	    pointerEvents: 'none' as const,
327	  }
328	})
329	
330	// ── 右键菜单 ──────────────────────────────────────────────────
331	
332	const ctxMenuVisible = ref(false)
333	const ctxMenuPos = ref({ x: 0, y: 0 })
334	const ctxMenuSession = ref<SessionInfo | null>(null)
335	
336	const ctxMenuItems = computed(() => {
337	  const s = ctxMenuSession.value
338	  if (!s) return []
339	  if (s.is_const) {
340	    return [
341	      { label: '固定会话…', action: 'constify', icon: 'pin' },
342	      { label: '取消固定', action: 'unconstify' },
343	    ]
344	  }
345	  return [
346	    { label: '固定会话…', action: 'constify', icon: 'pin' },
347	  ]
348	})
349	
350	// ── 固定会话卡片 ──────────────────────────────────────────────
351	
352	const constifyTarget = ref<SessionInfo | null>(null)
353	const constifyName = ref('')
354	const constifyCardRef = ref<HTMLElement | null>(null)
355	const constifyInputRef = ref<HTMLInputElement | null>(null)
356	const constifyCardTop = ref(0)
357	const constifyCardLeft = ref(0)
358	const generating = ref(false)
359	
360	/** 鼠标右键触发时的目标元素 rect，用于定位卡片 */
361	let constifyAnchorRect: DOMRect | null = null
362	
363	const constifyCardStyle = computed(() => {
364	  if (!constifyTarget.value) return { display: 'none' }
365	  return {
366	    position: 'fixed' as const,
367	    top: `${constifyCardTop.value}px`,
368	    left: `${constifyCardLeft.value}px`,
369	    zIndex: 1001,
370	  }
371	})
372	
373	function adjustConstifyCardPosition() {
374	  const cardEl = constifyCardRef.value
375	  if (!cardEl || !constifyTarget.value) return
376	  const cardWidth = cardEl.offsetWidth
377	  const cardHeight = cardEl.offsetHeight
378	  const vw = window.innerWidth
379	  const vh = window.innerHeight
380	  const margin = 8
381	
382	  if (constifyCardLeft.value + cardWidth > vw - margin) {
383	    const leftPos = (constifyAnchorRect?.left ?? constifyCardLeft.value) - cardWidth - margin
384	    constifyCardLeft.value = leftPos >= margin ? leftPos : Math.max(margin, vw - cardWidth - margin)
385	  }
386	  if (constifyCardTop.value + cardHeight > vh - margin) {
387	    constifyCardTop.value = Math.max(margin, vh - cardHeight - margin)
388	  }
389	  // Ensure card stays on the right side of the anchor when there's room
390	  if (constifyAnchorRect && constifyCardLeft.value < constifyAnchorRect.right) {
391	    constifyCardLeft.value = constifyAnchorRect.right + margin
392	  }
393	}
394	
395	function showConstifyCard(session: SessionInfo) {
396	  const rect = constifyAnchorRect
397	  if (rect) {
398	    constifyCardTop.value = rect.top
399	    constifyCardLeft.value = rect.right + 8
400	  }
401	  constifyTarget.value = session
402	  constifyName.value = session.const_name || ''
403	  closeContextMenu()
404	  nextTick(() => {
405	    adjustConstifyCardPosition()
406	    constifyInputRef.value?.focus()
407	    constifyInputRef.value?.select()
408	  })
409	}
410	
411	async function generateTitle() {
412	  const session = constifyTarget.value
413	  if (!session || generating.value) return
414	  generating.value = true
415	  try {
416	    const title = await sessionStore.generateSessionTitle(session.session_id)
417	    constifyName.value = title
418	    nextTick(() => {
419	      constifyInputRef.value?.focus()
420	      constifyInputRef.value?.select()
421	    })
422	  } catch (e) {
423	    console.error('[constify] 标题生成失败:', e)
424	  } finally {
425	    generating.value = false
426	  }
427	}
428	
429	function confirmConstify() {
430	  if (!constifyTarget.value || !constifyName.value.trim()) return
431	  emit('constify', constifyTarget.value.session_id, constifyName.value.trim())
432	  constifyTarget.value = null
433	  constifyName.value = ''
434	}
435	
436	function cancelConstify() {
437	  constifyTarget.value = null
438	  constifyName.value = ''
439	}
440	
441	// ── 悬浮详情卡片 ──────────────────────────────────────────────
442	
443	/** 注册一个全局点击监听，在 constify 卡片打开时点击外部关闭 */
444	watch(constifyTarget, (val) => {
445	  if (val) {
446	    const handler = (e: MouseEvent) => {
447	      const card = constifyCardRef.value
448	      if (card && !card.contains(e.target as Node)) {
449	        cancelConstify()
450	      }
451	    }
452	    // delay registration so the current click doesn't immediately close
453	    nextTick(() => document.addEventListener('click', handler, { once: true }))
454	  }
455	})
456	
457	function onSessionContextMenu(event: MouseEvent, session: SessionInfo) {
458	  // 关闭 hover card
459	  if (hoverLeaveTimer !== null) {
460	    clearTimeout(hoverLeaveTimer)
461	    hoverLeaveTimer = null
462	  }
463	  hoveredSession.value = null
464	
465	  // 保存锚点元素 rect，供 constify 卡片定位
466	  constifyAnchorRect = (event.currentTarget as HTMLElement).getBoundingClientRect()
467	
468	  ctxMenuSession.value = session
469	  ctxMenuPos.value = { x: event.clientX, y: event.clientY }
470	  ctxMenuVisible.value = true
471	}
472	
473	function handleContextMenuSelect(action: string) {
474	  const s = ctxMenuSession.value
475	  if (!s) return
476	  if (action === 'constify') {
477	    showConstifyCard(s)
478	    return  // 不关闭菜单，showConstifyCard 内部会关闭
479	  } else if (action === 'unconstify') {
480	    emit('unconstify', s.session_id)
481	  }
482	  closeContextMenu()
483	}
484	
485	function closeContextMenu() {
486	  ctxMenuVisible.value = false
487	  ctxMenuSession.value = null
488	}
489	
490	// ── 删除确认对话框 ──────────────────────────────────────────────
491	
492	const deleteConfirmTarget = ref<SessionInfo | null>(null)
493	
494	function showDeleteConfirm(session: SessionInfo) {
495	  deleteConfirmTarget.value = session
496	}
497	
498	function cancelDelete() {
499	  deleteConfirmTarget.value = null
500	}
501	
502	function confirmDelete() {
503	  if (deleteConfirmTarget.value) {
504	    emit('delete', deleteConfirmTarget.value.session_id)
505	  }
506	  deleteConfirmTarget.value = null
507	}
508	</script>
509	
510	<style scoped>
511	.session-sidebar {
512	  display: flex;
513	  flex-direction: column;
514	  gap: 8px;
515	}
516	.sidebar-section-header {
517	  display: flex;
518	  align-items: center;
519	  justify-content: space-between;
520	  font-size: 0.75em;
521	  font-weight: 600;
522	  color: var(--text-secondary);
523	  text-transform: uppercase;
524	  letter-spacing: 0.5px;
525	}
526	.sidebar-section-header span {
527	  transition: opacity 0.2s ease 0.05s, transform 0.25s ease 0.05s;
528	  overflow: hidden;
529	  white-space: nowrap;
530	  display: inline-block;
531	  max-width: 200px;
532	}
533	.btn-new {
534	  width: 24px;
535	  height: 24px;
536	  border: none;
537	  border-radius: 6px;
538	  background: var(--bg-card);
539	  color: var(--text-secondary);
540	  font-size: 16px;
541	  cursor: pointer;
542	  display: flex;
543	  align-items: center;
544	  justify-content: center;
545	  transition: background 0.15s;
546	}
547	.btn-new:hover {
548	  background: var(--accent);
549	  color: #fff;
550	}
551	.session-list {
552	  display: flex;
553	  flex-direction: column;
554	  gap: 4px;
555	  max-height: 400px;
556	  overflow-y: auto;
557	  padding: 0 6px 8px;
558	}
559	
560	/* ── Section label ── */
561	.section-label {
562	  font-size: 0.7em;
563	  font-weight: 600;
564	  color: var(--text-tertiary, #9ca3af);
565	  text-transform: uppercase;
566	  letter-spacing: 0.4px;
567	  padding: 4px 12px 2px;
568	}
569	
570	.section-hint {
571	  font-size: 0.75em;
572	  color: var(--text-tertiary, #9ca3af);
573	  padding: 6px 12px 8px;
574	  line-height: 1.4;
575	}
576	
577	/* ── Session items ── */
578	.session-item {
579	  display: flex;
580	  align-items: center;
581	  justify-content: space-between;
582	  padding: 10px 12px;
583	  border: none;
584	  border-radius: 8px;
585	  background: transparent;
586	  cursor: pointer;
587	  text-align: left;
588	  font-family: inherit;
589	  transition: background 0.15s;
590	}
591	.session-item:hover {
592	  background: var(--bg-card);
593	}
594	.session-item.active {
595	  background: var(--bg-card);
596	  box-shadow: var(--shadow);
597	}
598	
599	/* Const 会话外观 — pin 图标已提供视觉区分，无需侧边条 */
600	.session-item.is-const {
601	  background: color-mix(in srgb, var(--accent) 4%, transparent);
602	}
603	/* active const sessions should have a clean white bg */
604	.session-item.is-const.active {
605	  background: var(--bg-card);
606	}
607	
608	.session-item-main {
609	  display: flex;
610	  flex-direction: column;
611	  gap: 2px;
612	  min-width: 0;
613	  transition: opacity 0.2s ease 0.05s, transform 0.25s ease 0.05s;
614	  overflow: hidden;
615	  max-height: 80px;
616	}
617	.session-id {
618	  font-size: 0.9em;
619	  font-weight: 500;
620	  color: var(--text-primary);
621	  display: flex;
622	  align-items: center;
623	  gap: 2px;
624	}
625	.const-name-text {
626	  overflow: hidden;
627	  text-overflow: ellipsis;
628	  white-space: nowrap;
629	}
630	.sub-badge {
631	  display: inline-block;
632	  margin-left: 4px;
633	  padding: 0 4px;
634	  font-size: 0.65em;
635	  font-weight: 600;
636	  color: var(--text-secondary);
637	  background: var(--bg-secondary);
638	  border: 1px solid var(--border);
639	  border-radius: 3px;
640	  vertical-align: middle;
641	}
642	.session-count {
643	  font-size: 0.75em;
644	  color: var(--text-secondary);
645	}
646	.btn-delete {
647	  width: 22px;
648	  height: 22px;
649	  border: none;
650	  border-radius: 4px;
651	  background: transparent;
652	  color: var(--text-secondary);
653	  font-size: 16px;
654	  cursor: pointer;
655	  opacity: 0;
656	  transition: opacity 0.15s ease 0.05s, transform 0.25s ease 0.05s, color 0.15s;
657	  overflow: hidden;
658	  max-width: 22px;
659	}
660	.session-item:hover .btn-delete {
661	  opacity: 1;
662	}
663	.btn-delete:hover {
664	  color: var(--status-error);
665	}
666	.no-sessions {
667	  font-size: 0.8em;
668	  color: var(--text-secondary);
669	  padding: 8px;
670	  transition: opacity 0.2s ease 0.05s;
671	  overflow: hidden;
672	  max-height: 40px;
673	}
674	
675	.session-item-right {
676	  display: flex;
677	  align-items: center;
678	  gap: 4px;
679	}
680	
681	.status-dot {
682	  width: 8px;
683	  height: 8px;
684	  border-radius: 50%;
685	  flex-shrink: 0;
686	}
687	
688	.status-dot.connected {
689	  background: var(--status-ok);
690	}
691	
692	.status-dot.streaming {
693	  background: var(--status-ok);
694	  animation: pulse 1.2s ease-in-out infinite;
695	}
696	
697	.status-dot.awaiting-user {
698	  background: var(--status-warn);
699	  animation: pulse 1.2s ease-in-out infinite;
700	}
701	
702	@keyframes pulse {
703	  0%, 100% { opacity: 1; transform: scale(1); }
704	  50% { opacity: 0.5; transform: scale(1.3); }
705	}
706	
707	/* ── Hover card ── */
708	.session-hover-card {
709	  min-width: 220px;
710	  padding: 8px 12px;
711	  background: var(--bg-card);
712	  border: 1px solid var(--border);
713	  border-radius: 8px;
714	  box-shadow: var(--shadow-lg);
715	  font-size: 0.8em;
716	  line-height: 1.6;
717	  white-space: nowrap;
718	}
719	.card-row {
720	  display: flex;
721	  justify-content: space-between;
722	  gap: 16px;
723	}
724	.card-label {
725	  color: var(--text-secondary);
726	}

728	  font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums;
729	  color: var(--text-primary);
730	  max-width: 280px;
731	  overflow: hidden;
732	  text-overflow: ellipsis;
733	}
734	.card-divider {
735	  height: 1px;
736	  background: var(--border);
737	  margin: 4px 0;
738	}
739	
740	.card-enter-active,
741	.card-leave-active {
742	  transition: opacity 0.15s ease, transform 0.15s ease;
743	}
744	.card-enter-from,
745	.card-leave-to {
746	  opacity: 0;
747	  transform: translateX(-8px);
748	}
749	
750	/* ── Collapsed icon-only mode ── */
751	.session-sidebar.collapsed .sidebar-section-header {
752	  justify-content: center;
753	}
754	.session-sidebar.collapsed .sidebar-section-header span {
755	  max-width: 0;
756	  opacity: 0;
757	  transform: translateX(-24px);
758	  overflow: hidden;
759	  white-space: nowrap;
760	  display: inline-block;
761	  padding: 0;
762	  margin: 0;
763	}
764	.session-sidebar.collapsed .session-item {
765	  justify-content: center;
766	  padding: 6px;
767	}
768	.session-sidebar.collapsed .session-item-main {
769	  max-height: 0;
770	  max-width: 0;
771	  min-width: 0;
772	  opacity: 0;
773	  overflow: hidden;
774	  transform: translateX(-24px);
775	  padding: 0;
776	  margin: 0;
777	}
778	.session-sidebar.collapsed .btn-delete {
779	  max-width: 0;
780	  opacity: 0;
781	  overflow: hidden;
782	  transform: translateX(-24px);
783	  padding: 0;
784	  margin: 0;
785	  border: none;
786	}
787	.session-sidebar.collapsed .no-sessions {
788	  max-height: 0;
789	  opacity: 0;
790	  overflow: hidden;
791	  padding: 0;
792	  margin: 0;
793	}
794	/* collapsed 时隐藏分区 label 和提示 */
795	.session-sidebar.collapsed .section-label,
796	.session-sidebar.collapsed .section-hint {
797	  max-height: 0;
798	  opacity: 0;
799	  overflow: hidden;
800	  padding: 0;
801	  margin: 0;
802	}
803	/* collapsed 时隐藏 const 左侧边框 */
804	.session-sidebar.collapsed .session-item.is-const {
805	  border-left: none;
806	}
807	
808	/* ── 固定会话卡片 ── */
809	.constify-card {
810	  min-width: 240px;
811	  padding: 16px;
812	  background: var(--bg-card);
813	  border: 1px solid var(--border);
814	  border-radius: 10px;
815	  box-shadow: var(--shadow-xl);
816	  display: flex;
817	  flex-direction: column;
818	  gap: 12px;
819	  pointer-events: auto;
820	}
821	
822	.constify-card-title {
823	  font-size: 0.95em;
824	  font-weight: 600;
825	  color: var(--text-primary);
826	}
827	
828	.constify-input-row {
829	  display: flex;
830	  gap: 6px;
831	  align-items: stretch;
832	}
833	
834	.constify-input {
835	  flex: 1;
836	  padding: 8px 12px;
837	  font-size: 0.9em;
838	  font-family: inherit;
839	  color: var(--text-primary);
840	  background: var(--bg-primary);
841	  border: 1px solid var(--border);
842	  border-radius: 6px;
843	  outline: none;
844	  transition: border-color 0.15s;
845	}
846	
847	.constify-input:focus {
848	  border-color: var(--accent);
849	}
850	
851	.constify-input::placeholder {
852	  color: var(--text-tertiary);
853	}
854	
855	.constify-gen-btn {
856	  display: flex;
857	  align-items: center;
858	  justify-content: center;
859	  width: 34px;
860	  border: 1px solid var(--border);
861	  border-radius: 6px;
862	  background: var(--bg-primary);
863	  color: var(--text-secondary);
864	  cursor: pointer;
865	  transition: background 0.15s, color 0.15s, border-color 0.15s;
866	  flex-shrink: 0;
867	}
868	
869	.constify-gen-btn:hover:not(:disabled) {
870	  background: color-mix(in srgb, var(--accent) 8%, transparent);
871	  color: var(--accent);
872	  border-color: var(--accent);
873	}
874	
875	.constify-gen-btn:disabled {
876	  opacity: 0.4;
877	  cursor: not-allowed;
878	}
879	
880	.constify-gen-btn.loading {
881	  animation: gen-btn-pulse 0.8s ease-in-out infinite;
882	}
883	
884	@keyframes gen-btn-pulse {
885	  0%, 100% { opacity: 0.5; }
886	  50% { opacity: 1; }
887	}
888	
889	.constify-actions {
890	  display: flex;
891	  justify-content: flex-end;
892	  gap: 8px;
893	}
894	
895	.constify-btn {
896	  padding: 6px 16px;
897	  font-size: 0.9em;
898	  font-family: inherit;
899	  border: none;
900	  border-radius: 6px;
901	  cursor: pointer;
902	  transition: background 0.15s, opacity 0.15s;
903	}
904	
905	.constify-btn.cancel {
906	  background: transparent;
907	  color: var(--text-secondary);
908	}
909	
910	.constify-btn.cancel:hover {
911	  background: color-mix(in srgb, var(--accent) 8%, transparent);
912	  color: var(--text-primary);
913	}
914	
915	.constify-btn.confirm {
916	  background: var(--accent);
917	  color: #fff;
918	}
919	
920	.constify-btn.confirm:hover:not(:disabled) {
921	  opacity: 0.85;
922	}
923	
924	.constify-btn.confirm:disabled {
925	  opacity: 0.4;
926	  cursor: not-allowed;
927	}
928	
929	/* 卡片弹出动画 */
930	.constify-pop-enter-active {
931	  transition: opacity 0.12s ease-out, transform 0.12s ease-out;
932	}
933	.constify-pop-leave-active {
934	  transition: opacity 0.1s ease-in, transform 0.1s ease-in;
935	}
936	.constify-pop-enter-from {
937	  opacity: 0;
938	  transform: translateX(-6px) scale(0.96);
939	}
940	.constify-pop-leave-to {
941	  opacity: 0;
942	  transform: translateX(-4px) scale(0.96);
943	}
944	
945	/* ── 删除确认对话框 ── */
946	.delete-confirm-overlay {
947	  position: fixed;
948	  inset: 0;
949	  background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.4);
950	  display: flex;
951	  align-items: center;
952	  justify-content: center;
953	  z-index: 2000;
954	}
955	
956	.delete-confirm-card {
957	  background: var(--bg-card);
958	  border-radius: 12px;
959	  padding: 20px;
960	  min-width: 300px;
961	  max-width: 400px;
962	  box-shadow: var(--shadow-xl);
963	}
964	
965	.delete-confirm-title {
966	  font-size: 1.1em;
967	  font-weight: 600;
968	  color: var(--text-primary);
969	  margin-bottom: 12px;
970	}
971	
972	.delete-confirm-message {
973	  font-size: 0.95em;
974	  color: var(--text-secondary);
975	  line-height: 1.5;
976	  margin-bottom: 20px;
977	}
978	
979	.delete-confirm-message strong {
980	  color: var(--text-primary);
981	  font-weight: 600;
982	}
983	
984	.delete-confirm-actions {
985	  display: flex;
986	  justify-content: flex-end;
987	  gap: 10px;
988	}
989	
990	.delete-confirm-btn {
991	  padding: 8px 18px;
992	  font-size: 0.95em;
993	  font-family: inherit;
994	  border: none;
995	  border-radius: 6px;
996	  cursor: pointer;
997	  transition: background 0.15s, opacity 0.15s;
998	}
999	
1000	.delete-confirm-btn.cancel {
1001	  background: transparent;
1002	  color: var(--text-secondary);
1003	}
1004	
1005	.delete-confirm-btn.cancel:hover {
1006	  background: var(--bg-secondary);
1007	  color: var(--text-primary);
1008	}
1009	
1010	.delete-confirm-btn.confirm {
1011	  background: var(--status-error, #dc2626);
1012	  color: #fff;
1013	}
1014	
1015	.delete-confirm-btn.confirm:hover {
1016	  opacity: 0.9;
1017	}
1018	
1019	/* Fade transition */
1020	.fade-enter-active,
1021	.fade-leave-active {
1022	  transition: opacity 0.15s ease;
1023	}
1024	
1025	.fade-enter-from,
1026	.fade-leave-to {
1027	  opacity: 0;
1028	}
1029	</style>

42	@dataclass(frozen=True)
43	class ThinkPathExecution:
44	    """Validated, opt-in execution preference for one chat turn.
45	
46	    The browser can only submit a fixed ThinkPath id.  Resolving its role and
47	    selecting a provider happens server-side, so a client cannot smuggle an
48	    arbitrary provider role, model capability, or cost preference into a chat
49	    request.
50	    """
51	
52	    path: ThinkPath | None = None
53	    provider: Any | None = None
54	    model_name: str | None = None
55	
56	
57	def _resolve_think_path_execution(
58	    think_path_id: object,
59	    *,
60	    think_path_enabled: bool,
61	    declarative_model_routing_enabled: bool,
62	    has_explicit_model_selection: bool,
63	    provider_manager: Any | None,
64	    model_roles_path: Path = _MODEL_ROLES_PATH,
65	) -> ThinkPathExecution:
66	    """Resolve a visible ThinkPath without weakening model-selection rules.
67	
68	    A path is ignored unless its feature flag is on.  Explicit provider/model
69	    choices always win, and an unavailable/malformed declarative rule leaves
70	    the normal default route untouched.  This helper performs no I/O besides
71	    reading the local role configuration and never changes provider state.
72	    """
73	    if not think_path_enabled:
74	        return ThinkPathExecution()
75	
76	    path = get_think_path(think_path_id if isinstance(think_path_id, str) else None)
77	    if path is None:
78	        return ThinkPathExecution()
79	
80	    if (
81	        not declarative_model_routing_enabled
82	        or has_explicit_model_selection
83	        or provider_manager is None
84	    ):
85	        return ThinkPathExecution(path=path)
86	
87	    try:
88	        role = resolve_model_role(model_roles_path, path.role)
89	        selected = provider_manager.select_for_role(role)
90	    except Exception:
91	        # Role routing is an optional convenience.  A bad local rule or an
92	        # unexpected provider implementation must never reject the message.
93	        logger.warning("[chat] ThinkPath model routing unavailable", exc_info=True)
94	        return ThinkPathExecution(path=path)
95	
96	    if selected is None:
97	        return ThinkPathExecution(path=path)
98	    provider, model_name = selected
99	    if not isinstance(model_name, str) or not model_name.strip():
100	        return ThinkPathExecution(path=path)
101	    return ThinkPathExecution(path=path, provider=provider, model_name=model_name)
102	
103	
104	def _think_path_runtime_context(path: ThinkPath | None) -> str:
105	    """Return trusted, fixed execution guidance for a selected path only."""
106	    if path is None:
107	        return ""
108	    return (
109	        "[本轮执行偏好（用户已确认）]\n"
110	        f"采用“{path.label}”路径：{path.description}\n"
111	        f"预期深度：{path.depth}；预估成本：{path.estimated_cost}。"
112	    )
113	
114	
115	def _effective_auto_approve(session: SessionState, requested: object) -> bool:
116	    """Prevent a delegated session from exceeding its parent's approval policy."""
117	    context = (
118	        getattr(session, "delegation_context", None)
119	        if getattr(session, "is_subagent", False)
120	        else None
121	    )
122	    if context is None:
123	        return bool(requested)
124	    return bool(requested) and bool(context.auto_approve)
125	
126	
127	def _get_provider_context(app_state) -> tuple[int, str]:
128	    """从 ProviderManager 获取默认 context_window 和 model_name。"""
129	    mgr = getattr(app_state, "provider_manager", None)
130	    if mgr is not None and mgr.count > 0:
131	        for provider in mgr.iter_enabled():
132	            return provider.config.context_window, provider.default_model
133	    return 256_000, ""

136	def _build_runtime_context_for_agent(
137	    app_state, turn_tools, current_model_name: str | None
138	) -> str:
139	    """生成运行时配置摘要，注入到 agent 的 episodic_context。
140	
141	    让 agent 每轮都能"看到"自己的配置全貌（providers/MCP/工具统计），
142	    减少执行路径的不确定性。失败时返回空字符串，不阻塞主流程。
143	    """
144	    try:
145	        from agent.runtime_context import build_runtime_context
146	
147	        provider_manager = getattr(app_state, "provider_manager", None)
148	        native_count = sum(
149	            1
150	            for t in turn_tools
151	            if not t.name.split("_")[0].islower() or "_" not in t.name
152	        )
153	        # 更准确的统计：MCP 工具名通常带 server_id 前缀
154	        from tools import TOOL_CATEGORIES
155	
156	        all_native_names: set[str] = set()
157	        for names in TOOL_CATEGORIES.values():
158	            all_native_names.update(names)
159	        native_count = sum(1 for t in turn_tools if t.name in all_native_names)
160	        mcp_count = len(turn_tools) - native_count
161	
162	        return build_runtime_context(
163	            provider_manager=provider_manager,
164	            mcp_tool_count=mcp_count,
165	            native_tool_count=native_count,
166	            current_model_name=current_model_name,
167	        )
168	    except Exception as e:
169	        logger.warning("[chat] 运行时配置摘要生成失败: %s", e)
170	        return ""
