```json
172	
173	async def _process_image_refs(user_message: str) -> str:
174	    """从用户消息中提取图片引用，自动描述图片内容并追加到消息末尾。
175	
176	    流程：
177	    1. 解析 __refs__ 块中的 image 类型引用
178	    2. 对每个有 path 的图片调用 GLM-5V-Turbo 生成描述
179	    3. 将描述追加到用户消息文本末尾（在 __refs__ 之前）
180	
181	    Returns:
182	        增强后的用户消息文本
183	    """
184	    import re
185	
186	    # 提取 refs 块
187	    refs_start = user_message.rfind("__refs__")
188	    if refs_start == -1:
189	        return user_message
190	
191	    refs_end = user_message.find("__/refs__", refs_start)
192	    if refs_end == -1:
193	        return user_message
194	
195	    refs_json = user_message[refs_start + len("__refs__") : refs_end]
196	    try:
197	        refs_list = json.loads(refs_json)
198	    except (json.JSONDecodeError, ValueError):
199	        return user_message
200	
201	    # 提取图片引用
202	    image_paths = []
203	    for ref_item in refs_list:
204	        if isinstance(ref_item, dict) and ref_item.get("type") == "image":
205	            path = ref_item.get("path", "")
206	            if path:
207	                image_paths.append((path, ref_item.get("label", "image")))
208	
209	    if not image_paths:
210	        return user_message
211	
212	    # 对每张图片生成描述
213	    descriptions = []
214	    for path, label in image_paths:
215	        try:
216	            desc = await _describe_image(path)
217	            if desc:
218	                descriptions.append(f"[图片 {label}: {desc}]")
219	        except Exception as e:
220	            logger.warning(f"Failed to describe image {path}: {e}")
221	            descriptions.append(f"[图片 {label}: 描述失败 - {str(e)[:80]}]")
222	
223	    if not descriptions:
224	        return user_message
225	
226	    # 将描述插入到 __refs__ 之前
227	    before_refs = user_message[:refs_start].rstrip()
228	    after_refs = user_message[refs_start:]
229	    desc_text = "\n\n" + "\n".join(descriptions)
230	    return before_refs + desc_text + "\n\n" + after_refs
231	
232	
233	def _resolve_local_image_ref(image_ref: str) -> Path:
234	    """将前端图片 ref 解析为已通过路径安全检查的本地路径。"""
235	    path_text = image_ref.strip()
236	    if path_text.startswith(_LOCAL_REF_PREFIX):
237	        path_text = path_text[len(_LOCAL_REF_PREFIX) :].strip()
238	    if not path_text:
239	        raise ValueError("图片路径为空")
240	
241	    file_path = Path(path_text).expanduser().resolve(strict=False)
242	    blocked = check_path_access(str(file_path))
243	    if blocked:
244	        raise PermissionError(blocked)
245	    return file_path
246	
247	
248	async def _describe_image(image_path: str) -> str:
249	    """调用 GLM-5V-Turbo 描述单张图片。"""
250	    import base64
251	    import mimetypes
252	
253	    file_path = _resolve_local_image_ref(image_path)
254	    if not file_path.exists():
255	        raise FileNotFoundError(f"图片文件不存在: {image_path}")
256	
257	    # 读取并编码图片
258	    image_bytes = file_path.read_bytes()
259	    mime = mimetypes.guess_type(str(file_path))[0] or "image/png"
260	    image_b64 = base64.b64encode(image_bytes).decode("utf-8")
261	    data_url = f"data:{mime};base64,{image_b64}"
262	
263	    # 调用 GLM-5V-Turbo
264	    from zai import ZhipuAiClient
265	
266	    settings = get_settings()
267	    if not settings.zhipuai_api_key:
268	        return "(图片描述不可用: 未配置智谱 API Key)"
269	
270	    client = ZhipuAiClient(api_key=settings.zhipuai_api_key)
271	
272	    response = await asyncio.to_thread(
273	        client.chat.completions.create,
274	        model="glm-5v-turbo",
275	        messages=[
276	            {
277	                "role": "user",
278	                "content": [
279	                    {"type": "image_url", "image_url": {"url": data_url}},
280	                    {
281	                        "type": "text",
282	                        "text": "请简洁描述这张图片的主要内容，包括关键元素、场景和文字（如果有）。控制在 100 字以内。",
283	                    },
284	                ],
285	            }
286	        ],
287	        thinking={"type": "enabled"},
288	        stream=False,
289	    )
290	
291	    return response.choices[0].message.content or "(无法描述)"
292	
293	
294	async def _get_messages_from_sidecar(
295	    session: "SessionState",
296	    limit: int = 50,
297	) -> list[dict]:
298	    """从 sidecar 获取消息历史。sidecar 不可用时返回空列表。
299	
300	    通过 SessionMap（SQLite 持久化）查找 sidecar session ID，
301	    然后调用 get_messages RPC 获取消息列表。
302	    """
303	    app_state = getattr(session, "_app_state", None)
304	    if app_state is None:
305	        return []
306	    sidecar_mgr = getattr(app_state, "sidecar_manager", None)
307	    if sidecar_mgr is None or sidecar_mgr.client is None:
308	        return []
309	    # 从 SessionMap 获取 sidecar session ID（持久化，重启后仍可用）
310	    from api.pi_bridge.session_adapter import SessionMap
311	    with SessionMap() as sm:
312	        sidecar_sid = sm.get_sidecar_id(session.session_id)
313	    if not sidecar_sid:
314	        sidecar_sid = getattr(session, "_sidecar_session_id", None)
315	    if not sidecar_sid:
316	        return []
317	    try:
318	        result = await sidecar_mgr.client.call("get_messages", {
319	            "session_id": sidecar_sid,
320	            "limit": limit,
321	        })
322	        return result.get("messages", [])
323	    except Exception:
324	        logger.debug("[sidecar] get_messages failed", exc_info=True)
325	        return []
326	
327	
328	async def _get_recent_ai_messages(session, config, limit: int = 5) -> list[str]:
329	    """从 sidecar 获取最近 N 条 AI 消息内容（用于贴纸情感分析）。
330	
331	    sidecar 模式下 config 为 None，改为从 sidecar RPC 获取消息历史。
332	    """
333	    messages = await _get_messages_from_sidecar(session, limit=limit * 3)
334	    ai_msgs = [m.get("content", "") for m in messages if m.get("role") == "assistant"]
335	    return ai_msgs[-limit:]
336	
337	
338	async def _stream_turn_sidecar(
339	    ws: WebSocket,
340	    session: SessionState,
341	    user_message_for_llm: str,
342	    system_prompt: str,
343	    current_provider_id: str,
344	    current_model_name: str | None,
345	) -> str:
346	    """Execute a turn using oh-my-pi sidecar (Bun subprocess).
347	
348	    Returns final_answer string for post-processing (stickers, memory, etc.).
349	    Intermediate events (token, tool_start, tool_end, tool_error) are streamed
350	    to the frontend via WS in real-time.
351	
352	    The answer and done events are NOT sent here — the existing post-processing
353	    pipeline in _run_agent_turn handles those (including sticker processing).
354	    """
355	    app_state = ws.app.state
356	
357	    # 1. Ensure sidecar is running
358	    mgr = app_state.sidecar_manager
359	    await mgr.start()
360	    client = mgr.client
361	    assert client is not None, "Sidecar client not available"
362	
363	    # 2. Look up sidecar session (persistent SessionMap, fallback to in-memory)
364	    from api.pi_bridge.session_adapter import SessionMap
365	    with SessionMap() as _session_map:
366	        sidecar_sid = _session_map.get_sidecar_id(session.session_id)
367	    if not sidecar_sid:
368	        sidecar_sid = getattr(session, "_sidecar_session_id", None)
369	
370	    if not sidecar_sid:
371	        if current_provider_id:
372	            model_str = f"{current_provider_id}/{current_model_name or 'gpt-4o'}"
373	        else:
374	            model_str = current_model_name or "gpt-4o"
375	
376	        # 首次创建 sidecar session，system_prompt 含人设/规则/技能
377	        # 如果是重启后重建，从 SessionMap 恢复最近对话上下文
378	        _sidecar_system_prompt = system_prompt
379	        try:
380	            _past_turns = _session_map.get_recent_turns(session.session_id, count=5)
381	            if _past_turns:
382	                _history_lines = []
383	                for t in _past_turns:
384	                    _history_lines.append(f"用户: {t.get('user', '')}")
385	                    _history_lines.append(f"助理: {t.get('assistant', '')}")
386	                _history_text = "\n".join(_history_lines)
387	                _sidecar_system_prompt = (
388	                    f"{system_prompt}\n\n"
389	                    f"[历史对话上下文（共 {len(_past_turns)} 轮）]\n"
390	                    f"{_history_text}\n"
391	                )
392	                logger.info(
393	                    "[sidecar] Restored %d past turns for session %s",
394	                    len(_past_turns), session.session_id[:8],
395	                )
396	        except Exception:
397	            logger.debug("[sidecar] Failed to restore past turns", exc_info=True)
398	
399	        result = await client.call("create_session", {
400	            "model": model_str,
401	            "system_prompt": _sidecar_system_prompt,
402	            "cwd": ".",
403	        })
404	        sidecar_sid = result["session_id"]
405	        session._sidecar_session_id = sidecar_sid
406	        _session_map.set_mapping(session.session_id, sidecar_sid)
407	        logger.info(
408	            "[sidecar] Created session %s for Maxma session %s",
409	            sidecar_sid[:8], session.session_id[:8],
410	        )
411	
412	    # 3. 情景记忆：每轮对话以用户消息为查询检索相关历史，注入到 user_message
413	    _user_message_for_llm = user_message_for_llm
414	    try:
415	        _episodic_mm = getattr(app_state, "episodic_mm", None)
416	        if _episodic_mm is not None and user_message_for_llm:
417	            from agent.context_manager import retrieve_from_episodic
418	            _episodic_context = retrieve_from_episodic(
419	                user_message_for_llm,
420	                _episodic_mm,
421	                top_k=3,
422	                session_id=session.session_id,
423	            )
424	            if _episodic_context:
425	                _user_message_for_llm = (
426	                    f"[相关情景记忆]\n{_episodic_context}\n\n"
427	                    f"---\n\n{user_message_for_llm}"
428	                )
429	    except Exception:
430	        logger.warning("[sidecar] Episodic retrieval failed", exc_info=True)
431	
432	    # 3. Register event handlers to forward intermediate events to WS
433	    final_answer = ""
434	    turn_done = asyncio.Event()
435	
436	    async def _on_token(sid: str, event: dict):
437	        if sid != sidecar_sid:
438	            return
439	        try:
440	            await ws.send_json({
441	                "type": "token",
442	                "payload": {"token": event.get("payload", {}).get("token", "")},
443	            })
444	        except Exception:
445	            pass
446	
447	    async def _on_tool_start(sid: str, event: dict):
448	        if sid != sidecar_sid:
449	            return
450	        try:
451	            payload = event.get("payload", {})
452	            await ws.send_json({
453	                "type": "tool_start",
454	                "payload": {
455	                    "tool_name": payload.get("tool_name", ""),
456	                    "input": payload.get("input", ""),
457	                },
458	            })
459	        except Exception:
460	            pass
461	
462	    async def _on_tool_end(sid: str, event: dict):
463	        if sid != sidecar_sid:
464	            return
465	        try:
466	            payload = event.get("payload", {})
467	            await ws.send_json({
468	                "type": "tool_end",
469	                "payload": {
470	                    "tool_name": payload.get("tool_name", ""),
471	                    "output": payload.get("output", ""),
472	                    "elapsed": payload.get("elapsed", 0),
473	                },
474	            })
475	        except Exception:
476	            pass
477	
478	    async def _on_tool_error(sid: str, event: dict):
479	        if sid != sidecar_sid:
480	            return
481	        try:
482	            payload = event.get("payload", {})
483	            await ws.send_json({
484	                "type": "tool_error",
485	                "payload": {
486	                    "tool_name": payload.get("tool_name", ""),
487	                    "error": payload.get("error", ""),
488	                },
489	            })
490	        except Exception:
491	            pass
492	
493	    async def _on_answer(sid: str, event: dict):
494	        nonlocal final_answer
495	        if sid != sidecar_sid:
496	            return
497	        # Extract the answer but do NOT send to WS — the existing post-processing
498	        # in _run_agent_turn handles sticker processing + answer push.
499	        final_answer = event.get("payload", {}).get("content", "")
500	
501	    async def _on_done(sid: str, event: dict):
502	        if sid != sidecar_sid:
503	            return
504	        turn_done.set()
505	
506	    # Register all event handlers
507	    unsubs = []
508	    for evt_type, handler in [
509	        ("token", _on_token),
510	        ("tool_start", _on_tool_start),
511	        ("tool_end", _on_tool_end),
512	        ("tool_error", _on_tool_error),
513	        ("answer", _on_answer),
514	        ("done", _on_done),
515	    ]:
516	        unsub = client.on(evt_type, handler)
517	        unsubs.append(unsub)
518	
519	    # 4. Execute prompt via sidecar
520	    try:
521	        await client.call("prompt", {
522	            "session_id": sidecar_sid,
523	            "message": _user_message_for_llm,
524	        })
525	        # Wait for done event (sidecar signals completion)
526	        await asyncio.wait_for(turn_done.wait(), timeout=600)
527	    except asyncio.TimeoutError:
528	        logger.warning("[sidecar] Turn timed out for session %s", sidecar_sid)
529	        if not final_answer:
530	            final_answer = "（Sidecar 处理超时，请重试）"
531	    except Exception as e:
532	        logger.exception("[sidecar] Turn failed for session %s", sidecar_sid)
533	        if not final_answer:
534	            final_answer = f"（Sidecar 处理出错：{e}）"
535	    finally:
536	        for unsub in unsubs:
537	            try:
538	                unsub()
539	            except Exception:
540	                pass
541	
542	    return final_answer
543	
544	
545	async def _calculate_context_usage(
546	    session,
547	    system_prompt,
548	    *,
549	    max_tokens: int = 256_000,
550	    model_name: str = "",
551	) -> dict:
552	    """估算上下文用量。sidecar 模式下从消息历史估算。
553	
554	    从 sidecar 获取消息列表，用字符数粗略估算 token 用量。
555	    返回字典包括估算用量、最大用量、占比、消息数。
556	    """
557	    messages = await _get_messages_from_sidecar(session, limit=200)
558	    total_chars = sum(len(m.get("content", "")) for m in messages)
559	    total_chars += len(system_prompt or "")
560	    # 粗略估算：混合中英文约 2 字符/token
561	    estimated_tokens = int(total_chars / 2)
562	    return {
563	        "estimated_tokens": estimated_tokens,
564	        "max_tokens": max_tokens,
565	        "percentage": min(100, int(estimated_tokens / max(max_tokens, 1) * 100)),
566	        "message_count": len(messages),
567	        "model_name": model_name,
568	    }
569	
570	
571	async def _inject_cancel_tool_messages(session, config, ws: WebSocket) -> None:
572	    """为 checkpoint 中孤立的 tool_calls 注入统一格式的正常 ToolMessage。
573	
574	    sidecar 模式下 session._graph 为 None，取消由 sidecar 的 cancel RPC 处理，
575	    无需手动清理 checkpoint。直接返回。
576	    """
577	    graph = session._graph
578	    if graph is None:
579	        return  # sidecar 模式：cancel 由 sidecar 处理，无需 checkpoint 清理
580	
581	    try:
582	        state = await graph.aget_state(config)
583	    except Exception:
584	        logger.debug("Failed to get graph state for cancel cleanup", exc_info=True)
585	        return  # checkpoint 不可读时静默跳过
586	
587	    messages = state.values.get("messages", [])
588	    if not messages:
589	        return
590	
591	    # 从后往前找最后一个 AIMessage
592	    last_ai = None
593	    for i in range(len(messages) - 1, -1, -1):
594	        if isinstance(messages[i], AIMessage):
595	            last_ai = messages[i]
596	            break
597	
598	    if last_ai is None:
599	        return
600	
601	    tool_calls = getattr(last_ai, "tool_calls", [])
602	    if not tool_calls:
603	        return
604	
605	    # 收集其后所有 ToolMessage 的 tool_call_id 集合
606	    try:
607	        idx = messages.index(last_ai)
608	    except ValueError:
609	        return
610	    following = messages[idx + 1 :]
611	
612	    tool_msg_ids = {m.tool_call_id for m in following if isinstance(m, ToolMessage)}
613	
614	    orphaned = [tc for tc in tool_calls if tc["id"] not in tool_msg_ids]
615	    if not orphaned:
616	        return  # checkpoint 已一致
617	
618	    # 通知前端：使运行的工具体进入错误状态
619	    for tc in orphaned:
620	        try:
621	            await ws.send_json(
622	                {
623	                    "type": "tool_error",
624	                    "payload": {
625	                        "tool_name": tc["name"],
626	                        "error": "用户取消了该工具调用",
627	                    },
628	                }
629	            )
630	        except Exception:
631	            logger.debug(
632	                "Failed to send tool_error via WebSocket (connection may be closed)",
633	                exc_info=True,
634	            )
635	
636	    # 生成取消 ToolMessage 并写入 checkpoint
637	    cancel_msgs = []
638	    for tc in orphaned:
639	        cancel_msgs.append(
640	            ToolMessage(
641	                content=format_error("用户取消了该工具调用"),
642	                name=tc["name"],
643	                tool_call_id=tc["id"],
644	            )
645	        )
646	    try:
647	        await graph.aupdate_state(config, {"messages": cancel_msgs}, as_node="tools")
648	    except Exception as e:
649	        print(
650	            f"[cancel] aupdate_state failed: {type(e).__name__}: {e}", file=sys.stderr
651	        )
652	        raise
653	
654	
655	# ── 项目上下文自动感知 ──────────────────────────────────────────
656	
657	import re as _re
658	
659	# 匹配 Windows / Unix 绝对路径
660	_PATH_PATTERN = _re.compile(r"(?:[A-Za-z]:[\\/]|[\\/])(?:[\w .\-]+[\\/])*[\w .\-]+")
661	
662	
663	def _detect_project_path(message: str) -> str | None:
664	    """从用户消息中提取可能的项目根目录路径。"""
665	    matches = _PATH_PATTERN.findall(message)
666	    for m in matches:
667	        p = m.rstrip("\\/").rstrip()
668	        # 检查是否是目录
669	        from pathlib import Path as _Path
670	
671	        if _Path(p).is_dir():
672	            # 检查是否像项目根目录（含 .git 或 package.json 或 pyproject.toml 等）
673	            markers = [
674	                ".git",
675	                "package.json",
676	                "pyproject.toml",
677	                "Cargo.toml",
678	                "go.mod",
679	                "requirements.txt",
680	                "setup.py",
681	            ]
682	            if any((_Path(p) / marker).exists() for marker in markers):
683	                return p
684	    return None
685	
686	
687	def _get_project_context(session: SessionState, user_message: str) -> str | None:
688	    """获取项目上下文：优先用缓存，否则尝试从消息检测并扫描。"""
689	    # 已有缓存
690	    if session._project_context is not None:
691	        return session._project_context
692	
693	    # 尝试从消息检测项目路径
694	    project_path = _detect_project_path(user_message)
695	    if project_path is None:
696	        return None
697	
698	    # 扫描项目
699	    try:
700	        from agent.project_scanner import scan_project
701	
702	        ctx = scan_project(project_path)
703	        text = ctx.to_prompt_text()
704	        # 缓存到 session
705	        session._project_context = text
706	        session._project_path = project_path
707	        return text
708	    except Exception as e:
709	        import logging
710	
711	        logging.getLogger(__name__).warning("[project_scanner] 扫描失败: %s", e)
712	        return None
713	
714	
715	async def _project_completed_turn_to_episodic(
716	    *,
717	    user_message: str = "",
718	    assistant_message: str = "",
719	    episodic_mm,
720	    session_id: str,
721	    turn_id: str,
722	    graph=None,
723	    config: dict | None = None,
724	) -> None:
725	    """Best-effort 将一个成功的 chat turn 投影到情景记忆。
726	
727	    sidecar 模式下 graph/config 为 None，直接使用传入的 user_message 和
728	    assistant_message 构造摘要，不再从 checkpoint 读取消息列表。
729	    """
730	    if episodic_mm is None:
731	        return
732	    try:
733	        # sidecar 模式：graph 为 None，使用直接传入的消息
734	        if graph is None:
735	            # 构造简单的摘要文本用于情景记忆
736	            summary_parts = []
737	            if user_message:
738	                user_preview = user_message[:200] + ("..." if len(user_message) > 200 else "")
739	                summary_parts.append(f"用户: {user_preview}")
740	            if assistant_message:
741	                asst_preview = assistant_message[:300] + ("..." if len(assistant_message) > 300 else "")
742	                summary_parts.append(f"助理: {asst_preview}")
743	            summary = "\n".join(summary_parts)
744	            if not summary:
745	                return
746	            # 写入情景记忆
747	            episode_id = await episodic_mm.add_episode(
748	                session_id=session_id,
749	                turn_id=turn_id,
750	                summary=summary,
751	            )
752	            if episode_id is None:
753	                logger.debug(
754	                    "[episodic] no episode created for session=%s turn=%s",
755	                    session_id, turn_id,
756	                )
757	            return
758	
759	        # LangGraph 路径（保留兼容，理论上 sidecar 模式不会到达）
760	        episode_id = await commit_to_episodic(
761	            graph,
762	            config,
763	            episodic_mm,
764	            session_id=session_id,
765	            turn_id=turn_id,
766	        )
767	        if episode_id is None:
768	            logger.warning(
769	                "[episodic] projection produced no episode for session=%s turn=%s",
770	                session_id,
771	                turn_id,
772	            )
773	    except Exception:
774	        logger.exception(
775	            "[episodic] projection failed after completed response for session=%s turn=%s",
776	            session_id,
777	            turn_id,
778	        )
779	
780	
781	def _new_turn_id(turn_id: object = None) -> str:
782	    """Return a validated client id or create one before execution begins."""
783	    if isinstance(turn_id, str):
784	        candidate = turn_id.strip()
785	        if candidate and len(candidate) <= 128:
786	            return candidate
787	    return uuid.uuid4().hex
788	
789	
790	async def _is_memory_eligible_turn(graph, config: dict) -> bool:
791	    """Read the graph's explicit model outcome before persisting a turn.
792	
793	    Provider failures are intentionally rendered as helpful AI messages by the
794	    graph.  Their text is not a reliable persistence signal, particularly
795	    across locales and provider implementations, so only an explicit success
796	    marker allows automatic episodic/LTM projection.
797	    """
798	    try:
799	        state = await graph.aget_state(config)
800	        values = getattr(state, "values", {}) if state is not None else {}
801	        succeeded = values.get("llm_invocation_succeeded")
802	        if succeeded is True:
803	            return True
804	        if succeeded is False:
805	            logger.info("[memory] skipping failed model turn")
806	        else:
807	            logger.warning("[memory] skipping turn without model outcome metadata")
808	    except Exception:
809	        logger.warning(
810	            "[memory] skipping turn with unreadable model outcome", exc_info=True
811	        )
812	    return False
813	
814	
815	async def _run_agent_turn(
816	    ws: WebSocket,
817	    session: SessionState,
818	    user_message: str,
819	    private_mode: bool = False,
820	    auto_approve: bool = False,
821	    provider_id: str | None = None,
822	    model_name: str | None = None,
823	    think_path_id: str | None = None,
824	    turn_id: str | None = None,
825	):
826	    """
827	    在指定的session中编排一轮 Agent 对话。
828	    无返回值。
829	    以内置的 WebSocketCallback回调函数和前端通信系统作为副作用。
830	
831	    若指定了 provider_id + model_name，则从 ProviderManager 动态创建 LLM；
832	    否则退化到 app_state.llm 全局 fallback。
833	    """
834	    # 1. [准备环境] 从 WebSocket 获取应用状态
835	    app_state = ws.app.state
836	    current_task = asyncio.current_task()
837	    # The memory id is assigned before any model work.  Callers can pass a
838	    # stable client/request id when retrying after reconnect; otherwise this
839	    # invocation gets one stable id for its full lifetime.
840	    turn_id = _new_turn_id(turn_id)
841	    interaction.current_session_id.set(session.session_id)
842	    # ── 多模态：自动描述用户附带的图片 ──────────────────────────
843	    user_message = await _process_image_refs(user_message)
844	    # ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
845	
846	    # 获取默认上下文窗口大小和模型名（一次性解构，避免重复调用）
847	    default_max_tokens, fallback_model_name = _get_provider_context(app_state)
848	
849	    # 子会话在创建时带有不可变的 DelegationContext。前端连接后也必须
850	    # 消费它，不能让客户端 payload 或之后的全局 provider 配置改变父任务
851	    # 已授权的模型、工具或预算。普通会话保持原有选择逻辑。
852	    delegation_context = (
853	        getattr(session, "delegation_context", None)
854	        if getattr(session, "is_subagent", False)
855	        else None
856	    )
857	    delegation_helpers = None
858	    auto_approve = _effective_auto_approve(session, auto_approve)
859	    session.auto_approve = auto_approve
860	    interaction.set_session_auto_approve(session.session_id, auto_approve)
861	
862	    # 动态 LLM 选择（Phase 2：每次消息独立指定提供商/模型）
863	    # 阶段 3.3：指定 provider 失败时尝试 fallback 链（按 priority 排序）
864	    current_max_tokens = default_max_tokens
865	    current_provider_id = ""
866	    if provider_id and model_name and hasattr(app_state, "provider_manager"):
867	        try:
868	            provider = app_state.provider_manager.get(provider_id)
869	            llm = provider.create_llm(model_name, temperature=0.7, streaming=True)
870	            current_model_name = model_name
871	            current_max_tokens = provider.config.context_window
872	            current_provider_id = provider.config.id
873	        except KeyError:
874	            # 阶段 3.3：尝试 fallback 到下一个可用 provider
875	            fallback_provider = app_state.provider_manager.get_fallback(
876	                exclude_ids={provider_id} if provider_id else None
877	            )
878	            if fallback_provider is not None:
879	                logger.warning(
880	                    "[chat:%s] requested provider/model fallback: provider_id=%r model=%r not found; "
881	                    "switching to fallback provider=%r (priority=%d)",
882	                    session.session_id[:8],
883	                    provider_id,
884	                    model_name,
885	                    fallback_provider.config.id,
886	                    fallback_provider.config.priority,
887	                )
888	                llm = fallback_provider.create_llm(
889	                    fallback_provider.default_model,
890	                    temperature=0.7,
891	                    streaming=True,
892	                )
893	                current_model_name = fallback_provider.default_model
894	                current_max_tokens = fallback_provider.config.context_window
895	                current_provider_id = fallback_provider.config.id
896	            else:
897	                logger.warning(
898	                    "[chat:%s] requested provider/model fallback: provider_id=%r model=%r not found; "
899	                    "no fallback available, using default",
900	                    session.session_id[:8],
901	                    provider_id,
902	                    model_name,
903	                )
904	                llm = app_state.llm
905	                current_model_name = None
906	    elif provider_id or model_name:
907	        logger.warning(
908	            "[chat:%s] requested provider/model fallback: provider_id=%r model=%r incomplete or unavailable; "
909	            "using default provider/model=%r",
910	            session.session_id[:8],
911	            provider_id,
912	            model_name,
913	            fallback_model_name or "<unknown>",
914	        )
915	        llm = app_state.llm
916	        current_model_name = None
917	    else:
918	        llm = app_state.llm
919	        current_model_name = None
920	
921	    # ThinkPath is a user-confirmed depth preference, not an opaque prompt
922	    # classifier.  It may opt into declarative routing only when the user did
923	    # not already select a provider/model in this same request.
924	    settings = get_settings()
925	    think_path_execution = _resolve_think_path_execution(
926	        think_path_id,
927	        think_path_enabled=settings.think_path_enabled,
928	        declarative_model_routing_enabled=settings.declarative_model_routing_enabled,
929	        has_explicit_model_selection=bool(provider_id or model_name),
930	        provider_manager=getattr(app_state, "provider_manager", None),
931	    )
932	    if think_path_execution.provider is not None:
933	        try:
934	            routed_provider = think_path_execution.provider
935	            routed_model_name = think_path_execution.model_name
936	            llm = routed_provider.create_llm(
937	                routed_model_name,
938	                temperature=0.7,
939	                streaming=True,
940	            )
941	            current_provider_id = routed_provider.config.id
942	            current_model_name = routed_model_name
943	            current_max_tokens = routed_provider.config.context_window
944	            logger.info(
945	                "[chat:%s] ThinkPath %s selected provider=%s model=%s",
946	                session.session_id[:8],
947	                think_path_execution.path.id if think_path_execution.path else "",
948	                current_provider_id,
949	                current_model_name,
950	            )
951	        except Exception:
952	            # Do not turn an optional selection preference into a chat outage.
953	            # The previously selected/default LLM remains intact.
954	            logger.warning(
955	                "[chat:%s] ThinkPath route creation failed; using normal selection",
956	                session.session_id[:8],
957	                exc_info=True,
958	            )
959	
960	    if delegation_context is not None:
961	        from tools.sub_agent.delegation_context import (
962	            activate_delegation_context,
963	            bind_model_budget,
964	            prepare_delegated_tools,
965	            reset_delegation_context,
966	        )
967	
968	        delegation_helpers = (
969	            activate_delegation_context,
970	            prepare_delegated_tools,
971	            reset_delegation_context,
972	        )
973	        if delegation_context.remaining_seconds() <= 0:
974	            error = RuntimeError("子 Agent 的委托时间预算已耗尽")
975	            if (
976	                session._pending_result is not None
977	                and not session._pending_result.done()
978	            ):
979	                session._pending_result.set_exception(error)
980	            await ws.send_json(
981	                format_ws_error(ErrorCode.AGENT_ERROR, "子 Agent 的委托时间预算已耗尽")
982	            )
983	            return
984	        llm = bind_model_budget(delegation_context)
985	        current_model_name = delegation_context.model_name or current_model_name
986	        if delegation_context.max_tokens > 0:
987	            current_max_tokens = min(current_max_tokens, delegation_context.max_tokens)
988	
989	    if llm is None:
990	        error_collector.add_error(
991	            level="ERROR",
992	            category="llm",
993	            message="No LLM provider configured",
994	            session_id=session.session_id,
995	        )
996	        await ws.send_json(
997	            format_ws_error(
998	                ErrorCode.NO_LLM,
999	                "No LLM provider configured. Add one in Model Settings first.",
1000	            )
1001	        )
1002	        return
1003	
1004	    # A normal parent turn also activates a context.  This makes a top-level
1005	    # delegation inherit the model actually selected for this request rather
1006	    # than rediscovering app_state.llm inside the tool.
1007	    if delegation_context is None:
1008	        from tools.sub_agent.delegation_context import (
1009	            activate_delegation_context,
1010	            create_delegation_context,
1011	            reset_delegation_context,
1012	        )
1013	
1014	        execution_context = create_delegation_context(
1015	            app_state,
1016	            session.session_id,
1017	            model=llm,
1018	            provider_id=current_provider_id,
1019	            model_name=current_model_name,
1020	            auto_approve=auto_approve,
1021	        )
1022	        delegation_helpers = (
1023	            activate_delegation_context,
1024	            None,
1025	            reset_delegation_context,
1026	        )
1027	    else:
1028	        execution_context = delegation_context
1029	
1030	    system_prompt = build_system_prompt()
1031	
1032	    # ── 项目上下文自动感知 ──────────────────────────────────────
1033	    # 缓存优化：project_ctx 不再追加到 system_prompt，而是 prepend 到
1034	    # user_message。这样 SystemMessage 保持完全稳定，有利于 DeepSeek
1035	    # prompt cache 命中（project_ctx 仅在检测到项目路径时非空）。
1036	    project_ctx = _get_project_context(session, user_message)
1037	    # ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
1038	
1039	    # 缓存优化：使用全量工具集 + MCP 工具，避免每轮工具集变化破坏
1040	    # DeepSeek prompt cache（tools 字段是 prompt 前缀的一部分）。
1041	    # 全量工具带来的额外 token 会被缓存，成本远低于缓存 miss。
1042	    mcp_tools = getattr(ws.app.state, "mcp_tools", None) or []
1043	    turn_tools = merge_tool_lists(
1044	        get_all_tools(), list(mcp_tools), log_collisions=False
1045	    )
1046	    if delegation_context is not None:
1047	        # This is the execution boundary, not merely prompt-time filtering.
1048	        # ScopedTool validates path arguments immediately before each call.
1049	        turn_tools = delegation_helpers[1](turn_tools, delegation_context)
1050	    # 4 层架构：注入情景记忆管理器，启用 episodic_retriever 节点
1051	    episodic_mm = getattr(ws.app.state, "episodic_mm", None)
1052	    # B6：生成运行时配置摘要，让 agent 感知自身的 providers/MCP/工具配置全貌
1053	    runtime_context_text = _build_runtime_context_for_agent(
1054	        app_state, turn_tools, current_model_name
1055	    )
1056	    think_path_context = _think_path_runtime_context(think_path_execution.path)
1057	    if think_path_context:
1058	        runtime_context_text = "\n\n".join(
1059	            part for part in (think_path_context, runtime_context_text) if part
1060	        )
1061	
1062	    # project_ctx prepend 到 user_message（不修改 system_prompt，保持缓存稳定）
1063	    if project_ctx:
1064	        user_message_for_llm = f"[项目上下文]\n{project_ctx}\n\n---\n\n{user_message}"
1065	    else:
1066	        user_message_for_llm = user_message
1067	
1068	    # oh-my-pi sidecar: no LangGraph state
1069	    config = None
1070	    agent_maxma = None
1071	    session._graph = None
1072	
1073	    # 2. [执行轮次] 流式执行 Agent 图，副作用推送最终回答，另有config回调副作用
1074	    final_answer = ""
1075	    _run_error: str | None = None
1076	    turn_completed = False
1077	    context_token = None
1078	    try:
1079	        # turn 开始时推送当前上下文用量（含刚加入的 user message）
1080	        initial_turn_usage = await _calculate_context_usage(
1081	            session,
1082	            system_prompt,
1083	            max_tokens=current_max_tokens,
1084	            model_name=current_model_name or "",
1085	        )
1086	        await ws.send_json({"type": "context_usage", "payload": initial_turn_usage})
1087	
1088	        context_token = delegation_helpers[0](execution_context)
1089	        if delegation_context is not None:
1090	            async with asyncio.timeout(delegation_context.remaining_seconds()):
1091	                final_answer = await _stream_turn_sidecar(
1092	                    ws,
1093	                    session,
1094	                    user_message_for_llm,
1095	                    system_prompt,
1096	                    current_provider_id,
1097	                    current_model_name,
1098	                )
1099	        else:
1100	            _turn_timeout = 600
1101	            try:
1102	                _turn_timeout = get_settings().turn_timeout
1103	            except Exception:
1104	                pass
1105	            async with asyncio.timeout(_turn_timeout):
1106	                final_answer = await _stream_turn_sidecar(
1107	                    ws,
1108	                    session,
1109	                    user_message_for_llm,
1110	                    system_prompt,
1111	                    current_provider_id,
1112	                    current_model_name,
1113	                )
1114	        # Sidecar mode: no graph state to inspect, trust the returned answer
1115	        turn_completed = bool(final_answer)
1116	
1117	        # 保存本轮对话到 SessionMap（用于侧边栏重启后恢复上下文）
1118	        if final_answer and not private_mode:
1119	            try:
1120	                from api.pi_bridge.session_adapter import SessionMap
1121	                with SessionMap() as sm:
1122	                    sm.append_turn(session.session_id, user_message, final_answer)
1123	            except Exception:
1124	                logger.debug("[sidecar] Failed to save turn to SessionMap", exc_info=True)
1125	
1126	        if final_answer:
1127	            # 表情包处理：分层决策架构
1128	            # 1. LLM 主动输出 [表情包:情绪] → 直接解析
1129	            # 2. LLM 未输出 → 决策器判断是否补发
1130	            from tools.sticker_utils import process_stickers
1131	
1132	            ai_recent = await _get_recent_ai_messages(session, config, limit=5)
1133	            processed_answer, _ = process_stickers(
1134	                final_answer,
1135	                user_message=user_message,
1136	                ai_recent_messages=ai_recent,
1137	            )
1138	            final_answer = processed_answer
1139	            await ws.send_json(
1140	                {  # [向前端通信] 1. 向客户端推送最终答案
1141	                    "type": "answer",
1142	                    "payload": {"content": processed_answer},
1143	                }
1144	            )
1145	    except asyncio.CancelledError:
1146	        # 清理 interaction 挂起 Future
1147	        await interaction.cancel_session(session.session_id)
1148	
1149	        # sidecar 模式：通过 cancel RPC 中止 sidecar 中的生成
1150	        try:
1151	            sidecar_mgr = getattr(ws.app.state, "sidecar_manager", None)
1152	            if sidecar_mgr and sidecar_mgr.client:
1153	                from api.pi_bridge.session_adapter import SessionMap
1154	                with SessionMap() as sm:
1155	                    sidecar_sid = sm.get_sidecar_id(session.session_id)
1156	                if not sidecar_sid:
1157	                    sidecar_sid = getattr(session, "_sidecar_session_id", None)
1158	                if sidecar_sid:
1159	                    await sidecar_mgr.client.call("cancel", {"session_id": sidecar_sid})
1160	        except Exception as e:
1161	            logger.debug("[cancel] sidecar cancel RPC failed: %s", e)
1162	
1163	        # 注：原 LangGraph 路径的 checkpoint 清理和 interrupt AIMessage 注入
1164	        # 在 sidecar 模式下不再需要 — cancel RPC 已中止生成，
1165	        # sidecar 内部维护消息状态的一致性。
1166	
1167	        await ws.send_json(format_ws_error(ErrorCode.CANCELLED, "生成已取消"))
1168	    except Exception as e:
1169	        # 清理可能挂起的用户交互 Future，防止阻塞后续交互
1170	        await interaction.cancel_session(
1171	            session.session_id, "Agent 执行出错，交互已取消"
1172	        )
1173	        _run_error = str(e)
1174	        trace_id = uuid.uuid4().hex[:8]
1175	        logger.error(
1176	            f"[sub-agent:{session.session_id[:8]}] _run_agent_turn error: {e}",
1177	            exc_info=True,
1178	            extra={"trace_id": trace_id},
1179	        )
1180	        error_collector.add_exception(
1181	            e,
1182	            category="agent",
1183	            message=f"Agent 执行出错: {str(e)[:200]}",
1184	            trace_id=trace_id,
1185	            session_id=session.session_id,
1186	        )
1187	        await ws.send_json(
1188	            format_ws_error(
1189	                ErrorCode.AGENT_ERROR,
1190	                f"Agent 执行出错: {str(e)[:200]}",
1191	                trace_id=trace_id,
1192	            )
1193	        )
1194	    finally:
1195	        if context_token is not None:
1196	            delegation_helpers[2](context_token)
1197	        if session._active_task is current_task:
1198	            session._active_task = None
1199	        context_usage = await _calculate_context_usage(
1200	            session,
1201	            system_prompt,
1202	            max_tokens=current_max_tokens,
1203	            model_name=current_model_name or "",
1204	        )
1205	        await ws.send_json(
1206	            {  # [向前端通信] 3. 推送 turn 结束 + 上下文用量 + turn_id（用于记忆事件关联）
1207	                "type": "done",
1208	                "payload": {
1209	                    "turn_id": turn_id,
1210	                    "context_usage": context_usage,
1211	                },
1212	            }
1213	        )
1214	
1215	    # 3. [后处理] 增加消息计数器，将对话记录入长期记忆
1216	    # 修复：此前仅在 final_answer 非空时 +=2，错误轮次仍写 checkpointer（至少写入 HumanMessage）
1217	    # 但计数不增 → message_count 与 checkpointer 实际消息数漂移，导致：
1218	    # 1) undo 端点 max(0, count - deleted) 计算错误
1219	    # 2) const 会话 YAML metadata.message_count 不准，重启后显示错误
1220	    if final_answer:
1221	        session.message_count += 2  # human + ai
1222	    else:
1223	        # Agent 出错：graph.ainvoke 已把 HumanMessage 写入 checkpointer，但没有 AI 回复
1224	        session.message_count += 1
1225	    memory_eligible = turn_completed and bool(final_answer)
1226	    if not private_mode and memory_eligible:
1227	        if final_answer:
1228	            await _project_completed_turn_to_episodic(
1229	                user_message=user_message,
1230	                assistant_message=final_answer,
1231	                episodic_mm=episodic_mm,
1232	                session_id=session.session_id,
1233	                turn_id=turn_id,
1234	            )
1235	        # 增量发送：只传成功轮次给记忆消费者，避免错误提示污染 LTM。
1236	        messages_for_memory = [
1237	            {"role": "user", "content": user_message},
1238	            {"role": "assistant", "content": final_answer},
1239	        ]
1240	        logger.info(
1241	            "[ltm] calling send_history, messages=%d (incremental)",
1242	            len(messages_for_memory),
1243	        )
1244	        try:
1245	            await app_state.ltm.send_history(
1246	                messages_for_memory,
1247	                session_id=session.session_id,
1248	                turn_id=turn_id,
1249	            )
1250	            logger.info("[ltm] send_history completed")
1251	        except Exception as e:
1252	            logger.error("[ltm] send_history failed: %s", e, exc_info=True)
1253	
1254	    # 4. [Const 会话] 自动持久化到磁盘 YAML
1255	    if final_answer and session.is_const:
1256	        try:
1257	            # sidecar 模式：从 sidecar 获取消息历史
1258	            messages = await _get_messages_from_sidecar(session, limit=200)
1259	            if messages:
1260	                # 转换为 serialize_messages 兼容格式
1261	                serialized = []
1262	                for m in messages:
1263	                    role = m.get("role", "unknown")
1264	                    content = m.get("content", "")
1265	                    if role == "user":
1266	                        serialized.append({"type": "human", "content": content})
1267	                    elif role == "assistant":
1268	                        serialized.append({"type": "ai", "content": content})
1269	                # 确保最后一条 AI 消息是 final_answer
1270	                for item in reversed(serialized):
1271	                    if item.get("type") == "ai":
1272	                        item["content"] = final_answer
1273	                        break
1274	                metadata = session.persistent_metadata()
1275	                save_const_session(
1276	                    session.session_id, session.const_name, metadata, serialized
1277	                )
1278	        except Exception as e:
1279	            print(
1280	                f"[const] 自动保存会话 {session.session_id[:8]} 失败: {e}",
1281	                file=sys.stderr,
1282	            )
1283	
1284	    # 5. [Sub-agent] 如果有待处理的 pending_result，resolve 它
1285	    if session._pending_result is not None and not session._pending_result.done():
1286	        if _run_error:
1287	            print(
1288	                f"[sub-agent:{session.session_id[:8]}] resolving pending_result with run error",
1289	                file=sys.stderr,
1290	            )
1291	            session._pending_result.set_exception(
1292	                RuntimeError(f"子 Agent 执行失败: {_run_error}")
1293	            )
1294	        elif final_answer:
1295	            print(
1296	                f"[sub-agent:{session.session_id[:8]}] resolving pending_result with answer",
1297	                file=sys.stderr,
1298	            )
1299	            session._pending_result.set_result(final_answer)
1300	        else:
1301	            print(
1302	                f"[sub-agent:{session.session_id[:8]}] resolving pending_result with exception (empty answer)",
1303	                file=sys.stderr,
1304	            )
1305	            session._pending_result.set_exception(
1306	                RuntimeError("Sub-agent 未能产生有效回答")
1307	            )
1308	
1309	
1310	async def _resume_sub_agent(
1311	    ws: WebSocket, session: SessionState
1312	) -> asyncio.Task | None:
1313	    """WebSocket 重连时，若会话有未完成的 sub-agent 任务则自动恢复执行。"""
1314	    if session._sub_agent_task is None or session._pending_result is None:
1315	        return None
1316	    if session._pending_result.done():
1317	        return None
1318	    task = session._sub_agent_task
1319	    session._sub_agent_task = None  # 消费掉，防止重连后重复启动
1320	    # 取消旧任务，等待其完成后再创建新任务，避免 checkpoint 竞态
1321	    if session._active_task is not None and not session._active_task.done():
1322	        session._active_task.cancel()
1323	        try:
1324	            await asyncio.wait_for(session._active_task, timeout=5)
1325	        except (asyncio.CancelledError, asyncio.TimeoutError):
1326	            pass
1327	        session._active_task = None
1328	    interaction.current_ws.set(ws)
1329	    interaction.current_session_id.set(session.session_id)
1330	    agent_task = asyncio.create_task(
1331	        _run_agent_turn(ws, session, task, private_mode=False)
1332	    )
1333	    session._active_task = agent_task
1334	    return agent_task
1335	
1336	
1337	@router.websocket("/ws/chat/{session_id}")
1338	async def websocket_chat(ws: WebSocket, session_id: str):
1339	    """WebSocket 聊天端点 — 接收用户消息、驱动 Agent、处理取消和用户交互。"""
1340	    await ws.accept()
1341	
1342	    # ── 初始化会话 ────────────────────────────────────────
1343	    app_state = ws.app.state
1344	    session = await app_state.session_manager.get_or_create(session_id)
1345	
1346	    # 注册 WebSocket 到注册表，供后台记忆 consumer 推送事件
1347	    app_state.ws_registry.register(session_id, ws)
1348	
1349	    # ── 推送初始上下文用量 ─────────────────────────────────
1350	    default_max_tokens, default_model = _get_provider_context(app_state)
1351	    initial_usage = await _calculate_context_usage(
1352	        session,
1353	        app_state.system_prompt,
1354	        max_tokens=default_max_tokens,
1355	        model_name=default_model,
1356	    )
1357	    await ws.send_json({"type": "context_usage", "payload": initial_usage})
1358	
1359	    # ── 断线重连时恢复 sub-agent ──────────────────────────
1360	    agent_task = await _resume_sub_agent(ws, session)
1361	
1362	    # ── 消息主循环 ────────────────────────────────────────
1363	    try:
1364	        while True:
1365	            raw = await ws.receive_text()
1366	            try:
1367	                msg = json.loads(raw)
1368	            except json.JSONDecodeError:
1369	                # 客户端发送非 JSON 文本（心跳探针、协议错误等），忽略不中断连接
1370	                continue
1371	            if not isinstance(msg, dict):
1372	                continue
1373	
1374	            match msg.get("type", ""):
1375	                case "ping":
1376	                    await ws.send_json({"type": "pong", "payload": {}})
1377	
1378	                case "chat":
1379	                    if agent_task and not agent_task.done():
1380	                        continue  # 已有 Agent 运行中，忽略本次输入
1381	
1382	                    payload = msg.get("payload")
1383	                    if not isinstance(payload, dict):
1384	                        continue
1385	                    user_message = str(payload.get("message", "")).strip()
1386	                    if not user_message:
1387	                        continue
1388	
1389	                    # 阶段 3.2：per-session 令牌桶限流
1390	                    allowed, rate_err = get_ws_rate_limiter().try_consume(session_id)
1391	                    if not allowed:
1392	                        get_metrics().record_rate_limit("ws")
1393	                        error_collector.add_error(
1394	                            level="WARNING",
1395	                            category="rate_limit",
1396	                            message=f"WebSocket 限流: {rate_err}",
1397	                            session_id=session_id,
1398	                        )
1399	                        await ws.send_json({"type": "error", "payload": rate_err})
1400	                        continue
1401	
1402	                    auto_approve = _effective_auto_approve(
1403	                        session, payload.get("auto_approve", False)
1404	                    )
1405	                    interaction.current_ws.set(ws)  # 供工具函数通过 WebSocket 推送交互
1406	                    interaction.current_session_id.set(session_id)
1407	                    interaction.set_session_auto_approve(session_id, auto_approve)
1408	
1409	                    agent_task = asyncio.create_task(
1410	                        _run_agent_turn(
1411	                            ws,
1412	                            session,
1413	                            user_message,
1414	                            private_mode=payload.get("private", False),
1415	                            auto_approve=auto_approve,
1416	                            provider_id=payload.get("provider_id"),
1417	                            model_name=payload.get("model_name"),
1418	                            think_path_id=payload.get("think_path_id"),
1419	                            turn_id=payload.get("turn_id"),
1420	                        )
1421	                    )
1422	                    session._active_task = agent_task  # 供外部 REST 接口查询活跃状态
1423	
1424	                case "user_response":
1425	                    payload = msg.get("payload", {})
1426	                    interaction_id = payload.get("interaction_id", "")
1427	                    response = payload.get("response", "")
1428	                    if interaction_id:
1429	                        await interaction.resolve(interaction_id, response)
1430	
1431	                case "artifact_action":
1432	                    # Artifact actions are never tool calls.  They can only
1433	                    # resolve an already-pending interaction after the signed,
1434	                    # session-bound token has been validated.
1435	
1436	                    if not get_settings().interactive_artifacts_enabled:
1437	                        continue
1438	                    try:
1439	                        from api.artifacts.schema import (
1440	                            ArtifactActionResponse,
1441	                            artifact_action_authorizer,
1442	                        )
1443	
1444	                        response = ArtifactActionResponse.model_validate(
1445	                            msg.get("payload", {})
1446	                        )
1447	                        authorized = artifact_action_authorizer.authorize(
1448	                            response, session_id=session_id
1449	                        )
1450	                    except (TypeError, ValueError):
1451	                        continue
1452	                    if authorized is None:
1453	                        continue
1454	                    if await interaction.resolve(
1455	                        authorized.interaction_id, authorized.action_id
1456	                    ):
1457	                        artifact_action_authorizer.consume(authorized)
1458	
1459	                case "plan_response":
1460	                    payload = msg.get("payload", {})
1461	                    plan_id = payload.get("plan_id", "")
1462	                    action = payload.get("action", "")
1463	                    modified_plan = payload.get("modified_plan", "")
1464	                    if plan_id:
1465	                        if action == "approve":
1466	                            await interaction.resolve(plan_id, "approve")
1467	                        elif action == "reject":
1468	                            await interaction.resolve(plan_id, "reject")
1469	                        elif action == "modify" and modified_plan:
1470	                            await interaction.resolve(plan_id, modified_plan)
1471	                        else:
1472	                            await interaction.resolve(plan_id, "reject")
1473	
1474	                case "cancel":
1475	                    if agent_task and not agent_task.done():
1476	                        agent_task.cancel()
1477	                        agent_task = None
1478	
1479	                case "update_auto_approve":
1480	                    payload = msg.get("payload")
1481	                    if not isinstance(payload, dict):
1482	                        continue
1483	                    auto_approve_val = _effective_auto_approve(
1484	                        session, payload.get("auto_approve", False)
1485	                    )
1486	                    interaction.set_session_auto_approve(session_id, auto_approve_val)
1487	                    session.auto_approve = auto_approve_val
1488	
1489	    except WebSocketDisconnect:
1490	        pass  # 客户端断开是正常行为
1491	    finally:
1492	        app_state.ws_registry.unregister(session_id)
1493	        if agent_task and not agent_task.done():
1494	            agent_task.cancel()
1495	        if session._active_task is agent_task:
1496	            session._active_task = None
1497	        interaction.clear_session_settings(session_id)
1498	
```

```json
1	import { defineStore } from 'pinia'
2	import { ref } from 'vue'
3	import { api } from '@/api'
4	import { removeTurnsFromStorage, TURNS_KEY_PREFIX } from '@/stores/chat'
5	import type { SessionInfo } from '@/types'
6	
7	const STORAGE_KEY = 'maxma_session_id'
8	
9	export const useSessionStore = defineStore('session', () => {
10	  const sessionId = ref('')
11	  const sessions = ref<SessionInfo[]>([])
12	  let _initialized = false
13	  let _initPromise: Promise<void> | null = null
14	
15	  async function initIfNeeded(retries = 5, delayMs = 1000) {
16	    if (_initialized) return
17	    if (_initPromise) { await _initPromise; return }
18	
19	    for (let attempt = 1; attempt <= retries; attempt++) {
20	      try {
21	        const stored = localStorage.getItem(STORAGE_KEY)
22	        if (stored) {
23	          try {
24	            await api.getSession(stored)
25	            sessionId.value = stored
26	          } catch {
27	            await _createSession()
28	          }
29	        } else {
30	          await _createSession()
31	        }
32	        await refreshSessions()
33	        cleanupOrphanedCaches()
34	        _initialized = true
35	        return
36	      } catch (e) {
37	        console.error(`[session] init failed (attempt ${attempt}/${retries}), retrying in ${delayMs}ms:`, e)
38	        _initialized = false
39	        if (attempt < retries) {
40	          await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, delayMs))
41	          delayMs *= 1.5  // 指数退避
42	        } else {
43	          console.error('[session] init failed after all retries')
44	        }
45	      }
46	    }
47	  }
48	
49	  async function refreshSessions() {
50	    // 失败时保留现有数据（不置空），并抛错让调用方决定是否重试
51	    // 修复：此前失败时 sessions.value = [] 且不抛错，
52	    // 导致 initIfNeeded 误认为 init 成功不再重试，
53	    // 页面刷新时如果后端还在启动会话列表永久为空
54	    const res = await api.listSessions()
55	    sessions.value = res.sessions
56	  }
57	
58	  async function _createSession() {
59	    const res = await api.createSession()
60	    sessionId.value = res.session_id
61	    localStorage.setItem(STORAGE_KEY, res.session_id)
62	  }
63	
64	  async function createSession() {
65	    await _createSession()
66	    await refreshSessions().catch(() => {})
67	  }
68	
69	  async function switchSession(id: string) {
70	    sessionId.value = id
71	    localStorage.setItem(STORAGE_KEY, id)
72	  }
73	
74	  async function deleteSession(id: string) {
75	    await api.deleteSession(id)
76	    removeTurnsFromStorage(id)
77	    if (sessionId.value === id) {
78	      await refreshSessions().catch(() => {})
79	      if (sessions.value.length > 0) {
80	        await switchSession(sessions.value[0].session_id)
81	      } else {
82	        await createSession()
83	      }
84	    } else {
85	      await refreshSessions().catch(() => {})
86	    }
87	  }
88	
89	  async function constifySession(id: string, name: string) {
90	    await api.constifySession(id, name)
91	    await refreshSessions().catch(() => {})
92	  }
93	
94	  async function unconstifySession(id: string) {
95	    await api.unconstifySession(id)
96	    await refreshSessions().catch(() => {})
97	  }
98	
99	  async function generateSessionTitle(id: string): Promise<string> {
100	    const res = await api.generateSessionTitle(id)
101	    return res.title
102	  }
103	
104	  function cleanupOrphanedCaches() {
105	    const validIds = new Set(sessions.value.map(s => s.session_id))
106	    // 防御：sessions 为空时（可能是后端不可用或 refreshSessions 失败），
107	    // 不清空缓存，避免后端短暂不可用时丢失所有会话历史
108	    if (validIds.size === 0) {
109	      console.warn('[session] cleanupOrphanedCaches: sessions 列表为空，跳过清理（可能是后端不可用）')
110	      return
111	    }
112	    for (let i = 0; i < localStorage.length; i++) {
113	      const key = localStorage.key(i)
114	      if (key && key.startsWith(TURNS_KEY_PREFIX)) {
115	        const sid = key.slice(TURNS_KEY_PREFIX.length)
116	        if (sid && !validIds.has(sid)) localStorage.removeItem(key)
117	      }
118	    }
119	  }
120	
121	  return {
122	    sessionId, sessions,
123	    initIfNeeded, refreshSessions, createSession, switchSession,
124	    deleteSession, constifySession, unconstifySession, generateSessionTitle,
125	  }
126	})
127	
```

```json
1	import { defineStore } from 'pinia'
2	import { computed, reactive } from 'vue'
3	import type { ChatTurn, ContextUsage } from '@/types'
4	
5	export const TURNS_KEY_PREFIX = 'maxma_turns_'
6	
7	interface SessionChannel {
8	  ws: WebSocket | null
9	  connected: boolean
10	  isStreaming: boolean
11	  isAwaitingUser: boolean
12	  turns: ChatTurn[]
13	  currentTurn: ChatTurn | null
14	  error: string | null
15	  errorCategory: 'user_error' | 'tool_error' | 'system_error' | 'rate_limit' | 'cancelled' | null
16	  errorTraceId: string | null
17	  contextUsage: ContextUsage | null
18	  taskTrackerData: Record<string, unknown> | null
19	  reconnectTimer: ReturnType<typeof setTimeout> | null
20	  reconnectAttempts: number
21	  initialized: boolean
22	  _awaitingToolName: string | null
23	  parentSessionId: string | null
24	  privateMode: boolean
25	  autoApprove: boolean
26	}
27	
28	function createChannel(): SessionChannel {
29	  return {
30	    ws: null, connected: false, isStreaming: false, isAwaitingUser: false,
31	    turns: [], currentTurn: null, error: null, errorCategory: null,
32	    errorTraceId: null, contextUsage: null, taskTrackerData: null,
33	    reconnectTimer: null, reconnectAttempts: 0, initialized: false,
34	    _awaitingToolName: null, parentSessionId: null,
35	    privateMode: false, autoApprove: false,
36	  }
37	}
38	
39	export const useChatStore = defineStore('chat', () => {
40	  const channels = reactive(new Map<string, SessionChannel>())
41	
42	  const allSessionStatuses = computed(() => {
43	    const map: Record<string, { connected: boolean; isStreaming: boolean; isAwaitingUser: boolean }> = {}
44	    for (const [sid, ch] of channels) {
45	      map[sid] = { connected: ch.connected, isStreaming: ch.isStreaming, isAwaitingUser: ch.isAwaitingUser }
46	    }
47	    return map
48	  })
49	
50	  function getOrCreateChannel(sid: string): SessionChannel {
51	    if (!channels.has(sid)) {
52	      channels.set(sid, createChannel())
53	    }
54	    return channels.get(sid)!
55	  }
56	
57	  function removeChannel(sid: string) {
58	    channels.delete(sid)
59	  }
60	
61	  function removeTurnsFromStorage(sid: string) {
62	    localStorage.removeItem(TURNS_KEY_PREFIX + sid)
63	  }
64	
65	  function saveTurnsToStorage(sid: string, data: ChatTurn[]) {
66	    try {
67	      localStorage.setItem(TURNS_KEY_PREFIX + sid, JSON.stringify(data))
68	    } catch (e) {
69	      console.error(`[chat:save] localStorage 保存失败:`, e)
70	    }
71	  }
72	
73	  function loadTurnsFromStorage(sid: string): ChatTurn[] | null {
74	    try {
75	      const raw = localStorage.getItem(TURNS_KEY_PREFIX + sid)
76	      return raw ? JSON.parse(raw) : null
77	    } catch { return null }
78	  }
79	
80	  function cleanupOrphanedCaches(validIds: Set<string>) {
81	    for (let i = 0; i < localStorage.length; i++) {
82	      const key = localStorage.key(i)
83	      if (key && key.startsWith(TURNS_KEY_PREFIX)) {
84	        const sid = key.slice(TURNS_KEY_PREFIX.length)
85	        if (sid && !validIds.has(sid)) localStorage.removeItem(key)
86	      }
87	    }
88	  }
89	
90	  return {
91	    channels, allSessionStatuses, TURNS_KEY_PREFIX,
92	    getOrCreateChannel, removeChannel,
93	    removeTurnsFromStorage, saveTurnsToStorage, loadTurnsFromStorage,
94	    cleanupOrphanedCaches,
95	  }
96	})
97	
98	/** 便捷工具函数：从 localStorage 移除指定会话的 turns 缓存 */
99	export function removeTurnsFromStorage(sid: string) {
100	  localStorage.removeItem(TURNS_KEY_PREFIX + sid)
101	}
102	
```

```json
146	<script setup lang="ts">
147	defineOptions({ name: 'ChatView' })
148	import { api } from '@/api'
149	import ChatInput from '@/components/ChatInput.vue'
150	import ChatWindow from '@/components/ChatWindow.vue'
151	import ContextUsageBadge from '@/components/ContextUsageBadge.vue'
152	import SessionPermissionModeControl from '@/components/SessionPermissionModeControl.vue'
153	import WorkflowCard from '@/components/WorkflowCard.vue'
154	import StatusBadge from '@/components/StatusBadge.vue'
155	import TaskTrackerBar from '@/components/TaskTrackerBar.vue'
156	import WorkbenchPanel from '@/components/workbench/WorkbenchPanel.vue'
157	import ReasoningTimeline from '@/components/workbench/ReasoningTimeline.vue'
158	import CanvasContainer from '@/components/workbench/CanvasContainer.vue'
159	import { useChat } from '@/composables/useChat'
160	import { useSelectionQuote } from '@/composables/useSelectionQuote'
161	import { useWorkbenchStore } from '@/stores/workbench'
162	import { useHealthStore } from '@/stores/health'
163	import { useProviderStore } from '@/stores/provider'
164	import { useSessionStore } from '@/stores/session'
165	import type { ParsedRef } from '@/utils/references'
166	import type { ThinkPathId } from '@/utils/thinkPath'
167	import { storeToRefs } from 'pinia'
168	import { computed, onMounted, ref } from 'vue'
169	
170	const sessionStore = useSessionStore()
171	const { sessionId, sessions } = storeToRefs(sessionStore)
172	const { health } = storeToRefs(useHealthStore())
173	const {
174	  connected, isStreaming, turns, currentTurn, error, errorCategory, errorTraceId,
175	  contextUsage, taskTrackerData, send, cancel, sendUserResponse, sendArtifactAction, sendPlanResponse, removeTurns,
176	  privateMode, setPrivateMode, autoApprove, setAutoApprove
177	} = useChat(sessionId)
178	
179	const workbench = useWorkbenchStore()
180	
181	const allTurns = computed(() => {
182	  const result = [...turns.value]
183	  if (currentTurn.value) {
184	    result.push(currentTurn.value)
185	  }
186	  return result
187	})
188	
189	const {
190	  quoteCandidate,
191	  quotedSelections,
192	  commitCandidate,
193	  removeQuote,
194	  clearQuotes,
195	} = useSelectionQuote()
196	
197	// 持久化 provider/model 选择到 localStorage，刷新后恢复
198	const SELECTED_PROVIDER_KEY = 'maxma_selected_provider'
199	const SELECTED_MODEL_KEY = 'maxma_selected_model'
200	const selectedProviderId = ref(localStorage.getItem(SELECTED_PROVIDER_KEY) || '')
201	const selectedModelName = ref(localStorage.getItem(SELECTED_MODEL_KEY) || '')
202	
203	const providerStore = useProviderStore()
204	const { hasProviders } = storeToRefs(providerStore)
205	
206	// 后端不可用时的加载失败状态（区分"后端不可用"和"真的无 provider"）
207	const providerLoadFailed = ref(false)
208	const providerRetrying = ref(false)
209	
210	async function loadProvidersWithStatus() {
211	  await providerStore.loadProviders()
212	  // loadProviders 内部 catch 了错误，不会抛出
213	  // 通过 loaded 标志判断是否成功加载过至少一次
214	  providerLoadFailed.value = !providerStore.loaded && providerStore.allProviders.length === 0
215	}
216	
217	async function retryLoadProviders() {
218	  if (providerRetrying.value) return
219	  providerRetrying.value = true
220	  try {
221	    await loadProvidersWithStatus()
222	  } finally {
223	    providerRetrying.value = false
224	  }
225	}
226	
227	onMounted(async () => {
228	  // 通过全局 store 加载 provider 列表（含重试），消除 ChatView/ChatInput 状态不一致
229	  await loadProvidersWithStatus()
230	})
231	
232	function onModelChange(providerId: string, modelName: string) {
233	  selectedProviderId.value = providerId
234	  selectedModelName.value = modelName
235	  // 持久化到 localStorage，刷新后可恢复
236	  localStorage.setItem(SELECTED_PROVIDER_KEY, providerId)
237	  localStorage.setItem(SELECTED_MODEL_KEY, modelName)
238	}
239	
240	const isSubagent = computed(() => {
241	  return sessions.value.some(
242	    s => s.session_id === sessionId.value && s.is_subagent
243	  )
244	})
245	
246	const chatInputRef = ref<InstanceType<typeof ChatInput> | null>(null)
247	
248	function addCitation(ref: ParsedRef) {
249	  chatInputRef.value?.addRef(ref)
250	}
251	
252	function onSend(text: string, refs: ParsedRef[], providerId?: string, modelName?: string, thinkPathId?: ThinkPathId) {
253	  // 将选区引用作为 refs 的一部分传给后端
254	  const quoteRefs: ParsedRef[] = quotedSelections.value.map(q => ({
255	    type: 'selection' as any,
256	    label: q.source,
257	    preview: q.text,
258	  } as ParsedRef))
259	  send(text, [...refs, ...quoteRefs], providerId, modelName, thinkPathId)
260	  clearQuotes()
261	}
262	
263	function handleToolAction(payload: { action: string; data?: unknown }) {
264	  if (payload.action === 'user_response') {
265	    const d = payload.data as { interactionId: string; response: string | string[] }
266	    sendUserResponse(d.interactionId, d.response)
267	  } else if (payload.action === 'undo') {
268	    handleUndo()
269	  }
270	}
271	
272	function handlePin(payload: { type: 'code' | 'table' | 'summary'; title: string; content: string; sourceTool?: string }) {
273	  workbench.addCard(payload)
274	}
275	
276	function handleArtifactAction(payload: { artifactId: string; actionId: string; token: string }) {
277	  if (sendArtifactAction(payload.artifactId, payload.actionId, payload.token)) {
278	    workbench.markArtifactActionSubmitted(payload.artifactId, payload.actionId)
279	  }
280	}
281	
282	async function handleUndo() {
283	  try {
284	    const result = await api.undoMessages(sessionId.value, 1)
285	    if (result.deleted_count > 0) {
286	      removeTurns(1)
287	    }
288	  } catch (e) {
289	    console.error('撤回失败:', e)
290	  }
291	}
292	</script>
293	
294	<style scoped>
295	.chat-view {
296	  flex: 1;
297	  display: flex;
298	  flex-direction: column;
299	  min-height: 0;
300	}
301	.chat-header {
302	  display: flex;
303	  align-items: center;
304	  gap: 20px;
305	  padding: 12px 24px;
306	  border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
307	  background: var(--bg-card);
308	}
309	.private-toggle,
310	.auto-approve-toggle {
311	  display: inline-flex;
312	  align-items: center;
313	  justify-content: center;
314	  gap: 6px;
315	  min-width: 62px;
316	  height: 26px;
317	  padding: 4px 12px;
318	  border: 1px solid var(--border);
319	  border-radius: 6px;
320	  background: transparent;
321	  color: var(--text-secondary);
322	  font-size: 0.8em;
323	  cursor: pointer;
324	  transition: all 0.15s;
325	  user-select: none;
326	}
327	.private-toggle:hover {
328	  border-color: var(--text-secondary);
329	}
330	.private-toggle.active {
331	  border-color: var(--status-warn);
332	  background: color-mix(in srgb, var(--status-warn) 10%, transparent);
333	  color: var(--status-warn);
334	}
335	.private-toggle:not(.active) .private-indicator {
336	  background: var(--accent);
337	}
338	.private-indicator {
339	  width: 8px;
340	  height: 8px;
341	  border-radius: 50%;
342	  background: currentColor;
343	}
344	.private-trigger {
345	  position: relative;
346	}
347	.hover-card {
348	  visibility: hidden;
349	  opacity: 0;
350	  transform: translateY(-4px);
351	  transition: visibility 0.15s ease, opacity 0.15s ease, transform 0.15s ease;
352	  pointer-events: none;
353	  position: absolute;
354	  top: calc(100% + 8px);
355	  left: 0;
356	  z-index: 100;
357	  min-width: 240px;
358	  padding: 8px 12px;
359	  background: var(--bg-card);
360	  border: 1px solid var(--border);
361	  border-radius: 8px;
362	  box-shadow: var(--shadow-lg);
363	  font-size: 0.8em;
364	  line-height: 1.6;
365	}
366	.private-trigger:hover .hover-card {
367	  visibility: visible;
368	  opacity: 1;
369	  transform: translateY(0);
370	}
371	.auto-approve-toggle:hover {
372	  border-color: var(--text-secondary);
373	}
374	/* 自动模式（autoApprove = true） */
375	.auto-approve-toggle.active {
376	  border-color: var(--status-warn);
377	  background: color-mix(in srgb, var(--status-warn) 10%, transparent);
378	  color: var(--status-warn);
379	}
380	/* 审核模式（autoApprove = false）指示器 */
381	.auto-approve-toggle:not(.active) .auto-approve-indicator {
382	  background: var(--accent);
383	}
384	.auto-approve-indicator {
385	  width: 8px;
386	  height: 8px;
387	  border-radius: 50%;
388	  background: currentColor;
389	}
390	.auto-approve-trigger {
391	  position: relative;
392	}
393	.auto-approve-trigger:hover .hover-card {
394	  visibility: visible;
395	  opacity: 1;
396	  transform: translateY(0);
397	}
398	.private-desc {

402	  white-space: normal;
403	  max-width: 240px;

407	}

410	}

413	}
414	.card-row {
```

```json
2	<template>
3	  <Transition name="float-sidebar">
4	    <div v-if="isVisible" class="float-sidebar" @mouseenter="onEnter" @mouseleave="onLeave">
5	      <!-- 复用主侧边栏的导航内容 -->
6	      <nav class="fs-nav">
7	        <router-link to="/" class="fs-nav-item" @click="forceClose">
8	          <Icon name="chat" :size="18" /> <span>对话</span>
9	        </router-link>
10	        <router-link to="/memory" class="fs-nav-item" @click="forceClose">
11	          <Icon name="memory" :size="18" /> <span>记忆</span>
12	        </router-link>
13	        <router-link to="/kb" class="fs-nav-item" @click="forceClose">
14	          <Icon name="memory" :size="18" /> <span>知识库</span>
15	        </router-link>
16	      </nav>
17	      <SessionSidebar
18	        :sessions="sessions"
19	        :active-id="sessionId"
20	        :session-statuses="allSessionStatuses"
21	        :collapsed="false"
22	        @create="createSession"
23	        @switch="onSwitch"
24	        @delete="deleteSession"
25	        @constify="onConstify"
26	        @unconstify="onUnconstify"
27	      />
28	    </div>
29	  </Transition>
30	</template>
31	
32	<script setup lang="ts">
33	import Icon from '@/components/Icon.vue'
34	import SessionSidebar from '@/components/SessionSidebar.vue'
35	import { useFloatSidebar } from '@/composables/useFloatSidebar'
36	import { useSessionStore } from '@/stores/session'
37	import { useChatStore } from '@/stores/chat'
38	import { storeToRefs } from 'pinia'
39	import { useRouter } from 'vue-router'
40	
41	const { isVisible, onEnter, onLeave, forceClose } = useFloatSidebar()
42	
43	const sessionStore = useSessionStore()
44	const { sessionId, sessions } = storeToRefs(sessionStore)
45	const { createSession, switchSession, deleteSession } = sessionStore
46	
47	const chatStore = useChatStore()
48	const { allSessionStatuses } = storeToRefs(chatStore)
49	
50	const router = useRouter()
51	
52	function onSwitch(id: string) {
53	  switchSession(id)
54	  router.push('/')
55	  forceClose()
56	}
57	
58	function onConstify(id: string, name: string) {
59	  if (name && name.trim()) sessionStore.constifySession(id, name.trim())
60	}
61	
62	function onUnconstify(id: string) {
63	  if (window.confirm('确定取消固定此会话？')) sessionStore.unconstifySession(id)
64	}
65	</script>
66	
67	<style scoped>
68	.float-sidebar {

115	}

119

121	  from { transform: translateX(-100%); opacity: 0; }

123	}

127	}
128

131	  .float-sidebar-leave-active { animation: none; }
132	}
```
