```json
108	<script setup lang="ts">
109	import HealthPanel from '@/components/HealthPanel.vue';
110	import PulsePanel from '@/components/PulsePanel.vue';
111	import OnboardingView from '@/views/OnboardingView.vue';
112	import Icon from '@/components/Icon.vue';
113	import SessionSidebar from '@/components/SessionSidebar.vue';
114	import { useChatStore } from '@/stores/chat';
115	import { useHealthStore } from '@/stores/health';
116	import { onboardingEnabled, useOnboardingStore } from '@/stores/onboarding';
117	import { storeToRefs } from 'pinia';
118	import { useSessionStore } from '@/stores/session';
119	import { useSidebar } from '@/composables/useSidebar';
120	import { api } from '@/api';
121	import { computed, ref, onMounted, onUnmounted, nextTick, watch } from 'vue';
122	import { useRouter, useRoute } from 'vue-router';
123	import { useTheme } from '@/composables/useTheme'
124	
125	import LeavesOverlay from '@/components/LeavesOverlay.vue'
126	import MediaViewer from '@/components/MediaViewer.vue'
127	import FloatSidebar from '@/components/FloatSidebar.vue'
128	import { useFloatSidebar } from '@/composables/useFloatSidebar'
129	import { usePaperTexture } from '@/composables/usePaperTexture'
130	import { useGlobalShortcut } from '@/composables/useGlobalShortcut'
131	import RegionalErrorBoundary from '@/components/ui/RegionalErrorBoundary.vue'
132	import { invoke } from '@tauri-apps/api/core'
133	
134	const { effectiveCollapsed, toggleSidebar } = useSidebar()
135	const pulseEnabled = import.meta.env.VITE_PULSE_ENABLED === 'true'
136	const onboarding = useOnboardingStore()
137	
138	const { onEnter: onFloatSidebarEnter, onLeave: onFloatSidebarLeave } = useFloatSidebar()
139	
140	const showSettingsMenu = ref(false)
141	const settingsTriggerRef = ref<HTMLElement | null>(null)
142	const settingsPopupRef = ref<HTMLElement | null>(null)
143	const popupTop = ref('0px')
144	const popupLeft = ref('228px')
145	const popupMaxHeight = ref('')
146	const restarting = ref(false)
147	const exportingErrorLog = ref(false)
148	const managingLogs = ref(false)
149	const { isDark: isNightMode } = useTheme()
150	
151	async function handleExportErrorLog() {
152	  if (exportingErrorLog.value) return
153	  exportingErrorLog.value = true
154	  closeSettingsMenu()
155	  try {
156	    const text = await api.getErrorLogText()
157	    const ts = new Date().toISOString().replace(/[:T]/g, '-').substring(0, 19)
158	    const filename = `maxma-error-report-${ts}.txt`
159	    // 调用 Tauri 原生保存对话框，让用户选择保存位置
160	    const result = await invoke<string | null>('save_text_file', {
161	      content: text,
162	      defaultFilename: filename,
163	    })
164	    if (result) {
165	      alert(`错误日志已保存到:\n${result}`)
166	    }
167	  } catch (e) {
168	    alert('导出错误日志失败: ' + (e instanceof Error ? e.message : String(e)))
169	  } finally {
170	    exportingErrorLog.value = false
171	  }
172	}
173	
174	async function handleManageLogs() {
175	  if (managingLogs.value) return
176	  managingLogs.value = true
177	  closeSettingsMenu()
178	  try {
179	    const info = await api.getLogFiles()
180	    const fileList = info.files.map((f: { name: string; size_mb: number }) => `  ${f.name}: ${f.size_mb.toFixed(2)} MB`).join('\n')
181	    const totalMB = (info.total_mb ?? 0).toFixed(2)
182	    const confirmClean = window.confirm(
183	      `日志文件占用情况：\n${fileList}\n\n总计: ${totalMB} MB\n\n是否清理旧日志轮转文件（保留当前日志）？`
184	    )
185	    if (confirmClean) {
186	      const result = await api.clearOldLogs()
187	      alert(`已清理 ${result.deleted_count ?? 0} 个旧日志文件，释放 ${(result.freed_mb ?? 0).toFixed(2)} MB 空间`)
188	    }
189	  } catch (e) {
190	    alert('日志管理失败: ' + (e instanceof Error ? e.message : String(e)))
191	  } finally {
192	    managingLogs.value = false
193	  }
194	}
195	
196	async function handleRestart() {
197	  if (restarting.value) return
198	  if (!window.confirm('确定要重启 MaxmaHere 服务吗？正在进行的对话可能会中断。')) return
199	  restarting.value = true
200	  closeSettingsMenu()
201	  api.restart()
202	  const poll = async () => {
203	    for (let i = 0; i < 60; i++) {
204	      await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, 2000))
205	      try {
206	        await api.health()
207	        location.reload(); return
208	      } catch { /* still down */ }
209	    }
210	    restarting.value = false
211	  }
212	  poll()
213	}
214	
215	function toggleSettingsMenu() {
216	  showSettingsMenu.value = !showSettingsMenu.value
217	  nextTick(() => updatePopupPosition())
218	}
219	
220	function closeSettingsMenu() {
221	  showSettingsMenu.value = false
222	}
223	
224	function restartOnboarding() {
225	  onboarding.restart()
226	  closeSettingsMenu()
227	}
228	
229	function updatePopupPosition() {
230	  if (settingsTriggerRef.value) {
231	    const rect = settingsTriggerRef.value.getBoundingClientRect()
232	    popupTop.value = `${rect.top}px`
233	    popupLeft.value = `${rect.right + 8}px`
234	    // 动态计算可用高度：视口高度 - popup 顶部位置 - 底部留白 16px
235	    // 避免固定 max-height 导致 popup 超出视口底部被裁切
236	    const available = window.innerHeight - rect.top - 16
237	    popupMaxHeight.value = `${Math.max(160, available)}px`
238	  }
239	}
240	
241	function onDocumentClick(e: MouseEvent) {
242	  if (!showSettingsMenu.value) return
243	  const trigger = settingsTriggerRef.value
244	  const popup = settingsPopupRef.value
245	  if (trigger && popup &&
246	      !trigger.contains(e.target as Node) &&
247	      !popup.contains(e.target as Node)) {
248	    closeSettingsMenu()
249	  }
250	}
251	
252	onMounted(() => {
253	  document.addEventListener('click', onDocumentClick)
254	})
255	
256	onUnmounted(() => {
257	  document.removeEventListener('click', onDocumentClick)
258	})
259	
260	function onSidebarClick(e: MouseEvent) {
261	  if (e.target === e.currentTarget) {
262	    toggleSidebar()
263	  }
264	}
265	
266	const router = useRouter()
267	const route = useRoute()
268	
269	function handleSwitchSession(id: string) {
270	  switchSession(id)
271	  router.push('/')
272	}
273	
274	function openProviderSetup() {
275	  onboarding.complete()
276	  router.push('/providers')
277	}
278	
279	function handleConstify(id: string, name: string) {
280	  if (name && name.trim()) {
281	    sessionStore.constifySession(id, name.trim())
282	  }
283	}
284	
285	function handleUnconstify(id: string) {
286	  if (window.confirm('确定取消固定此会话？')) {
287	    sessionStore.unconstifySession(id)
288	  }
289	}
290	
291	const sessionStore = useSessionStore()
292	const { sessionId, sessions } = storeToRefs(sessionStore)
293	const { createSession, switchSession, deleteSession } = sessionStore
294	
295	useGlobalShortcut({ key: 'n', mod: true, allowInEditable: true }, () => {
296	  void createSession().then(() => router.push('/'))
297	})
298	
299	const chatStore = useChatStore()
300	const { allSessionStatuses } = storeToRefs(chatStore)
301	
302	const healthStore = useHealthStore()
303	const { health } = storeToRefs(healthStore)
304	
305	onMounted(async () => {
306	  // 初始化 Session 状态（从 localStorage 恢复或创建新会话）
307	  await sessionStore.initIfNeeded()
308	  healthStore.startPolling()
309	  onboarding.initialize()
310	
311	  // 初始化纸质纹理 body class
312	  const { enabled: paperTextureEnabled } = usePaperTexture()
313	  document.body.classList.toggle('paper-texture', paperTextureEnabled.value)
314	})
315	
316	// 监听健康状态：后端从离线恢复到在线时，自动刷新会话列表
317	// 修复：页面刷新时如果后端还在启动，initIfNeeded 的 refreshSessions 可能失败，
318	// 此处作为兜底，在后端就绪后自动补刷会话列表
319	watch(health, (newHealth, oldHealth) => {
320	  if (!oldHealth && newHealth) {
321	    // 从 null（离线）变为有值（在线），刷新会话列表
322	    sessionStore.refreshSessions().catch(() => {})
323	  }
324	})
325	</script>
326	
327	<style>
328	@import '@/assets/styles/tokens.css';
329	@import '@/assets/styles/animations.css';
330	@import '@/assets/styles/design-system.css';
331	@import '@/themes/warm-paper.css';
332	@import '@/themes/midnight.css';
333	@import '@/themes/high-contrast.css';
334	@import '@/themes/grass-aroma.css';
335	@import '@/themes/contemplation.css';
336	@import '@/themes/coral.css';
337	@import '@/themes/delve.css';
338	@import '@/themes/deep-think.css';
339	@import '@/themes/absolutely.css';
340	@import '@/themes/dawn.css';
341	@import '@/themes/midnight-contrast.css';
342	
343	*,
344	*::before,
345	*::after {
346	  margin: 0;
347	  padding: 0;
348	  box-sizing: border-box;
349	}
350	
351	:root {
352	  /* 配色变量由主题文件定义（web/src/themes/*.css），结构 token 由 tokens.css 定义 */
353	  --radius: var(--radius-md);
354	  --shadow: var(--shadow-md);
355	  --shadow-pink: 0 4px 16px var(--shadow-color, rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.18));
356	}
357	
358	::selection {
359	  background: color-mix(in srgb, var(--accent) 20%, transparent);
360	  color: var(--text-primary);
361	}
362	
363	/* ── Scrollbar ── */
364	* {
365	  scrollbar-width: thin;
366	  scrollbar-color: var(--border) transparent;
367	}
368	*::-webkit-scrollbar {
369	  width: 6px;
370	  height: 6px;
371	}
372	*::-webkit-scrollbar-track {
373	  background: transparent;
374	}
375	*::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb {
376	  background: var(--border);
377	  border-radius: 3px;
378	}
379	*::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb:hover {
380	  background: var(--text-secondary);
381	}
382	
383	/* ── 纸质纹理系统：三层叠加 ── */
384	/* ① Surface 层：铺底元素直接叠纹理 */
385	body.paper-texture,
386	body.paper-texture .sidebar,
387	body.paper-texture .chat-header {
388	  background-image: var(--paper-texture-url);
389	  background-repeat: repeat;
390	  background-size: var(--paper-texture-size);
391	  background-attachment: fixed;
392	}
393	
394	/* ② Card 层：bg-card 元素用 lighten 混合 */
395	body.paper-texture .msg-card,
396	body.paper-texture .ds-card,
397	body.paper-texture .input-wrapper,
398	body.paper-texture .hover-card,
399	body.paper-texture .no-provider-card {
400	  background-image: var(--paper-texture-url);
401	  background-blend-mode: var(--paper-texture-card-blend-mode);
402	}
403	
404	/* ③ 亮度补偿：暖白叠层抵消纹理变暗（暗色主题跳过） */
405	html:not([data-theme="midnight"]):not([data-theme="midnight-contrast"])
406	body.paper-texture::before {
407	  content: '';
408	  position: fixed;
409	  inset: 0;
410	  z-index: -1;
411	  background: rgba(255, 253, 247, var(--paper-texture-opacity));
412	  pointer-events: none;
413	}
414	
415	html, body {
416	  height: 100%;
417	  font-family: var(--font-body);
418	  /* 响应式字体：15px 基准，随视口宽度自适应缩放（1920px≈16px, 2560px≈18px） */
419	  font-size: clamp(15px, 14px + 0.2vw, 18px);
420	  color: var(--text-primary);
421	  background: var(--bg-primary);
422	}
423	
424	#app {
425	  height: 100%;
426	}
427	
428	.app-layout {
429	  display: flex;
430	  height: 100%;
431	}
432	
433	.sidebar-hover-trigger {
434	  position: fixed;
435	  top: 0;
436	  left: 0;
437	  bottom: 0;
438	  width: 8px;
439	  z-index: 140;
440	  cursor: default;
441	}
442	
443	.sidebar {
444	  width: 220px;
445	  min-width: 220px;
446	  background: var(--bg-secondary);
447	  border-right: 1px solid var(--border);
448	  display: flex;
449	  flex-direction: column;
450	  padding: 24px 20px;
451	  gap: 24px;
452	  position: relative;
453	  overflow: hidden;
454	}
455	
456	.sidebar-header {
457	  display: flex;
458	  justify-content: center;
459	  transition: opacity 0.2s ease 0.05s, transform 0.25s ease 0.05s;
460	  overflow: hidden;
461	  max-height: 100px;
462	}
463	
464	.logo {
465	  display: flex;
466	  align-items: center;
467	  gap: 10px;
468	  font-size: 18px;
469	  font-weight: 700;
470	  font-family: var(--font-display);
471	  color: var(--accent);
472	  letter-spacing: -0.3px;
473	  margin: 0;
474	}
475	
476	.logo-img {
477	  width: 36px;
478	  height: 36px;
479	  border-radius: 50%;
480	  object-fit: cover;
481	  flex-shrink: 0;
482	}
483	
484	.logo-text {
485	  white-space: nowrap;
486	}
487	
488	.logo-favicon {
489	  width: 28px;
490	  height: 28px;
491	  border-radius: 50%;
492	  object-fit: cover;
493	}
494	
495	.sidebar-nav {
496	  display: flex;
497	  flex-direction: column;
498	  gap: 4px;
499	}
500	
501	.nav-item {
502	  display: flex;
503	  align-items: center;
504	  gap: 8px;
505	  padding: 8px 12px;
506	  border-radius: var(--radius);
507	  color: var(--text-secondary);
508	  text-decoration: none;
509	  font-size: 0.9em;
510	  transition: background 0.15s, color 0.15s;
511	}
512	
513	.nav-item:hover {
514	  background: var(--bg-card);
515	  color: var(--text-primary);
516	}
517	
518	.nav-item.router-link-active {
519	  background: var(--bg-card);
520	  color: var(--accent);
521	  font-weight: 600;
522	}
523	
524	.nav-label {
525	  transition: opacity 0.2s ease 0.05s, transform 0.25s ease 0.05s;
526	  overflow: hidden;
527	  white-space: nowrap;
528	  max-width: 200px;
529	}
530	
531	.pg-nav {
532	  margin-top: 16px;
533	  border-top: 1px solid var(--border);
534	  padding-top: 12px;
535	  border-radius: 0;
536	  font-size: 0.8em;
537	  color: var(--text-secondary);
538	  opacity: 0.7;
539	}
540	
541	.pg-nav:hover {
542	  opacity: 1;
543	}
544	
545	/* ── Settings trigger ── */
546	.settings-area {
547	  margin-top: auto;
548	}
549	
550	.settings-btn {
551	  width: 100%;
552	  border: none;
553	  cursor: pointer;
554	  font-family: inherit;
555	  font-size: 0.9em;
556	  background: transparent;
557	}
558	
559	.settings-btn.active {
560	  background: var(--bg-card);
561	  color: var(--accent);
562	  font-weight: 600;
563	}
564	
565	.settings-btn:hover {
566	  background: var(--bg-card);
567	  color: var(--text-primary);
568	}
569	
570	/* ── Settings popup ── */
571	.settings-popup {
572	  position: fixed;
573	  z-index: 200;
574	  background: var(--bg-card);
575	  border: 1px solid var(--border);
576	  border-radius: var(--radius);
577	  box-shadow: var(--shadow-lg);
578	  min-width: 170px;
579	  padding: 6px;
580	  /* maxHeight 由 JS 动态设置（基于触发按钮在视口中的位置），避免固定值裁切 */
581	  overflow-y: auto;
582	  overscroll-behavior: contain;
583	}
584	
585	.popup-header {
586	  padding: 8px 12px 6px;
587	  font-size: 0.75em;
588	  font-weight: 600;
589	  color: var(--text-tertiary);
590	  text-transform: uppercase;
591	  letter-spacing: 0.5px;
592	}
593	
594	.popup-item {
595	  display: flex;
596	  align-items: center;
597	  gap: 8px;
598	  padding: 8px 12px;
599	  border-radius: 6px;
600	  color: var(--text-secondary);
601	  text-decoration: none;
602	  font-size: 0.9em;
603	  transition: background 0.15s, color 0.15s;
604	}
605	
606	.popup-item:hover {
607	  background: var(--bg-secondary);
608	  color: var(--text-primary);
609	}
610	
611	.popup-item.router-link-active {
612	  color: var(--accent);
613	  font-weight: 600;
614	  background: var(--bg-secondary);
615	}
616	
617	.popup-divider {
618	  height: 1px;
619	  background: var(--border);
620	  margin: 4px 0;
621	}
622	
623	.popup-action {
624	  width: 100%;
625	  border: none;
626	  cursor: pointer;
627	  font-family: inherit;
628	  font-size: 0.9em;
629	  background: transparent;
630	  color: #dc2626;
631	}
632	.popup-action.neutral {
633	  color: var(--text-secondary);
634	}
635	.popup-action.neutral:hover {
636	  color: var(--text-primary);
637	}
638	.popup-action:hover:not(:disabled) {
639	  background: var(--bg-secondary);
640	  color: #b91c1c;
641	}
642	.popup-action:disabled {
643	  opacity: 0.5;
644	  cursor: not-allowed;
645	}
646	.popup-action.restarting {
647	  color: #f59e0b;
648	}
649	.popup-action.exporting {
650	  color: #3b82f6;
651	}
652	
653	/* ── Popup transition ── */
654	.popup-enter-active {
655	  transition: opacity 0.12s ease, transform 0.12s ease;
656	}
657	.popup-leave-active {
658	  transition: opacity 0.08s ease, transform 0.08s ease;
659	}
660	.popup-enter-from,
661	.popup-leave-to {
662	  opacity: 0;
663	  transform: translateX(-6px);
664	}
665	
666	.main {
667	  flex: 1;
668	  display: flex;
669	  flex-direction: column;
670	  min-width: 0;
671	}
672	
673	.sidebar .health-panel {
674	  transition: opacity 0.2s ease 0.05s;
675	  overflow: hidden;
676	  max-height: 300px;
677	}
678	
679	/* ── Collapsible sidebar ── */
680	.sidebar {
681	  position: relative;
682	  transition: width 0.25s ease;
683	}
684	.sidebar.collapsed {
685	  width: 58px;
686	  min-width: 58px;
687	  padding: 24px 10px;
688	  align-items: center;
689	  overflow: hidden;
690	}
691	.sidebar-icon-collapsed {
692	  display: none;
693	  justify-content: center;
694	}
695	.sidebar.collapsed .sidebar-header {
696	  max-height: 0;
697	  opacity: 0;
698	  transform: translateX(-30px);
699	  overflow: hidden;
700	  padding: 0;
701	  margin: 0;
702	}
703	.sidebar.collapsed .sidebar-icon-collapsed {
704	  display: flex;
705	  position: absolute;
706	  top: 22px;
707	  left: 50%;
708	  transform: translateX(-50%);
709	}
710	.sidebar.collapsed .sidebar-nav {
711	  width: 100%;
712	  align-items: center;
713	  padding-top: 10px;
714	}
715	.sidebar.collapsed .nav-item {
716	  justify-content: center;
717	  padding: 8px;
718	  gap: 0;
719	  width: 100%;
720	  overflow: hidden;
721	}
722	.sidebar.collapsed .nav-label {
723	  max-width: 0;
724	  opacity: 0;
725	  transform: translateX(-24px);
726	  overflow: hidden;
727	  white-space: nowrap;
728	  padding: 0;
729	  margin: 0;
730	}
731	.sidebar.collapsed .pg-nav {
732	  display: none;
733	}
734	.sidebar.collapsed .health-panel {
735	  max-height: 0;
736	  opacity: 0;
737	  overflow: hidden;
738	  padding: 0;
739	  margin: 0;
740	}
741	
742	/* ── Sidebar background image with blur + white overlay ── */
743	.sidebar::before {
744	  content: '';
745	  position: absolute;
746	  inset: -5%;
747	  background-image: url('/images/sidebar-bg.jpg');
748	  background-size: cover;
749	  background-position: left center;
750	  background-repeat: no-repeat;
751	  filter: blur(10px);
752	  transform: scale(1.05);
753	  z-index: 0;
754	  pointer-events: none;
755	}
756	
757	.sidebar::after {
758	  content: '';
759	  position: absolute;
760	  inset: 0;
761	  background: color-mix(in srgb, var(--bg-primary) 85%, transparent);
762	  z-index: 0;
763	  pointer-events: none;
764	}
765	
766	.sidebar > :not(.settings-popup) {
767	  position: relative;
768	  z-index: 1;
769	}
770	
771	/* ── Shared markdown rendered content ── */
772	.markdown-body {
773	  font-size: 1.05em; /* 相对于父元素（消息气泡）的字体大小 */
774	  line-height: 1.6;
775	  color: var(--text-primary);
776	  word-break: break-word;
777	}
778	
779	.markdown-body h1,
780	.markdown-body h2,
781	.markdown-body h3,
782	.markdown-body h4,
783	.markdown-body h5,
784	.markdown-body h6 {
785	  margin: 16px 0 8px;
786	  font-weight: 600;
787	  line-height: 1.3;
788	}
789	.markdown-body h1 { font-size: 1.5em; }
790	.markdown-body h2 { font-size: 1.3em; }
791	.markdown-body h3 { font-size: 1.15em; }
792	.markdown-body h4 { font-size: 1em; }
793	.markdown-body h5 { font-size: 0.9em; }
794	.markdown-body h6 { font-size: 0.85em; color: var(--text-secondary); }
795	
796	.markdown-body > *:first-child { margin-top: 0; }
797	.markdown-body > *:last-child  { margin-bottom: 0; }
798	
799	.markdown-body p {
800	  margin: 8px 0;
801	}
802	
803	.markdown-body ul,
804	.markdown-body ol {
805	  padding-left: 20px;
806	  margin: 8px 0;
807	}
808	
809	.markdown-body li {
810	  margin: 4px 0;
811	}
812	
813	.markdown-body code {
814	  background: var(--bg-primary);
815	  padding: 2px 6px;
816	  border-radius: 4px;
```

```json
207	const providerLoadFailed = ref(false)

209	
210	async function loadProvidersWithStatus() {
211	  await providerStore.loadProviders()
212	  // loadProviders 内部 catch 了错误，不会抛出
213	  // 通过 loaded 标志判断是否成功加载过至少一次
214	  providerLoadFailed.value = !providerStore.loaded && providerStore.allProviders.length === 0
215	}
216	
217	async function retryLoadProviders() {
218	  if (providerRetrying.value) return
219	  providerRetrying.value = true
220	  try {

222	  } finally {
223	    providerRetrying.value = false
224	  }
225	}
```

```json
1	"""Provider 管理器 — 按 id 索引 + 阶段 3.3 fallback 链路。
2	
3	阶段 3.3 增强：
4	- iter_enabled() 按 priority 排序（数字越小优先级越高）
5	- get_healthy() 跳过 health_status == error 的 provider
6	- get_fallback(exclude_ids) 返回下一个可用 provider
7	- mark_unhealthy/mark_healthy 状态标记
8	"""
9	
10	import logging
11	import threading
12	import time
13	from collections.abc import Iterator
14	from typing import Any, Optional
15	
16	from api.providers import HealthStatus, Provider, ProviderConfig
17	from api.providers.store import ProviderConfigStore
18	from api.runtime_status import RuntimeStatus
19	
20	logger = logging.getLogger(__name__)
21	
22	
23	def is_retryable_provider_error(error: BaseException) -> bool:
24	    """Return whether a failed model request can safely be retried elsewhere.
25	
26	    Provider fallback is deliberately limited to transport failures and transient
27	    upstream responses.  Local validation/programming errors must remain visible
28	    to the caller instead of being hidden behind an unrelated provider.
29	    """
30	    if isinstance(error, (TimeoutError, ConnectionError, OSError)):
31	        return True
32	
33	    status_code = getattr(error, "status_code", None)
34	    if status_code is None:
35	        response = getattr(error, "response", None)
36	        status_code = getattr(response, "status_code", None)
37	    if isinstance(status_code, int):
38	        return status_code in {408, 409, 425, 429} or status_code >= 500
39	
40	    # Keep this dependency-free: OpenAI and httpx expose different exception
41	    # types across supported versions, but their transient transport errors use
42	    # stable class names.
43	    error_name = type(error).__name__
44	    if error_name in {
45	        "APIConnectionError",
46	        "APITimeoutError",
47	        "RateLimitError",
48	        "ServiceUnavailableError",
49	        "InternalServerError",
50	        "ConnectError",
51	        "ReadTimeout",
52	        "WriteTimeout",
53	        "PoolTimeout",
54	    }:
55	        return True
56	
57	    cause = error.__cause__ or error.__context__
58	    return bool(cause and cause is not error and is_retryable_provider_error(cause))
59	
60	
61	class ProviderManager:
62	    """管理所有已注册的 Provider，支持按 id 查找、批量遍历和 fallback。
63	
64	    阶段 3.3：新增健康状态管理和 fallback 链路。健康状态使用 threading.Lock
65	    保护（与 ErrorRecoveryManager 一致），与 Provider 自身的 health_status
66	    字段读写同步。
67	    """
68	
69	    def __init__(self, store: ProviderConfigStore):
70	        self._store = store
71	        self._providers: dict[str, Provider] = {}
72	        self._lock = threading.Lock()  # 保护健康状态读写
73	
74	    # ── 生命周期 ────────────────────────────────────────
75	
76	    def load_all(self) -> None:
77	        """从 store 加载所有 enabled provider 并创建实例。
78	
79	        线程安全：在锁内重建 _providers，避免与 get_healthy/get_fallback 竞争。
80	        """
```

```json
328	  payload: {
329	    interaction_id: string
330	    response: string | string[]
331	  }
332	}
333	
334	/** 会话中途更新 auto_approve 设置 */
335	export interface UpdateAutoApproveMessage {
336	  type: 'update_auto_approve'
337	  payload: {
338	    auto_approve: boolean
339	  }
340	}
341	
342	export interface ArtifactActionMessage {
343	  type: 'artifact_action'
344	  payload: {
345	    artifact_id: string
346	    action_id: string
347	    token: string
348	  }
349	}
350	
351	export type ClientMessage = ChatMessage | CancelMessage | PingMessage | UserResponseMessage | UpdateAutoApproveMessage | ArtifactActionMessage
352	
353	// === 前端 UI 状态类型 ===
354	
355	export interface ThinkingBlock {
356	  kind: 'thinking'
357	  tokens: string
358	  done: boolean
359	  becameAnswer: boolean
```

```json
23	            v-if="turn.planCard"
24	            :plan="turn.planCard"

30	            :run-ids="turn.deferredRunIds"

34	              v-if="ev.kind === 'thinking' && !ev.consumed"

37	            >
38	              <ThinkingBlock :block="ev" />
39	            </div>

41	              v-else-if="ev.kind === 'tool'"
42	              class="cite-source"
43	              @contextmenu.prevent="
44	                onBubbleContextMenu(

46	                  'tool_result',
47	                  ev.output || ev.input || '',
48	                  ev.name,

50	              "
51	            >

54	                   - 用户拒绝后：tool status 永远为 running，ApprovalBubble 显示 "已拒绝"
55	                   - 用户批准后工具执行完成（status='done'）：由 ToolBubbleRouter 渲染工具结果 -->

57	                v-if="ev.interaction?.mode === 'approval' && ev.status === 'running'"

61	                :tool-input="ev.interaction?.tool_input"

63	                @action="forwardAction"
64	              />
65	              <!-- 普通工具调用或审批后工具执行结果 -->
66	              <ToolBubbleRouter v-else :tool-call="ev" @action="forwardAction" @pin="$emit('pin', $event)" />
67	            </div>
68	            <!-- 系统通知（如上下文压缩通知），轻量内联提示 -->

70	              v-else-if="ev.kind === 'system'"
71	              class="system-event-bubble"
72	            >
73	              <span class="system-event-icon">ℹ︎</span>
74	              <span class="system-event-text">{{ ev.content }}</span>
75	            </div>
76	          </template>
77	          <!-- finalAnswer：仅在已完成（非流式）轮次中展示 -->
78	          <div
79	            v-if="turn.finalAnswer && !hasAnswerBlock(turn) && !isStreamingTurn(turn)"

81	            @contextmenu.prevent="onBubbleContextMenu($event, 'assistant_message', turn.finalAnswer, 'AI')"
82	          >

84	          </div>
85	          <!-- 占位提示：finalAnswer 为空但轮次已完成（非流式）且有工具事件时，

88	            v-else-if="!turn.finalAnswer && !hasAnswerBlock(turn) && !isStreamingTurn(turn) && turn.events?.length"

91	            <MessageBubble role="assistant" content="（这一轮处理未生成文字回复，请查看上方工具执行结果或重新提问。）" />
92	          </div>

94	          <div v-if="turn.memoryEvents?.length" class="memory-tool-log">
95	            <div
96	              v-for="(me, i) in turn.memoryEvents"
97	              :key="i"
98	              class="memory-tool-entry"
99	              :class="{ 'is-running': me.status === 'running' }"
100	            >
101	              <span class="memory-tool-icon">
102	                <span v-if="me.status === 'running'" class="memory-spinner"></span>
103	                <span v-else-if="me.status === 'done'" class="memory-check">&#10003;</span>
104	                <span v-else class="memory-cross">&#10007;</span>
105	              </span>
106	              <!-- memory_review = 未触发任何修改，显示简洁文字 -->
107	              <template v-if="me.name === 'memory_review'">
108	                <span class="memory-tool-name">记忆检查</span>
109	                <span class="memory-tool-status">无需修改</span>
110	              </template>
111	              <!-- memory_processing = 后台 consumer 正在处理中 -->
112	              <template v-else-if="me.name === 'memory_processing'">
113	                <span class="memory-tool-name">记忆处理</span>
114	                <span class="memory-tool-status">处理中...</span>
115	              </template>
116	              <template v-else>
117	                <span class="memory-tool-name">{{ toolDisplayName(me.name) }}</span>
118	                <span v-if="me.status === 'running'" class="memory-tool-status">处理中...</span>
119	                <span v-else-if="me.status === 'done' && me.output" class="memory-tool-output" :title="me.output">{{ me.output }}</span>
120	                <span v-else-if="me.status === 'error'" class="memory-tool-status is-error">失败</span>
121	                <span v-if="me.elapsed !== null" class="memory-tool-elapsed">{{ me.elapsed.toFixed(1) }}s</span>
122	              </template>
123	            </div>
124	          </div>
125	        </div>
126	      </template>
127	
128	      <!-- 错误提示 -->
129	      <div v-if="error" class="error-banner" :class="'error-' + (errorCategory || 'system')">
130	        <span class="error-icon">
131	          <template v-if="errorCategory === 'user_error'">️</template>
132	          <template v-else-if="errorCategory === 'tool_error'"></template>
133	          <template v-else-if="errorCategory === 'rate_limit'"></template>

137	        <span class="error-message">{{ error }}</span>

141	          <span v-else class="copy-icon"></span>

143	      </div>
144
```

```json
204	<script setup lang="ts">
205	import type { ChatTurn } from '@/types'
206	import type { ParsedRef } from '@/utils/references'
207	import { api } from '@/api'
208	import { computed, nextTick, onMounted, onUnmounted, ref, watch } from 'vue'
209	import type { ContextMenuItem } from './ContextMenu.vue'
210	import ContextMenu from './ContextMenu.vue'
211	import MessageBubble from './MessageBubble.vue'
212	import ThinkingBlock from './ThinkingBlock.vue'
213	import ToolBubbleRouter from './ToolBubbleRouter.vue'
214	import PlanCard from './PlanCard.vue'
215	import ApprovalBubble from './ApprovalBubble.vue'
216	import SubAgentCard from './SubAgentCard.vue'
217	import { toolDisplayName } from './tools/_shared/displayNames'
218	import { chatSessionAliveCache } from '@/composables/sessionAliveCache'
219	
220	const props = defineProps<{
221	  sessionId: string
222	  turns: ChatTurn[]
223	  currentTurn: ChatTurn | null
224	  error: string | null
225	  errorCategory: 'user_error' | 'tool_error' | 'system_error' | 'rate_limit' | 'cancelled' | null
226	  errorTraceId: string | null
227	}>()
228	
229	// 错误日志一键复制（调用后端 ErrorCollector 获取完整报告）
230	const copySuccess = ref(false)
231	async function copyErrorLog() {
232	  let text: string
233	  try {
234	    // 优先调用后端获取完整错误报告（含内存收集 + 日志扫描 + 系统信息）
235	    text = await api.getErrorLogText()
236	    // 在报告末尾追加当前对话上下文的错误信息，便于定位
237	    if (props.error || props.errorTraceId) {
238	      text += '\n\n--- 当前对话错误上下文 ---\n'
239	      if (props.errorCategory) text += `错误类别: ${props.errorCategory}\n`
240	      if (props.errorTraceId) text += `Trace ID: ${props.errorTraceId}\n`
241	      if (props.error) text += `错误信息: ${props.error}\n`
242	    }
243	  } catch {
244	    // 后端不可用时降级为本地拼接
245	    const now = new Date()
246	    const ts = now.toISOString().replace('T', ' ').substring(0, 19)
247	    const lines = [
248	      'MaxmaHere 错误报告（降级模式 - 后端不可用）',
249	      '========================================',
250	      `时间: ${ts}`,
251	      `Trace ID: ${props.errorTraceId || 'N/A'}`,
252	      `错误类别: ${props.errorCategory || 'system_error'}`,
253	      `错误信息: ${props.error || 'N/A'}`,
254	      '========================================',
255	    ]
256	    text = lines.join('\n')
257	  }
258	  try {
259	    await navigator.clipboard.writeText(text)
260	  } catch {
261	    // 降级：用临时 textarea
262	    const ta = document.createElement('textarea')
263	    ta.value = text
264	    ta.style.position = 'fixed'
265	    ta.style.opacity = '0'
266	    document.body.appendChild(ta)
267	    ta.select()
268	    document.execCommand('copy')
269	    document.body.removeChild(ta)
270	  }
271	  copySuccess.value = true
272	  setTimeout(() => { copySuccess.value = false }, 2000)
273	}
274	
275	const emit = defineEmits<{
276	  (e: 'action', p: { action: string; data?: unknown }): void
277	  (e: 'cite', ref: ParsedRef): void
278	  (e: 'togglePrivate'): void
279	  (e: 'planRespond', planId: string, action: 'approve' | 'modify' | 'reject', modifiedPlan?: string): void
280	  (e: 'pin', payload: { type: 'code' | 'table' | 'summary'; title: string; content: string; sourceTool?: string }): void
281	}>()
282	
283	function forwardAction(payload: { action: string; data?: unknown }) {
284	  emit('action', payload)
285	}
286	
287	function onPlanRespond(planId: string, action: 'approve' | 'modify' | 'reject', modifiedPlan?: string) {
288	  emit('planRespond', planId, action, modifiedPlan)
289	}
290	
291	const windowRef = ref<HTMLElement | null>(null)
292	const SCROLL_BOTTOM_THRESHOLD = 100
293	const typingDelayElapsed = ref(false)
294	let typingTimer: ReturnType<typeof setTimeout> | null = null
295	
296	const currentTurnHasVisibleActivity = computed(() => {
297	  const turn = props.currentTurn
298	  if (!turn) return false
299	  if (turn.finalAnswer) return true
300	  return turn.events.some(ev => ev.kind === 'tool' || (ev.kind === 'thinking' && !ev.consumed))
301	})
302	
303	const showTypingIndicator = computed(() =>
304	  Boolean(props.currentTurn) && typingDelayElapsed.value && !currentTurnHasVisibleActivity.value
305	)
306	
307	function isNearBottom(): boolean {
308	  const el = windowRef.value
309	  if (!el) return true
310	  return el.scrollHeight - el.scrollTop - el.clientHeight < SCROLL_BOTTOM_THRESHOLD
311	}
312	
313	function hasAnswerBlock(turn: ChatTurn): boolean {
314	  return turn.events.some(e => e.kind === 'thinking' && e.becameAnswer)
315	}
316	
317	/** 合并已完成轮次和当前流式轮次到单个列表，用 turn.id 作为 key，
318	 *  使组件实例在过渡时不被销毁重建 */
319	const mergedTurns = computed<ChatTurn[]>(() => {
320	  if (!props.currentTurn) return props.turns
321	  // currentTurn 可能已被 pushed 到 turns（becameAnswer 分支），去重
322	  if (props.turns.some(t => t.id === props.currentTurn!.id)) return props.turns
323	  return [...props.turns, props.currentTurn]
324	})
325	
326	/** mergedTurns 中第 mergedIdx 项在 props.turns 中的索引（当前轮返回 -1） */
327	function turnsIndex(mergedIdx: number): number {
328	  // 前 props.turns.length 项索引与 mergedIdx 一致
329	  if (mergedIdx < props.turns.length) return mergedIdx
330	  return -1
331	}
332	
333	/** 该轮次是否正在流式生成中 */
334	function isStreamingTurn(turn: ChatTurn): boolean {
335	  return props.currentTurn?.id === turn.id
336	}
337	
338	watch(
339	  () => props.currentTurn?.id,
340	  (id) => {
341	    if (typingTimer) {
342	      clearTimeout(typingTimer)
343	      typingTimer = null
344	    }
345	    typingDelayElapsed.value = false
346	    if (!id) return
347	    const delay = 1500 + Math.floor(Math.random() * 2000)
348	    typingTimer = setTimeout(() => {
349	      if (props.currentTurn?.id === id) {
```

```json
356	
357	function scrollToBottom() {
358	  nextTick(() => {
359	    const el = windowRef.value
360	    if (el) {
361	      el.scrollTop = el.scrollHeight
362	    }
363	  })
364	}
365	
366	watch(
367	  () => props.sessionId,
368	  (sessionId, previousSessionId) => {
369	    if (previousSessionId && windowRef.value) {
370	      chatSessionAliveCache.rememberScroll(previousSessionId, windowRef.value.scrollTop)
371	    }
372	    if (!sessionId) return
373	    nextTick(() => {
374	      const el = windowRef.value
375	      if (!el) return
376	      const savedScrollTop = chatSessionAliveCache.restoreScroll(sessionId)
377	      el.scrollTop = savedScrollTop ?? el.scrollHeight
378	    })
379	  },
380	  { immediate: true },
381	)
382	
383	function scrollToTurn(index: number) {
384	  const el = windowRef.value?.querySelector(`[data-user-msg-idx="${index}"]`)
385	  if (el) {
386	    el.scrollIntoView({ behavior: 'smooth', block: 'start' })
387	  }
388	}
389	
390	watch(() => props.turns.length, () => {
391	  if (isNearBottom()) scrollToBottom()
392	})
393	watch(
394	  () => props.currentTurn?.events.length,
395	  () => {
396	    if (isNearBottom()) scrollToBottom()
397	  }
398	)
399	watch(
400	  () => props.currentTurn?.finalAnswer,
401	  () => {
402	    if (isNearBottom()) scrollToBottom()
403	  }
404	)
405	
406	// ── Typewriter: 调皮互动文案轮播 ──
407	const words = [
408	  '想我了没宝宝',
409	  '我厉害不',
410	  '今天想聊什么呀',
411	  '快夸我快夸我',
412	  '你是不是又想我了',
413	  '来找我玩啦',
414	  '等你好久啦',
415	  '有什么好玩的事吗',
416	  '小猪猪在干嘛呢',
417	  '嘿嘿嘿'
418	]
419	const displayedWord = ref(words[0])
420	let wordIndex = 0
421	let charIndex = words[0].length
422	let isDeleting = false
423	let typeTimer: ReturnType<typeof setTimeout> | null = null
424	
425	function typewriterTick() {
426	  const current = words[wordIndex]
427	  if (!isDeleting) {
428	    if (charIndex < current.length) {
429	      charIndex++
430	      displayedWord.value = current.slice(0, charIndex) + (charIndex === current.length ? '.' : '')
431	      typeTimer = setTimeout(typewriterTick, 120)
432	    } else {
433	      // 打出完整词后暂停 1.5s 再开始删除
434	      isDeleting = true
435	      typeTimer = setTimeout(typewriterTick, 1500)
436	    }
437	  } else {
438	    if (charIndex > 0) {
439	      charIndex--
440	      displayedWord.value = current.slice(0, charIndex)
441	      typeTimer = setTimeout(typewriterTick, 80)
442	    } else {
443	      isDeleting = false
444	      wordIndex = (wordIndex + 1) % words.length
445	      charIndex = 0
446	      typeTimer = setTimeout(typewriterTick, 120)
447	    }
448	  }
449	}
450	
451	// ── Private mode toggle (Ctrl+K) ──
452	function togglePrivate() {
453	  emit('togglePrivate')
454	}
455	
456	function onPrivateKeydown(e: KeyboardEvent) {
457	  if ((e.ctrlKey || e.metaKey) && e.key === 'k') {
458	    e.preventDefault()
459	    togglePrivate()
460	  }
461	}
462	
463	onMounted(() => {
464	  displayedWord.value = words[0]
465	  charIndex = words[0].length
466	  wordIndex = 0
467	  isDeleting = false
468	  typewriterTick()
469	  document.addEventListener('keydown', onPrivateKeydown)
470	})
471	
472	onUnmounted(() => {
473	  if (props.sessionId && windowRef.value) {
474	    chatSessionAliveCache.rememberScroll(props.sessionId, windowRef.value.scrollTop)
475	  }
476	  if (typeTimer) clearTimeout(typeTimer)
477	  if (typingTimer) clearTimeout(typingTimer)
478	  document.removeEventListener('keydown', onPrivateKeydown)
479	})
480	
481	// === 引用功能 ===
482	
483	const MAX_CITE_LENGTH = 1000
484	
485	const ctxMenuVisible = ref(false)
486	const ctxMenuPos = ref({ x: 0, y: 0 })
487	const pendingCitation = ref<{ text: string } | null>(null)
488	
489	/** 右键点击的用户消息在 turns 中的索引（-1 表示当前正在生成的 turn） */
490	const pendingUserMsgIdx = ref<number | null>(null)
491	
492	const ctxMenuItems = computed((): ContextMenuItem[] => {
493	  const items: ContextMenuItem[] = [
494	    { label: '引用', action: 'cite', icon: 'cite-speech' },
495	    { label: '复制', action: 'copy', icon: 'copy' },
496	  ]
497	  // 仅在右键最后一条已完成用户消息时显示「撤回」
498	  if (
499	    pendingUserMsgIdx.value !== null
500	    && pendingUserMsgIdx.value === props.turns.length - 1
501	    && props.turns.length > 0
502	  ) {
503	    items.push({ label: '撤回', action: 'undo', icon: 'undo-arrow' })
504	  }
505	  return items
506	})
507	
508	function onBubbleContextMenu(
509	  event: MouseEvent,
510	  _sourceType: string,
511	  fullText: string,
512	  _sourceLabel: string,
513	  userMsgIdx?: number,
514	) {
515	  pendingUserMsgIdx.value = userMsgIdx ?? null
516	
517	  let citeText = fullText
518	
519	  // 检查是否有文本选中
520	  const selection = window.getSelection()
521	  const selectedText = selection?.toString().trim()
522	  if (selectedText && selection!.rangeCount > 0) {
523	    const range = selection!.getRangeAt(0)
524	    const target = event.currentTarget as HTMLElement | null
525	    if (target && target.contains(range.commonAncestorContainer)) {
526	      citeText = selectedText
527	    }
528	    selection!.removeAllRanges()
529	  }
530	
531	  if (!citeText) return
532	
533	  if (citeText.length > MAX_CITE_LENGTH) {
534	    citeText = citeText.slice(0, MAX_CITE_LENGTH) + '…'
535	  }
536	
537	  pendingCitation.value = { text: citeText }
538	  ctxMenuPos.value = { x: event.clientX, y: event.clientY }
539	  ctxMenuVisible.value = true
540	}
541	
542	function handleContextMenuSelect(action: string) {
543	  if (action === 'cite' && pendingCitation.value) {
544	    const label = pendingCitation.value.text.length > 80
545	      ? pendingCitation.value.text.slice(0, 80) + '…'
546	      : pendingCitation.value.text
547	    const citeRef: ParsedRef = { type: 'cite', text: pendingCitation.value.text, label }
548	    emit('cite', citeRef)
549	  } else if (action === 'copy' && pendingCitation.value) {
```

```json
88	        <h3 class="edit-title">编辑记忆</h3>
89	        <div class="edit-field">
90	          <label>内容</label>
91	          <textarea
92	            v-model="editDialog.content"
93	            rows="3"
94	            class="edit-textarea"
95	            maxlength="150"
96	            :disabled="saving"
97	          ></textarea>

99	        </div>
100	        <div class="edit-field">
101	          <label>分区</label>
102	          <input v-model="editDialog.theme" class="edit-input" :disabled="saving" />
103	        </div>
104	        <div class="edit-actions">
105	          <button class="edit-btn cancel" :disabled="saving" @click="closeEditDialog">取消</button>
106	          <button
107	            class="edit-btn save"
108	            :disabled="!editDialog.content.trim() || saving"
109	            @click="saveEdit"
110	          >
111	            {{ saving ? '保存中…' : '保存' }}
112	          </button>
113	        </div>
114	      </div>
115	    </div>
116	  </div>
117	</template>
118	
119	<script setup lang="ts">
120	import { ref, computed, onMounted, onUnmounted } from 'vue'
121	import { api } from '@/api'
122	import type { VignetteSection } from '@/types'
123	import MomentCard from '@/components/MomentCard.vue'
124	import SectionCard from '@/components/SectionCard.vue'
125	import RenderMarkdown from '@/components/RenderMarkdown.vue'
126	
127	/** 可通过开发者工具切换为 false 回退到 Markdown 渲染 */
128	const useVignette = ref(true)
129	
130	const narrative = ref('')
131	const sections = ref<VignetteSection[]>([])
132	const loading = ref(false)
133	const errorMessage = ref('')
134	const saving = ref(false)
135	
136	// 搜索与过滤
137	const searchQuery = ref('')
138	const selectedTheme = ref('')
139	
140	// 编辑弹窗
141	const editDialog = ref({
142	  show: false,
143	  id: '',
144	  content: '',
145	  theme: '',
146	})
147	
148	// 竞态保护：refresh 序列号，丢弃过期响应
149	let refreshSeq = 0
150	// 组件卸载标志：防止卸载后修改 reactive 状态
151	let isMounted = true
152	
153	/** 所有分区名（用于过滤标签） */
154	const allThemes = computed(() => sections.value.map(s => s.theme))
155	
156	/** 过滤后的 sections */
157	const filteredSections = computed(() => {
158	  let result = sections.value
159	
160	  // 按分区过滤
161	  if (selectedTheme.value) {
162	    result = result.filter(s => s.theme === selectedTheme.value)
163	  }
164	
165	  // 按关键词过滤
166	  if (searchQuery.value) {
167	    const q = searchQuery.value.toLowerCase()
168	    result = result
169	      .map(section => ({
170	        ...section,
171	        items: section.items.filter(item =>
172	          item.description.toLowerCase().includes(q)
173	        ),
174	      }))
175	      .filter(section => section.items.length > 0)
176	  }
177	
178	  return result
179	})
180	
181	function handleEditItem(item: { id: string; description: string; theme: string }) {
182	  editDialog.value = {
183	    show: true,
184	    id: item.id,
185	    content: item.description,
186	    theme: item.theme,
187	  }
188	}
189	
190	function closeEditDialog() {
191	  if (saving.value) return  // 保存中不允许关闭
192	  editDialog.value.show = false
193	}
194	
195	function showGlobalError(msg: string) {
196	  if (!isMounted) return
197	  errorMessage.value = msg
198	}
199	
200	async function saveEdit() {
201	  if (!editDialog.value.content.trim() || !editDialog.value.id) return
202	  if (saving.value) return  // 防抖锁：防止重复提交
203	
204	  saving.value = true
205	  errorMessage.value = ''
206	  try {
207	    await api.updateMemory(
208	      editDialog.value.id,
209	      editDialog.value.content.trim(),
210	      editDialog.value.theme.trim(),
211	    )
212	    if (!isMounted) return
213	    editDialog.value.show = false
214	    await refresh()
215	  } catch (e: any) {
216	    console.error('Failed to update memory:', e)
217	    const detail = e?.message || String(e)
218	    showGlobalError(`保存失败：${detail}`)
219	  } finally {
220	    if (isMounted) saving.value = false
221	  }
222	}
223	
224	async function refresh() {
225	  const mySeq = ++refreshSeq
226	  loading.value = true
227	  errorMessage.value = ''
228	  try {
229	    if (useVignette.value) {
230	      const res = await api.getMemories()
231	      if (mySeq !== refreshSeq || !isMounted) return  // 丢弃过期响应
232	      sections.value = res.sections
233	    } else {
234	      const res = await api.getNarrative()
235	      if (mySeq !== refreshSeq || !isMounted) return  // 丢弃过期响应
236	      narrative.value = res.narrative
237	    }
238	  } catch (e: any) {
239	    if (mySeq !== refreshSeq || !isMounted) return
240	    console.error('Failed to load memories:', e)
241	    const detail = e?.message || String(e)
242	    showGlobalError(`加载失败：${detail}`)
243	    // 失败时不清空已有数据，保留用户上次看到的内容
244	  } finally {
245	    if (mySeq === refreshSeq && isMounted) loading.value = false
246	  }
247	}
248	
249	onMounted(() => refresh())
250	
251	onUnmounted(() => {
252	  isMounted = false
253	})
254	</script>
255
```

```json
24	      </div>

31	        :key="idx"
32	        class="activity-item"
33	        :class="`level-${record.level}`"
34	      >

52	<script setup lang="ts">
53	import { computed, onMounted, onUnmounted } from 'vue'
54	import { useActivityStore } from '@/stores/activity'
55	import type { ActivityStatsResponse } from '@/types'
56	
57	const store = useActivityStore()
58	
59	const displayRecords = computed(() => [...store.records].reverse())
60	
61	const statsTotal = computed(() => (store.stats as ActivityStatsResponse).total || 0)
62	const statsByCategory = computed(() => (store.stats as ActivityStatsResponse).by_category || {})
63	
64	const categoryLabels: Record<string, string> = {
65	  turn: 'Turn',
66	  tool: '工具',
67	  plan: '计划',
68	  compression: '压缩',
69	  approval: '审批',
70	  memory: '记忆',
71	  system: '系统',
72	}
73	
74	function categoryLabel(cat: string): string {
75	  return categoryLabels[cat] || cat
76	}
77	
78	function formatTime(ts: number): string {
79	  const d = new Date(ts * 1000)
80	  return d.toLocaleTimeString('zh-CN', { hour12: false })
81	}
82	
83	onMounted(() => {
84	  store.fetchRecent(100)
85	  store.fetchStats()
86	  store.startStream()
87	})
88	
89	onUnmounted(() => {
90	  store.stopStream()
91	})
92	</script>
```

```json
14	          :key="t.id"

32	      <div class="toggle-row">
33	        <div class="toggle-info">
34	          <div class="toggle-label">衬线字体</div>
35	          <div class="toggle-desc">使用衬线字体渲染正文内容，关闭则使用无衬线字体。</div>
36	        </div>
37	        <button class="toggle-btn" :class="{ on: serifFont }" @click="toggleSerif">
38	          {{ serifFont ? '开' : '关' }}
39	        </button>
40	      </div>
41	    </div>
42	
43	    <!-- 纹理 -->
44	    <div class="section">
45	      <h3>纹理</h3>
46	      <div class="toggle-row">
47	        <div class="toggle-info">
48	          <div class="toggle-label">纸质纹理</div>
49	          <div class="toggle-desc">在背景和卡片上叠加纸质纹理，营造纸张质感。关闭则使用纯色背景。</div>
50	        </div>
51	        <button class="toggle-btn" :class="{ on: paperTexture }" @click="togglePaperTexture">
52	          {{ paperTexture ? '开' : '关' }}
53	        </button>
54	      </div>
55	    </div>
56	  </div>

59	<script setup lang="ts">
60	import { ref } from 'vue'
61	import { useTheme } from '@/composables/useTheme'
62	import { usePaperTexture } from '@/composables/usePaperTexture'
63	
64	const { storedTheme, setTheme, THEMES } = useTheme()
65	
66	const serifFont = ref(localStorage.getItem('maxma.fontSerif') !== 'off')
67	
68	function toggleSerif() {
69	  serifFont.value = !serifFont.value
70	  localStorage.setItem('maxma.fontSerif', serifFont.value ? 'on' : 'off')
71	  document.body.classList.toggle('font-sans', !serifFont.value)
72	}
73	
74	const { enabled: paperTexture, toggle: togglePaperTexture } = usePaperTexture()
75	</script>
76
```

#### Tool: Read

> Read: `D:\Maxma\MaxmaHere\web\src\views\NewsView.vue`

**Output:**

```json
1	<template>
2	  <div class="news-view">
3	    <!-- 标题栏 -->
4	    <div class="header">
5	      <h2>更新动态</h2>
6	      <span class="news-count" v-if="!loading">共 {{ news.length }} 条更新</span>
7	    </div>
8	
9	    <div class="news-body">
10	      <!-- 卡片列表 -->
11	      <div class="news-content">
12	        <div v-if="loading" class="loading">加载中...</div>
13	        <div v-else-if="news.length === 0" class="empty">暂无更新动态</div>
14	        <div v-else class="card-grid" ref="cardGridRef">
15	          <NewsCard v-for="entry in news" :key="entry.id" :entry="entry" />
16	        </div>
17	      </div>
18	
19	      <!-- 版本演进时间轴 -->
20	      <div v-if="versionNodes.length > 0" class="version-timeline" :style="tlBounds">
21	        <div class="tl-track"></div>
22	        <div
23	          v-for="node in versionNodes"
24	          :key="node.version"
25	          class="tl-node"
26	          :style="{ top: node.top + 'px' }"
27	        >
28	          <div class="tl-dot"></div>
29	          <span class="tl-label">{{ node.version }}</span>
30	        </div>
31	      </div>
32	    </div>
33	  </div>
34	</template>
35	
36	<script setup lang="ts">
37	import { api } from '@/api'
38	import type { NewsEntry } from '@/types'
39	import NewsCard from '@/components/NewsCard.vue'
40	import { onMounted, onUnmounted, ref } from 'vue'
41	
42	const news = ref<NewsEntry[]>([])
43	const loading = ref(false)
44	const cardGridRef = ref<HTMLElement | null>(null)
45	const tlBounds = ref<{ top: string; height: string }>()
46	const versionNodes = ref<{ version: string; top: number }[]>([])
47	
48	let observer: ResizeObserver | null = null
49	
50	function updateTimelineBounds() {
51	  const grid = cardGridRef.value
52	  const body = grid?.closest<HTMLElement>('.news-body')
53	  if (!body || !grid) return
54	
55	  const cards = grid.querySelectorAll<HTMLElement>('.news-card')
56	  if (cards.length < 2) return
57	
58	  const bodyRect = body.getBoundingClientRect()
59	  const firstRect = cards[0].getBoundingClientRect()
60	  const lastRect = cards[cards.length - 1].getBoundingClientRect()
61	
62	  const top = firstRect.top + firstRect.height / 2 - bodyRect.top
63	  const bottom = lastRect.top + lastRect.height / 2 - bodyRect.top
64	
65	  tlBounds.value = {
66	    top: top + 'px',
67	    height: (bottom - top) + 'px',
68	  }
69	
70	  // 根据卡片实际 DOM 位置计算版本圆点的 top 值，而非按索引均分
71	  const tlTop = bodyRect.top + top
72	  const seen = new Set<string>()
73	  const nodes: { version: string; top: number }[] = []
74	  news.value.forEach((entry, idx) => {
75	    if (seen.has(entry.version)) return
76	    seen.add(entry.version)
77	    const card = cards[idx]
78	    if (!card) return
79	    const cardRect = card.getBoundingClientRect()
80	    nodes.push({
81	      version: entry.version,
82	      top: cardRect.top + cardRect.height / 2 - tlTop,
83	    })
84	  })
85	  versionNodes.value = nodes
86	}
87	
88	async function loadNews() {
89	  loading.value = true
90	  try {
91	    const res = await api.listNews()
92	    news.value = res.news.sort((a, b) => b.pr_number - a.pr_number)
93	    requestAnimationFrame(updateTimelineBounds)
94	  } catch (e: any) {
95	    console.error('加载更新动态失败', e)
96	  } finally {
97	    loading.value = false
98	  }
99	}
100	
101	onMounted(() => {
102	  loadNews()
103	  observer = new ResizeObserver(updateTimelineBounds)
104	  observer.observe(document.querySelector('.news-view')!)
105	})
106	
107	onUnmounted(() => {
108	  observer?.disconnect()
109	})
110	
111	</script>
112	
113	<style scoped>
114	.news-view {
115	  flex: 1;
116	  overflow-y: auto;
117	  padding: 40px 48px;
118	}
119	
120	.header {
121	  display: flex;
122	  align-items: center;
123	  justify-content: space-between;
124	  margin-bottom: 28px;
125	}
126	
127	.header h2 {
128	  font-size: 20px;
129	  font-weight: 700;
130	}
131	
132	.news-count {
133	  font-size: 13px;
134	  color: var(--text-secondary);
135	}
136	
137	.news-body {
138	  position: relative;
139	}
140	
141	.news-content {
142	  max-width: 720px;
```

#### Tool: Read

> Read: `D:\Maxma\MaxmaHere\web\src\stores\activity.ts`

**Output:**

```json
1	// web/src/stores/activity.ts
2	import { defineStore } from 'pinia'
3	import { ref } from 'vue'
4	import { api, getToken } from '@/api'
5	import { getBackendOrigin } from '@/utils/env'
6	import type { ActivityRecord, ActivityStatsResponse } from '@/types'
7	
8	export const useActivityStore = defineStore('activity', () => {
9	  const records = ref<ActivityRecord[]>([])
10	  const stats = ref<ActivityStatsResponse | Record<string, unknown>>({})
11	  const connected = ref(false)
12	  let eventSource: EventSource | null = null
13	  let pollTimer: ReturnType<typeof setInterval> | null = null
14	
15	  async function fetchRecent(limit = 100) {
16	    try {
17	      const data = await api.getActivityRecent(limit)
18	      records.value = data.records || []
19	    } catch (e) {
20	      console.error('Failed to fetch activity:', e)
21	    }
22	  }
23	
24	  async function fetchStats() {
25	    try {
26	      stats.value = await api.getActivityStats()
27	    } catch (e) {
28	      console.error('Failed to fetch activity stats:', e)
29	    }
30	  }
31	
32	  function startStream() {
33	    if (eventSource) eventSource.close()
34	    try {
35	      // 构造 SSE URL：EventSource 不支持自定义头，token 通过 query 传递
36	      const base = getBackendOrigin()
37	      const token = getToken()
38	      const url = `${base}/api/activity/stream${token ? `?token=${encodeURIComponent(token)}` : ''}`
39	      eventSource = new EventSource(url)
40	      eventSource.addEventListener('activity', (ev: MessageEvent) => {
41	        try {
42	          const record = JSON.parse(ev.data) as ActivityRecord
43	          records.value.push(record)
44	          // 限制前端保留 500 条
45	          if (records.value.length > 500) {
46	            records.value = records.value.slice(-500)
47	          }
48	        } catch { /* noop */ }
49	      })
50	      eventSource.onopen = () => {
51	        connected.value = true
52	        // SSE 重连成功后清理降级轮询，避免重复请求
53	        if (pollTimer) { clearInterval(pollTimer); pollTimer = null }
54	      }
55	      eventSource.onerror = () => {
56	        connected.value = false
57	        // SSE 断开后降级为轮询
58	        if (!pollTimer) {
59	          pollTimer = setInterval(() => fetchRecent(100), 5000)
60	        }
61	      }
62	    } catch {
63	      // EventSource 不支持时降级为轮询
64	      if (!pollTimer) {
65	        pollTimer = setInterval(() => fetchRecent(100), 5000)
66	      }
67	    }
68	  }
69	
70	  function stopStream() {
71	    if (eventSource) { eventSource.close(); eventSource = null }
72	    if (pollTimer) { clearInterval(pollTimer); pollTimer = null }
73	    connected.value = false
74	  }
75	
76	  async function clear() {
77	    try {
78	      await api.clearActivity()
79	      records.value = []
80	    } catch (e) {
81	      console.error('Failed to clear activity:', e)
82	    }
83	  }
84	
85	  return { records, stats, connected, fetchRecent, fetchStats, startStream, stopStream, clear }
86	})
87	
```

> Read: `D:\Maxma\MaxmaHere\web\src\components\PulsePanel.vue`

**Output:**

```json
1	<template>
2	  <section class="pulse-panel" aria-label="运行状态">
3	    <button class="pulse-toggle" type="button" :aria-expanded="!collapsed" aria-controls="pulse-details" @click="toggle">
4	      <span class="pulse-heading"><span class="pulse-dot" :class="overallStatus"></span><span>运行状态</span></span>
5	      <span class="pulse-summary">{{ summary }}</span>
6	      <span class="pulse-chevron" :class="{ expanded: !collapsed }" aria-hidden="true">›</span>
7	    </button>
8	    <div v-if="!collapsed" id="pulse-details" class="pulse-details" aria-live="polite">
9	      <div v-for="item in items" :key="item.id" class="pulse-item">
10	        <span class="pulse-dot" :class="item.component.status"></span>
11	        <div class="pulse-copy"><span class="pulse-label">{{ item.label }}</span><span class="pulse-detail">{{ item.detail }}</span></div>
12	      </div>
13	      <p v-if="health.timestamp" class="pulse-updated">更新于 {{ updatedAt }}</p>
14	    </div>
15	  </section>
16	</template>
17	
18	<script setup lang="ts">
19	import { computed, ref } from 'vue'
20	import type { ComponentHealth, HealthResponse } from '@/types'
21	import { diagnosticMessage, retryMessage } from '@/utils/providerDiagnostics'
22	
23	const STORAGE_KEY = 'maxma.pulse.collapsed'
24	const props = defineProps<{ health: HealthResponse }>()
25	
26	interface PulseItem { id: string; label: string; component: ComponentHealth; detail: string }
27	
28	function initialCollapsed(): boolean {
29	  try { return localStorage.getItem(STORAGE_KEY) === 'true' } catch { return false }
30	}
31	
32	const collapsed = ref(initialCollapsed())
33	const providerHealth = computed<ComponentHealth>(() => {
34	  const providers = Object.values(props.health.providers ?? {})
35	  if (!providers.length) return props.health.llm
36	  return providers.find(provider => provider.status === 'error')
37	    ?? providers.find(provider => provider.status === 'degraded')
38	    ?? providers[0]
39	})
40	const items = computed<PulseItem[]>(() => [
41	  makeItem('provider', '模型提供商', providerHealth.value),
42	  makeItem('ltm', '长期记忆', props.health.ltm ?? props.health.memory),
43	  makeItem('mcp', 'MCP 服务', props.health.mcp_tools),
44	  makeItem('execution', '执行环境', props.health.native_tools),
45	])
46	const overallStatus = computed(() => items.value.some(item => item.component.status === 'error')
47	  ? 'error' : items.value.some(item => item.component.status === 'degraded') ? 'degraded' : 'ok')
48	const summary = computed(() => {
49	  const attention = items.value.filter(item => item.component.status !== 'ok').length
50	  return attention ? `${attention} 项需要关注` : '运行正常'
51	})
52	const updatedAt = computed(() => new Date(props.health.timestamp * 1000).toLocaleTimeString())
53	
54	function makeItem(id: string, label: string, component: ComponentHealth): PulseItem {
55	  const diagnostic = diagnosticMessage(component)
56	  const retry = retryMessage(component.retry_at)
57	  const latency = component.latency_ms == null ? null : `${component.latency_ms.toFixed(0)}ms`
58	  const status = component.status === 'ok' ? '正常' : component.status === 'degraded' ? '受限' : '不可用'
59	  return { id, label, component, detail: [status, diagnostic, retry, latency].filter(Boolean).join(' · ') }
60	}
61	
62	function toggle() {
63	  collapsed.value = !collapsed.value
64	  try { localStorage.setItem(STORAGE_KEY, String(collapsed.value)) } catch { /* no persistent storage */ }
65	}
66	</script>
67	
68	<style scoped>
69	.pulse-panel { margin-top: auto; border-top: 1px solid var(--border); padding-top: 12px; }
70	.pulse-toggle { display: grid; grid-template-columns: minmax(0, 1fr) auto 16px; align-items: center; width: 100%; border: 0; background: transparent; color: var(--text-primary); cursor: pointer; font: inherit; text-align: left; }
71	.pulse-toggle:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid var(--accent); outline-offset: 3px; }
72	.pulse-heading, .pulse-item { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; }
73	.pulse-heading { min-width: 0; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 600; }
74	.pulse-summary, .pulse-updated { color: var(--text-tertiary); font-size: 11px; }
75	.pulse-chevron { color: var(--text-secondary); font-size: 18px; line-height: 1; text-align: right; transition: transform 160ms ease; }
76	.pulse-chevron.expanded { transform: rotate(90deg); }
77	.pulse-details { display: grid; gap: 8px; padding: 12px 0 2px; }
78	.pulse-copy { display: grid; gap: 1px; min-width: 0; }
79	.pulse-label { color: var(--text-secondary); font-size: 12px; }
80	.pulse-detail { overflow: hidden; color: var(--text-tertiary); font-size: 11px; text-overflow: ellipsis; white-space: nowrap; }
81	.pulse-dot { width: 7px; height: 7px; flex: 0 0 7px; border-radius: 50%; }
82	.pulse-dot.ok { background: var(--status-ok); }.pulse-dot.degraded { background: #d97706; }.pulse-dot.error { background: var(--status-error); }
83	.pulse-updated { margin: 2px 0 0 15px; }
84	</style>
85	
```

#### Tool: Read

> Read: `D:\Maxma\MaxmaHere\web\src\stores\provider.ts`

**Output:**

```json
1	import { defineStore } from 'pinia'
2	import { ref, computed } from 'vue'
3	import { api } from '@/api'
4	import type { ProviderConfig } from '@/types'
5	
6	/**
7	 * Provider 全局状态 store
8	 *
9	 * 此前 ChatView、ChatInput、ProvidersView 各自独立调用 api.listProviders()，
10	 * 无共享状态。ChatInput 的 loadProviders 失败时静默 catch 无重试，导致
11	 * 输入框显示"未配置模型"但 ChatView 显示聊天界面的不一致问题。
12	 *
13	 * 统一通过 store 管理 provider 列表，消除竞态和状态不一致。
14	 */
15	export const useProviderStore = defineStore('provider', () => {
16	  /** 所有 provider（含已禁用的，供 ProvidersView 管理用） */
17	  const allProviders = ref<ProviderConfig[]>([])
18	  /** 已启用的 provider 列表（供 ChatView/ChatInput 使用） */
19	  const enabledProviders = computed(() => allProviders.value.filter(p => p.enabled))
20	  /** 是否有已启用的 provider */
21	  const hasProviders = computed(() => enabledProviders.value.length > 0)
22	  /** Providers with a safe runtime reason code that UI surfaces can consume. */
23	  const providersNeedingAttention = computed(() => allProviders.value.filter(provider =>
24	    provider.health_status === 'degraded' || provider.health_status === 'error',
25	  ))
26	  /** 加载状态 */
27	  const loading = ref(false)
28	  /** 是否已成功加载过至少一次 */
29	  const loaded = ref(false)
30	  /** 进行中的加载 promise（并发调用时复用，避免竞态） */
31	  let _loadingPromise: Promise<void> | null = null
32	
33	  /**
34	   * 从后端加载 provider 列表
35	   * 失败时自动重试最多 3 次，间隔递增
36	   * 并发调用时复用同一个 promise，避免竞态
37	   */
38	  function loadProviders(retries = 3): Promise<void> {
39	    if (_loadingPromise) return _loadingPromise
40	    loading.value = true
41	    _loadingPromise = (async () => {
42	      try {
43	        for (let attempt = 0; attempt <= retries; attempt++) {
44	          try {
45	            const res = await api.listProviders()
46	            allProviders.value = res.providers
47	            loaded.value = true
48	            return
49	          } catch (e) {
50	            if (attempt < retries) {
51	              // 递增等待：200ms, 400ms, 800ms
52	              await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, 200 * Math.pow(2, attempt)))
53	            } else {
54	              // 最后一次仍失败：保留现有数据（首次加载时为空数组）
55	              console.warn('[providerStore] 加载 provider 列表失败（已重试', retries, '次）:', e)
56	            }
57	          }
58	        }
59	      } finally {
60	        loading.value = false
61	        _loadingPromise = null
62	      }
63	    })()
64	    return _loadingPromise
65	  }
66	
67	  /** 供 ProvidersView 在增删改后刷新（强制重新加载，不重试） */
68	  async function refresh(): Promise<void> {
69	    // 等待进行中的加载完成（如果有），再强制重新加载
70	    if (_loadingPromise) await _loadingPromise
71	    _loadingPromise = null
72	    loading.value = false
73	    await loadProviders(0)
74	  }
75	
76	  return {
77	    allProviders,
78	    enabledProviders,
79	    hasProviders,
80	    providersNeedingAttention,
81	    loading,
82	    loaded,
83	    loadProviders,
84	    refresh,
85	  }
86	})
87	
```

```json
13	const TIME_SUFFIX_RE = /（\d{4}-\d{2}-\d{2} \w{3} \d{2}:\d{2}）$/
14	
15	export const TURNS_KEY_PREFIX = 'maxma_turns_'
16	
17	/** 将旧格式 turn（userMessage 含 __refs__ 和时间尾缀）迁移为新格式 */
18	function migrateLegacyTurn(turn: any): ChatTurn {
19	  if (Array.isArray(turn.refs)) {
20	    return { memoryEvents: [], ...turn } as ChatTurn
21	  }
22	  // 旧格式：从 userMessage 中提取 refs 和时间尾缀
23	  const prevMsg = (turn.userMessage ?? '') as string
24	  const { cleanText, refs } = parseReferences(prevMsg || '')
25	  const text = refs.length > 0 ? cleanText : prevMsg.replace(TIME_SUFFIX_RE, '')
26	  return { ...turn, userMessage: text, refs, memoryEvents: [] }
27	}
28	
29	// 从 localStorage 恢复所有会话的消息缓存（页面刷新后仍保留）
30	function loadAllTurnsFromStorage(): Map<string, ChatTurn[]> {
31	  const map = new Map<string, ChatTurn[]>()
32	  const keysFound: string[] = []
33	  for (let i = 0; i < localStorage.length; i++) {
34	    const key = localStorage.key(i)
35	    if (key && key.startsWith(TURNS_KEY_PREFIX)) {
36	      keysFound.push(key)
37	      const sid = key.slice(TURNS_KEY_PREFIX.length)
38	      try {
39	        const raw = localStorage.getItem(key) || '[]'
40	        const data = JSON.parse(raw)
41	        if (Array.isArray(data)) {
42	          const migrated = data.map(migrateLegacyTurn)
43	          console.log(`[useChat:load] 从 localStorage 加载会话 ${sid}: ${data.length} 条 turn (迁移 ${migrated.length}), 序列化长度 ${raw.length}`)
44	          map.set(sid, migrated)
45	        } else {
46	          console.warn(`[useChat:load] 键 ${key} 的数据不是数组，跳过`)
47	        }
48	      } catch (e) {
49	        console.error(`[useChat:load] 解析 localStorage 键 ${key} 失败:`, e)
50	      }
51	    }
52	  }
53	  console.log(`[useChat:load] localStorage 中共 ${keysFound.length} 个 ${TURNS_KEY_PREFIX}* 键, 恢复 ${map.size} 个会话的缓存`)
54	  return map
55	}
56	
57	function saveTurnsToStorage(sid: string, data: ChatTurn[]) {
58	  const key = TURNS_KEY_PREFIX + sid
59	  const tryWrite = () => {
60	    const serialized = JSON.stringify(data)
61	    const size = new Blob([serialized]).size
62	    localStorage.setItem(key, serialized)
63	    return size
64	  }
65	  try {
66	    const size = tryWrite()
67	    console.log(`[useChat:save] 保存会话 ${sid} 到 localStorage: ${data.length} 条 turn, 约 ${(size / 1024).toFixed(1)} KB, key=${key}`)
68	  } catch (e) {
69	    // 修复：配额超限后无清理 → 后续所有保存全部静默失败，用户无感知地丢失持久化。
70	    // 策略：删除其他会话中最早（按 localStorage 键的写入顺序近似）的缓存，腾出空间后重试一次。
71	    if (e instanceof DOMException && (e.name === 'QuotaExceededError' || e.name === 'NS_ERROR_DOM_QUOTA_REACHED')) {
72	      console.warn(`[useChat:save] localStorage 配额超限，尝试清理其他会话缓存后重试 (key=${key})`)
73	      // 收集除当前 sid 外的所有 turns 缓存键，按"最近未使用"策略删除最旧的
74	      const otherKeys: string[] = []
75	      for (let i = 0; i < localStorage.length; i++) {
76	        const k = localStorage.key(i)
77	        if (k && k.startsWith(TURNS_KEY_PREFIX) && k !== key) {
78	          otherKeys.push(k)
79	        }
80	      }
81	      // 删除一半最旧的缓存（最多保留一半），按键在 localStorage 中的顺序（近似 FIFO）
82	      const toEvict = otherKeys.slice(0, Math.max(1, Math.ceil(otherKeys.length / 2)))
83	      for (const k of toEvict) {
84	        localStorage.removeItem(k)
85	        const evictedSid = k.slice(TURNS_KEY_PREFIX.length)
86	        turnsCache.delete(evictedSid)
87	        console.warn(`[useChat:save] 配额压力下清理会话 ${evictedSid} 的缓存`)
88	      }

90	      try {
91	        const size = tryWrite()
92	        console.log(`[useChat:save] 清理后重试成功: 会话 ${sid}, ${data.length} 条 turn, 约 ${(size / 1024).toFixed(1)} KB`)
93	      } catch (e2) {
94	        console.error(`[useChat:save] 清理后仍无法保存会话 ${sid} (key=${key}):`, e2)
95	        // 最后手段：移除当前会话自己的缓存键，避免留下部分写入的脏数据
96	        try { localStorage.removeItem(key) } catch { /* ignore */ }
97	      }
```

```json
5	    <span class="ring-group hover-trigger">
6	      <svg class="ring" viewBox="0 0 32 32">
7	        <circle
8	          class="ring-bg"
9	          cx="16" cy="16" r="13"
10	          fill="none"
11	          stroke-width="3"
12	        />
13	        <circle
14	          class="ring-fill"
15	          cx="16" cy="16" r="13"
16	          fill="none"
17	          stroke-width="3"
18	          stroke-linecap="round"
19	          :stroke-dasharray="circumference"
20	          :stroke-dashoffset="dashOffset"
21	        />
22	      </svg>
23	      <span class="label">{{ Math.round(usage.usage_percent) }}%</span>
24	      <div class="hover-card card-usage">
25	        <!-- 饼图：上下文组成概览 -->
26	        <div v-if="pieSegments.length > 0" class="pie-chart-container">
27	          <svg class="pie-chart" viewBox="0 0 36 36">
28	            <circle
29	              v-for="(seg, idx) in pieSegments"
30	              :key="idx"
31	              cx="18" cy="18" r="15.9155"
32	              fill="none"
33	              :stroke="seg.color"
34	              stroke-width="4"
35	              :stroke-dasharray="`${seg.percent} ${100 - seg.percent}`"
36	              :stroke-dashoffset="seg.offset"
37	            />
38	          </svg>
39	          <div class="pie-legend">
40	            <div v-for="(seg, idx) in pieSegments" :key="'l'+idx" class="pie-legend-item">
41	              <span class="pie-dot" :style="{ background: seg.color }"></span>
42	              <span class="pie-label">{{ seg.label }}</span>
43	              <span class="pie-value">{{ formatTokens(seg.tokens) }}</span>
44	            </div>
45	          </div>
46	        </div>
47	
48	        <!-- 总览 -->
49	        <div class="breakdown-section">
50	          <div class="card-row breakdown-header">
51	            <span class="card-label">总览</span>
52	            <span class="card-value">{{ Math.round(usage.usage_percent) }}%</span>
53	          </div>
54	          <div class="mini-bar-track" :class="level">
55	            <div
56	              class="mini-bar-fill"
57	              :style="{ width: Math.min(usage.usage_percent, 100) + '%' }"
58	            ></div>
59	          </div>
60	          <div class="card-row breakdown-part">
61	            <span class="card-label indent">已用</span>
62	            <span class="card-value">{{ formatTokens(usage.current_tokens) }}</span>
63	          </div>
64	          <div class="card-row breakdown-part">
65	            <span class="card-label indent">极限</span>
66	            <span class="card-value">{{ formatTokens(usage.max_tokens) }}</span>
67	          </div>
68	        </div>
69	
70	        <!-- 细分数据（可选） -->
71	        <template v-if="usage.breakdown">
72	          <div class="card-divider"></div>
73	
74	          <!-- 系统提示词 -->

76	            <div class="card-row breakdown-header">

83	                :style="{ width: usage.breakdown.system_prompt.usage_percent + '%' }"

88	              :key="part.key || part.label"
89	              class="card-row breakdown-part"
90	            >
91	              <span class="card-label indent">{{ part.label }}</span>
92	              <span class="card-value">{{ formatTokens(part.tokens) }}</span>
93	            </div>
94	          </div>
95	
96	          <!-- 对话数据 -->
97	          <div class="breakdown-section">
98	            <div class="card-row breakdown-header">
99	              <span class="card-label">对话数据</span>
100	              <span class="card-value">{{ formatTokens(usage.breakdown.messages.total) }}</span>
```

```json
172	<script setup lang="ts">
173	import { ref, computed } from 'vue'
174	import type { ContextUsage, DeepSeekBalanceResponse } from '@/types'
175	import { api } from '@/api'
176	
177	const props = defineProps<{
178	  usage: ContextUsage | null
179	  selectedModel?: string
180	}>()
181	
182	const displayModelName = computed(() => props.selectedModel || props.usage?.model_name || '')
183	
184	const circumference = 2 * Math.PI * 13
185	
186	const balanceData = ref<DeepSeekBalanceResponse | null>(null)
187	const balanceLoading = ref(false)
188	const balanceError = ref<string | null>(null)
189	let balanceFetched = false
190	
191	function formatTokens(n: number): string {
192	  if (n >= 1_000_000) return (n / 1_000_000).toFixed(1) + 'M'
193	  if (n >= 1_000) return (n / 1_000).toFixed(1) + 'K'
194	  return n.toLocaleString()
195	}
196	
197	const dashOffset = computed(() => {
198	  if (!props.usage) return circumference
199	  const pct = Math.min(props.usage.usage_percent, 100)
200	  return circumference * (1 - pct / 100)
201	})
202	
203	const level = computed(() => {
204	  if (!props.usage) return ''
205	  if (props.usage.usage_percent < 60) return 'safe'
206	  if (props.usage.usage_percent < 85) return 'warn'
207	  return 'danger'
208	})
209	
210	/** 饼图分段数据 */
211	const pieSegments = computed(() => {
212	  if (!props.usage?.breakdown) return []
213	  const total = props.usage.current_tokens || 1
214	  const sysTokens = props.usage.breakdown.system_prompt.total
215	  const msgTokens = props.usage.breakdown.messages.total
216	
217	  const segments: Array<{ label: string; tokens: number; percent: number; offset: number; color: string }> = []
218	  let cumPercent = 0
219	
220	  // 系统提示词
221	  const sysPercent = (sysTokens / total) * 100
222	  segments.push({
223	    label: '系统提示词',
224	    tokens: sysTokens,
225	    percent: sysPercent,
226	    offset: 25 - cumPercent,
227	    color: '#6366f1',
228	  })
229	  cumPercent += sysPercent
230	
231	  // 消息部分按类型拆分
232	  const colors = ['#22c55e', '#3b82f6', '#f59e0b']
233	  const msgParts = props.usage.breakdown.messages.parts || []
234	  msgParts.forEach((part, idx) => {
235	    const partPercent = (part.tokens / total) * 100
236	    segments.push({
237	      label: part.label,
238	      tokens: part.tokens,
239	      percent: partPercent,
240	      offset: 25 - cumPercent,
241	      color: colors[idx % colors.length],
242	    })
243	    cumPercent += partPercent
244	  })
245	
246	  return segments
247	})
```

```json
2	 * 工作台状态管理 — Pinia store（单例）。

41	    type: card.type,
42	    pinned: card.pinned === true,

44	  })))
45	  const activeCard = computed<CanvasCard | null>(() =>
46	    cards.value.find(card => card.id === activeCardId.value) ?? cards.value[0] ?? null,
47	  )
48

50	    isOpen.value = true
51	  }
52	
53	  function close() {
54	    isOpen.value = false
55	  }
56	
57	  function toggle() {

59	  }
```

```json
80	
81	    <!-- ── 文档列表 ── -->

84	        已索引文档（{{ store.documents.length }}）
```

> Read: `D:\Maxma\MaxmaHere\api\routes\news.py`

**Output:**

```json
1	"""REST API — 系统更新动态。"""
2	
3	import yaml
4	from fastapi import APIRouter
5	from pydantic import BaseModel
6	
7	from app_paths import NEWS_YAML_PATH
8	
9	router = APIRouter()
10	
11	NEWS_PATH = NEWS_YAML_PATH
12	
13	
14	# ── Pydantic 模型 ──
15	
16	
17	class NewsEntry(BaseModel):
18	    id: str
19	    en_title: str | None = None
20	    title: str
21	    description: str
22	    type: str
23	    date: str
24	    tags: list[str] = []
25	    version: str
26	    pr_number: int | None = None
27	
28	
29	class ListNewsResponse(BaseModel):
30	    news: list[NewsEntry]
31	
32	
33	# ── 读取 ──
34	
35	
36	def _load_news() -> list[NewsEntry]:
37	    if not NEWS_PATH.exists():
38	        return []
39	    with open(NEWS_PATH, encoding="utf-8") as f:
40	        raw = yaml.safe_load(f) or {}
41	    entries = [NewsEntry(**item) for item in raw.get("news", [])]
42	    # 按日期降序排列（最新的在前）
43	    entries.sort(key=lambda e: e.date, reverse=True)
44	    return entries
45	
46	
47	# ── 路由 ──
48	
49	
50	@router.get("/news", response_model=ListNewsResponse)
51	def list_news():
52	    """返回所有更新动态，按日期降序排列。"""
53	    return ListNewsResponse(news=_load_news())
54	
```

#### Tool: Read

> Read: `D:\Maxma\MaxmaHere\api\routes\activity.py`

**Output:**

```json
1	"""Activity Hub REST + SSE 路由。
2	
3	提供端点：
4	- GET    /api/activity/recent  获取最近的活动记录
5	- GET    /api/activity/stats    获取活动统计信息
6	- DELETE /api/activity          清空活动缓冲区
7	- GET    /api/activity/stream   SSE 流式推送活动事件
8	"""
9	from __future__ import annotations
10	
11	import asyncio
12	import json
13	import time
14	
15	from fastapi import APIRouter, Request
16	from fastapi.responses import StreamingResponse
17	
18	from api.activity_hub import activity_hub
19	
20	router = APIRouter()
21	
22	
23	@router.get("/activity/recent")
24	async def get_recent(limit: int = 100, category: str | None = None) -> dict:
25	    """获取最近的活动记录。"""
26	    records = activity_hub.recent(limit=limit, category=category)
27	    return {
28	        "records": [r.to_dict() for r in records],
29	        "total": len(records),
30	    }
31	
32	
33	@router.get("/activity/stats")
34	async def get_stats() -> dict:
35	    """获取活动统计信息。"""
36	    return activity_hub.stats()
37	
38	
39	@router.delete("/activity")
40	async def clear_activity() -> dict:
41	    """清空活动缓冲区。"""
42	    count = activity_hub.clear()
43	    return {"cleared": count}
44	
45	
46	@router.get("/activity/stream")
47	async def stream_activity(request: Request):
48	    """SSE 流式推送活动事件。
49	
50	    客户端通过 EventSource 连接，实时接收新活动。
51	    使用轮询 deque 的方式（每 1s 检查一次），避免复杂的发布订阅机制。
52	    """
53	    async def event_generator():
54	        # 用时间戳做游标，避免 deque 满后 len 索引错位
55	        last_ts = time.time()
56	        while True:
57	            if await request.is_disconnected():
58	                break
59	            records = activity_hub.recent(limit=10000)
60	            new_records = [r for r in records if r.timestamp > last_ts]
61	            for record in new_records:
62	                data = json.dumps(record.to_dict(), ensure_ascii=False)
63	                yield f"event: activity\ndata: {data}\n\n"
64	            if new_records:
65	                last_ts = new_records[-1].timestamp
66	            await asyncio.sleep(1.0)
67	
68	    return StreamingResponse(
69	        event_generator(),
70	        media_type="text/event-stream",
71	        headers={
72	            "Cache-Control": "no-cache",
73	            "Connection": "keep-alive",
74	            "X-Accel-Buffering": "no",
75	        },
76	    )
77	
```
