```json
37	
38	_LOCAL_REF_PREFIX = "local:"
39	_MODEL_ROLES_PATH = CONFIG_DIR / "model_roles.yaml"
40	
41	
42	@dataclass(frozen=True)
43	class ThinkPathExecution:
44	    """Validated, opt-in execution preference for one chat turn.
45	
46	    The browser can only submit a fixed ThinkPath id.  Resolving its role and
47	    selecting a provider happens server-side, so a client cannot smuggle an
48	    arbitrary provider role, model capability, or cost preference into a chat
49	    request.
50	    """
51	
52	    path: ThinkPath | None = None
53	    provider: Any | None = None
54	    model_name: str | None = None
55	
56	
57	def _resolve_think_path_execution(
58	    think_path_id: object,
59	    *,
60	    think_path_enabled: bool,
61	    declarative_model_routing_enabled: bool,
62	    has_explicit_model_selection: bool,
63	    provider_manager: Any | None,
64	    model_roles_path: Path = _MODEL_ROLES_PATH,
65	) -> ThinkPathExecution:
66	    """Resolve a visible ThinkPath without weakening model-selection rules.
67	
68	    A path is ignored unless its feature flag is on.  Explicit provider/model
69	    choices always win, and an unavailable/malformed declarative rule leaves
70	    the normal default route untouched.  This helper performs no I/O besides
71	    reading the local role configuration and never changes provider state.
72	    """
73	    if not think_path_enabled:
74	        return ThinkPathExecution()
75	
76	    path = get_think_path(think_path_id if isinstance(think_path_id, str) else None)
77	    if path is None:
78	        return ThinkPathExecution()
79	
80	    if (
81	        not declarative_model_routing_enabled
82	        or has_explicit_model_selection
83	        or provider_manager is None
84	    ):
85	        return ThinkPathExecution(path=path)
86	
87	    try:
88	        role = resolve_model_role(model_roles_path, path.role)
89	        selected = provider_manager.select_for_role(role)
90	    except Exception:
91	        # Role routing is an optional convenience.  A bad local rule or an
92	        # unexpected provider implementation must never reject the message.
93	        logger.warning("[chat] ThinkPath model routing unavailable", exc_info=True)
94	        return ThinkPathExecution(path=path)
95	
96	    if selected is None:
97	        return ThinkPathExecution(path=path)
98	    provider, model_name = selected
99	    if not isinstance(model_name, str) or not model_name.strip():
100	        return ThinkPathExecution(path=path)
101	    return ThinkPathExecution(path=path, provider=provider, model_name=model_name)
102	
103	
104	def _think_path_runtime_context(path: ThinkPath | None) -> str:
105	    """Return trusted, fixed execution guidance for a selected path only."""
106	    if path is None:
107	        return ""
108	    return (
109	        "[本轮执行偏好（用户已确认）]\n"
110	        f"采用“{path.label}”路径：{path.description}\n"
111	        f"预期深度：{path.depth}；预估成本：{path.estimated_cost}。"
112	    )
113	
114	
115	def _effective_auto_approve(session: SessionState, requested: object) -> bool:
116	    """Prevent a delegated session from exceeding its parent's approval policy."""
117	    context = (
118	        getattr(session, "delegation_context", None)
119	        if getattr(session, "is_subagent", False)
120	        else None
121	    )
122	    if context is None:
123	        return bool(requested)
124	    return bool(requested) and bool(context.auto_approve)
125	
126	
127	def _get_provider_context(app_state) -> tuple[int, str]:
128	    """从 ProviderManager 获取默认 context_window 和 model_name。"""
129	    mgr = getattr(app_state, "provider_manager", None)
130	    if mgr is not None and mgr.count > 0:
131	        for provider in mgr.iter_enabled():
132	            return provider.config.context_window, provider.default_model
133	    return 256_000, ""
134	
135	
136	def _build_runtime_context_for_agent(
137	    app_state, turn_tools, current_model_name: str | None
138	) -> str:
139	    """生成运行时配置摘要，注入到 agent 的 episodic_context。
140	
141	    让 agent 每轮都能"看到"自己的配置全貌（providers/MCP/工具统计），
142	    减少执行路径的不确定性。失败时返回空字符串，不阻塞主流程。
143	    """
144	    try:
145	        from agent.runtime_context import build_runtime_context
146	
147	        provider_manager = getattr(app_state, "provider_manager", None)
148	        native_count = sum(
149	            1
150	            for t in turn_tools
151	            if not t.name.split("_")[0].islower() or "_" not in t.name
152	        )
153	        # 更准确的统计：MCP 工具名通常带 server_id 前缀
154	        from tools import TOOL_CATEGORIES
155	
156	        all_native_names: set[str] = set()
157	        for names in TOOL_CATEGORIES.values():
158	            all_native_names.update(names)
159	        native_count = sum(1 for t in turn_tools if t.name in all_native_names)
160	        mcp_count = len(turn_tools) - native_count
161	
162	        return build_runtime_context(
163	            provider_manager=provider_manager,
164	            mcp_tool_count=mcp_count,
165	            native_tool_count=native_count,
166	            current_model_name=current_model_name,
167	        )
168	    except Exception as e:
169	        logger.warning("[chat] 运行时配置摘要生成失败: %s", e)
170	        return ""
171	
172	
173	async def _process_image_refs(user_message: str) -> str:
174	    """从用户消息中提取图片引用，自动描述图片内容并追加到消息末尾。
175	
176	    流程：
177	    1. 解析 __refs__ 块中的 image 类型引用
178	    2. 对每个有 path 的图片调用 GLM-5V-Turbo 生成描述
179	    3. 将描述追加到用户消息文本末尾（在 __refs__ 之前）
180	
181	    Returns:
182	        增强后的用户消息文本
183	    """
184	    import re
185	
186	    # 提取 refs 块
187	    refs_start = user_message.rfind("__refs__")
188	    if refs_start == -1:
189	        return user_message
190	
191	    refs_end = user_message.find("__/refs__", refs_start)
192	    if refs_end == -1:
193	        return user_message
194	
195	    refs_json = user_message[refs_start + len("__refs__") : refs_end]
196	    try:
197	        refs_list = json.loads(refs_json)
198	    except (json.JSONDecodeError, ValueError):
199	        return user_message
200	
201	    # 提取图片引用
202	    image_paths = []
203	    for ref_item in refs_list:
204	        if isinstance(ref_item, dict) and ref_item.get("type") == "image":
205	            path = ref_item.get("path", "")
206	            if path:
207	                image_paths.append((path, ref_item.get("label", "image")))
208	
209	    if not image_paths:
210	        return user_message
211	
212	    # 对每张图片生成描述
213	    descriptions = []
214	    for path, label in image_paths:
215	        try:
216	            desc = await _describe_image(path)
217	            if desc:
218	                descriptions.append(f"[图片 {label}: {desc}]")
219	        except Exception as e:
220	            logger.warning(f"Failed to describe image {path}: {e}")
221	            descriptions.append(f"[图片 {label}: 描述失败 - {str(e)[:80]}]")
222	
223	    if not descriptions:
224	        return user_message
225	
226	    # 将描述插入到 __refs__ 之前
227	    before_refs = user_message[:refs_start].rstrip()
228	    after_refs = user_message[refs_start:]
229	    desc_text = "\n\n" + "\n".join(descriptions)
230	    return before_refs + desc_text + "\n\n" + after_refs
231	
232	
233	def _resolve_local_image_ref(image_ref: str) -> Path:
234	    """将前端图片 ref 解析为已通过路径安全检查的本地路径。"""
235	    path_text = image_ref.strip()
236	    if path_text.startswith(_LOCAL_REF_PREFIX):
237	        path_text = path_text[len(_LOCAL_REF_PREFIX) :].strip()
238	    if not path_text:
239	        raise ValueError("图片路径为空")
240	
241	    file_path = Path(path_text).expanduser().resolve(strict=False)
242	    blocked = check_path_access(str(file_path))
243	    if blocked:
244	        raise PermissionError(blocked)
245	    return file_path
246	
247	
248	async def _describe_image(image_path: str) -> str:
249	    """调用 GLM-5V-Turbo 描述单张图片。"""
250	    import base64
251	    import mimetypes
252	
253	    file_path = _resolve_local_image_ref(image_path)
254	    if not file_path.exists():
255	        raise FileNotFoundError(f"图片文件不存在: {image_path}")
256	
257	    # 读取并编码图片
258	    image_bytes = file_path.read_bytes()
259	    mime = mimetypes.guess_type(str(file_path))[0] or "image/png"
260	    image_b64 = base64.b64encode(image_bytes).decode("utf-8")
261	    data_url = f"data:{mime};base64,{image_b64}"
262	
263	    # 调用 GLM-5V-Turbo
264	    from zai import ZhipuAiClient
265	
266	    settings = get_settings()
267	    if not settings.zhipuai_api_key:
268	        return "(图片描述不可用: 未配置智谱 API Key)"
269	
270	    client = ZhipuAiClient(api_key=settings.zhipuai_api_key)
271	
272	    response = await asyncio.to_thread(
273	        client.chat.completions.create,
274	        model="glm-5v-turbo",
275	        messages=[
276	            {
277	                "role": "user",
278	                "content": [
279	                    {"type": "image_url", "image_url": {"url": data_url}},
280	                    {
281	                        "type": "text",
282	                        "text": "请简洁描述这张图片的主要内容，包括关键元素、场景和文字（如果有）。控制在 100 字以内。",
283	                    },
284	                ],
285	            }
286	        ],
287	        thinking={"type": "enabled"},
288	        stream=False,
289	    )
290	
291	    return response.choices[0].message.content or "(无法描述)"
292	
293	
294	async def _get_messages_from_sidecar(
295	    session: "SessionState",
296	    limit: int = 50,
297	    *,
298	    sidecar_mgr=None,
299	) -> list[dict]:
300	    """从 sidecar 获取消息历史。sidecar 不可用时返回空列表。
301	
302	    通过 SessionMap（SQLite 持久化）查找 sidecar session ID，
303	    然后调用 get_messages RPC 获取消息列表。
304	
305	    Args:
306	        session: 会话状态
307	        limit: 最大消息数
308	        sidecar_mgr: SidecarManager 实例（必须由调用方传入）
309	    """
310	    if sidecar_mgr is None:
311	        sidecar_mgr = getattr(session, "_sidecar_mgr", None)
312	    if sidecar_mgr is None:
313	        return []
314	    await sidecar_mgr.start()
315	    client = sidecar_mgr.client
316	    if client is None:
317	        return []
318	    # 从 SessionMap 获取 sidecar session ID（持久化，重启后仍可用）
319	    from api.pi_bridge.session_adapter import SessionMap
320	    with SessionMap() as sm:
321	        sidecar_sid = sm.get_sidecar_id(session.session_id)
322	    if not sidecar_sid:
323	        sidecar_sid = getattr(session, "_sidecar_session_id", None)
324	    if not sidecar_sid:
325	        return []
326	    try:
327	        result = await client.call("get_messages", {
328	            "session_id": sidecar_sid,
329	            "limit": limit,
330	        })
331	        return result.get("messages", [])
332	    except Exception:
333	        logger.debug("[sidecar] get_messages failed", exc_info=True)
334	        return []
335	
336	
337	async def _get_recent_ai_messages(session, config, limit: int = 5) -> list[str]:
338	    """从 sidecar 获取最近 N 条 AI 消息内容（用于贴纸情感分析）。
339	
340	    sidecar 模式下 config 为 None，改为从 sidecar RPC 获取消息历史。
341	    """
342	    messages = await _get_messages_from_sidecar(session, limit=limit * 3)
343	    ai_msgs = [m.get("content", "") for m in messages if m.get("role") == "assistant"]
344	    return ai_msgs[-limit:]
345	
346	
347	async def _stream_turn_sidecar(
348	    ws: WebSocket,
349	    session: SessionState,
350	    user_message_for_llm: str,
351	    system_prompt: str,
352	    current_provider_id: str,
353	    current_model_name: str | None,
354	) -> str:
355	    """Execute a turn using oh-my-pi sidecar (Bun subprocess).
356	
357	    Returns final_answer string for post-processing (stickers, memory, etc.).
358	    Intermediate events (token, tool_start, tool_end, tool_error) are streamed
359	    to the frontend via WS in real-time.
360	
361	    The answer and done events are NOT sent here — the existing post-processing
362	    pipeline in _run_agent_turn handles those (including sticker processing).
363	    """
364	    app_state = ws.app.state
365	
366	    # 1. Ensure sidecar is running
367	    mgr = app_state.sidecar_manager
368	    await mgr.start()
369	    client = mgr.client
370	    assert client is not None, "Sidecar client not available"
371	    # 注入 sidecar manager 到 session，供下游函数（消息历史、context usage、
372	    # const 保存、情景记忆等）通过 session._sidecar_mgr 访问
373	    session._sidecar_mgr = mgr
374	
375	    # 2. Look up sidecar session (persistent SessionMap, fallback to in-memory)
376	    from api.pi_bridge.session_adapter import SessionMap
377	    with SessionMap() as _session_map:
378	        sidecar_sid = _session_map.get_sidecar_id(session.session_id)
379	    if not sidecar_sid:
380	        sidecar_sid = getattr(session, "_sidecar_session_id", None)
381	
382	    if not sidecar_sid:
383	        if current_provider_id:
384	            model_str = f"{current_provider_id}/{current_model_name or 'gpt-4o'}"
385	        else:
386	            model_str = current_model_name or "gpt-4o"
387	
388	        # 首次创建 sidecar session，system_prompt 含人设/规则/技能
389	        # 如果是重启后重建，从 SessionMap 恢复最近对话上下文
390	        _sidecar_system_prompt = system_prompt
391	        try:
392	            _past_turns = _session_map.get_recent_turns(session.session_id, count=5)
393	            if _past_turns:
394	                _history_lines = []
395	                for t in _past_turns:
396	                    _history_lines.append(f"用户: {t.get('user', '')}")
397	                    _history_lines.append(f"助理: {t.get('assistant', '')}")
398	                _history_text = "\n".join(_history_lines)
399	                _sidecar_system_prompt = (
400	                    f"{system_prompt}\n\n"
401	                    f"[历史对话上下文（共 {len(_past_turns)} 轮）]\n"
402	                    f"{_history_text}\n"
403	                )
404	                logger.info(
405	                    "[sidecar] Restored %d past turns for session %s",
406	                    len(_past_turns), session.session_id[:8],
407	                )
408	        except Exception:
409	            logger.debug("[sidecar] Failed to restore past turns", exc_info=True)
410	
411	        result = await client.call("create_session", {
412	            "model": model_str,
413	            "system_prompt": _sidecar_system_prompt,
414	            "cwd": ".",
415	        })
416	        sidecar_sid = result["session_id"]
417	        session._sidecar_session_id = sidecar_sid
418	        _session_map.set_mapping(session.session_id, sidecar_sid)
419	        logger.info(
420	            "[sidecar] Created session %s for Maxma session %s",
421	            sidecar_sid[:8], session.session_id[:8],
422	        )
423	
424	    # 3. 情景记忆：每轮对话以用户消息为查询检索相关历史，注入到 user_message
425	    _user_message_for_llm = user_message_for_llm
426	    try:
427	        _episodic_mm = getattr(app_state, "episodic_mm", None)
428	        if _episodic_mm is not None and user_message_for_llm:
429	            from agent.context_manager import retrieve_from_episodic
430	            _episodic_context = retrieve_from_episodic(
431	                user_message_for_llm,
432	                _episodic_mm,
433	                top_k=3,
434	                session_id=session.session_id,
435	            )
436	            if _episodic_context:
437	                _user_message_for_llm = (
438	                    f"[相关情景记忆]\n{_episodic_context}\n\n"
439	                    f"---\n\n{user_message_for_llm}"
440	                )
441	    except Exception:
442	        logger.warning("[sidecar] Episodic retrieval failed", exc_info=True)
443	
444	    # 3. Register event handlers to forward intermediate events to WS
445	    final_answer = ""
446	    turn_done = asyncio.Event()
447	
448	    async def _on_token(sid: str, event: dict):
449	        if sid != sidecar_sid:
450	            return
451	        try:
452	            await ws.send_json({
453	                "type": "token",
454	                "payload": {"token": event.get("payload", {}).get("token", "")},
455	            })
456	        except Exception:
457	            pass
458	
459	    async def _on_tool_start(sid: str, event: dict):
460	        if sid != sidecar_sid:
461	            return
462	        try:
463	            payload = event.get("payload", {})
464	            await ws.send_json({
465	                "type": "tool_start",
466	                "payload": {
467	                    "tool_name": payload.get("tool_name", ""),
468	                    "input": payload.get("input", ""),
469	                },
470	            })
471	        except Exception:
472	            pass
473	
474	    async def _on_tool_end(sid: str, event: dict):
475	        if sid != sidecar_sid:
476	            return
477	        try:
478	            payload = event.get("payload", {})
479	            await ws.send_json({
480	                "type": "tool_end",
481	                "payload": {
482	                    "tool_name": payload.get("tool_name", ""),
483	                    "output": payload.get("output", ""),
484	                    "elapsed": payload.get("elapsed", 0),
485	                },
486	            })
487	        except Exception:
488	            pass
489	
490	    async def _on_tool_error(sid: str, event: dict):
491	        if sid != sidecar_sid:
492	            return
493	        try:
494	            payload = event.get("payload", {})
495	            await ws.send_json({
496	                "type": "tool_error",
497	                "payload": {
498	                    "tool_name": payload.get("tool_name", ""),
499	                    "error": payload.get("error", ""),
500	                },
501	            })
502	        except Exception:
503	            pass
504	
505	    async def _on_answer(sid: str, event: dict):
506	        nonlocal final_answer
507	        if sid != sidecar_sid:
508	            return
509	        # Extract the answer but do NOT send to WS — the existing post-processing
510	        # in _run_agent_turn handles sticker processing + answer push.
511	        final_answer = event.get("payload", {}).get("content", "")
512	
513	    async def _on_done(sid: str, event: dict):
514	        if sid != sidecar_sid:
515	            return
516	        turn_done.set()
517	
518	    # Register all event handlers
519	    unsubs = []
520	    for evt_type, handler in [
521	        ("token", _on_token),
522	        ("tool_start", _on_tool_start),
523	        ("tool_end", _on_tool_end),
524	        ("tool_error", _on_tool_error),
525	        ("answer", _on_answer),
526	        ("done", _on_done),
527	    ]:
528	        unsub = client.on(evt_type, handler)
529	        unsubs.append(unsub)
530	
531	    # 4. Execute prompt via sidecar
532	    try:
533	        await client.call("prompt", {
534	            "session_id": sidecar_sid,
535	            "message": _user_message_for_llm,
536	        })
537	        # Wait for done event (sidecar signals completion)
538	        await asyncio.wait_for(turn_done.wait(), timeout=600)
539	    except asyncio.TimeoutError:
540	        logger.warning("[sidecar] Turn timed out for session %s", sidecar_sid)
541	        if not final_answer:
542	            final_answer = "（Sidecar 处理超时，请重试）"
543	    except Exception as e:
544	        logger.exception("[sidecar] Turn failed for session %s", sidecar_sid)
545	        if not final_answer:
546	            final_answer = f"（Sidecar 处理出错：{e}）"
547	    finally:
548	        for unsub in unsubs:
549	            try:
550	                unsub()
551	            except Exception:
552	                pass
553	
554	    return final_answer
555	
556	
557	async def _calculate_context_usage(
558	    session,
559	    system_prompt,
560	    *,
561	    max_tokens: int = 256_000,
562	    model_name: str = "",
563	) -> dict:
564	    """估算上下文用量。sidecar 模式下从消息历史估算。
565	
566	    从 sidecar 获取消息列表，用字符数粗略估算 token 用量。
567	    返回字典包括估算用量、最大用量、占比、消息数。
568	    """
569	    messages = await _get_messages_from_sidecar(session, limit=200)
570	    total_chars = sum(len(m.get("content", "")) for m in messages)
571	    total_chars += len(system_prompt or "")
572	    # 粗略估算：混合中英文约 2 字符/token
573	    estimated_tokens = int(total_chars / 2)
574	    return {
575	        "estimated_tokens": estimated_tokens,
576	        "max_tokens": max_tokens,
577	        "percentage": min(100, int(estimated_tokens / max(max_tokens, 1) * 100)),
578	        "message_count": len(messages),
579	        "model_name": model_name,
580	    }
581	
582	
583	async def _inject_cancel_tool_messages(session, config, ws: WebSocket) -> None:
584	    """为 checkpoint 中孤立的 tool_calls 注入统一格式的正常 ToolMessage。
585	
586	    sidecar 模式下 session._graph 为 None，取消由 sidecar 的 cancel RPC 处理，
587	    无需手动清理 checkpoint。直接返回。
588	    """
589	    graph = session._graph
590	    if graph is None:
591	        return  # sidecar 模式：cancel 由 sidecar 处理，无需 checkpoint 清理
592	
593	    try:
594	        state = await graph.aget_state(config)
595	    except Exception:
596	        logger.debug("Failed to get graph state for cancel cleanup", exc_info=True)
597	        return  # checkpoint 不可读时静默跳过
598	
599	    messages = state.values.get("messages", [])
600	    if not messages:
601	        return
602	
603	    # 从后往前找最后一个 AIMessage
604	    last_ai = None
605	    for i in range(len(messages) - 1, -1, -1):
606	        if isinstance(messages[i], AIMessage):
607	            last_ai = messages[i]
608	            break
609	
610	    if last_ai is None:
611	        return
612	
613	    tool_calls = getattr(last_ai, "tool_calls", [])
614	    if not tool_calls:
615	        return
616	
617	    # 收集其后所有 ToolMessage 的 tool_call_id 集合
618	    try:
619	        idx = messages.index(last_ai)
620	    except ValueError:
621	        return
622	    following = messages[idx + 1 :]
623	
624	    tool_msg_ids = {m.tool_call_id for m in following if isinstance(m, ToolMessage)}
625	
626	    orphaned = [tc for tc in tool_calls if tc["id"] not in tool_msg_ids]
627	    if not orphaned:
628	        return  # checkpoint 已一致
629	
630	    # 通知前端：使运行的工具体进入错误状态
631	    for tc in orphaned:
632	        try:
633	            await ws.send_json(
634	                {
635	                    "type": "tool_error",
636	                    "payload": {
637	                        "tool_name": tc["name"],
638	                        "error": "用户取消了该工具调用",
639	                    },
640	                }
641	            )
642	        except Exception:
643	            logger.debug(
644	                "Failed to send tool_error via WebSocket (connection may be closed)",
645	                exc_info=True,
646	            )
647	
648	    # 生成取消 ToolMessage 并写入 checkpoint
649	    cancel_msgs = []
650	    for tc in orphaned:
651	        cancel_msgs.append(
652	            ToolMessage(
653	                content=format_error("用户取消了该工具调用"),
654	                name=tc["name"],
655	                tool_call_id=tc["id"],
656	            )
657	        )
658	    try:
659	        await graph.aupdate_state(config, {"messages": cancel_msgs}, as_node="tools")
660	    except Exception as e:
661	        print(
662	            f"[cancel] aupdate_state failed: {type(e).__name__}: {e}", file=sys.stderr
663	        )
664	        raise
665	
666	
667	# ── 项目上下文自动感知 ──────────────────────────────────────────
668	
669	import re as _re
670	
671	# 匹配 Windows / Unix 绝对路径
672	_PATH_PATTERN = _re.compile(r"(?:[A-Za-z]:[\\/]|[\\/])(?:[\w .\-]+[\\/])*[\w .\-]+")
673	
674	
675	def _detect_project_path(message: str) -> str | None:
676	    """从用户消息中提取可能的项目根目录路径。"""
677	    matches = _PATH_PATTERN.findall(message)
678	    for m in matches:
679	        p = m.rstrip("\\/").rstrip()
680	        # 检查是否是目录
681	        from pathlib import Path as _Path
682	
683	        if _Path(p).is_dir():
684	            # 检查是否像项目根目录（含 .git 或 package.json 或 pyproject.toml 等）
685	            markers = [
686	                ".git",
687	                "package.json",
688	                "pyproject.toml",
689	                "Cargo.toml",
690	                "go.mod",
691	                "requirements.txt",
692	                "setup.py",
693	            ]
694	            if any((_Path(p) / marker).exists() for marker in markers):
695	                return p
696	    return None
697	
698	
699	def _get_project_context(session: SessionState, user_message: str) -> str | None:
700	    """获取项目上下文：优先用缓存，否则尝试从消息检测并扫描。"""
701	    # 已有缓存
702	    if session._project_context is not None:
703	        return session._project_context
704	
705	    # 尝试从消息检测项目路径
706	    project_path = _detect_project_path(user_message)
707	    if project_path is None:
708	        return None
709	
710	    # 扫描项目
711	    try:
712	        from agent.project_scanner import scan_project
713	
714	        ctx = scan_project(project_path)
715	        text = ctx.to_prompt_text()
716	        # 缓存到 session
717	        session._project_context = text
718	        session._project_path = project_path
719	        return text
720	    except Exception as e:
721	        import logging
722	
723	        logging.getLogger(__name__).warning("[project_scanner] 扫描失败: %s", e)
724	        return None
725	
726	
727	async def _project_completed_turn_to_episodic(
728	    *,
729	    user_message: str = "",
730	    assistant_message: str = "",
731	    episodic_mm,
732	    session_id: str,
733	    turn_id: str,
734	    graph=None,
735	    config: dict | None = None,
736	) -> None:
737	    """Best-effort 将一个成功的 chat turn 投影到情景记忆。
738	
739	    sidecar 模式下 graph/config 为 None，直接使用传入的 user_message 和
740	    assistant_message 构造摘要，不再从 checkpoint 读取消息列表。
741	    """
742	    if episodic_mm is None:
743	        return
744	    try:
745	        # sidecar 模式：graph 为 None，使用直接传入的消息
746	        if graph is None:
747	            # 构造简单的摘要文本用于情景记忆
748	            summary_parts = []
749	            if user_message:
750	                user_preview = user_message[:200] + ("..." if len(user_message) > 200 else "")
751	                summary_parts.append(f"用户: {user_preview}")
752	            if assistant_message:
753	                asst_preview = assistant_message[:300] + ("..." if len(assistant_message) > 300 else "")
754	                summary_parts.append(f"助理: {asst_preview}")
755	            summary = "\n".join(summary_parts)
756	            if not summary:
757	                return
758	            # 写入情景记忆（add_episode 是同步方法）
759	            episode_id = episodic_mm.add_episode(
760	                summary=summary,
761	                session_id=session_id,
762	                turn_id=turn_id,
763	            )
764	            if episode_id is None:
765	                logger.debug(
766	                    "[episodic] no episode created for session=%s turn=%s",
767	                    session_id, turn_id,
768	                )
769	            return
770	
771	        # LangGraph 路径（保留兼容，理论上 sidecar 模式不会到达）
772	        episode_id = await commit_to_episodic(
773	            graph,
774	            config,
775	            episodic_mm,
776	            session_id=session_id,
777	            turn_id=turn_id,
778	        )
779	        if episode_id is None:
780	            logger.warning(
781	                "[episodic] projection produced no episode for session=%s turn=%s",
782	                session_id,
783	                turn_id,
784	            )
785	    except Exception:
786	        logger.exception(
787	            "[episodic] projection failed after completed response for session=%s turn=%s",
788	            session_id,
789	            turn_id,
790	        )
791	
792	
793	def _new_turn_id(turn_id: object = None) -> str:
794	    """Return a validated client id or create one before execution begins."""
795	    if isinstance(turn_id, str):
796	        candidate = turn_id.strip()
797	        if candidate and len(candidate) <= 128:
798	            return candidate
799	    return uuid.uuid4().hex
800	
801	
802	async def _is_memory_eligible_turn(graph, config: dict) -> bool:
803	    """Read the graph's explicit model outcome before persisting a turn.
804	
805	    Provider failures are intentionally rendered as helpful AI messages by the
806	    graph.  Their text is not a reliable persistence signal, particularly
807	    across locales and provider implementations, so only an explicit success
808	    marker allows automatic episodic/LTM projection.
809	    """
810	    try:
811	        state = await graph.aget_state(config)
812	        values = getattr(state, "values", {}) if state is not None else {}
813	        succeeded = values.get("llm_invocation_succeeded")
814	        if succeeded is True:
815	            return True
816	        if succeeded is False:
817	            logger.info("[memory] skipping failed model turn")
818	        else:
819	            logger.warning("[memory] skipping turn without model outcome metadata")
820	    except Exception:
821	        logger.warning(
822	            "[memory] skipping turn with unreadable model outcome", exc_info=True
823	        )
824	    return False
825	
826	
827	async def _run_agent_turn(
828	    ws: WebSocket,
829	    session: SessionState,
830	    user_message: str,
831	    private_mode: bool = False,
832	    auto_approve: bool = False,
833	    provider_id: str | None = None,
834	    model_name: str | None = None,
835	    think_path_id: str | None = None,
836	    turn_id: str | None = None,
837	):
838	    """
839	    在指定的session中编排一轮 Agent 对话。
840	    无返回值。
841	    以内置的 WebSocketCallback回调函数和前端通信系统作为副作用。
842	
843	    若指定了 provider_id + model_name，则从 ProviderManager 动态创建 LLM；
844	    否则退化到 app_state.llm 全局 fallback。
845	    """
846	    # 1. [准备环境] 从 WebSocket 获取应用状态
847	    app_state = ws.app.state
848	    current_task = asyncio.current_task()
849	    # The memory id is assigned before any model work.  Callers can pass a
850	    # stable client/request id when retrying after reconnect; otherwise this
851	    # invocation gets one stable id for its full lifetime.
852	    turn_id = _new_turn_id(turn_id)
853	    interaction.current_session_id.set(session.session_id)
854	    # ── 多模态：自动描述用户附带的图片 ──────────────────────────
855	    user_message = await _process_image_refs(user_message)
856	    # ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
857	
858	    # 获取默认上下文窗口大小和模型名（一次性解构，避免重复调用）
859	    default_max_tokens, fallback_model_name = _get_provider_context(app_state)
860	
861	    # 子会话在创建时带有不可变的 DelegationContext。前端连接后也必须
862	    # 消费它，不能让客户端 payload 或之后的全局 provider 配置改变父任务
863	    # 已授权的模型、工具或预算。普通会话保持原有选择逻辑。
864	    delegation_context = (
865	        getattr(session, "delegation_context", None)
866	        if getattr(session, "is_subagent", False)
867	        else None
868	    )
869	    delegation_helpers = None
870	    auto_approve = _effective_auto_approve(session, auto_approve)
871	    session.auto_approve = auto_approve
872	    interaction.set_session_auto_approve(session.session_id, auto_approve)
873	
874	    # 动态 LLM 选择（Phase 2：每次消息独立指定提供商/模型）
875	    # 阶段 3.3：指定 provider 失败时尝试 fallback 链（按 priority 排序）
876	    current_max_tokens = default_max_tokens
877	    current_provider_id = ""
878	    if provider_id and model_name and hasattr(app_state, "provider_manager"):
879	        try:
880	            provider = app_state.provider_manager.get(provider_id)
881	            llm = provider.create_llm(model_name, temperature=0.7, streaming=True)
882	            current_model_name = model_name
883	            current_max_tokens = provider.config.context_window
884	            current_provider_id = provider.config.id
885	        except KeyError:
886	            # 阶段 3.3：尝试 fallback 到下一个可用 provider
887	            fallback_provider = app_state.provider_manager.get_fallback(
888	                exclude_ids={provider_id} if provider_id else None
889	            )
890	            if fallback_provider is not None:
891	                logger.warning(
892	                    "[chat:%s] requested provider/model fallback: provider_id=%r model=%r not found; "
893	                    "switching to fallback provider=%r (priority=%d)",
894	                    session.session_id[:8],
895	                    provider_id,
896	                    model_name,
897	                    fallback_provider.config.id,
898	                    fallback_provider.config.priority,
899	                )
900	                llm = fallback_provider.create_llm(
901	                    fallback_provider.default_model,
902	                    temperature=0.7,
903	                    streaming=True,
904	                )
905	                current_model_name = fallback_provider.default_model
906	                current_max_tokens = fallback_provider.config.context_window
907	                current_provider_id = fallback_provider.config.id
908	            else:
909	                logger.warning(
910	                    "[chat:%s] requested provider/model fallback: provider_id=%r model=%r not found; "
911	                    "no fallback available, using default",
912	                    session.session_id[:8],
913	                    provider_id,
914	                    model_name,
915	                )
916	                llm = app_state.llm
917	                current_model_name = None
918	    elif provider_id or model_name:
919	        logger.warning(
920	            "[chat:%s] requested provider/model fallback: provider_id=%r model=%r incomplete or unavailable; "
921	            "using default provider/model=%r",
922	            session.session_id[:8],
923	            provider_id,
924	            model_name,
925	            fallback_model_name or "<unknown>",
926	        )
927	        llm = app_state.llm
928	        current_model_name = None
929	    else:
930	        llm = app_state.llm
931	        current_model_name = None
932	
933	    # ThinkPath is a user-confirmed depth preference, not an opaque prompt
934	    # classifier.  It may opt into declarative routing only when the user did
935	    # not already select a provider/model in this same request.
936	    settings = get_settings()
937	    think_path_execution = _resolve_think_path_execution(
938	        think_path_id,
939	        think_path_enabled=settings.think_path_enabled,
940	        declarative_model_routing_enabled=settings.declarative_model_routing_enabled,
941	        has_explicit_model_selection=bool(provider_id or model_name),
942	        provider_manager=getattr(app_state, "provider_manager", None),
943	    )
944	    if think_path_execution.provider is not None:
945	        try:
946	            routed_provider = think_path_execution.provider
947	            routed_model_name = think_path_execution.model_name
948	            llm = routed_provider.create_llm(
949	                routed_model_name,
950	                temperature=0.7,
951	                streaming=True,
952	            )
953	            current_provider_id = routed_provider.config.id
954	            current_model_name = routed_model_name
955	            current_max_tokens = routed_provider.config.context_window
956	            logger.info(
957	                "[chat:%s] ThinkPath %s selected provider=%s model=%s",
958	                session.session_id[:8],
959	                think_path_execution.path.id if think_path_execution.path else "",
960	                current_provider_id,
961	                current_model_name,
962	            )
963	        except Exception:
964	            # Do not turn an optional selection preference into a chat outage.
965	            # The previously selected/default LLM remains intact.
966	            logger.warning(
967	                "[chat:%s] ThinkPath route creation failed; using normal selection",
968	                session.session_id[:8],
969	                exc_info=True,
970	            )
971	
972	    if delegation_context is not None:
973	        from tools.sub_agent.delegation_context import (
974	            activate_delegation_context,
975	            bind_model_budget,
976	            prepare_delegated_tools,
977	            reset_delegation_context,
978	        )
979	
980	        delegation_helpers = (
981	            activate_delegation_context,
982	            prepare_delegated_tools,
983	            reset_delegation_context,
984	        )
985	        if delegation_context.remaining_seconds() <= 0:
986	            error = RuntimeError("子 Agent 的委托时间预算已耗尽")
987	            if (
988	                session._pending_result is not None
989	                and not session._pending_result.done()
990	            ):
991	                session._pending_result.set_exception(error)
992	            await ws.send_json(
993	                format_ws_error(ErrorCode.AGENT_ERROR, "子 Agent 的委托时间预算已耗尽")
994	            )
995	            return
996	        llm = bind_model_budget(delegation_context)
997	        current_model_name = delegation_context.model_name or current_model_name
998	        if delegation_context.max_tokens > 0:
999	            current_max_tokens = min(current_max_tokens, delegation_context.max_tokens)
1000	
1001	    if llm is None:
1002	        error_collector.add_error(
1003	            level="ERROR",
1004	            category="llm",
1005	            message="No LLM provider configured",
1006	            session_id=session.session_id,
1007	        )
1008	        await ws.send_json(
1009	            format_ws_error(
1010	                ErrorCode.NO_LLM,
1011	                "No LLM provider configured. Add one in Model Settings first.",
1012	            )
1013	        )
1014	        return
1015	
1016	    # A normal parent turn also activates a context.  This makes a top-level
1017	    # delegation inherit the model actually selected for this request rather
1018	    # than rediscovering app_state.llm inside the tool.
1019	    if delegation_context is None:
1020	        from tools.sub_agent.delegation_context import (
1021	            activate_delegation_context,
1022	            create_delegation_context,
1023	            reset_delegation_context,
1024	        )
1025	
1026	        execution_context = create_delegation_context(
1027	            app_state,
1028	            session.session_id,
1029	            model=llm,
1030	            provider_id=current_provider_id,
1031	            model_name=current_model_name,
1032	            auto_approve=auto_approve,
1033	        )
1034	        delegation_helpers = (
1035	            activate_delegation_context,
1036	            None,
1037	            reset_delegation_context,
1038	        )
1039	    else:
1040	        execution_context = delegation_context
1041	
1042	    system_prompt = build_system_prompt()
1043	
1044	    # ── 项目上下文自动感知 ──────────────────────────────────────
1045	    # 缓存优化：project_ctx 不再追加到 system_prompt，而是 prepend 到
1046	    # user_message。这样 SystemMessage 保持完全稳定，有利于 DeepSeek
1047	    # prompt cache 命中（project_ctx 仅在检测到项目路径时非空）。
1048	    project_ctx = _get_project_context(session, user_message)
1049	    # ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
1050	
1051	    # 缓存优化：使用全量工具集 + MCP 工具，避免每轮工具集变化破坏
1052	    # DeepSeek prompt cache（tools 字段是 prompt 前缀的一部分）。
1053	    # 全量工具带来的额外 token 会被缓存，成本远低于缓存 miss。
1054	    mcp_tools = getattr(ws.app.state, "mcp_tools", None) or []
1055	    turn_tools = merge_tool_lists(
1056	        get_all_tools(), list(mcp_tools), log_collisions=False
1057	    )
1058	    if delegation_context is not None:
1059	        # This is the execution boundary, not merely prompt-time filtering.
1060	        # ScopedTool validates path arguments immediately before each call.
1061	        turn_tools = delegation_helpers[1](turn_tools, delegation_context)
1062	    # 4 层架构：注入情景记忆管理器，启用 episodic_retriever 节点
1063	    episodic_mm = getattr(ws.app.state, "episodic_mm", None)
1064	    # B6：生成运行时配置摘要，让 agent 感知自身的 providers/MCP/工具配置全貌
1065	    runtime_context_text = _build_runtime_context_for_agent(
1066	        app_state, turn_tools, current_model_name
1067	    )
1068	    think_path_context = _think_path_runtime_context(think_path_execution.path)
1069	    if think_path_context:
1070	        runtime_context_text = "\n\n".join(
1071	            part for part in (think_path_context, runtime_context_text) if part
1072	        )
1073	
1074	    # project_ctx prepend 到 user_message（不修改 system_prompt，保持缓存稳定）
1075	    if project_ctx:
1076	        user_message_for_llm = f"[项目上下文]\n{project_ctx}\n\n---\n\n{user_message}"
1077	    else:
1078	        user_message_for_llm = user_message
1079	
1080	    # oh-my-pi sidecar: no LangGraph state
1081	    config = None
1082	    agent_maxma = None
1083	    session._graph = None
1084	
1085	    # 2. [执行轮次] 流式执行 Agent 图，副作用推送最终回答，另有config回调副作用
1086	    final_answer = ""
1087	    _run_error: str | None = None
1088	    turn_completed = False
1089	    context_token = None
1090	    try:
1091	        # turn 开始时推送当前上下文用量（含刚加入的 user message）
1092	        initial_turn_usage = await _calculate_context_usage(
1093	            session,
1094	            system_prompt,
1095	            max_tokens=current_max_tokens,
1096	            model_name=current_model_name or "",
1097	        )
1098	        await ws.send_json({"type": "context_usage", "payload": initial_turn_usage})
1099	
1100	        context_token = delegation_helpers[0](execution_context)
1101	        if delegation_context is not None:
1102	            async with asyncio.timeout(delegation_context.remaining_seconds()):
1103	                final_answer = await _stream_turn_sidecar(
1104	                    ws,
1105	                    session,
1106	                    user_message_for_llm,
1107	                    system_prompt,
1108	                    current_provider_id,
1109	                    current_model_name,
1110	                )
1111	        else:
1112	            _turn_timeout = 600
1113	            try:
1114	                _turn_timeout = get_settings().turn_timeout
1115	            except Exception:
1116	                pass
1117	            async with asyncio.timeout(_turn_timeout):
1118	                final_answer = await _stream_turn_sidecar(
1119	                    ws,
1120	                    session,
1121	                    user_message_for_llm,
1122	                    system_prompt,
1123	                    current_provider_id,
1124	                    current_model_name,
1125	                )
1126	        # Sidecar mode: no graph state to inspect, trust the returned answer
1127	        turn_completed = bool(final_answer)
1128	
1129	        # 保存本轮对话到 SessionMap（用于侧边栏重启后恢复上下文）
1130	        if final_answer and not private_mode:
1131	            try:
1132	                from api.pi_bridge.session_adapter import SessionMap
1133	                with SessionMap() as sm:
1134	                    sm.append_turn(session.session_id, user_message, final_answer)
1135	            except Exception:
1136	                logger.debug("[sidecar] Failed to save turn to SessionMap", exc_info=True)
1137	
1138	        if final_answer:
1139	            # 表情包处理：分层决策架构
1140	            # 1. LLM 主动输出 [表情包:情绪] → 直接解析
1141	            # 2. LLM 未输出 → 决策器判断是否补发
1142	            from tools.sticker_utils import process_stickers
1143	
1144	            ai_recent = await _get_recent_ai_messages(session, config, limit=5)
1145	            processed_answer, _ = process_stickers(
1146	                final_answer,
1147	                user_message=user_message,
1148	                ai_recent_messages=ai_recent,
1149	            )
1150	            final_answer = processed_answer
1151	            await ws.send_json(
1152	                {  # [向前端通信] 1. 向客户端推送最终答案
1153	                    "type": "answer",
1154	                    "payload": {"content": processed_answer},
1155	                }
1156	            )
1157	    except asyncio.CancelledError:
1158	        # 清理 interaction 挂起 Future
1159	        await interaction.cancel_session(session.session_id)
1160	
1161	        # sidecar 模式：通过 cancel RPC 中止 sidecar 中的生成
1162	        try:
1163	            sidecar_mgr = getattr(ws.app.state, "sidecar_manager", None)
1164	            if sidecar_mgr and sidecar_mgr.client:
1165	                from api.pi_bridge.session_adapter import SessionMap
1166	                with SessionMap() as sm:
1167	                    sidecar_sid = sm.get_sidecar_id(session.session_id)
1168	                if not sidecar_sid:
1169	                    sidecar_sid = getattr(session, "_sidecar_session_id", None)
1170	                if sidecar_sid:
1171	                    await sidecar_mgr.client.call("cancel", {"session_id": sidecar_sid})
1172	        except Exception as e:
1173	            logger.debug("[cancel] sidecar cancel RPC failed: %s", e)
1174	
1175	        # 注：原 LangGraph 路径的 checkpoint 清理和 interrupt AIMessage 注入
1176	        # 在 sidecar 模式下不再需要 — cancel RPC 已中止生成，
1177	        # sidecar 内部维护消息状态的一致性。
1178	
1179	        await ws.send_json(format_ws_error(ErrorCode.CANCELLED, "生成已取消"))
1180	    except Exception as e:
1181	        # 清理可能挂起的用户交互 Future，防止阻塞后续交互
1182	        await interaction.cancel_session(
1183	            session.session_id, "Agent 执行出错，交互已取消"
1184	        )
1185	        _run_error = str(e)
1186	        trace_id = uuid.uuid4().hex[:8]
1187	        logger.error(
1188	            f"[sub-agent:{session.session_id[:8]}] _run_agent_turn error: {e}",
1189	            exc_info=True,
1190	            extra={"trace_id": trace_id},
1191	        )
1192	        error_collector.add_exception(
1193	            e,
1194	            category="agent",
1195	            message=f"Agent 执行出错: {str(e)[:200]}",
1196	            trace_id=trace_id,
1197	            session_id=session.session_id,
1198	        )
1199	        await ws.send_json(
1200	            format_ws_error(
1201	                ErrorCode.AGENT_ERROR,
1202	                f"Agent 执行出错: {str(e)[:200]}",
1203	                trace_id=trace_id,
1204	            )
1205	        )
1206	    finally:
1207	        if context_token is not None:
1208	            delegation_helpers[2](context_token)
1209	        if session._active_task is current_task:
1210	            session._active_task = None
1211	        context_usage = await _calculate_context_usage(
1212	            session,
1213	            system_prompt,
1214	            max_tokens=current_max_tokens,
1215	            model_name=current_model_name or "",
1216	        )
1217	        await ws.send_json(
1218	            {  # [向前端通信] 3. 推送 turn 结束 + 上下文用量 + turn_id（用于记忆事件关联）
1219	                "type": "done",
1220	                "payload": {
1221	                    "turn_id": turn_id,
1222	                    "context_usage": context_usage,
1223	                },
1224	            }
1225	        )
1226	
1227	    # 3. [后处理] 增加消息计数器，将对话记录入长期记忆
1228	    # 修复：此前仅在 final_answer 非空时 +=2，错误轮次仍写 checkpointer（至少写入 HumanMessage）
1229	    # 但计数不增 → message_count 与 checkpointer 实际消息数漂移，导致：
1230	    # 1) undo 端点 max(0, count - deleted) 计算错误
1231	    # 2) const 会话 YAML metadata.message_count 不准，重启后显示错误
1232	    if final_answer:
1233	        session.message_count += 2  # human + ai
1234	    else:
1235	        # Agent 出错：graph.ainvoke 已把 HumanMessage 写入 checkpointer，但没有 AI 回复
1236	        session.message_count += 1
1237	    memory_eligible = turn_completed and bool(final_answer)
1238	    if not private_mode and memory_eligible:
1239	        if final_answer:
1240	            await _project_completed_turn_to_episodic(
1241	                user_message=user_message,
1242	                assistant_message=final_answer,
1243	                episodic_mm=episodic_mm,
1244	                session_id=session.session_id,
1245	                turn_id=turn_id,
1246	            )
1247	        # 增量发送：只传成功轮次给记忆消费者，避免错误提示污染 LTM。
1248	        messages_for_memory = [
1249	            {"role": "user", "content": user_message},
1250	            {"role": "assistant", "content": final_answer},
1251	        ]
1252	        logger.info(
1253	            "[ltm] calling send_history, messages=%d (incremental)",
1254	            len(messages_for_memory),
1255	        )
1256	        try:
1257	            await app_state.ltm.send_history(
1258	                messages_for_memory,
1259	                session_id=session.session_id,
1260	                turn_id=turn_id,
1261	            )
1262	            logger.info("[ltm] send_history completed")
1263	        except Exception as e:
1264	            logger.error("[ltm] send_history failed: %s", e, exc_info=True)
1265	
1266	    # 4. [Const 会话] 自动持久化到磁盘 YAML
1267	    if final_answer and session.is_const:
1268	        try:
1269	            # sidecar 模式：从 sidecar 获取消息历史
1270	            messages = await _get_messages_from_sidecar(session, limit=200)
1271	            if messages:
1272	                # 转换为 serialize_messages 兼容格式
1273	                serialized = []
1274	                for m in messages:
1275	                    role = m.get("role", "unknown")
1276	                    content = m.get("content", "")
1277	                    if role == "user":
1278	                        serialized.append({"type": "human", "content": content})
1279	                    elif role == "assistant":
1280	                        serialized.append({"type": "ai", "content": content})
1281	                # 确保最后一条 AI 消息是 final_answer
1282	                for item in reversed(serialized):
1283	                    if item.get("type") == "ai":
1284	                        item["content"] = final_answer
1285	                        break
1286	                metadata = session.persistent_metadata()
1287	                save_const_session(
1288	                    session.session_id, session.const_name, metadata, serialized
1289	                )
1290	        except Exception as e:
1291	            print(
1292	                f"[const] 自动保存会话 {session.session_id[:8]} 失败: {e}",
1293	                file=sys.stderr,
1294	            )
1295	
1296	    # 5. [Sub-agent] 如果有待处理的 pending_result，resolve 它
1297	    if session._pending_result is not None and not session._pending_result.done():
1298	        if _run_error:
1299	            print(
1300	                f"[sub-agent:{session.session_id[:8]}] resolving pending_result with run error",
1301	                file=sys.stderr,
1302	            )
1303	            session._pending_result.set_exception(
1304	                RuntimeError(f"子 Agent 执行失败: {_run_error}")
1305	            )
1306	        elif final_answer:
1307	            print(
1308	                f"[sub-agent:{session.session_id[:8]}] resolving pending_result with answer",
1309	                file=sys.stderr,
1310	            )
1311	            session._pending_result.set_result(final_answer)
1312	        else:
1313	            print(
1314	                f"[sub-agent:{session.session_id[:8]}] resolving pending_result with exception (empty answer)",
1315	                file=sys.stderr,
1316	            )
1317	            session._pending_result.set_exception(
1318	                RuntimeError("Sub-agent 未能产生有效回答")
1319	            )
1320	
1321	
1322	async def _resume_sub_agent(
1323	    ws: WebSocket, session: SessionState
1324	) -> asyncio.Task | None:
1325	    """WebSocket 重连时，若会话有未完成的 sub-agent 任务则自动恢复执行。"""
1326	    if session._sub_agent_task is None or session._pending_result is None:
1327	        return None
1328	    if session._pending_result.done():
1329	        return None
1330	    task = session._sub_agent_task
1331	    session._sub_agent_task = None  # 消费掉，防止重连后重复启动
1332	    # 取消旧任务，等待其完成后再创建新任务，避免 checkpoint 竞态
1333	    if session._active_task is not None and not session._active_task.done():
1334	        session._active_task.cancel()
1335	        try:
1336	            await asyncio.wait_for(session._active_task, timeout=5)
1337	        except (asyncio.CancelledError, asyncio.TimeoutError):
1338	            pass
1339	        session._active_task = None
1340	    interaction.current_ws.set(ws)
1341	    interaction.current_session_id.set(session.session_id)
1342	    agent_task = asyncio.create_task(
1343	        _run_agent_turn(ws, session, task, private_mode=False)
1344	    )
1345	    session._active_task = agent_task
1346	    return agent_task
1347	
1348	
1349	@router.websocket("/ws/chat/{session_id}")
1350	async def websocket_chat(ws: WebSocket, session_id: str):
1351	    """WebSocket 聊天端点 — 接收用户消息、驱动 Agent、处理取消和用户交互。"""
1352	    await ws.accept()
1353	
1354	    # ── 初始化会话 ────────────────────────────────────────
1355	    app_state = ws.app.state
1356	    session = await app_state.session_manager.get_or_create(session_id)
1357	
1358	    # 注册 WebSocket 到注册表，供后台记忆 consumer 推送事件
1359	    app_state.ws_registry.register(session_id, ws)
1360	
1361	    # ── 推送初始上下文用量 ─────────────────────────────────
1362	    default_max_tokens, default_model = _get_provider_context(app_state)
1363	    initial_usage = await _calculate_context_usage(
1364	        session,
1365	        app_state.system_prompt,
1366	        max_tokens=default_max_tokens,
1367	        model_name=default_model,
1368	    )
1369	    await ws.send_json({"type": "context_usage", "payload": initial_usage})
1370	
1371	    # ── 断线重连时恢复 sub-agent ──────────────────────────
1372	    agent_task = await _resume_sub_agent(ws, session)
1373	
1374	    # ── 消息主循环 ────────────────────────────────────────
1375	    try:
1376	        while True:
1377	            raw = await ws.receive_text()
1378	            try:
1379	                msg = json.loads(raw)
1380	            except json.JSONDecodeError:
1381	                # 客户端发送非 JSON 文本（心跳探针、协议错误等），忽略不中断连接
1382	                continue
1383	            if not isinstance(msg, dict):
1384	                continue
1385	
1386	            match msg.get("type", ""):
1387	                case "ping":
1388	                    await ws.send_json({"type": "pong", "payload": {}})
1389	
1390	                case "chat":
1391	                    if agent_task and not agent_task.done():
1392	                        continue  # 已有 Agent 运行中，忽略本次输入
1393	
1394	                    payload = msg.get("payload")
1395	                    if not isinstance(payload, dict):
1396	                        continue
1397	                    user_message = str(payload.get("message", "")).strip()
1398	                    if not user_message:
1399	                        continue
1400	
1401	                    # 阶段 3.2：per-session 令牌桶限流
1402	                    allowed, rate_err = get_ws_rate_limiter().try_consume(session_id)
1403	                    if not allowed:
1404	                        get_metrics().record_rate_limit("ws")
1405	                        error_collector.add_error(
1406	                            level="WARNING",
1407	                            category="rate_limit",
1408	                            message=f"WebSocket 限流: {rate_err}",
1409	                            session_id=session_id,
1410	                        )
1411	                        await ws.send_json({"type": "error", "payload": rate_err})
1412	                        continue
1413	
1414	                    auto_approve = _effective_auto_approve(
1415	                        session, payload.get("auto_approve", False)
1416	                    )
1417	                    interaction.current_ws.set(ws)  # 供工具函数通过 WebSocket 推送交互
1418	                    interaction.current_session_id.set(session_id)
1419	                    interaction.set_session_auto_approve(session_id, auto_approve)
1420	
1421	                    agent_task = asyncio.create_task(
1422	                        _run_agent_turn(
1423	                            ws,
1424	                            session,
1425	                            user_message,
1426	                            private_mode=payload.get("private", False),
1427	                            auto_approve=auto_approve,
1428	                            provider_id=payload.get("provider_id"),
1429	                            model_name=payload.get("model_name"),
1430	                            think_path_id=payload.get("think_path_id"),
1431	                            turn_id=payload.get("turn_id"),
1432	                        )
1433	                    )
1434	                    session._active_task = agent_task  # 供外部 REST 接口查询活跃状态
1435	
1436	                case "user_response":
1437	                    payload = msg.get("payload", {})
1438	                    interaction_id = payload.get("interaction_id", "")
1439	                    response = payload.get("response", "")
1440	                    if interaction_id:
1441	                        await interaction.resolve(interaction_id, response)
1442	
1443	                case "artifact_action":
1444	                    # Artifact actions are never tool calls.  They can only
1445	                    # resolve an already-pending interaction after the signed,
1446	                    # session-bound token has been validated.
1447	
1448	                    if not get_settings().interactive_artifacts_enabled:
1449	                        continue
1450	                    try:
1451	                        from api.artifacts.schema import (
1452	                            ArtifactActionResponse,
1453	                            artifact_action_authorizer,
1454	                        )
1455	
1456	                        response = ArtifactActionResponse.model_validate(
1457	                            msg.get("payload", {})
1458	                        )
1459	                        authorized = artifact_action_authorizer.authorize(
1460	                            response, session_id=session_id
1461	                        )
1462	                    except (TypeError, ValueError):
1463	                        continue
1464	                    if authorized is None:
1465	                        continue
1466	                    if await interaction.resolve(
1467	                        authorized.interaction_id, authorized.action_id
1468	                    ):
1469	                        artifact_action_authorizer.consume(authorized)
1470	
1471	                case "plan_response":
1472	                    payload = msg.get("payload", {})
1473	                    plan_id = payload.get("plan_id", "")
1474	                    action = payload.get("action", "")
1475	                    modified_plan = payload.get("modified_plan", "")
1476	                    if plan_id:
1477	                        if action == "approve":
1478	                            await interaction.resolve(plan_id, "approve")
1479	                        elif action == "reject":
1480	                            await interaction.resolve(plan_id, "reject")
1481	                        elif action == "modify" and modified_plan:
1482	                            await interaction.resolve(plan_id, modified_plan)
1483	                        else:
1484	                            await interaction.resolve(plan_id, "reject")
1485	
1486	                case "cancel":
1487	                    if agent_task and not agent_task.done():
1488	                        agent_task.cancel()
1489	                        agent_task = None
1490	
1491	                case "update_auto_approve":
1492	                    payload = msg.get("payload")
1493	                    if not isinstance(payload, dict):
1494	                        continue
1495	                    auto_approve_val = _effective_auto_approve(
1496	                        session, payload.get("auto_approve", False)
1497	                    )
1498	                    interaction.set_session_auto_approve(session_id, auto_approve_val)
1499	                    session.auto_approve = auto_approve_val
1500	
1501	    except WebSocketDisconnect:
1502	        pass  # 客户端断开是正常行为
1503	    finally:
1504	        app_state.ws_registry.unregister(session_id)
1505	        if agent_task and not agent_task.done():
1506	            agent_task.cancel()
1507	        if session._active_task is agent_task:
1508	            session._active_task = None
1509	        interaction.clear_session_settings(session_id)
1510
```

```json
1	/**
2	 * session-bridge.ts — JSON-RPC server wrapping createAgentSession.
3	 *
4	 * RPC Methods:
5	 *   create_session({ model, system_prompt?, cwd? }) → { session_id }
6	 *   prompt({ session_id, message })               → { ok: true }
7	 *   cancel({ session_id })                         → { ok: true }
8	 *   destroy_session({ session_id })                → { ok: true }
9	 *   undo({ session_id, steps? })                   → { removed }
10	 *   get_messages({ session_id, limit? })           → { messages, total }
11	 *
12	 * Events are forwarded as JSON-RPC notifications (method: "event").
13	 */
14	
15	import { createInterface } from "node:readline";
16	import { randomUUID } from "node:crypto";
17	import { createAgentSession } from "@oh-my-pi/pi-coding-agent";
18	import { getBundledModel } from "@oh-my-pi/pi-catalog/models";
19	import type { Model } from "@oh-my-pi/pi-ai";
20	import type { AgentSession } from "@oh-my-pi/pi-coding-agent";
21	import { registerCustomTools } from "./tools/index";
22	
23	// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
24	// Types
25	// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
26	
27	interface SessionRecord {
28	  session: AgentSession;
29	  unsubscribe: () => void;
30	  promptQueue: Promise<void>;  // serializes concurrent prompt calls
31	}
32	
33	// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
34	// State
35	// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
36	
37	const sessions = new Map<string, SessionRecord>();
38	const rl = createInterface({ input: process.stdin });
39	
40	// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
41	// JSON-RPC helpers
42	// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
43	
44	function send(id: number | null, result: unknown) {
45	  process.stdout.write(JSON.stringify({ jsonrpc: "2.0", id, result }) + "\n");
46	}
47	
48	function sendError(id: number | null, message: string) {
49	  process.stdout.write(
50	    JSON.stringify({ jsonrpc: "2.0", id, error: { message } }) + "\n",
51	  );
52	}
53	
54	function sendEvent(sessionId: string, event: Record<string, unknown>) {
55	  process.stdout.write(
56	    JSON.stringify({
57	      jsonrpc: "2.0",
58	      method: "event",
59	      params: { session_id: sessionId, event },
60	    }) + "\n",
61	  );
62	}
63	
64	// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
65	// Model resolution
66	// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
67	
68	/**
69	 * Parse a model string like "openai/gpt-4o" into a proper Model object.
70	 *
71	 * Strategy:
72	 *   A — Try `getBundledModel(provider, modelId)` from the bundled catalog.
73	 *   B — Fall back to constructing a minimal Model object manually.
74	 */
75	function parseModel(modelStr: string): Model {
76	  const slashIdx = modelStr.indexOf("/");
77	  const provider = slashIdx >= 0 ? modelStr.slice(0, slashIdx) : "";
78	  const modelId = slashIdx >= 0 ? modelStr.slice(slashIdx + 1) : modelStr;
79	
80	  // Option A: bundled catalog lookup
81	  if (provider) {
82	    try {
83	      const bundled = getBundledModel(provider as any, modelId);
84	      if (bundled) return bundled;
85	    } catch {
86	      // Fall through to manual construction
87	    }
88	  }
89	
90	  // Option B: manual fallback (minimal Model object from env vars)
91	  const baseUrl =
92	    process.env.OPENAI_BASE_URL ?? "https://api.openai.com/v1";
93	  return {
94	    id: modelId,
95	    name: modelId,
96	    api: "openai-completions" as const,
97	    provider,
98	    baseUrl,
99	    reasoning: false,
100	    input: ["text"] as ("text" | "image")[],
101	    cost: { input: 0, output: 0, cacheRead: 0, cacheWrite: 0 },
102	    contextWindow: 128000,
103	    maxTokens: 4096,
104	    compat: {
105	      supportsDeveloperRole: true,
106	      supportsStrictMode: false,
107	      supportsReasoningEffort: false,
108	      reasoningEffortMap: {},
109	      supportsReasoningParams: false,
110	      thinkingFormat: "disabled" as const,
111	      reasoningDisableMode: "off" as const,
112	      omitReasoningEffort: false,
113	      includeEncryptedReasoning: false,
114	      filterReasoningHistory: false,
115	      disableReasoningOnForcedToolChoice: false,
116	      disableReasoningOnToolChoice: false,
117	      supportsToolChoice: true,
118	      supportsForcedToolChoice: true,
119	      supportsNamedToolChoice: true,
120	      reasoningContentField: undefined,
121	      requiresReasoningContentForToolCalls: false,
122	      requiresReasoningContentForAllAssistantTurns: false,
123	      allowsSyntheticReasoningContentForToolCalls: false,
124	      replayReasoningContent: false,
125	      qwenPreserveThinking: false,
126	      requiresThinkingAsText: false,
127	      requiresMistralToolIds: false,
128	      requiresToolResultName: false,
129	      requiresAssistantAfterToolResult: false,
130	      requiresAssistantContentForToolCalls: false,
131	      stripDeepseekSpecialTokens: false,
132	      streamMarkupHealingPattern: undefined,
133	      reasoningDeltasMayBeCumulative: false,
134	      emptyLengthFinishIsContextError: false,
135	      usesOpenAIToolCallIdLimit: false,
136	      promptCacheSessionHeader: undefined,
137	      isOpenRouterHost: false,
138	      alwaysSendMaxTokens: true,
139	      enableGeminiThinkingLoopGuard: undefined,
140	      openRouterRouting: undefined,
141	      wireModelIdMode: "raw" as const,
142	      supportsStore: false,
143	      supportsMultipleSystemMessages: true,
144	      maxTokensField: "max_tokens" as const,
145	      supportsUsageInStreaming: true,
146	      cacheControlFormat: undefined,
147	      supportsLongPromptCacheRetention: false,
148	      supportsImageDetailOriginal: false,
149	      strictResponsesPairing: false,
150	      toolStrictMode: "none" as const,
151	      streamIdleTimeoutMs: undefined,
152	      vercelGatewayRouting: undefined,
153	      extraBody: undefined,
154	    },
155	  } as Model;
156	}
157	
158	// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
159	// Pi event → Maxma event mapping
160	// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
161	
162	function mapPiEventToMaxma(
163	  piEvent: Record<string, unknown>,
164	): Record<string, unknown> | null {
165	  // Handle AgentEvent types directly
166	  const type = piEvent.type as string;
167	
168	  if (type === "message_update") {
169	    const assistantEvent = (piEvent as any).assistantMessageEvent;
170	    if (!assistantEvent) return null;
171	
172	    const aeType = assistantEvent.type as string;
173	
174	    if (aeType === "text_delta") {
175	      return {
176	        type: "token",
177	        payload: { token: assistantEvent.delta ?? "" },
178	      };
179	    }
180	
181	    // NOTE: toolcall_start/toolcall_end from message_update are pre-execution
182	    // events (LLM deciding to call a tool). The actual execution data comes
183	    // from tool_execution_start/tool_execution_end below, which carry full
184	    // toolName and result data. Skip early message_update tool events to avoid
185	    // duplicate/empty-named events.
186	
187	    if (aeType === "error") {
188	      const errMsg =
189	        (assistantEvent as any).error?.content?.[0]?.text ??
190	        "Unknown agent error";
191	      return {
192	        type: "error",
193	        payload: { code: "AGENT_ERROR", message: errMsg },
194	      };
195	    }
196	
197	    return null;
198	  }
199	
200	  if (type === "tool_execution_start") {
201	    const e = piEvent as any;
202	    return {
203	      type: "tool_start",
204	      payload: {
205	        tool_name: e.toolName ?? "",
206	        input: JSON.stringify(e.args ?? {}),
207	      },
208	    };
209	  }
210	
211	  if (type === "tool_execution_end") {
212	    const e = piEvent as any;
213	    const isError = e.isError === true;
214	    if (isError) {
215	      return {
216	        type: "tool_error",
217	        payload: {
218	          tool_name: e.toolName ?? "",
219	          error: JSON.stringify(e.result ?? {}),
220	          elapsed: 0,
221	        },
222	      };
223	    }
224	    return {
225	      type: "tool_end",
226	      payload: {
227	        tool_name: e.toolName ?? "",
228	        output: JSON.stringify(e.result ?? {}),
229	        elapsed: 0,
230	      },
231	    };
232	  }
233	
234	  if (type === "message_end") {
235	    const msg = (piEvent as any).message;
236	    let content = "";
237	    if (msg?.content) {
238	      if (typeof msg.content === "string") {
239	        content = msg.content;
240	      } else if (Array.isArray(msg.content)) {
241	        content = msg.content
242	          .map((b: any) => (b?.type === "text" ? b.text : ""))
243	          .join("");
244	      }
245	    }
246	    return {
247	      type: "answer",
248	      payload: { content },
249	    };
250	  }
251	
252	  if (type === "agent_end") {
253	    return { type: "done", payload: {} };
254	  }
255	
256	  return null;
257	}
258	
259	// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
260	// Main event subscriber
261	// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
262	
263	function subscribeSession(
264	  sessionId: string,
265	  session: AgentSession,
266	): () => void {
267	  return session.subscribe((event: any) => {
268	    const mapped = mapPiEventToMaxma(event as Record<string, unknown>);
269	    if (mapped) {
270	      sendEvent(sessionId, mapped);
271	    }
272	  });
273	}
274	
275	// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
276	// RPC handler
277	// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
278	
279	rl.on("line", async (line: string) => {
280	  let req: any;
281	  try {
282	    req = JSON.parse(line);
283	  } catch {
284	    sendError(null, "Parse error");
285	    return;
286	  }
287	
288	  const { method, params, id } = req;
289	
290	  try {
291	    if (method === "create_session") {
292	      const modelStr: string = params?.model ?? "openai/gpt-4o";
293	      const model = parseModel(modelStr);
294	      const cwd: string = params?.cwd ?? process.cwd();
295	      const systemPrompt: string | undefined = params?.system_prompt;
296	      const tools: string[] | undefined = params?.tools as string[] | undefined;
297	      
298	      const createOptions: Record<string, unknown> = {
299	        model,
300	        cwd,
301	      };
302	      if (systemPrompt !== undefined) {
303	        createOptions.systemPrompt = systemPrompt;
304	      }
305	      if (tools !== undefined && Array.isArray(tools) && tools.length > 0) {
306	        createOptions.toolNames = tools;
307	      }
308	
309	      // Register custom Maxma tools
310	      const customTools = registerCustomTools();
311	      if (customTools.length > 0) {
312	        createOptions.customTools = customTools;
313	      }
314	
315	      const { session } = await createAgentSession(createOptions as any);
316	      const sessionId = randomUUID();
317	
318	      const unsubscribe = subscribeSession(sessionId, session);
319	      sessions.set(sessionId, { session, unsubscribe, promptQueue: Promise.resolve() });
320	
321	      send(id, { session_id: sessionId });
322	      return;
323	    }
324	
325	    if (method === "prompt") {
326	      const sessionId: string = params?.session_id;
327	      const message: string = params?.message ?? "";
328	      const record = sessions.get(sessionId);
329	      if (!record) {
330	        sendError(id, `Session not found: ${sessionId}`);
331	        return;
332	      }
333	
334	      // Serialize: chain onto the previous prompt so they run sequentially.
335	      // A failed prompt does not block the next one (.catch resets the chain).
336	      record.promptQueue = record.promptQueue
337	        .catch(() => {})
338	        .then(() => record.session.prompt(message).catch((err: unknown) => {
339	          sendEvent(sessionId, {
340	            type: "error",
341	            payload: { code: "PROMPT_ERROR", message: String(err) },
342	          });
343	        }));
344	
345	      send(id, { ok: true });
346	      return;
347	    }
348	
349	    if (method === "cancel") {
350	      const sessionId: string = params?.session_id;
351	      const record = sessions.get(sessionId);
352	      if (!record) {
353	        sendError(id, `Session not found: ${sessionId}`);
354	        return;
355	      }
356	
357	      record.session.agent.abort("Cancelled by user");
358	
359	      send(id, { ok: true });
360	      return;
361	    }
362	
363	    if (method === "destroy_session") {
364	      const sessionId: string = params?.session_id;
365	      const record = sessions.get(sessionId);
366	      if (!record) {
367	        sendError(id, `Session not found: ${sessionId}`);
368	        return;
369	      }
370	
371	      record.unsubscribe();
372	      await record.session.dispose();
373	      sessions.delete(sessionId);
374	
375	      send(id, { ok: true });
376	      return;
377	    }
378	
379	    if (method === "undo") {
380	      const sessionId: string = params?.session_id as string;
381	      const steps: number = (params?.steps as number) ?? 1;
382	      const record = sessions.get(sessionId);
383	      if (!record) {
384	        sendError(id, `Session not found: ${sessionId}`);
385	        return;
386	      }
387	
388	      // Truncate the last N assistant+user message pairs (copy-first to avoid mutating internal state)
389	      const originalLen = record.session.state.messages.length;
390	      const keepCount = Math.max(0, originalLen - steps * 2);
391	      const remaining = record.session.state.messages.slice(0, keepCount);
392	      const removed = originalLen - keepCount;
393	      record.session.replace_messages(remaining);
394	      send(id, { removed });
395	      return;
396	    }
397	
398	    if (method === "get_messages") {
399	      const sessionId: string = params?.session_id as string;
400	      const limit: number = (params?.limit as number) ?? 50;
401	      const record = sessions.get(sessionId);
402	      if (!record) {
403	        sendError(id, `Session not found: ${sessionId}`);
404	        return;
405	      }
406	
407	      const messages = record.session.state.messages;
408	      const total = messages.length;
409	      const sliced = messages.slice(-limit);
410	      const result = sliced.map((m: any) => {
411	        let content = "";
412	        if (typeof m.content === "string") {
413	          content = m.content;
414	        } else if (Array.isArray(m.content)) {
415	          content = m.content
416	            .filter((b: any) => b?.type === "text")
417	            .map((b: any) => b.text ?? "")
418	            .join("");
419	        }
420	        return { role: m.role ?? "unknown", content };
421	      });
422	      send(id, { messages: result, total });
423	      return;
424	    }
425	
426	    sendError(id, `Unknown method: ${method}`);
427	  } catch (err) {
428	    sendError(id, String(err));
429	  }
430	});
431	
432	// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
433	// Graceful shutdown
434	// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
435	
436	async function shutdown() {
437	  for (const [sid, record] of sessions) {
438	    try {
439	      record.unsubscribe();
440	      await record.session.dispose();
441	    } catch {
442	      // best-effort cleanup
443	    }
444	  }
445	  sessions.clear();
446	  rl.close();
447	  process.exit(0);
448	}
449	
450	process.on("SIGTERM", shutdown);
451	process.on("SIGINT", shutdown);
452	
```
