172	
173	async def _process_image_refs(user_message: str) -> str:
174	    """从用户消息中提取图片引用，自动描述图片内容并追加到消息末尾。
175	
176	    流程：
177	    1. 解析 __refs__ 块中的 image 类型引用
178	    2. 对每个有 path 的图片调用 GLM-5V-Turbo 生成描述
179	    3. 将描述追加到用户消息文本末尾（在 __refs__ 之前）
180	
181	    Returns:
182	        增强后的用户消息文本
183	    """
184	    import re
185	
186	    # 提取 refs 块
187	    refs_start = user_message.rfind("__refs__")
188	    if refs_start == -1:
189	        return user_message
190	
191	    refs_end = user_message.find("__/refs__", refs_start)
192	    if refs_end == -1:
193	        return user_message
194	
195	    refs_json = user_message[refs_start + len("__refs__") : refs_end]
196	    try:
197	        refs_list = json.loads(refs_json)
198	    except (json.JSONDecodeError, ValueError):
199	        return user_message
200	
201	    # 提取图片引用
202	    image_paths = []
203	    for ref_item in refs_list:
204	        if isinstance(ref_item, dict) and ref_item.get("type") == "image":
205	            path = ref_item.get("path", "")
206	            if path:
207	                image_paths.append((path, ref_item.get("label", "image")))
208	
209	    if not image_paths:
210	        return user_message
211	
212	    # 对每张图片生成描述
213	    descriptions = []
214	    for path, label in image_paths:
215	        try:
216	            desc = await _describe_image(path)
217	            if desc:
218	                descriptions.append(f"[图片 {label}: {desc}]")
219	        except Exception as e:
220	            logger.warning(f"Failed to describe image {path}: {e}")
221	            descriptions.append(f"[图片 {label}: 描述失败 - {str(e)[:80]}]")
222	
223	    if not descriptions:
224	        return user_message
225	
226	    # 将描述插入到 __refs__ 之前
227	    before_refs = user_message[:refs_start].rstrip()
228	    after_refs = user_message[refs_start:]
229	    desc_text = "\n\n" + "\n".join(descriptions)
230	    return before_refs + desc_text + "\n\n" + after_refs
231	
232	
233	def _resolve_local_image_ref(image_ref: str) -> Path:
234	    """将前端图片 ref 解析为已通过路径安全检查的本地路径。"""
235	    path_text = image_ref.strip()
236	    if path_text.startswith(_LOCAL_REF_PREFIX):
237	        path_text = path_text[len(_LOCAL_REF_PREFIX) :].strip()
238	    if not path_text:
239	        raise ValueError("图片路径为空")
240	
241	    file_path = Path(path_text).expanduser().resolve(strict=False)
242	    blocked = check_path_access(str(file_path))
243	    if blocked:
244	        raise PermissionError(blocked)
245	    return file_path
246	
247	
248	async def _describe_image(image_path: str) -> str:
249	    """调用 GLM-5V-Turbo 描述单张图片。"""
250	    import base64
251	    import mimetypes
252	
253	    file_path = _resolve_local_image_ref(image_path)
254	    if not file_path.exists():
255	        raise FileNotFoundError(f"图片文件不存在: {image_path}")
256	
257	    # 读取并编码图片
258	    image_bytes = file_path.read_bytes()
259	    mime = mimetypes.guess_type(str(file_path))[0] or "image/png"
260	    image_b64 = base64.b64encode(image_bytes).decode("utf-8")
261	    data_url = f"data:{mime};base64,{image_b64}"
262	
263	    # 调用 GLM-5V-Turbo
264	    from zai import ZhipuAiClient
265	
266	    settings = get_settings()
267	    if not settings.zhipuai_api_key:
268	        return "(图片描述不可用: 未配置智谱 API Key)"
269	
270	    client = ZhipuAiClient(api_key=settings.zhipuai_api_key)
271	
272	    response = await asyncio.to_thread(
273	        client.chat.completions.create,
274	        model="glm-5v-turbo",
275	        messages=[
276	            {
277	                "role": "user",
278	                "content": [
279	                    {"type": "image_url", "image_url": {"url": data_url}},
280	                    {
281	                        "type": "text",
282	                        "text": "请简洁描述这张图片的主要内容，包括关键元素、场景和文字（如果有）。控制在 100 字以内。",
283	                    },
284	                ],
285	            }
286	        ],
287	        thinking={"type": "enabled"},
288	        stream=False,
289	    )
290	
291	    return response.choices[0].message.content or "(无法描述)"
292	
293	
294	async def _get_messages_from_sidecar(
295	    session: "SessionState",
296	    limit: int = 50,
297	    *,
298	    sidecar_mgr=None,
299	) -> list[dict]:
300	    """从 sidecar 获取消息历史。sidecar 不可用时返回空列表。
301	
302	    通过 SessionMap（SQLite 持久化）查找 sidecar session ID，
303	    然后调用 get_messages RPC 获取消息列表。
304	
305	    Args:
306	        session: 会话状态
307	        limit: 最大消息数
308	        sidecar_mgr: SidecarManager 实例（必须由调用方传入）
309	    """
310	    if sidecar_mgr is None:
311	        sidecar_mgr = getattr(session, "_sidecar_mgr", None)
312	    if sidecar_mgr is None:
313	        return []
314	    await sidecar_mgr.start()
315	    client = sidecar_mgr.client
316	    if client is None:
317	        return []
318	    # 从 SessionMap 获取 sidecar session ID（持久化，重启后仍可用）
319	    from api.pi_bridge.session_adapter import SessionMap
320	    with SessionMap() as sm:
321	        sidecar_sid = sm.get_sidecar_id(session.session_id)
322	    if not sidecar_sid:
323	        sidecar_sid = getattr(session, "_sidecar_session_id", None)
324	    if not sidecar_sid:
325	        return []
326	    try:
327	        result = await client.call("get_messages", {
328	            "session_id": sidecar_sid,
329	            "limit": limit,
330	        })
331	        return result.get("messages", [])
332	    except Exception:
333	        logger.debug("[sidecar] get_messages failed", exc_info=True)
334	        return []
335	
336	
337	async def _get_recent_ai_messages(session, config, limit: int = 5) -> list[str]:
338	    """从 sidecar 获取最近 N 条 AI 消息内容（用于贴纸情感分析）。
339	
340	    sidecar 模式下 config 为 None，改为从 sidecar RPC 获取消息历史。
341	    """
342	    messages = await _get_messages_from_sidecar(session, limit=limit * 3)
343	    ai_msgs = [m.get("content", "") for m in messages if m.get("role") == "assistant"]
344	    return ai_msgs[-limit:]
345	
346	
347	async def _stream_turn_sidecar(
348	    ws: WebSocket,
349	    session: SessionState,
350	    user_message_for_llm: str,
351	    system_prompt: str,
352	    current_provider_id: str,
353	    current_model_name: str | None,
354	) -> str:
355	    """Execute a turn using oh-my-pi sidecar (Bun subprocess).
356	
357	    Returns final_answer string for post-processing (stickers, memory, etc.).
358	    Intermediate events (token, tool_start, tool_end, tool_error) are streamed
359	    to the frontend via WS in real-time.
360	
361	    The answer and done events are NOT sent here — the existing post-processing
362	    pipeline in _run_agent_turn handles those (including sticker processing).
363	    """
364	    app_state = ws.app.state
365	
366	    # 1. Ensure sidecar is running
367	    mgr = app_state.sidecar_manager
368	    await mgr.start()
369	    client = mgr.client
370	    assert client is not None, "Sidecar client not available"
371	    # 注入 sidecar manager 到 session，供下游函数（消息历史、context usage、
372	    # const 保存、情景记忆等）通过 session._sidecar_mgr 访问
373	    session._sidecar_mgr = mgr
374	
375	    # 2. Look up sidecar session (persistent SessionMap, fallback to in-memory)
376	    from api.pi_bridge.session_adapter import SessionMap
377	    with SessionMap() as sm:
378	        sidecar_sid = sm.get_sidecar_id(session.session_id)
379	    if not sidecar_sid:
380	        sidecar_sid = getattr(session, "_sidecar_session_id", None)
381	
382	    # 验证 sidecar session 是否仍然有效（服务器重启后旧 ID 过期）
383	    sidecar_valid = False
384	    if sidecar_sid:
385	        try:
386	            await client.call("get_messages", {
387	                "session_id": sidecar_sid, "limit": 0,
388	            })
389	            sidecar_valid = True
390	        except Exception:
391	            logger.info(
392	                "[sidecar] Stale session %s — clearing mapping",
393	                sidecar_sid[:8],
394	            )
395	            sidecar_sid = None
396	            with SessionMap() as sm:
397	                sm.remove(session.session_id)
398	
399	    if not sidecar_sid:
400	        if current_provider_id:
401	            model_str = f"{current_provider_id}/{current_model_name or 'gpt-4o'}"
402	        else:
403	            model_str = current_model_name or "gpt-4o"
404	
405	        # 首次创建 sidecar session，system_prompt 含人设/规则/技能
406	        # 从 SessionMap 恢复最近对话上下文（用于重启后重建）
407	        _sidecar_system_prompt = system_prompt
408	        try:
409	            with SessionMap() as sm:
410	                _past_turns = sm.get_recent_turns(session.session_id, count=5)
411	            if _past_turns:
412	                _history_lines = []
413	                for t in _past_turns:
414	                    _history_lines.append(f"用户: {t.get('user', '')}")
415	                    _history_lines.append(f"助理: {t.get('assistant', '')}")
416	                _history_text = "\n".join(_history_lines)
417	                _sidecar_system_prompt = (
418	                    f"{system_prompt}\n\n"
419	                    f"[历史对话上下文（共 {len(_past_turns)} 轮）]\n"
420	                    f"{_history_text}\n"
421	                )
422	                logger.info(
423	                    "[sidecar] Restored %d past turns for session %s",
424	                    len(_past_turns), session.session_id[:8],
425	                )
426	        except Exception:
427	            logger.debug("[sidecar] Failed to restore past turns", exc_info=True)
428	
429	        result = await client.call("create_session", {
430	            "model": model_str,
431	            "system_prompt": _sidecar_system_prompt,
432	            "cwd": ".",
433	        })
434	        sidecar_sid = result["session_id"]
435	        session._sidecar_session_id = sidecar_sid
436	        with SessionMap() as sm:
437	            sm.set_mapping(session.session_id, sidecar_sid)
438	        logger.info(
439	            "[sidecar] Created session %s for Maxma session %s",
440	            sidecar_sid[:8], session.session_id[:8],
441	        )
442	
443	    # 3. 情景记忆：每轮对话以用户消息为查询检索相关历史，注入到 user_message
444	    _user_message_for_llm = user_message_for_llm
445	    try:
446	        _episodic_mm = getattr(app_state, "episodic_mm", None)
447	        if _episodic_mm is not None and user_message_for_llm:
448	            from agent.context_manager import retrieve_from_episodic
449	            _episodic_context = retrieve_from_episodic(
450	                user_message_for_llm,
451	                _episodic_mm,
452	                top_k=3,
453	                session_id=session.session_id,
454	            )
455	            if _episodic_context:
456	                _user_message_for_llm = (
457	                    f"[相关情景记忆]\n{_episodic_context}\n\n"
458	                    f"---\n\n{user_message_for_llm}"
459	                )
460	    except Exception:
461	        logger.warning("[sidecar] Episodic retrieval failed", exc_info=True)
462	
463	    # 3. Register event handlers to forward intermediate events to WS
464	    final_answer = ""
465	    turn_done = asyncio.Event()
466	
467	    async def _on_token(sid: str, event: dict):
468	        if sid != sidecar_sid:
469	            return
470	        try:
471	            await ws.send_json({
472	                "type": "token",
473	                "payload": {"token": event.get("payload", {}).get("token", "")},
474	            })
475	        except Exception:
476	            pass
477	
478	    async def _on_tool_start(sid: str, event: dict):
479	        if sid != sidecar_sid:
480	            return
481	        try:
482	            payload = event.get("payload", {})
483	            await ws.send_json({
484	                "type": "tool_start",
485	                "payload": {
486	                    "tool_name": payload.get("tool_name", ""),
487	                    "input": payload.get("input", ""),
488	                },
489	            })
490	        except Exception:
491	            pass
492	
493	    async def _on_tool_end(sid: str, event: dict):
494	        if sid != sidecar_sid:
495	            return
496	        try:
497	            payload = event.get("payload", {})
498	            await ws.send_json({
499	                "type": "tool_end",
500	                "payload": {
501	                    "tool_name": payload.get("tool_name", ""),
502	                    "output": payload.get("output", ""),
503	                    "elapsed": payload.get("elapsed", 0),
504	                },
505	            })
506	        except Exception:
507	            pass
508	
509	    async def _on_tool_error(sid: str, event: dict):
510	        if sid != sidecar_sid:
511	            return
512	        try:
513	            payload = event.get("payload", {})
514	            await ws.send_json({
515	                "type": "tool_error",
516	                "payload": {
517	                    "tool_name": payload.get("tool_name", ""),
518	                    "error": payload.get("error", ""),
519	                },
520	            })
521	        except Exception:
522	            pass
523	
524	    async def _on_answer(sid: str, event: dict):
525	        nonlocal final_answer
526	        if sid != sidecar_sid:
527	            return
528	        # Extract the answer but do NOT send to WS — the existing post-processing
529	        # in _run_agent_turn handles sticker processing + answer push.
530	        final_answer = event.get("payload", {}).get("content", "")
531	
532	    async def _on_done(sid: str, event: dict):
533	        if sid != sidecar_sid:
534	            return
535	        turn_done.set()
536	
537	    async def _on_error(sid: str, event: dict):
538	        """BUG5 fix: forward sidecar error events to the frontend."""
539	        if sid != sidecar_sid:
540	            return
541	        payload = event.get("payload", {})
542	        logger.warning(
543	            "[sidecar] Error event for session %s: %s",
544	            sidecar_sid[:8], payload.get("message", payload),
545	        )
546	        await ws.send_json({
547	            "type": "error",
548	            "payload": {
549	                "code": payload.get("code", "SIDECAR_ERROR"),
550	                "message": payload.get("message", "Sidecar error"),
551	            },
552	        })
553	
554	    # Register all event handlers
555	    unsubs = []
556	    for evt_type, handler in [
557	        ("token", _on_token),
558	        ("tool_start", _on_tool_start),
559	        ("tool_end", _on_tool_end),
560	        ("tool_error", _on_tool_error),
561	        ("answer", _on_answer),
562	        ("done", _on_done),
563	        ("error", _on_error),
564	    ]:
565	        unsub = client.on(evt_type, handler)
566	        unsubs.append(unsub)
567	
568	    # 4. Execute prompt via sidecar
569	    try:
570	        await client.call("prompt", {
571	            "session_id": sidecar_sid,
572	            "message": _user_message_for_llm,
573	        })
574	        # Wait for done event (sidecar signals completion)
575	        await asyncio.wait_for(turn_done.wait(), timeout=600)
576	    except asyncio.TimeoutError:
577	        logger.warning("[sidecar] Turn timed out for session %s", sidecar_sid)
578	        if not final_answer:
579	            final_answer = "（Sidecar 处理超时，请重试）"
580	    except Exception as e:
581	        logger.exception("[sidecar] Turn failed for session %s", sidecar_sid)
582	        if not final_answer:
583	            final_answer = f"（Sidecar 处理出错：{e}）"
584	    finally:
585	        for unsub in unsubs:
586	            try:
587	                unsub()
588	            except Exception:
589	                pass
590	
591	    return final_answer
592	
593	
594	async def _calculate_context_usage(
595	    session,
596	    system_prompt,
597	    *,
598	    max_tokens: int = 256_000,
599	    model_name: str = "",
600	) -> dict:
601	    """估算上下文用量。sidecar 模式下从消息历史估算。
602	
603	    从 sidecar 获取消息列表，用字符数粗略估算 token 用量。
604	    返回字典包括估算用量、最大用量、占比、消息数。
605	    """
606	    messages = await _get_messages_from_sidecar(session, limit=200)
607	    total_chars = sum(len(m.get("content", "")) for m in messages)
608	    total_chars += len(system_prompt or "")
609	    # 粗略估算：混合中英文约 2 字符/token
610	    estimated_tokens = int(total_chars / 2)
611	    return {
612	        "estimated_tokens": estimated_tokens,
613	        "max_tokens": max_tokens,
614	        "percentage": min(100, int(estimated_tokens / max(max_tokens, 1) * 100)),
615	        "message_count": len(messages),
616	        "model_name": model_name,
617	    }
618	
619	
620	async def _inject_cancel_tool_messages(session, config, ws: WebSocket) -> None:
621	    """为 checkpoint 中孤立的 tool_calls 注入统一格式的正常 ToolMessage。
622	
623	    sidecar 模式下 session._graph 为 None，取消由 sidecar 的 cancel RPC 处理，
624	    无需手动清理 checkpoint。直接返回。
625	    """
626	    graph = session._graph
627	    if graph is None:
628	        return  # sidecar 模式：cancel 由 sidecar 处理，无需 checkpoint 清理
629	
630	    try:
631	        state = await graph.aget_state(config)
632	    except Exception:
633	        logger.debug("Failed to get graph state for cancel cleanup", exc_info=True)
634	        return  # checkpoint 不可读时静默跳过
635	
636	    messages = state.values.get("messages", [])
637	    if not messages:
638	        return
639	
640	    # 从后往前找最后一个 AIMessage
641	    last_ai = None
642	    for i in range(len(messages) - 1, -1, -1):
643	        if isinstance(messages[i], AIMessage):
644	            last_ai = messages[i]
645	            break
646	
647	    if last_ai is None:
648	        return
649	
650	    tool_calls = getattr(last_ai, "tool_calls", [])
651	    if not tool_calls:
652	        return
653	
654	    # 收集其后所有 ToolMessage 的 tool_call_id 集合
655	    try:
656	        idx = messages.index(last_ai)
657	    except ValueError:
658	        return
659	    following = messages[idx + 1 :]
660	
661	    tool_msg_ids = {m.tool_call_id for m in following if isinstance(m, ToolMessage)}
662	
663	    orphaned = [tc for tc in tool_calls if tc["id"] not in tool_msg_ids]
664	    if not orphaned:
665	        return  # checkpoint 已一致
666	
667	    # 通知前端：使运行的工具体进入错误状态
668	    for tc in orphaned:
669	        try:
670	            await ws.send_json(
671	                {
672	                    "type": "tool_error",
673	                    "payload": {
674	                        "tool_name": tc["name"],
675	                        "error": "用户取消了该工具调用",
676	                    },
677	                }
678	            )
679	        except Exception:
680	            logger.debug(
681	                "Failed to send tool_error via WebSocket (connection may be closed)",
682	                exc_info=True,
683	            )
684	
685	    # 生成取消 ToolMessage 并写入 checkpoint
686	    cancel_msgs = []
687	    for tc in orphaned:
688	        cancel_msgs.append(
689	            ToolMessage(
690	                content=format_error("用户取消了该工具调用"),
691	                name=tc["name"],
692	                tool_call_id=tc["id"],
693	            )
694	        )
695	    try:
696	        await graph.aupdate_state(config, {"messages": cancel_msgs}, as_node="tools")
697	    except Exception as e:
698	        print(
699	            f"[cancel] aupdate_state failed: {type(e).__name__}: {e}", file=sys.stderr
700	        )
701	        raise
702	
703	
704	# ── 项目上下文自动感知 ──────────────────────────────────────────
705	
706	import re as _re
707	
708	# 匹配 Windows / Unix 绝对路径
709	_PATH_PATTERN = _re.compile(r"(?:[A-Za-z]:[\\/]|[\\/])(?:[\w .\-]+[\\/])*[\w .\-]+")
710	
711	
712	def _detect_project_path(message: str) -> str | None:
713	    """从用户消息中提取可能的项目根目录路径。"""
714	    matches = _PATH_PATTERN.findall(message)
715	    for m in matches:
716	        p = m.rstrip("\\/").rstrip()
717	        # 检查是否是目录
718	        from pathlib import Path as _Path
719	
720	        if _Path(p).is_dir():
721	            # 检查是否像项目根目录（含 .git 或 package.json 或 pyproject.toml 等）
722	            markers = [
723	                ".git",
724	                "package.json",
725	                "pyproject.toml",
726	                "Cargo.toml",
727	                "go.mod",
728	                "requirements.txt",
729	                "setup.py",
730	            ]
731	            if any((_Path(p) / marker).exists() for marker in markers):
732	                return p
733	    return None
734	
735	
736	def _get_project_context(session: SessionState, user_message: str) -> str | None:
737	    """获取项目上下文：优先用缓存，否则尝试从消息检测并扫描。"""
738	    # 已有缓存
739	    if session._project_context is not None:
740	        return session._project_context
741	
742	    # 尝试从消息检测项目路径
743	    project_path = _detect_project_path(user_message)
744	    if project_path is None:
745	        return None
746	
747	    # 扫描项目
748	    try:
749	        from agent.project_scanner import scan_project
750	
751	        ctx = scan_project(project_path)
752	        text = ctx.to_prompt_text()
753	        # 缓存到 session
754	        session._project_context = text
755	        session._project_path = project_path
756	        return text
757	    except Exception as e:
758	        import logging
759	
760	        logging.getLogger(__name__).warning("[project_scanner] 扫描失败: %s", e)
761	        return None
762	
763	
764	async def _project_completed_turn_to_episodic(
765	    *,
766	    user_message: str = "",
767	    assistant_message: str = "",
768	    episodic_mm,
769	    session_id: str,
770	    turn_id: str,
771	    graph=None,
772	    config: dict | None = None,
773	) -> None:
774	    """Best-effort 将一个成功的 chat turn 投影到情景记忆。
775	
776	    sidecar 模式下 graph/config 为 None，直接使用传入的 user_message 和
777	    assistant_message 构造摘要，不再从 checkpoint 读取消息列表。
778	    """
779	    if episodic_mm is None:
780	        return
781	    try:
782	        # sidecar 模式：graph 为 None，使用直接传入的消息
783	        if graph is None:
784	            # 构造简单的摘要文本用于情景记忆
785	            summary_parts = []
786	            if user_message:
787	                user_preview = user_message[:200] + ("..." if len(user_message) > 200 else "")
788	                summary_parts.append(f"用户: {user_preview}")
789	            if assistant_message:
790	                asst_preview = assistant_message[:300] + ("..." if len(assistant_message) > 300 else "")
791	                summary_parts.append(f"助理: {asst_preview}")
792	            summary = "\n".join(summary_parts)
793	            if not summary:
794	                return
795	            # 写入情景记忆（add_episode 是同步方法）
796	            episode_id = episodic_mm.add_episode(
797	                summary=summary,
798	                session_id=session_id,
799	                turn_id=turn_id,
800	            )
801	            if episode_id is None:
802	                logger.debug(
803	                    "[episodic] no episode created for session=%s turn=%s",
804	                    session_id, turn_id,
805	                )
806	            return
807	
808	        # LangGraph 路径（保留兼容，理论上 sidecar 模式不会到达）
809	        episode_id = await commit_to_episodic(
810	            graph,
811	            config,
812	            episodic_mm,
813	            session_id=session_id,
814	            turn_id=turn_id,
815	        )
816	        if episode_id is None:
817	            logger.warning(
818	                "[episodic] projection produced no episode for session=%s turn=%s",
819	                session_id,
820	                turn_id,
821	            )
822	    except Exception:
823	        logger.exception(
824	            "[episodic] projection failed after completed response for session=%s turn=%s",
825	            session_id,
826	            turn_id,
827	        )
828	
829	
830	def _new_turn_id(turn_id: object = None) -> str:
831	    """Return a validated client id or create one before execution begins."""
832	    if isinstance(turn_id, str):
833	        candidate = turn_id.strip()
834	        if candidate and len(candidate) <= 128:
835	            return candidate
836	    return uuid.uuid4().hex
837	
838	
839	async def _is_memory_eligible_turn(graph, config: dict) -> bool:
840	    """Read the graph's explicit model outcome before persisting a turn.
841	
842	    Provider failures are intentionally rendered as helpful AI messages by the
843	    graph.  Their text is not a reliable persistence signal, particularly
844	    across locales and provider implementations, so only an explicit success
845	    marker allows automatic episodic/LTM projection.
846	    """
847	    try:
848	        state = await graph.aget_state(config)
849	        values = getattr(state, "values", {}) if state is not None else {}
850	        succeeded = values.get("llm_invocation_succeeded")
851	        if succeeded is True:
852	            return True
853	        if succeeded is False:
854	            logger.info("[memory] skipping failed model turn")
855	        else:
856	            logger.warning("[memory] skipping turn without model outcome metadata")
857	    except Exception:
858	        logger.warning(
859	            "[memory] skipping turn with unreadable model outcome", exc_info=True
860	        )
861	    return False
862	
863	
864	async def _run_agent_turn(
865	    ws: WebSocket,
866	    session: SessionState,
867	    user_message: str,
868	    private_mode: bool = False,
869	    auto_approve: bool = False,
870	    provider_id: str | None = None,
871	    model_name: str | None = None,
872	    think_path_id: str | None = None,
873	    turn_id: str | None = None,
874	):
875	    """
876	    在指定的session中编排一轮 Agent 对话。
877	    无返回值。
878	    以内置的 WebSocketCallback回调函数和前端通信系统作为副作用。
879	
880	    若指定了 provider_id + model_name，则从 ProviderManager 动态创建 LLM；
881	    否则退化到 app_state.llm 全局 fallback。
882	    """
883	    # 1. [准备环境] 从 WebSocket 获取应用状态
884	    app_state = ws.app.state
885	    current_task = asyncio.current_task()
886	    # The memory id is assigned before any model work.  Callers can pass a
887	    # stable client/request id when retrying after reconnect; otherwise this
888	    # invocation gets one stable id for its full lifetime.
889	    turn_id = _new_turn_id(turn_id)
890	    interaction.current_session_id.set(session.session_id)
891	    # ── 多模态：自动描述用户附带的图片 ──────────────────────────
892	    user_message = await _process_image_refs(user_message)
893	    # ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
894	
895	    # 获取默认上下文窗口大小和模型名（一次性解构，避免重复调用）
896	    default_max_tokens, fallback_model_name = _get_provider_context(app_state)
897	
898	    # 子会话在创建时带有不可变的 DelegationContext。前端连接后也必须
899	    # 消费它，不能让客户端 payload 或之后的全局 provider 配置改变父任务
900	    # 已授权的模型、工具或预算。普通会话保持原有选择逻辑。
901	    delegation_context = (
902	        getattr(session, "delegation_context", None)
903	        if getattr(session, "is_subagent", False)
904	        else None
905	    )
906	    delegation_helpers = None
907	    auto_approve = _effective_auto_approve(session, auto_approve)
908	    session.auto_approve = auto_approve
909	    interaction.set_session_auto_approve(session.session_id, auto_approve)
910	
911	    # 动态 LLM 选择（Phase 2：每次消息独立指定提供商/模型）
912	    # 阶段 3.3：指定 provider 失败时尝试 fallback 链（按 priority 排序）
913	    current_max_tokens = default_max_tokens
914	    current_provider_id = ""
915	    if provider_id and model_name and hasattr(app_state, "provider_manager"):
916	        try:
917	            provider = app_state.provider_manager.get(provider_id)
918	            llm = provider.create_llm(model_name, temperature=0.7, streaming=True)
919	            current_model_name = model_name
920	            current_max_tokens = provider.config.context_window
921	            current_provider_id = provider.config.id
922	        except KeyError:
923	            # 阶段 3.3：尝试 fallback 到下一个可用 provider
924	            fallback_provider = app_state.provider_manager.get_fallback(
925	                exclude_ids={provider_id} if provider_id else None
926	            )
927	            if fallback_provider is not None:
928	                logger.warning(
929	                    "[chat:%s] requested provider/model fallback: provider_id=%r model=%r not found; "
930	                    "switching to fallback provider=%r (priority=%d)",
931	                    session.session_id[:8],
932	                    provider_id,
933	                    model_name,
934	                    fallback_provider.config.id,
935	                    fallback_provider.config.priority,
936	                )
937	                llm = fallback_provider.create_llm(
938	                    fallback_provider.default_model,
939	                    temperature=0.7,
940	                    streaming=True,
941	                )
942	                current_model_name = fallback_provider.default_model
943	                current_max_tokens = fallback_provider.config.context_window
944	                current_provider_id = fallback_provider.config.id
945	            else:
946	                logger.warning(
947	                    "[chat:%s] requested provider/model fallback: provider_id=%r model=%r not found; "
948	                    "no fallback available, using default",
949	                    session.session_id[:8],
950	                    provider_id,
951	                    model_name,
952	                )
953	                llm = app_state.llm
954	                current_model_name = None
955	    elif provider_id or model_name:
956	        logger.warning(
957	            "[chat:%s] requested provider/model fallback: provider_id=%r model=%r incomplete or unavailable; "
958	            "using default provider/model=%r",
959	            session.session_id[:8],
960	            provider_id,
961	            model_name,
962	            fallback_model_name or "<unknown>",
963	        )
964	        llm = app_state.llm
965	        current_model_name = None
966	    else:
967	        llm = app_state.llm
968	        current_model_name = None
969	
970	    # ThinkPath is a user-confirmed depth preference, not an opaque prompt
971	    # classifier.  It may opt into declarative routing only when the user did
972	    # not already select a provider/model in this same request.
973	    settings = get_settings()
974	    think_path_execution = _resolve_think_path_execution(
975	        think_path_id,
976	        think_path_enabled=settings.think_path_enabled,
977	        declarative_model_routing_enabled=settings.declarative_model_routing_enabled,
978	        has_explicit_model_selection=bool(provider_id or model_name),
979	        provider_manager=getattr(app_state, "provider_manager", None),
980	    )
981	    if think_path_execution.provider is not None:
982	        try:
983	            routed_provider = think_path_execution.provider
984	            routed_model_name = think_path_execution.model_name
985	            llm = routed_provider.create_llm(
986	                routed_model_name,
987	                temperature=0.7,
988	                streaming=True,
989	            )
990	            current_provider_id = routed_provider.config.id
991	            current_model_name = routed_model_name
992	            current_max_tokens = routed_provider.config.context_window
993	            logger.info(
994	                "[chat:%s] ThinkPath %s selected provider=%s model=%s",
995	                session.session_id[:8],
996	                think_path_execution.path.id if think_path_execution.path else "",
997	                current_provider_id,
998	                current_model_name,
999	            )
1000	        except Exception:
1001	            # Do not turn an optional selection preference into a chat outage.
1002	            # The previously selected/default LLM remains intact.
1003	            logger.warning(
1004	                "[chat:%s] ThinkPath route creation failed; using normal selection",
1005	                session.session_id[:8],
1006	                exc_info=True,
1007	            )
1008	
1009	    if delegation_context is not None:
1010	        from tools.sub_agent.delegation_context import (
1011	            activate_delegation_context,
1012	            bind_model_budget,
1013	            prepare_delegated_tools,
1014	            reset_delegation_context,
1015	        )
1016	
1017	        delegation_helpers = (
1018	            activate_delegation_context,
1019	            prepare_delegated_tools,
1020	            reset_delegation_context,
1021	        )
1022	        if delegation_context.remaining_seconds() <= 0:
1023	            error = RuntimeError("子 Agent 的委托时间预算已耗尽")
1024	            if (
1025	                session._pending_result is not None
1026	                and not session._pending_result.done()
1027	            ):
1028	                session._pending_result.set_exception(error)
1029	            await ws.send_json(
1030	                format_ws_error(ErrorCode.AGENT_ERROR, "子 Agent 的委托时间预算已耗尽")
1031	            )
1032	            return
1033	        llm = bind_model_budget(delegation_context)
1034	        current_model_name = delegation_context.model_name or current_model_name
1035	        if delegation_context.max_tokens > 0:
1036	            current_max_tokens = min(current_max_tokens, delegation_context.max_tokens)
1037	
1038	    if llm is None:
1039	        error_collector.add_error(
1040	            level="ERROR",
1041	            category="llm",
1042	            message="No LLM provider configured",
1043	            session_id=session.session_id,
1044	        )
1045	        await ws.send_json(
1046	            format_ws_error(
1047	                ErrorCode.NO_LLM,
1048	                "No LLM provider configured. Add one in Model Settings first.",
1049	            )
1050	        )
1051	        return
1052	
1053	    # A normal parent turn also activates a context.  This makes a top-level
1054	    # delegation inherit the model actually selected for this request rather
1055	    # than rediscovering app_state.llm inside the tool.
1056	    if delegation_context is None:
1057	        from tools.sub_agent.delegation_context import (
1058	            activate_delegation_context,
1059	            create_delegation_context,
1060	            reset_delegation_context,
1061	        )
1062	
1063	        execution_context = create_delegation_context(
1064	            app_state,
1065	            session.session_id,
1066	            model=llm,
1067	            provider_id=current_provider_id,
1068	            model_name=current_model_name,
1069	            auto_approve=auto_approve,
1070	        )
1071	        delegation_helpers = (
1072	            activate_delegation_context,
1073	            None,
1074	            reset_delegation_context,
1075	        )
1076	    else:
1077	        execution_context = delegation_context
1078	
1079	    system_prompt = build_system_prompt()
1080	
1081	    # ── 项目上下文自动感知 ──────────────────────────────────────
1082	    # 缓存优化：project_ctx 不再追加到 system_prompt，而是 prepend 到
1083	    # user_message。这样 SystemMessage 保持完全稳定，有利于 DeepSeek
1084	    # prompt cache 命中（project_ctx 仅在检测到项目路径时非空）。
1085	    project_ctx = _get_project_context(session, user_message)
1086	    # ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
1087	
1088	    # 缓存优化：使用全量工具集 + MCP 工具，避免每轮工具集变化破坏
1089	    # DeepSeek prompt cache（tools 字段是 prompt 前缀的一部分）。
1090	    # 全量工具带来的额外 token 会被缓存，成本远低于缓存 miss。
1091	    mcp_tools = getattr(ws.app.state, "mcp_tools", None) or []
1092	    turn_tools = merge_tool_lists(
1093	        get_all_tools(), list(mcp_tools), log_collisions=False
1094	    )
1095	    if delegation_context is not None:
1096	        # This is the execution boundary, not merely prompt-time filtering.
1097	        # ScopedTool validates path arguments immediately before each call.
1098	        turn_tools = delegation_helpers[1](turn_tools, delegation_context)
1099	    # 4 层架构：注入情景记忆管理器，启用 episodic_retriever 节点
1100	    episodic_mm = getattr(ws.app.state, "episodic_mm", None)
1101	    # B6：生成运行时配置摘要，让 agent 感知自身的 providers/MCP/工具配置全貌
1102	    runtime_context_text = _build_runtime_context_for_agent(
1103	        app_state, turn_tools, current_model_name
1104	    )
1105	    think_path_context = _think_path_runtime_context(think_path_execution.path)
1106	    if think_path_context:
1107	        runtime_context_text = "\n\n".join(
1108	            part for part in (think_path_context, runtime_context_text) if part
1109	        )
1110	
1111	    # project_ctx prepend 到 user_message（不修改 system_prompt，保持缓存稳定）
1112	    if project_ctx:
1113	        user_message_for_llm = f"[项目上下文]\n{project_ctx}\n\n---\n\n{user_message}"
1114	    else:
1115	        user_message_for_llm = user_message
1116	
1117	    # oh-my-pi sidecar: no LangGraph state
1118	    config = None
1119	    agent_maxma = None
1120	    session._graph = None
1121	
1122	    # 2. [执行轮次] 流式执行 Agent 图，副作用推送最终回答，另有config回调副作用
1123	    final_answer = ""
1124	    _run_error: str | None = None
1125	    turn_completed = False
1126	    context_token = None
1127	    try:
1128	        # turn 开始时推送当前上下文用量（含刚加入的 user message）
1129	        initial_turn_usage = await _calculate_context_usage(
1130	            session,
1131	            system_prompt,
1132	            max_tokens=current_max_tokens,
1133	            model_name=current_model_name or "",
1134	        )
1135	        await ws.send_json({"type": "context_usage", "payload": initial_turn_usage})
1136	
1137	        context_token = delegation_helpers[0](execution_context)
1138	        if delegation_context is not None:
1139	            async with asyncio.timeout(delegation_context.remaining_seconds()):
1140	                final_answer = await _stream_turn_sidecar(
1141	                    ws,
1142	                    session,
1143	                    user_message_for_llm,
1144	                    system_prompt,
1145	                    current_provider_id,
1146	                    current_model_name,
1147	                )
1148	        else:
1149	            _turn_timeout = 600
1150	            try:
1151	                _turn_timeout = get_settings().turn_timeout
1152	            except Exception:
1153	                pass
1154	            async with asyncio.timeout(_turn_timeout):
1155	                final_answer = await _stream_turn_sidecar(
1156	                    ws,
1157	                    session,
1158	                    user_message_for_llm,
1159	                    system_prompt,
1160	                    current_provider_id,
1161	                    current_model_name,
1162	                )
1163	        # Sidecar mode: no graph state to inspect, trust the returned answer
1164	        turn_completed = bool(final_answer)
1165	
1166	        # 保存本轮对话到 SessionMap（用于侧边栏重启后恢复上下文）
1167	        if final_answer and not private_mode:
1168	            try:
1169	                from api.pi_bridge.session_adapter import SessionMap
1170	                with SessionMap() as sm:
1171	                    sm.append_turn(session.session_id, user_message, final_answer)
1172	            except Exception:
1173	                logger.debug("[sidecar] Failed to save turn to SessionMap", exc_info=True)
1174	
1175	        if final_answer:
1176	            # 表情包处理：分层决策架构
1177	            # 1. LLM 主动输出 [表情包:情绪] → 直接解析
1178	            # 2. LLM 未输出 → 决策器判断是否补发
1179	            from tools.sticker_utils import process_stickers
1180	
1181	            ai_recent = await _get_recent_ai_messages(session, config, limit=5)
1182	            processed_answer, _ = process_stickers(
1183	                final_answer,
1184	                user_message=user_message,
1185	                ai_recent_messages=ai_recent,
1186	            )
1187	            final_answer = processed_answer
1188	            await ws.send_json(
1189	                {  # [向前端通信] 1. 向客户端推送最终答案
1190	                    "type": "answer",
1191	                    "payload": {"content": processed_answer},
1192	                }
1193	            )
1194	    except asyncio.CancelledError:
1195	        # 清理 interaction 挂起 Future
1196	        await interaction.cancel_session(session.session_id)
1197	
1198	        # sidecar 模式：通过 cancel RPC 中止 sidecar 中的生成
1199	        try:
1200	            sidecar_mgr = getattr(ws.app.state, "sidecar_manager", None)
1201	            if sidecar_mgr and sidecar_mgr.client:
1202	                from api.pi_bridge.session_adapter import SessionMap
1203	                with SessionMap() as sm:
1204	                    sidecar_sid = sm.get_sidecar_id(session.session_id)
1205	                if not sidecar_sid:
1206	                    sidecar_sid = getattr(session, "_sidecar_session_id", None)
1207	                if sidecar_sid:
1208	                    await sidecar_mgr.client.call("cancel", {"session_id": sidecar_sid})
1209	        except Exception as e:
1210	            logger.debug("[cancel] sidecar cancel RPC failed: %s", e)
1211	
1212	        # 注：原 LangGraph 路径的 checkpoint 清理和 interrupt AIMessage 注入
1213	        # 在 sidecar 模式下不再需要 — cancel RPC 已中止生成，
1214	        # sidecar 内部维护消息状态的一致性。
1215	
1216	        await ws.send_json(format_ws_error(ErrorCode.CANCELLED, "生成已取消"))
1217	    except Exception as e:
1218	        # 清理可能挂起的用户交互 Future，防止阻塞后续交互
1219	        await interaction.cancel_session(
1220	            session.session_id, "Agent 执行出错，交互已取消"
1221	        )
1222	        _run_error = str(e)
1223	        trace_id = uuid.uuid4().hex[:8]
1224	        logger.error(
1225	            f"[sub-agent:{session.session_id[:8]}] _run_agent_turn error: {e}",
1226	            exc_info=True,
1227	            extra={"trace_id": trace_id},
1228	        )
1229	        error_collector.add_exception(
1230	            e,
1231	            category="agent",
1232	            message=f"Agent 执行出错: {str(e)[:200]}",
1233	            trace_id=trace_id,
1234	            session_id=session.session_id,
1235	        )
1236	        await ws.send_json(
1237	            format_ws_error(
1238	                ErrorCode.AGENT_ERROR,
1239	                f"Agent 执行出错: {str(e)[:200]}",
1240	                trace_id=trace_id,
1241	            )
1242	        )
1243	    finally:
1244	        if context_token is not None:
1245	            delegation_helpers[2](context_token)
1246	        if session._active_task is current_task:
1247	            session._active_task = None
1248	        context_usage = await _calculate_context_usage(
1249	            session,
1250	            system_prompt,
1251	            max_tokens=current_max_tokens,
1252	            model_name=current_model_name or "",
1253	        )
1254	        await ws.send_json(
1255	            {  # [向前端通信] 3. 推送 turn 结束 + 上下文用量 + turn_id（用于记忆事件关联）
1256	                "type": "done",
1257	                "payload": {
1258	                    "turn_id": turn_id,
1259	                    "context_usage": context_usage,
1260	                },
1261	            }
1262	        )
1263	
1264	    # 3. [后处理] 增加消息计数器，将对话记录入长期记忆
1265	    # 修复：此前仅在 final_answer 非空时 +=2，错误轮次仍写 checkpointer（至少写入 HumanMessage）
1266	    # 但计数不增 → message_count 与 checkpointer 实际消息数漂移，导致：
1267	    # 1) undo 端点 max(0, count - deleted) 计算错误
1268	    # 2) const 会话 YAML metadata.message_count 不准，重启后显示错误
1269	    if final_answer:
1270	        session.message_count += 2  # human + ai
1271	    else:
1272	        # Agent 出错：graph.ainvoke 已把 HumanMessage 写入 checkpointer，但没有 AI 回复
1273	        session.message_count += 1
1274	    memory_eligible = turn_completed and bool(final_answer)
1275	    if not private_mode and memory_eligible:
1276	        if final_answer:
1277	            await _project_completed_turn_to_episodic(
1278	                user_message=user_message,
1279	                assistant_message=final_answer,
1280	                episodic_mm=episodic_mm,
1281	                session_id=session.session_id,
1282	                turn_id=turn_id,
1283	            )
1284	        # 增量发送：只传成功轮次给记忆消费者，避免错误提示污染 LTM。
1285	        messages_for_memory = [
1286	            {"role": "user", "content": user_message},
1287	            {"role": "assistant", "content": final_answer},
1288	        ]
1289	        logger.info(
1290	            "[ltm] calling send_history, messages=%d (incremental)",
1291	            len(messages_for_memory),
1292	        )
1293	        try:
1294	            await app_state.ltm.send_history(
1295	                messages_for_memory,
1296	                session_id=session.session_id,
1297	                turn_id=turn_id,
1298	            )
1299	            logger.info("[ltm] send_history completed")
1300	        except Exception as e:
1301	            logger.error("[ltm] send_history failed: %s", e, exc_info=True)
1302	
1303	    # 4. [Const 会话] 自动持久化到磁盘 YAML
1304	    if final_answer and session.is_const:
1305	        try:
1306	            # sidecar 模式：从 sidecar 获取消息历史
1307	            messages = await _get_messages_from_sidecar(session, limit=200)
1308	            if messages:
1309	                # 转换为 serialize_messages 兼容格式
1310	                serialized = []
1311	                for m in messages:
1312	                    role = m.get("role", "unknown")
1313	                    content = m.get("content", "")
1314	                    if role == "user":
1315	                        serialized.append({"type": "human", "content": content})
1316	                    elif role == "assistant":
1317	                        serialized.append({"type": "ai", "content": content})
1318	                # 确保最后一条 AI 消息是 final_answer
1319	                for item in reversed(serialized):
1320	                    if item.get("type") == "ai":
1321	                        item["content"] = final_answer
1322	                        break
1323	                metadata = session.persistent_metadata()
1324	                save_const_session(
1325	                    session.session_id, session.const_name, metadata, serialized
1326	                )
1327	        except Exception as e:
1328	            print(
1329	                f"[const] 自动保存会话 {session.session_id[:8]} 失败: {e}",
1330	                file=sys.stderr,
1331	            )
1332	
1333	    # 5. [Sub-agent] 如果有待处理的 pending_result，resolve 它
1334	    if session._pending_result is not None and not session._pending_result.done():
1335	        if _run_error:
1336	            print(
1337	                f"[sub-agent:{session.session_id[:8]}] resolving pending_result with run error",
1338	                file=sys.stderr,
1339	            )
1340	            session._pending_result.set_exception(
1341	                RuntimeError(f"子 Agent 执行失败: {_run_error}")
1342	            )
1343	        elif final_answer:
1344	            print(
1345	                f"[sub-agent:{session.session_id[:8]}] resolving pending_result with answer",
1346	                file=sys.stderr,
1347	            )
1348	            session._pending_result.set_result(final_answer)
1349	        else:
1350	            print(
1351	                f"[sub-agent:{session.session_id[:8]}] resolving pending_result with exception (empty answer)",
1352	                file=sys.stderr,
1353	            )
1354	            session._pending_result.set_exception(
1355	                RuntimeError("Sub-agent 未能产生有效回答")
1356	            )
1357	
1358	
1359	async def _resume_sub_agent(
1360	    ws: WebSocket, session: SessionState
1361	) -> asyncio.Task | None:
1362	    """WebSocket 重连时，若会话有未完成的 sub-agent 任务则自动恢复执行。"""
1363	    if session._sub_agent_task is None or session._pending_result is None:
1364	        return None
1365	    if session._pending_result.done():
1366	        return None
1367	    task = session._sub_agent_task
1368	    session._sub_agent_task = None  # 消费掉，防止重连后重复启动
1369	    # 取消旧任务，等待其完成后再创建新任务，避免 checkpoint 竞态
1370	    if session._active_task is not None and not session._active_task.done():
1371	        session._active_task.cancel()
1372	        try:
1373	            await asyncio.wait_for(session._active_task, timeout=5)
1374	        except (asyncio.CancelledError, asyncio.TimeoutError):
1375	            pass
1376	        session._active_task = None
1377	    interaction.current_ws.set(ws)
1378	    interaction.current_session_id.set(session.session_id)
1379	    agent_task = asyncio.create_task(
1380	        _run_agent_turn(ws, session, task, private_mode=False)
1381	    )
1382	    session._active_task = agent_task
1383	    return agent_task
1384	
1385	
1386	@router.websocket("/ws/chat/{session_id}")
1387	async def websocket_chat(ws: WebSocket, session_id: str):
1388	    """WebSocket 聊天端点 — 接收用户消息、驱动 Agent、处理取消和用户交互。"""
1389	    await ws.accept()
1390	
1391	    # ── 初始化会话 ────────────────────────────────────────
1392	    app_state = ws.app.state
1393	    session = await app_state.session_manager.get_or_create(session_id)
1394	
1395	    # 注册 WebSocket 到注册表，供后台记忆 consumer 推送事件
1396	    app_state.ws_registry.register(session_id, ws)
1397	
1398	    # ── 推送初始上下文用量 ─────────────────────────────────
1399	    default_max_tokens, default_model = _get_provider_context(app_state)
1400	    initial_usage = await _calculate_context_usage(
1401	        session,
1402	        app_state.system_prompt,
1403	        max_tokens=default_max_tokens,
1404	        model_name=default_model,
1405	    )
1406	    await ws.send_json({"type": "context_usage", "payload": initial_usage})
1407	
1408	    # ── 断线重连时恢复 sub-agent ──────────────────────────
1409	    agent_task = await _resume_sub_agent(ws, session)
1410	
1411	    # ── 消息主循环 ────────────────────────────────────────
1412	    try:
1413	        while True:
1414	            raw = await ws.receive_text()
1415	            try:
1416	                msg = json.loads(raw)
1417	            except json.JSONDecodeError:
1418	                # 客户端发送非 JSON 文本（心跳探针、协议错误等），忽略不中断连接
1419	                continue
1420	            if not isinstance(msg, dict):
1421	                continue
1422	
1423	            match msg.get("type", ""):
1424	                case "ping":
1425	                    await ws.send_json({"type": "pong", "payload": {}})
1426	
1427	                case "chat":
1428	                    if agent_task and not agent_task.done():
1429	                        continue  # 已有 Agent 运行中，忽略本次输入
1430	
1431	                    payload = msg.get("payload")
1432	                    if not isinstance(payload, dict):
1433	                        continue
1434	                    user_message = str(payload.get("message", "")).strip()
1435	                    if not user_message:
1436	                        continue
1437	
1438	                    # 阶段 3.2：per-session 令牌桶限流
1439	                    allowed, rate_err = get_ws_rate_limiter().try_consume(session_id)
1440	                    if not allowed:
1441	                        get_metrics().record_rate_limit("ws")
1442	                        error_collector.add_error(
1443	                            level="WARNING",
1444	                            category="rate_limit",
1445	                            message=f"WebSocket 限流: {rate_err}",
1446	                            session_id=session_id,
1447	                        )
1448	                        await ws.send_json({"type": "error", "payload": rate_err})
1449	                        continue
1450	
1451	                    auto_approve = _effective_auto_approve(
1452	                        session, payload.get("auto_approve", False)
1453	                    )
1454	                    interaction.current_ws.set(ws)  # 供工具函数通过 WebSocket 推送交互
1455	                    interaction.current_session_id.set(session_id)
1456	                    interaction.set_session_auto_approve(session_id, auto_approve)
1457	
1458	                    agent_task = asyncio.create_task(
1459	                        _run_agent_turn(
1460	                            ws,
1461	                            session,
1462	                            user_message,
1463	                            private_mode=payload.get("private", False),
1464	                            auto_approve=auto_approve,
1465	                            provider_id=payload.get("provider_id"),
1466	                            model_name=payload.get("model_name"),
1467	                            think_path_id=payload.get("think_path_id"),
1468	                            turn_id=payload.get("turn_id"),
1469	                        )
1470	                    )
1471	                    session._active_task = agent_task  # 供外部 REST 接口查询活跃状态
1472	
1473	                case "user_response":
1474	                    payload = msg.get("payload", {})
1475	                    interaction_id = payload.get("interaction_id", "")
1476	                    response = payload.get("response", "")
1477	                    if interaction_id:
1478	                        await interaction.resolve(interaction_id, response)
1479	
1480	                case "artifact_action":
1481	                    # Artifact actions are never tool calls.  They can only
1482	                    # resolve an already-pending interaction after the signed,
1483	                    # session-bound token has been validated.
1484	
1485	                    if not get_settings().interactive_artifacts_enabled:
1486	                        continue
1487	                    try:
1488	                        from api.artifacts.schema import (
1489	                            ArtifactActionResponse,
1490	                            artifact_action_authorizer,
1491	                        )
1492	
1493	                        response = ArtifactActionResponse.model_validate(
1494	                            msg.get("payload", {})
1495	                        )
1496	                        authorized = artifact_action_authorizer.authorize(
1497	                            response, session_id=session_id
1498	                        )
1499	                    except (TypeError, ValueError):
1500	                        continue
1501	                    if authorized is None:
1502	                        continue
1503	                    if await interaction.resolve(
1504	                        authorized.interaction_id, authorized.action_id
1505	                    ):
1506	                        artifact_action_authorizer.consume(authorized)
1507	
1508	                case "plan_response":
1509	                    payload = msg.get("payload", {})
1510	                    plan_id = payload.get("plan_id", "")
1511	                    action = payload.get("action", "")
1512	                    modified_plan = payload.get("modified_plan", "")
1513	                    if plan_id:
1514	                        if action == "approve":
1515	                            await interaction.resolve(plan_id, "approve")
1516	                        elif action == "reject":
1517	                            await interaction.resolve(plan_id, "reject")
1518	                        elif action == "modify" and modified_plan:
1519	                            await interaction.resolve(plan_id, modified_plan)
1520	                        else:
1521	                            await interaction.resolve(plan_id, "reject")
1522	
1523	                case "cancel":
1524	                    if agent_task and not agent_task.done():
1525	                        agent_task.cancel()
1526	                        agent_task = None
1527	
1528	                case "update_auto_approve":
1529	                    payload = msg.get("payload")
1530	                    if not isinstance(payload, dict):
1531	                        continue
1532	                    auto_approve_val = _effective_auto_approve(
1533	                        session, payload.get("auto_approve", False)
1534	                    )
1535	                    interaction.set_session_auto_approve(session_id, auto_approve_val)
1536	                    session.auto_approve = auto_approve_val
1537	
1538	    except WebSocketDisconnect:
1539	        pass  # 客户端断开是正常行为
1540	    finally:
1541	        app_state.ws_registry.unregister(session_id)
1542	        if agent_task and not agent_task.done():
1543	            agent_task.cancel()
1544	        if session._active_task is agent_task:
1545	            session._active_task = None
1546	        interaction.clear_session_settings(session_id)
1547	
```

30	class PermissionModeRequest(BaseModel):
31	    """Browser-facing request for the session's additional permission layer."""
32	
33	    permission_mode: PermissionModeValue

35	
36	def _permission_modes_enabled() -> bool:
37	    """Read the opt-in flag at request time so settings reloads take effect."""
38	    try:
39	        from config.settings import get_settings
40	
41	        return bool(get_settings().permission_modes_enabled)
42	    except Exception:
43	        # Permission mode controls must never accidentally become writable if
44	        # settings cannot be loaded.
45	        return False
46	
47	
48	def _permission_mode_metadata(session, *, enabled: bool) -> dict[str, object]:
49	    """Return the small, non-secret contract consumed by the session UI.
50	
51	    A disabled feature reports the compatible confirmation-first mode instead
52	    of a stale, more permissive saved value.  This reflects the mode effective
53	    at the approval boundary while the feature flag is off.
54	    """
55	    return {
56	        "session_id": session.session_id,
57	        "permission_modes_enabled": enabled,
58	        "permission_mode": session.permission_mode if enabled else "ask",
59	        "permission_mode_updated_at": session.permission_mode_updated_at,
60	        "available_permission_modes": list(_PERMISSION_MODES) if enabled else [],
61	    }

104	@router.put("/sessions/{session_id}/permission-mode")
105	async def set_session_permission_mode(
106	    session_id: str,
107	    body: PermissionModeRequest,
108	    request: Request,
109	):
110	    """Persist a validated permission mode when the opt-in feature is active."""
111	    sm = request.app.state.session_manager
112	    session = await sm.get(session_id)
113	    if session is None:
114	        raise HTTPException(status_code=404, detail="Session not found")
115	
116	    if not _permission_modes_enabled():
117	        # The flag preserves the legacy approval semantics, so an inactive
118	        # endpoint must not leave a latent elevated value on the session.
119	        raise HTTPException(status_code=409, detail="Permission modes are unavailable")
120	
121	    try:
122	        session.set_permission_mode(body.permission_mode)
123	    except ValueError:
124	        # The request model normally catches this first.  Keep the boundary
125	        # fail-closed if an alternative SessionState implementation rejects it.
126	        raise HTTPException(status_code=422, detail="Unsupported permission mode") from None
127	
128	    return _permission_mode_metadata(session, enabled=True)

194	async def _sync_const_session_after_undo(session, deleted: int, *, sidecar_mgr=None):
195	    """Sync const session YAML after undo. sidecar 模式下从 sidecar 获取消息。"""
196	    if session.is_const and deleted > 0:
197	        from api.const_session_store import save_const_session
198	
199	        try:
200	            # 从 sidecar 获取当前消息列表
201	            from api.pi_bridge.session_adapter import SessionMap
202	            sidecar_sid = None
203	            with SessionMap() as smap:
204	                sidecar_sid = smap.get_sidecar_id(session.session_id)
205	            if not sidecar_sid:
206	                sidecar_sid = getattr(session, "_sidecar_session_id", None)
207	            if not sidecar_sid:
208	                return
209	
210	            # 优先使用传入的 sidecar_mgr，其次检查 session 上的引用
211	            if sidecar_mgr is None:
212	                sidecar_mgr = getattr(session, "_sidecar_mgr", None)
213	            if sidecar_mgr is None:
214	                return
215	            await sidecar_mgr.start()
216	            if sidecar_mgr.client is None:
217	                return
218	
219	            result = await sidecar_mgr.client.call("get_messages", {
220	                "session_id": sidecar_sid,
221	                "limit": 200,
222	            })
223	            messages = result.get("messages", [])
224	            serialized = []

227	                content = m.get("content", "")

229	                    serialized.append({"type": "human", "content": content})
230	                elif role == "assistant":
231	                    serialized.append({"type": "ai", "content": content})
232	            metadata = session.persistent_metadata()
233	            save_const_session(
234	                session.session_id,
235	                session.const_name,
236	                metadata,
237	                serialized,
238	            )
239	            logger.info(

241	                session.session_id, deleted, session.message_count,
242	            )
243	        except Exception:
244	            logger.warning(
245	                "[undo] const 会话 %s 撤回后同步 YAML 失败",
246	                session.session_id, exc_info=True,
247	            )

250	@router.post("/sessions/{session_id}/undo")
251	async def undo_session_messages(session_id: str, request: Request, n: int = 1):
252	    """撤回最近 n 轮对话（默认撤回最后一轮）。"""
253	    if n < 1:
254	        return {"deleted_count": 0}
255	    sm = request.app.state.session_manager
256	    session = await sm.get(session_id)
257	    if session is None:
258	        raise HTTPException(status_code=404, detail="Session not found")
259	
260	    # ── Sidecar path ──────────────────────────────────────────────
261	    mgr = getattr(request.app.state, "sidecar_manager", None)
262	    if mgr is not None:
263	        await mgr.start()
264	        client = mgr.client
265	        if client is not None:
266	            # 注入 sidecar manager 到 session
267	            session._sidecar_mgr = mgr
268	            # 优先从 SessionMap（持久化 SQLite）查找 sidecar session ID
269	            from api.pi_bridge.session_adapter import SessionMap
270	            with SessionMap() as smap:
271	                sidecar_sid = smap.get_sidecar_id(session_id)
272	            if not sidecar_sid:
273	                sidecar_sid = getattr(session, "_sidecar_session_id", None)
274	            if sidecar_sid:
275	                try:
276	                    result = await client.call("undo", {
277	                        "session_id": sidecar_sid,
278	                        "steps": n,
279	                    })
280	                    deleted = result.get("removed", 0)
281	                    session.message_count = max(0, session.message_count - deleted)
282	                    await _sync_const_session_after_undo(session, deleted, sidecar_mgr=mgr)
283	                    return {"deleted_count": deleted}
284	                except Exception:
285	                    logger.debug("[undo] sidecar undo failed for %s", session_id, exc_info=True)
286	
287	    # sidecar 不可用时的降级响应
288	    raise HTTPException(status_code=503, detail="Undo 需要 sidecar 连接")
289	
290	
291	@router.get("/sessions/{session_id}/context-usage")
292	async def get_context_usage(session_id: str, request: Request):
293	    sm = request.app.state.session_manager
294	    session = await sm.get(session_id)
295	    if session is None:
296	        raise HTTPException(status_code=404, detail="Session not found")
297	    mgr = getattr(request.app.state, "provider_manager", None)
298	    max_tokens = 256_000
299	    model_name = ""
300	    if mgr is not None and mgr.count > 0:
301	        for provider in mgr.iter_enabled():
302	            max_tokens = provider.config.context_window
303	            model_name = provider.default_model
304	            break
305	
306	    system_prompt = request.app.state.system_prompt or ""
307	
308	    # sidecar 模式：从 sidecar 获取消息估算用量
309	    counting_messages = []
310	    sidecar_mgr = getattr(request.app.state, "sidecar_manager", None)
311	    if sidecar_mgr is not None:
312	        await sidecar_mgr.start()
313	        client = sidecar_mgr.client
314	        if client is not None:
315	            from api.pi_bridge.session_adapter import SessionMap
316	            with SessionMap() as smap:
317	                sidecar_sid = smap.get_sidecar_id(session_id)
318	            if not sidecar_sid:
319	                sidecar_sid = getattr(session, "_sidecar_session_id", None)
320	            if sidecar_sid:
321	                try:
322	                    result = await client.call("get_messages", {
323	                        "session_id": sidecar_sid,
324	                        "limit": 200,
325	                    })
326	                    counting_messages = result.get("messages", [])
327	                except Exception:
328	                    logger.debug("Failed to get messages for context usage in session %s", session_id, exc_info=True)
329	
330	    total_chars = sum(len(m.get("content", "")) for m in counting_messages)
331	    total_chars += len(system_prompt)
332	    estimated_tokens = int(total_chars / 2)
333	    usage = {
334	        "estimated_tokens": estimated_tokens,
335	        "max_tokens": max_tokens,
336	        "percentage": min(100, int(estimated_tokens / max(max_tokens, 1) * 100)),
337	        "message_count": len(counting_messages),
338	        "model_name": model_name,
339	        "session_id": session_id,
340	    }
341	    return usage

344	@router.delete("/sessions/{session_id}")
345	async def delete_session(session_id: str, request: Request):
346	    sm = request.app.state.session_manager
347	    session = await sm.get(session_id)
348	
349	    # 若为 const 会话，先清理磁盘文件
350	    if session is not None and session.is_const:
351	        from api.const_session_store import delete_const_session
352	
353	        delete_const_session(session_id)
354	
355	    # BUG8 fix: 清理 sidecar session（防止内存泄漏）
356	    sidecar_mgr = getattr(request.app.state, "sidecar_manager", None)
357	    if sidecar_mgr is not None and sidecar_mgr.client is not None:
358	        from api.pi_bridge.session_adapter import SessionMap
359	        with SessionMap() as smap:
360	            sidecar_sid = smap.get_sidecar_id(session_id)
361	        if not sidecar_sid and session is not None:
362	            sidecar_sid = getattr(session, "_sidecar_session_id", None)
363	        if sidecar_sid:
364	            try:
365	                await sidecar_mgr.client.call("destroy_session", {
366	                    "session_id": sidecar_sid,
367	                })
368	            except Exception:
369	                logger.debug("[delete] sidecar destroy failed for %s", sidecar_sid[:8], exc_info=True)
370	        # 清理 SessionMap 映射
371	        with SessionMap() as smap:
372	            smap.remove(session_id)
373	
374	    if not await sm.delete(session_id):
375	        raise HTTPException(status_code=404, detail="Session not found")
376	    return {"status": "deleted"}
377	
378	
379	# ── Const 固定会话 ────────────────────────────────────────────
380	
381	
382	@router.post("/sessions/{session_id}/const")
383	async def constify_session(session_id: str, body: ConstifyRequest, request: Request):
384	    """将当前会话固定为 const 持久化保存。"""
385	    sm = request.app.state.session_manager
386	    session = await sm.get(session_id)
387	    if session is None:
388	        raise HTTPException(status_code=404, detail="Session not found")
389	
390	    # Agent 运行中禁止固定
391	    if session._active_task is not None and not session._active_task.done():
392	        raise HTTPException(status_code=409, detail="Agent 仍在运行中，无法固定会话")
393	
394	    # 从 sidecar 提取消息
395	    serialized = []
396	    sidecar_mgr = getattr(request.app.state, "sidecar_manager", None)
397	    if sidecar_mgr is not None:
398	        await sidecar_mgr.start()
399	        client = sidecar_mgr.client
400	        if client is not None:
401	            from api.pi_bridge.session_adapter import SessionMap
402	            with SessionMap() as smap:
403	                sidecar_sid = smap.get_sidecar_id(session_id)
404	            if not sidecar_sid:
405	                sidecar_sid = getattr(session, "_sidecar_session_id", None)
406	            if sidecar_sid:
407	                try:
408	                    result = await client.call("get_messages", {
409	                        "session_id": sidecar_sid,
410	                        "limit": 200,
411	                    })
412	                    for m in result.get("messages", []):
413	                        role = m.get("role", "unknown")
414	                        content = m.get("content", "")
415	                        if role == "user":
416	                            serialized.append({"type": "human", "content": content})
417	                        elif role == "assistant":
418	                            serialized.append({"type": "ai", "content": content})
419	                except Exception:
420	                    logger.debug("Failed to get messages for constify in session %s", session_id, exc_info=True)
421	
422	    from api.const_session_store import save_const_session
423	
424	    metadata = session.persistent_metadata()
425	    save_const_session(session.session_id, body.name, metadata, serialized)
426	
427	    # 标记为 const
428	    session.is_const = True
429	    session.const_name = body.name
430	
431	    return {
432	        "session_id": session.session_id,
433	        "is_const": True,
434	        "const_name": body.name,
435	    }
436	
437	
438	@router.post("/sessions/{session_id}/generate-title")
439	async def generate_session_title(session_id: str, request: Request):
440	    """根据会话内容使用 LLM 生成简洁标题。"""
441	    sm = request.app.state.session_manager
442	    session = await sm.get(session_id)
443	    if session is None:
444	        raise HTTPException(status_code=404, detail="Session not found")
445	
446	    # 从 sidecar 提取消息
447	    messages = []
448	    sidecar_mgr = getattr(request.app.state, "sidecar_manager", None)
449	    if sidecar_mgr is not None:
450	        await sidecar_mgr.start()
451	        client = sidecar_mgr.client
452	        if client is not None:
453	            from api.pi_bridge.session_adapter import SessionMap
454	            with SessionMap() as smap:
455	                sidecar_sid = smap.get_sidecar_id(session_id)
456	            if not sidecar_sid:
457	                sidecar_sid = getattr(session, "_sidecar_session_id", None)
458	            if sidecar_sid:
459	                try:
460	                    result = await client.call("get_messages", {
461	                        "session_id": sidecar_sid,
462	                        "limit": 20,
463	                    })
464	                    messages = result.get("messages", [])
465	                except Exception:
466	                    logger.debug("Failed to get messages for title generation in session %s", session_id, exc_info=True)
467	
468	    if not messages:
469	        raise HTTPException(status_code=400, detail="没有消息可供生成标题")
470	
471	    # 构建对话文本（截断长内容）
472	    conversation_lines = []
473	    for m in messages:
474	        role = m.get("role", "unknown")
475	        content = m.get("content", "")[:600]
476	        conversation_lines.append(f"[{role}]\n{content}")
477	    conversation_text = "\n\n".join(conversation_lines)
478	
479	    system_prompt = """你是一个对话标题生成器。根据用户和助理的对话内容，生成一个简短的标题。
480	
481	## 规则（必须严格遵守）
482	
483	1. **忠实概括**：标题必须基于对话的实际内容，不能捏造或偏离用户真实提出的问题或主题。这是最根本的原则。
484	2. **核心主题**：准确抓住整个对话中最主要、最核心的主题或意图。如果用户问了多个问题，优先选择覆盖最广或最重要的那个。
485	3. **简洁凝练**：标题通常很短，一般为5-10个字，力求用最少的词概括最多信息。剔除冗余词语，保留关键词。
486	4. **区分度**：生成的标题应能明显区别于用户历史对话中的其他标题，便于快速定位和识别不同对话。
487	5. **通用可读**：不使用具体的"您"、"我"等指代词，也不包含"对话关于…"这样的描述性前缀。标题本身是名词性短语，直接陈述主题（如"Python爬虫入门"）。
488	6. **中性客观**：不添加情感色彩或主观评价（如不写成"令人困惑的数学问题"），也不使用指令式语气（如"请总结这个对话"）。
489	
490	## 输出格式
491	
492	只输出标题本身，不要有任何额外文字、引号或标点符号。"""
493	
494	    prompt = f"{system_prompt}\n\n对话内容：\n{conversation_text}\n\n标题："
495	
496	    try:
497	        llm = request.app.state.llm
498	        response = await llm.ainvoke(prompt)
499	        title = (
500	            response.content.strip().strip('"').strip("'")
501	            if hasattr(response, "content")
502	            else str(response).strip()
503	        )
504	        title = title[:50]
505	        if not title:
506	            title = "未命名会话"
507	    except Exception as e:
508	        raise HTTPException(status_code=500, detail=f"标题生成失败: {e}")
509	
510	    return {"title": title}
511	
512	
513	@router.delete("/sessions/{session_id}/const")
514	async def unconstify_session(session_id: str, request: Request):
515	    """取消固定，删除磁盘文件。"""
516	    from api.const_session_store import delete_const_session
517	
518	    delete_const_session(session_id)
519	
520	    sm = request.app.state.session_manager
521	    session = await sm.get(session_id)
522	    if session is not None:
523	        session.is_const = False
524	        session.const_name = ""
525	
526	    return {"status": "ok"}
527	
```

67	def _migrate_provider_from_env(store) -> object | None:
68	    """从 .env 读取 DeepSeek 配置写入 SQLite（向后兼容）。"""
69	    import os
70	    api_key = os.getenv("DEEPSEEK_API_KEY", "")
71	    if not api_key:
72	        return None
73	    base_url = os.getenv("DEEPSEEK_BASE_URL", "https://api.deepseek.com/v1")
74	    model_name = os.getenv("MODEL_NAME", "deepseek-v4-flash")
75	    context_window_str = os.getenv("MODEL_CONTEXT_WINDOW", "256000")
76	    from api.providers import ProviderConfig
77	    config = ProviderConfig(
78	        id="deepseek-main",
79	        provider_type="openai",
80	        label="DeepSeek",
81	        api_key=api_key,
82	        base_url=base_url,
83	        models=[model_name],
84	        enabled=True,
85	        context_window=int(context_window_str),
86	    )
87	    store.save(config)
88	    return config

91	def _hook_tools_for_action(app_state, action: str, trigger_detail: str) -> list:
92	    """Select tools for a headless event-hook run.
93	
94	    Event hooks execute without a live chat WebSocket, so tools that require
95	    immediate user interaction are intentionally excluded.
96	    """
97	    from tools import select_tools_for_query
98	
99	    mcp_tools = getattr(app_state, "mcp_tools", None) or []
100	    selected = select_tools_for_query(
101	        f"{action}\n\n触发详情：{trigger_detail}",
102	        mcp_tools=list(mcp_tools),
103	    )
104	    return [
105	        tool
106	        for tool in selected
107	        if not str(getattr(tool, "name", "")).startswith("ask_user_")
108	    ]
109	
110	
111	def _extract_hook_final_answer(output) -> str:
112	    messages = output.get("messages", []) if isinstance(output, dict) else []
113	    if not messages:
114	        return ""
115	    last = messages[-1]
116	    content = last.content if hasattr(last, "content") else str(last)
117	    return str(content or "")
118	
119	
120	async def _run_event_hook_action(app: FastAPI, hook, trigger_detail: str) -> str:
121	    """Run one event-hook action through the normal LangGraph Agent entrypoint."""
122	    app_state = app.state
123	    llm = getattr(app_state, "llm", None)
124	    if llm is None:
125	        raise HookUnsupportedError("事件钩子执行不可用：未配置 LLM Provider")
126	
127	    session_manager = getattr(app_state, "session_manager", None)
128	    if session_manager is None:
129	        raise HookUnsupportedError("事件钩子执行不可用：会话管理器未初始化")
130	
131	    session = await session_manager.create()
132	    try:
133	        system_prompt = getattr(app_state, "system_prompt", "") or get_system_prompt()
134	        system_prompt = (
135	            system_prompt
136	            + "\n\n[事件钩子执行模式]\n"
137	            + "当前任务由后台事件钩子自动触发，没有可交互的聊天 WebSocket。"
138	            + "不要请求用户确认或等待用户输入；"
139	            + "如果动作需要人工确认，请说明无法在后台执行。"
140	        )
141	        tools = _hook_tools_for_action(app_state, hook.action, trigger_detail)
142	        # 4 层架构：注入情景记忆管理器（事件钩子场景也启用 episodic 检索）
143	        episodic_mm = getattr(app_state, "episodic_mm", None)
144	        prompt = (
145	            "[事件钩子触发]\n"
146	            f"钩子名称：{hook.name}\n"
147	            f"钩子类型：{hook.hook_type}\n"
148	            f"触发详情：{trigger_detail}\n\n"
149	            "[预设动作]\n"
150	            f"{hook.action}"
151	        )
152	        timeout = float(hook.config.get("timeout", 600))
153	        response = await asyncio.wait_for(
154	            llm.ainvoke([
155	                SystemMessage(content=system_prompt),
156	                HumanMessage(content=prompt),
157	            ]),
158	            timeout=timeout,
159	        )
160	        final_answer = response.content if hasattr(response, "content") else str(response)
161	        return (
162	            final_answer
163	            or "事件钩子动作已执行，但没有生成文本结果"
164	        )
165	    finally:
166	        delete_session = getattr(session_manager, "delete", None)
167	        if callable(delete_session):
168	            await delete_session(session.session_id)
169	
170	
171	def _build_event_hook_callback(app: FastAPI):
172	    async def _callback(hook, trigger_detail: str) -> str:
173	        return await _run_event_hook_action(app, hook, trigger_detail)
174	
175	    return _callback
176
