```json
178	async def _load_const_sessions(app: FastAPI):
179	    """从 YAML 重建所有 const 固定会话的元数据到内存 SessionManager。
180	
181	    sidecar 模式下，const session 的消息由 oh-my-pi 管理（通过 JSONL 持久化）。
182	    此函数只恢复元数据（is_const, const_name, message_count），不重建消息历史。
183	    消息在用户首次访问时通过 sidecar RPC 按需加载。
184	    """
185	    sm = app.state.session_manager
186	    const_list = load_all_const_sessions()
187	    if not const_list:
188	        return
189	
190	    # 尝试获取 checkpointer（可选，sidecar 模式下不需要）
191	    shared_checkpointer = None
192	    try:
193	        from api.checkpointer_factory import get_persistent_checkpointer
194	        shared_checkpointer = get_persistent_checkpointer()
195	    except Exception:
196	        logger.debug("[const] No checkpointer available — sidecar-only mode for const sessions")
197	
198	    loaded = 0
199	    for const_data in const_list:
200	        sid = const_data.get("session_id")
201	        if not sid or sid in sm._sessions:
202	            continue
203	
204	        metadata = const_data.get("metadata", {})
205	        const_name = const_data.get("const_name", "")
206	
207	        # sidecar 模式：只恢复元数据，消息由 sidecar 按需管理
208	        session = SessionState(
209	            session_id=sid,
210	            created_at=metadata.get("created_at", time.time()),
211	            last_active=metadata.get("last_active", time.time()),
212	            message_count=metadata.get("message_count", 0),
213	            permission_mode=metadata.get("permission_mode", "ask"),
214	            permission_mode_updated_at=metadata.get("permission_mode_updated_at", time.time()),
215	            checkpointer=shared_checkpointer,  # 可能为 None
216	            is_const=True,
217	            const_name=const_name,
218	        )
219	        sm._sessions[sid] = session
220	        loaded += 1
221	        logger.info("[const] Loaded const session %s (name=%s, msg_count=%d)",
222	                    sid[:8], const_name, metadata.get("message_count", 0))
223	
224	    logger.info("[const] 已加载 %d/%d 个固定会话", loaded, len(const_list))
225	
226	
227	@asynccontextmanager
228	async def lifespan(app: FastAPI):
229	    from agent.lifecycle.disposable import DisposableStore, to_disposable
230	
231	    # Disposable 资源集合 — 统一管理生命周期
232	    _disposables = DisposableStore()
233	    app.state._disposables = _disposables
234	
235	    # 1. 初始化 Provider 管理器（SQLite 存储，兼容旧 YAML 导入）
236	    from api.db.core import initialize_database
237	    from api.db.providers import ProviderDbStore
238	
239	    initialize_database()  # 确保 DB schema 已创建
240	
241	    provider_store = ProviderDbStore()
242	    # 首次迁移：从旧 YAML 导入已有配置
243	    migrated_count = provider_store.migrate_from_yaml()
244	    if migrated_count:
245	        logger.info("[provider] migrated %d provider(s) from YAML", migrated_count)
246	    # 迁移 .env 中的 DeepSeek 配置（纯新安装场景）
247	    if provider_store.is_empty:
248	        migrated = _migrate_provider_from_env(provider_store)
249	        if migrated:
250	            logger.info("[provider] migrated %s from .env", migrated.label)
251	
252	    provider_manager = ProviderManager(provider_store)
253	    provider_manager.load_all()
254	    app.state.provider_manager = provider_manager
255	    logger.info("[provider] loaded %d provider(s)", provider_manager.count)
256	
257	    # 阶段 3.3：启动 provider 健康监控后台任务
258	    # - 健康 provider 每 check_interval 秒检查一次
259	    # - unhealthy provider 每 recovery_interval 秒重新探测
260	    # - 连续失败达 unhealthy_threshold 才标记 error（避免单次抖动）
261	    from api.providers.health_monitor import start_health_monitor
262	    from config.settings import get_settings as _get_settings_for_health
263	    _health_settings = _get_settings_for_health()
264	    start_health_monitor(
265	        provider_manager,
266	        check_interval=_health_settings.provider_health_check_interval_seconds,
267	        recovery_interval=_health_settings.provider_recovery_check_interval_seconds,
268	        unhealthy_threshold=_health_settings.provider_unhealthy_threshold,
269	    )
270	    logger.info(
271	        "[health_monitor] 已启动（check=%ds, recovery=%ds, threshold=%d）",
272	        _health_settings.provider_health_check_interval_seconds,
273	        _health_settings.provider_recovery_check_interval_seconds,
274	        _health_settings.provider_unhealthy_threshold,
275	    )
276	
277	    # 2. 其他共享资源（不阻塞启动 — LLM 在后台初始化）
278	    app.state.system_prompt = get_system_prompt()
279	    app.state.native_tools = get_tools()
280	    app.state.session_manager = SessionManager()
281	    # The workflow API is always registered but runtime construction remains
282	    # opt-in. A disabled flag therefore has no journal or execution side effect.
283	    workflow_settings = get_settings()
284	    if (
285	        workflow_settings.workflow_enabled
286	        and workflow_settings.async_subagent_enabled
287	        and workflow_settings.permission_modes_enabled
288	    ):
289	        from tools.workflow.journal import WorkflowJournalStore
290	        from tools.workflow.registry import DEFAULT_WORKFLOW_REGISTRY
291	        from tools.workflow.run_manager import WorkflowRunManager
292	
293	        app.state.workflow_run_manager = WorkflowRunManager(
294	            WorkflowJournalStore(WORKFLOW_JOURNAL_PATH), DEFAULT_WORKFLOW_REGISTRY
295	        )
296	        app.state.session_manager.set_workflow_run_manager(app.state.workflow_run_manager)
297	        app.state.workflow_run_manager.recover()
298	    app.state.ws_registry = WebSocketRegistry()
299	    app.state.ltm = LongTermMemoryInterface(
300	        MEMORY_PATH,
301	        retry_policy_enabled=get_settings().ltm_retry_policy_enabled,
302	    )
303	
304	    # 阶段 5.1：初始化持久化 checkpointer（sidecar 模式下可选）
305	    # - 启用 SQLite 持久化：进程重启后可恢复会话状态
306	    # - langgraph 未安装时跳过，sidecar 模式下不需要 checkpointer
307	    try:
308	        from api.checkpointer_factory import init_persistent_checkpointer
309	        await init_persistent_checkpointer()
310	        from api.checkpointer_factory import get_checkpointer_info
311	        logger.info("[checkpointer] %s", get_checkpointer_info())
312	    except ImportError:
313	        logger.info("[checkpointer] langgraph not available — using sidecar-only mode")
314	    except Exception:
315	        logger.warning("[checkpointer] init failed — using sidecar-only mode", exc_info=True)
316	
317	    # 后台初始化 LLM（不阻塞 lifespan，让 API 立即就绪）
318	    async def _init_llm_background():
319	        try:
320	            llm = get_llm(provider_manager)
321	            app.state.llm = llm
322	            logger.info("[llm] LLM 后台初始化完成")
323	            # LLM 就绪后启动长期记忆
324	            app.state.ltm.start_listening(
325	                llm, ws_registry=app.state.ws_registry,
326	            )
327	            logger.info("[ltm] 长期记忆监听器已启动")
328	        except RuntimeError as e:
329	            logger.warning("[llm] %s", e)
330	            logger.warning("[llm] No LLM configured — chat will be read-only until a provider is added")
331	            app.state.llm = None
332	    app.state._llm_init_task = asyncio.create_task(_init_llm_background())
333	    _disposables.add(to_disposable(lambda: app.state._llm_init_task.cancel() if not app.state._llm_init_task.done() else None))
334	
335	    # 从 YAML 配置加载 MCP 工具
336	    app.state.mcp_tools = await init_mcp_tools()
337	    app.state.tools = merge_tool_lists(app.state.native_tools, app.state.mcp_tools)
338	
339	    # 注入 MCP 重载回调：工具修改 YAML 后通过此回调触发异步重载
340	    _loop = asyncio.get_running_loop()  # 在 lifespan 协程中安全获取
341	
342	    def _mcp_reload_callback():
343	        _loop.call_soon_threadsafe(lambda: _loop.create_task(_do_reload_from_tool()))
344	
345	    async def _do_reload_from_tool():
346	        try:
347	            from tools.mcp import reload_mcp
348	            new_tools = await reload_mcp()
349	            app.state.mcp_tools = new_tools
350	            app.state.tools = merge_tool_lists(app.state.native_tools, new_tools)
351	            logger.info("[mcp] 工具触发热重载成功，共 %d 个 MCP 工具", len(new_tools))
352	        except Exception as exc:
353	            logger.error("[mcp] 工具触发热重载失败: %s", exc)
354	
355	    set_reload_callback(_mcp_reload_callback)
356	
357	    # 加载 const 固定会话（需要 tools 已就绪）
358	    await _load_const_sessions(app)
359	
360	    # 4. 启动定时 session 清理任务（每 5 分钟清理超过 TTL 的不活跃会话）
361	    async def _periodic_cleanup():
362	        while True:
363	            await asyncio.sleep(300)  # 5 分钟
364	            sm = app.state.session_manager
365	            removed = await sm.cleanup_expired()
366	            if removed:
367	                logger.info(
368	                    "[session] cleanup: removed %d expired session(s), %d remaining",
369	                    removed, len(sm._sessions),
370	                )
371	
372	    app.state._cleanup_task = asyncio.create_task(_periodic_cleanup())
373	    _disposables.add(to_disposable(lambda: app.state._cleanup_task.cancel() if not app.state._cleanup_task.done() else None))

572	def create_app() -> FastAPI:
573	    app = FastAPI(
574	        title="MaxmaHere API",
575	        version=__version__,
576	        lifespan=lifespan,
577	    )
578	
579	    cors_origins = build_cors_origins()
580	    app.add_middleware(
581	        CORSMiddleware,
582	        allow_origins=cors_origins,
583	        allow_credentials=True,
584	        allow_methods=["*"],
585	        allow_headers=["*"],
586	    )
587	
588	    # REST 路由
589	    app.include_router(sessions.router, prefix="/api")
590	    app.include_router(deferred_runs_router.router, prefix="/api")
591	    app.include_router(workflows_router.router, prefix="/api")
592	    app.include_router(autonomy_router.router, prefix="/api")
593	    app.include_router(memory.router, prefix="/api")
594	    app.include_router(files.router, prefix="/api")
595	    app.include_router(balance.router, prefix="/api")
596	
597	    # WebSocket 路由（无 /api 前缀）
598	    app.include_router(chat.router)
599	
600	    # Provider CRUD 路由
601	    app.include_router(providers.router, prefix="/api")
602	
603	    # MCP 服务器配置查看与热加载
604	    app.include_router(mcp_router.router, prefix="/api")
605	
606	    # MCP 测试连接（路由自带 /api/mcp 前缀）
607	    app.include_router(mcp_test_router.router)
608	
609	    # 人设读写 (SOUL.md / USER.md)
610	    app.include_router(persona_router.router, prefix="/api")
611	
612	    # 本地路径白名单管理
613	    app.include_router(path_whitelist_router.router, prefix="/api")
614	
615	    # MaxmaBlocker 拒止锚管理
616	    app.include_router(maxma_blocker_router.router, prefix="/api")
617	
618	    # Anthropic Skills
619	    app.include_router(skills_router.router, prefix="/api")
620	
621	    # 系统更新动态
622	    app.include_router(news_router.router, prefix="/api")
623	
624	    # 重启后端
625	    app.include_router(restart_router.router, prefix="/api")
626	
627	    # 工具环境变量管理
628	    app.include_router(env_vars_router.router, prefix="/api")
629	
630	    # 工具使用统计
631	    app.include_router(tool_stats_router.router, prefix="/api")
632	
633	    # 文件上传
634	    app.include_router(upload_router.router, prefix="/api")
635	
636	    # 运行时指标
637	    app.include_router(metrics_router.router, prefix="/api")
638	
639	    # 事件钩子
640	    app.include_router(event_hooks_router.router, prefix="/api")
641	
642	    # 审计日志
643	    app.include_router(audit_log_router.router, prefix="/api")
644	
645	    # 诊断与错误日志导出
646	    app.include_router(diagnostics_router.router, prefix="/api")
647	
648	    # Transcript 读取
649	    from api.routes import transcripts as transcripts_router_mod
650	    app.include_router(transcripts_router_mod.router, prefix="/api")
651	
652	    # Activity Hub —— 活动事件中心（REST + SSE）
653	    from api.routes import activity as activity_router
654	    app.include_router(activity_router.router, prefix="/api")
655	
656	    # 会话手动压缩
657	    from api.routes import session_compress
658	    app.include_router(session_compress.router, prefix="/api")
659	
660	    # 知识库
661	    from api.routes import kb as kb_router
662	    app.include_router(kb_router.router, prefix="/api")
663	
664	    # 表情包
665	    from api.routes import stickers as stickers_router
666	    app.include_router(stickers_router.router, prefix="/api")
667	
668	    # 表情收藏
669	    from api.routes import sticker_favorites as sticker_favorites_router
670	    app.include_router(sticker_favorites_router.router, prefix="/api")
671	
672	    # 自定义表情上传
673	    from api.routes import sticker_upload as sticker_upload_router
674	    app.include_router(sticker_upload_router.router, prefix="/api")
675	
676	    # Auth token 端点 — 桌面应用运行时获取 Token（替代构建时硬编码）
677	    @app.get("/api/auth/token")
678	    async def get_auth_token():
679	        """返回当前认证 Token。桌面应用启动后调用此接口获取 Token。"""
680	        return {"token": app.state.auth_token}
681	
682	    # 健康检查
683	    @app.get("/api/health")
684	    async def health(full: bool = False):
685	        return await get_health_report(app, probe_remote=full)
686	
687	    # 自治调度器状态（前端监控 + 外部健康检查）
688	    @app.get("/api/autonomy/status")
689	    async def get_autonomy_status():
690	        """获取自治调度器运行状态。"""
691	        from agent.autonomy.scheduler import get_autonomy_status as _get_status
692	        return _get_status()
693	
694	    # ── 全局异常处理器 ──────────────────────────────────────────
695	    # 捕获所有未处理的异常，记录到 ErrorCollector 供一键导出，
696	    # 同时写入日志（带 exc_info），避免错误丢失。
697	    import traceback as _traceback
698	    from fastapi.responses import JSONResponse as _JSONResponse
699	    from fastapi import Request as _Request
700	    from api.diagnostics import error_collector as _error_collector
701	
702	    @app.exception_handler(Exception)
703	    async def _global_exception_handler(request: _Request, exc: Exception):
704	        _error_collector.add_exception(
705	            exc,
706	            category="uncaught",
707	            message=f"未捕获异常 [{type(exc).__name__}]: {exc}",
708	            request_id=getattr(request.state, "request_id", None),
709	        )
710	        logger.error(
711	            "未捕获异常: %s %s -> %s: %s",
712	            request.method,
713	            request.url.path,
714	            type(exc).__name__,
715	            exc,
716	            exc_info=True,
717	        )
718	        return _JSONResponse(
719	            status_code=500,
720	            content={"detail": "Internal Server Error"},
721	        )
722	
723	    # 中间件执行顺序以“最后 add 的最先执行”为准。
724	    # 注册顺序（add 顺序）与实际执行顺序（后 add 先执行）：
725	    #   add 顺序: Auth → RateLimit → RequestLog
726	    #   执行顺序: RequestLog → RateLimit → Auth → 路由
727	    # 限流在 Auth 之前，避免被拒绝的鉴权请求也消耗限流配额。
728	    # 阶段 3.2：新增 RateLimitMiddleware（HTTP 按 IP 限流）
729	    app.add_middleware(AuthMiddleware)
730	    app.add_middleware(RateLimitMiddleware)
731	
732	    # 请求日志放在最外层，确保包括被鉴权拒绝的请求也会被记录。
733	    app.add_middleware(RequestLogMiddleware)
734	
735	    # 生产模式：挂载前端静态文件（必须在所有 API 路由之后）
736	    if os.environ.get("MAXMA_ENV") == "production":
737	        from app_paths import WEB_DIST_DIR as dist_dir
738	        if dist_dir.exists():
739	            from fastapi.responses import FileResponse
740	
741	            # 挂载静态资源目录
742	            app.mount("/assets", StaticFiles(directory=dist_dir / "assets"), name="assets")
743	            if (dist_dir / "fonts").exists():
744	                app.mount("/fonts", StaticFiles(directory=dist_dir / "fonts"), name="fonts")
745	            if (dist_dir / "images").exists():
746	                app.mount("/images", StaticFiles(directory=dist_dir / "images"), name="images")
747	
748	            # SPA 路由回退：所有非 API、非静态资源路径返回 index.html
749	            @app.get("/{path:path}")
750	            async def spa_fallback(path: str):
751	                index_path = dist_dir / "index.html"
752	                if index_path.exists():
753	                    return FileResponse(index_path)
754	                return {"detail": "Not Found"}
755	
756	            # 根路径也返回 index.html
757	            @app.get("/")
758	            async def root_fallback():
759	                index_path = dist_dir / "index.html"
760	                if index_path.exists():
761	                    return FileResponse(index_path)
762	                return {"detail": "Not Found"}
763	
764	            logger.info("[static] 已挂载前端静态文件: %s", dist_dir)
765	        else:
766	            logger.warning("[static] web/dist 目录不存在，跳过前端挂载: %s", dist_dir)
767	
768	    return app
769	
```

```json
1	/**
2	 * session-bridge.ts — JSON-RPC server wrapping createAgentSession.
3	 *
4	 * RPC Methods:
5	 *   create_session({ model, system_prompt?, cwd? }) → { session_id }
6	 *   prompt({ session_id, message })               → { ok: true }
7	 *   cancel({ session_id })                         → { ok: true }
8	 *   destroy_session({ session_id })                → { ok: true }
9	 *   undo({ session_id, steps? })                   → { removed }
10	 *   get_messages({ session_id, limit? })           → { messages, total }
11	 *
12	 * Events are forwarded as JSON-RPC notifications (method: "event").
13	 */
14	
15	import { createInterface } from "node:readline";
16	import { randomUUID } from "node:crypto";
17	import { createAgentSession } from "@oh-my-pi/pi-coding-agent";
18	import { getBundledModel } from "@oh-my-pi/pi-catalog/models";
19	import type { Model } from "@oh-my-pi/pi-ai";
20	import type { AgentSession } from "@oh-my-pi/pi-coding-agent";
21	import { registerCustomTools } from "./tools/index";
22	
23	// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
24	// Types
25	// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
26	
27	interface SessionRecord {
28	  session: AgentSession;
29	  unsubscribe: () => void;
30	  promptQueue: Promise<void>;  // serializes concurrent prompt calls
31	}
32	
33	// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
34	// State
35	// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
36	
37	const sessions = new Map<string, SessionRecord>();
38	const rl = createInterface({ input: process.stdin });
39	
40	// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
41	// JSON-RPC helpers
42	// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
43	
44	function send(id: number | null, result: unknown) {
45	  process.stdout.write(JSON.stringify({ jsonrpc: "2.0", id, result }) + "\n");
46	}
47	
48	function sendError(id: number | null, message: string) {
49	  process.stdout.write(
50	    JSON.stringify({ jsonrpc: "2.0", id, error: { message } }) + "\n",
51	  );
52	}
53	
54	function sendEvent(sessionId: string, event: Record<string, unknown>) {
55	  process.stdout.write(
56	    JSON.stringify({
57	      jsonrpc: "2.0",
58	      method: "event",
59	      params: { session_id: sessionId, event },
60	    }) + "\n",
61	  );
62	}
63	
64	// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
65	// Model resolution
66	// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
67	
68	/**
69	 * Parse a model string like "openai/gpt-4o" into a proper Model object.
70	 *
71	 * Strategy:
72	 *   A — Try `getBundledModel(provider, modelId)` from the bundled catalog.
73	 *   B — Fall back to constructing a minimal Model object manually.
74	 */
75	function parseModel(modelStr: string): Model {
76	  const slashIdx = modelStr.indexOf("/");
77	  const provider = slashIdx >= 0 ? modelStr.slice(0, slashIdx) : "";
78	  const modelId = slashIdx >= 0 ? modelStr.slice(slashIdx + 1) : modelStr;
79	
80	  // Option A: bundled catalog lookup
81	  if (provider) {
82	    try {
83	      const bundled = getBundledModel(provider as any, modelId);
84	      if (bundled) return bundled;
85	    } catch {
86	      // Fall through to manual construction
87	    }
88	  }
89	
90	  // Option B: manual fallback (minimal Model object from env vars)
91	  const baseUrl =
92	    process.env.OPENAI_BASE_URL ?? "https://api.openai.com/v1";
93	  return {
94	    id: modelId,
95	    name: modelId,
96	    api: "openai-completions" as const,
97	    provider,
98	    baseUrl,
99	    reasoning: false,
100	    input: ["text"] as ("text" | "image")[],
101	    cost: { input: 0, output: 0, cacheRead: 0, cacheWrite: 0 },
102	    contextWindow: 128000,
103	    maxTokens: 4096,
104	    compat: {
105	      supportsDeveloperRole: true,
106	      supportsStrictMode: false,
107	      supportsReasoningEffort: false,
108	      reasoningEffortMap: {},
109	      supportsReasoningParams: false,
110	      thinkingFormat: "disabled" as const,
111	      reasoningDisableMode: "off" as const,
112	      omitReasoningEffort: false,
113	      includeEncryptedReasoning: false,
114	      filterReasoningHistory: false,
115	      disableReasoningOnForcedToolChoice: false,
116	      disableReasoningOnToolChoice: false,
117	      supportsToolChoice: true,
118	      supportsForcedToolChoice: true,
119	      supportsNamedToolChoice: true,
120	      reasoningContentField: undefined,
121	      requiresReasoningContentForToolCalls: false,
122	      requiresReasoningContentForAllAssistantTurns: false,
123	      allowsSyntheticReasoningContentForToolCalls: false,
124	      replayReasoningContent: false,
125	      qwenPreserveThinking: false,
126	      requiresThinkingAsText: false,
127	      requiresMistralToolIds: false,
128	      requiresToolResultName: false,
129	      requiresAssistantAfterToolResult: false,
130	      requiresAssistantContentForToolCalls: false,
131	      stripDeepseekSpecialTokens: false,
132	      streamMarkupHealingPattern: undefined,
133	      reasoningDeltasMayBeCumulative: false,
134	      emptyLengthFinishIsContextError: false,
135	      usesOpenAIToolCallIdLimit: false,
136	      promptCacheSessionHeader: undefined,
137	      isOpenRouterHost: false,
138	      alwaysSendMaxTokens: true,
139	      enableGeminiThinkingLoopGuard: undefined,
140	      openRouterRouting: undefined,
141	      wireModelIdMode: "raw" as const,
142	      supportsStore: false,
143	      supportsMultipleSystemMessages: true,
144	      maxTokensField: "max_tokens" as const,
145	      supportsUsageInStreaming: true,
146	      cacheControlFormat: undefined,
147	      supportsLongPromptCacheRetention: false,
148	      supportsImageDetailOriginal: false,
149	      strictResponsesPairing: false,
150	      toolStrictMode: "none" as const,
151	      streamIdleTimeoutMs: undefined,
152	      vercelGatewayRouting: undefined,
153	      extraBody: undefined,
154	    },
155	  } as Model;
156	}
157	
158	// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
159	// Pi event → Maxma event mapping
160	// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
161	
162	function mapPiEventToMaxma(
163	  piEvent: Record<string, unknown>,
164	): Record<string, unknown> | null {
165	  // Handle AgentEvent types directly
166	  const type = piEvent.type as string;
167	
168	  if (type === "message_update") {
169	    const assistantEvent = (piEvent as any).assistantMessageEvent;
170	    if (!assistantEvent) return null;
171	
172	    const aeType = assistantEvent.type as string;
173	
174	    if (aeType === "text_delta") {
175	      return {
176	        type: "token",
177	        payload: { token: assistantEvent.delta ?? "" },
178	      };
179	    }
180	
181	    // NOTE: toolcall_start/toolcall_end from message_update are pre-execution
182	    // events (LLM deciding to call a tool). The actual execution data comes
183	    // from tool_execution_start/tool_execution_end below, which carry full
184	    // toolName and result data. Skip early message_update tool events to avoid
185	    // duplicate/empty-named events.
186	
187	    if (aeType === "error") {
188	      const errMsg =
189	        (assistantEvent as any).error?.content?.[0]?.text ??
190	        "Unknown agent error";
191	      return {
192	        type: "error",
193	        payload: { code: "AGENT_ERROR", message: errMsg },
194	      };
195	    }
196	
197	    return null;
198	  }
199	
200	  if (type === "tool_execution_start") {
201	    const e = piEvent as any;
202	    return {
203	      type: "tool_start",
204	      payload: {
205	        tool_name: e.toolName ?? "",
206	        input: JSON.stringify(e.args ?? {}),
207	      },
208	    };
209	  }
210	
211	  if (type === "tool_execution_end") {
212	    const e = piEvent as any;
213	    const isError = e.isError === true;
214	    if (isError) {
215	      return {
216	        type: "tool_error",
217	        payload: {
218	          tool_name: e.toolName ?? "",
219	          error: JSON.stringify(e.result ?? {}),
220	          elapsed: 0,
221	        },
222	      };
223	    }
224	    return {
225	      type: "tool_end",
226	      payload: {
227	        tool_name: e.toolName ?? "",
228	        output: JSON.stringify(e.result ?? {}),
229	        elapsed: 0,
230	      },
231	    };
232	  }
233	
234	  if (type === "message_end") {
235	    const msg = (piEvent as any).message;
236	    let content = "";
237	    if (msg?.content) {
238	      if (typeof msg.content === "string") {
239	        content = msg.content;
240	      } else if (Array.isArray(msg.content)) {
241	        content = msg.content
242	          .map((b: any) => (b?.type === "text" ? b.text : ""))
243	          .join("");
244	      }
245	    }
246	    return {
247	      type: "answer",
248	      payload: { content },
249	    };
250	  }
251	
252	  if (type === "agent_end") {
253	    return { type: "done", payload: {} };
254	  }
255	
256	  return null;
257	}
258	
259	// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
260	// Main event subscriber
261	// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
262	
263	function subscribeSession(
264	  sessionId: string,
265	  session: AgentSession,
266	): () => void {
267	  return session.subscribe((event: any) => {
268	    const mapped = mapPiEventToMaxma(event as Record<string, unknown>);
269	    if (mapped) {
270	      sendEvent(sessionId, mapped);
271	    }
272	  });
273	}
274	
275	// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
276	// RPC handler
277	// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
278	
279	rl.on("line", async (line: string) => {
280	  let req: any;
281	  try {
282	    req = JSON.parse(line);
283	  } catch {
284	    sendError(null, "Parse error");
285	    return;
286	  }
287	
288	  const { method, params, id } = req;
289	
290	  try {
291	    if (method === "create_session") {
292	      const modelStr: string = params?.model ?? "openai/gpt-4o";
293	      const model = parseModel(modelStr);
294	      const cwd: string = params?.cwd ?? process.cwd();
295	      const systemPrompt: string | undefined = params?.system_prompt;
296	      const tools: string[] | undefined = params?.tools as string[] | undefined;
297	      
298	      const createOptions: Record<string, unknown> = {
299	        model,
300	        cwd,
301	      };
302	      if (systemPrompt !== undefined) {
303	        createOptions.systemPrompt = systemPrompt;
304	      }
305	      if (tools !== undefined && Array.isArray(tools) && tools.length > 0) {
306	        createOptions.toolNames = tools;
307	      }
308	
309	      // Register custom Maxma tools
310	      const customTools = registerCustomTools();
311	      if (customTools.length > 0) {
312	        createOptions.customTools = customTools;
313	      }
314	
315	      const { session } = await createAgentSession(createOptions as any);
316	      const sessionId = randomUUID();
317	
318	      const unsubscribe = subscribeSession(sessionId, session);
319	      sessions.set(sessionId, { session, unsubscribe, promptQueue: Promise.resolve() });
320	
321	      send(id, { session_id: sessionId });
322	      return;
323	    }
324	
325	    if (method === "prompt") {
326	      const sessionId: string = params?.session_id;
327	      const message: string = params?.message ?? "";
328	      const record = sessions.get(sessionId);
329	      if (!record) {
330	        sendError(id, `Session not found: ${sessionId}`);
331	        return;
332	      }
333	
334	      // Serialize: chain onto the previous prompt so they run sequentially.
335	      // A failed prompt does not block the next one (.catch resets the chain).
336	      record.promptQueue = record.promptQueue
337	        .catch(() => {})
338	        .then(() => record.session.prompt(message).catch((err: unknown) => {
339	          sendEvent(sessionId, {
340	            type: "error",
341	            payload: { code: "PROMPT_ERROR", message: String(err) },
342	          });
343	          // BUG3 fix: always send done after error so Python doesn't hang
344	          sendEvent(sessionId, { type: "done", payload: {} });
345	        }));
346	
347	      send(id, { ok: true });
348	      return;
349	    }
350	
351	    if (method === "cancel") {
352	      const sessionId: string = params?.session_id;
353	      const record = sessions.get(sessionId);
354	      if (!record) {
355	        sendError(id, `Session not found: ${sessionId}`);
356	        return;
357	      }
358	
359	      record.session.agent.abort("Cancelled by user");
360	      // BUG4 fix: send done event so Python's turn_done.wait() unblocks
361	      sendEvent(sessionId, { type: "done", payload: {} });
362	
363	      send(id, { ok: true });
364	      return;
365	    }
366	
367	    if (method === "destroy_session") {
368	      const sessionId: string = params?.session_id;
369	      const record = sessions.get(sessionId);
370	      if (!record) {
371	        sendError(id, `Session not found: ${sessionId}`);
372	        return;
373	      }
374	
375	      record.unsubscribe();
376	      await record.session.dispose();
377	      sessions.delete(sessionId);
378	
379	      send(id, { ok: true });
380	      return;
381	    }
382	
383	    if (method === "undo") {
384	      const sessionId: string = params?.session_id as string;
385	      const steps: number = (params?.steps as number) ?? 1;
386	      const record = sessions.get(sessionId);
387	      if (!record) {
388	        sendError(id, `Session not found: ${sessionId}`);
389	        return;
390	      }
391	
392	      // Truncate the last N assistant+user message pairs (copy-first to avoid mutating internal state)
393	      const originalLen = record.session.state.messages.length;
394	      const keepCount = Math.max(0, originalLen - steps * 2);
395	      const remaining = record.session.state.messages.slice(0, keepCount);
396	      const removed = originalLen - keepCount;
397	      record.session.replace_messages(remaining);
398	      send(id, { removed });
399	      return;
400	    }
401	
402	    if (method === "get_messages") {
403	      const sessionId: string = params?.session_id as string;
404	      const limit: number = (params?.limit as number) ?? 50;
405	      const record = sessions.get(sessionId);
406	      if (!record) {
407	        sendError(id, `Session not found: ${sessionId}`);
408	        return;
409	      }
410	
411	      const messages = record.session.state.messages;
412	      const total = messages.length;
413	      const sliced = messages.slice(-limit);
414	      const result = sliced.map((m: any) => {
415	        let content = "";
416	        if (typeof m.content === "string") {
417	          content = m.content;
418	        } else if (Array.isArray(m.content)) {
419	          content = m.content
420	            .filter((b: any) => b?.type === "text")
421	            .map((b: any) => b.text ?? "")
422	            .join("");
423	        }
424	        return { role: m.role ?? "unknown", content };
425	      });
426	      send(id, { messages: result, total });
427	      return;
428	    }
429	
430	    sendError(id, `Unknown method: ${method}`);
431	  } catch (err) {
432	    sendError(id, String(err));
433	  }
434	});
435	
436	// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
437	// Graceful shutdown
438	// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
439	
440	async function shutdown() {
441	  for (const [sid, record] of sessions) {
442	    try {
443	      record.unsubscribe();
444	      await record.session.dispose();
445	    } catch {
446	      // best-effort cleanup
447	    }
448	  }
449	  sessions.clear();
450	  rl.close();
451	  process.exit(0);
452	}
453	
454	process.on("SIGTERM", shutdown);
455	process.on("SIGINT", shutdown);
456	
```

```json
1	"""Production-grade SidecarManager for Bun subprocess lifecycle.
2	
3	Manages start/stop/restart of the Bun sidecar process (session-bridge.ts).
4	Designed to be consumed by JsonRpcClient (Task 1.3) which will use the
5	stdin/stdout streams for JSON-RPC communication.
6	
7	Thread-safe: all public mutation methods use asyncio.Lock.
8	"""
9	
10	from __future__ import annotations
11	
12	import asyncio
13	import logging
14	import sys
15	from pathlib import Path
16	
17	# Ensure project root is on sys.path for imports when run as a script
18	_project_root = Path(__file__).resolve().parent.parent.parent
19	if str(_project_root) not in sys.path:
20	    sys.path.insert(0, str(_project_root))
21	
22	from api.pi_bridge.rpc_client import JsonRpcClient
23	
24	logger = logging.getLogger(__name__)
25	
26	# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
27	# Constants
28	# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
29	
30	SIDECAR_DIR = Path(__file__).resolve().parent.parent.parent / "bun-sidecar"
31	SIDECAR_ENTRY = SIDECAR_DIR / "src" / "session-bridge.ts"
32	# 当 settings 未初始化时的默认值
33	_DEFAULT_BUN_PATH = "D:/NodeGlobal/node_modules/bun/bin/bun.exe"
34	
35	
36	def _resolve_bun_path() -> str:
37	    """从配置读取 Bun 路径，fallback 到默认值。
38	
39	    生产模式（PyInstaller _MEIPASS）：查找捆绑的 bun.exe。
40	    开发模式：使用配置文件或默认路径。
41	    """
42	    # 生产模式：PyInstaller 打包后 bun.exe 在 _MEIPASS 目录
43	    meipass = getattr(sys, "_MEIPASS", None)
44	    if meipass:
45	        bundled_bun = Path(meipass) / "bun-sidecar" / "bun.exe"
46	        if bundled_bun.exists():
47	            return str(bundled_bun)
48	    try:
49	        from config.settings import get_settings
50	        s = get_settings()
51	        return s.sidecar_bun_path or _DEFAULT_BUN_PATH
52	    except Exception:
53	        return _DEFAULT_BUN_PATH
54	
55	
56	# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
57	# SidecarManager
58	# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
59	
60	class SidecarManager:
61	    """Manages the lifecycle of the Bun sidecar subprocess.
62	
63	    Provides properties for accessing the process's stdin/stdout streams
64	    so that a separate JsonRpcClient can perform JSON-RPC communication.
65	    """
66	
67	    def __init__(self) -> None:
68	        self._process: asyncio.subprocess.Process | None = None
69	        self._lock = asyncio.Lock()
70	        self._stderr_task: asyncio.Task[None] | None = None
71	        self._client: JsonRpcClient | None = None
72	
73	    # -- Properties ---------------------------------------------------------
74	
75	    @property
76	    def is_running(self) -> bool:
77	        """True if the subprocess is started and still alive."""
78	        return (
79	            self._process is not None
80	            and self._process.returncode is None
81	        )
82	
83	    @property
84	    def stdin(self) -> asyncio.StreamWriter | None:
85	        """The process's stdin stream, or None if not running."""
86	        return self._process.stdin if self._process else None
87	
88	    @property
89	    def stdout(self) -> asyncio.StreamReader | None:
90	        """The process's stdout stream, or None if not running."""
91	        return self._process.stdout if self._process else None
92	
93	    @property
94	    def client(self) -> JsonRpcClient | None:
95	        """The JSON-RPC client for this sidecar, or None if not started."""
96	        return self._client
97	
98	    # -- Public API ---------------------------------------------------------
99	
100	    async def start(self) -> None:
101	        """Start the Bun sidecar subprocess.
102	
103	        If already running, this is a no-op.
104	        After starting, stderr is forwarded to the Python logger in a
105	        background task, and a short sleep allows the process to initialise.
106	        """
107	        async with self._lock:
108	            if self.is_running:
109	                logger.debug("Sidecar already running, skipping start")
110	                return
111	
112	            bun_path = _resolve_bun_path()
113	            logger.info(
114	                "Starting sidecar: %s run %s", bun_path, SIDECAR_ENTRY
115	            )
116	            self._process = await asyncio.create_subprocess_exec(
117	                bun_path,
118	                "run",
119	                str(SIDECAR_ENTRY),
120	                stdin=asyncio.subprocess.PIPE,
121	                stdout=asyncio.subprocess.PIPE,
122	                stderr=asyncio.subprocess.PIPE,
123	                cwd=str(SIDECAR_DIR),
124	            )
125	            logger.info(
126	                "Sidecar started (pid=%s)", self._process.pid
127	            )
128	
129	            # Forward stderr in the background
130	            self._stderr_task = asyncio.create_task(
131	                self._forward_stderr()
132	            )
133	
134	            # Create and start the JSON-RPC client
135	            assert self._process.stdin is not None
136	            assert self._process.stdout is not None
137	            self._client = JsonRpcClient(
138	                self._process.stdin, self._process.stdout
139	            )
140	            await self._client.start_reading()
141	
142	            # Brief wait for the process to initialise
143	            await asyncio.sleep(0.5)
144	
145	    async def stop(self) -> None:
146	        """Stop the sidecar subprocess gracefully.
147	
148	        Strategy (Windows-aware):
149	          0. Stop the JSON-RPC client first.
150	          1. Send terminate (WM_CLOSE on Windows, SIGTERM on Unix).
151	          2. Wait up to 5 seconds for clean exit.
152	          3. On timeout, force-kill (TerminateProcess / SIGKILL).
153	          4. Ignore ProcessLookupError (already exited).
154	        """
155	        async with self._lock:
156	            # Stop the JSON-RPC client first (inside lock)
157	            if self._client is not None:
158	                await self._client.stop()
159	                self._client = None
160	
161	            if not self.is_running:
162	                logger.debug("Sidecar not running, skipping stop")
163	                return
164	
165	            proc = self._process
166	            self._process = None  # Prevent re-use during cleanup
167	
168	            # Cancel stderr forwarding task
169	            if self._stderr_task is not None and not self._stderr_task.done():
170	                self._stderr_task.cancel()
171	                try:
172	                    await self._stderr_task
173	                except asyncio.CancelledError:
174	                    pass
175	            self._stderr_task = None
176	
177	        # Process termination outside lock (I/O bound, no shared state)
178	        assert proc is not None
179	        try:
180	            proc.terminate()  # SIGTERM on Unix, WM_CLOSE on Windows
181	            await asyncio.wait_for(proc.wait(), timeout=5)
182	            logger.info("Sidecar (pid=%s) stopped gracefully", proc.pid)
183	        except asyncio.TimeoutError:
184	            logger.warning(
185	                "Sidecar (pid=%s) did not exit in 5s, killing", proc.pid
186	            )
187	            proc.kill()  # TerminateProcess on Windows, SIGKILL on Unix
188	            await proc.wait()
189	            logger.info("Sidecar (pid=%s) killed", proc.pid)
190	        except ProcessLookupError:
191	            logger.debug(
192	                "Sidecar (pid=%s) already exited", proc.pid
193	            )
194	
195	    async def restart(self) -> None:
196	        """Restart the sidecar subprocess (stop then start)."""
197	        logger.info("Restarting sidecar")
198	        await self.stop()
199	        await self.start()
200	
201	    # -- Internal helpers ---------------------------------------------------
202	
203	    async def _forward_stderr(self) -> None:
204	        """Read stderr lines from the process and forward them to the logger."""
205	        try:
206	            assert self._process is not None
207	            assert self._process.stderr is not None
208	            async for line in self._process.stderr:
209	                text = line.decode("utf-8", errors="replace").rstrip()
210	                if text:
211	                    logger.debug("[sidecar] %s", text)
212	        except Exception:
213	            logger.exception("Error forwarding sidecar stderr")
214	
215	
216	# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
217	# Self-test
218	# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
219	
220	async def _test() -> None:
221	    """Quick integration test: start, verify running, stop, verify stopped."""
222	    logging.basicConfig(
223	        level=logging.DEBUG,
224	        format="%(asctime)s [%(levelname)s] %(name)s: %(message)s",
225	    )
226	
227	    mgr = SidecarManager()
228	
229	    # Start
230	    await mgr.start()
231	    assert mgr.is_running, "Expected sidecar to be running after start()"
232	    assert mgr.stdin is not None, "Expected stdin to be available"
233	    assert mgr.stdout is not None, "Expected stdout to be available"
234	    print(f"[PASS] Sidecar started (pid={mgr._process.pid})")
235	
236	    # Stop
237	    await mgr.stop()
238	    assert not mgr.is_running, "Expected sidecar to be stopped after stop()"
239	    print("[PASS] Sidecar stopped")
240	
241	
242	if __name__ == "__main__":
243	    asyncio.run(_test())
244	
```

#### Tool: Read

> Read: `D:\Maxma\MaxmaHere\api\pi_bridge\session_adapter.py`

**Output:**

```json
1	"""Maxma session ↔ oh-my-pi sidecar session 映射持久化。
2	
3	在 SQLite 中维护 Maxma session_id 到 sidecar session_id 的双向映射，
4	同时保存最近对话轮次，确保 sidecar 重启后上下文可恢复。
5	"""
6	
7	from __future__ import annotations
8	
9	import json
10	import sqlite3
11	import threading
12	from pathlib import Path
13	from typing import Any
14	
15	# SQLite 数据库路径
16	SESSION_MAP_DIR = Path.home() / ".maxma"
17	SESSION_MAP_DB = SESSION_MAP_DIR / "session_map.db"
18	# 保存的最大对话轮次数
19	MAX_TURNS = 20
20	
21	
22	class SessionMap:
23	    """Maxma ↔ sidecar session ID 映射表。
24	    
25	    线程安全（SQLite connection 是线程安全的，但 WAL 模式下并发写需序列化）。
26	    """
27	    
28	    def __init__(self, db_path: str | Path = SESSION_MAP_DB) -> None:
29	        self._db_path = str(db_path)
30	        self._lock = threading.Lock()
31	        # 确保父目录存在
32	        Path(self._db_path).parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
33	        self._conn = sqlite3.connect(self._db_path, timeout=5)
34	        self._conn.execute("PRAGMA journal_mode=WAL")
35	        # Main table
36	        self._conn.execute("""
37	            CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS session_map (
38	                maxma_id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
39	                sidecar_id TEXT NOT NULL,
40	                is_const INTEGER DEFAULT 0,
41	                turns TEXT DEFAULT '[]',
42	                created_at TEXT DEFAULT (datetime('now')),
43	                updated_at TEXT DEFAULT (datetime('now'))
44	            )
45	        """)
46	        # Migration: add columns if missing
47	        for col_sql in [
48	            "ALTER TABLE session_map ADD COLUMN is_const INTEGER DEFAULT 0",
49	            "ALTER TABLE session_map ADD COLUMN turns TEXT DEFAULT '[]'",
50	        ]:
51	            try:
52	                self._conn.execute(col_sql)
53	            except sqlite3.OperationalError:
54	                pass  # Column already exists
55	        self._conn.commit()
56	
57	    def __enter__(self) -> SessionMap:
58	        return self
59	
60	    def __exit__(self, *args: object) -> None:
61	        self.close()
62	    
63	    def get_sidecar_id(self, maxma_id: str) -> str | None:
64	        """根据 Maxma session ID 查找对应的 sidecar session ID。"""
65	        with self._lock:
66	            row = self._conn.execute(
67	                "SELECT sidecar_id FROM session_map WHERE maxma_id = ?",
68	                (maxma_id,),
69	            ).fetchone()
70	        return row[0] if row else None
71	    
72	    def get_maxma_id(self, sidecar_id: str) -> str | None:
73	        """反向查找：根据 sidecar session ID 查找 Maxma session ID。"""
74	        with self._lock:
75	            row = self._conn.execute(
76	                "SELECT maxma_id FROM session_map WHERE sidecar_id = ?",
77	                (sidecar_id,),
78	            ).fetchone()
79	        return row[0] if row else None
80	    
81	    def set_mapping(self, maxma_id: str, sidecar_id: str) -> None:
82	        """建立或更新映射（保留首次创建时间）。"""
83	        with self._lock:
84	            self._conn.execute(
85	                "INSERT INTO session_map (maxma_id, sidecar_id) VALUES (?, ?) "
86	                "ON CONFLICT(maxma_id) DO UPDATE SET "
87	                "sidecar_id=excluded.sidecar_id, updated_at=datetime('now')",
88	                (maxma_id, sidecar_id),
89	            )
90	            self._conn.commit()
91	    
92	    def remove(self, maxma_id: str) -> bool:
93	        """删除指定 Maxma session 的映射。"""
94	        with self._lock:
95	            cur = self._conn.execute(
96	                "DELETE FROM session_map WHERE maxma_id = ?", (maxma_id,)
97	            )
98	            self._conn.commit()
99	        return cur.rowcount > 0
100	    
101	    def set_const(self, maxma_id: str, is_const: bool = True) -> None:
102	        """标记一个 Maxma session 是否为 const session。"""
103	        with self._lock:
104	            self._conn.execute(
105	                "UPDATE session_map SET is_const = ?, updated_at = datetime('now') WHERE maxma_id = ?",
106	                (1 if is_const else 0, maxma_id),
107	            )
108	            self._conn.commit()
109	
110	    def get_const(self, maxma_id: str) -> bool:
111	        """检查一个 Maxma session 是否为 const session。"""
112	        with self._lock:
113	            row = self._conn.execute(
114	                "SELECT is_const FROM session_map WHERE maxma_id = ?",
115	                (maxma_id,),
116	            ).fetchone()
117	        return bool(row[0]) if row else False
118	
119	    def append_turn(self, maxma_id: str, user_message: str, assistant_message: str) -> None:
120	        """保存一轮对话到 session 记录（用于重启后恢复上下文）。
121	
122	        如果 session 映射尚不存在，自动创建一行（sidecar_id 为空占位）。
123	        """
124	        with self._lock:
125	            row = self._conn.execute(
126	                "SELECT turns FROM session_map WHERE maxma_id = ?", (maxma_id,)
127	            ).fetchone()
128	            if row:
129	                turns: list[dict[str, str]] = json.loads(row[0]) if row[0] else []
130	            else:
131	                turns = []
132	            turns.append({
133	                "user": user_message[:500],
134	                "assistant": assistant_message[:1000],
135	            })
136	            # 只保留最近 N 轮
137	            if len(turns) > MAX_TURNS:
138	                turns = turns[-MAX_TURNS:]
139	            self._conn.execute(
140	                "INSERT INTO session_map (maxma_id, sidecar_id, turns) VALUES (?, '', ?) "
141	                "ON CONFLICT(maxma_id) DO UPDATE SET "
142	                "turns=excluded.turns, updated_at=datetime('now')",
143	                (maxma_id, json.dumps(turns, ensure_ascii=False)),
144	            )
145	            self._conn.commit()
146	
147	    def get_recent_turns(self, maxma_id: str, count: int = 5) -> list[dict[str, str]]:
148	        """获取最近 N 轮对话（用于重启后恢复上下文）。"""
149	        with self._lock:
150	            row = self._conn.execute(
151	                "SELECT turns FROM session_map WHERE maxma_id = ?",
152	                (maxma_id,),
153	            ).fetchone()
154	            if row and row[0]:
155	                turns: list[dict[str, str]] = json.loads(row[0])
156	                return turns[-count:]
157	            return []
158	
159	    def list_all(self) -> list[dict[str, str]]:
160	        """列出所有映射（用于调试/管理）。"""
161	        with self._lock:
162	            rows = self._conn.execute(
163	                "SELECT maxma_id, sidecar_id, created_at, updated_at "
164	                "FROM session_map ORDER BY updated_at DESC"
165	            ).fetchall()
166	        return [
167	            {
168	                "maxma_id": r[0],
169	                "sidecar_id": r[1],
170	                "created_at": r[2],
171	                "updated_at": r[3],
172	            }
173	            for r in rows
174	        ]
175	    
176	    @property
177	    def count(self) -> int:
178	        """当前映射数量。"""
179	        with self._lock:
180	            row = self._conn.execute(
181	                "SELECT COUNT(*) FROM session_map"
182	            ).fetchone()
183	        return row[0] if row else 0
184	    
185	    def close(self) -> None:
186	        """关闭数据库连接。"""
187	        self._conn.close()
188	
```

> Read: `D:\Maxma\MaxmaHere\api\pi_bridge\rpc_client.py`

**Output:**

```json
1	"""JSON-RPC 2.0 client for communicating with the Bun sidecar over stdio."""
2	
3	from __future__ import annotations
4	
5	import asyncio
6	import json
7	import logging
8	from collections.abc import Callable
9	from typing import Any
10	
11	logger = logging.getLogger(__name__)
12	
13	
14	class JsonRpcError(Exception):
15	    """Raised when the sidecar returns a JSON-RPC error response."""
16	
17	    def __init__(self, message: str, data: Any = None) -> None:
18	        super().__init__(message)
19	        self.data = data
20	
21	
22	class JsonRpcClient:
23	    """JSON-RPC 2.0 client over stdio.
24	
25	    Reads/writes JSON lines from/to a subprocess's stdin/stdout.
26	    Supports:
27	    - Request/response with call()
28	    - Server-pushed event notifications with on()
29	    - Automatic cleanup on stop()
30	    """
31	
32	    def __init__(
33	        self, stdin: asyncio.StreamWriter, stdout: asyncio.StreamReader
34	    ) -> None:
35	        self._stdin = stdin
36	        self._stdout = stdout
37	        self._msg_id = 0
38	        self._pending: dict[int, asyncio.Future[dict]] = {}
39	        self._handlers: dict[str, list[Callable]] = {}
40	        self._running = False
41	        self._read_task: asyncio.Task[None] | None = None
42	
43	    # -- Public API ---------------------------------------------------------
44	
45	    async def start_reading(self) -> None:
46	        """Start the background task that reads stdout and dispatches messages."""
47	        if self._running:
48	            return
49	        self._running = True
50	        self._read_task = asyncio.create_task(self._read_loop())
51	
52	    async def call(
53	        self, method: str, params: dict | None = None, *, timeout: float = 120
54	    ) -> dict:
55	        """Send a JSON-RPC request and wait for the response.
56	
57	        Args:
58	            method: The RPC method name.
59	            params: Optional parameters dict.
60	            timeout: Maximum seconds to wait for a response (default 120).
61	
62	        Returns:
63	            The result dict from the response.
64	
65	        Raises:
66	            JsonRpcError: if the sidecar returns an error response.
67	            TimeoutError: if no response within *timeout* seconds.
68	            RuntimeError: if the client is not running.
69	        """
70	        if not self._running:
71	            raise RuntimeError("JsonRpcClient is not running")
72	
73	        self._msg_id += 1
74	        msg_id = self._msg_id
75	
76	        req: dict[str, Any] = {
77	            "jsonrpc": "2.0",
78	            "method": method,
79	            "id": msg_id,
80	        }
81	        if params is not None:
82	            req["params"] = params
83	
84	        future: asyncio.Future[dict] = asyncio.get_running_loop().create_future()
85	        self._pending[msg_id] = future
86	
87	        try:
88	            line = json.dumps(req, ensure_ascii=False) + "\n"
89	            self._stdin.write(line.encode("utf-8"))
90	            await self._stdin.drain()
91	            return await asyncio.wait_for(future, timeout=timeout)
92	        except asyncio.TimeoutError:
93	            self._pending.pop(msg_id, None)
94	            raise TimeoutError(
95	                f"RPC call '{method}' timed out after {timeout}s"
96	            )
97	
98	    def on(self, event_type: str, handler: Callable) -> Callable[[], None]:
99	        """Register an event handler.
100	
101	        The handler receives ``(session_id: str, event: dict)``.
102	
103	        Returns a callable that unsubscribes the handler when invoked.
104	        """
105	        if event_type not in self._handlers:
106	            self._handlers[event_type] = []
107	        self._handlers[event_type].append(handler)
108	
109	        def _unsubscribe() -> None:
110	            try:
111	                self._handlers[event_type].remove(handler)
112	            except ValueError:
113	                pass
114	
115	        return _unsubscribe
116	
117	    async def stop(self) -> None:
118	        """Stop the read loop and cancel pending futures."""
119	        self._running = False
120	        if self._read_task is not None and not self._read_task.done():
121	            self._read_task.cancel()
122	            try:
123	                await self._read_task
124	            except asyncio.CancelledError:
125	                pass
126	            self._read_task = None
127	        # Cancel remaining pending futures
128	        for fut in self._pending.values():
129	            if not fut.done():
130	                fut.set_exception(RuntimeError("Client stopped"))
131	        self._pending.clear()
132	
133	    @property
134	    def is_running(self) -> bool:
135	        """True if the read loop is active."""
136	        return self._running
137	
138	    # -- Internal -----------------------------------------------------------
139	
140	    async def _read_loop(self) -> None:
141	        """Continuously read JSON lines from stdout and dispatch them."""
142	        try:
143	            while self._running:
144	                line = await self._stdout.readline()
145	                if not line:
146	                    break  # EOF: process died
147	                line_str = line.decode("utf-8").strip()
148	                if not line_str:
149	                    continue
150	                try:
151	                    msg = json.loads(line_str)
152	                    await self._dispatch(msg)
153	                except json.JSONDecodeError:
154	                    logger.warning(
155	                        "[rpc] invalid JSON from sidecar: %s", line_str[:200]
156	                    )
157	        except Exception:
158	            if self._running:
159	                logger.exception("[rpc] read loop crashed")
160	        finally:
161	            self._running = False
162	            # Cancel all pending futures
163	            for fut in self._pending.values():
164	                if not fut.done():
165	                    fut.set_exception(RuntimeError("Sidecar disconnected"))
166	            self._pending.clear()
167	
168	    async def _dispatch(self, msg: dict) -> None:
169	        """Dispatch an incoming message: event notification or RPC response."""
170	        # Event notification (server-pushed, no id)
171	        if msg.get("method") == "event":
172	            params = msg.get("params", {})
173	            event = params.get("event", {})
174	            event_type: str = ""
175	            if isinstance(event, dict):
176	                event_type = event.get("type", "")
177	            handlers = self._handlers.get(event_type, [])
178	            session_id = params.get("session_id", "")
179	            for handler in handlers:
180	                try:
181	                    if asyncio.iscoroutinefunction(handler):
182	                        await handler(session_id, event)
183	                    else:
184	                        handler(session_id, event)
185	                except Exception:
186	                    logger.exception(
187	                        "[rpc] event handler error: type=%s", event_type
188	                    )
189	            return
190	
191	        # RPC response (has id)
192	        msg_id = msg.get("id")
193	        if msg_id is not None and msg_id in self._pending:
194	            fut = self._pending.pop(msg_id)
195	            if "error" in msg:
196	                error = msg["error"]
197	                fut.set_exception(
198	                    JsonRpcError(
199	                        error.get("message", "RPC error"),
200	                        error.get("data"),
201	                    )
202	                )
203	            else:
204	                fut.set_result(msg.get("result", {}))
205	
```

#### Tool: Read

> Read: `D:\Maxma\MaxmaHere\api\pi_bridge\ws_event_mapper.py`

**Output:**

```json
1	"""WS Event Mapper — validates and enriches sidecar events for Maxma WS protocol.
2	
3	The TS sidecar (session-bridge.ts) already maps Pi events to Maxma WS format.
4	This module only:
5	1. Validates that events match the known schema
6	2. Enriches events with additional context (turn_id, etc.)
7	3. Documents the full event types for the bridge protocol
8	"""
9	
10	from collections.abc import Mapping
11	from typing import Any
12	
13	# ── Known Event Types ────────────────────────────────────
14	# These match both the TS sidecar output and the Maxma frontend WS protocol.
15	
16	EVENT_TYPES = frozenset({
17	    "thinking_start",
18	    "token",
19	    "thinking_end",
20	    "tool_start",
21	    "tool_end",
22	    "tool_error",
23	    "answer",
24	    "done",
25	    "error",
26	    "context_usage",
27	})
28	
29	# ── Event Schema Check ───────────────────────────────────
30	
31	def validate_event(event: Mapping[str, Any]) -> bool:
32	    """Check that an event has the minimum required structure.
33	
34	    Returns False if the event is malformed, True otherwise.
35	    Does NOT raise exceptions — just logs warnings.
36	    """
37	    import logging
38	    logger = logging.getLogger(__name__)
39	
40	    if not isinstance(event, Mapping):
41	        logger.warning("Event is not a dict: %r", type(event))
42	        return False
43	
44	    event_type = event.get("type")
45	    if not isinstance(event_type, str) or event_type not in EVENT_TYPES:
46	        logger.warning("Unknown or missing event type: %r", event_type)
47	        return False
48	
49	    payload = event.get("payload")
50	    if not isinstance(payload, Mapping):
51	        logger.warning("Event %r missing payload", event_type)
52	        return False
53	
54	    return True
55	
56	
57	# ── Event Enrichment ─────────────────────────────────────
58	
59	def enrich_event(event: dict[str, Any], *, turn_id: str | None = None) -> dict[str, Any]:
60	    """Add optional context to an event before sending to the frontend.
61	
62	    Args:
63	        event: The event dict (modified in place and returned).
64	        turn_id: Current turn ID to attach to 'done' events.
65	
66	    Returns:
67	        The enriched event dict (same object, modified in place).
68	    """
69	    event_type = event.get("type", "")
70	
71	    if event_type == "done" and turn_id:
72	        if "payload" not in event:
73	            event["payload"] = {}
74	        if isinstance(event["payload"], dict):
75	            event["payload"]["turn_id"] = turn_id
76	
77	    return event
78	
79	
80	# ── Event Creation Helpers ───────────────────────────────
81	
82	def make_done_event(turn_id: str | None = None) -> dict[str, Any]:
83	    """Create a properly formatted 'done' event."""
84	    payload: dict[str, Any] = {}
85	    if turn_id:
86	        payload["turn_id"] = turn_id
87	    return {"type": "done", "payload": payload}
88	
89	
90	def make_error_event(
91	    message: str,
92	    code: str = "AGENT_ERROR",
93	    trace_id: str | None = None,
94	) -> dict[str, Any]:
95	    """Create a properly formatted 'error' event."""
96	    payload: dict[str, Any] = {"code": code, "message": message}
97	    if trace_id:
98	        payload["trace_id"] = trace_id
99	    return {"type": "error", "payload": payload}
100	
101	
102	def make_context_usage_event(usage: dict[str, Any]) -> dict[str, Any]:
103	    """Create a properly formatted 'context_usage' event."""
104	    return {"type": "context_usage", "payload": usage}
105	
```
