```json
42	@dataclass(frozen=True)
43	class ThinkPathExecution:
44	    """Validated, opt-in execution preference for one chat turn.
45	
46	    The browser can only submit a fixed ThinkPath id.  Resolving its role and
47	    selecting a provider happens server-side, so a client cannot smuggle an
48	    arbitrary provider role, model capability, or cost preference into a chat
49	    request.
50	    """
51	
52	    path: ThinkPath | None = None
53	    provider: Any | None = None
54	    model_name: str | None = None
55	
56	
57	def _resolve_think_path_execution(
58	    think_path_id: object,
59	    *,
60	    think_path_enabled: bool,
61	    declarative_model_routing_enabled: bool,
62	    has_explicit_model_selection: bool,
63	    provider_manager: Any | None,
64	    model_roles_path: Path = _MODEL_ROLES_PATH,
65	) -> ThinkPathExecution:
66	    """Resolve a visible ThinkPath without weakening model-selection rules.
67	
68	    A path is ignored unless its feature flag is on.  Explicit provider/model
69	    choices always win, and an unavailable/malformed declarative rule leaves
70	    the normal default route untouched.  This helper performs no I/O besides
71	    reading the local role configuration and never changes provider state.
72	    """
73	    if not think_path_enabled:
74	        return ThinkPathExecution()
75	
76	    path = get_think_path(think_path_id if isinstance(think_path_id, str) else None)
77	    if path is None:
78	        return ThinkPathExecution()
79	
80	    if (
81	        not declarative_model_routing_enabled
82	        or has_explicit_model_selection
83	        or provider_manager is None
84	    ):
85	        return ThinkPathExecution(path=path)
86	
87	    try:
88	        role = resolve_model_role(model_roles_path, path.role)
89	        selected = provider_manager.select_for_role(role)
90	    except Exception:
91	        # Role routing is an optional convenience.  A bad local rule or an
92	        # unexpected provider implementation must never reject the message.
93	        logger.warning("[chat] ThinkPath model routing unavailable", exc_info=True)
94	        return ThinkPathExecution(path=path)
95	
96	    if selected is None:
97	        return ThinkPathExecution(path=path)
98	    provider, model_name = selected
99	    if not isinstance(model_name, str) or not model_name.strip():
100	        return ThinkPathExecution(path=path)
101	    return ThinkPathExecution(path=path, provider=provider, model_name=model_name)
102	
103	
104	def _think_path_runtime_context(path: ThinkPath | None) -> str:
105	    """Return trusted, fixed execution guidance for a selected path only."""
106	    if path is None:
107	        return ""
108	    return (
109	        "[本轮执行偏好（用户已确认）]\n"
110	        f"采用“{path.label}”路径：{path.description}\n"
111	        f"预期深度：{path.depth}；预估成本：{path.estimated_cost}。"
112	    )
113	
114	
115	def _effective_auto_approve(session: SessionState, requested: object) -> bool:
116	    """Prevent a delegated session from exceeding its parent's approval policy."""
117	    context = (
118	        getattr(session, "delegation_context", None)
119	        if getattr(session, "is_subagent", False)
120	        else None
121	    )
122	    if context is None:
123	        return bool(requested)
124	    return bool(requested) and bool(context.auto_approve)
125	
126	
127	def _get_provider_context(app_state) -> tuple[int, str]:
128	    """从 ProviderManager 获取默认 context_window 和 model_name。"""
129	    mgr = getattr(app_state, "provider_manager", None)
130	    if mgr is not None and mgr.count > 0:
131	        for provider in mgr.iter_enabled():
132	            return provider.config.context_window, provider.default_model
133	    return 256_000, ""
134	
135	
136	def _build_runtime_context_for_agent(
137	    app_state, turn_tools, current_model_name: str | None
138	) -> str:
139	    """生成运行时配置摘要，注入到 agent 的 episodic_context。
140	
141	    让 agent 每轮都能"看到"自己的配置全貌（providers/MCP/工具统计），
142	    减少执行路径的不确定性。失败时返回空字符串，不阻塞主流程。
143	    """
144	    try:
145	        from agent.runtime_context import build_runtime_context
146	
147	        provider_manager = getattr(app_state, "provider_manager", None)
148	        native_count = sum(
149	            1
150	            for t in turn_tools
151	            if not t.name.split("_")[0].islower() or "_" not in t.name
152	        )
153	        # 更准确的统计：MCP 工具名通常带 server_id 前缀
154	        from tools import TOOL_CATEGORIES
155	
156	        all_native_names: set[str] = set()
157	        for names in TOOL_CATEGORIES.values():
158	            all_native_names.update(names)
159	        native_count = sum(1 for t in turn_tools if t.name in all_native_names)
160	        mcp_count = len(turn_tools) - native_count
161	
162	        return build_runtime_context(
163	            provider_manager=provider_manager,
164	            mcp_tool_count=mcp_count,
165	            native_tool_count=native_count,
166	            current_model_name=current_model_name,
167	        )
168	    except Exception as e:
169	        logger.warning("[chat] 运行时配置摘要生成失败: %s", e)
170	        return ""
171	
172	
173	async def _process_image_refs(user_message: str) -> str:
174	    """从用户消息中提取图片引用，自动描述图片内容并追加到消息末尾。
175	
176	    流程：
177	    1. 解析 __refs__ 块中的 image 类型引用
178	    2. 对每个有 path 的图片调用 GLM-5V-Turbo 生成描述
179	    3. 将描述追加到用户消息文本末尾（在 __refs__ 之前）
180	
181	    Returns:
182	        增强后的用户消息文本
183	    """
184	    import re
185	
186	    # 提取 refs 块
187	    refs_start = user_message.rfind("__refs__")
188	    if refs_start == -1:
189	        return user_message
190	
191	    refs_end = user_message.find("__/refs__", refs_start)
192	    if refs_end == -1:
193	        return user_message
194	
195	    refs_json = user_message[refs_start + len("__refs__") : refs_end]
196	    try:
197	        refs_list = json.loads(refs_json)
198	    except (json.JSONDecodeError, ValueError):
199	        return user_message
200	
201	    # 提取图片引用
202	    image_paths = []
203	    for ref_item in refs_list:
204	        if isinstance(ref_item, dict) and ref_item.get("type") == "image":
205	            path = ref_item.get("path", "")
206	            if path:
207	                image_paths.append((path, ref_item.get("label", "image")))
208	
209	    if not image_paths:
210	        return user_message
211	
212	    # 对每张图片生成描述
213	    descriptions = []
214	    for path, label in image_paths:
215	        try:
216	            desc = await _describe_image(path)
217	            if desc:
218	                descriptions.append(f"[图片 {label}: {desc}]")
219	        except Exception as e:
220	            logger.warning(f"Failed to describe image {path}: {e}")
221	            descriptions.append(f"[图片 {label}: 描述失败 - {str(e)[:80]}]")
222	
223	    if not descriptions:
224	        return user_message
225	
226	    # 将描述插入到 __refs__ 之前
227	    before_refs = user_message[:refs_start].rstrip()
228	    after_refs = user_message[refs_start:]
229	    desc_text = "\n\n" + "\n".join(descriptions)
230	    return before_refs + desc_text + "\n\n" + after_refs
231	
232	
233	def _resolve_local_image_ref(image_ref: str) -> Path:
234	    """将前端图片 ref 解析为已通过路径安全检查的本地路径。"""
235	    path_text = image_ref.strip()
236	    if path_text.startswith(_LOCAL_REF_PREFIX):
237	        path_text = path_text[len(_LOCAL_REF_PREFIX) :].strip()
238	    if not path_text:
239	        raise ValueError("图片路径为空")
240	
241	    file_path = Path(path_text).expanduser().resolve(strict=False)
242	    blocked = check_path_access(str(file_path))
243	    if blocked:
244	        raise PermissionError(blocked)
245	    return file_path
246	
247	
248	async def _describe_image(image_path: str) -> str:
249	    """调用 GLM-5V-Turbo 描述单张图片。"""
250	    import base64
251	    import mimetypes
252	
253	    file_path = _resolve_local_image_ref(image_path)
254	    if not file_path.exists():
255	        raise FileNotFoundError(f"图片文件不存在: {image_path}")
256	
257	    # 读取并编码图片
258	    image_bytes = file_path.read_bytes()
259	    mime = mimetypes.guess_type(str(file_path))[0] or "image/png"
260	    image_b64 = base64.b64encode(image_bytes).decode("utf-8")
261	    data_url = f"data:{mime};base64,{image_b64}"
262	
263	    # 调用 GLM-5V-Turbo
264	    from zai import ZhipuAiClient
265	
266	    settings = get_settings()
267	    if not settings.zhipuai_api_key:
268	        return "(图片描述不可用: 未配置智谱 API Key)"
269	
270	    client = ZhipuAiClient(api_key=settings.zhipuai_api_key)
271	
272	    response = await asyncio.to_thread(
273	        client.chat.completions.create,
274	        model="glm-5v-turbo",
275	        messages=[
276	            {
277	                "role": "user",
278	                "content": [
279	                    {"type": "image_url", "image_url": {"url": data_url}},
280	                    {
281	                        "type": "text",
282	                        "text": "请简洁描述这张图片的主要内容，包括关键元素、场景和文字（如果有）。控制在 100 字以内。",
283	                    },
284	                ],
285	            }
286	        ],
287	        thinking={"type": "enabled"},
288	        stream=False,
289	    )
290	
291	    return response.choices[0].message.content or "(无法描述)"
292	
293	
294	async def _get_messages_from_sidecar(
295	    session: "SessionState",
296	    limit: int = 50,
297	    *,
298	    sidecar_mgr=None,
299	) -> list[dict]:
300	    """从 sidecar 获取消息历史。sidecar 不可用时返回空列表。
301	
302	    通过 SessionMap（SQLite 持久化）查找 sidecar session ID，
303	    然后调用 get_messages RPC 获取消息列表。
304	
305	    Args:
306	        session: 会话状态
307	        limit: 最大消息数
308	        sidecar_mgr: SidecarManager 实例（必须由调用方传入）
309	    """
310	    if sidecar_mgr is None:
311	        sidecar_mgr = getattr(session, "_sidecar_mgr", None)
312	    if sidecar_mgr is None:
313	        return []
314	    await sidecar_mgr.start()
315	    client = sidecar_mgr.client
316	    if client is None:
317	        return []
318	    # 从 SessionMap 获取 sidecar session ID（持久化，重启后仍可用）
319	    from api.pi_bridge.session_adapter import SessionMap
320	    with SessionMap() as sm:
321	        sidecar_sid = sm.get_sidecar_id(session.session_id)
322	    if not sidecar_sid:
323	        sidecar_sid = getattr(session, "_sidecar_session_id", None)
324	    if not sidecar_sid:
325	        return []
326	    try:
327	        result = await client.call("get_messages", {
328	            "session_id": sidecar_sid,
329	            "limit": limit,
330	        })
331	        return result.get("messages", [])
332	    except Exception:
333	        logger.debug("[sidecar] get_messages failed", exc_info=True)
334	        return []
335	
336	
337	async def _get_recent_ai_messages(session, config, limit: int = 5) -> list[str]:
338	    """从 sidecar 获取最近 N 条 AI 消息内容（用于贴纸情感分析）。
339	
340	    sidecar 模式下 config 为 None，改为从 sidecar RPC 获取消息历史。
341	    """
342	    messages = await _get_messages_from_sidecar(session, limit=limit * 3)
343	    ai_msgs = [m.get("content", "") for m in messages if m.get("role") == "assistant"]
344	    return ai_msgs[-limit:]
345	
346	
347	async def _stream_turn_sidecar(
348	    ws: WebSocket,
349	    session: SessionState,
350	    user_message_for_llm: str,
351	    system_prompt: str,
352	    current_provider_id: str,
353	    current_model_name: str | None,
354	) -> str:
355	    """Execute a turn using oh-my-pi sidecar (Bun subprocess).
356	
357	    Returns final_answer string for post-processing (stickers, memory, etc.).
358	    Intermediate events (token, tool_start, tool_end, tool_error) are streamed
359	    to the frontend via WS in real-time.
360	
361	    The answer and done events are NOT sent here — the existing post-processing
362	    pipeline in _run_agent_turn handles those (including sticker processing).
363	    """
364	    app_state = ws.app.state
365	
366	    # 1. Ensure sidecar is running
367	    mgr = app_state.sidecar_manager
368	    await mgr.start()
369	    client = mgr.client
370	    if client is None:
371	        raise RuntimeError("Sidecar client not available after start()")
372	    # 注入 sidecar manager 到 session，供下游函数（消息历史、context usage、
373	    # const 保存、情景记忆等）通过 session._sidecar_mgr 访问
374	    session._sidecar_mgr = mgr
375	
376	    # 2. Look up sidecar session (persistent SessionMap, fallback to in-memory)
377	    from api.pi_bridge.session_adapter import SessionMap
378	    with SessionMap() as sm:
379	        sidecar_sid = sm.get_sidecar_id(session.session_id)
380	    if not sidecar_sid:
381	        sidecar_sid = getattr(session, "_sidecar_session_id", None)
382	
383	    # 验证 sidecar session 是否仍然有效（服务器重启后旧 ID 过期）
384	    sidecar_valid = False
385	    if sidecar_sid:
386	        try:
387	            await client.call("get_messages", {
388	                "session_id": sidecar_sid, "limit": 0,
389	            })
390	            sidecar_valid = True
391	        except Exception:
392	            logger.info(
393	                "[sidecar] Stale session %s — clearing mapping",
394	                sidecar_sid[:8],
395	            )
396	            sidecar_sid = None
397	            with SessionMap() as sm:
398	                sm.remove(session.session_id)
399	
400	    if not sidecar_sid:
401	        if current_provider_id:
402	            model_str = f"{current_provider_id}/{current_model_name or 'gpt-4o'}"
403	        else:
404	            model_str = current_model_name or "gpt-4o"
405	
406	        # 首次创建 sidecar session，system_prompt 含人设/规则/技能
407	        # 从 SessionMap 恢复最近对话上下文（用于重启后重建）
408	        _sidecar_system_prompt = system_prompt
409	        try:
410	            with SessionMap() as sm:
411	                _past_turns = sm.get_recent_turns(session.session_id, count=5)
412	            if _past_turns:
413	                _history_lines = []
414	                for t in _past_turns:
415	                    _history_lines.append(f"用户: {t.get('user', '')}")
416	                    _history_lines.append(f"助理: {t.get('assistant', '')}")
417	                _history_text = "\n".join(_history_lines)
418	                _sidecar_system_prompt = (
419	                    f"{system_prompt}\n\n"
420	                    f"[历史对话上下文（共 {len(_past_turns)} 轮）]\n"
421	                    f"{_history_text}\n"
422	                )
423	                logger.info(
424	                    "[sidecar] Restored %d past turns for session %s",
425	                    len(_past_turns), session.session_id[:8],
426	                )
427	        except Exception:
428	            logger.debug("[sidecar] Failed to restore past turns", exc_info=True)
429	
430	        result = await client.call("create_session", {
431	            "model": model_str,
432	            "system_prompt": _sidecar_system_prompt,
433	            "cwd": ".",
434	        })
435	        sidecar_sid = result["session_id"]
436	        session._sidecar_session_id = sidecar_sid
437	        with SessionMap() as sm:
438	            sm.set_mapping(session.session_id, sidecar_sid)
439	        logger.info(
440	            "[sidecar] Created session %s for Maxma session %s",
441	            sidecar_sid[:8], session.session_id[:8],
442	        )
443	
444	    # 3. 情景记忆：每轮对话以用户消息为查询检索相关历史，注入到 user_message
445	    _user_message_for_llm = user_message_for_llm
446	    try:
447	        _episodic_mm = getattr(app_state, "episodic_mm", None)
448	        if _episodic_mm is not None and user_message_for_llm:
449	            from agent.context_manager import retrieve_from_episodic
450	            _episodic_context = retrieve_from_episodic(
451	                user_message_for_llm,
452	                _episodic_mm,
453	                top_k=3,
454	                session_id=session.session_id,
455	            )
456	            if _episodic_context:
457	                _user_message_for_llm = (
458	                    f"[相关情景记忆]\n{_episodic_context}\n\n"
459	                    f"---\n\n{user_message_for_llm}"
460	                )
461	    except Exception:
462	        logger.warning("[sidecar] Episodic retrieval failed", exc_info=True)
463	
464	    # 3. Register event handlers to forward intermediate events to WS
465	    final_answer = ""
466	    turn_done = asyncio.Event()
467	
468	    async def _on_token(sid: str, event: dict):
469	        if sid != sidecar_sid:
470	            return
471	        try:
472	            await ws.send_json({
473	                "type": "token",
474	                "payload": {"token": event.get("payload", {}).get("token", "")},
475	            })
476	        except Exception:
477	            pass
478	
479	    async def _on_tool_start(sid: str, event: dict):
480	        if sid != sidecar_sid:
481	            return
482	        try:
483	            payload = event.get("payload", {})
484	            await ws.send_json({
485	                "type": "tool_start",
486	                "payload": {
487	                    "tool_name": payload.get("tool_name", ""),
488	                    "input": payload.get("input", ""),
489	                },
490	            })
491	        except Exception:
492	            pass
493	
494	    async def _on_tool_end(sid: str, event: dict):
495	        if sid != sidecar_sid:
496	            return
497	        try:
498	            payload = event.get("payload", {})
499	            await ws.send_json({
500	                "type": "tool_end",
501	                "payload": {
502	                    "tool_name": payload.get("tool_name", ""),
503	                    "output": payload.get("output", ""),
504	                    "elapsed": payload.get("elapsed", 0),
505	                },
506	            })
507	        except Exception:
508	            pass
509	
510	    async def _on_tool_error(sid: str, event: dict):
511	        if sid != sidecar_sid:
512	            return
513	        try:
514	            payload = event.get("payload", {})
515	            await ws.send_json({
516	                "type": "tool_error",
517	                "payload": {
518	                    "tool_name": payload.get("tool_name", ""),
519	                    "error": payload.get("error", ""),
520	                },
521	            })
522	        except Exception:
523	            pass
524	
525	    async def _on_answer(sid: str, event: dict):
526	        nonlocal final_answer
527	        if sid != sidecar_sid:
528	            return
529	        # Extract the answer but do NOT send to WS — the existing post-processing
530	        # in _run_agent_turn handles sticker processing + answer push.
531	        final_answer = event.get("payload", {}).get("content", "")
532	
533	    async def _on_done(sid: str, event: dict):
534	        if sid != sidecar_sid:
535	            return
536	        turn_done.set()
537	
538	    async def _on_error(sid: str, event: dict):
539	        """BUG5 fix: forward sidecar error events to the frontend."""
540	        if sid != sidecar_sid:
541	            return
542	        payload = event.get("payload", {})
543	        logger.warning(
544	            "[sidecar] Error event for session %s: %s",
545	            sidecar_sid[:8], payload.get("message", payload),
546	        )
547	        try:
548	            await ws.send_json({
549	                "type": "error",
550	                "payload": {
551	                    "code": payload.get("code", "SIDECAR_ERROR"),
552	                    "message": payload.get("message", "Sidecar error"),
553	                },
554	            })
555	        except Exception:
556	            pass
557	
558	    # Register all event handlers
559	    unsubs = []
560	    for evt_type, handler in [
561	        ("token", _on_token),
562	        ("tool_start", _on_tool_start),
563	        ("tool_end", _on_tool_end),
564	        ("tool_error", _on_tool_error),
565	        ("answer", _on_answer),
566	        ("done", _on_done),
567	        ("error", _on_error),
568	    ]:
569	        unsub = client.on(evt_type, handler)
570	        unsubs.append(unsub)
571	
572	    # 4. Execute prompt via sidecar
573	    try:
574	        await client.call("prompt", {
575	            "session_id": sidecar_sid,
576	            "message": _user_message_for_llm,
577	        })
578	        # Wait for done event (sidecar signals completion)
579	        await asyncio.wait_for(turn_done.wait(), timeout=600)
580	    except asyncio.TimeoutError:
581	        logger.warning("[sidecar] Turn timed out for session %s", sidecar_sid)
582	        if not final_answer:
583	            final_answer = "（Sidecar 处理超时，请重试）"
584	    except Exception as e:
585	        logger.exception("[sidecar] Turn failed for session %s", sidecar_sid)
586	        if not final_answer:
587	            final_answer = f"（Sidecar 处理出错：{e}）"
588	    finally:
589	        for unsub in unsubs:
590	            try:
591	                unsub()
592	            except Exception:
593	                pass
594	
595	    return final_answer
596	
597	
598	async def _calculate_context_usage(
599	    session,
600	    system_prompt,
601	    *,
602	    max_tokens: int = 256_000,
603	    model_name: str = "",
604	) -> dict:
605	    """估算上下文用量。sidecar 模式下从消息历史估算。
606	
607	    从 sidecar 获取消息列表，用字符数粗略估算 token 用量。
608	    返回字典包括估算用量、最大用量、占比、消息数。
609	    """
610	    messages = await _get_messages_from_sidecar(session, limit=200)
611	    total_chars = sum(len(m.get("content", "")) for m in messages)
612	    total_chars += len(system_prompt or "")
613	    # 粗略估算：混合中英文约 2 字符/token
614	    estimated_tokens = int(total_chars / 2)
615	    return {
616	        "estimated_tokens": estimated_tokens,
617	        "max_tokens": max_tokens,
618	        "percentage": min(100, int(estimated_tokens / max(max_tokens, 1) * 100)),
619	        "message_count": len(messages),
620	        "model_name": model_name,
621	    }
622	
623	
624	
625	# ── 项目上下文自动感知 ──────────────────────────────────────────
626	
627	import re as _re
628	
629	# 匹配 Windows / Unix 绝对路径
630	_PATH_PATTERN = _re.compile(r"(?:[A-Za-z]:[\\/]|[\\/])(?:[\w .\-]+[\\/])*[\w .\-]+")
631	
632	
633	def _detect_project_path(message: str) -> str | None:
634	    """从用户消息中提取可能的项目根目录路径。"""
635	    matches = _PATH_PATTERN.findall(message)
636	    for m in matches:
637	        p = m.rstrip("\\/").rstrip()
638	        # 检查是否是目录
639	        from pathlib import Path as _Path
640	
641	        if _Path(p).is_dir():
642	            # 检查是否像项目根目录（含 .git 或 package.json 或 pyproject.toml 等）
643	            markers = [
644	                ".git",
645	                "package.json",
646	                "pyproject.toml",
647	                "Cargo.toml",
648	                "go.mod",
649	                "requirements.txt",
650	                "setup.py",
651	            ]
652	            if any((_Path(p) / marker).exists() for marker in markers):
653	                return p
654	    return None
655	
656	
657	def _get_project_context(session: SessionState, user_message: str) -> str | None:
658	    """获取项目上下文：优先用缓存，否则尝试从消息检测并扫描。"""
659	    # 已有缓存
660	    if session._project_context is not None:
661	        return session._project_context
662	
663	    # 尝试从消息检测项目路径
664	    project_path = _detect_project_path(user_message)
665	    if project_path is None:
666	        return None
667	
668	    # 扫描项目
669	    try:
670	        from agent.project_scanner import scan_project
671	
672	        ctx = scan_project(project_path)
673	        text = ctx.to_prompt_text()
674	        # 缓存到 session
675	        session._project_context = text
676	        session._project_path = project_path
677	        return text
678	    except Exception as e:
679	        import logging
680	
681	        logging.getLogger(__name__).warning("[project_scanner] 扫描失败: %s", e)
682	        return None
683	
684	
685	async def _project_completed_turn_to_episodic(
686	    *,
687	    user_message: str = "",
688	    assistant_message: str = "",
689	    episodic_mm,
690	    session_id: str,
691	    turn_id: str,
692	    graph=None,
693	    config: dict | None = None,
694	) -> None:
695	    """Best-effort 将一个成功的 chat turn 投影到情景记忆。
696	
697	    sidecar 模式下 graph/config 为 None，直接使用传入的 user_message 和
698	    assistant_message 构造摘要，不再从 checkpoint 读取消息列表。
699	    """
700	    if episodic_mm is None:
701	        return
702	    try:
703	        # sidecar 模式：graph 为 None，使用直接传入的消息
704	        if graph is None:
705	            # 构造简单的摘要文本用于情景记忆
706	            summary_parts = []
707	            if user_message:
708	                user_preview = user_message[:200] + ("..." if len(user_message) > 200 else "")
709	                summary_parts.append(f"用户: {user_preview}")
710	            if assistant_message:
711	                asst_preview = assistant_message[:300] + ("..." if len(assistant_message) > 300 else "")
712	                summary_parts.append(f"助理: {asst_preview}")
713	            summary = "\n".join(summary_parts)
714	            if not summary:
715	                return
716	            # 写入情景记忆（add_episode 是同步方法）
717	            episode_id = episodic_mm.add_episode(
718	                summary=summary,
719	                session_id=session_id,
720	                turn_id=turn_id,
721	            )
722	            if episode_id is None:
723	                logger.debug(
724	                    "[episodic] no episode created for session=%s turn=%s",
725	                    session_id, turn_id,
726	                )
727	            return
728	
729	        # LangGraph 路径（保留兼容，理论上 sidecar 模式不会到达）
730	        episode_id = await commit_to_episodic(
731	            graph,
732	            config,
733	            episodic_mm,
734	            session_id=session_id,
735	            turn_id=turn_id,
736	        )
737	        if episode_id is None:
738	            logger.warning(
739	                "[episodic] projection produced no episode for session=%s turn=%s",
740	                session_id,
741	                turn_id,
742	            )
743	    except Exception:
744	        logger.exception(
745	            "[episodic] projection failed after completed response for session=%s turn=%s",
746	            session_id,
747	            turn_id,
748	        )
749	
750	
751	def _new_turn_id(turn_id: object = None) -> str:
752	    """Return a validated client id or create one before execution begins."""
753	    if isinstance(turn_id, str):
754	        candidate = turn_id.strip()
755	        if candidate and len(candidate) <= 128:
756	            return candidate
757	    return uuid.uuid4().hex
758	
759	
760	
761	async def _run_agent_turn(
762	    ws: WebSocket,
763	    session: SessionState,
764	    user_message: str,
765	    private_mode: bool = False,
766	    auto_approve: bool = False,
767	    provider_id: str | None = None,
768	    model_name: str | None = None,
769	    think_path_id: str | None = None,
770	    turn_id: str | None = None,
771	):
772	    """
773	    在指定的session中编排一轮 Agent 对话。
774	    无返回值。
775	    以内置的 WebSocketCallback回调函数和前端通信系统作为副作用。
776	
777	    若指定了 provider_id + model_name，则从 ProviderManager 动态创建 LLM；
778	    否则退化到 app_state.llm 全局 fallback。
779	    """
780	    # 1. [准备环境] 从 WebSocket 获取应用状态
781	    app_state = ws.app.state
782	    current_task = asyncio.current_task()
783	    # The memory id is assigned before any model work.  Callers can pass a
784	    # stable client/request id when retrying after reconnect; otherwise this
785	    # invocation gets one stable id for its full lifetime.
786	    turn_id = _new_turn_id(turn_id)
787	    interaction.current_session_id.set(session.session_id)
788	    # ── 多模态：自动描述用户附带的图片 ──────────────────────────
789	    user_message = await _process_image_refs(user_message)
790	    # ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
791	
792	    # 获取默认上下文窗口大小和模型名（一次性解构，避免重复调用）
793	    default_max_tokens, fallback_model_name = _get_provider_context(app_state)
794	
795	    # 子会话在创建时带有不可变的 DelegationContext。前端连接后也必须
796	    # 消费它，不能让客户端 payload 或之后的全局 provider 配置改变父任务
797	    # 已授权的模型、工具或预算。普通会话保持原有选择逻辑。
798	    delegation_context = (
799	        getattr(session, "delegation_context", None)
800	        if getattr(session, "is_subagent", False)
801	        else None
802	    )
803	    delegation_helpers = None
804	    auto_approve = _effective_auto_approve(session, auto_approve)
805	    session.auto_approve = auto_approve
806	    interaction.set_session_auto_approve(session.session_id, auto_approve)
807	
808	    # 动态 LLM 选择（Phase 2：每次消息独立指定提供商/模型）
809	    # 阶段 3.3：指定 provider 失败时尝试 fallback 链（按 priority 排序）
810	    current_max_tokens = default_max_tokens
811	    current_provider_id = ""
812	    if provider_id and model_name and hasattr(app_state, "provider_manager"):
813	        try:
814	            provider = app_state.provider_manager.get(provider_id)
815	            llm = provider.create_llm(model_name, temperature=0.7, streaming=True)
816	            current_model_name = model_name
817	            current_max_tokens = provider.config.context_window
818	            current_provider_id = provider.config.id
819	        except KeyError:
820	            # 阶段 3.3：尝试 fallback 到下一个可用 provider
821	            fallback_provider = app_state.provider_manager.get_fallback(
822	                exclude_ids={provider_id} if provider_id else None
823	            )
824	            if fallback_provider is not None:
825	                logger.warning(
826	                    "[chat:%s] requested provider/model fallback: provider_id=%r model=%r not found; "
827	                    "switching to fallback provider=%r (priority=%d)",
828	                    session.session_id[:8],
829	                    provider_id,
830	                    model_name,
831	                    fallback_provider.config.id,
832	                    fallback_provider.config.priority,
833	                )
834	                llm = fallback_provider.create_llm(
835	                    fallback_provider.default_model,
836	                    temperature=0.7,
837	                    streaming=True,
838	                )
839	                current_model_name = fallback_provider.default_model
840	                current_max_tokens = fallback_provider.config.context_window
841	                current_provider_id = fallback_provider.config.id
842	            else:
843	                logger.warning(
844	                    "[chat:%s] requested provider/model fallback: provider_id=%r model=%r not found; "
845	                    "no fallback available, using default",
846	                    session.session_id[:8],
847	                    provider_id,
848	                    model_name,
849	                )
850	                llm = app_state.llm
851	                current_model_name = None
852	    elif provider_id or model_name:
853	        logger.warning(
854	            "[chat:%s] requested provider/model fallback: provider_id=%r model=%r incomplete or unavailable; "
855	            "using default provider/model=%r",
856	            session.session_id[:8],
857	            provider_id,
858	            model_name,
859	            fallback_model_name or "<unknown>",
860	        )
861	        llm = app_state.llm
862	        current_model_name = None
863	    else:
864	        llm = app_state.llm
865	        current_model_name = None
866	
867	    # ThinkPath is a user-confirmed depth preference, not an opaque prompt
868	    # classifier.  It may opt into declarative routing only when the user did
869	    # not already select a provider/model in this same request.
870	    settings = get_settings()
871	    think_path_execution = _resolve_think_path_execution(
872	        think_path_id,
873	        think_path_enabled=settings.think_path_enabled,
874	        declarative_model_routing_enabled=settings.declarative_model_routing_enabled,
875	        has_explicit_model_selection=bool(provider_id or model_name),
876	        provider_manager=getattr(app_state, "provider_manager", None),
877	    )
878	    if think_path_execution.provider is not None:
879	        try:
880	            routed_provider = think_path_execution.provider
881	            routed_model_name = think_path_execution.model_name
882	            llm = routed_provider.create_llm(
883	                routed_model_name,
884	                temperature=0.7,
885	                streaming=True,
886	            )
887	            current_provider_id = routed_provider.config.id
888	            current_model_name = routed_model_name
889	            current_max_tokens = routed_provider.config.context_window
890	            logger.info(
891	                "[chat:%s] ThinkPath %s selected provider=%s model=%s",
892	                session.session_id[:8],
893	                think_path_execution.path.id if think_path_execution.path else "",
894	                current_provider_id,
895	                current_model_name,
896	            )
897	        except Exception:
898	            # Do not turn an optional selection preference into a chat outage.
899	            # The previously selected/default LLM remains intact.
900	            logger.warning(
901	                "[chat:%s] ThinkPath route creation failed; using normal selection",
902	                session.session_id[:8],
903	                exc_info=True,
904	            )
905	
906	    if delegation_context is not None:
907	        from tools.sub_agent.delegation_context import (
908	            activate_delegation_context,
909	            bind_model_budget,
910	            prepare_delegated_tools,
911	            reset_delegation_context,
912	        )
913	
914	        delegation_helpers = (
915	            activate_delegation_context,
916	            prepare_delegated_tools,
917	            reset_delegation_context,
918	        )
919	        if delegation_context.remaining_seconds() <= 0:
920	            error = RuntimeError("子 Agent 的委托时间预算已耗尽")
921	            if (
922	                session._pending_result is not None
923	                and not session._pending_result.done()
924	            ):
925	                session._pending_result.set_exception(error)
926	            await ws.send_json(
927	                format_ws_error(ErrorCode.AGENT_ERROR, "子 Agent 的委托时间预算已耗尽")
928	            )
929	            return
930	        llm = bind_model_budget(delegation_context)
931	        current_model_name = delegation_context.model_name or current_model_name
932	        if delegation_context.max_tokens > 0:
933	            current_max_tokens = min(current_max_tokens, delegation_context.max_tokens)
934	
935	    if llm is None:
936	        error_collector.add_error(
937	            level="ERROR",
938	            category="llm",
939	            message="No LLM provider configured",
940	            session_id=session.session_id,
941	        )
942	        await ws.send_json(
943	            format_ws_error(
944	                ErrorCode.NO_LLM,
945	                "No LLM provider configured. Add one in Model Settings first.",
946	            )
947	        )
948	        return
949	
950	    # A normal parent turn also activates a context.  This makes a top-level
951	    # delegation inherit the model actually selected for this request rather
952	    # than rediscovering app_state.llm inside the tool.
953	    if delegation_context is None:
954	        from tools.sub_agent.delegation_context import (
955	            activate_delegation_context,
956	            create_delegation_context,
957	            reset_delegation_context,
958	        )
959	
960	        execution_context = create_delegation_context(
961	            app_state,
962	            session.session_id,
963	            model=llm,
964	            provider_id=current_provider_id,
965	            model_name=current_model_name,
966	            auto_approve=auto_approve,
967	        )
968	        delegation_helpers = (
969	            activate_delegation_context,
970	            None,
971	            reset_delegation_context,
972	        )
973	    else:
974	        execution_context = delegation_context
975	
976	    system_prompt = build_system_prompt()
977	
978	    # ── 项目上下文自动感知 ──────────────────────────────────────
979	    # 缓存优化：project_ctx 不再追加到 system_prompt，而是 prepend 到
980	    # user_message。这样 SystemMessage 保持完全稳定，有利于 DeepSeek
981	    # prompt cache 命中（project_ctx 仅在检测到项目路径时非空）。
982	    project_ctx = _get_project_context(session, user_message)
983	    # ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
984	
985	    # 缓存优化：使用全量工具集 + MCP 工具，避免每轮工具集变化破坏
986	    # DeepSeek prompt cache（tools 字段是 prompt 前缀的一部分）。
987	    # 全量工具带来的额外 token 会被缓存，成本远低于缓存 miss。
988	    mcp_tools = getattr(ws.app.state, "mcp_tools", None) or []
989	    turn_tools = merge_tool_lists(
990	        get_all_tools(), list(mcp_tools), log_collisions=False
991	    )
992	    if delegation_context is not None:
993	        # This is the execution boundary, not merely prompt-time filtering.
994	        # ScopedTool validates path arguments immediately before each call.
995	        turn_tools = delegation_helpers[1](turn_tools, delegation_context)
996	    # 4 层架构：注入情景记忆管理器，启用 episodic_retriever 节点
997	    episodic_mm = getattr(ws.app.state, "episodic_mm", None)
998	    # B6：生成运行时配置摘要，让 agent 感知自身的 providers/MCP/工具配置全貌
999	    runtime_context_text = _build_runtime_context_for_agent(
1000	        app_state, turn_tools, current_model_name
1001	    )
1002	    think_path_context = _think_path_runtime_context(think_path_execution.path)
1003	    if think_path_context:
1004	        runtime_context_text = "\n\n".join(
1005	            part for part in (think_path_context, runtime_context_text) if part
1006	        )
1007	
1008	    # project_ctx prepend 到 user_message（不修改 system_prompt，保持缓存稳定）
1009	    if project_ctx:
1010	        user_message_for_llm = f"[项目上下文]\n{project_ctx}\n\n---\n\n{user_message}"
1011	    else:
1012	        user_message_for_llm = user_message
1013	
1014	    # oh-my-pi sidecar: no LangGraph state
1015	    config = None
1016	    agent_maxma = None
1017	    session._graph = None
1018	
1019	    # 2. [执行轮次] 流式执行 Agent 图，副作用推送最终回答，另有config回调副作用
1020	    final_answer = ""
1021	    _run_error: str | None = None
1022	    turn_completed = False
1023	    context_token = None
1024	    try:
1025	        # turn 开始时推送当前上下文用量（含刚加入的 user message）
1026	        initial_turn_usage = await _calculate_context_usage(
1027	            session,
1028	            system_prompt,
1029	            max_tokens=current_max_tokens,
1030	            model_name=current_model_name or "",
1031	        )
1032	        await ws.send_json({"type": "context_usage", "payload": initial_turn_usage})
1033	
1034	        context_token = delegation_helpers[0](execution_context)
1035	        if delegation_context is not None:
1036	            async with asyncio.timeout(delegation_context.remaining_seconds()):
1037	                final_answer = await _stream_turn_sidecar(
1038	                    ws,
1039	                    session,
1040	                    user_message_for_llm,
1041	                    system_prompt,
1042	                    current_provider_id,
1043	                    current_model_name,
1044	                )
1045	        else:
1046	            _turn_timeout = 600
1047	            try:
1048	                _turn_timeout = get_settings().turn_timeout
1049	            except Exception:
1050	                pass
1051	            async with asyncio.timeout(_turn_timeout):
1052	                final_answer = await _stream_turn_sidecar(
1053	                    ws,
1054	                    session,
1055	                    user_message_for_llm,
1056	                    system_prompt,
1057	                    current_provider_id,
1058	                    current_model_name,
1059	                )
1060	        # Sidecar mode: no graph state to inspect, trust the returned answer
1061	        turn_completed = bool(final_answer)
1062	
1063	        # 保存本轮对话到 SessionMap（用于侧边栏重启后恢复上下文）
1064	        if final_answer and not private_mode:
1065	            try:
1066	                from api.pi_bridge.session_adapter import SessionMap
1067	                with SessionMap() as sm:
1068	                    sm.append_turn(session.session_id, user_message, final_answer)
1069	            except Exception:
1070	                logger.debug("[sidecar] Failed to save turn to SessionMap", exc_info=True)
1071	
1072	        if final_answer:
1073	            # 表情包处理：分层决策架构
1074	            # 1. LLM 主动输出 [表情包:情绪] → 直接解析
1075	            # 2. LLM 未输出 → 决策器判断是否补发
1076	            from tools.sticker_utils import process_stickers
1077	
1078	            ai_recent = await _get_recent_ai_messages(session, config, limit=5)
1079	            processed_answer, _ = process_stickers(
1080	                final_answer,
1081	                user_message=user_message,
1082	                ai_recent_messages=ai_recent,
1083	            )
1084	            final_answer = processed_answer
1085	            await ws.send_json(
1086	                {  # [向前端通信] 1. 向客户端推送最终答案
1087	                    "type": "answer",
1088	                    "payload": {"content": processed_answer},
1089	                }
1090	            )
1091	    except asyncio.CancelledError:
1092	        # 清理 interaction 挂起 Future
1093	        await interaction.cancel_session(session.session_id)
1094	
1095	        # sidecar 模式：通过 cancel RPC 中止 sidecar 中的生成
1096	        try:
1097	            sidecar_mgr = getattr(ws.app.state, "sidecar_manager", None)
1098	            if sidecar_mgr and sidecar_mgr.client:
1099	                from api.pi_bridge.session_adapter import SessionMap
1100	                with SessionMap() as sm:
1101	                    sidecar_sid = sm.get_sidecar_id(session.session_id)
1102	                if not sidecar_sid:
1103	                    sidecar_sid = getattr(session, "_sidecar_session_id", None)
1104	                if sidecar_sid:
1105	                    await sidecar_mgr.client.call("cancel", {"session_id": sidecar_sid})
1106	        except Exception as e:
1107	            logger.debug("[cancel] sidecar cancel RPC failed: %s", e)
1108	
1109	        # 注：原 LangGraph 路径的 checkpoint 清理和 interrupt AIMessage 注入
1110	        # 在 sidecar 模式下不再需要 — cancel RPC 已中止生成，
1111	        # sidecar 内部维护消息状态的一致性。
1112	
1113	        await ws.send_json(format_ws_error(ErrorCode.CANCELLED, "生成已取消"))
1114	    except Exception as e:
1115	        # 清理可能挂起的用户交互 Future，防止阻塞后续交互
1116	        await interaction.cancel_session(
1117	            session.session_id, "Agent 执行出错，交互已取消"
1118	        )
1119	        _run_error = str(e)
1120	        trace_id = uuid.uuid4().hex[:8]
1121	        logger.error(
1122	            f"[sub-agent:{session.session_id[:8]}] _run_agent_turn error: {e}",
1123	            exc_info=True,
1124	            extra={"trace_id": trace_id},
1125	        )
1126	        error_collector.add_exception(
1127	            e,
1128	            category="agent",
1129	            message=f"Agent 执行出错: {str(e)[:200]}",
1130	            trace_id=trace_id,
1131	            session_id=session.session_id,
1132	        )
1133	        await ws.send_json(
1134	            format_ws_error(
1135	                ErrorCode.AGENT_ERROR,
1136	                f"Agent 执行出错: {str(e)[:200]}",
1137	                trace_id=trace_id,
1138	            )
1139	        )
1140	    finally:
1141	        if context_token is not None:
1142	            delegation_helpers[2](context_token)
1143	        if session._active_task is current_task:
1144	            session._active_task = None
1145	        context_usage = await _calculate_context_usage(
1146	            session,
1147	            system_prompt,
1148	            max_tokens=current_max_tokens,
1149	            model_name=current_model_name or "",
1150	        )
1151	        await ws.send_json(
1152	            {  # [向前端通信] 3. 推送 turn 结束 + 上下文用量 + turn_id（用于记忆事件关联）
1153	                "type": "done",
1154	                "payload": {
1155	                    "turn_id": turn_id,
1156	                    "context_usage": context_usage,
1157	                },
1158	            }
1159	        )
1160	
1161	    # 3. [后处理] 增加消息计数器，将对话记录入长期记忆
1162	    # 修复：此前仅在 final_answer 非空时 +=2，错误轮次仍写 checkpointer（至少写入 HumanMessage）
1163	    # 但计数不增 → message_count 与 checkpointer 实际消息数漂移，导致：
1164	    # 1) undo 端点 max(0, count - deleted) 计算错误
1165	    # 2) const 会话 YAML metadata.message_count 不准，重启后显示错误
1166	    if final_answer:
1167	        session.message_count += 2  # human + ai
1168	    else:
1169	        # Agent 出错：graph.ainvoke 已把 HumanMessage 写入 checkpointer，但没有 AI 回复
1170	        session.message_count += 1
1171	    memory_eligible = turn_completed and bool(final_answer)
1172	    if not private_mode and memory_eligible:
1173	        if final_answer:
1174	            await _project_completed_turn_to_episodic(
1175	                user_message=user_message,
1176	                assistant_message=final_answer,
1177	                episodic_mm=episodic_mm,
1178	                session_id=session.session_id,
1179	                turn_id=turn_id,
1180	            )
1181	        # 增量发送：只传成功轮次给记忆消费者，避免错误提示污染 LTM。
1182	        messages_for_memory = [
1183	            {"role": "user", "content": user_message},
1184	            {"role": "assistant", "content": final_answer},
1185	        ]
1186	        logger.info(
1187	            "[ltm] calling send_history, messages=%d (incremental)",
1188	            len(messages_for_memory),
1189	        )
1190	        try:
1191	            await app_state.ltm.send_history(
1192	                messages_for_memory,
1193	                session_id=session.session_id,
1194	                turn_id=turn_id,
1195	            )
1196	            logger.info("[ltm] send_history completed")
1197	        except Exception as e:
1198	            logger.error("[ltm] send_history failed: %s", e, exc_info=True)
1199	
1200	    # 4. [Const 会话] 自动持久化到磁盘 YAML
1201	    if final_answer and session.is_const:
1202	        try:
1203	            # sidecar 模式：从 sidecar 获取消息历史
1204	            messages = await _get_messages_from_sidecar(session, limit=200)
1205	            if messages:
1206	                # 转换为 serialize_messages 兼容格式
1207	                serialized = []
1208	                for m in messages:
1209	                    role = m.get("role", "unknown")
1210	                    content = m.get("content", "")
1211	                    if role == "user":
1212	                        serialized.append({"type": "human", "content": content})
1213	                    elif role == "assistant":
1214	                        serialized.append({"type": "ai", "content": content})
1215	                # 确保最后一条 AI 消息是 final_answer
1216	                for item in reversed(serialized):
1217	                    if item.get("type") == "ai":
1218	                        item["content"] = final_answer
1219	                        break
1220	                metadata = session.persistent_metadata()
1221	                save_const_session(
1222	                    session.session_id, session.const_name, metadata, serialized
1223	                )
1224	        except Exception as e:
1225	            print(
1226	                f"[const] 自动保存会话 {session.session_id[:8]} 失败: {e}",
1227	                file=sys.stderr,
1228	            )
1229	
1230	    # 5. [Sub-agent] 如果有待处理的 pending_result，resolve 它
1231	    if session._pending_result is not None and not session._pending_result.done():
1232	        if _run_error:
1233	            print(
1234	                f"[sub-agent:{session.session_id[:8]}] resolving pending_result with run error",
1235	                file=sys.stderr,
1236	            )
1237	            session._pending_result.set_exception(
1238	                RuntimeError(f"子 Agent 执行失败: {_run_error}")
1239	            )
1240	        elif final_answer:
1241	            print(
1242	                f"[sub-agent:{session.session_id[:8]}] resolving pending_result with answer",
1243	                file=sys.stderr,
1244	            )
1245	            session._pending_result.set_result(final_answer)
1246	        else:
1247	            print(
1248	                f"[sub-agent:{session.session_id[:8]}] resolving pending_result with exception (empty answer)",
1249	                file=sys.stderr,
1250	            )
1251	            session._pending_result.set_exception(
1252	                RuntimeError("Sub-agent 未能产生有效回答")
1253	            )
1254	
1255	
1256	async def _resume_sub_agent(
1257	    ws: WebSocket, session: SessionState
1258	) -> asyncio.Task | None:
1259	    """WebSocket 重连时，若会话有未完成的 sub-agent 任务则自动恢复执行。"""
1260	    if session._sub_agent_task is None or session._pending_result is None:
1261	        return None
1262	    if session._pending_result.done():
1263	        return None
1264	    task = session._sub_agent_task
1265	    session._sub_agent_task = None  # 消费掉，防止重连后重复启动
1266	    # 取消旧任务，等待其完成后再创建新任务，避免 checkpoint 竞态
1267	    if session._active_task is not None and not session._active_task.done():
1268	        session._active_task.cancel()
1269	        try:
1270	            await asyncio.wait_for(session._active_task, timeout=5)
1271	        except (asyncio.CancelledError, asyncio.TimeoutError):
1272	            pass
1273	        session._active_task = None
1274	    interaction.current_ws.set(ws)
1275	    interaction.current_session_id.set(session.session_id)
1276	    agent_task = asyncio.create_task(
1277	        _run_agent_turn(ws, session, task, private_mode=False)
1278	    )
1279	    session._active_task = agent_task
1280	    return agent_task
1281	
1282	
1283	@router.websocket("/ws/chat/{session_id}")
1284	async def websocket_chat(ws: WebSocket, session_id: str):
1285	    """WebSocket 聊天端点 — 接收用户消息、驱动 Agent、处理取消和用户交互。"""
1286	    await ws.accept()
1287	
1288	    # ── 初始化会话 ────────────────────────────────────────
1289	    app_state = ws.app.state
1290	    session = await app_state.session_manager.get_or_create(session_id)
1291	
1292	    # 注册 WebSocket 到注册表，供后台记忆 consumer 推送事件
1293	    app_state.ws_registry.register(session_id, ws)
1294	
1295	    # ── 推送初始上下文用量 ─────────────────────────────────
1296	    default_max_tokens, default_model = _get_provider_context(app_state)
1297	    initial_usage = await _calculate_context_usage(
1298	        session,
1299	        app_state.system_prompt,
1300	        max_tokens=default_max_tokens,
1301	        model_name=default_model,
1302	    )
1303	    await ws.send_json({"type": "context_usage", "payload": initial_usage})
1304	
1305	    # ── 断线重连时恢复 sub-agent ──────────────────────────
1306	    agent_task = await _resume_sub_agent(ws, session)
1307	
1308	    # ── 消息主循环 ────────────────────────────────────────
1309	    try:
1310	        while True:
1311	            raw = await ws.receive_text()
1312	            try:
1313	                msg = json.loads(raw)
1314	            except json.JSONDecodeError:
1315	                # 客户端发送非 JSON 文本（心跳探针、协议错误等），忽略不中断连接
1316	                continue
1317	            if not isinstance(msg, dict):
1318	                continue
1319	
1320	            match msg.get("type", ""):
1321	                case "ping":
1322	                    await ws.send_json({"type": "pong", "payload": {}})
1323	
1324	                case "chat":
1325	                    if agent_task and not agent_task.done():
1326	                        continue  # 已有 Agent 运行中，忽略本次输入
1327	
1328	                    payload = msg.get("payload")
1329	                    if not isinstance(payload, dict):
1330	                        continue
1331	                    user_message = str(payload.get("message", "")).strip()
1332	                    if not user_message:
1333	                        continue
1334	
1335	                    # 阶段 3.2：per-session 令牌桶限流
1336	                    allowed, rate_err = get_ws_rate_limiter().try_consume(session_id)
1337	                    if not allowed:
1338	                        get_metrics().record_rate_limit("ws")
1339	                        error_collector.add_error(
1340	                            level="WARNING",
1341	                            category="rate_limit",
1342	                            message=f"WebSocket 限流: {rate_err}",
1343	                            session_id=session_id,
1344	                        )
1345	                        await ws.send_json({"type": "error", "payload": rate_err})
1346	                        continue
1347	
1348	                    auto_approve = _effective_auto_approve(
1349	                        session, payload.get("auto_approve", False)
1350	                    )
1351	                    interaction.current_ws.set(ws)  # 供工具函数通过 WebSocket 推送交互
1352	                    interaction.current_session_id.set(session_id)
1353	                    interaction.set_session_auto_approve(session_id, auto_approve)
1354	
1355	                    agent_task = asyncio.create_task(
1356	                        _run_agent_turn(
1357	                            ws,
1358	                            session,
1359	                            user_message,
1360	                            private_mode=payload.get("private", False),
1361	                            auto_approve=auto_approve,
1362	                            provider_id=payload.get("provider_id"),
1363	                            model_name=payload.get("model_name"),
1364	                            think_path_id=payload.get("think_path_id"),
1365	                            turn_id=payload.get("turn_id"),
1366	                        )
1367	                    )
1368	                    session._active_task = agent_task  # 供外部 REST 接口查询活跃状态
1369	
1370	                case "user_response":
1371	                    payload = msg.get("payload", {})
1372	                    interaction_id = payload.get("interaction_id", "")
1373	                    response = payload.get("response", "")
1374	                    if interaction_id:
1375	                        await interaction.resolve(interaction_id, response)
1376	
1377	                case "artifact_action":
1378	                    # Artifact actions are never tool calls.  They can only
1379	                    # resolve an already-pending interaction after the signed,
1380	                    # session-bound token has been validated.
1381	
1382	                    if not get_settings().interactive_artifacts_enabled:
1383	                        continue
1384	                    try:
1385	                        from api.artifacts.schema import (
1386	                            ArtifactActionResponse,
1387	                            artifact_action_authorizer,
1388	                        )
1389	
1390	                        response = ArtifactActionResponse.model_validate(
1391	                            msg.get("payload", {})
1392	                        )
1393	                        authorized = artifact_action_authorizer.authorize(
1394	                            response, session_id=session_id
1395	                        )
1396	                    except (TypeError, ValueError):
1397	                        continue
1398	                    if authorized is None:
1399	                        continue
1400	                    if await interaction.resolve(
1401	                        authorized.interaction_id, authorized.action_id
1402	                    ):
1403	                        artifact_action_authorizer.consume(authorized)
1404	
1405	                case "plan_response":
1406	                    payload = msg.get("payload", {})
1407	                    plan_id = payload.get("plan_id", "")
1408	                    action = payload.get("action", "")
1409	                    modified_plan = payload.get("modified_plan", "")
1410	                    if plan_id:
1411	                        if action == "approve":
1412	                            await interaction.resolve(plan_id, "approve")
1413	                        elif action == "reject":
1414	                            await interaction.resolve(plan_id, "reject")
1415	                        elif action == "modify" and modified_plan:
1416	                            await interaction.resolve(plan_id, modified_plan)
1417	                        else:
1418	                            await interaction.resolve(plan_id, "reject")
1419	
1420	                case "cancel":
1421	                    if agent_task and not agent_task.done():
1422	                        agent_task.cancel()
1423	                        agent_task = None
1424	
1425	                case "update_auto_approve":
1426	                    payload = msg.get("payload")
1427	                    if not isinstance(payload, dict):
1428	                        continue
1429	                    auto_approve_val = _effective_auto_approve(
1430	                        session, payload.get("auto_approve", False)
1431	                    )
1432	                    interaction.set_session_auto_approve(session_id, auto_approve_val)
1433	                    session.auto_approve = auto_approve_val
1434	
1435	    except WebSocketDisconnect:
1436	        pass  # 客户端断开是正常行为
1437	    finally:
1438	        app_state.ws_registry.unregister(session_id)
1439	        if agent_task and not agent_task.done():
1440	            agent_task.cancel()
1441	        if session._active_task is agent_task:
1442	            session._active_task = None
1443	        interaction.clear_session_settings(session_id)
1444	
```

> Read: `D:\Maxma\MaxmaHere\api\pi_bridge\rpc_client.py`

**Output:**

```json
1	"""JSON-RPC 2.0 client for communicating with the Bun sidecar over stdio."""
2	
3	from __future__ import annotations
4	
5	import asyncio
6	import json
7	import logging
8	from collections.abc import Callable
9	from typing import Any
10	
11	logger = logging.getLogger(__name__)
12	
13	
14	class JsonRpcError(Exception):
15	    """Raised when the sidecar returns a JSON-RPC error response."""
16	
17	    def __init__(self, message: str, data: Any = None) -> None:
18	        super().__init__(message)
19	        self.data = data
20	
21	
22	class JsonRpcClient:
23	    """JSON-RPC 2.0 client over stdio.
24	
25	    Reads/writes JSON lines from/to a subprocess's stdin/stdout.
26	    Supports:
27	    - Request/response with call()
28	    - Server-pushed event notifications with on()
29	    - Automatic cleanup on stop()
30	    """
31	
32	    def __init__(
33	        self, stdin: asyncio.StreamWriter, stdout: asyncio.StreamReader
34	    ) -> None:
35	        self._stdin = stdin
36	        self._stdout = stdout
37	        self._msg_id = 0
38	        self._pending: dict[int, asyncio.Future[dict]] = {}
39	        self._handlers: dict[str, list[Callable]] = {}
40	        self._running = False
41	        self._read_task: asyncio.Task[None] | None = None
42	
43	    # -- Public API ---------------------------------------------------------
44	
45	    async def start_reading(self) -> None:
46	        """Start the background task that reads stdout and dispatches messages."""
47	        if self._running:
48	            return
49	        self._running = True
50	        self._read_task = asyncio.create_task(self._read_loop())
51	
52	    async def call(
53	        self, method: str, params: dict | None = None, *, timeout: float = 120
54	    ) -> dict:
55	        """Send a JSON-RPC request and wait for the response.
56	
57	        Args:
58	            method: The RPC method name.
59	            params: Optional parameters dict.
60	            timeout: Maximum seconds to wait for a response (default 120).
61	
62	        Returns:
63	            The result dict from the response.
64	
65	        Raises:
66	            JsonRpcError: if the sidecar returns an error response.
67	            TimeoutError: if no response within *timeout* seconds.
68	            RuntimeError: if the client is not running.
69	        """
70	        if not self._running:
71	            raise RuntimeError("JsonRpcClient is not running")
72	
73	        self._msg_id += 1
74	        msg_id = self._msg_id
75	
76	        req: dict[str, Any] = {
77	            "jsonrpc": "2.0",
78	            "method": method,
79	            "id": msg_id,
80	        }
81	        if params is not None:
82	            req["params"] = params
83	
84	        future: asyncio.Future[dict] = asyncio.get_running_loop().create_future()
85	        self._pending[msg_id] = future
86	
87	        try:
88	            line = json.dumps(req, ensure_ascii=False) + "\n"
89	            self._stdin.write(line.encode("utf-8"))
90	            await self._stdin.drain()
91	            return await asyncio.wait_for(future, timeout=timeout)
92	        except asyncio.TimeoutError:
93	            self._pending.pop(msg_id, None)
94	            raise TimeoutError(
95	                f"RPC call '{method}' timed out after {timeout}s"
96	            )
97	        except Exception:
98	            self._pending.pop(msg_id, None)
99	            raise
100	
101	    def on(self, event_type: str, handler: Callable) -> Callable[[], None]:
102	        """Register an event handler.
103	
104	        The handler receives ``(session_id: str, event: dict)``.
105	
106	        Returns a callable that unsubscribes the handler when invoked.
107	        """
108	        if event_type not in self._handlers:
109	            self._handlers[event_type] = []
110	        self._handlers[event_type].append(handler)
111	
112	        def _unsubscribe() -> None:
113	            try:
114	                self._handlers[event_type].remove(handler)
115	            except ValueError:
116	                pass
117	
118	        return _unsubscribe
119	
120	    async def stop(self) -> None:
121	        """Stop the read loop and cancel pending futures."""
122	        self._running = False
123	        if self._read_task is not None and not self._read_task.done():
124	            self._read_task.cancel()
125	            try:
126	                await self._read_task
127	            except asyncio.CancelledError:
128	                pass
129	            self._read_task = None
130	        # Cancel remaining pending futures
131	        for fut in self._pending.values():
132	            if not fut.done():
133	                fut.set_exception(RuntimeError("Client stopped"))
134	        self._pending.clear()
135	
136	    @property
137	    def is_running(self) -> bool:
138	        """True if the read loop is active."""
139	        return self._running
140	
141	    # -- Internal -----------------------------------------------------------
142	
143	    async def _read_loop(self) -> None:
144	        """Continuously read JSON lines from stdout and dispatch them."""
145	        try:
146	            while self._running:
147	                line = await self._stdout.readline()
148	                if not line:
149	                    break  # EOF: process died
150	                line_str = line.decode("utf-8").strip()
151	                if not line_str:
152	                    continue
153	                try:
154	                    msg = json.loads(line_str)
155	                    await self._dispatch(msg)
156	                except json.JSONDecodeError:
157	                    logger.warning(
158	                        "[rpc] invalid JSON from sidecar: %s", line_str[:200]
159	                    )
160	        except Exception:
161	            if self._running:
162	                logger.exception("[rpc] read loop crashed")
163	        finally:
164	            self._running = False
165	            # Cancel all pending futures
166	            for fut in self._pending.values():
167	                if not fut.done():
168	                    fut.set_exception(RuntimeError("Sidecar disconnected"))
169	            self._pending.clear()
170	
171	    async def _dispatch(self, msg: dict) -> None:
172	        """Dispatch an incoming message: event notification or RPC response."""
173	        # Event notification (server-pushed, no id)
174	        if msg.get("method") == "event":
175	            params = msg.get("params", {})
176	            event = params.get("event", {})
177	            event_type: str = ""
178	            if isinstance(event, dict):
179	                event_type = event.get("type", "")
180	            handlers = self._handlers.get(event_type, [])
181	            session_id = params.get("session_id", "")
182	            for handler in handlers:
183	                try:
184	                    if asyncio.iscoroutinefunction(handler):
185	                        await handler(session_id, event)
186	                    else:
187	                        handler(session_id, event)
188	                except Exception:
189	                    logger.exception(
190	                        "[rpc] event handler error: type=%s", event_type
191	                    )
192	            return
193	
194	        # RPC response (has id)
195	        msg_id = msg.get("id")
196	        if msg_id is not None and msg_id in self._pending:
197	            fut = self._pending.pop(msg_id)
198	            if "error" in msg:
199	                error = msg["error"]
200	                fut.set_exception(
201	                    JsonRpcError(
202	                        error.get("message", "RPC error"),
203	                        error.get("data"),
204	                    )
205	                )
206	            else:
207	                fut.set_result(msg.get("result", {}))
208	
```
